title: Repurposing 3D Generative Model for Autoregressive Layout Generation
summary: We introduce LaviGen, a framework that repurposes 3D generative models for 3D layout generation. Unlike previous methods that infer object layouts from textual descriptions, LaviGen operates directly in the native 3D space, formulating layout generation as an autoregressive process that explicitly models geometric relations and physical constraints among objects, producing coherent and physically plausible 3D scenes. To further enhance this process, we propose an adapted 3D diffusion model that integrates scene, object, and instruction information and employs a dual-guidance self-rollout distillation mechanism to improve efficiency and spatial accuracy. Extensive experiments on the LayoutVLM benchmark show LaviGen achieves superior 3D layout generation performance, with 19% higher physical plausibility than the state of the art and 65% faster computation. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/fenghora/LaviGen.

AI.tldr: LaviGen是一个将3D生成模型重新用于3D布局生成的框架，通过自回归过程在原生3D空间中建模几何关系和物理约束，实现高效、物理合理的场景布局生成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常从文本描述推断对象布局，缺乏对3D空间中几何关系和物理约束的显式建模，导致生成的布局可能不连贯或物理不合理。
AI.method: 1. 在原生3D空间中构建自回归布局生成过程，显式建模对象间的几何关系和物理约束；2. 提出改进的3D扩散模型，整合场景、对象和指令信息；3. 采用双引导自展开蒸馏机制提高效率和空间准确性。
AI.result: 在LayoutVLM基准测试中，LaviGen在3D布局生成方面表现优异：物理合理性比现有最佳方法提高19%，计算速度加快65%。
AI.conclusion: LaviGen通过重新利用3D生成模型并在原生3D空间中显式建模几何和物理约束，能够生成更连贯、物理合理的3D场景布局，在性能和效率方面均显著优于现有方法。

title: FineCog-Nav: Integrating Fine-grained Cognitive Modules for Zero-shot Multimodal UAV Navigation
summary: UAV vision-language navigation (VLN) requires an agent to navigate complex 3D environments from an egocentric perspective while following ambiguous multi-step instructions over long horizons. Existing zero-shot methods remain limited, as they often rely on large base models, generic prompts, and loosely coordinated modules. In this work, we propose FineCog-Nav, a top-down framework inspired by human cognition that organizes navigation into fine-grained modules for language processing, perception, attention, memory, imagination, reasoning, and decision-making. Each module is driven by a moderate-sized foundation model with role-specific prompts and structured input-output protocols, enabling effective collaboration and improved interpretability. To support fine-grained evaluation, we construct AerialVLN-Fine, a curated benchmark of 300 trajectories derived from AerialVLN, with sentence-level instruction-trajectory alignment and refined instructions containing explicit visual endpoints and landmark references. Experiments show that FineCog-Nav consistently outperforms zero-shot baselines in instruction adherence, long-horizon planning, and generalization to unseen environments. These results suggest the effectiveness of fine-grained cognitive modularization for zero-shot aerial navigation. Project page: https://smartdianlab.github.io/projects-FineCogNav.

AI.tldr: FineCog-Nav：受人类认知启发的无人机视觉语言导航框架，通过细粒度模块化架构提升零样本导航性能
AI.motivation: 现有零样本无人机视觉语言导航方法存在局限性，主要依赖大型基础模型、通用提示和松散协调的模块，难以处理复杂3D环境中的多步模糊指令和长视野导航任务。
AI.method: 提出FineCog-Nav框架，采用自上而下的认知架构，将导航分解为语言处理、感知、注意力、记忆、想象、推理和决策等细粒度模块。每个模块由中等规模的基础模型驱动，配备角色特定的提示和结构化输入输出协议，实现有效协作和可解释性。同时构建AerialVLN-Fine基准数据集，包含300条轨迹，具有句子级指令-轨迹对齐和包含明确视觉端点及地标参考的精细化指令。
AI.result: 实验表明，FineCog-Nav在指令遵循、长视野规划和未见环境泛化方面持续优于零样本基线方法。这些结果验证了细粒度认知模块化在零样本空中导航中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 细粒度认知模块化架构能够有效提升无人机视觉语言导航的零样本性能，通过将复杂导航任务分解为专门化的认知模块，并采用中等规模模型与角色特定提示，实现了更好的指令遵循和长视野规划能力。

title: Enhancing Hazy Wildlife Imagery: AnimalHaze3k and IncepDehazeGan
summary: Atmospheric haze significantly degrades wildlife imagery, impeding computer vision applications critical for conservation, such as animal detection, tracking, and behavior analysis. To address this challenge, we introduce AnimalHaze3k a synthetic dataset comprising of 3,477 hazy images generated from 1,159 clear wildlife photographs through a physics-based pipeline. Our novel IncepDehazeGan architecture combines inception blocks with residual skip connections in a GAN framework, achieving state-of-the-art performance (SSIM: 0.8914, PSNR: 20.54, and LPIPS: 0.1104), delivering 6.27% higher SSIM and 10.2% better PSNR than competing approaches. When applied to downstream detection tasks, dehazed images improved YOLOv11 detection mAP by 112% and IoU by 67%. These advances can provide ecologists with reliable tools for population monitoring and surveillance in challenging environmental conditions, demonstrating significant potential for enhancing wildlife conservation efforts through robust visual analytics.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了AnimalHaze3k合成数据集和IncepDehazeGan架构，用于解决野生动物图像中的大气雾霾问题，显著提升了图像去雾效果和下游检测任务性能。
AI.motivation: 大气雾霾严重降低了野生动物图像质量，阻碍了用于动物保护的关键计算机视觉应用（如动物检测、跟踪和行为分析）。需要开发专门针对野生动物图像的雾霾去除方法。
AI.method: 1) 创建AnimalHaze3k合成数据集：包含3,477张雾霾图像，基于1,159张清晰野生动物照片通过物理模拟管道生成；2) 提出IncepDehazeGan架构：在GAN框架中结合inception模块和残差跳跃连接，专门用于野生动物图像去雾。
AI.result: IncepDehazeGan在SSIM(0.8914)、PSNR(20.54)和LPIPS(0.1104)指标上达到最先进性能，比竞争方法SSIM提高6.27%，PSNR提高10.2%。去雾后的图像使YOLOv11检测mAP提高112%，IoU提高67%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为生态学家在恶劣环境条件下进行种群监测和监视提供了可靠工具，通过鲁棒的视觉分析显著增强了野生动物保护工作的潜力。

title: VEFX-Bench: A Holistic Benchmark for Generic Video Editing and Visual Effects
summary: As AI-assisted video creation becomes increasingly practical, instruction-guided video editing has become essential for refining generated or captured footage to meet professional requirements. Yet the field still lacks both a large-scale human-annotated dataset with complete editing examples and a standardized evaluator for comparing editing systems. Existing resources are limited by small scale, missing edited outputs, or the absence of human quality labels, while current evaluation often relies on expensive manual inspection or generic vision-language model judges that are not specialized for editing quality. We introduce VEFX-Dataset, a human-annotated dataset containing 5,049 video editing examples across 9 major editing categories and 32 subcategories, each labeled along three decoupled dimensions: Instruction Following, Rendering Quality, and Edit Exclusivity. Building on VEFX-Dataset, we propose VEFX-Reward, a reward model designed specifically for video editing quality assessment. VEFX-Reward jointly processes the source video, the editing instruction, and the edited video, and predicts per-dimension quality scores via ordinal regression. We further release VEFX-Bench, a benchmark of 300 curated video-prompt pairs for standardized comparison of editing systems. Experiments show that VEFX-Reward aligns more strongly with human judgments than generic VLM judges and prior reward models on both standard IQA/VQA metrics and group-wise preference evaluation. Using VEFX-Reward as an evaluator, we benchmark representative commercial and open-source video editing systems, revealing a persistent gap between visual plausibility, instruction following, and edit locality in current models.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了VEFX-Dataset、VEFX-Reward和VEFX-Bench三个工具，旨在解决视频编辑领域缺乏大规模人工标注数据集和标准化评估器的问题。
AI.motivation: 随着AI辅助视频创作日益实用，指令引导的视频编辑对于精炼生成或拍摄的素材以满足专业需求变得至关重要。然而该领域仍缺乏包含完整编辑示例的大规模人工标注数据集和用于比较编辑系统的标准化评估器。现有资源受限于规模小、缺少编辑输出或缺乏人工质量标签，而当前评估通常依赖昂贵的人工检查或非专门针对编辑质量的通用视觉语言模型评估器。
AI.method: 1) 引入VEFX-Dataset：包含5,049个视频编辑示例，涵盖9个主要编辑类别和32个子类别，每个示例在三个解耦维度上标注：指令遵循、渲染质量和编辑排他性。2) 基于VEFX-Dataset提出VEFX-Reward：专门为视频编辑质量评估设计的奖励模型，联合处理源视频、编辑指令和编辑后的视频，通过序数回归预测每个维度的质量分数。3) 发布VEFX-Bench：包含300个精选视频-提示对的基准测试，用于标准化比较编辑系统。
AI.result: 实验表明，VEFX-Reward在标准IQA/VQA指标和组间偏好评估上比通用VLM评估器和先前的奖励模型更符合人类判断。使用VEFX-Reward作为评估器，对代表性商业和开源视频编辑系统进行基准测试，揭示了当前模型在视觉合理性、指令遵循和编辑局部性方面存在持续差距。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过提供大规模人工标注数据集、专门设计的质量评估奖励模型和标准化基准测试，为指令引导视频编辑领域建立了重要的基础设施，有助于推动该领域的研究和系统开发。

title: Information Router for Mitigating Modality Dominance in Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision Language models (VLMs) have demonstrated strong performance across a wide range of benchmarks, yet they often suffer from modality dominance, where predictions rely disproportionately on a single modality. Prior approaches primarily address this issue by steering model's attention allocation, implicitly assuming that all modalities provide sufficient information. However, attention only determines where the model focuses, and cannot enrich information that is missing or ambiguous. In the real world, input modalities often differ in information density and their signal-to-noise ratios. In such cases, simply adjusting model's attention does not resolve the underlying lack of information. In this paper, we propose \textsc{MoIR}: \textit{Multi-modal Information Router}, an information-level fusion method that explicitly reduces information disparity prior to fusion. \textsc{MoIR} identifies less informative tokens and routes complementary information from a stronger modality, constructing information-dense token representations before they are processed by a large language model. By modifying information availability, \textsc{MoIR} enables reliable shifts in modality dominance, even when one modality is degraded. We evaluate \textsc{MoIR} on three widely used multi-modal benchmarks across multiple model backbones. Experimental results show that \textsc{MoIR} consistently demonstrates more balanced modality contribution, and improves robustness and downstream performance, particularly even under modality degradation. These findings demonstrate that explicitly modifying cross-modal information is an effective and complementary strategy for mitigating modality dominance in multi-modal reasoning models.

AI.tldr: MoIR是一种多模态信息路由方法，通过识别信息不足的token并从强模态路由补充信息，在融合前显式减少模态间信息差异，解决传统注意力方法无法处理信息缺失的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM存在模态主导问题，传统方法通过调整注意力分配来缓解，但注意力只能决定模型关注点，无法丰富缺失或模糊的信息。现实世界中不同模态的信息密度和信噪比存在差异，仅调整注意力无法解决底层信息不足问题。
AI.method: 提出MoIR（多模态信息路由器），一种信息级融合方法。识别信息不足的token，从信息更强的模态路由补充信息，在大型语言模型处理前构建信息密集的token表示。通过修改信息可用性，实现可靠的模态主导转移。
AI.result: 在三个广泛使用的多模态基准测试和多个模型骨干上评估MoIR。实验结果显示MoIR能实现更平衡的模态贡献，提高鲁棒性和下游性能，特别是在模态退化情况下表现更佳。
AI.conclusion: 显式修改跨模态信息是缓解多模态推理模型中模态主导问题的有效补充策略。MoIR通过信息级路由解决了传统注意力方法的局限性，在信息密度不均的真实场景中表现优越。

title: Do Vision-Language Models Truly Perform Vision Reasoning? A Rigorous Study of the Modality Gap
summary: Reasoning in vision-language models (VLMs) has recently attracted significant attention due to its broad applicability across diverse downstream tasks. However, it remains unclear whether the superior performance of VLMs stems from genuine vision-grounded reasoning or relies predominantly on the reasoning capabilities of their textual backbones. To systematically measure this, we introduce CrossMath, a novel multimodal reasoning benchmark designed for controlled cross-modal comparisons. Specifically, we construct each problem in text-only, image-only, and image+text formats guaranteeing identical task-relevant information, verified by human annotators. This rigorous alignment effectively isolates modality-specific reasoning differences while eliminating confounding factors such as information mismatch. Extensive evaluation of state-of-the-art VLMs reveals a consistent phenomenon: a substantial performance gap between textual and visual reasoning. Notably, VLMs excel with text-only inputs, whereas incorporating visual data (image+text) frequently degrades performance compared to the text-only baseline. These findings indicate that current VLMs conduct reasoning primarily in the textual space, with limited genuine reliance on visual evidence. To mitigate this limitation, we curate a CrossMath training set for VLM fine-tuning. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that fine-tuning on this training set significantly boosts reasoning performance across all individual and joint modalities, while yielding robust gains on two general visual reasoning tasks. Source code is available at https://github.com/xuyige/CrossMath.

AI.tldr: CrossMath是一个新颖的多模态推理基准，用于系统评估视觉语言模型是否真正依赖视觉证据进行推理，还是主要依靠文本骨干的推理能力。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型在多种下游任务中表现出色，但尚不清楚其优越性能是源于真正的视觉基础推理，还是主要依赖其文本骨干的推理能力。需要系统测量这种跨模态推理差异。
AI.method: 构建CrossMath基准，将每个问题设计为纯文本、纯图像和图像+文本三种格式，保证任务相关信息完全一致，通过人工标注验证对齐。这种严格对齐有效隔离了模态特定的推理差异，消除了信息不匹配等混杂因素。
AI.result: 对最先进视觉语言模型的广泛评估揭示了一个一致现象：文本推理和视觉推理之间存在显著性能差距。模型在纯文本输入下表现出色，而加入视觉数据（图像+文本）通常会导致性能下降。这表明当前视觉语言模型主要在文本空间进行推理，对视觉证据的真实依赖有限。
AI.conclusion: 当前视觉语言模型主要依赖文本推理能力，而非真正的视觉基础推理。通过CrossMath训练集进行微调可以显著提升所有模态的推理性能，并在通用视觉推理任务上获得稳健增益。

title: Where Do Vision-Language Models Fail? World Scale Analysis for Image Geolocalization
comment: Accepted to the CVPR EarthVision 2026 Workshop
summary: Image geolocalization has traditionally been addressed through retrieval-based place recognition or geometry-based visual localization pipelines. Recent advances in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated strong zero-shot reasoning capabilities across multimodal tasks, yet their performance in geographic inference remains underexplored. In this work, we present a systematic evaluation of multiple state-of-the-art VLMs for country-level image geolocalization using ground-view imagery only. Instead of relying on image matching, GPS metadata, or task-specific training, we evaluate prompt-based country prediction in a zero-shot setting. The selected models are tested on three geographically diverse datasets to assess their robustness and generalization ability. Our results reveal substantial variation across models, highlighting the potential of semantic reasoning for coarse geolocalization and the limitations of current VLMs in capturing fine-grained geographic cues. This study provides the first focused comparison of modern VLMs for country-level geolocalization and establishes a foundation for future research at the intersection of multimodal reasoning and geographic understanding.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统评估了多种最先进的视觉语言模型在仅使用地面视角图像进行国家级别地理定位的零样本能力，发现不同模型表现差异显著，揭示了语义推理在粗粒度地理定位中的潜力及现有模型在捕捉细粒度地理线索方面的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统图像地理定位方法主要依赖基于检索的地点识别或基于几何的视觉定位流程。尽管视觉语言模型在多模态任务中展现出强大的零样本推理能力，但其在地理推断方面的性能尚未得到充分探索。本研究旨在填补这一空白，系统评估VLMs在国家级别图像地理定位中的表现。
AI.method: 采用零样本设置下的提示词驱动国家预测方法，不依赖图像匹配、GPS元数据或任务特定训练。选取多个最先进的视觉语言模型，在三个地理多样性数据集上进行测试，评估其鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.result: 不同模型表现存在显著差异，揭示了语义推理在粗粒度地理定位中的潜力。同时发现当前VLMs在捕捉细粒度地理线索方面存在局限性，为多模态推理与地理理解的交叉研究提供了基础。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次对现代视觉语言模型在国家级别地理定位任务上进行了集中比较，证实了语义推理在粗粒度地理定位中的有效性，同时指出了当前模型在细粒度地理理解方面的不足，为未来多模态推理与地理理解的交叉研究奠定了基础。

title: Find, Fix, Reason: Context Repair for Video Reasoning
summary: Reinforcement learning has advanced video reasoning in large multi-modal models, yet dominant pipelines either rely on on-policy self-exploration, which plateaus at the model's knowledge boundary, or hybrid replay that mixes policies and demands careful regularization. Dynamic context methods zoom into focused evidence but often require curated pretraining and two-stage tuning, and their context remains bounded by a small model's capability. In contrast, larger models excel at instruction following and multi-modal understanding, can supply richer context to smaller models, and rapidly zoom in on target regions via simple tools. Building on this capability, we introduce an observation-level intervention: a frozen, tool-integrated teacher identifies the missing spatiotemporal dependency and provides a minimal evidence patch (e.g., timestamps, regions etc.) from the original video while the question remains unchanged. The student answers again with the added context, and training updates with a chosen-rollout scheme integrated into Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). We further propose a Robust Improvement Reward (RIR) that aligns optimization with two goals: outcome validity through correct answers and dependency alignment through rationales that reflect the cited evidence. Advantages are group-normalized across the batch, preserving on-policy exploration while directing it along causally meaningful directions with minimal changes to the training stack. Experiments on various related benchmarks show consistent accuracy gains and strong generalization. Web page and source code will be available at https://github.com/JethroJames/FFR.git.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于冻结工具集成教师的观察级干预方法，通过提供最小证据补丁来增强视频推理能力，结合GRPO和RIR奖励实现准确率提升
AI.motivation: 现有视频推理方法存在局限性：基于策略的自我探索受限于模型知识边界；混合重放需要精心正则化；动态上下文方法需要精心预训练且受限于小模型能力。大模型在指令遵循和多模态理解方面表现优异，能够为小模型提供更丰富的上下文
AI.method: 提出观察级干预：冻结的工具集成教师识别缺失的时空依赖关系，从原始视频中提供最小证据补丁（时间戳、区域等）。学生使用添加的上下文重新回答，通过集成到GRPO中的chosen-rollout方案进行训练。进一步提出稳健改进奖励（RIR），通过正确答案确保结果有效性，通过反映引用证据的推理确保依赖对齐
AI.result: 在多个相关基准测试中显示出一致的准确率提升和强大的泛化能力
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持策略探索的同时，通过最小化训练堆栈的更改，沿因果有意义的方向引导探索，实现了视频推理的显著改进

title: CollideNet: Hierarchical Multi-scale Video Representation Learning with Disentanglement for Time-To-Collision Forecasting
summary: Time-to-Collision (TTC) forecasting is a critical task in collision prevention, requiring precise temporal prediction and comprehending both local and global patterns encapsulated in a video, both spatially and temporally. To address the multi-scale nature of video, we introduce a novel spatiotemporal hierarchical transformer-based architecture called CollideNet, specifically catered for effective TTC forecasting. In the spatial stream, CollideNet aggregates information for each video frame simultaneously at multiple resolutions. In the temporal stream, along with multi-scale feature encoding, CollideNet also disentangles the non-stationarity, trend, and seasonality components. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in comparison to prior works on three commonly used public datasets, setting a new state-of-the-art by a considerable margin. We conduct cross-dataset evaluations to analyze the generalization capabilities of our method, and visualize the effects of disentanglement of the trend and seasonality components of the video data. We release our code at https://github.com/DeSinister/CollideNet/.

AI.tldr: CollideNet：一种用于碰撞时间预测的新型时空分层Transformer架构，通过多尺度空间特征聚合和时序分量解耦实现SOTA性能
AI.motivation: 碰撞时间预测需要精确的时间预测和对视频中局部与全局时空模式的理解，现有方法在处理视频多尺度特性方面存在不足
AI.method: 提出CollideNet：1）空间流中同时聚合多分辨率帧信息；2）时间流中进行多尺度特征编码，并解耦非平稳性、趋势和季节性分量
AI.result: 在三个常用公共数据集上实现SOTA性能，显著超越先前工作；通过跨数据集评估验证泛化能力；可视化趋势和季节性分量解耦效果
AI.conclusion: CollideNet通过时空分层Transformer架构有效处理视频多尺度特性，在碰撞时间预测任务中取得显著性能提升，具有良好的泛化能力

title: A Two-Stage, Object-Centric Deep Learning Framework for Robust Exam Cheating Detection
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures. Accepted at the FISU Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (FJCAI 2026), Vietnam
summary: Academic integrity continues to face the persistent challenge of examination cheating. Traditional invigilation relies on human observation, which is inefficient, costly, and prone to errors at scale. Although some existing AI-powered monitoring systems have been deployed and trusted, many lack transparency or require multi-layered architectures to achieve the desired performance. To overcome these challenges, we propose an improvement over a simple two-stage framework for exam cheating detection that integrates object detection and behavioral analysis using well-known technologies. First, the state-of-the-art YOLOv8n model is used to localize students in exam-room images. Each detected region is cropped and preprocessed, then classified by a fine-tuned RexNet-150 model as either normal or cheating behavior. The system is trained on a dataset compiled from 10 independent sources with a total of 273,897 samples, achieving 0.95 accuracy, 0.94 recall, 0.96 precision, and 0.95 F1-score - a 13\% increase over a baseline accuracy of 0.82 in video-based cheating detection. In addition, with an average inference time of 13.9 ms per sample, the proposed approach demonstrates robustness and scalability for deployment in large-scale environments. Beyond the technical contribution, the AI-assisted monitoring system also addresses ethical concerns by ensuring that final outcomes are delivered privately to individual students after the examination, for example, via personal email. This prevents public exposure or shaming and offers students an opportunity to reflect on their behavior. For further improvement, it is possible to incorporate additional factors, such as audio data and consecutive frames, to achieve greater accuracy. This study provides a foundation for developing real-time, scalable, ethical, and open-source solutions.

AI.tldr: 提出基于YOLOv8n和RexNet-150的两阶段考试作弊检测框架，在27万+样本数据集上达到95%准确率，比基线提升13%，推理时间13.9ms/样本，兼顾隐私保护。
AI.motivation: 传统人工监考效率低、成本高且易出错；现有AI监控系统缺乏透明度或需要复杂架构。需要开发高效、透明、可扩展的考试作弊检测方案。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：1) 使用YOLOv8n定位考场图像中的学生区域；2) 裁剪预处理后，用微调的RexNet-150模型分类正常/作弊行为。数据集来自10个独立源共273,897个样本。
AI.result: 准确率0.95，召回率0.94，精确率0.96，F1分数0.95，比视频基线准确率0.82提升13%。平均推理时间13.9ms/样本，适合大规模部署。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为开发实时、可扩展、符合伦理的开源解决方案奠定基础。通过私密反馈避免公开羞辱，未来可整合音频和连续帧数据提升准确性。

title: Dental Panoramic Radiograph Analysis Using YOLO26 From Tooth Detection to Disease Diagnosis
summary: Panoramic radiography is a fundamental diagnostic tool in dentistry, offering a comprehensive view of the entire dentition with minimal radiation exposure. However, manual interpretation is time-consuming and prone to errors, especially in high-volume clinical settings. This creates a pressing need for efficient automated solutions. This study presents the first application of YOLOv26 for automated tooth detection, FDI-based numbering, and dental disease segmentation in panoramic radiographs. The DENTEX dataset was preprocessed using Roboflow for format conversion and augmentation, yielding 1,082 images for tooth enumeration and 1,040 images for disease segmentation across four pathology classes. Five YOLOv26-seg variants were trained on Google Colab using transfer learning at a resolution of 800x800. Results demonstrate that the YOLOv26m-seg model achieved the best performance for tooth enumeration, with a precision of 0.976, recall of 0.970, and box mAP50 of 0.976. It outperformed the YOLOv8x baseline by 4.9% in precision and 3.3% in mAP50, while also enabling high-quality mask-level segmentation (mask mAP50 = 0.970). For disease segmentation, the YOLOv26l-seg model attained a box mAP50 of 0.591 and a mask mAP50 of 0.547. Impacted teeth showed the highest per-class average precision (0.943), indicating that visual distinctiveness influences detection performance more than annotation quantity. Overall, these findings demonstrate that YOLOv26-based models offer a robust and accurate framework for automated dental image analysis, with strong potential to enhance diagnostic efficiency and consistency in clinical practice.

AI.tldr: YOLOv26首次应用于全景X光片的自动牙齿检测、FDI编号和牙科疾病分割，在牙齿枚举和疾病分割任务上均表现出色，优于YOLOv8基线模型。
AI.motivation: 全景X光片是牙科基础诊断工具，但人工解读耗时且易出错，特别是在高流量临床环境中，需要高效的自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 使用DENTEX数据集，通过Roboflow进行格式转换和数据增强，得到1082张牙齿枚举图像和1040张疾病分割图像。在Google Colab上使用迁移学习训练了5个YOLOv26-seg变体，分辨率为800x800。
AI.result: YOLOv26m-seg模型在牙齿枚举任务中表现最佳：精度0.976，召回率0.970，框mAP50 0.976，比YOLOv8x基线模型精度提高4.9%，mAP50提高3.3%。YOLOv26l-seg模型在疾病分割任务中框mAP50为0.591，掩码mAP50为0.547。阻生牙的平均精度最高（0.943）。
AI.conclusion: 基于YOLOv26的模型为自动牙科图像分析提供了稳健准确的框架，在提高临床诊断效率和一致性方面具有强大潜力。

title: AIFIND: Artifact-Aware Interpreting Fine-Grained Alignment for Incremental Face Forgery Detection
summary: As forgery types continue to emerge consistently, Incremental Face Forgery Detection (IFFD) has become a crucial paradigm. However, existing methods typically rely on data replay or coarse binary supervision, which fails to explicitly constrain the feature space, leading to severe feature drift and catastrophic forgetting. To address this, we propose AIFIND, Artifact-Aware Interpreting Fine-Grained Alignment for Incremental Face Forgery Detection, which leverages semantic anchors to stabilize incremental learning. We design the Artifact-Driven Semantic Prior Generator to instantiate invariant semantic anchors, establishing a fixed coordinate system from low-level artifact cues. These anchors are injected into the image encoder via Artifact-Probe Attention, which explicitly constrains volatile visual features to align with stable semantic anchors. Adaptive Decision Harmonizer harmonizes the classifiers by preserving angular relationships of semantic anchors, maintaining geometric consistency across tasks. Extensive experiments on multiple incremental protocols validate the superiority of AIFIND.

AI.tldr: AIFIND提出了一种基于语义锚点的增量人脸伪造检测方法，通过构建稳定的语义坐标系统来缓解特征漂移和灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有增量人脸伪造检测方法通常依赖数据回放或粗粒度的二元监督，无法显式约束特征空间，导致严重的特征漂移和灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.method: 提出AIFIND框架：1) 设计基于伪影驱动的语义先验生成器，从低级伪影线索实例化不变的语义锚点；2) 通过伪影-探针注意力将锚点注入图像编码器，显式约束易变的视觉特征与稳定语义锚点对齐；3) 自适应决策协调器通过保持语义锚点的角度关系来协调分类器，维持跨任务的几何一致性。
AI.result: 在多个增量协议上的广泛实验验证了AIFIND的优越性。
AI.conclusion: AIFIND通过语义锚点稳定增量学习，有效解决了增量人脸伪造检测中的特征漂移和灾难性遗忘问题。

title: DENALI: A Dataset Enabling Non-Line-of-Sight Spatial Reasoning with Low-Cost LiDARs
summary: Consumer LiDARs in mobile devices and robots typically output a single depth value per pixel. Yet internally, they record full time-resolved histograms containing direct and multi-bounce light returns; these multi-bounce returns encode rich non-line-of-sight (NLOS) cues that can enable perception of hidden objects in a scene. However, severe hardware limitations of consumer LiDARs make NLOS reconstruction with conventional methods difficult. In this work, we motivate a complementary direction: enabling NLOS perception with low-cost LiDARs through data-driven inference. We present DENALI, the first large-scale real-world dataset of space-time histograms from low-cost LiDARs capturing hidden objects. We capture time-resolved LiDAR histograms for 72,000 hidden-object scenes across diverse object shapes, positions, lighting conditions, and spatial resolutions. Using our dataset, we show that consumer LiDARs can enable accurate, data-driven NLOS perception. We further identify key scene and modeling factors that limit performance, as well as simulation-fidelity gaps that hinder current sim-to-real transfer, motivating future work toward scalable NLOS vision with consumer LiDARs.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了DENALI数据集，用于研究如何利用低成本消费级LiDAR的时空直方图数据进行数据驱动的非视距感知。
AI.motivation: 消费级LiDAR内部记录包含直接和多跳光返回的完整时间分辨直方图，这些多跳返回编码了丰富的非视距线索，可以感知场景中的隐藏物体。然而，消费级LiDAR的硬件限制使得传统方法的非视距重建变得困难。
AI.method: 提出了DENALI数据集，这是第一个大规模真实世界的低成本LiDAR时空直方图数据集，捕获了72,000个隐藏物体场景，涵盖不同物体形状、位置、光照条件和空间分辨率。
AI.result: 研究表明消费级LiDAR能够实现准确的数据驱动非视距感知，并识别了限制性能的关键场景和建模因素，以及当前仿真到真实转换存在的保真度差距。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为利用消费级LiDAR实现可扩展的非视距视觉提供了数据集基础，并指出了未来研究方向，特别是仿真到真实转换的改进。

title: Saturation-Aware Space-Variant Blind Image Deblurring
summary: This paper presents a novel saturation aware space variant blind image deblurring framework designed to address challenges posed by saturated pixels in deblurring under high dynamic range and low light conditions. The proposed approach effectively segments the image based on blur intensity and proximity to saturation, leveraging a pre estimated Light Spread Function to mitigate stray light effects. By accurately estimating the true radiance of saturated regions using the dark channel prior, our method enhances the deblurring process without introducing artifacts like ringing. Experimental evaluations on both synthetic and real world datasets demonstrate that the framework improves deblurring outcomes across various scenarios showcasing superior performance compared to state of the art saturation-aware and general purpose methods. This adaptability highlights the framework potential integration with existing and emerging blind image deblurring techniques.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种针对饱和像素的盲图像去模糊框架，通过分割图像区域并利用光扩散函数和暗通道先验来准确估计饱和区域的真实辐射度，有效减少振铃伪影。
AI.motivation: 在高动态范围和低光照条件下，饱和像素给图像去模糊带来挑战，传统方法在处理饱和区域时容易产生振铃等伪影，需要专门针对饱和感知的去模糊方法。
AI.method: 基于模糊强度和饱和接近度对图像进行分割，利用预估计的光扩散函数减轻杂散光效应，使用暗通道先验准确估计饱和区域的真实辐射度，避免引入振铃伪影。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上的实验评估表明，该框架在各种场景下都能改善去模糊效果，性能优于现有的饱和感知和通用去模糊方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架展示了处理饱和像素的有效性，具有与现有和新兴盲图像去模糊技术集成的潜力，为高动态范围和低光照条件下的图像去模糊提供了新思路。

title: Winner of CVPR2026 NTIRE Challenge on Image Shadow Removal: Semantic and Geometric Guidance for Shadow Removal via Cascaded Refinement
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables, accepted at the CVPR 2026 Workshops (NTIRE 2026 Image Shadow Removal Challenge). Code and materials are available at https://github.com/AIT-Assistive-Autonomous-Systems/SGCR-SR
summary: We present a three-stage progressive shadow-removal pipeline for the CVPR2026 NTIRE WSRD+ challenge. Built on OmniSR, our method treats deshadowing as iterative direct refinement, where later stages correct residual artefacts left by earlier predictions. The model combines RGB appearance with frozen DINOv2 semantic guidance and geometric cues from monocular depth and surface normals, reused across all stages. To stabilise multi-stage optimisation, we introduce a contraction-constrained objective that encourages non-increasing reconstruction error across the cascade. A staged training pipeline transfers from earlier WSRD pretraining to WSRD+ supervision and final WSRD+ 2026 adaptation with cosine-annealed checkpoint ensembling. On the official WSRD+ 2026 hidden test set, our final ensemble achieved 26.680 PSNR, 0.8740 SSIM, 0.0578 LPIPS, and 26.135 FID, ranked first overall, and won the NTIRE 2026 Image Shadow Removal Challenge. The strong performance of the proposed model is further validated on the ISTD+ and UAV-SC+ datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种三阶段渐进式阴影去除管道，用于CVPR2026 NTIRE WSRD+挑战赛。该方法基于OmniSR，将去阴影视为迭代直接细化过程，结合RGB外观、冻结的DINOv2语义引导以及单目深度和表面法线的几何线索，并引入收缩约束目标来稳定多阶段优化。
AI.motivation: 解决图像阴影去除问题，特别是在多阶段优化过程中保持稳定性和减少残留伪影。传统方法可能在迭代过程中产生累积误差，需要一种能够确保重建误差非递增的优化策略。
AI.method: 1. 三阶段渐进式阴影去除管道，基于OmniSR架构；2. 将去阴影视为迭代直接细化，后续阶段修正前期预测的残留伪影；3. 结合RGB外观、冻结的DINOv2语义引导、单目深度和表面法线的几何线索；4. 引入收缩约束目标，确保级联中重建误差非递增；5. 分阶段训练：从WSRD预训练到WSRD+监督，再到WSRD+ 2026适应，使用余弦退火检查点集成。
AI.result: 在官方WSRD+ 2026隐藏测试集上：PSNR 26.680，SSIM 0.8740，LPIPS 0.0578，FID 26.135，综合排名第一，赢得了NTIRE 2026图像阴影去除挑战赛。在ISTD+和UAV-SC+数据集上也验证了模型的强大性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的三阶段渐进式阴影去除方法通过结合多模态线索和收缩约束优化策略，在NTIRE 2026挑战赛中取得了最先进的性能，证明了该方法在阴影去除任务中的有效性和鲁棒性。

title: MARCH: Multi-Agent Radiology Clinical Hierarchy for CT Report Generation
summary: Automated 3D radiology report generation often suffers from clinical hallucinations and a lack of the iterative verification found in human practice. While recent Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have advanced the field, they typically operate as monolithic "black-box" systems without the collaborative oversight characteristic of clinical workflows. To address these challenges, we propose MARCH (Multi-Agent Radiology Clinical Hierarchy), a multi-agent framework that emulates the professional hierarchy of radiology departments and assigns specialized roles to distinct agents. MARCH utilizes a Resident Agent for initial drafting with multi-scale CT feature extraction, multiple Fellow Agents for retrieval-augmented revision, and an Attending Agent that orchestrates an iterative, stance-based consensus discourse to resolve diagnostic discrepancies. On the RadGenome-ChestCT dataset, MARCH significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both clinical fidelity and linguistic accuracy. Our work demonstrates that modeling human-like organizational structures enhances the reliability of AI in high-stakes medical domains.

AI.tldr: MARCH是一个模仿放射科专业层级的多智能体框架，通过角色分工和迭代验证解决3D放射报告生成中的临床幻觉问题，显著提升临床保真度和语言准确性。
AI.motivation: 当前自动化3D放射报告生成存在临床幻觉问题，且缺乏人类实践中常见的迭代验证过程。现有的视觉语言模型通常是"黑盒"系统，不具备临床工作流程中的协作监督特性。
AI.method: 提出MARCH多智能体框架，模拟放射科专业层级：住院医师智能体负责多尺度CT特征提取的初始草稿，多个研究员智能体进行检索增强修订，主治医师智能体通过基于立场的共识对话协调迭代过程以解决诊断差异。
AI.result: 在RadGenome-ChestCT数据集上，MARCH在临床保真度和语言准确性方面显著优于最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 模拟人类组织结构的AI框架能够增强高风险医疗领域中AI的可靠性，多智能体协作方法为医疗AI系统提供了更可靠的架构。

title: neuralCAD-Edit: An Expert Benchmark for Multimodal-Instructed 3D CAD Model Editing
summary: We introduce neuralCAD-Edit, the first benchmark for editing 3D CAD models collected from expert CAD engineers. Instead of text conditioning as in prior works, we collect realistic CAD editing requests by capturing videos of professional designers, interacting directly with CAD models in CAD software, while talking, pointing and drawing. We recruited ten consenting designers to contribute to this contained study. We benchmark leading foundation models against human CAD experts carrying out edits, and find a large performance gap in both automatic metrics and human evaluations. Even the best foundation model (GPT 5.2) scores 53% lower (absolute) than CAD experts in human acceptance trials, demonstrating the challenge of neuralCAD-Edit. We hope neuralCAD-Edit will provide a solid foundation against which 3D CAD editing approaches and foundation models can be developed. Code/data: https://autodeskailab.github.io/neuralCAD-Edit

AI.tldr: 首个基于专业CAD工程师真实编辑行为的3D CAD模型编辑基准，通过捕捉设计师在CAD软件中的交互视频（包括语音、指向和绘图）收集编辑请求，而非传统的文本条件。
AI.motivation: 现有3D CAD编辑研究多基于文本条件，缺乏真实工程师在实际CAD软件中的交互数据。需要建立反映专业设计师真实工作流程的基准，以推动3D CAD编辑方法和基础模型的发展。
AI.method: 收集10位专业CAD设计师在CAD软件中直接操作模型时的视频数据（包括语音、指向和绘图），构建neuralCAD-Edit基准。将领先的基础模型与人类CAD专家在编辑任务上的表现进行对比评估。
AI.result: 基础模型与人类CAD专家存在显著性能差距：即使在人类接受度测试中，最佳基础模型（GPT 5.2）得分也比CAD专家低53%（绝对值）。自动指标和人工评估均显示较大差距。
AI.conclusion: neuralCAD-Edit基准揭示了当前基础模型在3D CAD编辑任务上的局限性，为3D CAD编辑方法和基础模型的开发提供了坚实的评估基础。该基准的挑战性表明该领域仍有很大发展空间。

title: Motion-Adapter: A Diffusion Model Adapter for Text-to-Motion Generation of Compound Actions
comment: 12 pages, 12 figures, Under review for publication in IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics
summary: Recent advances in generative motion synthesis have enabled the production of realistic human motions from diverse input modalities. However, synthesizing compound actions from texts, which integrate multiple concurrent actions into coherent full-body sequences, remains a major challenge. We identify two key limitations in current text-to-motion diffusion models: (i) catastrophic neglect, where earlier actions are overwritten by later ones due to improper handling of temporal information, and (ii) attention collapse, which arises from excessive feature fusion in cross-attention mechanisms. As a result, existing approaches often depend on overly detailed textual descriptions (e.g., raising right hand), explicit body-part specifications (e.g., editing the upper body), or the use of large language models (LLMs) for body-part interpretation. These strategies lead to deficient semantic representations of physical structures and kinematic mechanisms, limiting the ability to incorporate natural behaviors such as greeting while walking. To address these issues, we propose the Motion-Adapter, a plug-and-play module that guides text-to-motion diffusion models in generating compound actions by computing decoupled cross-attention maps, which serve as structural masks during the denoising process. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method consistently produces more faithful and coherent compound motions across diverse textual prompts, surpassing state-of-the-art approaches.

AI.tldr: Motion-Adapter：一个即插即用模块，通过解耦交叉注意力图作为结构掩码，解决文本到动作扩散模型中复合动作生成的灾难性遗忘和注意力崩溃问题
AI.motivation: 当前文本到动作扩散模型在生成复合动作（多个并发动作）时存在两个关键限制：1) 灾难性遗忘 - 早期动作被后期动作覆盖；2) 注意力崩溃 - 交叉注意力机制中过度特征融合导致的问题。现有方法依赖过于详细的文本描述、显式身体部位指定或LLM解释，导致物理结构和运动机制的语义表示不足，无法自然生成如"边走边打招呼"等复合行为。
AI.method: 提出Motion-Adapter即插即用模块，通过计算解耦的交叉注意力图，在去噪过程中作为结构掩码，引导文本到动作扩散模型生成复合动作。该方法不需要修改基础模型架构，可直接应用于现有扩散模型。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，该方法在多样化文本提示下能持续生成更忠实和连贯的复合动作，超越了现有最先进方法。Motion-Adapter有效解决了复合动作生成中的关键问题。
AI.conclusion: Motion-Adapter通过解耦交叉注意力机制和结构掩码策略，成功解决了文本到动作扩散模型中复合动作生成的灾难性遗忘和注意力崩溃问题，实现了更自然、连贯的复合动作合成，无需依赖详细文本描述或外部LLM解释。

title: From Articles to Canopies: Knowledge-Driven Pseudo-Labelling for Tree Species Classification using LLM Experts
summary: Hyperspectral tree species classification is challenging due to limited and imbalanced class labels, spectral mixing (overlapping light signatures from multiple species), and ecological heterogeneity (variability among ecological systems). Addressing these challenges requires methods that integrate biological and structural characteristics of vegetation, such as canopy architecture and interspecific interactions, rather than relying solely on spectral signatures. This paper presents a biologically informed, semi-supervised deep learning method that integrates multi-sensor Earth observation data, specifically hyperspectral imaging (HSI) and airborne laser scanning (ALS), with expert, ecological knowledge. The approach relies on biologically inspired pseudo-labelling over a precomputed canopy graph, yielding accurate classification at low training cost. In addition, ecological priors on species cohabitation are automatically derived from reliable sources using large language models (LLMs) and encoded as a cohabitation matrix with likelihoods of species occurring together. These priors are incorporated into the pseudo-labelling strategy, effectively introducing expert knowledge into the model. Experiments on a real-world forest dataset demonstrate 5.6% improvement over the best reference method. Expert evaluation of cohabitation priors reveals high accuracy with differences no larger than 15%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种生物信息引导的半监督深度学习方法，用于解决高光谱树种分类中标签有限、类别不平衡、光谱混合和生态异质性等挑战。该方法整合了高光谱成像和机载激光扫描数据，通过基于冠层图的生物启发伪标记和从大语言模型自动提取的物种共栖先验知识，实现了低训练成本下的准确分类。
AI.motivation: 高光谱树种分类面临四个主要挑战：1）有限的类别标签和类别不平衡问题；2）光谱混合（多个物种的光谱特征重叠）；3）生态异质性（生态系统间的变异性）。传统方法过度依赖光谱特征，忽略了植被的生物和结构特性（如冠层结构和种间相互作用），导致分类性能受限。
AI.method: 提出了一种生物信息引导的半监督深度学习方法：1）整合多传感器地球观测数据（高光谱成像HSI和机载激光扫描ALS）；2）基于预计算的冠层图进行生物启发伪标记；3）利用大语言模型从可靠来源自动提取物种共栖先验知识，编码为共栖矩阵（物种共同出现的概率）；4）将共栖先验知识融入伪标记策略，将专家知识引入模型。
AI.result: 在真实森林数据集上的实验表明：1）相比最佳基准方法，分类性能提升了5.6%；2）专家评估显示，自动提取的共栖先验知识具有高准确性，与专家知识差异不超过15%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过整合多传感器数据、生物启发伪标记和自动提取的生态先验知识，有效解决了高光谱树种分类的关键挑战。实验证明该方法在低训练成本下实现了显著性能提升，且自动提取的生态知识具有高可靠性，为生态遥感分类提供了新范式。

title: Using Large Language Models and Knowledge Graphs to Improve the Interpretability of Machine Learning Models in Manufacturing
summary: Explaining Machine Learning (ML) results in a transparent and user-friendly manner remains a challenging task of Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI). In this paper, we present a method to enhance the interpretability of ML models by using a Knowledge Graph (KG). We store domain-specific data along with ML results and their corresponding explanations, establishing a structured connection between domain knowledge and ML insights. To make these insights accessible to users, we designed a selective retrieval method in which relevant triplets are extracted from the KG and processed by a Large Language Model (LLM) to generate user-friendly explanations of ML results. We evaluated our method in a manufacturing environment using the XAI Question Bank. Beyond standard questions, we introduce more complex, tailored questions that highlight the strengths of our approach. We evaluated 33 questions, analyzing responses using quantitative metrics such as accuracy and consistency, as well as qualitative ones such as clarity and usefulness. Our contribution is both theoretical and practical: from a theoretical perspective, we present a novel approach for effectively enabling LLMs to dynamically access a KG in order to improve the explainability of ML results. From a practical perspective, we provide empirical evidence showing that such explanations can be successfully applied in real-world manufacturing environments, supporting better decision-making in manufacturing processes.

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用知识图谱增强机器学习模型可解释性的方法，通过结构化存储领域知识和ML结果，结合LLM生成用户友好的解释
AI.motivation: 机器学习结果的可解释性仍然是XAI领域的挑战，需要以透明和用户友好的方式解释ML结果，以支持更好的决策制定
AI.method: 使用知识图谱存储领域特定数据和ML结果及其解释，设计选择性检索方法从KG提取相关三元组，利用LLM处理生成用户友好的ML结果解释
AI.result: 在制造环境中使用XAI问题库评估了33个问题，通过准确性、一致性等定量指标以及清晰度、有用性等定性指标分析响应，证明方法在现实制造环境中的成功应用
AI.conclusion: 从理论角度提出了一种新颖的方法，使LLM能够动态访问KG以改进ML结果的可解释性；从实践角度提供了经验证据，表明此类解释可在现实制造环境中成功应用，支持制造过程中更好的决策制定

title: Learning to Reason with Insight for Informal Theorem Proving
summary: Although most of the automated theorem-proving approaches depend on formal proof systems, informal theorem proving can align better with large language models' (LLMs) strength in natural language processing. In this work, we identify a primary bottleneck in informal theorem proving as a lack of insight, namely the difficulty of recognizing the core techniques required to solve complex problems. To address this, we propose a novel framework designed to cultivate this essential reasoning skill and enable LLMs to perform insightful reasoning. We propose $\mathtt{DeepInsightTheorem}$, a hierarchical dataset that structures informal proofs by explicitly extracting core techniques and proof sketches alongside the final proof. To fully exploit this dataset, we design a Progressive Multi-Stage SFT strategy that mimics the human learning process, guiding the model from basic proof writing to insightful thinking. Our experiments on challenging mathematical benchmarks demonstrate that this insight-aware generation strategy significantly outperforms baselines. These results demonstrate that teaching models to identify and apply core techniques can substantially improve their mathematical reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出DeepInsightTheorem框架，通过层次化数据集和渐进式微调策略，解决LLMs在非形式化定理证明中缺乏洞察力的问题，显著提升数学推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有自动定理证明方法大多依赖形式化证明系统，而非形式化定理证明更符合LLMs的自然语言处理优势。研究发现非形式化定理证明的主要瓶颈在于缺乏洞察力，即难以识别解决复杂问题所需的核心技术。
AI.method: 提出DeepInsightTheorem层次化数据集，明确提取核心技术、证明草图和最终证明；设计渐进式多阶段监督微调策略，模拟人类学习过程，从基础证明写作引导到洞察性思维。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的数学基准测试中，这种洞察感知的生成策略显著优于基线方法，证明教导模型识别和应用核心技术可以大幅提升其数学推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过培养LLMs的洞察性推理能力，特别是识别和应用核心技术的能力，可以有效提升其在非形式化定理证明中的表现，为解决复杂数学问题提供了新思路。

title: Polyglot: Multilingual Style Preserving Speech-Driven Facial Animation
comment: The project website is available at https://fedenoce.github.io/polyglot/
summary: Speech-Driven Facial Animation (SDFA) has gained significant attention due to its applications in movies, video games, and virtual reality. However, most existing models are trained on single-language data, limiting their effectiveness in real-world multilingual scenarios. In this work, we address multilingual SDFA, which is essential for realistic generation since language influences phonetics, rhythm, intonation, and facial expressions. Speaking style is also shaped by individual differences, not only by language. Existing methods typically rely on either language-specific or speaker-specific conditioning, but not both, limiting their ability to model their interaction. We introduce Polyglot, a unified diffusion-based architecture for personalized multilingual SDFA. Our method uses transcript embeddings to encode language information and style embeddings extracted from reference facial sequences to capture individual speaking characteristics. Polyglot does not require predefined language or speaker labels, enabling generalization across languages and speakers through self-supervised learning. By jointly conditioning on language and style, it captures expressive traits such as rhythm, articulation, and habitual facial movements, producing temporally coherent and realistic animations. Experiments show improved performance in both monolingual and multilingual settings, providing a unified framework for modeling language and personal style in SDFA.

AI.tldr: Polyglot：一种基于扩散的统一架构，用于个性化多语言语音驱动面部动画，通过联合条件化语言和风格信息，无需预定义标签即可实现跨语言和说话者的泛化。
AI.motivation: 现有SDFA模型大多基于单语言数据训练，限制了其在现实多语言场景中的应用效果。语言影响语音学、节奏、语调和面部表情，而说话风格还受个体差异影响。现有方法通常只依赖语言特定或说话者特定的条件化，无法建模两者的交互作用。
AI.method: 提出Polyglot统一扩散架构，使用转录文本嵌入编码语言信息，从参考面部序列提取风格嵌入捕捉个体说话特征。无需预定义语言或说话者标签，通过自监督学习实现跨语言和说话者的泛化。联合条件化语言和风格信息，捕捉节奏、发音和习惯性面部运动等表达特征。
AI.result: 实验表明在单语言和多语言设置下均取得改进性能，提供统一的框架来建模SDFA中的语言和个人风格，生成时间一致且逼真的动画。
AI.conclusion: Polyglot通过联合建模语言和个体风格，解决了多语言SDFA的关键挑战，为现实世界多语言场景中的个性化面部动画提供了有效的统一框架。

title: From Benchmarking to Reasoning: A Dual-Aspect, Large-Scale Evaluation of LLMs on Vietnamese Legal Text
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures. Accepted at the FISU Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (FJCAI 2026), Vietnam
summary: The complexity of Vietnam's legal texts presents a significant barrier to public access to justice. While Large Language Models offer a promising solution for legal text simplification, evaluating their true capabilities requires a multifaceted approach that goes beyond surface-level metrics. This paper introduces a comprehensive dual-aspect evaluation framework to address this need. First, we establish a performance benchmark for four state-of-the-art large language models (GPT-4o, Claude 3 Opus, Gemini 1.5 Pro, and Grok-1) across three key dimensions: Accuracy, Readability, and Consistency. Second, to understand the "why" behind these performance scores, we conduct a large-scale error analysis on a curated dataset of 60 complex Vietnamese legal articles, using a novel, expert-validated error typology. Our results reveal a crucial trade-off: models like Grok-1 excel in Readability and Consistency but compromise on fine-grained legal Accuracy, while models like Claude 3 Opus achieve high Accuracy scores that mask a significant number of subtle but critical reasoning errors. The error analysis pinpoints \textit{Incorrect Example} and \textit{Misinterpretation} as the most prevalent failures, confirming that the primary challenge for current LLMs is not summarization but controlled, accurate legal reasoning. By integrating a quantitative benchmark with a qualitative deep dive, our work provides a holistic and actionable assessment of LLMs for legal applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个双方面评估框架，用于评估大型语言模型在越南法律文本简化任务中的表现，结合性能基准测试和大规模错误分析。
AI.motivation: 越南法律文本的复杂性阻碍了公众获取司法公正，而大型语言模型为法律文本简化提供了有前景的解决方案。然而，评估其真实能力需要超越表面指标的多方面方法。
AI.method: 1) 建立性能基准：评估四种最先进的大型语言模型（GPT-4o、Claude 3 Opus、Gemini 1.5 Pro、Grok-1）在准确性、可读性和一致性三个关键维度的表现；2) 大规模错误分析：在60个复杂越南法律条款的精选数据集上，使用专家验证的错误类型学进行深入分析。
AI.result: 揭示了关键权衡：Grok-1在可读性和一致性方面表现出色，但在细粒度法律准确性上有所妥协；Claude 3 Opus获得高准确性分数，但掩盖了大量微妙但关键的推理错误。错误分析指出"错误示例"和"误解"是最普遍的失败类型，表明当前LLM的主要挑战不是摘要，而是受控、准确的法律推理。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合定量基准和定性深度分析，本研究为法律应用中的LLM提供了全面且可操作的评估，揭示了当前模型在法律推理方面的核心局限性。

title: DenTab: A Dataset for Table Recognition and Visual QA on Real-World Dental Estimates
summary:
Tables condense key transactional and administrative information into compact layouts, but practical extraction requires more than text recognition: systems must also recover structure (rows, columns, merged cells, headers) and interpret roles such as line items, subtotals, and totals under common capture artifacts. Many existing resources for table structure recognition and TableVQA are built from clean digital-born sources or rendered tables, and therefore only partially reflect noisy administrative conditions.
  We introduce DenTab, a dataset of 2{,}000 cropped table images from dental estimates with high-quality HTML annotations, enabling evaluation of table recognition (TR) and table visual question answering (TableVQA) on the same inputs. DenTab includes 2{,}208 questions across eleven categories spanning retrieval, aggregation, and logic/consistency checks. We benchmark 16 systems, including 14 vision--language models (VLMs) and two OCR baselines. Across models, strong structure recovery does not consistently translate into reliable performance on multi-step arithmetic and consistency questions, and these reasoning failures persist even when using ground-truth HTML table inputs.
  To improve arithmetic reliability without training, we propose the Table Router Pipeline, which routes arithmetic questions to deterministic execution. The pipeline combines (i) a VLM that produces a baseline answer, a structured table representation, and a constrained table program with (ii) a rule-based executor that performs exact computation over the parsed table. The source code and dataset will be made publicly available at https://github.com/hamdilaziz/DenTab.

AI.tldr: DenTab是一个包含2000张牙科估算表格图像的数据集，带有高质量HTML标注，用于评估表格识别和表格视觉问答，并提出了Table Router Pipeline来提升算术问题的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有表格识别和TableVQA数据集大多基于干净的数字化来源或渲染表格，不能充分反映实际行政文档中的噪声条件。需要一个新的数据集来评估在真实噪声环境下表格结构恢复和表格问答的性能。
AI.method: 1) 构建DenTab数据集：包含2000张牙科估算表格图像，带有高质量HTML标注和2208个问题，涵盖检索、聚合和逻辑/一致性检查等11个类别。2) 提出Table Router Pipeline：结合视觉语言模型生成基线答案、结构化表格表示和约束表格程序，然后通过基于规则的执行器在解析的表格上进行精确计算。
AI.result: 评估了16个系统（14个视觉语言模型和2个OCR基线）。结果显示，强大的结构恢复能力并不能一致地转化为多步算术和一致性问题的可靠性能，即使使用真实HTML表格输入，这些推理失败仍然存在。Table Router Pipeline在不训练的情况下显著提升了算术可靠性。
AI.conclusion: DenTab数据集填补了真实噪声环境下表格识别和TableVQA评估的空白。Table Router Pipeline通过结合VLM的感知能力和基于规则的精确计算，有效解决了表格问答中的算术可靠性问题，为实际应用提供了实用解决方案。

title: Beyond Distribution Sharpening: The Importance of Task Rewards
summary: Frontier models have demonstrated exceptional capabilities following the integration of task-reward-based reinforcement learning (RL) into their training pipelines, enabling systems to evolve from pure reasoning models into sophisticated agents. However, debate persists regarding whether RL genuinely instills new skills within a base model or merely sharpens its existing distribution to elicit latent capabilities. To address this dichotomy, we present an explicit comparison between distribution sharpening and task-reward-based learning, utilizing RL as a tool to implement both paradigms. Our analysis reveals the inherent limitations of distribution sharpening, demonstrating from first principles how and why the optima can be unfavorable and the approach fundamentally unstable. Furthermore, our experiments using Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct, Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct and Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507 on math datasets confirm that sharpening yields limited gains, whereas incorporating task-based reward signal can greatly help achieve robust performance improvements and stable learning.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了分布锐化与基于任务奖励的强化学习在模型训练中的效果，发现分布锐化效果有限，而任务奖励信号能带来更稳定和显著的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 前沿模型通过整合基于任务奖励的强化学习（RL）获得了卓越能力，但学界仍在争论RL是否真正为基座模型注入了新技能，还是仅仅通过锐化现有分布来激发潜在能力。需要明确比较这两种训练范式。
AI.method: 使用RL作为工具同时实现分布锐化和基于任务奖励的学习两种范式。从第一性原理分析分布锐化的固有局限性，并在Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct、Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct和Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507模型上，使用数学数据集进行实验验证。
AI.result: 分析显示分布锐化存在固有局限性：其最优解可能不利且方法本质上不稳定。实验证实锐化带来的增益有限，而整合基于任务的奖励信号能显著帮助实现稳健的性能提升和稳定学习。
AI.conclusion: 基于任务奖励的强化学习不仅仅是分布锐化，而是能够为模型带来实质性能力提升的有效训练范式。任务奖励信号对于实现稳定学习和显著性能改进至关重要。

title: Semantic Area Graph Reasoning for Multi-Robot Language-Guided Search
summary: Coordinating multi-robot systems (MRS) to search in unknown environments is particularly challenging for tasks that require semantic reasoning beyond geometric exploration. Classical coordination strategies rely on frontier coverage or information gain and cannot incorporate high-level task intent, such as searching for objects associated with specific room types. We propose \textit{Semantic Area Graph Reasoning} (SAGR), a hierarchical framework that enables Large Language Models (LLMs) to coordinate multi-robot exploration and semantic search through a structured semantic-topological abstraction of the environment. SAGR incrementally constructs a semantic area graph from a semantic occupancy map, encoding room instances, connectivity, frontier availability, and robot states into a compact task-relevant representation for LLM reasoning. The LLM performs high-level semantic room assignment based on spatial structure and task context, while deterministic frontier planning and local navigation handle geometric execution within assigned rooms. Experiments on the Habitat-Matterport3D dataset across 100 scenarios show that SAGR remains competitive with state-of-the-art exploration methods while consistently improving semantic target search efficiency, with up to 18.8\% in large environments. These results highlight the value of structured semantic abstractions as an effective interface between LLM-based reasoning and multi-robot coordination in complex indoor environments.

AI.tldr: SAGR框架利用LLM通过语义区域图协调多机器人系统，在未知环境中进行语义搜索，相比传统几何探索方法显著提升语义目标搜索效率。
AI.motivation: 传统多机器人协调策略（如前沿覆盖或信息增益）无法融入高级任务意图（如搜索特定房间类型的关联对象），需要能够进行语义推理的协调框架。
AI.method: 提出SAGR分层框架：从语义占据地图增量构建语义区域图，编码房间实例、连通性、前沿可用性和机器人状态；LLM基于空间结构和任务上下文进行高级语义房间分配；确定性前沿规划和局部导航处理几何执行。
AI.result: 在Habitat-Matterport3D数据集的100个场景中，SAGR在保持与最先进探索方法竞争力的同时，显著提升语义目标搜索效率，在大型环境中提升达18.8%。
AI.conclusion: 结构化语义抽象作为LLM推理与多机器人协调之间的有效接口，在复杂室内环境中具有重要价值，能够将高级语义推理与低级几何执行有效结合。

title: Geometric regularization of autoencoders via observed stochastic dynamics
summary: Stochastic dynamical systems with slow or metastable behavior evolve, on long time scales, on an unknown low-dimensional manifold in high-dimensional ambient space. Building a reduced simulator from short-burst ambient ensembles is a long-standing problem: local-chart methods like ATLAS suffer from exponential landmark scaling and per-step reprojection, while autoencoder alternatives leave tangent-bundle geometry poorly constrained, and the errors propagate into the learned drift and diffusion. We observe that the ambient covariance~$Λ$ already encodes coordinate-invariant tangent-space information, its range spanning the tangent bundle. Using this, we construct a tangent-bundle penalty and an inverse-consistency penalty for a three-stage pipeline (chart learning, latent drift, latent diffusion) that learns a single nonlinear chart and the latent SDE. The penalties induce a function-space metric, the $ρ$-metric, strictly weaker than the Sobolev $H^1$ norm yet achieving the same chart-quality generalization rate up to logarithmic factors. For the drift, we derive an encoder-pullback target via Itô's formula on the learned encoder and prove a bias decomposition showing the standard decoder-side formula carries systematic error for any imperfect chart. Under a $W^{2,\infty}$ chart-convergence assumption, chart-level error propagates controllably to weak convergence of the ambient dynamics and to convergence of radial mean first-passage times. Experiments on four surfaces embedded in up to $201$ ambient dimensions reduce radial MFPT error by $50$--$70\%$ under rotation dynamics and achieve the lowest inter-well MFPT error on most surface--transition pairs under metastable Müller--Brown Langevin dynamics, while reducing end-to-end ambient coefficient errors by up to an order of magnitude relative to an unregularized autoencoder.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于环境协方差的正则化三阶段方法，用于从短时爆发数据中学习随机动力系统的低维流形和潜在SDE，显著改善了切丛几何约束和MFPT误差。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在从短时爆发环境系综构建降阶模拟器时存在问题：局部图方法（如ATLAS）存在指数级地标扩展和每步重投影问题，而自编码器方法对切丛几何约束不足，导致学习到的漂移和扩散误差传播。
AI.method: 利用环境协方差Λ编码的坐标不变切空间信息，构建切丛惩罚和逆一致性惩罚的三阶段流程：1）图学习，2）潜在漂移学习，3）潜在扩散学习。引入ρ-度量作为函数空间度量，弱于Sobolev H¹范数但达到相同的图质量泛化率。
AI.result: 在嵌入高达201维环境空间的四个曲面上，径向平均首次通过时间（MFPT）误差降低50-70%（旋转动力学），在大多数表面-跃迁对中实现最低的井间MFPT误差（Müller-Brown Langevin动力学），端到端环境系数误差相比无正则化自编码器降低一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过环境协方差的正则化有效约束切丛几何，在W^{2,∞}图收敛假设下，图级误差可控制地传播到环境动力学的弱收敛和径向MFPT收敛，显著提升了降阶模拟器的精度。

title: Stylistic-STORM (ST-STORM) : Perceiving the Semantic Nature of Appearance
comment: 20 pages, 16 figures, ICPR 2026 (28th International Conference on Pattern Recognition)
summary: One of the dominant paradigms in self-supervised learning (SSL), illustrated by MoCo or DINO, aims to produce robust representations by capturing features that are insensitive to certain image transformations such as illumination, or geometric changes. This strategy is appropriate when the objective is to recognize objects independently of their appearance. However, it becomes counterproductive as soon as appearance itself constitutes the discriminative signal. In weather analysis, for example, rain streaks, snow granularity, atmospheric scattering, as well as reflections and halos, are not noise: they carry the essential information. In critical applications such as autonomous driving, ignoring these cues is risky, since grip and visibility depend directly on ground conditions and atmospheric conditions. We introduce ST-STORM, a hybrid SSL framework that treats appearance (style) as a semantic modality to be disentangled from content. Our architecture explicitly separates two latent streams, regulated by gating mechanisms. The Content branch aims at a stable semantic representation through a JEPA scheme coupled with a contrastive objective, promoting invariance to appearance variations. In parallel, the Style branch is constrained to capture appearance signatures (textures, contrasts, scattering) through feature prediction and reconstruction under an adversarial constraint. We evaluate ST-STORM on several tasks, including object classification (ImageNet-1K), fine-grained weather characterization, and melanoma detection (ISIC 2024 Challenge). The results show that the Style branch effectively isolates complex appearance phenomena (F1=97% on Multi-Weather and F1=94% on ISIC 2024 with 10% labeled data), without degrading the semantic performance (F1=80% on ImageNet-1K) of the Content branch, and improves the preservation of critical appearance

AI.tldr: ST-STORM是一个混合自监督学习框架，将外观（风格）作为语义模态与内容解耦，通过两个分支分别处理内容和外观特征，适用于天气分析、医学图像等需要保留外观信息的任务。
AI.motivation: 传统自监督学习方法（如MoCo、DINO）通过抑制图像变换（如光照、几何变化）来获得鲁棒表示，这在识别对象时有效。但当外观本身构成判别信号时（如天气分析中的雨雪纹理、医学图像中的皮肤特征），这种策略适得其反。在自动驾驶等关键应用中，忽略这些外观线索是危险的。
AI.method: ST-STORM采用混合自监督学习架构，显式分离两个潜在流：内容分支通过JEPA方案和对比目标追求稳定的语义表示，对外观变化保持不变性；风格分支通过特征预测和重建在对抗约束下捕获外观特征（纹理、对比度、散射）。两个分支通过门控机制调节。
AI.result: 在多个任务上评估：风格分支有效隔离复杂外观现象（Multi-Weather数据集F1=97%，ISIC 2024挑战赛F1=94%，仅用10%标注数据）；内容分支保持语义性能（ImageNet-1K F1=80%）；整体改善了关键外观特征的保留。
AI.conclusion: ST-STORM成功将外观作为语义模态与内容解耦，证明了在需要外观信息的任务中，传统自监督学习的不变性策略可能不适用。该框架在保持语义性能的同时，有效捕获了外观特征，为天气分析、医学诊断等应用提供了新思路。

title: Characterising LLM-Generated Competency Questions: a Cross-Domain Empirical Study using Open and Closed Models
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2507.02989
summary: Competency Questions (CQs) are a cornerstone of requirement elicitation in ontology engineering. CQs represent requirements as a set of natural language questions that an ontology should satisfy; they are traditionally modelled by ontology engineers together with domain experts as part of a human-centred, manual elicitation process. The use of Generative AI automates CQ creation at scale, therefore democratising the process of generation, widening stakeholder engagement, and ultimately broadening access to ontology engineering. However, given the large and heterogeneous landscape of LLMs, varying in dimensions such as parameter scale, task and domain specialisation, and accessibility, it is crucial to characterise and understand the intrinsic, observable properties of the CQs they produce (e.g., readability, structural complexity) through a systematic, cross-domain analysis. This paper introduces a set of quantitative measures for the systematic comparison of CQs across multiple dimensions. Using CQs generated from well defined use cases and scenarios, we identify their salient properties, including readability, relevance with respect to the input text and structural complexity of the generated questions. We conduct our experiments over a set of use cases and requirements using a range of LLMs, including both open (KimiK2-1T, LLama3.1-8B, LLama3.2-3B) and closed models (Gemini 2.5 Pro, GPT 4.1). Our analysis demonstrates that LLM performance reflects distinct generation profiles shaped by the use case.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套用于系统比较不同LLM生成的能力问题(CQs)的定量测量方法，通过跨领域分析揭示了LLM在生成CQs时的性能特征和生成模式。
AI.motivation: 能力问题(CQs)是本体工程中需求获取的基石，传统上需要本体工程师与领域专家手动协作。虽然生成式AI能够大规模自动化CQs创建，但不同LLM在参数规模、任务和领域专业化等方面存在显著差异，需要系统分析它们生成的CQs的内在可观察特性。
AI.method: 引入了一套用于多维度系统比较CQs的定量测量方法，包括可读性、与输入文本的相关性以及生成问题的结构复杂性。使用明确定义的用例和场景生成CQs，在多个LLM上进行实验，包括开源模型(KimiK2-1T、LLama3.1-8B、LLama3.2-3B)和闭源模型(Gemini 2.5 Pro、GPT 4.1)。
AI.result: 分析表明，LLM的性能反映了由用例塑造的独特生成模式。不同LLM在生成CQs时表现出不同的特性组合，这些特性受到具体应用场景的影响。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统化的定量分析，可以更好地理解和比较不同LLM在生成能力问题方面的性能特征，为选择合适的LLM用于特定本体工程任务提供了依据，有助于推动生成式AI在本体工程需求获取中的有效应用。

title: Evaluating the Progression of Large Language Model Capabilities for Small-Molecule Drug Design
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have the potential to accelerate small molecule drug design due to their ability to reason about information from diverse sources and formats. However, their practical utility remains unclear due to the lack of benchmarks that reflect real-world scenarios. In this work, we introduce a suite of chemically-grounded tasks spanning molecular property prediction, molecular representation transformations, and molecular design. Importantly, we formulate these tasks as reinforcement learning (RL) environments, enabling a unified approach for evaluation and post-training. Across three model families, we find that frontier models are increasingly proficient at chemical tasks, but that there is significant room for improvement, especially in experimental settings with low data. Critically, we show that RL-based post-training can substantially improve performance. A smaller model post-trained on our environments becomes competitive with state-of-the-art frontier models, despite a significantly weaker base model. This suggests a practical route toward employing LLMs in drug discovery; by combining carefully-designed evaluation tasks with targeted post-training, we can both elucidate and close critical capability gaps.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个化学基准测试套件，将分子相关任务构建为强化学习环境，评估LLMs在药物发现中的能力，并展示RL后训练能显著提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型语言模型在药物设计方面具有潜力，但由于缺乏反映真实场景的基准测试，其实际效用尚不明确。需要建立化学基础的任务来评估LLMs在药物发现中的能力。
AI.method: 引入一套化学基础的任务套件，涵盖分子性质预测、分子表示转换和分子设计。将这些任务构建为强化学习环境，实现统一的评估和后训练方法。在三个模型家族上进行测试，并应用RL后训练。
AI.result: 前沿模型在化学任务上表现越来越好，但在低数据实验环境中仍有很大改进空间。RL后训练能显著提升性能，较小的模型经过后训练后能与最先进的前沿模型竞争，尽管其基础模型较弱。
AI.conclusion: 通过精心设计的评估任务和有针对性的后训练，可以阐明并弥补关键能力差距，为在药物发现中应用LLMs提供了一条实用途径。

title: Joint-Centric Dual Contrastive Alignment with Structure-Preserving and Information-Balanced Regularization
summary: We propose HILBERT (HIerarchical Long-sequence Balanced Embedding with Reciprocal contrastive Training), a cross-attentive multimodal framework for learning document-level audio-text representations from long, segmented sequences in low-resource data settings. HILBERT leverages frozen pre-trained speech and language encoders to extract segment-level features, which are aggregated via cross-modal attention and self-attentive pooling to form modality-specific document representations and a joint cross-attentive embedding. To align modalities while preserving modality-specific structure under severe audio-text dimensional imbalance, we introduce a reciprocal dual contrastive objective that simultaneously aligns audio-to-joint and text-to-joint representations, rather than directly contrasting audio and text alone. Two auxiliary regularizers further stabilize long-sequence fusion: a Centered Kernel Alignment (CKA) loss that preserves structural consistency between each modality and the joint embedding, and a mutual information balancing loss that prevents dominance of a single modality by equalizing information flow from audio and text into the joint space. For downstream prediction, HILBERT employs a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) classifier over concatenated audio, text, and joint representations to accommodate heterogeneous label regimes. Extensive evaluation across multiple audio-text backbone combinations demonstrates that HILBERT learns semantically meaningful long-sequence representations and achieves superior performance on highly imbalanced multi-class settings.

AI.tldr: HILBERT是一个用于低资源环境下长序列音频-文本多模态表示学习的框架，通过分层平衡嵌入和互惠对比训练解决维度不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 在低资源数据设置中，从长分割序列学习文档级音频-文本表示面临挑战，特别是音频和文本之间的严重维度不平衡问题，需要一种能够对齐模态同时保持模态特定结构的方法。
AI.method: 使用冻结的预训练语音和语言编码器提取片段级特征，通过跨模态注意力和自注意力池化聚合形成模态特定文档表示和联合跨注意力嵌入。引入互惠双重对比目标对齐音频-联合和文本-联合表示，而非直接对比音频和文本。采用两个辅助正则化器：中心核对齐损失保持模态与联合嵌入间的结构一致性，互信息平衡损失防止单一模态主导。下游预测使用混合专家分类器处理音频、文本和联合表示的拼接。
AI.result: 在多个音频-文本骨干组合上的广泛评估表明，HILBERT能够学习语义上有意义的长序列表示，并在高度不平衡的多类设置中实现优越性能。
AI.conclusion: HILBERT通过分层平衡嵌入和互惠对比训练，有效解决了低资源环境下长序列音频-文本表示学习中的维度不平衡问题，为多模态学习提供了稳健的框架。

title: SENSE: Stereo OpEN Vocabulary SEmantic Segmentation
summary: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation enables models to segment objects or image regions beyond fixed class sets, offering flexibility in dynamic environments. However, existing methods often rely on single-view images and struggle with spatial precision, especially under occlusions and near object boundaries. We propose SENSE, the first work on Stereo OpEN Vocabulary SEmantic Segmentation, which leverages stereo vision and vision-language models to enhance open-vocabulary semantic segmentation. By incorporating stereo image pairs, we introduce geometric cues that improve spatial reasoning and segmentation accuracy. Trained on the PhraseStereo dataset, our approach achieves strong performance in phrase-grounded tasks and demonstrates generalization in zero-shot settings. On PhraseStereo, we show a +2.9% improvement in Average Precision over the baseline method and +0.76% over the best competing method. SENSE also provides a relative improvement of +3.5% mIoU on Cityscapes and +18% on KITTI compared to the baseline work. By jointly reasoning over semantics and geometry, SENSE supports accurate scene understanding from natural language, essential for autonomous robots and Intelligent Transportation Systems.

AI.tldr: SENSE是首个基于立体视觉的开放词汇语义分割方法，通过融合立体图像对和视觉语言模型，利用几何线索提升空间推理和分割精度，在多个数据集上优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇语义分割方法通常依赖单视角图像，在空间精度方面存在不足，特别是在遮挡和物体边界附近。需要结合几何信息来提升分割的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出SENSE（Stereo OpEN Vocabulary SEmantic Segmentation），利用立体视觉和视觉语言模型，通过立体图像对引入几何线索，联合推理语义和几何信息，在PhraseStereo数据集上进行训练。
AI.result: 在PhraseStereo数据集上比基线方法提升2.9%平均精度，比最佳竞争方法提升0.76%；在Cityscapes上相对提升3.5% mIoU，在KITTI上相对提升18%。
AI.conclusion: SENSE通过融合立体视觉和视觉语言模型，显著提升了开放词汇语义分割的空间精度和鲁棒性，为自主机器人和智能交通系统提供了更准确的场景理解能力。

title: Early Detection of Acute Myeloid Leukemia (AML) Using YOLOv12 Deep Learning Model
summary: Acute Myeloid Leukemia (AML) is one of the most life-threatening type of blood cancers, and its accurate classification is considered and remains a challenging task due to the visual similarity between various cell types. This study addresses the classification of the multiclasses of AML cells Utilizing YOLOv12 deep learning model. We applied two segmentation approaches based on cell and nucleus features, using Hue channel and Otsu thresholding techniques to preprocess the images prior to classification. Our experiments demonstrate that YOLOv12 with Otsu thresholding on cell-based segmentation achieved the highest level of validation and test accuracy, both reaching 99.3%.

AI.tldr: 使用YOLOv12深度学习模型对急性髓系白血病细胞进行多类别分类，通过细胞和细胞核两种分割方法结合色调通道和Otsu阈值预处理，在细胞分割上获得99.3%的最高准确率
AI.motivation: 急性髓系白血病是一种危及生命的血癌，由于不同细胞类型之间视觉相似性高，其准确分类一直是一个具有挑战性的任务。本研究旨在解决AML细胞的多类别分类问题。
AI.method: 采用YOLOv12深度学习模型进行AML细胞分类。使用了两种分割方法：基于细胞特征和基于细胞核特征。预处理阶段应用了色调通道和Otsu阈值技术对图像进行处理。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，在细胞分割基础上应用Otsu阈值处理的YOLOv12模型取得了最佳性能，验证集和测试集的准确率均达到99.3%。
AI.conclusion: YOLOv12结合Otsu阈值处理的细胞分割方法能够有效实现AML细胞的高精度多类别分类，为白血病诊断提供了有前景的自动化解决方案。

title: BAGEL: Benchmarking Animal Knowledge Expertise in Language Models
summary: Large language models have shown strong performance on broad-domain knowledge and reasoning benchmarks, but it remains unclear how well language models handle specialized animal-related knowledge under a unified closed-book evaluation protocol. We introduce BAGEL, a benchmark for evaluating animal knowledge expertise in language models. BAGEL is constructed from diverse scientific and reference sources, including bioRxiv, Global Biotic Interactions, Xeno-canto, and Wikipedia, using a combination of curated examples and automatically generated closed-book question-answer pairs. The benchmark covers multiple aspects of animal knowledge, including taxonomy, morphology, habitat, behavior, vocalization, geographic distribution, and species interactions. By focusing on closed-book evaluation, BAGEL measures animal-related knowledge of models without external retrieval at inference time. BAGEL further supports fine-grained analysis across source domains, taxonomic groups, and knowledge categories, enabling a more precise characterization of model strengths and systematic failure modes. Our benchmark provides a new testbed for studying domain-specific knowledge generalization in language models and for improving their reliability in biodiversity-related applications.

AI.tldr: BAGEL是一个评估语言模型动物知识专业能力的基准测试，通过闭卷评估协议测试模型在分类学、形态学、栖息地、行为、发声、地理分布和物种相互作用等多方面的动物知识。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型语言模型在广泛领域的知识和推理基准上表现出色，但尚不清楚它们在统一闭卷评估协议下处理专业动物知识的能力如何。需要专门的基准来评估语言模型在动物相关领域的专业知识。
AI.method: BAGEL从多样化的科学和参考来源构建，包括bioRxiv、Global Biotic Interactions、Xeno-canto和Wikipedia，结合精心策划的示例和自动生成的闭卷问答对。采用闭卷评估方法，在推理时不依赖外部检索。
AI.result: BAGEL基准支持跨来源领域、分类群组和知识类别的细粒度分析，能够更精确地描述模型的优势和系统性失败模式，为研究语言模型领域特定知识泛化提供了新的测试平台。
AI.conclusion: BAGEL基准为研究语言模型领域特定知识泛化提供了新的测试平台，有助于提高模型在生物多样性相关应用中的可靠性，填补了专业动物知识评估的空白。

title: VADF: Vision-Adaptive Diffusion Policy Framework for Efficient Robotic Manipulation
summary: Diffusion policies are becoming mainstream in robotic manipulation but suffer from hard negative class imbalance due to uniform sampling and lack of sample difficulty awareness, leading to slow training convergence and frequent inference timeout failures. We propose VADF (Vision-Adaptive Diffusion Policy Framework), a vision-driven dual-adaptive framework that significantly reduces convergence steps and achieves early success in inference, with model-agnostic design enabling seamless integration into any diffusion policy architecture. During training, we introduce Adaptive Loss Network (ALN), a lightweight MLP-based loss predictor that quantifies per-step sample difficulty in real time. Guided by hard negative mining, it performs weighted sampling to prioritize high-loss regions, enabling adaptive weight updates and faster convergence. In inference, we design the Hierarchical Vision Task Segmenter (HVTS), which decomposes high-level task instructions into multi-stage low-level sub-instructions based on visual input. It adaptively segments action sequences into simple and complex subtasks by assigning shorter noise schedules with longer direct execution sequences to simple actions, and longer noise steps with shorter execution sequences to complex ones, thereby dramatically reducing computational overhead and significantly improving the early success rate.

AI.tldr: VADF框架通过视觉驱动的双自适应机制解决扩散策略中的负类不平衡和样本难度感知问题，显著减少训练收敛步数并提升推理早期成功率。
AI.motivation: 扩散策略在机器人操作中面临两个主要问题：1）均匀采样导致的硬负类不平衡；2）缺乏样本难度感知，导致训练收敛缓慢和推理超时失败频繁。
AI.method: 提出VADF框架，包含两个核心组件：1）训练阶段的Adaptive Loss Network（ALN），基于MLP的轻量级损失预测器，实时量化样本难度并指导加权采样；2）推理阶段的Hierarchical Vision Task Segmenter（HVTS），基于视觉输入将高级任务分解为多阶段子指令，自适应分配噪声调度。
AI.result: VADF显著减少了收敛步数，实现了推理早期成功，计算开销大幅降低，早期成功率显著提升，且模型无关设计可无缝集成到任何扩散策略架构中。
AI.conclusion: VADF通过视觉驱动的双自适应机制有效解决了扩散策略中的训练收敛和推理效率问题，为机器人操作中的扩散策略提供了更高效、更可靠的解决方案。

title: The Amazing Stability of Flow Matching
comment: EurIPS 2025 Workshop on Principles of Generative Modeling (PriGM)
summary:
The success of deep generative models in generating high-quality and diverse samples is often attributed to particular architectures and large training datasets. In this paper, we investigate the impact of these factors on the quality and diversity of samples generated by \emph{flow-matching} models. Surprisingly, in our experiments on CelebA-HQ dataset, flow matching remains stable even when pruning 50\% of the dataset. That is, the quality and diversity of generated samples are preserved. Moreover, pruning impacts the latent representation only slightly, that is, samples generated by models trained on the full and pruned dataset map to visually similar outputs for a given seed. We observe similar stability when changing the architecture or training configuration, such that the latent representation is maintained under these changes as well.
  Our results quantify just how strong this stability can be in practice, and help explain the reliability of flow-matching models under various perturbations.

AI.tldr: 流匹配模型在数据集裁剪、架构变更和训练配置变化下表现出惊人的稳定性，生成质量和多样性保持良好
AI.motivation: 研究深度生成模型成功通常归因于特定架构和大训练数据集，本文旨在探究这些因素对流匹配模型生成样本质量和多样性的实际影响
AI.method: 在CelebA-HQ数据集上进行实验，通过裁剪50%数据集、改变架构和训练配置等方式测试流匹配模型的稳定性
AI.result: 流匹配模型在裁剪50%数据集后仍保持稳定，生成样本的质量和多样性得以保留；潜在表示仅轻微变化，相同种子生成的输出视觉相似；架构和训练配置变化下也观察到类似稳定性
AI.conclusion: 流匹配模型在各种扰动下表现出强大的稳定性，这有助于解释其在实践中的可靠性，量化了这种稳定性的实际强度

title: A Reconfigurable Pneumatic Joint Enabling Localized Selective Stiffening and Shape Locking in Vine-Inspired Robots
summary: Vine-inspired robots achieve large workspace coverage through tip eversion, enabling safe navigation in confined and cluttered environments. However, their deployment in free space is fundamentally limited by low axial stiffness, poor load-bearing capacity, and the inability to retain shape during and after steering. In this work, we propose a reconfigurable pneumatic joint (RPJ) architecture that introduces discrete, pressure-tunable stiffness along the robot body without compromising continuous growth. Each RPJ module comprises symmetrically distributed pneumatic chambers that locally increase bending stiffness when pressurized, enabling decoupling between global compliance and localized rigidity. We integrate the RPJs into a soft growing robot with tendon-driven steering and develop a compact base station for mid-air eversion. System characterization and experimental validation demonstrate moderate pressure requirements for eversion, as well as comparable localized stiffening and steering performance to layer-jamming mechanisms. Demonstrations further show that the proposed robot achieves improved shape retention during bending, reduced gravitational deflection under load, cascading retraction, and reliable payload transport up to 202 g in free space. The RPJ mechanism establishes a practical pathway toward structurally adaptive vine robots for manipulation-oriented tasks such as object sorting and adaptive exploration in unconstrained environments.

AI.tldr: 提出可重构气动关节（RPJ）架构，解决藤蔓机器人轴向刚度低、承载能力差和转向时形状保持问题，实现局部刚度可调而不影响连续生长
AI.motivation: 藤蔓机器人通过尖端外翻实现大工作空间覆盖，但在自由空间中部署受到轴向刚度低、承载能力差以及转向时无法保持形状的根本限制
AI.method: 提出可重构气动关节（RPJ）架构，包含对称分布的气动腔室，加压时可局部增加弯曲刚度；将RPJ集成到具有肌腱驱动转向的软体生长机器人中，并开发用于空中外翻的紧凑基站
AI.result: 系统表征和实验验证显示适中的外翻压力需求，局部刚化和转向性能与层压机制相当；机器人实现弯曲时形状保持改善、负载下重力偏转减少、级联收缩，以及在自由空间中可靠承载达202g
AI.conclusion: RPJ机制为结构自适应藤蔓机器人建立了实用途径，适用于物体分类和无约束环境自适应探索等操作导向任务

title: TableSeq: Unified Generation of Structure, Content, and Layout
summary: We present TableSeq, an image-only, end-to-end framework for joint table structure recognition, content recognition, and cell localization. The model formulates these tasks as a single sequence-generation problem: one decoder produces an interleaved stream of \texttt{HTML} tags, cell text, and discretized coordinate tokens, thereby aligning logical structure, textual content, and cell geometry within a unified autoregressive sequence. This design avoids external OCR, auxiliary decoders, and complex multi-stage post-processing. TableSeq combines a lightweight high-resolution FCN-H16 encoder with a minimal structure-prior head and a single-layer transformer encoder, yielding a compact architecture that remains effective on challenging layouts. Across standard benchmarks, TableSeq achieves competitive or state-of-the-art results while preserving architectural simplicity. It reaches 95.23 TEDS / 96.83 S-TEDS on PubTabNet, 97.45 TEDS / 98.69 S-TEDS on FinTabNet, and 99.79 / 99.54 / 99.66 precision / recall / F1 on SciTSR under the CAR protocol, while remaining competitive on PubTables-1M under GriTS. Beyond TSR/TCR, the same sequence interface generalizes to index-based table querying without task-specific heads, achieving the best IRDR score and competitive ICDR/ICR performance. We also study multi-token prediction for faster blockwise decoding and show that it reduces inference latency with only limited accuracy degradation. Overall, TableSeq provides a practical and reproducible single-stream baseline for unified table recognition, and the source code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/hamdilaziz/TableSeq.

AI.tldr: TableSeq是一个端到端的图像级表格识别框架，将表格结构识别、内容识别和单元格定位统一为单一序列生成任务，无需外部OCR或复杂后处理。
AI.motivation: 现有表格识别方法通常需要外部OCR、多个解码器或复杂的多阶段后处理流程，导致系统复杂且效率低下。TableSeq旨在通过统一的序列生成框架简化这一过程。
AI.method: 将表格识别任务统一为单一序列生成问题：一个解码器生成交错的HTML标签、单元格文本和离散化坐标标记。采用轻量级高分辨率FCN-H16编码器、最小结构先验头和单层Transformer编码器。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中取得竞争性或SOTA结果：PubTabNet上95.23 TEDS/96.83 S-TEDS，FinTabNet上97.45 TEDS/98.69 S-TEDS，SciTSR上99.79/99.54/99.66精度/召回率/F1。在表格查询任务中也表现优异。
AI.conclusion: TableSeq提供了一个实用且可复现的单流基线框架，通过统一的序列生成方法简化了表格识别流程，同时保持了架构简洁性和高性能。

title: Neuro-Symbolic ODE Discovery with Latent Grammar Flow
summary:
Understanding natural and engineered systems often relies on symbolic formulations, such as differential equations, which provide interpretability and transferability beyond black-box models.
  We introduce Latent Grammar Flow (LGF), a neuro-symbolic generative framework for discovering ordinary differential equations from data. LGF embeds equations as grammar-based representations into a discrete latent space and forces semantically similar equations to be positioned closer together with a behavioural loss. Then, a discrete flow model guides the sampling process to recursively generate candidate equations that best fit the observed data. Domain knowledge and constraints, such as stability, can be either embedded into the rules or used as conditional predictors.

AI.tldr: Latent Grammar Flow (LGF) 是一种神经符号生成框架，用于从数据中发现常微分方程，通过将方程嵌入离散潜在空间并利用行为损失使语义相似的方程更接近，然后使用离散流模型递归生成最符合观测数据的候选方程。
AI.motivation: 理解自然和工程系统通常依赖于符号公式（如微分方程），这些公式提供了可解释性和可迁移性，超越了黑盒模型。然而，从数据中发现微分方程仍然具有挑战性。
AI.method: LGF 将方程作为基于语法的表示嵌入离散潜在空间，并使用行为损失使语义相似的方程在空间中更接近。然后采用离散流模型指导采样过程，递归生成最符合观测数据的候选方程。领域知识和约束（如稳定性）可以嵌入到规则中或用作条件预测器。
AI.result: 该方法能够从数据中发现常微分方程，同时保持符号表示的可解释性和可迁移性优势。
AI.conclusion: LGF 提供了一个有效的神经符号框架，用于从数据中发现微分方程，能够结合领域知识约束，为系统理解提供了比纯黑盒模型更具解释性和可迁移性的解决方案。

title: Robust Fleet Sizing for Multi-UAV Inspection Missions under Synchronized Replacement Demand
summary:
Multi-UAV inspection missions require spare drones to replace active drones during recharging cycles. Existing fleet-sizing approaches often assume steady-state operating conditions that do not apply to finite-horizon missions, or they treat replacement requests as statistically independent events. The latter provides per-request blocking guarantees that fail to translate to mission-level reliability when demands cluster. This paper identifies a structural failure mode where efficient routing assigns similar workloads to each UAV, leading to synchronized battery depletion and replacement bursts that exhaust the spare pool even when average capacity is sufficient.
  We derive a closed-form sufficient fleet-sizing rule, k = m(ceil(R) + 1), where m is the number of active UAVs and R is the recovery-to-active time ratio. This additive buffer of m spares absorbs worst-case synchronized demand at recovery-cycle boundaries and ensures mission-level reliability even when all UAVs deplete simultaneously. Monte Carlo validation across five scenarios (m in [2, 10], R in [0.87, 3.39], 1000 trials each) shows that Erlang-B sizing with a per-request blocking target epsilon = 0.01 drops to 69.9% mission success at R = 3.39, with 95% of spare exhaustion events concentrated in the top-decile 5-minute demand windows. In contrast, the proposed rule maintains 99.8% success (Wilson 95% lower bound 99.3%) across all tested conditions, including wind variability up to CV = 0.30, while requiring only four additional drones in the most demanding scenario.

AI.tldr: 针对多无人机巡检任务，本文提出了一种考虑同步电池耗尽情况的机队规模确定方法，相比传统基于独立请求假设的Erlang-B模型，能显著提升任务级可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机机队规模确定方法存在两个主要问题：1）假设稳态运行条件，不适用于有限时间任务；2）将替换请求视为统计独立事件，这种基于单次请求阻塞保证的方法在需求聚集时无法保证任务级可靠性。研究发现，高效路由策略会导致各无人机工作量相似，从而引发同步电池耗尽和替换需求爆发，即使在平均容量足够的情况下也可能耗尽备用无人机池。
AI.method: 本文推导了一个闭式充分机队规模规则：k = m(ceil(R) + 1)，其中m为活动无人机数量，R为恢复时间与活动时间之比。该规则增加了m个备用无人机的缓冲容量，用于吸收恢复周期边界处最坏情况的同步需求。通过蒙特卡洛模拟在五种场景（m∈[2,10]，R∈[0.87,3.39]，每种场景1000次试验）进行验证，并与基于单次请求阻塞目标ε=0.01的Erlang-B模型进行比较。
AI.result: Erlang-B模型在R=3.39时任务成功率降至69.9%，且95%的备用耗尽事件集中在需求最高的5分钟窗口（前10%时间段）。相比之下，提出的规则在所有测试条件下（包括风速变异系数CV=0.30）均保持99.8%的成功率（Wilson 95%置信下限99.3%），在最苛刻场景下仅需额外增加4架无人机。
AI.conclusion: 针对多无人机巡检任务中的同步电池耗尽问题，提出的k = m(ceil(R) + 1)机队规模规则能有效保证任务级可靠性，相比传统基于独立请求假设的方法具有显著优势，即使在最坏情况需求爆发下也能维持高成功率，且额外成本可控。

title: AEGIS: Anchor-Enforced Gradient Isolation for Knowledge-Preserving Vision-Language-Action Fine-Tuning
summary: Adapting pre-trained vision-language models (VLMs) for robotic control requires injecting high-magnitude continuous gradients from a flow-matching action expert into a backbone trained exclusively with cross-entropy.
