This cross-modal gradient asymmetry - the spectral dimensionality mismatch between low-rank MSE regression gradients and the high-dimensional semantic manifold sculpted by CE pre-training, causes rapid, severe erosion of the VLM's visual-question-answering (VQA) capability. Industry-standard defences either sever the gradient pathway entirely via stop gradient, discarding the rich continuous supervision, or restrict parameter capacity through low-rank adapters (LoRA) that constrain the rank of updates but not their direction, and thus still overwrite the pre-trained manifold. We introduce AEGIS (Anchor-Enforced Gradient Isolation System): a buffer-free, layer-wise orthogonal gradient projection framework that enables direct continuous MSE learning while preserving the pre-trained VQA manifold - without any co-training data or replay buffer. AEGIS pre-computes a static Gaussian reference anchor from masked VQA forward passes across all transformer layers, then at each training step constructs a Wasserstein-2 transport penalty that generates an anchor restoration gradient. A sequential dual-backward decomposes the task and anchor gradients; for each transformer layer, AEGIS applies a single Gram-Schmidt orthogonal projection that bends the task gradient away from the destructive direction while preserving its constructive content. The projection sheds less than 1% of gradient energy on average, yet eliminates the cumulative activation drift that drives severe forgetting.

AI.tldr: AEGIS框架通过正交梯度投影解决视觉语言模型适应机器人控制时的灾难性遗忘问题，在保持VQA能力的同时实现连续MSE学习
AI.motivation: 预训练视觉语言模型适应机器人控制时，连续MSE回归梯度与交叉熵预训练语义流形之间的维度不匹配导致VQA能力严重退化，现有方法要么完全切断梯度通路，要么无法保护预训练流形
AI.method: AEGIS框架：1）通过掩码VQA前向传播计算静态高斯参考锚点；2）构建Wasserstein-2传输惩罚生成锚点恢复梯度；3）通过顺序双反向分解任务和锚点梯度；4）对每个transformer层应用Gram-Schmidt正交投影，弯曲任务梯度远离破坏性方向
AI.result: 正交投影平均仅损失不到1%的梯度能量，但能消除导致严重遗忘的累积激活漂移，实现直接连续MSE学习的同时保持预训练VQA流形
AI.conclusion: AEGIS提供了一种无缓冲区、层级的正交梯度投影框架，有效解决了跨模态梯度不对称问题，在适应机器人控制的同时保护了预训练视觉语言模型的语义能力

title: DTEA: A Dual-Topology Elastic Actuator Enabling Real-Time Switching Between Series and Parallel Compliance
summary: Series and parallel elastic actuators offer complementary but mutually exclusive advantages, yet no existing actuator enables real-time transition between these topologies during operation. This paper presents a novel actuator design called the Dual-Topology Elastic Actuator (DTEA), which enables dynamic switching between SEA and PEA topologies during operation. A proof-of-concept prototype of the DTEA is developed to demonstrate the feasibility of the topology-switching mechanism. Experiments are conducted to evaluate the robustness and timing of the switching mechanism under operational conditions. The actuator successfully performed 324 topology-switching cycles under load without damage, demonstrating the robustness of the mechanism. The measured switching time between SEA and PEA modes is under 33.33 ms. Additional experiments are conducted to characterize the static stiffness and disturbance rejection performance in both SEA and PEA modes. Static stiffness tests show that the PEA mode is 1.53x stiffer than the SEA mode, with KSEA = 5.57 +/- 0.02 Nm/rad and KPEA = 8.54 +/- 0.02 Nm/rad. Disturbance rejection experiments show that the mean peak deflection in SEA mode is 2.26x larger than in PEA mode (5.2 deg vs. 2.3 deg), while the mean settling time is 3.45x longer (1380 ms vs. 400 ms). The observed behaviors are consistent with the known characteristics of conventional SEA and PEA actuators, validating the functionality of both modes in the DTEA actuator.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新型双拓扑弹性执行器（DTEA），能够在运行过程中实时切换串联弹性执行器（SEA）和并联弹性执行器（PEA）拓扑结构，并通过实验验证了其可行性、鲁棒性和性能特征。
AI.motivation: 串联弹性执行器（SEA）和并联弹性执行器（PEA）具有互补但相互排斥的优势，现有执行器无法在运行过程中实现这两种拓扑结构之间的实时切换。需要一种能够动态切换拓扑的新型执行器设计。
AI.method: 提出双拓扑弹性执行器（DTEA）设计，开发概念验证原型，实现SEA和PEA拓扑之间的动态切换机制。通过实验评估切换机制的鲁棒性、时序特性，并测试两种模式下的静态刚度和抗干扰性能。
AI.result: DTEA在负载下成功完成324次拓扑切换循环无损坏，切换时间小于33.33毫秒。PEA模式比SEA模式刚度高1.53倍（8.54 vs 5.57 Nm/rad）。SEA模式的平均峰值偏转是PEA模式的2.26倍（5.2° vs 2.3°），平均稳定时间长3.45倍（1380 ms vs 400 ms）。
AI.conclusion: DTEA成功实现了运行过程中SEA和PEA拓扑的动态切换，验证了切换机制的鲁棒性和快速性。两种模式表现出与传统SEA和PEA一致的特征，证明了DTEA设计的有效性，为需要动态适应不同工作条件的机器人系统提供了新的执行器解决方案。

title: Chain-of-Thought Degrades Visual Spatial Reasoning Capabilities of Multimodal LLMs
summary: Multimodal Reasoning Models (MRMs) leveraging Chain-of-Thought (CoT) based thinking have revolutionized mathematical and logical problem-solving. However, we show that this paradigm struggles with generalized spatial intelligence. We perform a comprehensive evaluation of seventeen models across thirteen spatial benchmarks and identify a critical gap: CoT prompting consistently degrades performance in visual spatial reasoning. Furthermore, through a novel No-Image++ ablation, we demonstrate that MRMs and CoT prompted MLMs suffer from severe shortcut learning, and hallucinate visual details from textual priors even when the image is absent. These findings challenge the efficacy of text-only CoT for spatial tasks and underscore the need for vision-centric reasoning paradigms.

AI.tldr: 研究发现多模态推理模型在空间智能任务中存在严重缺陷：思维链提示会降低视觉空间推理性能，模型存在严重的捷径学习问题，即使没有图像也会从文本先验中产生视觉幻觉。
AI.motivation: 虽然基于思维链的多模态推理模型在数学和逻辑问题解决方面取得了革命性进展，但本文发现这些模型在广义空间智能方面存在严重不足。研究旨在评估当前模型在空间推理任务中的真实能力，揭示其局限性。
AI.method: 对17个模型在13个空间基准测试上进行全面评估，分析思维链提示对视觉空间推理的影响。通过创新的No-Image++消融实验，验证模型是否存在捷径学习和视觉幻觉问题。
AI.result: 思维链提示在视觉空间推理任务中持续降低模型性能。多模态推理模型和思维链提示的多语言模型存在严重的捷径学习问题，即使在没有图像的情况下也会从文本先验中产生视觉细节幻觉。
AI.conclusion: 文本思维链范式在空间任务中效果有限，挑战了当前方法的有效性。研究强调了开发以视觉为中心的空间推理范式的必要性，而非依赖文本主导的推理方法。

title: Beyond Surface Statistics: Robust Conformal Prediction for LLMs via Internal Representations
summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed in settings where reliability matters, yet output-level uncertainty signals such as token probabilities, entropy, and self-consistency can become brittle under calibration--deployment mismatch. Conformal prediction provides finite-sample validity under exchangeability, but its practical usefulness depends on the quality of the nonconformity score. We propose a conformal framework for LLM question answering that uses internal representations rather than output-facing statistics: specifically, we introduce Layer-Wise Information (LI) scores, which measure how conditioning on the input reshapes predictive entropy across model depth, and use them as nonconformity scores within a standard split conformal pipeline. Across closed-ended and open-domain QA benchmarks, with the clearest gains under cross-domain shift, our method achieves a better validity--efficiency trade-off than strong text-level baselines while maintaining competitive in-domain reliability at the same nominal risk level. These results suggest that internal representations can provide more informative conformal scores when surface-level uncertainty is unstable under distribution shift.

AI.tldr: 提出基于内部表征的LLM问答共形预测框架，使用层间信息分数作为非共形分数，在分布偏移下获得更好的有效性-效率权衡
AI.motivation: LLM部署中可靠性至关重要，但基于输出层面的不确定性信号（如token概率、熵、自一致性）在校准-部署不匹配时变得脆弱。共形预测在可交换性下提供有限样本有效性，但其实际效用取决于非共形分数的质量。
AI.method: 提出LLM问答的共形预测框架，使用内部表征而非输出层面统计：引入层间信息（LI）分数，衡量输入条件如何重塑跨模型深度的预测熵，并将其用作标准分割共形流程中的非共形分数。
AI.result: 在封闭式和开放域QA基准测试中，特别是在跨域偏移下，该方法比强文本级基线实现了更好的有效性-效率权衡，同时在相同名义风险水平下保持竞争力的域内可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 当表面级不确定性在分布偏移下不稳定时，内部表征可以提供更具信息量的共形分数，为LLM可靠性提供更稳健的不确定性量化方法。

title: Environment-Adaptive Solid-State LiDAR-Inertial Odometry
summary: Solid-state LiDAR-inertial SLAM has attracted significant attention due to its advantages in speed and robustness. However, achieving accurate mapping in extreme environments remains challenging due to severe geometric degeneracy and unreliable observations, which often lead to ill-conditioned optimization and map inconsistencies. To address these challenges, we propose an environment-adaptive solid-state LiDAR-inertial odometry that integrates local normal-vector constraints with degeneracy-aware map maintenance to enhance localization accuracy. Specifically, we introduce local normal-vector constraints to improve the stability of state estimation, effectively suppressing localization drift in degenerate scenarios. Furthermore, we design a degeneration-guided map update strategy to improve map precision. Benefiting from the refined map representation, localization accuracy is further enhanced in subsequent estimation. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior mapping accuracy and robustness in extreme and perceptually degraded environments, with an average RMSE reduction of up to 12.8% compared to the baseline method.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种环境自适应的固态激光雷达-惯性SLAM方法，通过局部法向量约束和退化感知地图维护来提升极端环境下的定位精度和地图一致性。
AI.motivation: 固态激光雷达-惯性SLAM在速度和鲁棒性方面具有优势，但在极端环境中由于严重的几何退化和不可靠观测，导致优化病态和地图不一致，难以实现精确建图。
AI.method: 1. 引入局部法向量约束来提升状态估计的稳定性，有效抑制退化场景下的定位漂移；2. 设计退化引导的地图更新策略来提升地图精度；3. 通过精化的地图表示进一步增强后续估计的定位精度。
AI.result: 在极端和感知退化环境中实现了优越的建图精度和鲁棒性，相比基线方法平均RMSE降低了12.8%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的环境自适应固态激光雷达-惯性里程计方法通过局部法向量约束和退化感知地图维护，有效解决了极端环境下的几何退化和地图不一致问题，显著提升了SLAM系统的性能。

title: Detecting and Suppressing Reward Hacking with Gradient Fingerprints
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) typically optimizes for outcome rewards without imposing constraints on intermediate reasoning. This leaves training susceptible to reward hacking, where models exploit loopholes (e.g., spurious patterns in training data) in the reward function to achieve high scores without solving the intended task. These reward-hacking behaviors are often implicit, as the intermediate chain-of-thought (CoT) may appear plausible on the surface, limiting the effectiveness of purely text-based monitoring. We propose Gradient Fingerprint (GRIFT), a method for detecting reward hacking using models' internal computations. Given a prompt and a model-generated CoT, GRIFT computes gradients of the CoT conditioned on the prompt and compresses them into a compact representation, which is then used to assess whether the CoT reflects reward hacking behavior. Across verifiable reasoning benchmarks spanning math, code, and logical reasoning, GRIFT substantially outperforms strong baselines, including CoT Monitor and TRACE, achieving over 25% relative improvement in detecting reward hacking behavior. Moreover, integrating GRIFT into the rejection fine-tuning pipeline for reasoning tasks reduces reward hacking and improves performance on the true task objective. Our results highlight a promising direction of leveraging gradient level representations for assessing the quality of CoT reasoning traces. Our code is available at: https://github.com/songtao-x/reward_hack.

AI.tldr: GRIFT方法通过分析模型内部计算的梯度来检测强化学习中的奖励攻击行为，在数学、代码和逻辑推理基准测试中显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 传统的强化学习通常只优化最终结果奖励，而不对中间推理过程施加约束，这使得训练容易受到奖励攻击的影响。模型可能利用奖励函数中的漏洞（如训练数据中的虚假模式）获得高分，但并未真正解决目标任务。这些奖励攻击行为通常是隐性的，因为中间思维链在表面上看起来合理，限制了纯文本监控的有效性。
AI.method: 提出GRIFT（梯度指纹）方法，利用模型的内部计算来检测奖励攻击。给定一个提示和模型生成的思维链，GRIFT计算思维链相对于提示的梯度，并将其压缩为紧凑表示，然后用于评估思维链是否反映奖励攻击行为。
AI.result: 在涵盖数学、代码和逻辑推理的可验证推理基准测试中，GRIFT显著优于包括CoT Monitor和TRACE在内的强基线方法，在检测奖励攻击行为方面实现了超过25%的相对改进。将GRIFT集成到推理任务的拒绝微调流程中，可以减少奖励攻击并提高真实任务目标的性能。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明，利用梯度级表示来评估思维链推理轨迹的质量是一个有前景的方向。该方法为检测和缓解强化学习中的奖励攻击问题提供了有效的技术途径。

title: Mind's Eye: A Benchmark of Visual Abstraction, Transformation and Composition for Multimodal LLMs
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved impressive progress on vision language benchmarks, yet their capacity for visual cognitive and visuospatial reasoning remains less understood. We introduce "Mind's Eye", a multiple-choice benchmark of eight visuo-cognitive tasks inspired by classic human intelligence tests and organized under a novel "A-R-T" taxonomy: Abstraction, Relation, and Transformation. The tasks probe core processes of fluid intelligence such as pattern induction, analogical relation mapping, and mental transformation. We evaluate a diverse suite of closed-source and open-source MLLMs and compare their performance with human participants. Humans achieve 80% accuracy, while top performing MLLMs remain below 50%. Error analysis reveals failures in: (i) visual attention allocation, (ii) internal perceptual manipulation, and (iii) weak abstraction of underlying visual concepts. Our findings suggest that current MLLMs exhibit limited visuospatial reasoning capabilities, when compared with human participants, highlighting the need for more cognitively grounded evaluation frameworks.

AI.tldr: Mind's Eye是一个评估多模态大语言模型视觉认知和空间推理能力的基准测试，包含8个任务，采用A-R-T分类法（抽象、关系、转换）。人类准确率达80%，而最佳MLLM低于50%，揭示了当前模型在视觉注意力分配、内部感知操作和视觉概念抽象方面的局限性。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态大语言模型在视觉语言基准测试上取得了显著进展，但其视觉认知和空间推理能力仍未被充分理解。研究者希望创建一个受人类智力测试启发的评估框架，系统性地衡量MLLM在这些核心认知能力上的表现。
AI.method: 研究者开发了"Mind's Eye"基准测试，包含8个视觉认知任务，采用新颖的A-R-T分类法：抽象（Abstraction）、关系（Relation）、转换（Transformation）。这些任务基于经典人类智力测试设计，评估模式归纳、类比关系映射和心理转换等流体智力核心过程。评估了多种闭源和开源MLLM，并与人类参与者表现进行对比。
AI.result: 人类参与者在基准测试中达到80%的准确率，而表现最佳的MLLM准确率仍低于50%。错误分析揭示了三个主要失败原因：(1) 视觉注意力分配不当，(2) 内部感知操作能力有限，(3) 对底层视觉概念的抽象能力较弱。
AI.conclusion: 当前多模态大语言模型在视觉空间推理能力方面与人类相比存在显著差距，突显了需要更基于认知科学的评估框架来推动模型发展。该研究为理解MLLM的认知局限性提供了重要见解。

title: Limits of Lamarckian Evolution Under Pressure of Morphological Novelty
summary: Lamarckian inheritance has been shown to be a powerful accelerator in systems where the joint evolution of robot morphologies and controllers is enhanced with individual learning. Its defining advantage lies in the offspring inheriting controllers learned by their parents. The efficacy of this option, however, relies on morphological similarity between parent and offspring. In this study, we examine how Lamarckian inheritance performs when the search process is driven toward high morphological variance, potentially straining the requirement for parent-offspring similarity. Using a system of modular robots that can evolve and learn to solve a locomotion task, we compare Darwinian and Lamarckian evolution to determine how they respond to shifting from pure task-based selection to a multi-objective pressure that also rewards morphological novelty. Our results confirm that Lamarckian evolution outperforms Darwinian evolution when optimizing task-performance alone. However, introducing selection pressure for morphological diversity causes a substantial performance drop, which is much greater in the Lamarckian system. Further analyses show that promoting diversity reduces parent-offspring similarity, which in turn reduces the benefits of inheriting controllers learned by parents. These results reveal the limits of Lamarckian evolution by exposing a fundamental trade-off between inheritance-based exploitation and diversity-driven exploration.

AI.tldr: 拉马克遗传在机器人形态-控制器协同进化中加速优化，但需要亲代-子代形态相似性；当引入形态多样性选择压力时，其优势大幅下降
AI.motivation: 研究拉马克遗传在追求高形态多样性的进化搜索中的表现，探索亲代-子代形态相似性要求与多样性探索之间的权衡关系
AI.method: 使用模块化机器人系统，比较达尔文进化与拉马克进化在不同选择压力下的表现：纯任务性能优化 vs 多目标优化（任务性能+形态新颖性）
AI.result: 拉马克进化在纯任务优化中优于达尔文进化；但引入形态多样性选择压力后，拉马克系统性能下降更显著；多样性降低亲代-子代相似性，削弱了学习控制器继承的优势
AI.conclusion: 揭示了拉马克进化的局限性：在基于继承的利用与多样性驱动的探索之间存在根本性权衡，形态多样性会削弱拉马克遗传的优势

title: Adaptive multi-fidelity optimization with fast learning rates
comment: Published at International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Statistics (AISTATS) 2020
summary: In multi-fidelity optimization, biased approximations of varying costs of the target function are available. This paper studies the problem of optimizing a locally smooth function with a limited budget, where the learner has to make a tradeoff between the cost and the bias of these approximations. We first prove lower bounds for the simple regret under different assumptions on the fidelities, based on a cost-to-bias function. We then present the Kometo algorithm which achieves, with additional logarithmic factors, the same rates without any knowledge of the function smoothness and fidelity assumptions, and improves previously proven guarantees. We finally empirically show that our algorithm outperforms previous multi-fidelity optimization methods without the knowledge of problem-dependent parameters.

AI.tldr: 提出Kometo算法用于多保真度优化，在未知函数平滑度和保真度假设的情况下实现接近最优的简单遗憾，改进了现有方法。
AI.motivation: 在多保真度优化中，学习者需要在不同保真度近似（具有不同成本和偏差）之间进行权衡，以在有限预算下优化目标函数。现有方法通常需要已知问题相关参数（如函数平滑度和保真度假设），这在实际应用中不现实。
AI.method: 首先基于成本-偏差函数在不同保真度假设下推导简单遗憾的下界。然后提出Kometo算法，该算法无需已知函数平滑度和保真度假设，仅通过额外对数因子即可达到相同的最优速率。
AI.result: 理论证明Kometo算法在未知问题参数的情况下实现了接近最优的简单遗憾。实验结果表明，该算法在无需已知问题相关参数的情况下优于现有的多保真度优化方法。
AI.conclusion: Kometo算法为多保真度优化提供了一个实用的解决方案，能够在未知函数平滑度和保真度假设的情况下实现接近最优的性能，解决了实际应用中参数未知的问题。

title: Elucidating the SNR-t Bias of Diffusion Probabilistic Models
summary: Diffusion Probabilistic Models have demonstrated remarkable performance across a wide range of generative tasks. However, we have observed that these models often suffer from a Signal-to-Noise Ratio-timestep (SNR-t) bias. This bias refers to the misalignment between the SNR of the denoising sample and its corresponding timestep during the inference phase. Specifically, during training, the SNR of a sample is strictly coupled with its timestep. However, this correspondence is disrupted during inference, leading to error accumulation and impairing the generation quality. We provide comprehensive empirical evidence and theoretical analysis to substantiate this phenomenon and propose a simple yet effective differential correction method to mitigate the SNR-t bias. Recognizing that diffusion models typically reconstruct low-frequency components before focusing on high-frequency details during the reverse denoising process, we decompose samples into various frequency components and apply differential correction to each component individually. Extensive experiments show that our approach significantly improves the generation quality of various diffusion models (IDDPM, ADM, DDIM, A-DPM, EA-DPM, EDM, PFGM++, and FLUX) on datasets of various resolutions with negligible computational overhead. The code is at https://github.com/AMAP-ML/DCW.

AI.tldr: 该论文发现扩散概率模型存在SNR-t偏差问题，即在推理阶段去噪样本的信噪比与其对应时间步长不匹配，导致误差累积和生成质量下降。作者提出了一种简单有效的差分校正方法来缓解此偏差。
AI.motivation: 扩散概率模型在各种生成任务中表现出色，但作者观察到这些模型经常遭受SNR-t偏差问题。这种偏差指的是在推理阶段，去噪样本的信噪比与其对应时间步长之间的错位。在训练期间，样本的信噪比严格与其时间步长耦合，但在推理过程中这种对应关系被破坏，导致误差累积并损害生成质量。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种简单而有效的差分校正方法。认识到扩散模型通常在反向去噪过程中先重建低频分量再关注高频细节，作者将样本分解为不同频率分量，并对每个分量分别应用差分校正。该方法计算开销极小，可应用于多种扩散模型。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，该方法显著提高了多种扩散模型（IDDPM、ADM、DDIM、A-DPM、EA-DPM、EDM、PFGM++和FLUX）在各种分辨率数据集上的生成质量，且计算开销可忽略不计。
AI.conclusion: 该论文识别并分析了扩散模型中的SNR-t偏差问题，提出了一种有效的差分校正方法。该方法简单、通用且计算高效，能显著提升多种扩散模型的生成性能。

title: ChemGraph-XANES: An Agentic Framework for XANES Simulation and Analysis
summary: Computational X-ray absorption near-edge structure (XANES) is widely used to probe local coordination environments, oxidation states, and electronic structure in chemically complex systems. However, the use of computational XANES at scale is constrained more by workflow complexity than by the underlying simulation method itself. To address this challenge, we present ChemGraph-XANES, an agentic framework for automated XANES simulation and analysis that unifies natural-language task specification, structure acquisition, FDMNES input generation, task-parallel execution, spectral normalization, and provenance-aware data curation. Built on ASE, FDMNES, Parsl, and a LangGraph/LangChain-based tool interface, the framework exposes XANES workflow operations as typed Python tools that can be orchestrated by large language model (LLM) agents. In multi-agent mode, a retrieval-augmented expert agent consults the FDMNES manual to ground parameter selection, while executor agents translate user requests into structured tool calls. We demonstrate documentation-grounded parameter retrieval and show that the same workflow supports both explicit structure-file inputs and chemistry-level natural-language requests. Because independent XANES calculations are naturally task-parallel, the framework is well suited for high-throughput deployment on high-performance computing (HPC) systems, enabling scalable XANES database generation for downstream analysis and machine-learning applications. ChemGraph-XANES thus provides a reproducible and extensible workflow layer for physics-based XANES simulation, spectral curation, and agent-compatible computational spectroscopy.

AI.tldr: ChemGraph-XANES是一个基于智能体框架的自动化XANES模拟分析系统，通过自然语言任务规范、结构获取、并行计算和溯源数据管理，解决了计算XANES工作流程复杂性的问题。
AI.motivation: 计算X射线吸收近边结构(XANES)广泛用于探测复杂化学系统的局部配位环境、氧化态和电子结构，但其大规模应用受到工作流程复杂性的限制，而非基础模拟方法本身。
AI.method: 提出ChemGraph-XANES智能体框架，整合自然语言任务规范、结构获取、FDMNES输入生成、任务并行执行、光谱归一化和溯源感知数据管理。基于ASE、FDMNES、Parsl和LangGraph/LangChain工具接口，将XANES工作流操作暴露为类型化Python工具，可由大语言模型智能体编排。在多智能体模式下，检索增强的专家智能体参考FDMNES手册进行参数选择，执行智能体将用户请求转换为结构化工具调用。
AI.result: 展示了基于文档的参数检索能力，证明同一工作流支持显式结构文件输入和化学级自然语言请求。由于独立的XANES计算本质上是任务并行的，该框架非常适合在高性能计算系统上进行高通量部署，能够为下游分析和机器学习应用生成可扩展的XANES数据库。
AI.conclusion: ChemGraph-XANES为基于物理的XANES模拟、光谱管理和智能体兼容的计算光谱学提供了一个可重现且可扩展的工作流层，解决了工作流程复杂性的瓶颈问题。

title: Continual Hand-Eye Calibration for Open-world Robotic Manipulation
summary: Hand-eye calibration through visual localization is a critical capability for robotic manipulation in open-world environments. However, most deep learning-based calibration models suffer from catastrophic forgetting when adapting into unseen data amongst open-world scene changes, while simple rehearsal-based continual learning strategy cannot well mitigate this issue. To overcome this challenge, we propose a continual hand-eye calibration framework, enabling robots to adapt to sequentially encountered open-world manipulation scenes through spatially replay strategy and structure-preserving distillation. Specifically, a Spatial-Aware Replay Strategy (SARS) constructs a geometrically uniform replay buffer that ensures comprehensive coverage of each scene pose space, replacing redundant adjacent frames with maximally informative viewpoints. Meanwhile, a Structure-Preserving Dual Distillation (SPDD) is proposed to decompose localization knowledge into coarse scene layout and fine pose precision, and distills them separately to alleviate both types of forgetting during continual adaptation. As a new manipulation scene arrives, SARS provides geometrically representative replay samples from all prior scenes, and SPDD applies structured distillation on these samples to retain previously learned knowledge. After training on the new scene, SARS incorporates selected samples from the new scene into the replay buffer for future rehearsal, allowing the model to continuously accumulate multi-scene calibration capability. Experiments on multiple public datasets show significant anti scene forgetting performance, maintaining accuracy on past scenes while preserving adaptation to new scenes, confirming the effectiveness of the framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种持续手眼标定框架，通过空间感知重放策略和结构保持双重蒸馏，解决深度学习标定模型在开放世界场景变化中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习手眼标定模型在适应开放世界新场景时存在灾难性遗忘问题，而简单的重放策略无法有效缓解这一问题。需要一种能够持续适应开放世界场景变化的标定方法。
AI.method: 提出持续手眼标定框架，包含两个核心组件：1) 空间感知重放策略(SARS)，构建几何均匀的重放缓冲区，确保全面覆盖每个场景的姿态空间；2) 结构保持双重蒸馏(SPDD)，将定位知识分解为粗略场景布局和精细姿态精度，分别进行蒸馏以缓解两种类型的遗忘。
AI.result: 在多个公共数据集上的实验表明，该方法具有显著的抗场景遗忘性能，能够在保持对新场景适应能力的同时，维持对过去场景的标定精度。
AI.conclusion: 提出的持续手眼标定框架通过空间感知重放和结构保持蒸馏，有效解决了开放世界机器人操作中的灾难性遗忘问题，使机器人能够持续适应新场景并保持多场景标定能力。

title: Enhancing AI and Dynamical Subseasonal Forecasts with Probabilistic Bias Correction
summary: Decision-makers rely on weather forecasts to plant crops, manage wildfires, allocate water and energy, and prepare for weather extremes. Today, such forecasts enjoy unprecedented accuracy out to two weeks thanks to steady advances in physics-based dynamical models and data-driven artificial intelligence (AI) models. However, model skill drops precipitously at subseasonal timescales (2 - 6 weeks ahead), due to compounding errors and persistent biases. To counter this degradation, we introduce probabilistic bias correction (PBC), a machine learning framework that substantially reduces systematic error by learning to correct historical probabilistic forecasts. When applied to the leading dynamical and AI models from the European Centre for Medium-Range Weather Forecasts (ECMWF), PBC doubles the subseasonal skill of the AI Forecasting System and improves the skill of the operationally-debiased dynamical model for 91% of pressure, 92% of temperature, and 98% of precipitation targets. We designed PBC for operational deployment, and, in ECMWF's 2025 real-time forecasting competition, its global forecasts placed first for all weather variables and lead times, outperforming the dynamical models from six operational forecasting centers, an international dynamical multi-model ensemble, ECMWF's AI Forecasting System, and the forecasting systems of 34 teams worldwide. These probabilistic skill gains translate into more accurate prediction of extreme events and have the potential to improve agricultural planning, energy management, and disaster preparedness in vulnerable communities.

AI.tldr: 论文提出概率偏差校正(PBC)框架，通过机器学习校正历史概率预报的系统性误差，显著提升次季节尺度(2-6周)天气预报技能，在ECMWF实时预报竞赛中全面领先。
AI.motivation: 次季节尺度(2-6周)天气预报技能急剧下降，主要由于误差累积和系统性偏差。现有物理动力模型和AI模型在该时间尺度上表现不佳，限制了农业种植、野火管理、水资源分配和极端天气应对等决策支持能力。
AI.method: 提出概率偏差校正(PBC)机器学习框架，通过学习校正历史概率预报来减少系统性误差。该方法可应用于领先的动力模型和AI模型，专门设计用于业务化部署。
AI.result: PBC使ECMWF的AI预报系统次季节技能翻倍，改善91%气压、92%温度和98%降水目标的业务去偏差动力模型技能。在ECMWF 2025实时预报竞赛中，PBC在所有天气变量和预报时效上均排名第一，超越了6个业务预报中心的动力模型、国际动力多模式集合、ECMWF的AI预报系统以及全球34个团队的预报系统。
AI.conclusion: PBC框架显著提升次季节概率预报技能，能够更准确地预测极端事件，有潜力改善农业规划、能源管理和脆弱社区的灾害准备，为业务天气预报提供了有效的偏差校正解决方案。

title: Ranking XAI Methods for Head and Neck Cancer Outcome Prediction
comment: 4-page conference paper, accepted at IEEE ISBI 2026 (International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging)
summary: For head and neck cancer (HNC) patients, prognostic outcome prediction can support personalized treatment strategy selection. Improving prediction performance of HNC outcomes has been extensively explored by using advanced artificial intelligence (AI) techniques on PET/CT data. However, the interpretability of AI remains a critical obstacle for its clinical adoption. Unlike previous HNC studies that empirically selected explainable AI (XAI) techniques, we are the first to comprehensively evaluate and rank 13 XAI methods across 24 metrics, covering faithfulness, robustness, complexity and plausibility. Experimental results on the multi-center HECKTOR challenge dataset show large variations across evaluation aspects among different XAI methods, with Integrated Gradients (IG) and DeepLIFT (DL) consistently obtained high rankings for faithfulness, complexity and plausibility. This work highlights the importance of comprehensive XAI method evaluation and can be extended to other medical imaging tasks.

AI.tldr: 该研究首次对头颈癌预后预测中的13种可解释AI方法进行了全面评估，使用24个指标从忠实性、鲁棒性、复杂性和合理性四个维度进行排名，发现Integrated Gradients和DeepLIFT在多个维度表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI技术在头颈癌预后预测中显示出潜力，但其可解释性不足阻碍了临床采用。先前研究通常经验性地选择可解释AI方法，缺乏系统性评估和比较。
AI.method: 研究采用多中心HECKTOR挑战数据集，对13种可解释AI方法进行全面评估，使用24个指标覆盖四个关键维度：忠实性（模型预测与解释的一致性）、鲁棒性（解释的稳定性）、复杂性（解释的简洁性）和合理性（临床相关性）。
AI.result: 实验结果显示不同可解释AI方法在评估维度上存在显著差异。Integrated Gradients和DeepLIFT在忠实性、复杂性和合理性三个维度上持续获得高排名，表现最为稳定和优秀。
AI.conclusion: 该研究强调了全面评估可解释AI方法的重要性，为头颈癌预后预测提供了方法选择指导，其评估框架可扩展到其他医学影像任务中，促进AI在临床的可靠应用。

title: From Seeing to Simulating: Generative High-Fidelity Simulation with Digital Cousins for Generalizable Robot Learning and Evaluation
summary: Learning robust robot policies in real-world environments requires diverse data augmentation, yet scaling real-world data collection is costly due to the need for acquiring physical assets and reconfiguring environments. Therefore, augmenting real-world scenes into simulation has become a practical augmentation for efficient learning and evaluation. We present a generative framework that establishes a generative real-to-sim mapping from real-world panoramas to high-fidelity simulation scenes, and further synthesize diverse cousin scenes via semantic and geometric editing. Combined with high-quality physics engines and realistic assets, the generated scenes support interactive manipulation tasks. Additionally, we incorporate multi-room stitching to construct consistent large-scale environments for long-horizon navigation across complex layouts. Experiments demonstrate a strong sim-to-real correlation validating our platform's fidelity, and show that extensively scaling up data generation leads to significantly better generalization to unseen scene and object variations, demonstrating the effectiveness of Digital Cousins for generalizable robot learning and evaluation.

AI.tldr: 提出一个生成式框架，将真实世界全景图映射到高保真仿真场景，并通过语义和几何编辑合成多样化"表亲场景"，支持机器人交互任务和大规模导航
AI.motivation: 真实世界机器人策略学习需要多样化数据增强，但物理数据收集成本高昂。通过将真实场景增强到仿真中，可以实现高效学习和评估
AI.method: 建立生成式真实到仿真映射框架，从真实全景图生成高保真仿真场景；通过语义和几何编辑合成多样化表亲场景；结合高质量物理引擎和真实资产；采用多房间拼接构建大规模一致环境
AI.result: 实验显示强烈的仿真到真实相关性验证了平台保真度；大规模数据生成显著提高了对未见场景和物体变化的泛化能力
AI.conclusion: Digital Cousins框架为可泛化的机器人学习和评估提供了有效方法，通过生成多样化仿真场景解决了真实数据收集的扩展性问题

title: AstroVLM: Expert Multi-agent Collaborative Reasoning for Astronomical Imaging Quality Diagnosis
summary: Vision Language Models (VLMs) have been applied to several specific domains and have shown strong problem-solving capabilities. However, astronomical imaging, a quite complex problem involving multidisciplinary knowledge and several subtasks, has not been adequately studied. Due to the complexity of the astronomical imaging process, both world-class astronomical organizations, such as NASA, and expert enthusiasts devote a great deal of time and effort. This is because the processes in astronomical imaging have complex underlying correlations that significantly influence one another, making the quality diagnosis and error localization of astronomical images challenging. To address this problem, we propose AstroVLM, a collaborative multi-agent system for diagnosing the quality of astronomical images. Experiment results show that AstroVLM outperforms all baselines on real-world astronomical imaging quality diagnosis tasks, providing a reference for language models to handle complicated multi-process tasks.

AI.tldr: AstroVLM：基于视觉语言模型的多智能体协作系统，用于天文图像质量诊断
AI.motivation: 天文成像是一个涉及多学科知识和多个子任务的复杂问题，现有视觉语言模型在这一领域研究不足。天文成像过程复杂，各环节之间存在强相关性，导致质量诊断和错误定位困难，需要大量专家时间和精力。
AI.method: 提出AstroVLM，一个协作式多智能体系统，专门用于天文图像质量诊断。系统利用视觉语言模型处理天文成像这一复杂多流程任务。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，AstroVLM在真实世界天文成像质量诊断任务中优于所有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: AstroVLM为语言模型处理复杂多流程任务提供了参考，展示了视觉语言模型在天文成像这一复杂领域的问题解决能力。

title: Fuzzy Logic Theory-based Adaptive Reward Shaping for Robust Reinforcement Learning (FARS)
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) often struggles in real-world tasks with high-dimensional state spaces and long horizons, where sparse or fixed rewards severely slow down exploration and cause agents to get trapped in local optima. This paper presents a fuzzy logic based reward shaping method that integrates human intuition into RL reward design. By encoding expert knowledge into adaptive and interpreable terms, fuzzy rules promote stable learning and reduce sensitivity to hyperparameters. The proposed method leverages these properties to adapt reward contributions based on the agent state, enabling smoother transitions between fast motion and precise control in challenging navigation tasks. Extensive simulation results on autonomous drone racing benchmarks show stable learning behavior and consistent task performance across scenarios of increasing difficulty. The proposed method achieves faster convergence and reduced performance variability across training seeds in more challenging environments, with success rates improving by up to approximately 5 percent compared to non fuzzy reward formulations.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于模糊逻辑的奖励塑形方法，将人类直觉融入强化学习奖励设计，在无人机竞速任务中实现更稳定的学习和更快的收敛。
AI.motivation: 强化学习在高维状态空间和长时程任务中面临探索困难，稀疏或固定奖励导致学习缓慢并陷入局部最优。需要将专家知识融入奖励设计以改善学习稳定性。
AI.method: 基于模糊逻辑的奖励塑形方法，将专家知识编码为自适应且可解释的模糊规则，根据智能体状态动态调整奖励贡献，实现快速运动与精确控制之间的平滑过渡。
AI.result: 在自主无人机竞速基准测试中，该方法表现出稳定的学习行为和一致的任务性能。在更具挑战性的环境中，相比非模糊奖励公式，收敛速度更快且性能变异性降低，成功率提升约5%。
AI.conclusion: 模糊逻辑奖励塑形能有效将人类直觉融入强化学习，改善探索效率和学习稳定性，在复杂导航任务中实现更好的性能。

title: OT on the Map: Quantifying Domain Shifts in Geographic Space
summary: In computer vision and machine learning for geographic data, out-of-domain generalization is a pervasive challenge, arising from uneven global data coverage and distribution shifts across geographic regions. Though models are frequently trained in one region and deployed in another, there is no principled method for determining when this cross-region adaptation will be successful. A well-defined notion of distance between distributions can effectively quantify how different a new target domain is compared to the domains used for model training, which in turn could support model training and deployment decisions. In this paper, we propose a strategy for computing distances between geospatial domains that leverages geographic information with Optimal Transport methods (GeoSpOT). In our experiments, GeoSpOT distances emerge as effective predictors of cross-domain transfer difficulty. We further demonstrate that embeddings from pretrained location encoders provide information comparable to image/text embeddings, despite relying solely on longitude-latitude pairs as input. This allows users to get an approximation of out-of-domain performance for geospatial models, even when the exact downstream task is unknown, or no task-specific data is available. Building on these findings, we show that GeoSpOT distances can preemptively guide data selection and enable predictive tools to analyze regions where a model is likely to underperform.

AI.tldr: GeoSpOT：一种利用最优传输方法结合地理信息计算地理空间域间距离的方法，用于预测跨域迁移难度和指导模型部署决策
AI.motivation: 地理数据在计算机视觉和机器学习中存在域外泛化挑战，由于全球数据覆盖不均和地理区域间的分布偏移。当前缺乏原则性方法来确定跨区域适应的成功率，需要量化域间差异来支持模型训练和部署决策。
AI.method: 提出GeoSpOT方法，结合地理信息与最优传输方法计算地理空间域间距离。利用预训练位置编码器从经纬度对中提取嵌入信息，这些嵌入可与图像/文本嵌入相媲美。
AI.result: GeoSpOT距离能有效预测跨域迁移难度；位置编码器嵌入提供与图像/文本嵌入相当的信息；即使下游任务未知或无任务特定数据，也能近似估计域外性能；GeoSpOT距离可指导数据选择和预测模型可能表现不佳的区域。
AI.conclusion: GeoSpOT为地理空间模型提供了一种量化域间差异的方法，能够预测跨域迁移难度，指导数据选择，并识别模型可能表现不佳的区域，为解决地理数据域外泛化问题提供了有效工具。

title: Breakout-picker: Reducing false positives in deep learning-based borehole breakout characterization from acoustic image logs
summary: Borehole breakouts are stress-induced spalling on the borehole wall, which are identifiable in acoustic image logs as paired zones with near-symmetry azimuths, low acoustic amplitudes, and increased borehole radius. Accurate breakout characterization is crucial for in-situ stress analysis. In recent years, deep learning has been introduced to automate the time-consuming and labor-intensive breakout picking process. However, existing approaches often suffer from misclassification of non-breakout features, leading to high false positive rates. To address this limitation, this study develops a deep learning framework, termed Breakout-picker, with a specific focus on reducing false positives in automatic breakout characterization. Breakout-picker reduces false positives through two strategies. First, the training of Breakout-picker incorporates negative samples of non-breakout features, including natural fractures, keyseats, and logging artifacts. They share similar characteristics with breakouts, such as low acoustic amplitude or locally enlarged borehole radius. These negative training samples enables Breakout-picker to better discriminate true breakouts and similar non-breakout features. Second, candidate breakouts identified by Breakout-picker are further validated by azimuthal symmetry criteria, whereby detections that do not exhibit the near-symmetry characteristics of breakout azimuth are excluded. The performance of Breakout-picker is evaluated using three acoustic image log datasets from different regions. The results demonstrate that Breakout-picker outperforms other automatic methods with higher accuracy and substantially lower false positive rates. By reducing false positives, Breakout-picker enhances the reliability of automatic breakout characterization from acoustic image logs, which in turn benefits in-situ stress analysis based on borehole breakouts.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个名为Breakout-picker的深度学习框架，通过整合负样本训练和方位对称性验证来降低自动识别钻孔崩落时的误报率。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在自动识别钻孔崩落时存在高误报率问题，经常将非崩落特征（如天然裂缝、键槽、测井伪影）误分类为崩落，这影响了原位应力分析的准确性。
AI.method: 提出Breakout-picker深度学习框架，采用两种策略降低误报：1）训练时加入非崩落特征的负样本（天然裂缝、键槽、测井伪影）；2）对识别出的候选崩落进行方位对称性验证，排除不符合近对称特征的结果。
AI.result: 使用三个不同区域的声波图像测井数据集进行评估，Breakout-picker在准确率上优于其他自动方法，且误报率显著降低。
AI.conclusion: Breakout-picker通过降低误报率提高了声波图像测井中自动崩落识别的可靠性，从而改善了基于钻孔崩落的原位应力分析。

title: JumpLoRA: Sparse Adapters for Continual Learning in Large Language Models
summary: Adapter-based methods have become a cost-effective approach to continual learning (CL) for Large Language Models (LLMs), by sequentially learning a low-rank update matrix for each task. To mitigate catastrophic forgetting, state-of-the-art approaches impose constraints on new adapters with respect to the previous ones, by targeting either subspace or coordinate-wise interference. In this paper, we propose JumpLoRA, a novel framework to adaptively induce sparsity in the Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) blocks through the use of JumpReLU gating. The method achieves dynamic parameter isolation, which helps prevent task interference. We demonstrate that our method is highly modular and compatible with LoRA-based CL approaches. Specifically, it significantly boosts the performance of IncLoRA and outperforms the leading state-of-the-art CL method, ELLA.

AI.tldr: 提出JumpLoRA框架，通过JumpReLU门控在LoRA块中自适应诱导稀疏性，实现动态参数隔离以防止任务干扰，提升持续学习性能
AI.motivation: 现有基于适配器的大语言模型持续学习方法通过低秩更新矩阵学习新任务，但存在灾难性遗忘问题。当前最先进方法通过对新适配器施加约束来缓解遗忘，但主要针对子空间或坐标级干扰，需要更有效的参数隔离机制
AI.method: 提出JumpLoRA框架，在LoRA块中使用JumpReLU门控自适应诱导稀疏性，实现动态参数隔离。该方法具有高度模块化特性，可与基于LoRA的持续学习方法兼容
AI.result: JumpLoRA显著提升了IncLoRA的性能，并超越了当前最先进的持续学习方法ELLA，证明了其有效性
AI.conclusion: JumpLoRA通过自适应稀疏诱导和动态参数隔离机制，有效防止任务干扰，为基于LoRA的大语言模型持续学习提供了高效解决方案

title: PLAF: Pixel-wise Language-Aligned Feature Extraction for Efficient 3D Scene Understanding
summary: Accurate open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding requires semantic representations that are both language-aligned and spatially precise at the pixel level, while remaining scalable when lifted to 3D space. However, existing representations struggle to jointly satisfy these requirements, and densely propagating pixel-wise semantics to 3D often results in substantial redundancy, leading to inefficient storage and querying in large-scale scenes. To address these challenges, we present \emph{PLAF}, a Pixel-wise Language-Aligned Feature extraction framework that enables dense and accurate semantic alignment in 2D without sacrificing open-vocabulary expressiveness. Building upon this representation, we further design an efficient semantic storage and querying scheme that significantly reduces redundancy across both 2D and 3D domains. Experimental results show that \emph{PLAF} provides a strong semantic foundation for accurate and efficient open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding. The codes are publicly available at https://github.com/RockWenJJ/PLAF.

AI.tldr: PLAF是一个像素级语言对齐特征提取框架，用于实现准确高效的开放词汇3D场景理解，通过减少2D和3D语义冗余来提升存储和查询效率。
AI.motivation: 现有语义表示难以同时满足语言对齐、像素级空间精度和3D可扩展性要求，且密集像素语义传播到3D会导致显著冗余，影响大规模场景的存储和查询效率。
AI.method: 提出PLAF框架：1）在2D中提取密集准确的像素级语言对齐特征，保持开放词汇表达能力；2）设计高效的语义存储和查询方案，显著减少2D和3D领域的冗余。
AI.result: 实验结果表明PLAF为准确高效的开放词汇3D场景理解提供了强大的语义基础，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: PLAF通过像素级语言对齐特征提取和高效的语义存储方案，解决了现有3D场景理解中语义表示的语言对齐、空间精度和可扩展性之间的矛盾，实现了准确高效的开放词汇3D场景理解。

title: Sketching the Readout of Large Language Models for Scalable Data Attribution and Valuation
summary: Data attribution and valuation are critical for understanding data-model synergy for Large Language Models (LLMs), yet existing gradient-based methods suffer from scalability challenges on LLMs. Inspired by human cognition, where decision making relies on a focused readout of relevant memories rather than replaying all pathways, we introduce RISE (Readout Influence Sketching Estimator). Instead of computing and indexing gradients across the entire LLM, RISE focuses on influence hotspots at the output layer, where influence signals concentrate, and the gradient admits a decomposed outer-product form. This enables a dual-channel representation combining a lexical residual channel (RH) and a semantic projected-error channel (GH). Applying CountSketch projections to these channels achieves strong compression while maintaining accurate attribution. Across the OLMo (1B-32B) and Pythia (14M-6.9B) families, RISE reduces index storage by up to 112$\times$ compared to RapidIn and scales to 32B parameters LLM, where gradient-based baselines such as RapidIn and ZO-Inf become memory-infeasible. We evaluate RISE on two paradigms: (1) retrospective attribution, retrieving influential training examples for specific predictions, and (2) prospective valuation, scoring candidate data utility zero-shot. We validate RISE on three tasks: Howdy backdoor data detection, Finance-Medical domain separation, and Brain Rot high-quality data selection. In a closed-loop Brain Rot study, continued pretraining on RISE-selected data yields consistent downstream improvements. Overall, RISE provides a practical and scalable primitive for influence analysis and training-data selection in modern large language models.

AI.tldr: RISE是一种用于大语言模型数据归因和评估的轻量级方法，通过聚焦输出层的影响热点，使用双通道表示和CountSketch投影实现高效压缩，相比现有方法减少112倍存储，可扩展到32B参数模型。
AI.motivation: 现有基于梯度的数据归因方法在大语言模型上存在可扩展性挑战，无法处理大规模参数模型。受人类认知中决策依赖于相关记忆的聚焦读取而非重放所有路径的启发，需要开发更高效的数据影响分析方法。
AI.method: RISE聚焦于输出层的影响热点，利用梯度可分解为外积形式的特性，构建双通道表示：词汇残差通道(RH)和语义投影误差通道(GH)。应用CountSketch投影对这些通道进行压缩，在保持准确归因的同时大幅减少存储需求。
AI.result: 在OLMo(1B-32B)和Pythia(14M-6.9B)模型系列上，RISE相比RapidIn减少索引存储达112倍，可扩展到32B参数模型，而基于梯度的基线方法(RapidIn和ZO-Inf)在内存上不可行。在Howdy后门数据检测、金融-医疗领域分离和Brain Rot高质量数据选择三个任务上验证有效。
AI.conclusion: RISE为大语言模型中的影响分析和训练数据选择提供了实用且可扩展的基础工具，通过聚焦输出层的影响热点和高效的压缩技术，解决了现有方法在大规模模型上的可扩展性问题。

title: IA-CLAHE: Image-Adaptive Clip Limit Estimation for CLAHE
comment: Accepted to NTIRE 2026 Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary: This paper proposes image-adaptive contrast limited adaptive histogram equalization (IA-CLAHE). Conventional CLAHE is widely used to boost the performance of various computer vision tasks and to improve visual quality for human perception in practical industrial applications. CLAHE applies contrast limited histogram equalization to each local region to enhance local contrast. However, CLAHE often leads to over-enhancement, because the contrast-limiting parameter clip limit is fixed regardless of the histogram distribution of each local region. Our IA-CLAHE addresses this limitation by adaptively estimating tile-wise clip limits from the input image. To achieve this, we train a lightweight clip limits estimator with a differentiable extension of CLAHE, enabling end-to-end optimization. Unlike prior learning-based CLAHE methods, IA-CLAHE does not require pre-searched ground-truth clip limits or task-specific datasets, because it learns to map input image histograms toward a domain-invariant uniform distribution, enabling zero-shot generalization across diverse conditions. Experimental results show that IA-CLAHE consistently improves recognition performance, while simultaneously enhancing visual quality for human perception, without requiring any task-specific training data.

AI.tldr: 提出IA-CLAHE方法，通过自适应估计每个局部区域的对比度限制参数，解决传统CLAHE固定clip limit导致的过增强问题，无需任务特定训练数据即可实现零样本泛化。
AI.motivation: 传统CLAHE在计算机视觉任务和工业应用中广泛用于提升性能和视觉质量，但其固定的对比度限制参数（clip limit）不考虑每个局部区域的直方图分布，经常导致过增强问题。
AI.method: 提出IA-CLAHE方法：1）训练轻量级clip limit估计器，从输入图像自适应估计每个tile的clip limit；2）使用CLAHE的可微分扩展实现端到端优化；3）通过学习将输入图像直方图映射到域不变均匀分布，无需预搜索ground-truth clip limit或任务特定数据集。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，IA-CLAHE在提升识别性能的同时，也改善了人类感知的视觉质量，且无需任何任务特定训练数据，在各种条件下都能实现一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: IA-CLAHE通过自适应估计局部对比度限制参数，有效解决了传统CLAHE的过增强问题，实现了零样本泛化能力，在提升计算机视觉任务性能的同时改善了视觉质量，具有实际应用价值。

title: From Vulnerable Data Subjects to Vulnerabilizing Data Practices: Navigating the Protection Paradox in AI-Based Analyses of Platformized Lives
comment: In The 2026 ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT '26), June 25-28, 2026, Montreal, QC, Canada. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 23 pages
summary: This paper traces a conceptual shift from understanding vulnerability as a static, essentialized property of data subjects to examining how it is actively enacted through data practices. Unlike reflexive ethical frameworks focused on missing or counter-data, we address the condition of abundance inherent to platformized life-a context where a near inexhaustible mass of data points already exists, shifting the ethical challenge to the researcher's choices in operating upon this existing mass. We argue that the ethical integrity of data science depends not just on who is studied, but on how technical pipelines transform "vulnerable" individuals into data subjects whose vulnerability can be further precarized. We develop this argument through an AI for Social Good (AI4SG) case: a journalist's request to use computer vision to quantify child presence in monetized YouTube 'family vlogs' for regulatory advocacy. This case reveals a "protection paradox": how data-driven efforts to protect vulnerable subjects can inadvertently impose new forms of computational exposure, reductionism, and extraction. Using this request as a point of departure, we perform a methodological deconstruction of the AI pipeline to show how granular technical decisions are ethically constitutive. We contribute a reflexive ethics protocol that translates these insights into a reflexive roadmap for research ethics surrounding platformized data subjects. Organized around four critical junctures-dataset design, operationalization, inference, and dissemination-the protocol identifies technical questions and ethical tensions where well-intentioned work can slide into renewed extraction or exposure. For every decision point, the protocol offers specific prompts to navigate four cross-cutting vulnerabilizing factors: exposure, monetization, narrative fixing, and algorithmic optimization. Rather than uncritically...

AI.tldr: 论文探讨数据实践中脆弱性的主动构建，而非将其视为数据主体的静态属性，提出AI4SG案例揭示"保护悖论"，开发了包含四个关键节点的反思性伦理协议
AI.motivation: 传统伦理框架关注缺失数据或反数据，但平台化生活带来数据过剩，研究者的技术选择如何将"脆弱"个体转化为数据主体并进一步加剧其脆弱性成为新的伦理挑战
AI.method: 通过AI4SG案例研究（使用计算机视觉量化YouTube家庭vlog中的儿童存在），对AI技术流程进行方法论解构，开发包含数据集设计、操作化、推断和传播四个关键节点的反思性伦理协议
AI.result: 揭示了"保护悖论"：旨在保护脆弱主体的数据驱动努力可能无意中施加新的计算暴露、还原论和提取形式；技术决策在伦理上是构成性的，需要系统性反思
AI.conclusion: 数据科学的伦理完整性不仅取决于研究对象，更取决于技术流程如何转化脆弱性；提出的伦理协议通过四个关键节点和四个交叉脆弱化因素（暴露、货币化、叙事固定、算法优化）为平台化数据主体研究提供反思性路线图

title: Contact-Aware Planning and Control of Continuum Robots in Highly Constrained Environments
summary: Continuum robots are well suited for navigating confined and fragile environments, such as vascular or endoluminal anatomy, where contact with surrounding structures is often unavoidable. While controlled contact can assist motion, unfavorable contact can degrade controllability, induce kinematic singularities, or introduce safety risks. We present a contact-aware planning approach that evaluates contact quality, penalizing hazardous interactions, while permitting benign contact. The planner produces kinematically feasible trajectories and contact-aware Jacobians which can be used for closed-loop control in hardware experiments. We validate the approach by testing the integrated system (planning, control, and mechanical design) on anatomical models from patient scans. The planner generates effective plans for three common anatomical environments, and, in all hardware trials, the continuum robot was able to reach the target while avoiding dangerous tip contact (100% success). Mean tracking errors were 1.9 +/- 0.5 mm, 1.2 +/- 0.1 mm, and 1.7 +/- 0.2 mm across the three different environments. Ablation studies showed that penalizing end-of-continuum-segment (ECS) contact improved manipulability and prevented hardware failures. Overall, this work enables reliable, contact-aware navigation in highly constrained environments.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种连续体机器人的接触感知规划方法，能够在受限解剖环境中区分危险接触与良性接触，生成可行的运动轨迹和接触感知雅可比矩阵，实现安全导航。
AI.motivation: 连续体机器人在血管或腔内解剖等受限脆弱环境中导航时，与周围结构的接触不可避免。虽然可控接触有助于运动，但不理想的接触会降低可控性、引发运动学奇点或带来安全风险。需要一种能够评估接触质量、惩罚危险交互同时允许良性接触的规划方法。
AI.method: 开发了一种接触感知规划方法，该方法评估接触质量并惩罚危险交互，同时允许良性接触。规划器生成运动学可行的轨迹和接触感知雅可比矩阵，可用于硬件实验中的闭环控制。通过消融研究验证了惩罚连续体末端段接触对改善可操作性和防止硬件故障的重要性。
AI.result: 在基于患者扫描的解剖模型上验证了集成系统（规划、控制和机械设计）。规划器在三种常见解剖环境中生成了有效规划，所有硬件试验中连续体机器人都能到达目标同时避免危险的尖端接触（100%成功率）。三种不同环境中的平均跟踪误差分别为1.9±0.5mm、1.2±0.1mm和1.7±0.2mm。消融研究表明惩罚连续体末端段接触改善了可操作性并防止了硬件故障。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作实现了在高度受限环境中的可靠、接触感知导航，为连续体机器人在脆弱解剖环境中的安全操作提供了有效解决方案。

title: MMGait: Towards Multi-Modal Gait Recognition
summary: Gait recognition has emerged as a powerful biometric technique for identifying individuals at a distance without requiring user cooperation. Most existing methods focus primarily on RGB-derived modalities, which fall short in real-world scenarios requiring multi-modal collaboration and cross-modal retrieval. To overcome these challenges, we present MMGait, a comprehensive multi-modal gait benchmark integrating data from five heterogeneous sensors, including an RGB camera, a depth camera, an infrared camera, a LiDAR scanner, and a 4D Radar system. MMGait contains twelve modalities and 334,060 sequences from 725 subjects, enabling systematic exploration across geometric, photometric, and motion domains. Based on MMGait, we conduct extensive evaluations on single-modal, cross-modal, and multi-modal paradigms to analyze modality robustness and complementarity. Furthermore, we introduce a new task, Omni Multi-Modal Gait Recognition, which aims to unify the above three gait recognition paradigms within a single model. We also propose a simple yet powerful baseline, OmniGait, which learns a shared embedding space across diverse modalities and achieves promising recognition performance. The MMGait benchmark, codebase, and pretrained checkpoints are publicly available at https://github.com/BNU-IVC/MMGait.

AI.tldr: MMGait是一个全面的多模态步态识别基准，整合了5种异构传感器的12种模态数据，包含725个受试者的334,060个序列，支持单模态、跨模态和多模态评估，并提出了统一这三种范式的Omni多模态步态识别任务和OmniGait基线模型。
AI.motivation: 现有步态识别方法主要关注RGB衍生模态，在需要多模态协作和跨模态检索的真实场景中存在不足。需要构建一个全面的多模态基准来克服这些挑战。
AI.method: 提出了MMGait基准，整合了RGB相机、深度相机、红外相机、LiDAR扫描仪和4D雷达系统五种异构传感器的数据，包含12种模态。基于此基准，提出了Omni多模态步态识别任务，并设计了OmniGait基线模型，该模型学习跨不同模态的共享嵌入空间。
AI.result: MMGait基准包含725个受试者的334,060个序列，支持在几何、光度和运动域进行系统探索。OmniGait模型在统一单模态、跨模态和多模态步态识别方面表现出有前景的性能。
AI.conclusion: MMGait为多模态步态识别研究提供了全面的基准，提出的Omni多模态步态识别任务和OmniGait基线模型为统一不同识别范式提供了有效解决方案，推动了该领域的发展。

title: Training Time Prediction for Mixed Precision-based Distributed Training
summary: Accurate prediction of training time in distributed deep learning is crucial for resource allocation, cost estimation, and job scheduling. We observe that the floating-point precision setting is a key determinant of training time, leading to training time variations of ~2.4x over its minimum. However, existing studies on distributed training time prediction rely on static model computation graphs that do not capture precision variations, including mixed precision. According to our experiments, training time prediction without considering precision results in significant prediction errors - reaching up to 147.85% in mean absolute percentage error (MAPE). To address this issue, we propose a precision-aware distributed training time predictor that achieves robust accuracy across diverse precision settings, including mixed precision, with 9.8% MAPE.

AI.tldr: 提出精度感知的分布式深度学习训练时间预测器，解决现有方法因忽略浮点精度设置（包括混合精度）而导致预测误差高达147.85%的问题，新方法在多种精度设置下实现9.8%的平均绝对百分比误差。
AI.motivation: 分布式深度学习训练时间的准确预测对资源分配、成本估算和作业调度至关重要。研究发现浮点精度设置是训练时间的关键决定因素，可导致训练时间变化约2.4倍，而现有预测方法依赖静态模型计算图，无法捕捉精度变化（包括混合精度），导致预测误差显著。
AI.method: 提出精度感知的分布式训练时间预测器，能够考虑不同浮点精度设置（包括混合精度）对训练时间的影响，通过建模精度相关的计算和通信开销来实现准确预测。
AI.result: 实验表明，不考虑精度的训练时间预测会导致高达147.85%的平均绝对百分比误差（MAPE），而提出的精度感知预测器在多种精度设置（包括混合精度）下实现了9.8%的MAPE，表现出稳健的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 浮点精度设置是分布式深度学习训练时间预测的关键因素，忽略精度会导致显著预测误差。提出的精度感知预测器能够准确预测不同精度设置下的训练时间，为资源管理和调度提供可靠支持。

title: Factor Graph-Based Shape Estimation for Continuum Robots via Magnus Expansion
summary: Reconstructing the shape of continuum manipulators from sparse, noisy sensor data is a challenging task, owing to the infinite-dimensional nature of such systems. Existing approaches broadly trade off between parametric methods that yield compact state representations but lack probabilistic structure, and Cosserat rod inference on factor graphs, which provides principled uncertainty quantification at the cost of a state dimension that grows with the spatial discretization. This letter combines the strength of both paradigms by estimating the coefficients of a low-dimensional Geometric Variable Strain (GVS) parameterization within a factor graph framework. A novel kinematic factor, derived from the Magnus expansion of the strain field, encodes the closed-form rod geometry as a prior constraint linking the GVS strain coefficients to the backbone pose variables. The resulting formulation yields a compact state vector directly amenable to model-based control, while retaining the modularity, probabilistic treatment and computational efficiency of factor graph inference. The proposed method is evaluated in simulation on a 0.4 m long tendon-driven continuum robot under three measurement configurations, achieving mean position errors below 2 mm for all three scenarios and demonstrating a sixfold reduction in orientation error compared to a Gaussian process regression baseline when only position measurements are available.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合几何变量应变参数化和因子图推理的新方法，用于从稀疏噪声传感器数据重建连续体机械臂形状，在保持紧凑状态表示的同时提供概率不确定性量化。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在参数化方法（紧凑但缺乏概率结构）和Cosserat杆因子图推理（提供不确定性量化但状态维度随空间离散化增长）之间存在权衡，需要结合两者优势。
AI.method: 在因子图框架内估计低维几何变量应变参数化系数，通过基于Magnus展开的新型运动学因子将GVS应变系数与骨架位姿变量连接，形成紧凑状态向量。
AI.result: 在0.4米长肌腱驱动连续体机器人仿真中，三种测量配置下平均位置误差均低于2毫米，仅使用位置测量时相比高斯过程回归基线实现六倍方向误差降低。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功结合了参数化方法的紧凑状态表示和因子图推理的概率处理能力，为连续体机械臂形状重建提供了既适合模型控制又保持计算效率的解决方案。

title: TwoHamsters: Benchmarking Multi-Concept Compositional Unsafety in Text-to-Image Models
summary: Despite the remarkable synthesis capabilities of text-to-image (T2I) models, safeguarding them against content violations remains a persistent challenge. Existing safety alignments primarily focus on explicit malicious concepts, often overlooking the subtle yet critical risks of compositional semantics. To address this oversight, we identify and formalize a novel vulnerability: Multi-Concept Compositional Unsafety (MCCU), where unsafe semantics stem from the implicit associations of individually benign concepts. Based on this formulation, we introduce TwoHamsters, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 17.5k prompts curated to probe MCCU vulnerabilities. Through a rigorous evaluation of 10 state-of-the-art models and 16 defense mechanisms, our analysis yields 8 pivotal insights. In particular, we demonstrate that current T2I models and defense mechanisms face severe MCCU risks: on TwoHamsters, FLUX achieves an MCCU generation success rate of 99.52%, while LLaVA-Guard only attains a recall of 41.06%, highlighting a critical limitation of the current paradigm for managing hazardous compositional generation.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了多概念组合不安全（MCCU）这一新型漏洞，即多个良性概念组合可能产生不安全语义，并构建了包含17.5k提示的TwoHamsters基准来评估现有文本到图像模型和防御机制在此类漏洞上的表现。
AI.motivation: 当前文本到图像模型的安全对齐主要关注显性恶意概念，忽视了组合语义带来的微妙但关键的风险。现有方法无法有效处理多个良性概念组合可能产生的隐含不安全关联，存在安全漏洞。
AI.method: 1. 识别并形式化多概念组合不安全（MCCU）漏洞；2. 构建TwoHamsters基准，包含17.5k个专门设计的提示来探测MCCU漏洞；3. 对10个最先进的文本到图像模型和16种防御机制进行系统评估。
AI.result: 评估显示当前模型和防御机制面临严重的MCCU风险：在TwoHamsters基准上，FLUX模型的MCCU生成成功率高达99.52%，而LLaVA-Guard的召回率仅为41.06%，表明现有范式在管理危险组合生成方面存在严重局限性。
AI.conclusion: 多概念组合不安全（MCCU）是文本到图像模型安全性的关键漏洞，现有安全对齐方法对此类组合语义风险处理不足。TwoHamsters基准揭示了当前范式的严重局限性，为未来模型安全研究提供了重要方向。

title: Can LLMs Understand the Impact of Trauma? Costs and Benefits of LLMs Coding the Interviews of Firearm Violence Survivors
comment: Accepted to Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics (2026)
summary: Firearm violence is a pressing public health issue, yet research into survivors' lived experiences remains underfunded and difficult to scale. Qualitative research, including in-depth interviews, is a valuable tool for understanding the personal and societal consequences of community firearm violence and designing effective interventions. However, manually analyzing these narratives through thematic analysis and inductive coding is time-consuming and labor-intensive. Recent advancements in large language models (LLMs) have opened the door to automating this process, though concerns remain about whether these models can accurately and ethically capture the experiences of vulnerable populations. In this study, we assess the use of open-source LLMs to inductively code interviews with 21 Black men who have survived community firearm violence. Our results demonstrate that while some configurations of LLMs can identify important codes, overall relevance remains low and is highly sensitive to data processing. Furthermore, LLM guardrails lead to substantial narrative erasure. These findings highlight both the potential and limitations of LLM-assisted qualitative coding and underscore the ethical challenges of applying AI in research involving marginalized communities.

AI.tldr: 评估开源大语言模型用于黑人男性枪击幸存者访谈的归纳编码，发现模型能识别重要编码但整体相关性低，且数据预处理敏感，伦理护栏导致叙事擦除。
AI.motivation: 枪击暴力是紧迫的公共卫生问题，但幸存者经历研究资金不足且难以规模化。定性研究（如深度访谈）对理解社区枪击暴力的个人社会后果和设计有效干预措施有价值，但手动主题分析和归纳编码耗时耗力。大语言模型为自动化此过程提供了可能，但需评估其能否准确、伦理地捕捉弱势群体经历。
AI.method: 使用开源大语言模型对21名经历过社区枪击暴力的黑人男性访谈进行归纳编码评估，分析不同配置下模型的编码表现。
AI.result: 某些配置的大语言模型能识别重要编码，但整体相关性较低且对数据处理高度敏感。模型伦理护栏导致大量叙事被擦除。
AI.conclusion: 研究凸显了大语言模型辅助定性编码的潜力和局限性，并强调了在涉及边缘化社区的研究中应用人工智能的伦理挑战。

title: GaussianFlow SLAM: Monocular Gaussian Splatting SLAM Guided by GaussianFlow
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, 7 tables, accepted to IEEE RA-L
summary: Gaussian splatting has recently gained traction as a compelling map representation for SLAM systems, enabling dense and photo-realistic scene modeling. However, its application to monocular SLAM remains challenging due to the lack of reliable geometric cues from monocular input. Without geometric supervision, mapping or tracking could fall in local-minima, resulting in structural degeneracies and inaccuracies. To address this challenge, we propose GaussianFlow SLAM, a monocular 3DGS-SLAM that leverages optical flow as a geometry-aware cue to guide the optimization of both the scene structure and camera poses. By encouraging the projected motion of Gaussians, termed GaussianFlow, to align with the optical flow, our method introduces consistent structural cues to regularize both map reconstruction and pose estimation. Furthermore, we introduce normalized error-based densification and pruning modules to refine inactive and unstable Gaussians, thereby contributing to improved map quality and pose accuracy. Experiments conducted on public datasets demonstrate that our method achieves superior rendering quality and tracking accuracy compared with state-of-the-art algorithms. The source code is available at: https://github.com/url-kaist/gaussianflow-slam.

AI.tldr: GaussianFlow SLAM：一种利用光流作为几何感知线索的单目3DGS-SLAM方法，通过高斯投影运动与光流对齐来正则化地图重建和位姿估计，提升渲染质量和跟踪精度。
AI.motivation: 高斯溅射作为SLAM系统地图表示具有吸引力，但应用于单目SLAM时面临挑战，因为单目输入缺乏可靠的几何线索。没有几何监督，建图或跟踪可能陷入局部极小值，导致结构退化和不准确。
AI.method: 提出GaussianFlow SLAM，利用光流作为几何感知线索指导场景结构和相机位姿优化。通过鼓励高斯投影运动（GaussianFlow）与光流对齐，引入一致的结构线索正则化地图重建和位姿估计。此外，引入基于归一化误差的致密化和剪枝模块来优化非活跃和不稳定的高斯。
AI.result: 在公共数据集上的实验表明，该方法相比最先进算法实现了更优的渲染质量和跟踪精度。
AI.conclusion: GaussianFlow SLAM通过光流引导优化，有效解决了单目3DGS-SLAM中的几何监督问题，提升了场景重建和相机跟踪的性能。

title: Topology-Driven Fusion of nnU-Net and MedNeXt for Accurate Brain Tumor Segmentation on Sub-Saharan Africa Dataset
summary: Accurate automatic brain tumor segmentation in Low and Middle-Income (LMIC) countries is challenging due to the lack of defined national imaging protocols, diverse imaging data, extensive use of low-field Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) scanners and limited health-care resources. As part of the Brain Tumor Segmentation (BraTS) Africa 2025 Challenge, we applied topology refinement to the state-of-the-art segmentation models like nnU-Net, MedNeXt, and a combination of both. Since the BraTS-Africa dataset has low MRI image quality, we incorporated the BraTS 2025 challenge data of pre-treatment adult glioma (Task 1) to pre-train the segmentation model and use it to fine-tune on the BraTS-Africa dataset. We added an extra topology refinement module to address the issue of deformation in prediction that arose due to topological error. With the introduction of this module, we achieved a better Normalized Surface Distance (NSD) of 0.810, 0.829, and 0.895 on Surrounding Non-Enhancing FLAIR Hyperintensity (SNFH) , Non-Enhancing Tumor Core (NETC) and Enhancing tumor (ET).

AI.tldr: 在BraTS-Africa 2025挑战赛中，针对LMIC国家脑肿瘤分割面临的挑战，通过拓扑细化模块改进nnU-Net和MedNeXt等先进分割模型，利用BraTS 2025数据预训练后微调，显著提升了低质量MRI图像的分割性能。
AI.motivation: 低收入和中等收入国家（LMIC）的脑肿瘤自动分割面临多重挑战：缺乏统一的影像协议、数据多样性大、广泛使用低场强MRI设备以及医疗资源有限。BraTS-Africa数据集图像质量较低，需要专门的方法来应对这些现实约束条件。
AI.method: 1. 采用先进分割模型（nnU-Net、MedNeXt及其组合）作为基础架构；2. 利用BraTS 2025挑战赛的预处理成人胶质瘤数据进行模型预训练；3. 在BraTS-Africa数据集上进行微调；4. 引入额外的拓扑细化模块，专门处理因拓扑错误导致的预测变形问题。
AI.result: 通过拓扑细化模块，在三个关键肿瘤区域取得了显著改进的归一化表面距离（NSD）分数：周围非增强FLAIR高信号区域（SNFH）达到0.810，非增强肿瘤核心（NETC）达到0.829，增强肿瘤（ET）达到0.895。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑细化模块能有效解决低质量MRI图像分割中的拓扑错误问题，显著提升在LMIC国家现实医疗条件下的脑肿瘤分割性能，为资源受限环境下的精准医疗提供了可行解决方案。

title: SCRIPT: Implementing an Intelligent Tutoring System for Programming in a German University Context
comment: In: Cristea, A.I., Walker, E., Lu, Y., Santos, O.C., Isotani, S. (eds) Artificial Intelligence in Education. Posters and Late Breaking Results, Workshops and Tutorials, Industry and Innovation Tracks, Practitioners, Doctoral Consortium, Blue Sky, and WideAIED. AIED 2025. Communications in Computer and Information Science, vol 2590 . Springer, Cham
summary: Practice and extensive exercises are essential in programming education. Intelligent tutoring systems (ITSs) are a viable option to provide individualized hints and advice to programming students even when human tutors are not available. However, prior ITS for programming rarely support the Python programming language, mostly focus on introductory programming, and rarely take recent developments in generative models into account. We aim to establish a novel ITS for Python programming that is highly adaptable, serves both as a teaching and research platform, provides interfaces to plug in hint mechanisms (e.g.\ via large language models), and works inside the particularly challenging regulatory environment of Germany, that is, conforming to the European data protection regulation, the European AI act, and ethical framework of the German Research Foundation. In this paper, we present the description of the current state of the ITS along with future development directions, as well as discuss the challenges and opportunities for improving the system.

AI.tldr: 提出一个面向Python编程的新型智能辅导系统，旨在提供个性化指导，适应德国严格监管环境，并整合大语言模型等先进技术
AI.motivation: 编程教育需要大量练习，智能辅导系统能提供个性化指导。现有ITS大多不支持Python，主要针对入门编程，且未充分利用生成模型的最新进展。同时需要适应德国严格的监管环境
AI.method: 建立一个高度可适应的Python编程ITS，作为教学和研究平台，提供接口集成提示机制（如大语言模型），并符合欧盟数据保护条例、AI法案和德国研究基金会的伦理框架
AI.result: 提出了当前ITS的状态描述、未来发展方向，并讨论了系统改进的挑战和机遇
AI.conclusion: 该研究旨在开发一个符合严格监管要求、支持Python编程、整合先进AI技术的智能辅导系统，为编程教育提供创新的教学和研究平台

title: ShapeGen: Robotic Data Generation for Category-Level Manipulation
summary: Manipulation policies deployed in uncontrolled real-world scenarios are faced with great in-category geometric diversity of everyday objects. In order to function robustly under such variations, policies need to work in a category-level manner, i.e. knowing how to interact with any object in a certain category, instead of only a specific one seen during training. This in-category generalizability is usually nurtured with shape-diversified training data; however, manually collecting such a corpus of data is infeasible due to the requirement of intense human labor and large collections of divergent objects at hand. In this paper, we propose ShapeGen, a data generation method that aims at generating shape-variated manipulation data in a simulator-free and 3D manner. ShapeGen decomposes the process into two stages: Shape Library curation and Function-Aware Generation. In the first stage, we train spatial warpings between shapes mapping points to points that correspond functionally, and aggregate 3D models along with the warpings into a plug-and-play Shape Library. In the second stage, we design a pipeline that, leveraging established Libraries, requires only minimal human annotation to generate physically plausible and functionally correct novel demonstrations. Experiments in the real world demonstrate the effectiveness of ShapeGen to boost policies' in-category shape generalizability. Project page: https://wangyr22.github.io/ShapeGen/.

AI.tldr: ShapeGen：一种免模拟器、3D方式生成形状多样化操作数据的方法，通过形状库构建和功能感知生成两阶段流程，提升策略在真实世界中的类别内形状泛化能力
AI.motivation: 现实世界中部署的操作策略面临日常物体在类别内几何多样性带来的挑战。为在如此变化下保持鲁棒性，策略需要以类别级别工作，而不仅仅是针对训练时见过的特定物体。传统方法依赖形状多样化的训练数据，但手动收集此类数据因需要大量人工劳动和大量不同物体而不可行。
AI.method: ShapeGen采用两阶段方法：1) 形状库构建：训练形状间的空间扭曲映射，将功能对应的点映射到点，并将3D模型与扭曲映射聚合到即插即用的形状库中；2) 功能感知生成：设计一个利用已建立库的流程，仅需最少人工标注即可生成物理合理且功能正确的新演示。
AI.result: 真实世界实验证明ShapeGen能有效提升策略的类别内形状泛化能力。该方法免模拟器、3D方式生成形状多样化操作数据，解决了手动数据收集的可行性问题。
AI.conclusion: ShapeGen通过创新的两阶段数据生成方法，为操作策略提供了形状多样化的训练数据，显著提升了策略在真实世界中的类别内形状泛化能力，为解决现实世界操作中的几何多样性挑战提供了有效解决方案。

title: Sentiment Analysis of German Sign Language Fairy Tales
summary: We present a dataset and a model for sentiment analysis of German sign language (DGS) fairy tales. First, we perform sentiment analysis for three levels of valence (negative, neutral, positive) on German fairy tales text segments using four large language models (LLMs) and majority voting, reaching an inter-annotator agreement of 0.781 Krippendorff's alpha. Second, we extract face and body motion features from each corresponding DGS video segment using MediaPipe. Finally, we train an explainable model (based on XGBoost) to predict negative, neutral or positive sentiment from video features. Results show an average balanced accuracy of 0.631. A thorough analysis of the most important features reveal that, in addition to eyebrows and mouth motion on the face, also the motion of hips, elbows, and shoulders considerably contribute in the discrimination of the conveyed sentiment, indicating an equal importance of face and body for sentiment communication in sign language.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一个用于德国手语童话情感分析的数据集和模型，通过结合文本情感标注和视频运动特征，训练可解释的XGBoost模型预测手语情感。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是开发一个能够分析德国手语（DGS）童话情感的系统，探索手语中情感表达的面部和身体运动特征，填补手语情感分析领域的空白。
AI.method: 方法包括三个步骤：1）使用四个大语言模型对德语童话文本片段进行情感标注（负面、中性、正面），通过多数投票达到0.781的Krippendorff's alpha一致性；2）使用MediaPipe从对应的DGS视频片段中提取面部和身体运动特征；3）训练基于XGBoost的可解释模型，从视频特征预测情感类别。
AI.result: 模型达到平均平衡准确率0.631。特征重要性分析显示，除了眉毛和嘴巴的面部运动外，臀部、肘部和肩部的运动也对情感区分有显著贡献，表明面部和身体在手语情感表达中具有同等重要性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功开发了一个德国手语情感分析系统，证明了面部和身体运动特征在手语情感表达中的重要性，为手语情感识别提供了新的数据集和可解释模型。

title: From Competition to Coopetition: Coopetitive Training-Free Image Editing Based on Text Guidance
summary: Text-guided image editing, a pivotal task in modern multimedia content creation, has seen remarkable progress with training-free methods that eliminate the need for additional optimization. Despite recent progress, existing methods are typically constrained by a competitive paradigm in which the editing and reconstruction branches are independently driven by their respective objectives to maximize alignment with target and source prompts. The adversarial strategy causes semantic conflicts and unpredictable outcomes due to the lack of coordination between branches. To overcome these issues, we propose Coopetitive Training-Free Image Editing (CoEdit), a novel zero-shot framework that transforms attention control from competition to coopetitive negotiation, achieving editing harmony across spatial and temporal dimensions. Spatially, CoEdit introduces Dual-Entropy Attention Manipulation, which quantifies directional entropic interactions between branches to reformulate attention control as a harmony-maximization problem, eventually improving the localization of editable and preservable regions. Temporally, we present Entropic Latent Refinement mechanism to dynamically adjust latent representations over time, minimizing accumulated editing errors and ensuring consistent semantic transitions throughout the denoising trajectory. Additionally, we propose the Fidelity-Constrained Editing Score, a composite metric that jointly evaluates semantic editing and background fidelity. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that CoEdit achieves superior performance in both editing quality and structural preservation, enhancing multimedia information utilization by enabling more effective interaction between visual and textual modalities. The code will be available at https://github.com/JinhaoShen/CoEdit.

AI.tldr: CoEdit提出了一种零样本图像编辑框架，通过合作竞争注意力控制机制，在空间维度引入双熵注意力操纵，在时间维度使用熵潜在精炼，实现更好的编辑质量和结构保持。
AI.motivation: 现有基于文本引导的图像编辑方法通常采用竞争范式，编辑分支和重建分支各自独立优化目标，导致语义冲突和不可预测的结果。需要一种协调机制来解决分支间的冲突问题。
AI.method: 提出Coopetitive Training-Free Image Editing (CoEdit)框架：1) 空间维度：双熵注意力操纵，量化分支间的方向熵交互，将注意力控制重新表述为和谐最大化问题；2) 时间维度：熵潜在精炼机制，动态调整潜在表示，最小化累积编辑误差；3) 提出保真度约束编辑评分作为复合评估指标。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试上的广泛实验表明，CoEdit在编辑质量和结构保持方面均取得优越性能，通过增强视觉和文本模态间的交互，提升了多媒体信息利用效率。
AI.conclusion: CoEdit通过将注意力控制从竞争转变为合作竞争协商，实现了跨空间和时间维度的编辑和谐，解决了现有方法中的语义冲突问题，为训练自由的文本引导图像编辑提供了更有效的解决方案。

title: The Relic Condition: When Published Scholarship Becomes Material for Its Own Replacement
summary: We extracted the scholarly reasoning systems of two internationally prominent humanities and social science scholars from their published corpora alone, converted those systems into structured inference-time constraints for a large language model, and tested whether the resulting scholar-bots could perform core academic functions at expert-assessed quality. The distillation pipeline used an eight-layer extraction method and a nine-module skill architecture grounded in local, closed-corpus analysis. The scholar-bots were then deployed across doctoral supervision, peer review, lecturing and panel-style academic exchange. Expert assessment involved three senior academics producing reports and appointment-level syntheses. Across the preserved expert record, all review and supervision reports judged the outputs benchmark-attaining, appointment-level recommendations placed both bots at or above Senior Lecturer level in the Australian university system, and recovered panel scores placed Scholar A between 7.9 and 8.9/10 and Scholar B between 8.5 and 8.9/10 under multi-turn debate conditions. A research-degree-student survey showed high performance ratings across information reliability, theoretical depth and logical rigor, with pronounced ceiling effects on a 7-point scale, despite all participants already being frontier-model users. We term this the Relic condition: when publication systems make stable reasoning architectures legible, extractable and cheaply deployable, the public record of intellectual labor becomes raw material for its own functional replacement. Because the technical threshold for this transition is already crossed at modest engineering effort, we argue that the window for protective frameworks covering disclosure, consent, compensation and deployment restriction is the present, while deployment remains optional rather than infrastructural.

AI.tldr: 从两位知名学者的已发表文献中提取其学术推理系统，转化为大语言模型的推理约束，创建学者机器人并测试其在学术核心功能上的表现，结果显示达到专家评估的高质量水平。
AI.motivation: 探索是否能够从学者的已发表文献中提取其稳定的推理架构，并将其转化为可部署的人工智能系统，以执行学术核心功能，同时研究这种技术能力对学术劳动和知识产权的潜在影响。
AI.method: 采用八层提取方法和九模块技能架构，基于本地封闭语料分析，从两位国际知名人文社科学者的发表文献中提取其学术推理系统，将其转化为大语言模型的推理约束，创建学者机器人。在博士指导、同行评审、讲座和学术小组讨论等场景中部署测试，由三位资深学者进行专家评估。
AI.result: 所有评审和指导报告均达到基准水平；两位学者机器人在澳大利亚大学系统中的推荐级别均达到或超过高级讲师水平；在小组讨论条件下，学者A得分7.9-8.9/10，学者B得分8.5-8.9/10；研究型学生调查显示在信息可靠性、理论深度和逻辑严谨性方面获得高评分，尽管参与者均为前沿模型用户。
AI.conclusion: 当发表系统使稳定的推理架构变得可读、可提取且廉价部署时，智力劳动的公共记录成为其自身功能替代的原材料。由于这一转变的技术门槛已经以适度的工程努力被跨越，作者主张当前是建立保护框架（涵盖披露、同意、补偿和部署限制）的关键窗口期，而此时部署仍是可选的而非基础设施性的。

title: Safe and Energy-Aware Multi-Robot Density Control via PDE-Constrained Optimization for Long-Duration Autonomy
summary: This paper presents a novel density control framework for multi-robot systems with spatial safety and energy sustainability guarantees. Stochastic robot motion is encoded through the Fokker-Planck Partial Differential Equation (PDE) at the density level. Control Lyapunov and control barrier functions are integrated with PDEs to enforce target density tracking, obstacle region avoidance, and energy sufficiency over multiple charging cycles. The resulting quadratic program enables fast in-the-loop implementation that adjusts commands in real-time. Multi-robot experiment and extensive simulations were conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of the controller under localization and motion uncertainties.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种具有空间安全和能量可持续性保证的多机器人系统密度控制框架，通过Fokker-Planck PDE编码随机运动，结合控制Lyapunov和屏障函数实现目标密度跟踪、避障和能量管理。
AI.motivation: 多机器人系统在实际应用中面临空间安全和能量可持续性的挑战，需要一种能够在存在定位和运动不确定性的情况下，同时保证安全约束和能量管理的控制框架。
AI.method: 使用Fokker-Planck偏微分方程在密度层面编码随机机器人运动，将控制Lyapunov函数和控制屏障函数与PDE结合，通过二次规划实现实时控制命令调整。
AI.result: 通过多机器人实验和大量仿真验证了控制器在定位和运动不确定性下的有效性，实现了目标密度跟踪、障碍区域避让和多个充电周期的能量充足性保证。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为多机器人系统提供了一种具有空间安全和能量可持续性保证的密度控制方法，能够实时调整控制命令以适应不确定性，具有实际应用价值。

title: Tabular foundation models for in-context prediction of molecular properties
summary: Accurate molecular property prediction is central to drug discovery, catalysis, and process design, yet real-world applications are often limited by small datasets. Molecular foundation models provide a promising direction by learning transferable molecular representations; however, they typically involve task-specific fine-tuning, require machine learning expertise, and often fail to outperform classical baselines. Tabular foundation models (TFMs) offer a fundamentally different paradigm: they perform predictions through in-context learning, enabling inference without task-specific training. Here, we evaluate TFMs in the low- to medium-data regime across both standardized pharmaceutical benchmarks and chemical engineering datasets. We evaluate both frozen molecular foundation model representations, as well as classical descriptors and fingerprints. Across the benchmarks, the approach shows excellent predictive performance while reducing computational cost, compared to fine-tuning, with these advantages also transferring to practical engineering data settings. In particular, combining TFMs with CheMeleon embeddings yields up to 100\% win rates on 30 MoleculeACE tasks, while compact RDKit2d and Mordred descriptors provide strong descriptor-based alternatives. Molecular representation emerges as a key determinant in TFM performance, with molecular foundation model embeddings and 2D descriptor sets both providing substantial gains over classic molecular fingerprints on many tasks. These results suggest that in-context learning with TFMs provides a highly accurate and cost-efficient alternative for property prediction in practical applications.

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了表格基础模型（TFMs）在分子性质预测中的应用，发现在小到中等数据量下，通过上下文学习的方式，TFMs在预测性能和计算成本方面优于传统的微调方法，特别是在结合CheMeleon嵌入时表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 分子性质预测在药物发现、催化和过程设计中至关重要，但实际应用常受限于小数据集。现有的分子基础模型需要任务特定的微调，需要机器学习专业知识，且往往无法超越经典基线方法。表格基础模型提供了一种无需任务特定训练的上下文学习范式，有望解决这些问题。
AI.method: 在低到中等数据量下，评估表格基础模型在标准化药物基准和化学工程数据集上的表现。评估了冻结的分子基础模型表示、经典描述符和分子指纹。特别比较了CheMeleon嵌入、RDKit2d和Mordred描述符等不同分子表示方法。
AI.result: TFMs在预测性能上表现出色，同时降低了计算成本（相比微调方法）。结合CheMeleon嵌入时，在30个MoleculeACE任务中获得了高达100%的胜率。紧凑的RDKit2d和Mordred描述符也提供了强大的基于描述符的替代方案。分子表示是TFM性能的关键决定因素，分子基础模型嵌入和2D描述符集在许多任务上都显著优于经典分子指纹。
AI.conclusion: 上下文学习与表格基础模型为实际应用中的分子性质预测提供了高度准确且成本效益高的替代方案，特别是在小到中等数据量场景下。分子表示的选择对性能有重要影响，分子基础模型嵌入和2D描述符集是有效的选择。

title: Trajectory Planning for Safe Dual Control with Active Exploration
summary: Planning safe trajectories under model uncertainty is a fundamental challenge. Robust planning ensures safety by considering worst-case realizations, yet ignores uncertainty reduction and leads to overly conservative behavior. Actively reducing uncertainty on-the-fly during a nominal mission defines the dual control problem. Most approaches address this by adding a weighted exploration term to the cost, tuned to trade off the nominal objective and uncertainty reduction, but without formal consideration of when exploration is beneficial. Moreover, safety is enforced in some methods but not in others. We study a budget-constrained dual control problem, where uncertainty is reduced subject to safety and a mission-level cost budget that limits the allowable degradation in task performance due to exploration. In this work, we propose Dual-gatekeeper, a framework that integrates robust planning with active exploration under formal guarantees of safety and budget feasibility. The key idea is that exploration is pursued only when it provides a verifiable improvement without compromising safety or violating the budget, enabling the system to balance immediate task performance with long-term uncertainty reduction in a principled manner. We provide two implementations of the framework based on different safety mechanisms and demonstrate its performance on quadrotor navigation and autonomous car racing case studies under parametric uncertainty.

AI.tldr: Dual-gatekeeper框架：在安全约束和任务性能预算下，将鲁棒规划与主动探索相结合，仅在探索能提供可验证改进且不违反安全或预算时才进行探索。
AI.motivation: 在模型不确定性下规划安全轨迹是基本挑战。鲁棒规划考虑最坏情况确保安全但忽略不确定性减少，导致过于保守；而主动探索的双重控制问题缺乏对探索何时有益的正式考虑，且安全约束在不同方法中不一致。
AI.method: 提出Dual-gatekeeper框架，集成鲁棒规划与主动探索，在安全性和预算可行性方面提供正式保证。核心思想是：仅当探索能提供可验证改进且不损害安全或违反预算时才进行探索。提供了基于不同安全机制的两种实现。
AI.result: 在四旋翼导航和自动驾驶赛车案例研究中展示了框架性能，这些案例都存在参数不确定性。框架能够以原则性方式平衡即时任务性能与长期不确定性减少。
AI.conclusion: Dual-gatekeeper框架解决了预算约束下的双重控制问题，通过正式的安全和预算保证，实现了鲁棒规划与主动探索的集成，使系统能够原则性地平衡即时任务性能与长期不确定性减少。

title: Univariate Channel Fusion for Multivariate Time Series Classification
summary: Multivariate time series classification (MTSC) plays a crucial role in various domains, including biomedical signal analysis and motion monitoring. However, existing approaches, particularly deep learning models, often require high computational resources, making them unsuitable for real-time applications or deployment on low-cost hardware, such as IoT devices and wearable systems. In this paper, we propose the Univariate Channel Fusion (UCF) method to deal with MTSC efficiently. UCF transforms multivariate time series into a univariate representation through simple channel fusion strategies such as the mean, median, or dynamic time warping barycenter. This transformation enables the use of any classifier originally designed for univariate time series, providing a flexible and computationally lightweight alternative to complex models. We evaluate UCF in five case studies covering diverse application domains, including chemical monitoring, brain-computer interfaces, and human activity analysis. The results demonstrate that UCF often outperforms baseline methods and state-of-the-art algorithms tailored for MTSC, while achieving substantial gains in computational efficiency, being particularly effective in problems with high inter-channel correlation.

AI.tldr: UCF方法将多元时间序列转换为单变量表示，通过简单通道融合策略实现高效分类，在保持性能的同时大幅降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有多元时间序列分类方法（特别是深度学习模型）计算资源需求高，不适合实时应用或低成本硬件部署（如物联网设备和可穿戴系统）。
AI.method: 提出Univariate Channel Fusion (UCF)方法，通过均值、中位数或动态时间规整重心等简单通道融合策略，将多元时间序列转换为单变量表示，从而可以使用任何为单变量时间序列设计的分类器。
AI.result: 在五个涵盖化学监测、脑机接口和人类活动分析等不同应用领域的案例研究中，UCF通常优于基线方法和专门为MTSC设计的最先进算法，同时显著提高计算效率，特别适用于通道间相关性高的问题。
AI.conclusion: UCF为多元时间序列分类提供了一种灵活且计算轻量的替代方案，特别适合资源受限环境，在保持分类性能的同时大幅降低计算复杂度。

title: Neural Gabor Splatting: Enhanced Gaussian Splatting with Neural Gabor for High-frequency Surface Reconstruction
summary: Recent years have witnessed the rapid emergence of 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) as a powerful approach for 3D reconstruction and novel view synthesis. Its explicit representation with Gaussian primitives enables fast training, real-time rendering, and convenient post-processing such as editing and surface reconstruction.
