AI.motivation: 现有灵巧手操控数据采集方法存在多种问题：仿真和视频方法有sim-to-real差距和重定向问题；基于动捕手套的遥操作系统需要每操作员校准且缺乏便携性；便携方案缺乏跨平台和跨操作员兼容性。需要一种便携、免校准、跨平台兼容的解决方案。
AI.method: 开发DEX-Mouse系统，采用商用现成组件构建便携式手持遥操作接口，集成动觉力反馈。采用操作员无关设计，无需校准或结构修改。支持目标机器人手直接安装在操作员前臂上的配置，产生机器人对齐的数据。
AI.result: 在多种灵巧操控任务的比较用户研究中，使用该系统的操作员在附着配置下达到86.67%的任务完成率。附着配置相比空间分离的遥操作设置，在所有比较接口中都降低了操作员的感知工作量。硬件和软件栈已开源。
AI.conclusion: DEX-Mouse提供了一种低成本、便携、免校准的灵巧手遥操作解决方案，解决了现有方法的局限性，通过机器人对齐的数据采集和降低感知工作量，为数据驱动的灵巧手操控提供了实用工具。

title: Aligning What Vision-Language Models See and Perceive with Adaptive Information Flow
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated strong capability in a wide range of tasks such as visual recognition, document parsing, and visual grounding. Nevertheless, recent work shows that while VLMs often manage to capture the correct image region corresponding to the question, they do not necessarily produce the correct answers. In this work, we demonstrate that this misalignment could be attributed to suboptimal information flow within VLMs, where text tokens distribute too much attention to irrelevant visual tokens, leading to incorrect answers. Based on the observation, we show that modulating the information flow during inference can improve the perception capability of VLMs. The idea is that text tokens should only be associated with important visual tokens during decoding, eliminating the interference of irrelevant regions. To achieve this, we propose a token dynamics-based method to determine the importance of visual tokens, where visual tokens that exhibit distinct activation patterns during different decoding stages are viewed as important. We apply our approach to representative open-source VLMs and evaluate on various datasets, including visual question answering, visual grounding and counting, optical character recognition, and object hallucination. The results show that our approach significantly improves the performance of baselines. Project page: https://cxliu0.github.io/AIF/.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于token动态的方法来调节视觉语言模型中的信息流，通过识别重要的视觉token并减少无关视觉token的干扰，从而提升模型在多种视觉任务上的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉语言模型在多种任务上表现出色，但研究发现模型即使能定位到正确的图像区域，也常常给出错误答案。作者认为这是由于信息流不理想导致的，即文本token向无关的视觉token分配了过多注意力，造成干扰。
AI.method: 提出基于token动态的方法来确定视觉token的重要性：在解码的不同阶段表现出明显激活模式的视觉token被视为重要token。在推理过程中调节信息流，确保文本token只与重要的视觉token关联，消除无关区域的干扰。
AI.result: 该方法在多种代表性开源视觉语言模型上进行了评估，涵盖视觉问答、视觉定位与计数、光学字符识别和物体幻觉等数据集。结果显示，该方法显著提升了基线模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过调节视觉语言模型中的信息流，减少文本token对无关视觉token的注意力分配，可以有效提升模型的感知能力。基于token动态的重要性评估方法为改善视觉语言模型的性能提供了一种有效途径。

title: ReactBench: A Benchmark for Topological Reasoning in MLLMs on Chemical Reaction Diagrams
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) excel at recognizing individual visual elements and reasoning over simple linear diagrams. However, when faced with complex topological structures involving branching paths, converging flows, and cyclic dependencies, their reasoning capabilities degrade sharply, even on tasks as basic as counting endpoints. Existing benchmarks fail to probe this gap, focusing on semantic comprehension rather than structural reasoning. We introduce ReactBench, a benchmark that reveals fundamental limitations in structural reasoning through chemical reaction diagrams. These real-world scientific diagrams offer an ideal testbed because they naturally span diverse structures from linear chains to cyclic graphs, while requiring both precise local recognition and coherent global reasoning. Our benchmark comprises 1,618 expert-annotated QA pairs across four hierarchical task dimensions. Extensive evaluation across 17 MLLMs reveals a significant performance gap exceeding 30% between anchor-based tasks and holistic structural reasoning tasks. Controlled ablations confirm this bottleneck lies in reasoning, not perception. These findings expose a fundamental deficit in structural understanding and establish directions for advancing visual reasoning.

AI.tldr: ReactBench基准测试揭示多模态大语言模型在复杂拓扑结构推理上的根本缺陷，通过化学反应图评估发现结构推理能力严重不足
AI.motivation: 当前MLLMs在处理简单线性图时表现良好，但在面对复杂拓扑结构（如分支路径、汇聚流、循环依赖）时推理能力急剧下降。现有基准测试主要关注语义理解而非结构推理，无法揭示这一能力缺陷。
AI.method: 引入ReactBench基准测试，使用化学反应图作为测试平台，包含1,618个专家标注的QA对，涵盖四个层次化任务维度。评估了17个MLLMs，并通过控制消融实验验证瓶颈所在。
AI.result: 评估显示，在锚点基础任务和整体结构推理任务之间存在超过30%的性能差距。消融实验证实瓶颈在于推理而非感知能力，暴露了MLLMs在结构理解上的根本缺陷。
AI.conclusion: ReactBench揭示了MLLMs在复杂结构推理上的严重不足，为推进视觉推理研究提供了明确方向和评估框架，强调了开发结构理解能力的重要性。

title: Momentum-constrained Hybrid Heuristic Trajectory Optimization Framework with Residual-enhanced DRL for Visually Impaired Scenarios
comment: 24 pages, 14 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2509.15582
summary: Safe and efficient assistive planning for visually impaired scenarios remains challenging, since existing methods struggle with multi-objective optimization, generalization, and interpretability. In response, this paper proposes a Momentum-Constrained Hybrid Heuristic Trajectory Optimization Framework (MHHTOF). To balance multiple objectives of comfort and safety, the framework designs a Heuristic Trajectory Sampling Cluster (HTSC) with a Momentum-Constrained Trajectory Optimization (MTO), which suppresses abrupt velocity and acceleration changes. In addition, a novel residual-enhanced deep reinforcement learning (DRL) module refines candidate trajectories, advancing temporal modeling and policy generalization. Finally, a dual-stage cost modeling mechanism (DCMM) is introduced to regulate optimization, where costs in the Frenet space ensure consistency, and reward-driven adaptive weights in the Cartesian space integrate user preferences for interpretability and user-centric decision-making. Experimental results show that the proposed framework converges in nearly half the iterations of baselines and achieves lower and more stable costs. In complex dynamic scenarios, MHHTOF further demonstrates stable velocity and acceleration curves with reduced risk, confirming its advantages in robustness, safety, and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出MHHTOF框架，通过动量约束混合启发式轨迹优化解决视障辅助规划中的多目标优化、泛化和可解释性问题
AI.motivation: 现有视障辅助规划方法在多目标优化、泛化能力和可解释性方面存在不足，需要平衡舒适性与安全性，同时提高算法的鲁棒性和用户可理解性
AI.method: 1) 启发式轨迹采样簇(HTSC)结合动量约束轨迹优化(MTO)抑制速度加速度突变；2) 残差增强深度强化学习模块优化候选轨迹；3) 双阶段成本建模机制(DCMM)在Frenet空间保证一致性，在Cartesian空间通过奖励驱动自适应权重集成用户偏好
AI.result: 框架收敛速度比基线快近一倍，获得更低更稳定的成本；在复杂动态场景中表现出更稳定的速度加速度曲线和更低风险，验证了鲁棒性、安全性和效率优势
AI.conclusion: MHHTOF框架通过动量约束、混合启发式优化和双阶段成本建模，有效解决了视障辅助规划中的多目标平衡、泛化和可解释性问题，为安全高效的辅助导航提供了新方案

title: Discovering quantum phenomena with Interpretable Machine Learning
summary: Interpretable machine learning techniques are becoming essential tools for extracting physical insights from complex quantum data. We build on recent advances in variational autoencoders to demonstrate that such models can learn physically meaningful and interpretable representations from a broad class of unlabeled quantum datasets. From raw measurement data alone, the learned representation reveals rich information about the underlying structure of quantum phase spaces. We further augment the learning pipeline with symbolic methods, enabling the discovery of compact analytical descriptors that serve as order parameters for the distinct regimes emerging in the learned representations. We demonstrate the framework on experimental Rydberg-atom snapshots, classical shadows of the cluster Ising model, and hybrid discrete-continuous fermionic data, revealing previously unreported phenomena such as a corner-ordering pattern in the Rydberg arrays. These results establish a general framework for the automated and interpretable discovery of physical laws from diverse quantum datasets. All methods are available through qdisc, an open-source Python library designed to make these tools accessible to the broader community.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合变分自编码器和符号方法的可解释机器学习框架，用于从无标签量子数据中自动发现物理规律和序参量。
AI.motivation: 可解释机器学习技术对于从复杂量子数据中提取物理洞察变得至关重要。现有方法需要从原始测量数据中学习有物理意义的表示，并发现描述不同量子相区的紧凑解析描述符。
AI.method: 基于变分自编码器构建学习框架，从无标签量子数据中学习物理意义明确的表示。进一步用符号方法增强学习流程，发现紧凑的解析描述符作为序参量。框架在实验性Rydberg原子快照、簇Ising模型的经典阴影和混合离散连续费米子数据上进行了验证。
AI.result: 学习到的表示揭示了量子相空间的底层结构。发现了新的物理现象，如Rydberg阵列中的角有序模式。框架能够自动发现不同量子相区的序参量，所有方法通过开源Python库qdisc提供。
AI.conclusion: 建立了一个通用的可解释机器学习框架，能够从多样化量子数据集中自动发现物理规律。该方法为量子物理研究提供了强大的数据分析工具，并通过开源库促进更广泛的应用。

title: Beyond a Single Frame: Multi-Frame Spatially Grounded Reasoning Across Volumetric MRI
summary: Spatial reasoning and visual grounding are core capabilities for vision-language models (VLMs), yet most medical VLMs produce predictions without transparent reasoning or spatial evidence. Existing benchmarks also evaluate VLMs on isolated 2D images, overlooking the volumetric nature of clinical imaging, where findings can span multiple frames or appear on only a few slices. We introduce Spatially Grounded MRI Visual Question Answering (SGMRI-VQA), a 41,307-pair benchmark for multi-frame, spatially grounded reasoning on volumetric MRI. Built from expert radiologist annotations in the fastMRI+ dataset across brain and knee studies, each QA pair includes a clinician-aligned chain-of-thought trace with frame-indexed bounding box coordinates. Tasks are organized hierarchically across detection, localization, counting/classification, and captioning, requiring models to jointly reason about what is present, where it is, and across which frames it extends. We benchmark 10 VLMs and show that supervised fine-tuning of Qwen3-VL-8B with bounding box supervision consistently improves grounding performance over strong zero-shot baselines, indicating that targeted spatial supervision is an effective path toward grounded clinical reasoning.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了SGMRI-VQA基准测试，用于评估医学视觉语言模型在MRI多帧图像上的空间推理和视觉定位能力，包含41,307个专家标注的问答对，涵盖检测、定位、计数/分类和描述任务。
AI.motivation: 当前医学视觉语言模型缺乏透明的推理过程和空间证据，且现有基准测试仅评估2D图像，忽略了临床影像的体数据特性（如MRI多帧图像），无法评估模型在跨帧空间推理方面的能力。
AI.method: 从fastMRI+数据集的脑部和膝盖MRI研究中提取专家放射科医生的标注，构建包含41,307个问答对的SGMRI-VQA基准测试。每个问答对包含临床医生对齐的思维链追踪和帧索引边界框坐标。任务按检测、定位、计数/分类和描述分层组织。评估了10个视觉语言模型，并对Qwen3-VL-8B进行了带边界框监督的监督微调。
AI.result: 带边界框监督的Qwen3-VL-8B监督微调在空间定位性能上持续优于强零样本基线模型，表明有针对性的空间监督是提升临床推理定位能力的有效途径。
AI.conclusion: SGMRI-VQA基准测试填补了医学视觉语言模型在体数据空间推理评估方面的空白，证明了空间监督对提升临床推理定位能力的重要性，为开发具有透明空间推理能力的医学AI系统提供了方向。

title: Corner Reflector Array Jamming Discrimination Using Multi-Dimensional Micro-Motion Features with Frequency Agile Radar
summary: This paper introduces a robust discrimination method for distinguishing real ship targets from corner-reflector-array jamming with frequency-agile radar. The key idea is to exploit the multidimensional micro-motion signatures that separate rigid ships from non-rigid decoys. From Range-Velocity maps we derive two new hand-crafted descriptors-mean weighted residual (MWR) and complementary contrast factor (CCF) and fuse them with deep features learned by a lightweight CNN. An XGBoost classifier then gives the final decision. Extensive simulations show that the hybrid feature set consistently outperforms state-of-the-art alternatives, confirming the superiority of the proposed approach.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合手工特征与深度学习特征的混合方法，用于频率捷变雷达中区分真实舰船目标与角反射器阵列干扰
AI.motivation: 角反射器阵列干扰对雷达目标识别构成严重挑战，传统方法难以有效区分真实舰船目标与这类非刚性干扰体。需要利用舰船与干扰体在微动特征上的本质差异来提升识别性能。
AI.method: 从距离-速度图中提取两个手工特征（平均加权残差MWR和互补对比因子CCF），结合轻量级CNN学习的深度特征，使用XGBoost分类器进行最终决策。
AI.result: 大量仿真实验表明，混合特征集在性能上持续优于现有最先进方法，验证了所提方法的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合手工设计的微动特征与深度学习特征，能够有效区分刚性舰船与非刚性角反射器阵列干扰，为频率捷变雷达抗干扰提供了一种鲁棒的识别方法。

title: Weak-Link Optimization for Multi-Agent Reasoning and Collaboration
comment: 13 pages, 4 figures. Submitted to CAAI Transactions on Intelligence Technology
summary: LLM-driven multi-agent frameworks address complex reasoning tasks through multi-role collaboration. However, existing approaches often suffer from reasoning instability, where individual agent errors are amplified through collaboration, undermining overall performance. Current research mainly focuses on enhancing high-capability agents or suppressing unreliable outputs to improve framework effectiveness, while systematic identification and reinforcement of performance-limiting agents receive less attention. To address this gap, we propose WORC, a \underline{w}eak-link \underline{o}ptimization framework for multi-agent \underline{r}easoning and \underline{c}ollaboration, grounded in the weak-link principle. WORC follows a two-stage workflow. In the weak agent localization stage, task features are constructed, and a meta-learning-based weight predictor trained on optimal configurations identified by swarm intelligence algorithms (SIAs) enables zero-shot mapping from these features to agent performance weights, where the agent with the lowest predicted weight is identified as the weak agent. In the weak-link optimization stage, an uncertainty-driven allocation strategy assigns additional reasoning budgets to weak agents, with lower predicted weights leading to larger repeated-sampling quotas to compensate for reliability deficiencies. Experimental results show that WORC achieves an average accuracy of 82.2\% on reasoning benchmarks while improving framework stability and cross-architecture generalization, suggesting that compensating for weak links, rather than reinforcing strengths alone, enhances the robustness of multi-agent systems.

AI.tldr: WORC是一个基于弱链原则的多智能体推理协作优化框架，通过定位弱智能体并分配额外推理资源来提升系统稳定性，在推理基准上达到82.2%的平均准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有多智能体框架存在推理不稳定性问题，个体智能体错误会在协作中被放大。当前研究主要关注增强高能力智能体或抑制不可靠输出，而对系统性识别和强化性能受限的弱智能体关注不足。
AI.method: 采用两阶段工作流：1) 弱智能体定位阶段：构建任务特征，通过元学习权重预测器（基于群体智能算法识别的最优配置训练）实现从特征到性能权重的零样本映射，预测权重最低的智能体被识别为弱智能体；2) 弱链优化阶段：基于不确定性的分配策略为弱智能体分配额外推理预算，预测权重越低则获得更大的重复采样配额以补偿可靠性缺陷。
AI.result: WORC在推理基准上达到82.2%的平均准确率，同时提升了框架稳定性和跨架构泛化能力。实验表明补偿弱链而非仅强化优势能增强多智能体系统的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统性识别和补偿弱智能体而非仅强化优势智能体，能够有效提升多智能体推理系统的稳定性和性能，验证了弱链原则在多智能体协作中的重要性。

title: HRDexDB: A Large-Scale Dataset of Dexterous Human and Robotic Hand Grasps
summary: We present HRDexDB, a large-scale, multi-modal dataset of high-fidelity dexterous grasping sequences featuring both human and diverse robotic hands. Unlike existing datasets, HRDexDB provides a comprehensive collection of grasping trajectories across human hands and multiple robot hand embodiments, spanning 100 diverse objects. Leveraging state-of-the-art vision methods and a new dedicated multi-camera system, our HRDexDB offers high-precision spatiotemporal 3D ground-truth motion for both the agent and the manipulated object. To facilitate the study of physical interaction, HRDexDB includes high-resolution tactile signals, synchronized multi-view video, and egocentric video streams. The dataset comprises 1.4K grasping trials, encompassing both successes and failures, each enriched with visual, kinematic, and tactile modalities. By providing closely aligned captures of human dexterity and robotic execution on the same target objects under comparable grasping motions, HRDexDB serves as a foundational benchmark for multi-modal policy learning and cross-domain dexterous manipulation.

AI.tldr: HRDexDB是一个大规模多模态数据集，包含人类和多种机器人手的高保真灵巧抓取序列，涵盖100个不同物体，提供视觉、运动学和触觉数据。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏对人类灵巧性和多种机器人手抓取轨迹的全面收集，且缺少高精度时空3D真值运动数据。需要建立跨领域灵巧操作的基础基准。
AI.method: 利用最先进的视觉方法和专门的多摄像头系统，采集人类和机器人手抓取100个不同物体的序列。数据集包含1.4K个抓取试验（成功和失败），提供高分辨率触觉信号、同步多视角视频和自我中心视频流。
AI.result: 创建了HRDexDB数据集，包含人类和机器人手在相同目标物体上执行类似抓取动作的对齐捕获，提供高精度时空3D真值运动数据，涵盖视觉、运动学和触觉多种模态。
AI.conclusion: HRDexDB作为多模态策略学习和跨领域灵巧操作的基础基准，通过提供人类灵巧性和机器人执行的紧密对齐捕获，促进了物理交互研究。

title: SegMix:Shuffle-based Feedback Learning for Semantic Segmentation of Pathology Images
summary: Segmentation is a critical task in computational pathology, as it identifies areas affected by disease or abnormal growth and is essential for diagnosis and treatment. However, acquiring high-quality pixel-level supervised segmentation data requires significant workload demands from experienced pathologists, limiting the application of deep learning. To overcome this challenge, relaxing the label conditions to image-level classification labels allows for more data to be used and more scenarios to be enabled. One approach is to leverage Class Activation Map (CAM) to generate pseudo pixel-level annotations for semantic segmentation with only image-level labels. However, this method fails to thoroughly explore the essential characteristics of pathology images, thus identifying only small areas that are insufficient for pseudo masking. In this paper, we propose a novel shuffle-based feedback learning method inspired by curriculum learning to generate higher-quality pseudo-semantic segmentation masks. Specifically, we perform patch level shuffle of pathology images, with the model adaptively adjusting the shuffle strategy based on feedback from previous learning. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed approach outperforms state-of-the-arts on three different datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于洗牌反馈学习的方法，利用图像级标签生成更高质量的病理图像伪语义分割掩码
AI.motivation: 病理图像分割需要像素级标注，但获取成本高；现有基于CAM的方法仅能识别小区域，无法生成足够的伪掩码用于分割
AI.method: 提出基于课程学习启发的洗牌反馈学习方法：对病理图像进行块级洗牌，模型根据先前学习反馈自适应调整洗牌策略，生成更高质量的伪语义分割掩码
AI.result: 在三个不同数据集上的实验结果表明，该方法优于现有最先进方法
AI.conclusion: 提出的洗牌反馈学习方法能有效利用图像级标签生成高质量的伪分割掩码，为病理图像分割提供了一种有效的弱监督解决方案

title: Polarization by Default: Auditing Recommendation Bias in LLM-Based Content Curation
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed to curate and rank human-created content, yet the nature and structure of their biases in these tasks remains poorly understood: which biases are robust across providers and platforms, and which can be mitigated through prompt design. We present a controlled simulation study mapping content selection biases across three major LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google) on real social media datasets from Twitter/X, Bluesky, and Reddit, using six prompting strategies (\textit{general}, \textit{popular}, \textit{engaging}, \textit{informative}, \textit{controversial}, \textit{neutral}). Through 540,000 simulated top-10 selections from pools of 100 posts across 54 experimental conditions, we find that biases differ substantially in how structural and how prompt-sensitive they are. Polarization is amplified across all configurations, toxicity handling shows a strong inversion between engagement- and information-focused prompts, and sentiment biases are predominantly negative. Provider comparisons reveal distinct trade-offs: GPT-4o Mini shows the most consistent behavior across prompts; Claude and Gemini exhibit high adaptivity in toxicity handling; Gemini shows the strongest negative sentiment preference. On Twitter/X, where author demographics can be inferred from profile bios, political leaning bias is the clearest demographic signal: left-leaning authors are systematically over-represented despite right-leaning authors forming the pool plurality in the dataset, and this pattern largely persists across prompts.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过大规模模拟实验，系统分析了三大LLM提供商在社交媒体内容选择中的偏见模式，发现不同偏见在结构性和提示敏感性方面存在显著差异，并揭示了提供商间的不同权衡取舍。
AI.motivation: LLM越来越多地被用于策划和排名人类创建的内容，但其在这些任务中的偏见性质和结构仍不明确：哪些偏见在不同提供商和平台间具有鲁棒性，哪些可以通过提示设计来缓解。需要系统研究LLM在内容选择中的偏见模式。
AI.method: 采用受控模拟研究，在来自Twitter/X、Bluesky和Reddit的真实社交媒体数据集上，测试三大LLM提供商（OpenAI、Anthropic、Google）的偏见。使用六种提示策略（通用、流行、吸引人、信息性、争议性、中立），通过54万个模拟的top-10选择（从100个帖子的池中）覆盖54个实验条件。
AI.result: 1. 偏见在结构性和提示敏感性方面差异显著；2. 所有配置都放大了极化；3. 毒性处理在参与度和信息性提示间呈现强烈反转；4. 情感偏见主要为负面；5. 提供商比较显示不同权衡：GPT-4o Mini跨提示行为最一致，Claude和Gemini在毒性处理上适应性高，Gemini负面情感偏好最强；6. 在Twitter/X上，政治倾向偏见是最明显的人口统计信号：左倾作者被系统性过度代表，尽管右倾作者在数据集中占多数。
AI.conclusion: LLM在内容选择中的偏见模式复杂且多样化，不同偏见具有不同的结构性和提示敏感性。提供商间存在显著差异，提示设计只能部分缓解某些偏见。政治倾向偏见表现出较强的结构性特征，而毒性处理等偏见则更易受提示影响。这些发现对LLM在内容策划中的负责任部署具有重要意义。

title: An Intelligent Robotic and Bio-Digestor Framework for Smart Waste Management
comment: 8 pages, 10 figures, submitted to 7th International Conference on Smart Systems and Inventive Technology (ICSSIT 2026)
summary: Rapid urbanization and continuous population growth have made municipal solid waste management increasingly challenging. These challenges highlight the need for smarter and automated waste management solutions. This paper presents the design and evaluation of an integrated waste management framework that combines two connected systems, a robotic waste segregation module and an optimized bio-digestor. The robotic waste segregation system uses a MyCobot 280 Jetson Nano robotic arm along with YOLOv8 object detection and robot operating system (ROS)-based path planning to identify and sort waste in real time. It classifies waste into four different categories with high precision, reducing the need for manual intervention. After segregation, the biodegradable waste is transferred to a bio-digestor system equipped with multiple sensors. These sensors continuously monitor key parameters, including temperature, pH, pressure, and motor revolutions per minute. The Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) algorithm, combined with a regression model, is used to dynamically adjust system parameters. This intelligent optimization approach ensures stable operation and maximizes digestion efficiency under varying environmental conditions. System testing under dynamic conditions demonstrates a sorting accuracy of 98% along with highly efficient biological conversion. The proposed framework offers a scalable, intelligent, and practical solution for modern waste management, making it suitable for both residential and industrial applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种集成机器人垃圾分类和优化生物消化器的智能废物管理框架，实现98%的分类精度和高效生物转化
AI.motivation: 快速城市化和人口增长使城市固体废物管理日益困难，需要更智能、自动化的废物管理解决方案
AI.method: 结合机器人垃圾分类模块和优化生物消化器：1) 使用MyCobot 280 Jetson Nano机械臂配合YOLOv8目标检测和ROS路径规划实时识别分类四种废物；2) 生物消化器配备多传感器监测温度、pH、压力、转速等参数，采用粒子群优化算法结合回归模型动态调整系统参数
AI.result: 动态条件下测试显示98%的分类精度和高效的生物转化效率，系统运行稳定
AI.conclusion: 该框架为现代废物管理提供了可扩展、智能且实用的解决方案，适用于住宅和工业应用

title: Evaluating quality in synthetic data generation for large tabular health datasets
summary: There is no consensus in the field of synthetic data on concise metrics for quality evaluations or benchmarks on large health datasets, such as historical epidemiological data. This study presents an evaluation of seven recent models from major machine learning families. The models were evaluated using four different datasets, each with a distinct scale. To ensure a fair comparison, we systematically tuned the hyperparameters of each model for each dataset. We propose a methodology for evaluating the fidelity of synthesized joint distributions, aligning metrics with visualization on a single plot. This method is applicable to any dataset and is complemented by a domain-specific analysis of the German Cancer Registries' epidemiological dataset. The analysis reveals the challenges models face in strictly adhering to the medical domain. We hope this approach will serve as a foundational framework for guiding the selection of synthesizers and remain accessible to all stakeholders involved in releasing synthetic datasets.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种评估合成数据质量的方法论，特别针对大型健康数据集，通过系统评估7种机器学习模型在4个不同规模数据集上的表现，并应用于德国癌症登记流行病学数据。
AI.motivation: 当前合成数据领域缺乏针对大型健康数据集（如历史流行病学数据）的简洁质量评估指标和基准测试，需要建立系统化的评估框架来指导合成器的选择。
AI.method: 评估了7个来自主要机器学习家族的近期模型，使用4个不同规模的数据集，对每个模型在每个数据集上进行了系统化的超参数调优，提出了评估合成联合分布保真度的方法论，将指标与可视化在单一图表中对齐，并应用于德国癌症登记流行病学数据的领域特定分析。
AI.result: 分析揭示了模型在严格遵循医学领域约束方面面临的挑战，提出的方法能够有效评估合成数据的质量，并可作为选择合成器的基础框架。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出的方法论可作为指导合成器选择的基础框架，适用于任何数据集，并保持对所有参与发布合成数据集的相关方都易于访问，有助于推动合成数据在健康领域的应用。

title: TTL: Test-time Textual Learning for OOD Detection with Pretrained Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) such as CLIP exhibit strong Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection capabilities by aligning visual and textual representations. Recent CLIP-based test-time adaptation methods further improve detection performance by incorporating external OOD labels. However, such labels are finite and fixed, while the real OOD semantic space is inherently open-ended. Consequently, fixed labels fail to represent the diverse and evolving OOD semantics encountered in test streams. To address this limitation, we introduce Test-time Textual Learning (TTL), a framework that dynamically learns OOD textual semantics from unlabeled test streams, without relying on external OOD labels. TTL updates learnable prompts using pseudo-labeled test samples to capture emerging OOD knowledge. To suppress noise introduced by pseudo-labels, we introduce an OOD knowledge purification strategy that selects reliable OOD samples for adaptation while suppressing noise. In addition, TTL maintains an OOD Textual Knowledge Bank that stores high-quality textual features, providing stable score calibration across batches. Extensive experiments on two standard benchmarks with nine OOD datasets demonstrate that TTL consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance, highlighting the value of textual adaptation for robust test-time OOD detection. Our code is available at https://github.com/figec/TTL.

AI.tldr: TTL框架通过动态学习测试流中的OOD文本语义，无需外部OOD标签，实现了更鲁棒的测试时OOD检测
AI.motivation: 现有基于CLIP的测试时适应方法依赖有限且固定的外部OOD标签，无法代表测试流中多样且不断演化的OOD语义空间，限制了OOD检测性能
AI.method: 提出测试时文本学习(TTL)框架：1) 使用伪标签测试样本更新可学习提示以捕获新兴OOD知识；2) 引入OOD知识净化策略选择可靠OOD样本进行适应并抑制噪声；3) 维护OOD文本知识库存储高质量文本特征，实现跨批次的稳定分数校准
AI.result: 在两个标准基准测试和九个OOD数据集上的广泛实验表明，TTL始终实现最先进的性能，突显了文本适应对于鲁棒测试时OOD检测的价值
AI.conclusion: TTL通过动态学习测试流中的OOD文本语义，克服了固定外部标签的局限性，为开放语义空间中的OOD检测提供了更有效的解决方案

title: Towards Rigorous Explainability by Feature Attribution
summary: For around a decade, non-symbolic methods have been the option of choice when explaining complex machine learning (ML) models. Unfortunately, such methods lack rigor and can mislead human decision-makers. In high-stakes uses of ML, the lack of rigor is especially problematic. One prime example of provable lack of rigor is the adoption of Shapley values in explainable artificial intelligence (XAI), with the tool SHAP being a ubiquitous example. This paper overviews the ongoing efforts towards using rigorous symbolic methods of XAI as an alternative to non-rigorous non-symbolic approaches, concretely for assigning relative feature importance.

AI.tldr: 论文批判非符号化解释方法缺乏严谨性，提倡使用符号化方法进行可解释AI，特别针对特征重要性分配问题
AI.motivation: 非符号化解释方法（如SHAP）在复杂机器学习模型解释中缺乏严谨性，可能误导人类决策者，这在高风险应用中尤其成问题
AI.method: 采用严谨的符号化方法作为非严谨非符号化方法的替代方案，特别针对相对特征重要性分配问题
AI.result: 概述了当前在可解释AI领域使用符号化方法的研究进展和努力方向
AI.conclusion: 需要从非严谨的非符号化方法转向严谨的符号化方法，特别是在高风险机器学习应用中，以确保解释的可靠性和可信度

title: 4D Radar Gaussian Modeling and Scan Matching with RCS
comment: This version is an Extended Abstract, sent to the Radar in Robotics: New Frontiers workshop of ICRA 2026
summary: 4D millimeter-wave (mmWave) radars are increasingly used in robotics, as they offer robustness against adverse environmental conditions. Besides the usual XYZ position, they provide Doppler velocity measurements as well as Radar Cross Section (RCS) information for every point. While Doppler is widely used to filter out dynamic points, RCS is often overlooked and not usually used in modeling and scan matching processes. Building on previous 3D Gaussian modeling and scan matching work, we propose incorporating the physical behavior of RCS in the model, in order to further enrich the summarized information about the scene, and improve the scan matching process.

AI.tldr: 将RCS物理特性融入3D高斯模型，提升4D毫米波雷达点云配准性能
AI.motivation: 4D毫米波雷达在机器人领域应用广泛，但通常只利用Doppler速度信息过滤动态点，而忽略了RCS（雷达散射截面）信息。RCS包含丰富的物理特性，可以增强场景建模和点云配准能力。
AI.method: 在现有3D高斯建模和点云配准方法基础上，将RCS的物理行为特性融入模型，利用RCS信息丰富场景表征，改进点云配准过程。
AI.result: 未在摘要中明确说明具体实验结果，但预期通过融合RCS物理特性，能够增强场景信息表征并改善点云配准性能。
AI.conclusion: 将RCS物理特性融入3D高斯模型是提升4D毫米波雷达点云配准的有效方法，充分利用了雷达数据的完整信息维度。

title: Multi-Objective Bayesian Optimization via Adaptive \varepsilon-Constraints Decomposition
summary: Multi-objective Bayesian optimization (MOBO) provides a principled framework for optimizing expensive black-box functions with multiple objectives. However, existing MOBO methods often struggle with coverage, scalability with respect to the number of objectives, and integrating constraints and preferences. In this work, we propose \textit{STAGE-BO, Sequential Targeting Adaptive Gap-Filling $\varepsilon$-Constraint Bayesian Optimization}, that explicitly targets under-explored regions of the Pareto front. By analyzing the coverage of the approximate Pareto front, our method identifies the largest geometric gaps. These gaps are then used as constraints, which transforms the problem into a sequence of inequality-constrained subproblems, efficiently solved via constrained expected improvement acquisition. Our approach provides a uniform Pareto coverage without hypervolume computation and naturally applies to constrained and preference-based settings. Experiments on synthetic and real-world benchmarks demonstrate superior coverage and competitive hypervolume performance against state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: STAGE-BO是一种新的多目标贝叶斯优化方法，通过识别帕累托前沿的几何间隙并转化为约束条件，以序列化方式填补未探索区域，实现均匀覆盖。
AI.motivation: 现有MOBO方法在覆盖范围、目标数量扩展性、约束和偏好集成方面存在不足，特别是难以有效探索帕累托前沿的未开发区域。
AI.method: 提出STAGE-BO方法：1) 分析近似帕累托前沿的覆盖情况，识别最大几何间隙；2) 将这些间隙转化为约束条件，将问题转化为一系列不等式约束子问题；3) 使用约束期望改进采集函数高效求解。
AI.result: 在合成和真实世界基准测试中，STAGE-BO展现出优于现有方法的覆盖性能，并在超体积指标上具有竞争力，无需超体积计算即可实现均匀帕累托覆盖。
AI.conclusion: STAGE-BO通过显式针对帕累托前沿的未探索区域，解决了MOBO中的覆盖问题，提供了一种可扩展、能集成约束和偏好的有效方法。

title: Concept-wise Attention for Fine-grained Concept Bottleneck Models
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures, Accepted by CVPR 2026 Fingdings
summary: Recently impressive performance has been achieved in Concept Bottleneck Models (CBM) by utilizing the image-text alignment learned by a large pre-trained vision-language model (i.e. CLIP). However, there exist two key limitations in concept modeling. Existing methods often suffer from pre-training biases, manifested as granularity misalignment or reliance on structural priors. Moreover, fine-tuning with Binary Cross-Entropy (BCE) loss treats each concept independently, which ignores mutual exclusivity among concepts, leading to suboptimal alignment. To address these limitations, we propose Concept-wise Attention for Fine-grained Concept Bottleneck Models (CoAt-CBM), a novel framework that achieves adaptive fine-grained image-concept alignment and high interpretability. Specifically, CoAt-CBM employs learnable concept-wise visual queries to adaptively obtain fine-grained concept-wise visual embeddings, which are then used to produce a concept score vector. Then, a novel concept contrastive optimization guides the model to handle the relative importance of the concept scores, enabling concept predictions to faithfully reflect the image content and improved alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CoAt-CBM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods. The codes will be available upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: CoAt-CBM提出了一种新的概念瓶颈模型框架，通过概念级注意力机制实现细粒度图像-概念对齐，解决了现有方法中的预训练偏差和概念互斥性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CLIP的概念瓶颈模型存在两个关键限制：1) 预训练偏差问题，表现为粒度不对齐或过度依赖结构先验；2) 使用二元交叉熵损失微调时，将每个概念独立处理，忽略了概念间的互斥性，导致对齐效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出CoAt-CBM框架：1) 使用可学习的概念级视觉查询自适应获取细粒度的概念级视觉嵌入，生成概念得分向量；2) 引入概念对比优化，指导模型处理概念得分的相对重要性，使概念预测能忠实反映图像内容并改善对齐效果。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，CoAt-CBM在多个基准测试中一致优于现有最先进方法，实现了更好的图像-概念对齐和更高的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: CoAt-CBM通过自适应细粒度概念对齐和概念对比优化，有效解决了概念瓶颈模型中的预训练偏差和概念互斥性问题，显著提升了模型性能和可解释性。

title: Experience Compression Spectrum: Unifying Memory, Skills, and Rules in LLM Agents
summary: As LLM agents scale to long-horizon, multi-session deployments, efficiently managing accumulated experience becomes a critical bottleneck. Agent memory systems and agent skill discovery both address this challenge -- extracting reusable knowledge from interaction traces -- yet a citation analysis of 1,136 references across 22 primary papers reveals a cross-community citation rate below 1%. We propose the \emph{Experience Compression Spectrum}, a unifying framework that positions memory, skills, and rules as points along a single axis of increasing compression (5--20$\times$ for episodic memory, 50--500$\times$ for procedural skills, 1,000$\times$+ for declarative rules), directly reducing context consumption, retrieval latency, and compute overhead. Mapping 20+ systems onto this spectrum reveals that every system operates at a fixed, predetermined compression level -- none supports adaptive cross-level compression, a gap we term the \emph{missing diagonal}. We further show that specialization alone is insufficient -- both communities independently solve shared sub-problems without exchanging solutions -- that evaluation methods are tightly coupled to compression levels, that transferability increases with compression at the cost of specificity, and that knowledge lifecycle management remains largely neglected. We articulate open problems and design principles for scalable, full-spectrum agent learning systems.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了"经验压缩谱"框架，将记忆、技能和规则统一在单一压缩轴上，揭示了当前系统缺乏自适应跨级压缩的问题，并分析了知识生命周期管理的挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM智能体扩展到长视野、多会话部署，高效管理累积经验成为关键瓶颈。现有记忆系统和技能发现方法都试图从交互轨迹中提取可重用知识，但跨社区引用率低于1%，表明缺乏统一框架。
AI.method: 提出了经验压缩谱框架，将记忆、技能和规则定位在单一压缩轴上（情节记忆5-20倍，程序技能50-500倍，声明规则1000倍以上）。分析了22篇主要论文的1136个引用，将20多个系统映射到该谱系上，识别出"缺失对角线"问题。
AI.result: 发现所有系统都在固定的预定压缩级别上运行，缺乏自适应跨级压缩。两个社区独立解决共享子问题而不交换解决方案，评估方法与压缩级别紧密耦合，可转移性随压缩增加但以特异性为代价，知识生命周期管理被忽视。
AI.conclusion: 提出了可扩展、全谱系智能体学习系统的开放问题和设计原则，强调需要支持自适应跨级压缩的统一框架来有效管理智能体经验。

title: Graph Theoretical Outlier Rejection for 4D Radar Registration in Feature-Poor Environments
summary: Automotive 4D imaging radar is well suited for operation in dusty and low-visibility environments, but scan registration remains challenging due to scan sparsity and spurious detections caused by noise and multipath reflections. This difficulty is compounded in feature-poor open-pit mines, where the lack of distinctive landmarks reduces correspondence reliability. We integrate graph-based pairwise consistency maximization (PCM) as an outlier rejection step within the iterative closest points (ICP) loop. We propose a radar-adapted pairwise distance-invariant scoring function for graph-based (PCM) that incorporates anisotropic, per-detection uncertainty derived from a radar measurement model. The consistency maximization problem is approximated with a greedy heuristic that finds a large clique in the pairwise consistency graph. The refined correspondence set improves robustness when the initial association set is heavily contaminated. We evaluate a standard Euclidean distance residual and our uncertainty-aware residual on an open-pit mine dataset collected with a 4D imaging radar. Compared to the generalized ICP (GICP) baseline without PCM, our method reduces segment relative position error (RPE) by 29.6% on 1 m segments and by up to 55% on 100 m segments. The presented method is intended for integration into localization pipelines and is suitable for online use due to the greedy heuristic in graph-based (PCM).

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于稀疏4D成像雷达扫描配准的改进方法，在ICP循环中集成基于图的最大一致性（PCM）进行异常值剔除，使用雷达测量模型导出的各向异性不确定性进行评分，在露天矿数据集上显著降低了配准误差。
AI.motivation: 4D成像雷达在灰尘和低能见度环境下表现良好，但扫描配准面临挑战：扫描稀疏性、噪声和多径反射导致的虚假检测。在特征贫乏的露天矿环境中，缺乏明显地标进一步降低了对应关系的可靠性。
AI.method: 在迭代最近点（ICP）循环中集成基于图的最大一致性（PCM）作为异常值剔除步骤。提出雷达适应的成对距离不变评分函数，该函数结合了从雷达测量模型导出的各向异性、每个检测的不确定性。使用贪婪启发式算法近似解决一致性最大化问题，在成对一致性图中寻找大团。
AI.result: 在露天矿数据集上评估，相比没有PCM的广义ICP（GICP）基线，该方法在1米段上减少相对位置误差（RPE）29.6%，在100米段上最多减少55%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法适用于在线使用（因采用贪婪启发式算法），旨在集成到定位管道中，显著提高了在特征贫乏环境中稀疏雷达扫描配准的鲁棒性。

title: TwinTrack: Post-hoc Multi-Rater Calibration for Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC) segmentation on contrast-enhanced CT is inherently ambiguous: inter-rater disagreement among experts reflects genuine uncertainty rather than annotation noise. Standard deep learning approaches assume a single ground truth, producing probabilistic outputs that can be poorly calibrated and difficult to interpret under such ambiguity. We present TwinTrack, a framework that addresses this gap through post-hoc calibration of ensemble segmentation probabilities to the empirical mean human response (MHR) -the fraction of expert annotators labeling a voxel as tumor. Calibrated probabilities are thus directly interpretable as the expected proportion of annotators assigning the tumor label, explicitly modeling inter-rater disagreement. The proposed post-hoc calibration procedure is simple and requires only a small multi-rater calibration set. It consistently improves calibration metrics over standard approaches when evaluated on the MICCAI 2025 CURVAS-PDACVI multi-rater benchmark.

AI.tldr: TwinTrack框架通过后处理校准将分割概率映射到专家平均响应，直接解释为标注者分配肿瘤标签的预期比例，解决胰腺癌CT分割中固有的标注模糊性问题。
AI.motivation: 胰腺导管腺癌在增强CT上的分割存在固有的模糊性：专家间的标注差异反映的是真实的不确定性而非标注噪声。标准的深度学习方法假设单一真实标注，产生的概率输出在这种模糊性下可能校准不佳且难以解释。
AI.method: 提出TwinTrack框架，通过后处理校准将集成分割概率映射到经验平均人类响应（MHR）-即专家标注者将体素标记为肿瘤的比例。校准后的概率可直接解释为标注者分配肿瘤标签的预期比例，明确建模标注者间的不一致性。该方法仅需小型多标注者校准集。
AI.result: 在MICCAI 2025 CURVAS-PDACVI多标注者基准测试中，该方法相比标准方法持续改善了校准指标。
AI.conclusion: TwinTrack通过将分割概率校准到专家平均响应，为存在固有模糊性的医学图像分割提供了更好的概率解释性和校准性能，明确建模了标注者间的不一致性。

title: RefereeBench: Are Video MLLMs Ready to be Multi-Sport Referees
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) excel at generic video understanding, their ability to support specialized, rule-grounded decision-making remains insufficiently explored. In this paper, we introduce RefereeBench, the first large-scale benchmark for evaluating MLLMs as automatic sports referees. Spanning 11 sports with 925 curated videos and 6,475 QA pairs, RefereeBench evaluates five core officiating abilities: foul existence, foul and penalty classification, foul and penalty reasoning, entity perception, and temporal grounding. The benchmark is fully human-annotated to ensure high-quality annotations grounded in authentic officiating logic and multimodal evidence. Extensive evaluations of state-of-the-art MLLMs show that even the strongest models, such as Doubao-Seed-1.8 and Gemini-3-Pro, achieve only around 60% accuracy, while the strongest open-source model, Qwen3-VL, reaches only 47%. These results indicate that current models remain far from being reliable sports referees. Further analysis shows that while models can often identify incidents and involved entities, they struggle with rule application and temporal grounding, and frequently over-call fouls on normal clips. Our benchmark highlights the need for future MLLMs that better integrate domain knowledge and multimodal understanding, advancing trustworthy AI-assisted officiating and broader multimodal decision-making.

AI.tldr: RefereeBench：首个大规模评估多模态大语言模型作为自动体育裁判能力的基准，涵盖11项运动、925个视频和6,475个QA对，结果显示当前模型准确率仅60%左右，远未达到可靠裁判水平。
AI.motivation: 虽然多模态大语言模型在通用视频理解方面表现出色，但其在专业、基于规则的决策支持能力尚未得到充分探索。本研究旨在填补这一空白，评估MLLMs作为自动体育裁判的能力。
AI.method: 构建RefereeBench基准，涵盖11项体育运动，包含925个精选视频和6,475个人工标注的问答对。评估五个核心裁判能力：犯规存在性判断、犯规和处罚分类、犯规和处罚推理、实体感知、时间定位。所有标注均由人工完成，确保基于真实裁判逻辑和多模态证据的高质量标注。
AI.result: 对最先进MLLMs的广泛评估显示，即使最强的模型（如Doubao-Seed-1.8和Gemini-3-Pro）准确率仅约60%，最强的开源模型Qwen3-VL仅达到47%。分析表明，模型虽然能识别事件和涉及实体，但在规则应用和时间定位方面存在困难，且经常在正常片段上过度判罚犯规。
AI.conclusion: 当前模型距离成为可靠的体育裁判仍有很大差距。RefereeBench基准突出了未来MLLMs需要更好地整合领域知识和多模态理解，以推进可信的AI辅助裁判和更广泛的多模态决策能力。

title: Switch: Learning Agile Skills Switching for Humanoid Robots
summary: Recent advancements in whole-body control through deep reinforcement learning have enabled humanoid robots to achieve remarkable progress in real-world chal lenging locomotion skills. However, existing approaches often struggle with flexible transitions between distinct skills, cre ating safety concerns and practical limitations. To address this challenge, we introduce a hierarchical multi-skill system, Switch, enabling seamless skill transitions at any moment. Our approach comprises three key components: (1) a Skill Graph (SG) that establishes potential cross-skill transitions based on kinematic similarity within multi-skill motion data, (2) a whole-body tracking policy trained on this skill graph through deep reinforcement learning, and (3) an online skill scheduler to drive the tracking policy for robust skill execution and smooth transitions. For skill switching or significant tracking deviations, the scheduler performs online graph search to find the optimal feasible path, which ensures efficient, stable, and real-time execution of diverse locomotion skills. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that Switch empowers humanoid to execute agile skill transitions with high success rates while maintaining strong motion imitation performance.

AI.tldr: Switch：一种基于技能图的分层多技能系统，通过深度强化学习实现人形机器人任意时刻的无缝技能切换，确保安全稳定的全身运动控制。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度强化学习的全身控制方法在实现不同技能间的灵活切换方面存在困难，导致安全隐患和实际应用限制。需要一种能够实现任意时刻无缝技能过渡的系统。
AI.method: 提出分层多技能系统Switch，包含三个核心组件：1）基于多技能运动数据中运动学相似性建立潜在跨技能转换的技能图；2）通过深度强化学习在技能图上训练的全身跟踪策略；3）在线技能调度器，驱动跟踪策略实现鲁棒的技能执行和平滑过渡。
AI.result: 综合实验表明，Switch使人形机器人能够以高成功率执行敏捷的技能切换，同时保持强大的运动模仿性能。系统能够实时、高效、稳定地执行多样化的运动技能。
AI.conclusion: Switch系统通过技能图、强化学习策略和在线调度器的协同工作，成功解决了人形机器人多技能无缝切换的挑战，为实现更灵活、安全的机器人运动控制提供了有效方案。

title: RAGognizer: Hallucination-Aware Fine-Tuning via Detection Head Integration
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is widely used to augment the input to Large Language Models (LLMs) with external information, such as recent or domain-specific knowledge. Nonetheless, current models still produce closed-domain hallucinations and generate content that is unsupported by the retrieved context. Current detection approaches typically treat hallucination as a post-hoc problem, relying on black-box consistency checks or probes over frozen internal representations. In this work, we demonstrate that hallucination detection based on internal state representation can also serve as a direct training signal. We introduce RAGognize, a dataset of naturally occurring closed-domain hallucinations with token-level annotations, and RAGognizer, a hallucination-aware fine-tuning approach that integrates a lightweight detection head into an LLM, allowing for the joint optimization of language modeling and hallucination detection. This joint objective forces the model to improve the separability of its internal states regarding hallucinations while simultaneously learning to generate well-formed and meaningful responses. Across multiple benchmarks, RAGognizer achieves state-of-the-art token-level hallucination detection while substantially reducing hallucination rates during generation, without degrading language quality or relevance.

AI.tldr: RAGognizer：通过联合优化语言建模和幻觉检测的微调方法，在RAG系统中实现最先进的幻觉检测和生成质量提升
AI.motivation: 当前RAG系统仍会产生与检索上下文无关的闭域幻觉，现有检测方法多为后处理方案，依赖黑盒一致性检查或冻结内部表示。需要更有效的幻觉检测和减少方法。
AI.method: 提出RAGognize数据集（包含自然闭域幻觉的token级标注）和RAGognizer微调方法，将轻量级检测头集成到LLM中，联合优化语言建模和幻觉检测目标。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，RAGognizer实现了最先进的token级幻觉检测，同时显著降低了生成过程中的幻觉率，且不损害语言质量或相关性。
AI.conclusion: 内部状态表示可用于直接训练信号，联合优化语言建模和幻觉检测能同时改善内部状态的可分离性和生成质量，为RAG系统提供有效的幻觉缓解方案。

title: Sketch and Text Synergy: Fusing Structural Contours and Descriptive Attributes for Fine-Grained Image Retrieval
comment: Image Retrieval, Hand-drawn Sketch, Multi-stage Cross-modal Feature Alignment
summary: Fine-grained image retrieval via hand-drawn sketches or textual descriptions remains a critical challenge due to inherent modality gaps. While hand-drawn sketches capture complex structural contours, they lack color and texture, which text effectively provides despite omitting spatial contours. Motivated by the complementary nature of these modalities, we propose the Sketch and Text Based Image Retrieval (STBIR) framework. By synergizing the rich color and texture cues from text with the structural outlines provided by sketches, STBIR achieves superior fine-grained retrieval performance. First, a curriculum learning driven robustness enhancement module is proposed to enhance the model's robustness when handling queries of varying quality. Second, we introduce a category-knowledge-based feature space optimization module, thereby significantly boosting the model's representational power. Finally, we design a multi-stage cross-modal feature alignment mechanism to effectively mitigate the challenges of cross modal feature alignment. Furthermore, we curate the fine-grained STBIR benchmark dataset to rigorously validate the efficacy of our proposed framework and to provide data support as a reference for subsequent related research. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed STBIR framework significantly outperforms state of the art methods.

AI.tldr: 提出STBIR框架，通过结合手绘草图的结构轮廓和文本的颜色纹理信息，实现细粒度图像检索，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 细粒度图像检索中，手绘草图能捕捉复杂结构轮廓但缺乏颜色纹理，文本能提供颜色纹理但缺失空间轮廓。这两种模态具有互补性，但存在模态鸿沟挑战。
AI.method: 提出STBIR框架：1) 课程学习驱动的鲁棒性增强模块，处理不同质量查询；2) 基于类别知识的特征空间优化模块，提升表征能力；3) 多阶段跨模态特征对齐机制，缓解跨模态对齐挑战。此外构建了细粒度STBIR基准数据集。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，STBIR框架在细粒度图像检索任务上显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过协同利用草图和文本的互补信息，STBIR框架有效解决了细粒度跨模态检索问题，为后续研究提供了框架和数据集支持。

title: DiZiNER: Disagreement-guided Instruction Refinement via Pilot Annotation Simulation for Zero-shot Named Entity Recognition
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures; Accepted to the ACL 2026 Main Conference
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have advanced information extraction (IE) by enabling zero-shot and few-shot named entity recognition (NER), yet their generative outputs still show persistent and systematic errors. Despite progress through instruction fine-tuning, zero-shot NER still lags far behind supervised systems. These recurring errors mirror inconsistencies observed in early-stage human annotation processes that resolve disagreements through pilot annotation. Motivated by this analogy, we introduce DiZiNER (Disagreement-guided Instruction Refinement via Pilot Annotation Simulation for Zero-shot Named Entity Recognition), a framework that simulates the pilot annotation process, employing LLMs to act as both annotators and supervisors. Multiple heterogeneous LLMs annotate shared texts, and a supervisor model analyzes inter-model disagreements to refine task instructions. Across 18 benchmarks, DiZiNER achieves zero-shot SOTA results on 14 datasets, improving prior bests by +8.0 F1 and reducing the zero-shot to supervised gap by over +11 points. It also consistently outperforms its supervisor, GPT-5 mini, indicating that improvements stem from disagreement-guided instruction refinement rather than model capacity. Pairwise agreement between models shows a strong correlation with NER performance, further supporting this finding.

AI.tldr: DiZiNER框架通过模拟人类标注中的试点标注过程，利用LLM作为标注者和监督者，通过分析模型间分歧来优化任务指令，显著提升零样本NER性能
AI.motivation: 尽管LLM在零样本NER方面取得进展，但其生成输出仍存在系统性错误，性能远落后于监督系统。这些错误与人类早期标注过程中的不一致性相似，后者通过试点标注解决分歧，这启发了DiZiNER框架的开发
AI.method: DiZiNER模拟试点标注过程：1) 多个异构LLM对共享文本进行标注；2) 监督模型分析模型间分歧；3) 基于分歧分析优化任务指令。框架中LLM同时扮演标注者和监督者角色
AI.result: 在18个基准测试中，DiZiNER在14个数据集上达到零样本SOTA，比先前最佳方法提升+8.0 F1，将零样本与监督系统的差距缩小超过11个百分点。即使监督模型是GPT-5 mini，DiZiNER仍能超越其性能，表明改进源于分歧引导的指令优化而非模型容量
AI.conclusion: DiZiNER通过模拟人类标注的试点过程，有效利用模型间分歧来优化指令，显著提升零样本NER性能。模型间一致性程度与NER性能强相关，验证了分歧引导指令优化的有效性

title: (Weighted) Adaptive Radius Near Neighbor Search: Evaluation for WiFi Fingerprint-based Positioning
comment: 11 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables, submitted to IPIN 2026
summary: Fixed Radius Near Neighbor (FRNN) search is an alternative to the widely used k Nearest Neighbors (kNN) search. Unlike kNN, FRNN determines a label or an estimate for a test sample based on all training samples within a predefined distance. While this approach is beneficial in certain scenarios, assuming a fixed maximum distance for all training samples can decrease the accuracy of the FRNN. Therefore, in this paper we propose the Adaptive Radius Near Neighbor (ARNN) and the Weighted ARNN (WARNN), which employ adaptive distances and in latter case weights. All three methods are compared to kNN and twelve of its variants for a regression problem, namely WiFi fingerprinting indoor positioning, using 22 different datasets to provide a comprehensive analysis. While the performances of the tested FRNN and ARNN versions were amongst the worse, three of the four best methods in the test were WARNN versions, indicating that using weights together with adaptive distances achieves performance comparable or even better than kNN variants.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出自适应半径近邻(ARNN)和加权自适应半径近邻(WARNN)方法，作为固定半径近邻(FRNN)的改进，通过自适应距离和权重机制提升回归问题性能，在WiFi指纹室内定位任务中验证了WARNN优于传统kNN及其变体。
AI.motivation: 固定半径近邻(FRNN)方法对所有训练样本使用固定最大距离，在某些情况下会降低准确性。需要开发更灵活的近邻搜索方法来提升回归任务的性能。
AI.method: 提出两种新方法：自适应半径近邻(ARNN)使用自适应距离阈值，加权自适应半径近邻(WARNN)在ARNN基础上加入权重机制。在WiFi指纹室内定位回归问题中，使用22个不同数据集，将FRNN、ARNN、WARNN与kNN及其12个变体进行全面比较。
AI.result: 测试的FRNN和ARNN版本性能较差，但在四个最佳方法中，有三个是WARNN版本。这表明结合自适应距离和权重机制能达到甚至超越kNN变体的性能。
AI.conclusion: 自适应距离与权重结合(WARNN)在回归任务中表现出色，性能优于传统kNN方法，为近邻搜索提供了有效的改进方案。

title: QuantSightBench: Evaluating LLM Quantitative Forecasting with Prediction Intervals
summary: Forecasting has become a natural benchmark for reasoning under uncertainty. Yet existing evaluations of large language models remain limited to judgmental tasks in simple formats, such as binary or multiple-choice questions. In practice, however, forecasting spans a far broader scope. Across domains such as economics, public health, and social demographics, decisions hinge on numerical estimates over continuous quantities, a capability that current benchmarks do not capture. Evaluating such estimates requires a format that makes uncertainty explicit and testable. We propose prediction intervals as a natural and rigorous interface for this purpose. They demand scale awareness, internal consistency across confidence levels, and calibration over a continuum of outcomes, making them a more suitable evaluation format than point estimates for numerical forecasting. To assess this capability, we introduce a new benchmark QuantSightBench, and evaluate frontier models under multiple settings, assessing both empirical coverage and interval sharpness. Our results show that none of the 11 evaluated frontier and open-weight models achieves the 90\% coverage target, with the top performers Gemini 3.1 Pro (79.1\%), Grok 4 (76.4\%), and GPT-5.4 (75.3\%) all falling at least 10 percentage points short. Calibration degrades sharply at extreme magnitudes, revealing systematic overconfidence across all evaluated models.

AI.tldr: 提出预测区间作为评估大语言模型数值预测能力的新基准，发现现有模型在连续量预测中普遍存在过度自信问题
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型评估主要局限于简单格式的判断任务（如二选一或多选题），而实际预测任务需要连续数值估计能力，当前基准无法有效评估这种能力
AI.method: 提出使用预测区间作为评估接口，要求模型具备尺度感知、置信水平内部一致性和连续结果校准能力；引入QuantSightBench新基准，评估11个前沿和开源模型在多种设置下的表现
AI.result: 所有11个评估模型均未达到90%覆盖率目标，最佳表现者Gemini 3.1 Pro（79.1%）、Grok 4（76.4%）和GPT-5.4（75.3%）均至少相差10个百分点；校准在极端量级时急剧恶化，所有模型均表现出系统性过度自信
AI.conclusion: 预测区间是评估数值预测能力的合适格式，当前大语言模型在连续量预测中存在显著不足，需要改进不确定性量化能力

title: Keep It CALM: Toward Calibration-Free Kilometer-Level SLAM with Visual Geometry Foundation Models via an Assistant Eye
comment: 19 pages, 8 figures, submitted to IEEE TPAMI
summary: Visual Geometry Foundation Models (VGFMs) demonstrate remarkable zero-shot capabilities in local reconstruction. However, deploying them for kilometer-level Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) remains challenging. In such scenarios, current approaches mainly rely on linear transforms (e.g., Sim3 and SL4) for sub-map alignment, while we argue that a single linear transform is fundamentally insufficient to model the complex, non-linear geometric distortions inherent in VGFM outputs. Forcing such rigid alignment leads to the rapid accumulation of uncorrected residuals, eventually resulting in significant trajectory drift and map divergence. To address these limitations, we present CAL2M (Calibration-free Assistant-eye based Large-scale Localization and Mapping), a plug-and-play framework compatible with arbitrary VGFMs. Distinct from traditional systems, CAL2M introduces an "assistant eye" solely to leverage the prior of constant physical spacing, effectively eliminating scale ambiguity without any temporal or spatial pre-calibration. Furthermore, leveraging the assumption of accurate feature matching, we propose an epipolar-guided intrinsic and pose correction model. Supported by an online intrinsic search module, it can effectively rectify rotation and translation errors caused by inaccurate intrinsics through fundamental matrix decomposition. Finally, to ensure accurate mapping, we introduce a globally consistent mapping strategy based on anchor propagation. By constructing and fusing anchors across the trajectory, we establish a direct local-to-global mapping relationship. This enables the application of nonlinear transformations to elastically align sub-maps, effectively eliminating geometric misalignments and ensuring a globally consistent reconstruction. The source code of CAL2M will be publicly available at https://github.com/IRMVLab/CALM.

AI.tldr: CAL2M是一个无需校准的辅助眼大尺度定位与建图框架，通过非线性变换解决视觉几何基础模型在千米级SLAM中的几何失真问题
AI.motivation: 视觉几何基础模型在局部重建中表现出优异的零样本能力，但在千米级SLAM部署中存在挑战。现有方法主要依赖线性变换进行子地图对齐，但单一线性变换无法建模VGFM输出中固有的复杂非线性几何失真，导致未校正残差快速累积，最终造成显著的轨迹漂移和地图发散。
AI.method: CAL2M引入"辅助眼"利用恒定物理间距先验消除尺度模糊性，无需时空预校准；提出基于对极几何的内参和位姿校正模型，通过基础矩阵分解校正内参不准确引起的旋转和平移误差；采用基于锚点传播的全局一致建图策略，通过构建和融合轨迹上的锚点建立局部到全局的映射关系，应用非线性变换弹性对齐子地图。
AI.result: CAL2M能够有效消除几何错位，确保全局一致的重建，解决了VGFM在大尺度SLAM中的几何失真问题。该框架与任意VGFM兼容，具有即插即用特性。
AI.conclusion: CAL2M通过引入辅助眼、对极几何校正模型和全局一致建图策略，成功解决了视觉几何基础模型在千米级SLAM中的非线性几何失真问题，实现了无需校准的大尺度定位与建图。

title: Diffusion Autoencoder for Unsupervised Artifact Restoration in Handheld Fundus Images
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, 1 Table - ISBI IEEE 2025 CONFERENCE
summary: The advent of handheld fundus imaging devices has made ophthalmologic diagnosis and disease screening more accessible, efficient, and cost-effective. However, images captured from these setups often suffer from artifacts such as flash reflections, exposure variations, and motion-induced blur, which degrade image quality and hinder downstream analysis. While generative models have been effective in image restoration, most depend on paired supervision or predefined artifact structures, making them less adaptable to unstructured degradations commonly observed in handheld fundus images. To address this, we propose an unsupervised diffusion autoencoder that integrates a context encoder with the denoising process to learn semantically meaningful representations for artifact restoration. The model is trained only on high-quality table-top fundus images and infers to restore artifact-affected handheld acquisitions. We validate the restorations through quantitative and qualitative evaluations, and have shown that diagnostic accuracy increases to 81.17% on an unseen dataset and multiple artifact conditions

AI.tldr: 提出无监督扩散自编码器，用于修复手持式眼底图像中的非结构化伪影，仅使用高质量桌面眼底图像训练，在未见数据集上提升诊断准确率至81.17%
AI.motivation: 手持式眼底成像设备使眼科诊断和疾病筛查更易获得、高效和经济，但捕获的图像常存在闪光反射、曝光变化和运动模糊等伪影，降低图像质量并阻碍下游分析。现有生成模型大多依赖配对监督或预定义伪影结构，难以适应手持式眼底图像中常见的非结构化退化
AI.method: 提出无监督扩散自编码器，将上下文编码器与去噪过程集成，学习语义上有意义的表示以进行伪影修复。模型仅使用高质量桌面眼底图像训练，可推断并修复受伪影影响的手持式采集图像
AI.result: 通过定量和定性评估验证修复效果，在未见数据集和多种伪影条件下，诊断准确率提升至81.17%
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了手持式眼底图像中的非结构化伪影问题，仅需高质量桌面图像训练即可实现跨设备伪影修复，显著提升诊断准确性

title: Efficient closed-form approaches for pose estimation using Sylvester forms
summary: Solving non-linear least-squares problem for pose estimation (rotation and translation) is often a time consuming yet fundamental problem in several real-time computer vision applications. With an adequate rotation parametrization, the optimization problem can be reduced to the solution of a~system of polynomial equations and solved in closed form. Recent advances in efficient closed form solvers utilizing resultant matrices have shown a promising research direction to decrease the computation time while preserving the estimation accuracy. In this paper, we propose a new class of resultant-based solvers that exploit Sylvester forms to further reduce the complexity of the resolution. We demonstrate that our proposed methods are numerically as accurate as the state-of-the-art solvers, and outperform them in terms of computational time. We show that this approach can be applied for pose estimation in two different types of problems: estimating a pose from 3D to 3D correspondences, and estimating a pose from 3D points to 2D points correspondences.

AI.tldr: 提出基于Sylvester形式的新型结式求解器，用于姿态估计中的非线性最小二乘问题，在保持精度的同时显著降低计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 姿态估计（旋转和平移）中的非线性最小二乘问题在实时计算机视觉应用中耗时严重，需要更高效的封闭形式求解方法。
AI.method: 提出一类基于Sylvester形式的新型结式求解器，利用适当的旋转参数化将优化问题简化为多项式方程组，通过Sylvester形式进一步降低求解复杂度。
AI.result: 所提方法在数值精度上与最先进的求解器相当，但在计算时间上优于现有方法，适用于3D-3D对应和3D-2D对应两种姿态估计问题。
AI.conclusion: 基于Sylvester形式的结式求解器为姿态估计提供了一种更高效的计算框架，在保持精度的同时显著提升了计算速度。

title: NeuroLip: An Event-driven Spatiotemporal Learning Framework for Cross-Scene Lip-Motion-based Visual Speaker Recognition
summary: Visual speaker recognition based on lip motion offers a silent, hands-free, and behavior-driven biometric solution that remains effective even when acoustic cues are unavailable. Compared to traditional methods that rely heavily on appearance-dependent representations, lip motion encodes subject-specific behavioral dynamics driven by consistent articulation patterns and muscle coordination, offering inherent stability across environmental changes. However, capturing these robust, fine-grained dynamics is challenging for conventional frame-based cameras due to motion blur and low dynamic range. To exploit the intrinsic stability of lip motion and address these sensing limitations, we propose NeuroLip, an event-based framework that captures fine-grained lip dynamics under a strict yet practical cross-scene protocol: training is performed under a single controlled condition, while recognition must generalize to unseen viewing and lighting conditions. NeuroLip features a 1) Temporal-aware Voxel Encoding module with adaptive event weighting, 2) Structure-aware Spatial Enhancer that amplifies discriminative behavioral patterns by suppressing noise while preserving vertically structured motion information, and 3) Polarity Consistency Regularization mechanism to retain motion-direction cues encoded in event polarities. To facilitate systematic evaluation, we introduce DVSpeaker, a comprehensive event-based lip-motion dataset comprising 50 subjects recorded under four distinct viewpoint and illumination scenarios. Extensive experiments demonstrate that NeuroLip achieves near-perfect matched-scene accuracy and robust cross-scene generalization, attaining over 71% accuracy on unseen viewpoints and nearly 76% under low-light conditions, outperforming representative existing methods by at least 8.54%. The dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/JiuZeongit/NeuroLip.

AI.tldr: NeuroLip：基于事件相机的唇部运动视觉说话人识别框架，通过事件数据捕捉细粒度唇部动态，在跨场景协议下实现鲁棒识别，并发布了DVSpeaker数据集。
AI.motivation: 唇部运动提供了一种无声、免手、行为驱动的生物识别方案，在声学线索不可用时仍有效。传统方法依赖外观相关表示，而唇部运动编码了由一致发音模式和肌肉协调驱动的特定主体行为动态，具有跨环境变化的固有稳定性。然而，传统帧相机因运动模糊和低动态范围难以捕捉这些鲁棒的细粒度动态。
AI.method: 提出NeuroLip事件框架：1) 具有自适应事件加权的时序感知体素编码模块；2) 结构感知空间增强器，通过抑制噪声同时保留垂直结构化运动信息来放大判别性行为模式；3) 极性一致性正则化机制，保留事件极性编码的运动方向线索。采用严格的跨场景协议：在单一受控条件下训练，在未见过的视角和光照条件下进行识别。
AI.result: NeuroLip在匹配场景下达到近乎完美的准确率，在跨场景泛化方面表现鲁棒：在未见视角上超过71%准确率，在低光照条件下接近76%，比现有代表性方法至少高出8.54%。发布了包含50个主体在四种不同视角和光照场景下记录的DVSpeaker事件唇部运动数据集。
AI.conclusion: NeuroLip通过事件相机有效捕捉唇部细粒度动态，解决了传统帧相机的局限性，在跨场景协议下实现了鲁棒的说话人识别。提出的方法在未见视角和光照条件下表现出色，为视觉说话人识别提供了新的解决方案。

title: DPrivBench: Benchmarking LLMs' Reasoning for Differential Privacy
summary: Differential privacy (DP) has a wide range of applications for protecting data privacy, but designing and verifying DP algorithms requires expert-level reasoning, creating a high barrier for non-expert practitioners. Prior works either rely on specialized verification languages that demand substantial domain expertise or remain semi-automated and require human-in-the-loop guidance. In this work, we investigate whether large language models (LLMs) can automate DP reasoning. We introduce DPrivBench, a benchmark in which each instance asks whether a function or algorithm satisfies a stated DP guarantee under specified assumptions. The benchmark is carefully designed to cover a broad range of DP topics, span diverse difficulty levels, and resist shortcut reasoning through trivial pattern matching. Experiments show that while the strongest models handle textbook mechanisms well, all models struggle with advanced algorithms, revealing substantial gaps in current DP reasoning capabilities. Through further analytic study and failure-mode analysis, we identify several promising directions for improving automated DP reasoning. Our benchmark provides a solid foundation for developing and evaluating such methods, and complements existing benchmarks for mathematical reasoning.

AI.tldr: 论文提出DPrivBench基准测试，用于评估大语言模型在差分隐私推理方面的能力，发现当前模型在处理基础机制时表现良好，但在复杂算法上存在显著不足。
AI.motivation: 差分隐私算法设计和验证需要专家级推理能力，对非专家从业者构成高门槛。现有方法要么依赖需要大量领域知识的专用验证语言，要么需要人工参与指导，因此研究大语言模型能否自动化差分隐私推理。
AI.method: 引入DPrivBench基准测试，每个实例询问函数或算法在特定假设下是否满足声明的差分隐私保证。基准设计涵盖广泛的差分隐私主题、不同难度级别，并抵抗通过简单模式匹配的捷径推理。
AI.result: 实验表明，最强模型能较好处理教科书机制，但所有模型在高级算法上都表现困难，揭示了当前差分隐私推理能力的显著差距。通过进一步分析研究和失败模式分析，确定了改进自动化差分隐私推理的几个有前景方向。
AI.conclusion: DPrivBench为开发和评估差分隐私推理方法提供了坚实基础，并补充了现有的数学推理基准。研究揭示了当前大语言模型在差分隐私推理方面的局限性，并为未来改进指明了方向。

title: Discover and Prove: An Open-source Agentic Framework for Hard Mode Automated Theorem Proving in Lean 4
summary: Most ATP benchmarks embed the final answer within the formal statement -- a convention we call "Easy Mode" -- a design that simplifies the task relative to what human competitors face and may lead to optimistic estimates of model capability. We call the stricter, more realistic setting "Hard Mode": the system must independently discover the answer before constructing a formal proof. To enable Hard Mode research, we make two contributions. First, we release MiniF2F-Hard and FIMO-Hard, expert-reannotated Hard Mode variants of two widely-used ATP benchmarks. Second, we introduce Discover And Prove (DAP), an agentic framework that uses LLM natural-language reasoning with explicit self-reflection to discover answers, then rewrites Hard Mode statements into Easy Mode ones for existing ATP provers. DAP sets the state of the art: on CombiBench it raises solved problems from 7 (previous SOTA, Pass@16) to 10; on PutnamBench it is the first system to formally prove 36 theorems in Hard Mode -- while simultaneously revealing that state-of-the-art LLMs exceed 80% answer accuracy on the same problems where formal provers manage under 10%, exposing a substantial gap that Hard Mode benchmarks are uniquely suited to measure.

AI.tldr: 论文提出"困难模式"概念以更真实评估自动定理证明系统，创建MiniF2F-Hard和FIMO-Hard基准，并开发DAP框架结合LLM推理与形式证明器，在多个基准上取得最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 现有ATP基准通常在形式化陈述中嵌入最终答案（"简单模式"），这简化了任务并可能导致对模型能力的高估。需要更严格的"困难模式"来更真实地评估系统能力，模拟人类竞赛者需要独立发现答案的挑战。
AI.method: 1) 发布MiniF2F-Hard和FIMO-Hard基准，这是两个广泛使用的ATP基准的专家重新标注的困难模式变体；2) 提出Discover And Prove (DAP)框架，使用LLM自然语言推理和显式自我反思来发现答案，然后将困难模式陈述重写为简单模式供现有ATP证明器使用。
AI.result: DAP在CombiBench上将已解决问题从7个（先前SOTA，Pass@16）提升到10个；在PutnamBench上是第一个在困难模式下正式证明36个定理的系统；同时揭示最先进的LLM在相同问题上答案准确率超过80%，而形式证明器仅管理不到10%，暴露了显著的能力差距。
AI.conclusion: 困难模式基准能更真实地评估自动定理证明系统，DAP框架通过结合LLM推理和形式证明器在困难模式下取得最佳性能，同时揭示了LLM推理能力与形式证明能力之间的显著差距，为未来研究提供了重要方向。

title: World-Value-Action Model: Implicit Planning for Vision-Language-Action Systems
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as a promising paradigm for building embodied agents that ground perception and language into action. However, most existing approaches rely on direct action prediction, lacking the ability to reason over long-horizon trajectories and evaluate their consequences, which limits performance in complex decision-making tasks. In this work, we introduce World-Value-Action (WAV) model, a unified framework that enables implicit planning in VLA systems. Rather than performing explicit trajectory optimization, WAV model learn a structured latent representation of future trajectories conditioned on visual observations and language instructions. A learned world model predicts future states, while a trajectory value function evaluates their long-horizon utility. Action generation is then formulated as inference in this latent space, where the model progressively concentrates probability mass on high-value and dynamically feasible trajectories. We provide a theoretical perspective showing that planning directly in action space suffers from an exponential decay in the probability of feasible trajectories as the horizon increases. In contrast, latent-space inference reshapes the search distribution toward feasible regions, enabling efficient long-horizon decision making. Extensive simulations and real-world experiments demonstrate that the WAV model consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving significant improvements in task success rate, generalization ability, and robustness, especially in long-horizon and compositional scenarios.

AI.tldr: WAV模型通过隐式规划解决VLA模型中长时程决策问题，使用结构化潜在表示、世界模型预测和轨迹价值函数评估，在潜在空间进行推理而非直接动作预测。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型大多依赖直接动作预测，缺乏对长时程轨迹的推理能力和后果评估，限制了在复杂决策任务中的表现。需要一种能够进行隐式规划的统一框架。
AI.method: 提出World-Value-Action (WAV)模型：1) 学习基于视觉观察和语言指令的未来轨迹结构化潜在表示；2) 使用世界模型预测未来状态；3) 轨迹价值函数评估长时程效用；4) 在潜在空间进行推理，将概率质量集中在高价值和动态可行的轨迹上。
AI.result: WAV模型在仿真和真实世界实验中均优于现有方法，在任务成功率、泛化能力和鲁棒性方面取得显著提升，尤其在长时程和组合场景中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: WAV模型通过潜在空间推理实现了高效的隐式规划，解决了VLA模型中长时程决策的挑战，为构建更智能的具身智能体提供了有效框架。

title: Stein Variational Black-Box Combinatorial Optimization
summary: Combinatorial black-box optimization in high-dimensional settings demands a careful trade-off between exploiting promising regions of the search space and preserving sufficient exploration to identify multiple optima. Although Estimation-of-Distribution Algorithms (EDAs) provide a powerful model-based framework, they often concentrate on a single region of interest, which may result in premature convergence when facing complex or multimodal objective landscapes. In this work, we incorporate the Stein operator to introduce a repulsive mechanism among particles in the parameter space, thereby encouraging the population to disperse and jointly explore several modes of the fitness landscape. Empirical evaluations across diverse benchmark problems show that the proposed method achieves performance competitive with, and in several cases superior to, leading state-of-the-art approaches, particularly on large-scale instances. These findings highlight the potential of Stein variational gradient descent as a promising direction for addressing large, computationally expensive, discrete black-box optimization problems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合Stein算子的估计分布算法，通过粒子间的排斥机制促进种群分散，以更好地探索多模态优化问题的多个最优解。
AI.motivation: 传统估计分布算法在高维组合黑盒优化中容易过早收敛到单一区域，难以有效处理多模态目标函数。需要平衡开发与探索，同时发现多个最优解。
AI.method: 将Stein算子引入估计分布算法框架，在参数空间中建立粒子间的排斥机制，促使种群分散并联合探索适应度景观的多个模态。
AI.result: 在多样化基准问题上，该方法性能与最先进方法相当，在大规模实例上表现更优，展示了Stein变分梯度下降处理大规模离散黑盒优化问题的潜力。
AI.conclusion: Stein变分梯度下降为处理大规模、计算昂贵的离散黑盒优化问题提供了有前景的方向，通过排斥机制有效解决了传统EDAs过早收敛的问题。

title: LP$^{2}$DH: A Locality-Preserving Pixel-Difference Hashing Framework for Dynamic Texture Recognition
summary: Spatiotemporal Local Binary Pattern (STLBP) is a widely used dynamic texture descriptor, but it suffers from extremely high dimensionality. To tackle this, STLBP features are often extracted on three orthogonal planes, which sacrifice inter-plane correlation. In this work, we propose a Locality-Preserving Pixel-Difference Hashing (LP$^{2}$DH) framework that jointly encodes pixel differences in the full spatiotemporal neighbourhood. LP$^{2}$DH transforms Pixel-Difference Vectors (PDVs) into compact binary codes with maximal discriminative power. Furthermore, we incorporate a locality-preserving embedding to maintain the PDVs' local structure before and after hashing. Then, a curvilinear search strategy is utilized to jointly optimize the hashing matrix and binary codes via gradient descent on the Stiefel manifold. After hashing, dictionary learning is applied to encode the binary vectors into codewords, and the resulting histogram is utilized as the final feature representation. The proposed LP$^{2}$DH achieves state-of-the-art performance on three major dynamic texture recognition benchmarks: 99.80% against DT-GoogleNet's 98.93% on UCLA, 98.52% against HoGF$^{3D}$'s 97.63% on DynTex++, and 96.19% compared to STS's 95.00% on YUPENN. The source code is available at: https://github.com/drx770/LP2DH.

AI.tldr: 提出LP²DH框架，通过局部保持像素差异哈希将STLBP的高维特征转换为紧凑二进制码，在动态纹理识别基准上达到SOTA性能
AI.motivation: STLBP作为动态纹理描述符存在维度极高的问题，现有方法在三个正交平面上提取特征牺牲了平面间相关性，需要更有效的特征编码方法
AI.method: 提出局部保持像素差异哈希框架：1) 将像素差异向量转换为紧凑二进制码；2) 引入局部保持嵌入保持哈希前后局部结构；3) 使用曲率搜索策略在Stiefel流形上联合优化哈希矩阵和二进制码；4) 应用字典学习将二进制向量编码为码字，生成直方图特征表示
AI.result: 在三个主要动态纹理识别基准上达到SOTA：UCLA数据集99.80% vs DT-GoogleNet 98.93%；DynTex++数据集98.52% vs HoGF³D 97.63%；YUPENN数据集96.19% vs STS 95.00%
AI.conclusion: LP²DH框架有效解决了STLBP的高维问题，通过局部保持哈希和流形优化实现了紧凑且判别性强的特征表示，在动态纹理识别任务中表现出优越性能

title: ECG-Lens: Benchmarking ML & DL Models on PTB-XL Dataset
summary: Automated classification of electrocardiogram (ECG) signals is a useful tool for diagnosing and monitoring cardiovascular diseases. This study compares three traditional machine learning algorithms (Decision Tree Classifier, Random Forest Classifier, and Logistic Regression) and three deep learning models (Simple Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), and Complex CNN (ECGLens)) for the classification of ECG signals from the PTB-XL dataset, which contains 12-lead recordings from normal patients and patients with various cardiac conditions. The DL models were trained on raw ECG signals, allowing them to automatically extract discriminative features. Data augmentation using the Stationary Wavelet Transform (SWT) was applied to enhance model performance, increase the diversity of training samples, and preserve the essential characteristics of the ECG signals. The models were evaluated using multiple metrics, including accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, and ROC-AUC. The ECG-Lens model achieved the highest performance, with 80% classification accuracy and a 90% ROC-AUC. These findings demonstrate that deep learning architectures, particularly complex CNNs substantially outperform traditional ML methods on raw 12-lead ECG data, and provide a practical benchmark for selecting automated ECG classification models and identifying directions for condition-specific model development.

AI.tldr: 比较传统机器学习与深度学习模型在12导联ECG信号分类上的性能，发现复杂CNN模型（ECG-Lens）表现最佳，达到80%准确率和90% ROC-AUC
AI.motivation: 心电图信号自动分类是心血管疾病诊断和监测的重要工具，需要评估不同机器学习方法在12导联ECG数据上的性能，为临床实践提供模型选择基准
AI.method: 使用PTB-XL数据集（包含正常患者和多种心脏疾病的12导联记录），比较三种传统机器学习算法（决策树、随机森林、逻辑回归）和三种深度学习模型（简单CNN、LSTM、复杂CNN-ECGLens）。深度学习模型在原始ECG信号上训练以自动提取特征，应用平稳小波变换进行数据增强以提升性能并保持ECG信号基本特征
AI.result: ECG-Lens模型表现最佳，达到80%分类准确率和90% ROC-AUC。深度学习架构（特别是复杂CNN）在原始12导联ECG数据上显著优于传统机器学习方法
AI.conclusion: 深度学习模型（尤其是复杂CNN架构）在ECG信号分类任务中优于传统机器学习方法，为自动ECG分类模型选择提供了实用基准，并指明了针对特定疾病模型开发的方向

title: DigiForest: Digital Analytics and Robotics for Sustainable Forestry
summary: Covering one third of Earth's land surface, forests are vital to global biodiversity, climate regulation, and human well-being. In Europe, forests and woodlands reach approximately 40% of land area, and the forestry sector is central to achieving the EU's climate neutrality and biodiversity goals; these emphasize sustainable forest management, increased use of long-lived wood products, and resilient forest ecosystems. To meet these goals and properly address their inherent challenges, current practices require further innovation. This chapter introduces DigiForest, a novel, large-scale precision forestry approach leveraging digital technologies and autonomous robotics. DigiForest is structured around four main components: (1) autonomous, heterogeneous mobile robots (aerial, legged, and marsupial) for tree-level data collection; (2) automated extraction of tree traits to build forest inventories; (3) a Decision Support System (DSS) for forecasting forest growth and supporting decision-making; and (4) low-impact selective logging using purpose-built autonomous harvesters. These technologies have been extensively validated in real-world conditions in several locations, including forests in Finland, the UK, and Switzerland.

AI.tldr: DigiForest是一个大规模精准林业方法，利用数字技术和自主机器人进行森林管理，包括自主机器人数据采集、树木性状自动提取、决策支持系统和低影响选择性采伐。
AI.motivation: 森林覆盖地球陆地面积的三分之一，对全球生物多样性、气候调节和人类福祉至关重要。欧洲森林覆盖率约40%，林业部门对实现欧盟气候中和与生物多样性目标具有核心作用。当前实践需要进一步创新来应对可持续森林管理、长效木制品利用和森林生态系统韧性等挑战。
AI.method: DigiForest采用四组件架构：1) 自主异构移动机器人（空中、腿式和袋式）进行树木级数据采集；2) 自动提取树木性状以建立森林清单；3) 决策支持系统用于预测森林生长和支持决策制定；4) 使用专用自主采伐机进行低影响选择性采伐。
AI.result: 这些技术已在芬兰、英国和瑞士等多个地点的真实森林条件下进行了广泛验证。
AI.conclusion: DigiForest通过整合数字技术和自主机器人，为应对可持续森林管理的挑战提供了创新解决方案，支持欧盟气候中和与生物多样性目标的实现。

title: Placing Puzzle Pieces Where They Matter: A Question Augmentation Framework for Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement learning has become a powerful approach for enhancing large language model reasoning, but faces a fundamental dilemma: training on easy problems can cause overfitting and pass@k degradation, while training on hard problems often results in sparse rewards. Recent question augmentation methods address this by prepending partial solutions as hints. However, uniform hint provision may introduce redundant information while missing critical reasoning bottlenecks, and excessive hints can reduce reasoning diversity, causing pass@k degradation. We propose \textbf{PieceHint}, a hint injection framework that strategically identifies and provides critical reasoning steps during training. By scoring the importance of different reasoning steps, selectively allocating hints based on problem difficulty, and progressively withdrawing scaffolding, PieceHint enables models to transition from guided learning to independent reasoning. Experiments on six mathematical reasoning benchmarks show that our 1.5B model achieves comparable average performance to 32B baselines while preserving pass@k diversity across all $k$ values.

AI.tldr: PieceHint框架通过战略性地识别和提供关键推理步骤来解决强化学习中简单问题过拟合和困难问题奖励稀疏的困境，在数学推理基准上实现了小模型媲美大模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 强化学习在增强大语言模型推理能力时面临基本困境：在简单问题上训练会导致过拟合和pass@k性能下降，而在困难问题上训练则面临奖励稀疏问题。现有的问题增强方法通过添加部分解决方案作为提示，但统一的提示提供可能引入冗余信息，同时错过关键推理瓶颈，过多的提示还会降低推理多样性。
AI.method: 提出PieceHint框架，通过以下策略战略性地注入提示：1) 对不同推理步骤的重要性进行评分；2) 根据问题难度选择性分配提示；3) 逐步撤除脚手架支持。该方法使模型能够从有指导的学习过渡到独立推理。
AI.result: 在六个数学推理基准上的实验表明，1.5B参数的模型实现了与32B基线模型相当的平均性能，同时在所有k值上保持了pass@k多样性。
AI.conclusion: PieceHint通过战略性地识别和提供关键推理步骤，有效解决了强化学习训练中的过拟合和奖励稀疏问题，使小模型能够达到大模型的性能水平，同时保持推理多样性。

title: P3T: Prototypical Point-level Prompt Tuning with Enhanced Generalization for 3D Vision-Language Models
summary: With the rise of pre-trained models in the 3D point cloud domain for a wide range of real-world applications, adapting them to downstream tasks has become increasingly important. However, conventional full fine-tuning methods are computationally expensive and storage-intensive. Although prompt tuning has emerged as an efficient alternative, it often suffers from overfitting, thereby compromising generalization capability. To address this issue, we propose Prototypical Point-level Prompt Tuning (P$^3$T), a parameter-efficient prompt tuning method designed for pre-trained 3D vision-language models (VLMs). P$^3$T consists of two components: 1) \textit{Point Prompter}, which generates instance-aware point-level prompts for the input point cloud, and 2) \textit{Text Prompter}, which employs learnable prompts into the input text instead of hand-crafted ones. Since both prompters operate directly on input data, P$^3$T enables task-specific adaptation of 3D VLMs without sacrificing generalizability. Furthermore, to enhance embedding space alignment, which is key to fine-tuning 3D VLMs, we introduce a prototypical loss that reduces intra-category variance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method matches or outperforms full fine-tuning in classification and few-shot learning, and further exhibits robust generalization under data shift in the cross-dataset setting. The code is available at \textcolor{violet}{https://github.com/gyjung975/P3T}.

AI.tldr: P³T是一种用于预训练3D视觉语言模型的高效提示调优方法，通过点级提示器和文本提示器实现任务特定适应，同时保持泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 预训练3D点云模型在下游任务适应中，传统全微调方法计算和存储成本高，而现有提示调优方法存在过拟合问题，损害泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出原型点级提示调优(P³T)，包含两个组件：1)点提示器为输入点云生成实例感知的点级提示；2)文本提示器将可学习提示注入输入文本。引入原型损失减少类内方差，增强嵌入空间对齐。
AI.result: 在分类和少样本学习任务中，P³T匹配或超越全微调性能，在跨数据集设置下对数据偏移表现出鲁棒泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: P³T是一种参数高效的提示调优方法，能够在保持泛化能力的同时实现3D视觉语言模型的任务特定适应，解决了传统微调方法的计算成本和过拟合问题。

title: A multi-platform LiDAR dataset for standardized forest inventory measurement at long term ecological monitoring sites
summary: We present a curated multi-platform LiDAR reference dataset from an instrumented ICOS forest plot, explicitly designed to support calibration, benchmarking, and integration of 3D structural data with ecological observations and standard allometric models. The dataset integrates UAV-borne laser scanning (ULS) to measure canopy coverage, terrestrial laser scanning (TLS) for detailed stem mapping, and backpack mobile laser scanning (MLS) with real-time SLAM for efficient sub-canopy acquisition. We focus on the control plot with the most complete and internally consistent registration, where TLS point clouds (~333 million points) are complemented by ULS and MLS data capturing canopy and understory strata. Marker-free, SLAM-aware protocols were used to reduce field and processing time, while manual and automated methods were combined. Final products are available in LAZ and E57 formats with UTM coordinates, together with registration reports for reproducibility. The dataset provides a benchmark for testing registration methods, evaluating scanning efficiency, and linking point clouds with segmentation, quantitative structure models, and allometric biomass estimation. By situating the acquisitions at a long-term ICOS site, it is explicitly linked to 3D structure with decades of ecological and flux measurements. More broadly, it illustrates how TLS, MLS, and ULS can be combined for repeated inventories and digital twins of forest ecosystems.

AI.tldr: 该研究提供了一个经过精心策划的多平台LiDAR参考数据集，集成了无人机激光扫描(ULS)、地面激光扫描(TLS)和背包移动激光扫描(MLS)，用于森林生态系统的校准、基准测试和三维结构数据整合。
AI.motivation: 为支持三维结构数据与生态观测和标准异速生长模型的校准、基准测试和整合，需要高质量的参考数据集。现有数据往往缺乏多平台集成和与长期生态观测的明确联系。
AI.method: 在ICOS森林样地采集多平台LiDAR数据：ULS测量冠层覆盖，TLS进行详细树干测绘，MLS使用实时SLAM进行高效亚冠层采集。采用无标记、SLAM感知协议减少野外和处理时间，结合手动和自动方法。数据以LAZ和E57格式提供，包含UTM坐标和配准报告。
AI.result: 创建了一个包含约3.33亿个TLS点云的多平台LiDAR数据集，整合了ULS和MLS数据，完整覆盖冠层和下层植被。数据集提供了配准方法测试、扫描效率评估以及点云与分割、定量结构模型和异速生长生物量估算链接的基准。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为森林生态系统研究提供了重要的多平台LiDAR参考基准，展示了TLS、MLS和ULS如何结合用于重复调查和数字孪生。通过与长期ICOS站点关联，将三维结构与数十年的生态和通量测量明确联系起来。

title: Self-Supervised Angular Deblurring in Photoacoustic Reconstruction via Noisier2Inverse
summary: Photoacoustic tomography (PAT) is an emerging imaging modality that combines the complementary strengths of optical contrast and ultrasonic resolution. A central task is image reconstruction, where measured acoustic signals are used to recover the initial pressure distribution. For ideal point-like or line-like detectors, several efficient and fast reconstruction algorithms exist, including Fourier methods, filtered backprojection, and time reversal. However, when applied to data acquired with finite-size detectors, these methods yield systematically blurred images. Although sharper images can be obtained by compensating for finite-detector effects, supervised learning approaches typically require ground-truth images that may not be available in practice. We propose a self-supervised reconstruction method based on Noisier2Inverse that addresses finite-size detector effects without requiring ground-truth data. Our approach operates directly on noisy measurements and learns to recover high-quality PAT images in a ground-truth-free manner. Its key components are: (i) PAT-specific modeling that recasts the problem as angular deblurring; (ii) a Noisier2Inverse formulation in the polar domain that leverages the known angular point-spread function; and (iii) a novel, statistically grounded early-stopping rule. In experiments, the proposed method consistently outperforms alternative approaches that do not use supervised data and achieves performance close to supervised benchmarks, while remaining practical for real acquisitions with finite-size detectors.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于Noisier2Inverse的自监督光声层析成像重建方法，无需真实标签数据即可处理有限尺寸探测器效应，通过角度去模糊建模和极坐标域处理实现高质量图像重建。
AI.motivation: 传统光声层析成像重建算法针对理想点状或线状探测器设计，当应用于有限尺寸探测器数据时会产生系统性模糊。现有补偿方法需要真实标签图像，但在实际应用中往往难以获取。
AI.method: 提出自监督重建方法：1) PAT特定建模将问题重构为角度去模糊；2) 在极坐标域应用Noisier2Inverse框架，利用已知角度点扩散函数；3) 引入基于统计原理的新型早停准则。
AI.result: 该方法在实验中持续优于不使用监督数据的替代方法，性能接近监督基准，同时适用于实际有限尺寸探测器采集场景。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的自监督方法能够有效处理有限尺寸探测器效应，无需真实标签数据即可实现高质量PAT图像重建，具有实际应用价值。
