We introduce \emph{Milkyway}, a self-evolving agent system that keeps the base model fixed and instead updates a persistent \emph{future prediction harness} for factor tracking, evidence gathering and interpretation, and uncertainty handling. Across repeated predictions on the same unresolved question, \emph{Milkyway} extracts internal feedback and writes reusable guidance back into the harness, so later predictions on that question can improve before the outcome is known. After the question is resolved, the final outcome provides a \emph{retrospective check} before the updated harness is carried forward to subsequent questions. On FutureX and FutureWorld, Milkyway achieves the best overall score among the compared methods, improving FutureX from 44.07 to 60.90 and FutureWorld from 62.22 to 77.96.

AI.tldr: Milkyway是一个自演化的未来预测系统，通过内部反馈机制在问题解决前持续改进预测，保持基础模型固定而更新预测工具链。
AI.motivation: 现有未来预测方法主要依赖最终结果进行改进，但最终结果过于粗糙，无法指导早期因素追踪、证据收集与解释、不确定性处理等关键环节。当同一未解决问题随时间被重新审视时，早期和后期预测之间的时间对比可以暴露早期预测过程的遗漏。
AI.method: Milkyway系统保持基础模型固定，更新持久化的未来预测工具链（用于因素追踪、证据收集与解释、不确定性处理）。通过对同一未解决问题进行重复预测，提取内部反馈信号，并将可重用指导写回工具链，使后续预测在结果未知前就能改进。问题解决后，最终结果提供回顾性检查，然后更新的工具链被用于后续问题。
AI.result: 在FutureX和FutureWorld数据集上，Milkyway在所有比较方法中获得最佳总体得分：FutureX从44.07提升到60.90，FutureWorld从62.22提升到77.96。
AI.conclusion: 内部反馈机制使预测系统能够在最终结果未知的情况下持续改进，通过时间对比暴露早期预测过程的遗漏，为未来预测问题提供了一种有效的自演化方法。

title: Empirical Prediction of Pedestrian Comfort in Mobile Robot Pedestrian Encounters
summary: Mobile robots joining public spaces like sidewalks must care for pedestrian comfort. Many studies consider pedestrians' objective safety, for example, by developing collision avoidance algorithms, but not enough studies take the pedestrian's subjective safety or comfort into consideration. Quantifying comfort is a major challenge that hinders mobile robots from understanding and responding to human emotions. We empirically look into the relationship between the mobile robot-pedestrian interaction kinematics and subjective comfort. We perform one-on-one experimental trials, each involving a mobile robot and a volunteer. Statistical analysis of pedestrians' reported comfort versus the kinematic variables shows moderate but significant correlations for most variables. Based on these empirical findings, we design three comfort estimators/predictors derived from the minimum distance, the minimum projected time-to-collision, and a composite estimator. The composite estimator employs all studied kinematic variables and reaches the highest prediction rate and classifying performance among the predictors. The composite predictor has an odds ratio of 3.67. In simple terms, when it identifies a pedestrian as comfortable, it is almost 4 times more likely that the pedestrian is comfortable rather than uncomfortable. The study provides a comfort quantifier for incorporating pedestrian feelings into path planners for more socially compliant robots.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过实验分析移动机器人与行人交互的运动学变量与主观舒适度之间的关系，开发了基于最小距离、最小投影碰撞时间和综合变量的舒适度预测器，为机器人路径规划提供舒适度量化方法。
AI.motivation: 当前移动机器人在公共空间（如人行道）运行时，大多关注行人的客观安全性（如避碰算法），但缺乏对行人主观安全感和舒适度的考虑。量化舒适度是机器人理解并响应人类情感的主要挑战，这阻碍了机器人实现更符合社会规范的行为。
AI.method: 采用一对一实验方法，让移动机器人与志愿者进行交互试验。通过统计分析行人报告的舒适度与运动学变量之间的关系，基于经验发现设计了三种舒适度估计器/预测器：基于最小距离、基于最小投影碰撞时间、以及综合所有研究运动学变量的复合估计器。
AI.result: 统计分析显示，大多数运动学变量与主观舒适度存在中等但显著的相关性。复合预测器在所有预测器中达到最高的预测率和分类性能，其优势比为3.67，意味着当它识别行人为舒适时，行人实际舒适而非不舒适的可能性几乎是4倍。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了一种舒适度量化方法，可将行人感受纳入机器人路径规划中，从而实现更具社会合规性的机器人行为。复合预测器在评估行人舒适度方面表现出色，为未来社交机器人设计提供了实用工具。

title: The Metacognitive Monitoring Battery: A Cross-Domain Benchmark for LLM Self-Monitoring
comment: 11 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables. Submitted to NeurIPS 2026 Evaluations and Datasets Track. Code, data, and Croissant metadata: https://github.com/synthiumjp/metacognitive-monitoring-battery
summary: We introduce a cross-domain behavioural assay of monitoring-control coupling in LLMs, grounded in the Nelson and Narens (1990) metacognitive framework and applying human psychometric methodology to LLM evaluation. The battery comprises 524 items across six cognitive domains (learning, metacognitive calibration, social cognition, attention, executive function, prospective regulation), each grounded in an established experimental paradigm. Tasks T1-T5 were pre-registered on OSF prior to data collection; T6 was added as an exploratory extension. After every forced-choice response, dual probes adapted from Koriat and Goldsmith (1996) ask the model to KEEP or WITHDRAW its answer and to BET or decline. The critical metric is the withdraw delta: the difference in withdrawal rate between incorrect and correct items. Applied to 20 frontier LLMs (10,480 evaluations), the battery discriminates three profiles consistent with the Nelson-Narens architecture: blanket confidence, blanket withdrawal, and selective sensitivity. Accuracy rank and metacognitive sensitivity rank are largely inverted. Retrospective monitoring and prospective regulation appear dissociable (r = .17, 95% CI wide given n=20; exemplar-based evidence is the primary support). Scaling on metacognitive calibration is architecture-dependent: monotonically decreasing (Qwen), monotonically increasing (GPT-5.4), or flat (Gemma). Behavioural findings converge structurally with an independent Type-2 SDT approach, providing preliminary cross-method construct validity. All items, data, and code: https://github.com/synthiumjp/metacognitive-monitoring-battery.

AI.tldr: 研究者开发了一个跨领域的行为测试电池，基于Nelson-Narens元认知框架，评估LLMs的监控-控制耦合能力，包含524个项目，应用于20个前沿LLM。
AI.motivation: 将人类心理测量学方法应用于LLM评估，基于Nelson和Narens（1990）的元认知框架，系统评估LLMs的监控-控制耦合能力，填补现有研究的空白。
AI.method: 开发包含524个项目的测试电池，涵盖六个认知领域（学习、元认知校准、社会认知、注意力、执行功能、前瞻性调节）。每个项目基于已建立的实验范式，采用Koriat和Goldsmith（1996）的双重探针方法，在每次强制选择回答后询问模型是否保留或撤回答案以及是否下注。关键指标是撤回差异（错误与正确项目的撤回率差异）。
AI.result: 应用于20个前沿LLM（10,480次评估），测试电池识别出三种与Nelson-Narens架构一致的元认知模式：全面自信、全面撤回和选择性敏感。准确率排名与元认知敏感性排名基本呈倒置关系。回顾性监控与前瞻性调节似乎可分离（r=0.17）。元认知校准的扩展模式具有架构依赖性：单调递减（Qwen）、单调递增（GPT-5.4）或平坦（Gemma）。行为发现与独立的Type-2信号检测理论方法在结构上收敛。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功开发了一个系统评估LLM元认知监控-控制耦合的跨领域行为测试电池，揭示了不同LLM的元认知模式差异，为理解LLM的元认知能力提供了实证基础，并展示了与人类元认知框架的结构相似性。

title: Vision-and-Language Navigation for UAVs: Progress, Challenges, and a Research Roadmap
summary: Vision-and-Language Navigation for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAV-VLN) represents a pivotal challenge in embodied artificial intelligence, focused on enabling UAVs to interpret high-level human commands and execute long-horizon tasks in complex 3D environments. This paper provides a comprehensive and structured survey of the field, from its formal task definition to the current state of the art. We establish a methodological taxonomy that charts the technological evolution from early modular and deep learning approaches to contemporary agentic systems driven by large foundation models, including Vision-Language Models (VLMs), Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, and the emerging integration of generative world models with VLA architectures for physically-grounded reasoning. The survey systematically reviews the ecosystem of essential resources simulators, datasets, and evaluation metrics that facilitates standardized research. Furthermore, we conduct a critical analysis of the primary challenges impeding real-world deployment: the simulation-to-reality gap, robust perception in dynamic outdoor settings, reasoning with linguistic ambiguity, and the efficient deployment of large models on resource-constrained hardware. By synthesizing current benchmarks and limitations, this survey concludes by proposing a forward-looking research roadmap to guide future inquiry into key frontiers such as multi-agent swarm coordination and air-ground collaborative robotics.

AI.tldr: 关于无人机视觉语言导航领域的全面综述，涵盖任务定义、技术演进、资源生态、关键挑战及未来研究方向
AI.motivation: 无人机视觉语言导航是具身人工智能的关键挑战，需要系统梳理该领域从任务定义到最新技术进展的完整脉络，为研究者提供结构化参考框架
AI.method: 建立方法论分类体系，追踪从早期模块化方法到深度学习，再到基于大基础模型（VLMs、VLA模型）的智能体系统技术演进；系统评述仿真器、数据集、评估指标等关键资源；批判性分析现实部署的主要挑战
AI.result: 提供了该领域的结构化综述，建立了技术分类体系，识别了仿真-现实差距、动态环境感知、语言歧义推理、资源受限部署等关键挑战，并分析了当前基准和局限性
AI.conclusion: 提出了前瞻性研究路线图，指导未来探索多智能体集群协调、空地协同机器人等前沿方向，推动无人机视觉语言导航向现实世界部署发展

title: Graph self-supervised learning based on frequency corruption
comment: 11 pages, 4 tables, 3 figures. Accepted at The ACM Web Conference 2026 (WWW 2026)
summary: Graph self-supervised learning can reduce the need for labeled graph data and has been widely used in recommendation, social networks, and other web applications. However, existing methods often underuse high-frequency signals and may overfit to specific local patterns, which limits representation quality and generalization. We propose Frequency-Corrupt Based Graph Self-Supervised Learning (FC-GSSL), a method that builds corrupted graphs biased toward high-frequency information by corrupting nodes and edges according to their low-frequency contributions. These corrupted graphs are used as inputs to an autoencoder, while low-frequency and general features are reconstructed as supervision targets, forcing the model to fuse information from multiple frequency bands. We further design multiple sampling strategies and generate diverse corrupted graphs from the intersections and unions of the sampling results. By aligning node representations from these views, the model can discover useful frequency combinations, reduce reliance on specific high-frequency components, and improve robustness. Experiments on 14 datasets across node classification, graph prediction, and transfer learning show that FC-GSSL consistently improves performance and generalization.

AI.tldr: FC-GSSL是一种基于频率破坏的图自监督学习方法，通过偏向高频信息的破坏图来强制模型融合多频段信息，提升表示质量和泛化能力
AI.motivation: 现有图自监督学习方法往往未能充分利用高频信号，且容易过拟合到特定的局部模式，这限制了表示质量和泛化能力
AI.method: 通过根据节点的低频贡献破坏节点和边，构建偏向高频信息的破坏图；使用自编码器以破坏图为输入，以低频和一般特征为重建目标；设计多种采样策略，从采样结果的交集和并集中生成多样化的破坏图；通过对齐不同视图的节点表示来发现有用的频率组合
AI.result: 在14个数据集上的节点分类、图预测和迁移学习实验中，FC-GSSL一致地提升了性能和泛化能力
AI.conclusion: FC-GSSL通过频率破坏机制有效融合多频段信息，减少对特定高频成分的依赖，提高了图自监督学习的表示质量和鲁棒性

title: RelativeFlow: Taming Medical Image Denoising Learning with Noisy Reference
summary: Medical image denoising (MID) lacks absolutely clean images for supervision, leading to a noisy reference problem that fundamentally limits denoising performance. Existing simulated-supervised discriminative learning (SimSDL) and simulated-supervised generative learning (SimSGL) treat noisy references as clean targets, causing suboptimal convergence or reference-biased learning, while self-supervised learning (SSL) imposes restrictive noise assumptions that are seldom satisfied in realistic MID scenarios. We propose \textbf{RelativeFlow}, a flow matching framework that learns from heterogeneous noisy references and drives inputs from arbitrary quality levels toward a unified high-quality target. RelativeFlow reformulates flow matching by decomposing the absolute noise-to-clean mapping into relative noisier-to-noisy mappings, and realizes this formulation through two key components: 1) consistent transport (CoT), a displacement map that constrains relative flows to be components of and progressively compose a unified absolute flow, and 2) simulation-based velocity field (SVF), which constructs a learnable velocity field using modality-specific degradation operators to support different medical imaging modalities. Extensive experiments on Computed Tomography (CT) and Magnetic Resonance (MR) denoising demonstrate that RelativeFlow significantly outperforms existing methods, taming MID with noisy references.

AI.tldr: RelativeFlow提出了一种流匹配框架，通过相对噪声到噪声映射解决医学图像去噪中缺乏绝对干净图像监督的问题，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 医学图像去噪缺乏绝对干净图像作为监督，导致噪声参考问题限制了去噪性能。现有方法如模拟监督判别学习、模拟监督生成学习和自监督学习都存在局限性：要么将噪声参考视为干净目标导致次优收敛或参考偏置学习，要么施加不现实的噪声假设。
AI.method: 提出RelativeFlow流匹配框架，将绝对噪声到干净映射分解为相对噪声到噪声映射。包含两个关键组件：1) 一致传输(CoT)，约束相对流作为统一绝对流的组成部分并逐步组合；2) 模拟基速度场(SVF)，使用模态特定退化算子构建可学习速度场以支持不同医学成像模态。
AI.result: 在计算机断层扫描(CT)和磁共振(MR)去噪的广泛实验中，RelativeFlow显著优于现有方法，有效解决了医学图像去噪中的噪声参考问题。
AI.conclusion: RelativeFlow通过流匹配框架学习异构噪声参考，将任意质量水平的输入驱动到统一高质量目标，为医学图像去噪提供了有效的解决方案，克服了现有方法的局限性。

title: A Mechanistic Analysis of Sim-and-Real Co-Training in Generative Robot Policies
summary: Co-training, which combines limited in-domain real-world data with abundant surrogate data such as simulation or cross-embodiment robot data, is widely used for training generative robot policies. Despite its empirical success, the mechanisms that determine when and why co-training is effective remain poorly understood. We investigate the mechanism of sim-and-real co-training through theoretical analysis and empirical study, and identify two intrinsic effects governing performance. The first, \textbf{``structured representation alignment"}, reflects a balance between cross-domain representation alignment and domain discernibility, and plays a primary role in downstream performance. The second, the \textbf{``importance reweighting effect"}, arises from domain-dependent modulation of action weighting and operates at a secondary level. We validate these effects with controlled experiments on a toy model and extensive sim-and-sim and sim-and-real robot manipulation experiments. Our analysis offers a unified interpretation of recent co-training techniques and motivates a simple method that consistently improves upon prior approaches. More broadly, our aim is to examine the inner workings of co-training and to facilitate research in this direction.

AI.tldr: 本文通过理论分析和实证研究揭示了sim-and-real协同训练的内在机制，识别出结构化表示对齐和重要性重加权两个关键效应，并提出了改进方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管协同训练（结合有限真实数据和丰富替代数据）在机器人策略训练中广泛应用且经验上成功，但其有效性的内在机制（何时、为何有效）仍缺乏深入理解，需要系统研究。
AI.method: 通过理论分析和实证研究相结合的方法：1）理论分析协同训练机制；2）在玩具模型上进行受控实验验证；3）在sim-and-sim和sim-and-real机器人操作任务上进行广泛实验验证；4）基于分析提出改进方法。
AI.result: 识别出协同训练的两个内在效应：1）结构化表示对齐效应（主要作用）- 跨域表示对齐与域可区分性之间的平衡；2）重要性重加权效应（次要作用）- 域依赖的动作权重调制。验证了这些效应，并提出了改进方法，在先前方法基础上取得一致提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文为协同训练机制提供了统一解释，揭示了结构化表示对齐和重要性重加权的内在作用，提出的简单方法优于先前方法，旨在深入理解协同训练内在机制并促进该方向研究。

title: (1D) Ordered Tokens Enable Efficient Test-Time Search
summary:
Tokenization is a key component of autoregressive (AR) generative models, converting raw data into more manageable units for modeling. Commonly, tokens describe local information, such as regions of pixels in images or word pieces in text, and AR generation predicts these tokens in a fixed order. A worthwhile question is whether token structures affect the ability to steer the generation through test-time search, where multiple candidate generations are explored and evaluated by a verifier. Using image generation as our testbed, we hypothesize that recent 1D ordered tokenizers with coarse-to-fine structure can be more amenable to search than classical 2D grid structures. This is rooted in the fact that the intermediate states in coarse-to-fine sequences carry semantic meaning that verifiers can reliably evaluate, enabling effective steering during generation.
  Through controlled experiments, we find that AR models trained on coarse-to-fine ordered tokens exhibit improved test-time scaling behavior compared to grid-based counterparts. Moreover, we demonstrate that, thanks to the ordered structure, pure test-time search over token sequences (i.e., without training an AR model) can perform training-free text-to-image generation when guided by an image-text verifier. Beyond this, we systematically study how classical search algorithms (best-of-N, beam search, lookahead search) interact with different token structures, as well as the role of different verifiers and AR priors. Our results highlight the impact of token structure on inference-time scalability and provide practical guidance for test-time scaling in AR models.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了自回归生成模型中分词结构对测试时搜索能力的影响，发现粗到细的1D有序分词器比传统2D网格结构更适合通过验证器引导生成。
AI.motivation: 研究分词结构如何影响自回归生成模型通过测试时搜索进行引导的能力。传统分词通常描述局部信息（如图像像素区域或文本词片段），并以固定顺序预测，但不同分词结构可能对验证器引导的搜索效率产生不同影响。
AI.method: 使用图像生成为测试平台，比较粗到细1D有序分词器与经典2D网格结构。通过控制实验研究不同分词结构对测试时扩展行为的影响。系统研究经典搜索算法（best-of-N、束搜索、前瞻搜索）与不同分词结构的交互作用，以及不同验证器和自回归先验的作用。
AI.result: 在粗到细有序分词器上训练的自回归模型比基于网格的模型表现出更好的测试时扩展行为。利用有序结构，仅通过测试时搜索（无需训练自回归模型）就能在图像-文本验证器引导下实现免训练的文生图生成。粗到细序列的中间状态具有语义意义，验证器可可靠评估，从而实现有效生成引导。
AI.conclusion: 分词结构对推理时扩展性有重要影响。粗到细1D有序分词器比传统2D网格结构更适合测试时搜索引导，为自回归模型的测试时扩展提供了实用指导。

title: ESCAPE: Episodic Spatial Memory and Adaptive Execution Policy for Long-Horizon Mobile Manipulation
summary: Coordinating navigation and manipulation with robust performance is essential for embodied AI in complex indoor environments. However, as tasks extend over long horizons, existing methods often struggle due to catastrophic forgetting, spatial inconsistency, and rigid execution. To address these issues, we propose ESCAPE (Episodic Spatial Memory Coupled with an Adaptive Policy for Execution), operating through a tightly coupled perception-grounding-execution workflow. For robust perception, ESCAPE features a Spatio-Temporal Fusion Mapping module to autoregressively construct a depth-free, persistent 3D spatial memory, alongside a Memory-Driven Target Grounding module for precise interaction mask generation. To achieve flexible action, our Adaptive Execution Policy dynamically orchestrates proactive global navigation and reactive local manipulation to seize opportunistic targets. ESCAPE achieves state-of-the-art performance on the ALFRED benchmark, reaching 65.09% and 60.79% success rates in test seen and unseen environments with step-by-step instructions. By reducing redundant exploration, our ESCAPE attains substantial improvements in path-length-weighted metrics and maintains robust performance (61.24% / 56.04%) even without detailed guidance for long-horizon tasks.

AI.tldr: ESCAPE是一个用于室内长时程任务的具身AI系统，通过时空融合映射构建持久3D空间记忆，结合自适应执行策略协调导航与操作，在ALFRED基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在长时程任务中面临灾难性遗忘、空间不一致性和执行僵化等问题，需要一种能够协调导航与操作并保持鲁棒性能的解决方案。
AI.method: 1) 时空融合映射模块：自回归构建无需深度的持久3D空间记忆；2) 记忆驱动目标定位模块：生成精确交互掩码；3) 自适应执行策略：动态协调主动全局导航和反应式局部操作以捕捉机会目标。
AI.result: 在ALFRED基准测试中，ESCAPE在测试可见和未见环境中分别达到65.09%和60.79%的成功率。即使没有详细指导，长时程任务仍保持61.24%/56.04%的鲁棒性能，并显著减少了冗余探索。
AI.conclusion: ESCAPE通过紧密耦合的感知-定位-执行工作流程，有效解决了长时程任务中的关键挑战，实现了协调导航与操作的鲁棒性能，为复杂室内环境中的具身AI提供了有效解决方案。

title: Weak-to-Strong Knowledge Distillation Accelerates Visual Learning
summary:
Large-scale visual learning is increasingly limited by training cost. Existing knowledge distillation methods transfer from a stronger teacher to a weaker student for compression or final-accuracy improvement. We instead investigate distillation to accelerate the training of strong students. We propose a generalizable plug-and-play recipe that freezes a weaker teacher, applies distillation only in early training, and turns it off once the student reaches and surpasses teacher-level performance. For ImageNet and CIFAR classification, this strategy reaches target thresholds much earlier, with up to 4.8 times speedup measured by epochs.
  We confirm that the method generalizes to other tasks and report 1.7 times epoch speedup for object detection on the COCO dataset, and 2.5 times earlier target-FID crossing for diffusion generation on the CIFAR-10 dataset, measured in steps. These findings validate our method as a universal speedup mechanism for visual learning.

AI.tldr: 提出一种通用知识蒸馏方法，通过冻结较弱教师模型、仅在早期训练阶段应用蒸馏，当学生模型超越教师性能后关闭蒸馏，显著加速强学生模型的训练过程。
AI.motivation: 大规模视觉学习的训练成本日益成为限制因素。现有知识蒸馏方法主要用于模型压缩或最终精度提升，而本文研究如何利用蒸馏来加速强学生模型的训练过程。
AI.method: 提出通用即插即用策略：1) 冻结一个较弱的教师模型；2) 仅在训练早期阶段应用知识蒸馏；3) 当学生模型达到并超越教师性能水平后关闭蒸馏。该方法适用于多种视觉任务。
AI.result: 在ImageNet和CIFAR分类任务中，该方法达到目标阈值的时间显著提前，最高实现4.8倍的epoch加速。在COCO目标检测任务中实现1.7倍epoch加速，在CIFAR-10扩散生成任务中实现2.5倍的步骤加速（以目标FID交叉点衡量）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法被验证为视觉学习的通用加速机制，能够显著减少训练成本，同时保持或超越教师模型的性能水平。

title: Bidirectional Cross-Modal Prompting for Event-Frame Asymmetric Stereo
summary: Conventional frame-based cameras capture rich contextual information but suffer from limited temporal resolution and motion blur in dynamic scenes. Event cameras offer an alternative visual representation with higher dynamic range free from such limitations. The complementary characteristics of the two modalities make event-frame asymmetric stereo promising for reliable 3D perception under fast motion and challenging illumination. However, the modality gap often leads to marginalization of domain-specific cues essential for cross-modal stereo matching. In this paper, we introduce Bi-CMPStereo, a novel bidirectional cross-modal prompting framework that fully exploits semantic and structural features from both domains for robust matching. Our approach learns finely aligned stereo representations within a target canonical space and integrates complementary representations by projecting each modality into both event and frame domains. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in accuracy and generalization.

AI.tldr: Bi-CMPStereo：一种双向跨模态提示框架，通过利用事件相机和帧相机的互补特征，解决跨模态立体匹配中的模态差距问题，显著提升动态场景下的3D感知性能。
AI.motivation: 传统帧相机在动态场景中存在时间分辨率有限和运动模糊的问题，而事件相机具有高动态范围和不受这些限制的优势。两种模态的互补特性使得事件-帧非对称立体感知在快速运动和挑战性光照条件下具有潜力，但模态差距导致跨模态立体匹配中特定领域的线索被边缘化。
AI.method: 提出Bi-CMPStereo框架，通过双向跨模态提示充分利用两个领域的语义和结构特征。该方法在目标规范空间内学习精细对齐的立体表示，并通过将每个模态投影到事件和帧两个域中来整合互补表示。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，该方法在准确性和泛化能力方面显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: Bi-CMPStereo通过有效利用事件和帧模态的互补特征，解决了跨模态立体匹配中的模态差距问题，为动态场景下的可靠3D感知提供了有效解决方案。

title: NK-GAD: Neighbor Knowledge-Enhanced Unsupervised Graph Anomaly Detection
summary: Graph anomaly detection aims to identify irregular patterns in graph-structured data. Most unsupervised GNN-based methods rely on the homophily assumption that connected nodes share similar attributes. However, real-world graphs often exhibit attribute-level heterophily, where connected nodes have dissimilar attributes. Our analysis of attribute-level heterophily graphs reveals two phenomena indicating that current approaches are not practical for unsupervised graph anomaly detection: 1) attribute similarities between connected nodes show nearly identical distributions across different connected node pair types, and 2) anomalies cause consistent variation trends between the graph with and without anomalous edges in the low- and high-frequency components of the spectral energy distributions, while the mid-part exhibits more erratic variations. Based on these observations, we propose NK-GAD, a neighbor knowledge-enhanced unsupervised graph anomaly detection framework. NK-GAD integrates a joint encoder capturing both similar and dissimilar neighbor features, a neighbor reconstruction module modeling normal distributions, a center aggregation module refining node features, and dual decoders for reconstructing attributes and structures. Experiments on seven datasets show NK-GAD achieves an average 3.29\% AUC improvement.

AI.tldr: NK-GAD：基于邻居知识增强的无监督图异常检测框架，针对属性级异质性图设计，通过联合编码器、邻居重建模块、中心聚合模块和双解码器提升检测性能
AI.motivation: 现有基于GNN的无监督图异常检测方法大多依赖同质性假设，但现实图常呈现属性级异质性（相连节点属性不相似）。研究发现：1）不同连接节点对类型的属性相似度分布几乎相同；2）异常在频谱能量分布的低频和高频部分引起一致变化趋势，而中频部分变化更随机。这些现象表明当前方法不适用于无监督图异常检测。
AI.method: 提出NK-GAD框架，包含：1）联合编码器捕获相似和不相似邻居特征；2）邻居重建模块建模正常分布；3）中心聚合模块精炼节点特征；4）双解码器分别重建属性和结构。该框架专门针对属性级异质性图设计。
AI.result: 在七个数据集上的实验表明，NK-GAD实现了平均3.29%的AUC提升，验证了其在无监督图异常检测中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: NK-GAD通过整合邻居知识增强机制，有效解决了属性级异质性图中的异常检测问题，为无监督图异常检测提供了更实用的解决方案。

title: LeapAlign: Post-Training Flow Matching Models at Any Generation Step by Building Two-Step Trajectories
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2026. Project page: https://rockeycoss.github.io/leapalign/
summary: This paper focuses on the alignment of flow matching models with human preferences. A promising way is fine-tuning by directly backpropagating reward gradients through the differentiable generation process of flow matching. However, backpropagating through long trajectories results in prohibitive memory costs and gradient explosion. Therefore, direct-gradient methods struggle to update early generation steps, which are crucial for determining the global structure of the final image. To address this issue, we introduce LeapAlign, a fine-tuning method that reduces computational cost and enables direct gradient propagation from reward to early generation steps. Specifically, we shorten the long trajectory into only two steps by designing two consecutive leaps, each skipping multiple ODE sampling steps and predicting future latents in a single step. By randomizing the start and end timesteps of the leaps, LeapAlign leads to efficient and stable model updates at any generation step. To better use such shortened trajectories, we assign higher training weights to those that are more consistent with the long generation path. To further enhance gradient stability, we reduce the weights of gradient terms with large magnitude, instead of completely removing them as done in previous works. When fine-tuning the Flux model, LeapAlign consistently outperforms state-of-the-art GRPO-based and direct-gradient methods across various metrics, achieving superior image quality and image-text alignment.

AI.tldr: LeapAlign是一种用于流匹配模型与人类偏好对齐的微调方法，通过设计两段跳跃缩短长轨迹，降低计算成本并实现从奖励到早期生成步骤的直接梯度传播。
AI.motivation: 流匹配模型通过直接反向传播奖励梯度进行微调的方法存在内存成本过高和梯度爆炸问题，导致难以更新关键的早期生成步骤，这些步骤对最终图像的全局结构至关重要。
AI.method: LeapAlign通过设计两个连续跳跃来缩短长轨迹，每个跳跃跳过多个ODE采样步骤并在单步中预测未来潜在表示。通过随机化跳跃的起始和结束时间步，实现高效稳定的模型更新。为更好利用缩短轨迹，为与长生成路径更一致的轨迹分配更高训练权重。为增强梯度稳定性，减少大梯度项权重而非完全移除。
AI.result: 在微调Flux模型时，LeapAlign在各种指标上一致优于最先进的基于GRPO和直接梯度的方法，实现了更优的图像质量和图像-文本对齐。
AI.conclusion: LeapAlign通过缩短轨迹和优化梯度传播机制，有效解决了流匹配模型微调中的计算成本和梯度稳定性问题，显著提升了模型与人类偏好的对齐效果。

title: Evolvable Embodied Agent for Robotic Manipulation via Long Short-Term Reflection and Optimization
comment: This work has been accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 2026 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2026)
summary: Achieving general-purpose robotics requires empowering robots to adapt and evolve based on their environment and feedback. Traditional methods face limitations such as extensive training requirements, difficulties in cross-task generalization, and lack of interpretability. Prompt learning offers new opportunities for self-evolving robots without extensive training, but simply reflecting on past experiences.However, extracting meaningful insights from task successes and failures remains a challenge. To this end, we propose the evolvable embodied agent (EEAgent) framework, which leverages large vision-language models (VLMs) for better environmental interpretation and policy planning. To enhance reflection on past experiences, we propose a long short-term reflective optimization (LSTRO) mechanism that dynamically refines prompts based on both past experiences and newly learned lessons, facilitating continuous self-evolution, thereby enhancing overall task success rates. Evaluations on six VIMA-Bench tasks reveal that our approach sets a new state-of-the-art, notably outperforming baselines in complex scenarios.

AI.tldr: EEAgent框架利用大视觉语言模型进行环境理解和策略规划，通过长短时反射优化机制动态调整提示，实现机器人的持续自我进化，在复杂任务中达到最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 通用机器人需要能够基于环境和反馈进行自适应和进化。传统方法存在训练需求大、跨任务泛化困难、缺乏可解释性等局限。提示学习为无需大量训练即可自我进化的机器人提供了新机会，但从任务成功和失败中提取有意义的洞察仍然具有挑战性。
AI.method: 提出可进化具身智能体（EEAgent）框架，利用大视觉语言模型进行环境理解和策略规划。为增强对过往经验的反思，提出长短时反射优化（LSTRO）机制，该机制基于过往经验和新学到的教训动态优化提示，促进持续自我进化。
AI.result: 在六个VIMA-Bench任务上的评估表明，该方法达到了新的最先进水平，在复杂场景中显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: EEAgent框架通过结合大视觉语言模型和长短时反射优化机制，实现了机器人的持续自我进化，显著提高了任务成功率，为通用机器人发展提供了有前景的方向。

title: TokenLight: Precise Lighting Control in Images using Attribute Tokens
summary: This paper presents a method for image relighting that enables precise and continuous control over multiple illumination attributes in a photograph. We formulate relighting as a conditional image generation task and introduce attribute tokens to encode distinct lighting factors such as intensity, color, ambient illumination, diffuse level, and 3D light positions. The model is trained on a large-scale synthetic dataset with ground-truth lighting annotations, supplemented by a small set of real captures to enhance realism and generalization. We validate our approach across a variety of relighting tasks, including controlling in-scene lighting fixtures and editing environment illumination using virtual light sources, on synthetic and real images. Our method achieves state-of-the-art quantitative and qualitative performance compared to prior work. Remarkably, without explicit inverse rendering supervision, the model exhibits an inherent understanding of how light interacts with scene geometry, occlusion, and materials, yielding convincing lighting effects even in traditionally challenging scenarios such as placing lights within objects or relighting transparent materials plausibly. Project page: vrroom.github.io/tokenlight/

AI.tldr: 提出TokenLight方法，通过属性令牌编码多种光照属性，实现图像重照明的精确连续控制，在合成和真实图像上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图像重照明方法通常难以实现对多种光照属性（如强度、颜色、环境光、漫反射水平、3D光源位置）的精确连续控制，且缺乏对光照与场景几何、遮挡和材质交互的深入理解。
AI.method: 将重照明建模为条件图像生成任务，引入属性令牌编码不同光照因素；使用带真实光照标注的大规模合成数据集训练，辅以少量真实捕获数据增强真实感和泛化能力。
AI.result: 在合成和真实图像的各种重照明任务中达到最先进的定量和定性性能；模型在没有显式逆渲染监督的情况下，展现出对光照与场景几何、遮挡、材质交互的内在理解，即使在传统挑战性场景（如物体内部放置光源、透明材质重照明）中也能产生逼真效果。
AI.conclusion: TokenLight方法通过属性令牌编码实现了对多种光照属性的精确连续控制，在无需显式逆渲染监督的情况下，模型能够理解光照与场景的复杂交互，为图像重照明提供了强大而灵活的解决方案。

title: Stability Principle Underlying Passive Dynamic Walking of Rimless Wheel
comment: This is a corrected version of the 2012 IEEE CCA paper. A typographical error in Eq. (16) has been corrected
summary: Rimless wheels are known as the simplest model for passive dynamic walking. It is known that the passive gait generated only by gravity effect always becomes asymptotically stable and 1-period because a rimless wheel automatically achieves the two necessary conditions for guaranteeing the asymptotic stability; one is the constraint on impact posture and the other is the constraint on restored mechanical energy. The asymptotic stability is then easily shown by the recurrence formula of kinetic energy. There is room, however, for further research into the inherent stability principle. In this paper, we reconsider the stability of the stance phase based on the linearization of the equation of motion, and investigate the relation between the stability and energy conservation law. Through the mathematical analysis, we provide a greater understanding of the inherent stability principle.

AI.tldr: 重新分析无轮缘轮被动行走的稳定性，基于运动方程线性化研究稳定性与能量守恒定律的关系，深化对固有稳定性原理的理解
AI.motivation: 无轮缘轮作为最简单的被动动态行走模型，其仅由重力效应产生的被动步态总是渐近稳定且1周期的，这源于其自动满足渐近稳定的两个必要条件：冲击姿态约束和恢复机械能约束。然而，对固有稳定性原理仍有进一步研究的空间。
AI.method: 基于运动方程的线性化重新考虑支撑相的稳定性，研究稳定性与能量守恒定律之间的关系，通过数学分析深入探讨固有稳定性原理
AI.result: 通过数学分析提供了对固有稳定性原理更深入的理解，阐明了无轮缘轮被动行走稳定性的内在机制
AI.conclusion: 该研究深化了对无轮缘轮被动动态行走固有稳定性原理的理解，通过运动方程线性化和能量守恒定律的分析，为这一简单模型的稳定性机制提供了更全面的理论解释

title: CodeMMR: Bridging Natural Language, Code, and Image for Unified Retrieval
summary: Code search, framed as information retrieval (IR), underpins modern software engineering and increasingly powers retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), improving code discovery, reuse, and the reliability of LLM-based coding. Yet existing code IR models remain largely text-centric and often overlook the visual and structural aspects inherent in programming artifacts such as web interfaces, data visualizations, SVGs, schematic diagrams, and UML. To bridge this gap, we introduce MMCoIR, the first comprehensive benchmark for evaluating multimodal code IR across five visual domains, eight programming languages, eleven libraries, and show the challenge of the task through extensive evaluation. Therefore, we then propose CodeMMR, a unified retrieval model that jointly embeds natural language, code, and images into a shared semantic space through instruction-based multimodal alignment. CodeMMR achieves strong generalization across modalities and languages, outperforming competitive baselines (e.g., UniIR, GME, VLM2Vec) by an average of 10 points on nDCG@10. Moreover, integrating CodeMMR into RAG enhances code generation fidelity and visual grounding on unseen code generation tasks, underscoring the potential of multimodal retrieval as a core enabler for next-generation intelligent programming systems. Datasets are available at HuggingFace.

AI.tldr: 提出首个多模态代码信息检索基准MMCoIR和统一检索模型CodeMMR，通过指令对齐将自然语言、代码和图像嵌入共享语义空间，显著提升检索性能并增强RAG系统的代码生成能力。
AI.motivation: 现有代码信息检索模型主要基于文本，忽视了编程工件中的视觉和结构信息（如Web界面、数据可视化、SVG、示意图、UML等），限制了代码发现、重用和LLM编码的可靠性。
AI.method: 1) 构建首个多模态代码信息检索基准MMCoIR，涵盖5个视觉领域、8种编程语言和11个库；2) 提出CodeMMR统一检索模型，通过指令驱动的多模态对齐将自然语言、代码和图像嵌入共享语义空间。
AI.result: CodeMMR在nDCG@10指标上平均优于竞争基线（如UniIR、GME、VLM2Vec）10个百分点，展现出跨模态和跨语言的强泛化能力；集成到RAG系统中能提升代码生成保真度和视觉基础能力。
AI.conclusion: 多模态检索是下一代智能编程系统的核心使能技术，CodeMMR通过统一的多模态表示学习有效解决了代码检索中的视觉信息缺失问题，为软件工程和RAG应用提供了重要基础。

title: RAD-2: Scaling Reinforcement Learning in a Generator-Discriminator Framework
summary: High-level autonomous driving requires motion planners capable of modeling multimodal future uncertainties while remaining robust in closed-loop interactions. Although diffusion-based planners are effective at modeling complex trajectory distributions, they often suffer from stochastic instabilities and the lack of corrective negative feedback when trained purely with imitation learning. To address these issues, we propose RAD-2, a unified generator-discriminator framework for closed-loop planning. Specifically, a diffusion-based generator is used to produce diverse trajectory candidates, while an RL-optimized discriminator reranks these candidates according to their long-term driving quality. This decoupled design avoids directly applying sparse scalar rewards to the full high-dimensional trajectory space, thereby improving optimization stability. To further enhance reinforcement learning, we introduce Temporally Consistent Group Relative Policy Optimization, which exploits temporal coherence to alleviate the credit assignment problem. In addition, we propose On-policy Generator Optimization, which converts closed-loop feedback into structured longitudinal optimization signals and progressively shifts the generator toward high-reward trajectory manifolds. To support efficient large-scale training, we introduce BEV-Warp, a high-throughput simulation environment that performs closed-loop evaluation directly in Bird's-Eye View feature space via spatial warping. RAD-2 reduces the collision rate by 56% compared with strong diffusion-based planners. Real-world deployment further demonstrates improved perceived safety and driving smoothness in complex urban traffic.

AI.tldr: RAD-2是一个用于闭环规划的生成器-判别器框架，通过扩散模型生成多样化轨迹候选，RL优化的判别器根据长期驾驶质量重新排序，显著降低碰撞率
AI.motivation: 解决基于扩散的规划器在闭环交互中的随机不稳定性和缺乏纠正性负反馈的问题，这些规划器虽然能建模复杂轨迹分布，但在纯模仿学习训练中存在局限性
AI.method: 1) 扩散生成器生成多样化轨迹候选；2) RL优化判别器根据长期驾驶质量重新排序候选轨迹；3) 引入时间一致组相对策略优化利用时间相干性缓解信用分配问题；4) 提出在线生成器优化将闭环反馈转换为结构化纵向优化信号；5) 开发BEV-Warp高吞吐量仿真环境在鸟瞰图特征空间进行闭环评估
AI.result: 与强基线扩散规划器相比，碰撞率降低56%；实际部署显示在复杂城市交通中感知安全性和驾驶平滑度均有改善
AI.conclusion: RAD-2通过解耦的生成器-判别器框架有效解决了扩散规划器的随机不稳定性和反馈缺乏问题，在闭环规划中实现了更好的性能和鲁棒性

title: HYPERHEURIST: A Simulated Annealing-Based Control Framework for LLM-Driven Code Generation in Optimized Hardware Design
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables. Accepted at IJCNN 2026
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promising progress for generating Register Transfer Level (RTL) hardware designs, largely because they can rapidly propose alternative architectural realizations. However, single-shot LLM generation struggles to consistently produce designs that are both functionally correct and power-efficient. This paper proposes HYPERHEURIST, a simulated annealing-based control framework that treats LLM-generated RTL as intermediate candidates rather than final designs. The suggested system not only focuses on functionality correctness but also on Power-Performance-Area (PPA) optimization. In the first phase, RTL candidates are filtered through compilation, structural checks, and simulation to identify functionally valid designs. PPA optimization is restricted to RTL designs that have already passed compilation and simulation. Evaluated across eight RTL benchmarks, this staged approach yields more stable and repeatable optimization behavior than single-pass LLM-generated RTL.

AI.tldr: HYPERHEURIST是一个基于模拟退火的控制框架，将LLM生成的RTL视为中间候选而非最终设计，通过分阶段验证和优化实现功能正确且功耗高效的硬件设计
AI.motivation: 单次LLM生成的RTL设计难以同时保证功能正确性和功耗效率，需要一种系统化方法来筛选和优化LLM生成的候选设计
AI.method: 采用模拟退火控制框架，分两阶段处理：第一阶段通过编译、结构检查和仿真筛选功能正确的RTL设计；第二阶段仅对通过验证的设计进行PPA（功耗-性能-面积）优化
AI.result: 在八个RTL基准测试中，这种分阶段方法比单次LLM生成的RTL表现出更稳定和可重复的优化行为
AI.conclusion: HYPERHEURIST框架通过将LLM生成的RTL视为中间候选并进行分阶段验证和优化，能够更可靠地生成功能正确且功耗高效的硬件设计

title: Chain of Uncertain Rewards with Large Language Models for Reinforcement Learning
summary: Designing effective reward functions is a cornerstone of reinforcement learning (RL), yet it remains a challenging and labor-intensive process due to the inefficiencies and inconsistencies inherent in traditional methods. Existing methods often rely on extensive manual design and evaluation steps, which are prone to redundancy and overlook local uncertainties at intermediate decision points. To address these challenges, we propose the Chain of Uncertain Rewards (CoUR), a novel framework that integrates large language models (LLMs) to streamline reward function design and evaluation in RL environments. Specifically, our CoUR introduces code uncertainty quantification with a similarity selection mechanism that combines textual and semantic analyses to identify and reuse the most relevant reward function components. By reducing redundant evaluations and leveraging Bayesian optimization on decoupled reward terms, CoUR enables a more efficient and robust search for optimal reward feedback. We comprehensively evaluate CoUR across nine original environments from IsaacGym and all 20 tasks from the Bidexterous Manipulation benchmark. The experimental results demonstrate that CoUR not only achieves better performance but also significantly lowers the cost of reward evaluations.

AI.tldr: CoUR框架利用LLM优化RL奖励函数设计，通过代码不确定性量化和相似性选择机制减少冗余评估，在IsaacGym和Bidexterous Manipulation基准测试中表现优异
AI.motivation: 传统RL奖励函数设计方法存在效率低下、不一致的问题，依赖大量手动设计和评估步骤，容易产生冗余且忽略中间决策点的局部不确定性
AI.method: 提出Chain of Uncertain Rewards (CoUR)框架，集成LLM优化奖励函数设计和评估；引入代码不确定性量化与相似性选择机制，结合文本和语义分析识别重用相关奖励函数组件；通过贝叶斯优化解耦奖励项实现高效搜索
AI.result: 在IsaacGym的9个原始环境和Bidexterous Manipulation基准的20个任务上全面评估，CoUR不仅获得更好性能，还显著降低奖励评估成本
AI.conclusion: CoUR框架通过集成LLM和不确定性量化机制，有效解决了传统RL奖励函数设计的效率问题，实现了更高效、鲁棒的奖励函数搜索

title: Think in Latent Thoughts: A New Paradigm for Gloss-Free Sign Language Translation
summary: Many SLT systems quietly assume that brief chunks of signing map directly to spoken-language words. That assumption breaks down because signers often create meaning on the fly using context, space, and movement. We revisit SLT and argue that it is mainly a cross-modal reasoning task, not just a straightforward video-to-text conversion. We thus introduce a reasoning-driven SLT framework that uses an ordered sequence of latent thoughts as an explicit middle layer between the video and the generated text. These latent thoughts gradually extract and organize meaning over time. On top of this, we use a plan-then-ground decoding method: the model first decides what it wants to say, and then looks back at the video to find the evidence. This separation improves coherence and faithfulness. We also built and released a new large-scale gloss-free SLT dataset with stronger context dependencies and more realistic meanings. Experiments across several benchmarks show consistent gains over existing gloss-free methods. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/fletcherjiang/SignThought.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于推理的手语翻译框架，使用潜在思维序列作为视频与文本之间的中间层，通过"先计划后落地"的解码方法提升翻译的连贯性和忠实度。
AI.motivation: 传统手语翻译系统错误地假设手语片段直接对应口语单词，忽略了手语者利用上下文、空间和动作动态创造意义的特性。作者认为手语翻译本质上是跨模态推理任务，而非简单的视频到文本转换。
AI.method: 提出了推理驱动的手语翻译框架：1) 使用有序的潜在思维序列作为视频与生成文本之间的显式中层；2) 采用"先计划后落地"的解码方法：模型先决定要表达什么，再回顾视频寻找证据；3) 构建并发布了新的大规模无注释手语翻译数据集，具有更强的上下文依赖性和更真实的语义。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，该方法相比现有的无注释方法取得了持续的性能提升。代码和数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: 手语翻译应被视为跨模态推理任务而非简单的视频到文本转换。通过引入潜在思维序列作为中间层和"先计划后落地"的解码策略，能够更好地捕捉手语中的上下文依赖和动态意义创造，提高翻译的连贯性和忠实度。

title: Rethinking the Necessity of Adaptive Retrieval-Augmented Generation through the Lens of Adaptive Listwise Ranking
summary: Adaptive Retrieval-Augmented Generation aims to mitigate the interference of extraneous noise by dynamically determining the necessity of retrieving supplementary passages. However, as Large Language Models evolve with increasing robustness to noise, the necessity of adaptive retrieval warrants re-evaluation. In this paper, we rethink this necessity and propose AdaRankLLM, a novel adaptive retrieval framework. To effectively verify the necessity of adaptive listwise reranking, we first develop an adaptive ranker employing a zero-shot prompt with a passage dropout mechanism, and compare its generation outcomes against static fixed-depth retrieval strategies. Furthermore, to endow smaller open-source LLMs with this precise listwise ranking and adaptive filtering capability, we introduce a two-stage progressive distillation paradigm enhanced by data sampling and augmentation techniques. Extensive experiments across three datasets and eight LLMs demonstrate that AdaRankLLM consistently achieves optimal performance in most scenarios with significantly reduced context overhead. Crucially, our analysis reveals a role shift in adaptive retrieval: it functions as a critical noise filter for weaker models to overcome their limitations, while serving as a cost-effective efficiency optimizer for stronger reasoning models.

AI.tldr: AdaRankLLM：一种新型自适应检索框架，通过动态确定是否需要检索补充段落来减少噪声干扰，并采用两阶段渐进蒸馏范式使小型开源LLM具备精确列表排序和自适应过滤能力
AI.motivation: 随着大型语言模型对噪声的鲁棒性不断增强，需要重新评估自适应检索的必要性。本文旨在重新思考这种必要性，并提出一种更有效的自适应检索框架
AI.method: 提出AdaRankLLM框架：1）使用零样本提示和段落丢弃机制开发自适应排序器，验证自适应列表重排序的必要性；2）引入两阶段渐进蒸馏范式，通过数据采样和增强技术使小型开源LLM具备精确列表排序和自适应过滤能力
AI.result: 在三个数据集和八个LLM上的广泛实验表明，AdaRankLLM在大多数场景中始终实现最优性能，同时显著减少上下文开销。分析揭示了自适应检索的角色转变：对较弱模型是关键的噪声过滤器，对较强推理模型是成本效益高的效率优化器
AI.conclusion: 自适应检索的必要性需要重新评估，AdaRankLLM框架通过自适应列表重排序和渐进蒸馏技术，在不同能力的LLM中都能有效平衡性能与效率，揭示了自适应检索在不同模型能力下的不同作用机制

title: RadarSplat-RIO: Indoor Radar-Inertial Odometry with Gaussian Splatting-Based Radar Bundle Adjustment
summary: Radar is more resilient to adverse weather and lighting conditions than visual and Lidar simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM). However, most radar SLAM pipelines still rely heavily on frame-to-frame odometry, which leads to substantial drift. While loop closure can correct long-term errors, it requires revisiting places and relies on robust place recognition. In contrast, visual odometry methods typically leverage bundle adjustment (BA) to jointly optimize poses and map within a local window. However, an equivalent BA formulation for radar has remained largely unexplored. We present the first radar BA framework enabled by Gaussian Splatting (GS), a dense and differentiable scene representation. Our method jointly optimizes radar sensor poses and scene geometry using full range-azimuth-Doppler data, bringing the benefits of multi-frame BA to radar for the first time. When integrated with an existing radar-inertial odometry frontend, our approach significantly reduces pose drift and improves robustness. Across multiple indoor scenes, our radar BA achieves substantial gains over the prior radar-inertial odometry, reducing average absolute translational and rotational errors by 90% and 80%, respectively.

AI.tldr: 首次提出基于高斯溅射的雷达束调整框架，显著减少雷达SLAM中的漂移误差
AI.motivation: 雷达SLAM虽然对恶劣天气和光照条件更鲁棒，但现有方法严重依赖帧间里程计，导致显著漂移。视觉里程计通常使用束调整联合优化位姿和地图，但雷达领域缺乏等效的BA方法。
AI.method: 提出首个基于高斯溅射的雷达束调整框架，利用高斯溅射作为密集可微的场景表示，联合优化雷达传感器位姿和场景几何，使用完整的距离-方位-多普勒数据。
AI.result: 在多个室内场景中，与现有雷达惯性里程计相比，平均绝对平移误差减少90%，旋转误差减少80%，显著降低了位姿漂移并提高了鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 首次将多帧束调整引入雷达SLAM，通过高斯溅射实现了雷达数据的有效束调整，显著提升了雷达SLAM的精度和鲁棒性。

title: Majority Voting for Code Generation
summary: We investigate Functional Majority Voting (FMV), a method based on functional consensus for code generation with Large Language Models, which identifies a representative solution from multiple generations using their runtime execution signatures on test inputs. We find that FMV is an effective test-time inference strategy, substantially boosting performance on LiveCodeBench without a large compute overhead. Furthermore, we extend the utility of functional consensus and apply it as an aggregation strategy for label-free Test-Time Reinforcement Learning. We demonstrate that this increases pass@1 on holdout tasks, but find no evidence of self-improvement beyond the base model's performance ceiling.

AI.tldr: FMV利用函数共识从多个LLM生成的代码中通过运行时执行特征识别代表性解决方案，显著提升代码生成性能，并扩展应用于无标签测试时强化学习的聚合策略。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在探索基于函数共识的代码生成方法，通过运行时执行特征从多个生成方案中识别最佳解决方案，并扩展该方法到无标签测试时强化学习的聚合策略中。
AI.method: 提出Functional Majority Voting (FMV)方法：在测试输入上运行多个LLM生成的代码，收集运行时执行特征（函数签名），基于这些特征识别代表性解决方案。同时将函数共识作为无标签测试时强化学习的聚合策略。
AI.result: FMV作为测试时推理策略，在LiveCodeBench上显著提升性能且计算开销小。作为无标签测试时强化学习的聚合策略，能提高holdout任务上的pass@1，但未发现超越基础模型性能上限的自我改进证据。
AI.conclusion: FMV是基于函数共识的有效代码生成方法，能显著提升LLM代码生成性能。函数共识可扩展为无标签测试时强化学习的聚合策略，但存在性能上限约束。

title: AnimationBench: Are Video Models Good at Character-Centric Animation?
summary: Video generation has advanced rapidly, with recent methods producing increasingly convincing animated results. However, existing benchmarks-largely designed for realistic videos-struggle to evaluate animation-style generation with its stylized appearance, exaggerated motion, and character-centric consistency. Moreover, they also rely on fixed prompt sets and rigid pipelines, offering limited flexibility for open-domain content and custom evaluation needs. To address this gap, we introduce AnimationBench, the first systematic benchmark for evaluating animation image-to-video generation. AnimationBench operationalizes the Twelve Basic Principles of Animation and IP Preservation into measurable evaluation dimensions, together with Broader Quality Dimensions including semantic consistency, motion rationality, and camera motion consistency. The benchmark supports both a standardized close-set evaluation for reproducible comparison and a flexible open-set evaluation for diagnostic analysis, and leverages visual-language models for scalable assessment. Extensive experiments show that AnimationBench aligns well with human judgment and exposes animation-specific quality differences overlooked by realism-oriented benchmarks, leading to more informative and discriminative evaluation of state-of-the-art I2V models.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了AnimationBench，这是首个针对动画风格图像到视频生成的系统性评测基准，解决了现有基准在评估动画风格生成时的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成基准主要针对真实视频设计，难以有效评估动画风格生成的特有属性，如风格化外观、夸张动作和角色一致性。同时，现有基准依赖固定提示集和刚性流程，缺乏对开放域内容和定制化评估需求的灵活性。
AI.method: 将动画十二原则和IP保护原则转化为可量化的评估维度，结合语义一致性、动作合理性、相机运动一致性等更广泛的质量维度。支持标准化闭集评估和灵活开集评估，并利用视觉语言模型进行可扩展评估。
AI.result: 实验表明AnimationBench与人类判断高度一致，能够揭示被真实视频导向基准忽视的动画特定质量差异，为最先进的I2V模型提供更具信息量和区分度的评估。
AI.conclusion: AnimationBench填补了动画风格图像到视频生成评估的空白，通过系统化的评估框架和灵活的评估模式，为动画生成模型的性能评估提供了更全面、更专业的工具。

title: RobotPan: A 360$^\circ$ Surround-View Robotic Vision System for Embodied Perception
summary: Surround-view perception is increasingly important for robotic navigation and loco-manipulation, especially in human-in-the-loop settings such as teleoperation, data collection, and emergency takeover. However, current robotic visual interfaces are often limited to narrow forward-facing views, or, when multiple on-board cameras are available, require cumbersome manual switching that interrupts the operator's workflow. Both configurations suffer from motion-induced jitter that causes simulator sickness in head-mounted displays. We introduce a surround-view robotic vision system that combines six cameras with LiDAR to provide full 360$^\circ$ visual coverage, while meeting the geometric and real-time constraints of embodied deployment. We further present \textsc{RobotPan}, a feed-forward framework that predicts \emph{metric-scaled} and \emph{compact} 3D Gaussians from calibrated sparse-view inputs for real-time rendering, reconstruction, and streaming. \textsc{RobotPan} lifts multi-view features into a unified spherical coordinate representation and decodes Gaussians using hierarchical spherical voxel priors, allocating fine resolution near the robot and coarser resolution at larger radii to reduce computational redundancy without sacrificing fidelity. To support long sequences, our online fusion updates dynamic content while preventing unbounded growth in static regions by selectively updating appearance. Finally, we release a multi-sensor dataset tailored to 360$^\circ$ novel view synthesis and metric 3D reconstruction for robotics, covering navigation, manipulation, and locomotion on real platforms. Experiments show that \textsc{RobotPan} achieves competitive quality against prior feed-forward reconstruction and view-synthesis methods while producing substantially fewer Gaussians, enabling practical real-time embodied deployment. Project website: https://robotpan.github.io/

AI.tldr: 提出RobotPan系统，结合六摄像头与LiDAR实现360°机器人视觉覆盖，通过前馈框架预测度量尺度紧凑3D高斯用于实时渲染、重建与流传输
AI.motivation: 当前机器人视觉接口存在视野受限、需要手动切换摄像头、运动抖动导致模拟器病等问题，需要为机器人导航和操作提供完整的360°视觉覆盖
AI.method: 采用六摄像头与LiDAR多传感器融合，提出RobotPan前馈框架：将多视图特征提升到统一球坐标系表示，使用分层球形体素先验解码高斯，在机器人附近分配精细分辨率，远处分配粗糙分辨率以减少计算冗余
AI.result: RobotPan在质量上可与现有前馈重建和视图合成方法竞争，同时产生更少的高斯，支持实时部署；发布了专门用于机器人360°新视图合成和度量3D重建的多传感器数据集
AI.conclusion: 提出的系统解决了机器人视觉接口的局限性，通过紧凑的3D高斯表示实现了实时360°视觉覆盖，为机器人导航、操作和远程控制提供了实用的解决方案

title: Robust Energy-Aware Routing for Air-Ground Cooperative Multi-UAV Delivery in Wind-Uncertain Environments
summary: Ensuring energy feasibility under wind uncertainty is critical for the safety and reliability of UAV delivery missions. In realistic truck-drone logistics systems, UAVs must deliver parcels and safely return under time-varying wind conditions that are only partially observable during flight. However, most existing routing approaches assume static or deterministic energy models, making them unreliable in dynamic wind environments. We propose Battery-Efficient Routing (BER), an online risk-sensitive planning framework for wind-sensitive truck-assisted UAV delivery. The problem is formulated as routing on a time dependent energy graph whose edge costs evolve according to wind-induced aerodynamic effects. BER continuously evaluates return feasibility while balancing instantaneous energy expenditure and uncertainty-aware risk. The approach is embedded in a hierarchical aerial-ground delivery architecture that combines task allocation, routing, and decentralized trajectory execution. Extensive simulations on synthetic ER graphs generated in Unreal Engine environments and quasi-real wind logs demonstrate that BER significantly improves mission success rates and reduces wind-induced failures compared with static and greedy baselines. These results highlight the importance of integrating real-time energy budgeting and environmental awareness for UAV delivery planning under dynamic wind conditions.

AI.tldr: BER是一个在线风险敏感规划框架，用于风敏感卡车辅助无人机配送，通过时间依赖能量图路由和实时能量预算来提高动态风环境下的任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 在现实的卡车-无人机物流系统中，无人机必须在部分可观测的时变风条件下安全配送包裹并返回。现有路由方法大多假设静态或确定性能量模型，在动态风环境中不可靠，需要确保风不确定性下的能量可行性以保证任务安全可靠。
AI.method: 提出电池高效路由(BER)框架，将问题建模为时间依赖能量图上的路由问题，边成本根据风致空气动力学效应演化。BER持续评估返回可行性，平衡瞬时能量消耗和不确定性感知风险，嵌入分层空地配送架构，结合任务分配、路由和分散轨迹执行。
AI.result: 在Unreal Engine环境中生成的合成ER图和准真实风日志上的广泛仿真表明，BER相比静态和贪婪基线显著提高了任务成功率，减少了风致故障。
AI.conclusion: 结果强调了集成实时能量预算和环境感知对于动态风条件下无人机配送规划的重要性，BER框架能有效提高风敏感卡车辅助无人机配送的可靠性和安全性。

title: Flexible Empowerment at Reasoning with Extended Best-of-N Sampling
summary: This paper proposes a novel method that incorporates empowerment when reasoning actions in reinforcement learning (RL), thereby achieving the flexibility of exploration-exploitation dilemma (EED). In previous methods, empowerment for promoting exploration has been provided as a bonus term to the task-specific reward function as an intrinsically-motivated RL. However, this approach introduces a delay until the policy that accounts for empowerment is learned, making it difficult to adjust the emphasis on exploration as needed. On the other hand, a trick devised for fine-tuning recent foundation models at reasoning, so-called best-of-N (BoN) sampling, allows for the implicit acquisition of modified policies without explicitly learning them. It is expected that applying this trick to exploration-promoting terms, such as empowerment, will enable more flexible adjustment of EED. Therefore, this paper investigates BoN sampling for empowerment. Furthermore, to adjust the degree of policy modification in a generalizable manner while maintaining computational cost, this paper proposes a novel BoN sampling method extended by Tsalis statistics. Through toy problems, the proposed method's cability to balance EED is verified. In addition, it is demonstrated that the proposed method improves RL performance to solve complex locomotion tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合赋权与最佳N采样的强化学习方法，通过Tsalis统计扩展实现探索-利用困境的灵活平衡
AI.motivation: 传统赋权方法作为内在奖励项引入探索延迟，难以动态调整探索-利用平衡；而最佳N采样技术能隐式获得修改策略，有望实现更灵活的探索调整
AI.method: 将最佳N采样应用于赋权探索，并提出基于Tsalis统计扩展的新型BoN采样方法，在保持计算成本的同时实现策略修改程度的泛化调整
AI.result: 在玩具问题上验证了方法平衡探索-利用困境的能力，并在复杂运动任务中展示了强化学习性能的提升
AI.conclusion: 基于Tsalis统计的最佳N采样赋权方法能有效实现探索-利用困境的灵活平衡，提升强化学习在复杂任务中的性能

title: GlobalSplat: Efficient Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian Splatting via Global Scene Tokens
summary: The efficient spatial allocation of primitives serves as the foundation of 3D Gaussian Splatting, as it directly dictates the synergy between representation compactness, reconstruction speed, and rendering fidelity. Previous solutions, whether based on iterative optimization or feed-forward inference, suffer from significant trade-offs between these goals, mainly due to the reliance on local, heuristic-driven allocation strategies that lack global scene awareness. Specifically, current feed-forward methods are largely pixel-aligned or voxel-aligned. By unprojecting pixels into dense, view-aligned primitives, they bake redundancy into the 3D asset. As more input views are added, the representation size increases and global consistency becomes fragile. To this end, we introduce GlobalSplat, a framework built on the principle of align first, decode later. Our approach learns a compact, global, latent scene representation that encodes multi-view input and resolves cross-view correspondences before decoding any explicit 3D geometry. Crucially, this formulation enables compact, globally consistent reconstructions without relying on pretrained pixel-prediction backbones or reusing latent features from dense baselines. Utilizing a coarse-to-fine training curriculum that gradually increases decoded capacity, GlobalSplat natively prevents representation bloat. On RealEstate10K and ACID, our model achieves competitive novel-view synthesis performance while utilizing as few as 16K Gaussians, significantly less than required by dense pipelines, obtaining a light 4MB footprint. Further, GlobalSplat enables significantly faster inference than the baselines, operating under 78 milliseconds in a single forward pass. Project page is available at https://r-itk.github.io/globalsplat/

AI.tldr: GlobalSplat提出"先对齐后解码"框架，通过全局潜在场景表示实现紧凑的3D高斯溅射重建，仅需16K高斯即可达到竞争性新视角合成效果，显著减少表示大小并加速推理。
AI.motivation: 现有3D高斯溅射的空间分配方法存在局限性：基于迭代优化的方法在紧凑性、重建速度和渲染质量间需要权衡；前馈方法多为像素对齐或体素对齐，通过反投影像素生成密集视图对齐基元，导致表示冗余。随着输入视图增加，表示尺寸增大且全局一致性变差。
AI.method: 提出"先对齐后解码"框架：1)学习紧凑的全局潜在场景表示，编码多视图输入并解析跨视图对应关系；2)采用由粗到细的训练课程，逐步增加解码容量，防止表示膨胀；3)不依赖预训练像素预测主干或密集基线的潜在特征重用。
AI.result: 在RealEstate10K和ACID数据集上，仅使用16K高斯即可达到竞争性新视角合成性能，显著少于密集流程所需数量，获得轻量4MB存储占用。推理速度显著快于基线，单次前向传播仅需78毫秒。
AI.conclusion: GlobalSplat通过全局潜在表示和由粗到细训练策略，实现了紧凑、全局一致的3D高斯溅射重建，在保持性能的同时大幅减少表示大小并加速推理，为高效3D表示提供了新范式。

title: Singularity Avoidance in Inverse Kinematics: A Unified Treatment of Classical and Learning-based Methods
summary: Singular configurations cause loss of task-space mobility, unbounded joint velocities, and solver divergence in inverse kinematics (IK) for serial manipulators. No existing survey bridges classical singularity-robust IK with rapidly growing learning-based approaches. We provide a unified treatment spanning Jacobian regularization, Riemannian manipulability tracking, constrained optimization, and modern data-driven paradigms. A systematic taxonomy classifies methods by retained geometric structure and robustness guarantees (formal vs. empirical). We address a critical evaluation gap by proposing a benchmarking protocol and presenting experimental results: 12 IK solvers are evaluated on the Franka Panda under position-only IK across four complementary panels measuring error degradation by condition number, velocity amplification, out-of-distribution robustness, and computational cost. Results show that pure learning methods fail even on well-conditioned targets (MLP: 0% success, approx. 10 mm mean error), while hybrid warm-start architectures - IKFlow (59% to 100%), CycleIK(0% to 98.6%), GGIK (0% to 100%) - rescue learned solvers via classical refinement, with DLS converging from initial errors up to 207 mm. Deeper singularity-regime evaluation is identified as immediate future work.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统综述了机器人逆运动学中的奇异性问题，提出了统一分类框架并建立了首个综合评估基准，比较了12种IK求解器在Franka Panda上的性能。
AI.motivation: 奇异性配置会导致任务空间机动性丧失、关节速度无界和求解器发散，现有研究缺乏对经典鲁棒IK方法与新兴学习方法的系统性综述和评估基准。
AI.method: 提出了统一的理论框架，涵盖雅可比正则化、黎曼可操作性跟踪、约束优化和数据驱动方法；建立了系统分类法（基于保留的几何结构和鲁棒性保证）；设计了包含四个互补评估面板的基准协议。
AI.result: 评估了12种IK求解器：纯学习方法在良好条件下也失败（MLP：0%成功率，约10mm平均误差）；混合预热架构（IKFlow 59-100%、CycleIK 0-98.6%、GGIK 0-100%）通过经典细化显著改善；DLS能从高达207mm的初始误差收敛。
AI.conclusion: 纯学习方法在奇异性附近表现不佳，混合方法通过经典细化显著提升性能；需要更深入的奇异性区域评估作为未来工作；建立了首个系统性IK求解器评估基准。

title: DataCenterGym: A Physics-Grounded Simulator for Multi-Objective Data Center Scheduling
summary:
Modern datacenters schedule heterogeneous workloads across geo-distributed sites with diverse compute capacities, electricity prices, and thermal conditions. Compute utilization, heat generation, cooling demand, and energy consumption are tightly coupled, yet most existing schedulers abstract these effects and treat them independently.
  We present \textit{DataCenterGym}, a physics-grounded simulation environment for job scheduling in geo-distributed data centers, designed as a reusable testbed for future research. The simulator integrates compute queueing, building thermal dynamics, localized HVAC behavior, and temperature-dependent service degradation within a Gymnasium-compatible interface. We also develop a Hierarchical Model Predictive Control (H-MPC) scheduling algorithm that performs distributed job placement while explicitly accounting for thermal and power dynamics. Through experiments on nominal operation and workload sensitivity, we demonstrate how H-MPC improves scheduling performance relative to baseline schedulers.

AI.tldr: DataCenterGym：用于地理分布式数据中心作业调度的物理基础仿真环境，包含层次模型预测控制调度算法，显式考虑热力和电力动态
AI.motivation: 现代数据中心在具有不同计算能力、电价和热条件的地理分布式站点调度异构工作负载。计算利用率、热量产生、冷却需求和能耗紧密耦合，但现有调度器通常抽象这些效应并独立处理它们。
AI.method: 提出了DataCenterGym——一个基于物理的地理分布式数据中心作业调度仿真环境，作为可重复使用的测试平台。该模拟器集成了计算排队、建筑热力学、局部HVAC行为以及温度相关的服务退化，并提供Gymnasium兼容接口。同时开发了层次模型预测控制调度算法，在执行分布式作业放置时显式考虑热力和电力动态。
AI.result: 通过正常运行和工作负载敏感性实验，展示了H-MPC相对于基线调度器在调度性能上的改进。
AI.conclusion: DataCenterGym为未来研究提供了一个可重复使用的测试平台，而H-MPC算法通过显式考虑热力和电力动态，在地理分布式数据中心调度中实现了更好的性能。

title: Diffusion Sequence Models for Generative In-Context Meta-Learning of Robot Dynamics
comment: Angelo Moroncelli, Matteo Rufolo and Gunes Cagin Aydin contributed equally to this work
summary: Accurate modeling of robot dynamics is essential for model-based control, yet remains challenging under distributional shifts and real-time constraints. In this work, we formulate system identification as an in-context meta-learning problem and compare deterministic and generative sequence models for forward dynamics prediction. We take a Transformer-based meta-model, as a strong deterministic baseline, and introduce to this setting two complementary diffusion-based approaches: (i) inpainting diffusion (Diffuser), which learns the joint input-observation distribution, and (ii) conditioned diffusion models (CNN and Transformer), which generate future observations conditioned on control inputs. Through large-scale randomized simulations, we analyze performance across in-distribution and out-of-distribution regimes, as well as computational trade-offs relevant for control. We show that diffusion models significantly improve robustness under distribution shift, with inpainting diffusion achieving the best performance in our experiments. Finally, we demonstrate that warm-started sampling enables diffusion models to operate within real-time constraints, making them viable for control applications. These results highlight generative meta-models as a promising direction for robust system identification in robotics.

AI.tldr: 该研究将系统辨识建模为上下文元学习问题，比较确定性模型和生成式序列模型在机器人动力学预测中的性能，发现扩散模型在分布偏移下具有更好的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 机器人动力学的精确建模对于基于模型的控制至关重要，但在分布偏移和实时约束下仍然具有挑战性。需要开发能够处理分布变化并满足实时控制需求的鲁棒系统辨识方法。
AI.method: 将系统辨识构建为上下文元学习问题，比较两种方法：1) Transformer元模型作为确定性基线；2) 两种扩散模型方法：补全扩散学习联合输入-观测分布，条件扩散模型基于控制输入生成未来观测。通过大规模随机化仿真分析性能。
AI.result: 扩散模型在分布偏移下显著提高了鲁棒性，其中补全扩散在实验中表现最佳。通过预热采样技术，扩散模型能够在实时约束下运行，使其适用于控制应用。
AI.conclusion: 生成式元模型是机器人领域鲁棒系统辨识的一个有前景方向，扩散模型在分布偏移下的优越性能和通过预热采样实现的实时性使其适用于实际控制应用。

title: DALM: A Domain-Algebraic Language Model via Three-Phase Structured Generation
summary: Large language models compress heterogeneous knowledge into a single parameter space, allowing facts from different domains to interfere during generation. We propose DALM, a Domain-Algebraic Language Model that replaces unconstrained token generation with structured denoising over a domain lattice. DALM follows a three-phase generation path: it first resolves domain uncertainty, then relation uncertainty, and finally concept uncertainty, so each stage operates under explicit algebraic constraints. The framework requires only three ingredients: a lattice of domains with computable meet, join, and implication; a typing function over relations that controls inheritance across domains; and a fiber partition that localizes knowledge to domain-specific subsets. Given these ingredients, DALM yields a three-phase encoder-decoder architecture in which generation is confined to a domain fiber, cross-domain contamination is structurally prevented in closed-vocabulary mode and auditably bounded in open-vocabulary mode, and a single query can produce a domain-indexed multi-perspective answer space. We instantiate the framework with the CDC knowledge representation system and outline training and evaluation on validated domain-annotated crystal libraries. DALM reframes language generation as algebraically constrained structured denoising rather than unconstrained decoding over a flat token space.

AI.tldr: DALM提出了一种基于域代数约束的语言模型，用结构化去噪替代无约束的token生成，通过域格的三阶段生成路径解决知识干扰问题。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型将异构知识压缩到单一参数空间，导致不同领域的事实信息在生成过程中相互干扰，需要结构化的方法来控制知识污染。
AI.method: DALM采用三阶段生成路径：先解决域不确定性，再解决关系不确定性，最后解决概念不确定性。框架基于域格、类型化关系和纤维划分三个要素，构建编码器-解码器架构，将生成限制在特定域纤维内。
AI.result: DALM能够结构性地防止跨域知识污染（在封闭词汇模式下完全防止，在开放词汇模式下可审计地限制），单个查询可产生域索引的多视角答案空间。
AI.conclusion: DALM将语言生成重新定义为代数约束的结构化去噪过程，而非在平坦token空间上的无约束解码，为控制知识干扰提供了代数框架。

title: Boundary Sampling to Learn Predictive Safety Filters via Pontryagin's Maximum Principle
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Safety filters provide a practical approach for enforcing safety constraints in autonomous systems. While learning-based tools scale to high-dimensional systems, their performance depends on informative data that includes states likely to lead to constraint violation, which can be difficult to efficiently sample in complex, high-dimensional systems. In this work, we characterize trajectories that barely avoid safety violations using the Pontryagin Maximum Principle. These boundary trajectories are used to guide data collection for learned Hamilton-Jacobi Reachability, concentrating learning efforts near safety-critical states to improve efficiency. The learned Control Barrier Value Function is then used directly for safety filtering. Simulations and experimental validation on a shared-control automotive racing application demonstrate PMP sampling improves learning efficiency, yielding faster convergence, reduced failure rates, and improved safe set reconstruction, with wall times around 3ms.

AI.tldr: 基于庞特里亚金极大值原理采样边界轨迹，指导学习型汉密尔顿-雅可比可达性分析，提高安全过滤器的学习效率和性能
AI.motivation: 学习型安全过滤器在高维系统中面临数据采样效率低下的问题，难以有效获取可能导致安全约束违反的关键状态信息
AI.method: 使用庞特里亚金极大值原理(PMP)表征勉强避免安全违反的边界轨迹，以此指导数据收集，集中学习资源于安全关键状态附近，学习控制屏障值函数用于安全过滤
AI.result: PMP采样显著提高学习效率，实现更快收敛、更低失败率、更优安全集重构，在共享控制赛车应用中验证，计算时间约3ms
AI.conclusion: PMP引导的边界轨迹采样是提高学习型汉密尔顿-雅可比可达性分析效率的有效方法，为高维系统安全过滤器提供了实用的数据收集策略

title: LLM attribution analysis across different fine-tuning strategies and model scales for automated code compliance
comment: 8 pages, 9 figures. Accepted at ICCCBE 2026 (International Conference on Computing in Civil and Building Engineering)
summary: Existing research on large language models (LLMs) for automated code compliance has primarily focused on performance, treating the models as black boxes and overlooking how training decisions affect their interpretive behavior. This paper addresses this gap by employing a perturbation-based attribution analysis to compare the interpretive behaviors of LLMs across different fine-tuning strategies such as full fine-tuning (FFT), low-rank adaptation (LoRA) and quantized LoRA fine-tuning, as well as the impact of model scales which include varying LLM parameter sizes. Our results show that FFT produces attribution patterns that are statistically different and more focused than those from parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods. Furthermore, we found that as model scale increases, LLMs develop specific interpretive strategies such as prioritizing numerical constraints and rule identifiers in the building text, albeit with performance gains in semantic similarity of the generated and reference computer-processable rules plateauing for models larger than 7B. This paper provides crucial insights into the explainability of these models, taking a step toward building more transparent LLMs for critical, regulation-based tasks in the Architecture, Engineering, and Construction industry.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过扰动归因分析比较了不同微调策略（FFT、LoRA、量化LoRA）和模型规模对LLM在代码合规性任务中解释行为的影响，发现FFT产生更聚焦的归因模式，且模型规模增大会发展特定解释策略。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注LLM在自动化代码合规性任务中的性能表现，将模型视为黑箱，忽视了训练决策如何影响其解释行为。本研究旨在填补这一空白，探究不同微调策略和模型规模对LLM解释行为的影响。
AI.method: 采用基于扰动的归因分析，比较不同微调策略（全微调FFT、低秩适应LoRA、量化LoRA微调）以及不同参数规模LLM在代码合规性任务中的解释行为。
AI.result: FFT产生的归因模式在统计上不同于参数高效微调方法，且更加聚焦；随着模型规模增大，LLM发展出特定的解释策略（如优先处理数值约束和规则标识符），但超过7B参数的模型在生成规则与参考规则的语义相似度方面性能提升趋于平缓。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为LLM的可解释性提供了重要见解，朝着为建筑、工程和施工行业的关键法规任务构建更透明的LLM迈出了一步，强调了考虑微调策略和模型规模对解释行为影响的重要性。

title: SegWithU: Uncertainty as Perturbation Energy for Single-Forward-Pass Risk-Aware Medical Image Segmentation
summary:
Reliable uncertainty estimation is critical for medical image segmentation, where automated contours feed downstream quantification and clinical decision support. Many strong uncertainty methods require repeated inference, while efficient single-forward-pass alternatives often provide weaker failure ranking or rely on restrictive feature-space assumptions. We present $\textbf{SegWithU}$, a post-hoc framework that augments a frozen pretrained segmentation backbone with a lightweight uncertainty head. SegWithU taps intermediate backbone features and models uncertainty as perturbation energy in a compact probe space using rank-1 posterior probes. It produces two voxel-wise uncertainty maps: a calibration-oriented map for probability tempering and a ranking-oriented map for error detection and selective prediction. Across ACDC, BraTS2024, and LiTS, SegWithU is the strongest and most consistent single-forward-pass baseline, achieving AUROC/AURC of $0.9838/2.4885$, $0.9946/0.2660$, and $0.9925/0.8193$, respectively, while preserving segmentation quality. These results suggest that perturbation-based uncertainty modeling is an effective and practical route to reliability-aware medical segmentation.
  Source code is available at https://github.com/ProjectNeura/SegWithU.

AI.tldr: SegWithU是一个用于医学图像分割的后处理不确定性估计框架，通过轻量级不确定性头增强冻结的预训练分割主干，使用扰动能量建模不确定性，提供校准导向和排名导向的不确定性图，在单次前向传播中实现可靠的不确定性估计。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割需要可靠的不确定性估计，因为自动分割结果会用于下游量化和临床决策支持。现有方法要么需要重复推理效率低下，要么单次前向传播方法的不确定性估计质量较差或依赖限制性特征空间假设。
AI.method: SegWithU是一个后处理框架，在冻结的预训练分割主干上添加轻量级不确定性头。该方法利用主干中间特征，在紧凑的探测空间中使用rank-1后验探针将不确定性建模为扰动能量。生成两种体素级不确定性图：用于概率调整的校准导向图和用于错误检测与选择性预测的排名导向图。
AI.result: 在ACDC、BraTS2024和LiTS数据集上，SegWithU是性能最强且最一致的单一前向传播基线方法，分别达到AUROC/AURC为0.9838/2.4885、0.9946/0.2660和0.9925/0.8193，同时保持了分割质量。
AI.conclusion: 基于扰动的不确定性建模是医学图像分割中实现可靠性感知的有效且实用的途径。SegWithU框架在保持分割质量的同时，提供了高质量的不确定性估计。

title: BioHiCL: Hierarchical Multi-Label Contrastive Learning for Biomedical Retrieval with MeSH Labels
summary: Effective biomedical information retrieval requires modeling domain semantics and hierarchical relationships among biomedical texts. Existing biomedical generative retrievers build on coarse binary relevance signals, limiting their ability to capture semantic overlap. We propose BioHiCL (Biomedical Retrieval with Hierarchical Multi-Label Contrastive Learning), which leverages hierarchical MeSH annotations to provide structured supervision for multi-label contrastive learning. Our models, BioHiCL-Base (0.1B) and BioHiCL-Large (0.3B), achieve promising performance on biomedical retrieval, sentence similarity, and question answering tasks, while remaining computationally efficient for deployment.

AI.tldr: BioHiCL：基于层次多标签对比学习的生物医学检索模型，利用MeSH层次标注提升语义理解能力
AI.motivation: 现有生物医学生成式检索模型依赖粗糙的二元相关性信号，难以捕捉语义重叠和层次关系，限制了检索效果
AI.method: 提出BioHiCL框架，利用层次化的MeSH标注进行多标签对比学习，构建结构化监督信号，开发了0.1B参数的Base模型和0.3B参数的Large模型
AI.result: BioHiCL在生物医学检索、句子相似度和问答任务上表现优异，同时保持计算效率，适合实际部署
AI.conclusion: 层次多标签对比学习能有效提升生物医学检索的语义建模能力，BioHiCL为领域特定检索提供了高效解决方案

title: Vectorizing Projection in Manifold-Constrained Motion Planning for Real-Time Whole-Body Control
summary: Many robot planning tasks require satisfaction of one or more constraints throughout the entire trajectory. For geometric constraints, manifold-constrained motion planning algorithms are capable of planning collision-free path between start and goal configurations on the constraint submanifolds specified by task. Current state-of-the-art methods can take tens of seconds to solve these tasks for complex systems such as humanoid robots, making real-world use impractical, especially in dynamic settings. Inspired by recent advances in hardware accelerated motion planning, we present a CPU SIMD-accelerated manifold-constrained motion planner that revisits projection-based constraint satisfaction through the lens of parallelization. By transforming relevant components into parallelizable structures, we use SIMD parallelism to plan constraint satisfying solutions. Our approach achieves up to 100-1000x speed-ups over the state-of-the-art, making real-time constrained motion planning feasible for the first time. We demonstrate our planner on a real humanoid robot and show real-time whole-body quasi-static plan generation. Our work is available at https://commalab.org/papers/mcvamp/.

AI.tldr: 提出一种CPU SIMD加速的流形约束运动规划器，通过并行化投影方法实现100-1000倍加速，首次实现实时约束运动规划
AI.motivation: 现有流形约束运动规划方法对复杂系统（如人形机器人）需要数十秒计算时间，难以在动态环境中实时应用，需要更快的规划算法
AI.method: 采用CPU SIMD并行加速技术，重新设计基于投影的约束满足方法，将相关组件转换为可并行化结构，利用SIMD并行性规划满足约束的轨迹
AI.result: 相比现有最优方法实现100-1000倍加速，首次实现实时约束运动规划，在真实人形机器人上展示实时全身准静态规划生成能力
AI.conclusion: 通过SIMD并行化投影方法显著加速流形约束运动规划，使复杂系统的实时约束规划成为可能，为人形机器人等复杂系统在动态环境中的应用开辟新途径

title: "Excuse me, may I say something..." CoLabScience, A Proactive AI Assistant for Biomedical Discovery and LLM-Expert Collaborations
summary: The integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) into scientific workflows presents exciting opportunities to accelerate biomedical discovery. However, the reactive nature of LLMs, which respond only when prompted, limits their effectiveness in collaborative settings that demand foresight and autonomous engagement. In this study, we introduce CoLabScience, a proactive LLM assistant designed to enhance biomedical collaboration between AI systems and human experts through timely, context-aware interventions. At the core of our method is PULI (Positive-Unlabeled Learning-to-Intervene), a novel framework trained with a reinforcement learning objective to determine when and how to intervene in streaming scientific discussions, by leveraging the team's project proposal and long- and short-term conversational memory. To support this work, we introduce BSDD (Biomedical Streaming Dialogue Dataset), a new benchmark of simulated research discussion dialogues with intervention points derived from PubMed articles. Experimental results show that PULI significantly outperforms existing baselines in both intervention precision and collaborative task utility, highlighting the potential of proactive LLMs as intelligent scientific assistants.

AI.tldr: CoLabScience是一个主动式LLM助手，通过PULI框架在生物医学协作中实现适时、上下文感知的干预，显著提升干预精度和协作任务效用。
AI.motivation: 当前LLMs的被动响应特性限制了其在需要预见性和自主参与的科学协作环境中的有效性，特别是在生物医学发现领域需要更主动的AI助手来加速研究进程。
AI.method: 提出CoLabScience系统，核心是PULI（Positive-Unlabeled Learning-to-Intervene）框架，采用强化学习目标训练，利用项目提案和长短期对话记忆来决定何时以及如何在流式科学讨论中进行干预。同时构建了BSDD（Biomedical Streaming Dialogue Dataset）基准数据集。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，PULI在干预精度和协作任务效用方面显著优于现有基线方法，证明了主动式LLMs作为智能科学助手的潜力。
AI.conclusion: CoLabScience通过主动干预机制有效增强了AI系统与人类专家在生物医学领域的协作，为加速科学发现提供了新的AI辅助范式。

title: TokenGS: Decoupling 3D Gaussian Prediction from Pixels with Learnable Tokens
summary: In this work, we revisit several key design choices of modern Transformer-based approaches for feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) prediction. We argue that the common practice of regressing Gaussian means as depths along camera rays is suboptimal, and instead propose to directly regress 3D mean coordinates using only a self-supervised rendering loss. This formulation allows us to move from the standard encoder-only design to an encoder-decoder architecture with learnable Gaussian tokens, thereby unbinding the number of predicted primitives from input image resolution and number of views. Our resulting method, TokenGS, demonstrates improved robustness to pose noise and multiview inconsistencies, while naturally supporting efficient test-time optimization in token space without degrading learned priors. TokenGS achieves state-of-the-art feed-forward reconstruction performance on both static and dynamic scenes, producing more regularized geometry and more balanced 3DGS distribution, while seamlessly recovering emergent scene attributes such as static-dynamic decomposition and scene flow.

AI.tldr: TokenGS：一种基于Transformer的编码器-解码器架构，通过可学习的高斯token直接回归3D均值坐标，实现前馈式3D高斯泼溅预测，在静态和动态场景重建中达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的3D高斯泼溅预测方法通常沿相机射线回归高斯均值作为深度，这种方法存在局限性。作者认为直接回归3D均值坐标并采用自监督渲染损失更为有效，同时希望解除预测基元数量与输入图像分辨率和视图数量的绑定关系。
AI.method: 提出TokenGS方法：1）放弃沿射线回归深度的传统做法，直接回归3D均值坐标；2）从编码器架构转向编码器-解码器架构；3）引入可学习的高斯token，使预测基元数量独立于输入分辨率和视图数量；4）支持在token空间进行高效的测试时优化而不损害学习到的先验。
AI.result: TokenGS在静态和动态场景的前馈重建中达到最先进性能，表现出：1）对姿态噪声和多视图不一致性的更强鲁棒性；2）更正则化的几何结构；3）更平衡的3DGS分布；4）能够无缝恢复涌现的场景属性，如静态-动态分解和场景流。
AI.conclusion: TokenGS通过重新设计Transformer架构的关键选择，特别是直接回归3D坐标和使用可学习token，显著提升了3D高斯泼溅预测的性能和灵活性，为前馈式3D重建提供了更优的解决方案。

title: CSLE: A Reinforcement Learning Platform for Autonomous Security Management
comment: Accepted as Oral to the Ninth Annual Conference on Machine Learning and Systems (MLSys 2026), https://mlsys.org/virtual/2026/oral/3812
summary: Reinforcement learning is a promising approach to autonomous and adaptive security management in networked systems. However, current reinforcement learning solutions for security management are mostly limited to simulation environments and it is unclear how they generalize to operational systems. In this paper, we address this limitation by presenting CSLE: a reinforcement learning platform for autonomous security management that enables experimentation under realistic conditions. Conceptually, CSLE encompasses two systems. First, it includes an emulation system that replicates key components of the target system in a virtualized environment. We use this system to gather measurements and logs, based on which we identify a system model, such as a Markov decision process. Second, it includes a simulation system where security strategies are efficiently learned through simulations of the system model. The learned strategies are then evaluated and refined in the emulation system to close the gap between theoretical and operational performance. We demonstrate CSLE through four use cases: flow control, replication control, segmentation control, and recovery control. Through these use cases, we show that CSLE enables near-optimal security management in an environment that approximates an operational system.

AI.tldr: CSLE是一个用于自主安全管理的强化学习平台，通过仿真与模拟系统结合，在接近实际运行系统的环境中实现接近最优的安全管理。
AI.motivation: 当前强化学习在安全管理中的应用主要局限于仿真环境，缺乏在实际运行系统中的验证和泛化能力，需要一种能够连接理论与实际性能的平台。
AI.method: CSLE包含两个系统：1) 仿真系统，在虚拟化环境中复制目标系统的关键组件，收集测量数据和日志以识别系统模型；2) 模拟系统，通过系统模型模拟高效学习安全策略，然后在仿真系统中评估和优化策略。
AI.result: 通过四个用例（流量控制、复制控制、分段控制和恢复控制）展示了CSLE能够在近似运行系统的环境中实现接近最优的安全管理。
AI.conclusion: CSLE平台通过仿真与模拟的结合，有效缩小了强化学习在安全管理中理论与实际性能之间的差距，为自主安全管理系统提供了实用的实验平台。

title: Utilizing Inpainting for Keypoint Detection for Vision-Based Control of Robotic Manipulators
summary: In this paper we present a novel visual servoing framework to control a robotic manipulator in the configuration space by using purely natural visual features. Our goal is to develop methods that can robustly detect and track natural features or keypoints on robotic manipulators that would be used for vision-based control, especially for scenarios where placing external markers on the robot is not feasible or preferred at runtime. For the model training process of our data driven approach, we create a data collection pipeline where we attach ArUco markers along the robot's body, label their centers as keypoints, and then utilize an inpainting method to remove the markers and reconstruct the occluded regions. By doing so, we generate natural (markerless) robot images that are automatically labeled with the marker locations. These images are used to train a keypoint detection algorithm, which is used to control the robot configuration using natural features of the robot. Unlike the prior methods that rely on accurate camera calibration and robot models for labeling training images, our approach eliminates these dependencies through inpainting. To achieve robust keypoint detection even in the presence of occlusion, we introduce a second inpainting model, this time to utilize during runtime, that reconstructs occluded regions of the robot in real time, enabling continuous keypoint detection. To further enhance the consistency and robustness of keypoint predictions, we integrate an Unscented Kalman Filter (UKF) that refines the keypoint estimates over time, adding to stable and reliable control performance. We obtained successful control results with this model-free and purely vision-based control strategy, utilizing natural robot features in the runtime, both under full visibility and partial occlusion.

AI.tldr: 提出基于自然视觉特征的机器人配置空间视觉伺服框架，通过数据驱动方法训练关键点检测算法，利用修复技术生成无标记训练数据和实时处理遮挡，结合UKF提升预测稳定性。
AI.motivation: 开发能够在机器人上无法或不希望放置外部标记的场景下，使用自然视觉特征进行视觉控制的鲁棒方法。传统方法依赖精确的相机标定和机器人模型，而本方法旨在消除这些依赖。
AI.method: 1. 数据收集管道：在机器人上附加ArUco标记，标记其中心作为关键点，然后使用修复方法去除标记并重建被遮挡区域，生成自动标注的无标记机器人图像。2. 训练关键点检测算法用于基于自然特征的机器人控制。3. 运行时引入第二个修复模型实时重建机器人被遮挡区域，实现连续关键点检测。4. 集成无迹卡尔曼滤波器(UKF)随时间优化关键点估计，提升预测一致性和鲁棒性。
AI.result: 获得了成功的控制结果，这种无模型、纯视觉的控制策略在运行时使用机器人自然特征，在完全可见和部分遮挡条件下均能有效工作。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种创新的视觉伺服框架，通过数据驱动方法和修复技术实现了基于自然视觉特征的机器人配置空间控制，消除了对精确相机标定和机器人模型的依赖，在遮挡条件下仍能保持鲁棒性能。

title: PAWN: Piece Value Analysis with Neural Networks
summary: Predicting the relative value of any given chess piece in a position remains an open challenge, as a piece's contribution depends on its spatial relationships with every other piece on the board. We demonstrate that incorporating the state of the full chess board via latent position representations derived using a CNN-based autoencoder significantly improves accuracy for MLP-based piece value prediction architectures.
