Using a dataset of over 12 million piece-value pairs gathered from Grandmaster-level games, with ground-truth labels generated by Stockfish 17, our enhanced piece value predictor significantly outperforms context-independent MLP-based systems, reducing validation mean absolute error by 16% and predicting relative piece value within approximately 0.65 pawns. More generally, our findings suggest that encoding the full problem state as context provides useful inductive bias for predicting the contribution of any individual component.

AI.tldr: 使用CNN自编码器提取棋盘潜在位置表示，结合完整棋盘状态显著提升国际象棋棋子相对价值预测精度
AI.motivation: 预测国际象棋棋子在特定局面中的相对价值是一个开放挑战，因为棋子的贡献取决于其与棋盘上所有其他棋子的空间关系。现有基于MLP的棋子价值预测系统缺乏对完整棋盘状态的考虑。
AI.method: 1. 使用CNN自编码器提取棋盘潜在位置表示；2. 将这些表示作为上下文输入到MLP架构中；3. 使用超过1200万个棋子-价值对的数据集，数据来自特级大师对局，真实标签由Stockfish 17生成；4. 训练增强型棋子价值预测器。
AI.result: 1. 验证集平均绝对误差降低16%；2. 相对棋子价值预测误差约为0.65个兵；3. 显著优于上下文无关的MLP系统；4. 完整棋盘状态编码提供了有用的归纳偏置。
AI.conclusion: 将完整问题状态编码为上下文，为预测任何个体组件的贡献提供了有用的归纳偏置。该方法在国际象棋棋子价值预测中表现出显著优势，可推广到其他需要评估组件在复杂系统中相对贡献的问题。

title: StreamCacheVGGT: Streaming Visual Geometry Transformers with Robust Scoring and Hybrid Cache Compression
summary: Reconstructing dense 3D geometry from continuous video streams requires stable inference under a constant memory budget. Existing $O(1)$ frameworks primarily rely on a ``pure eviction'' paradigm, which suffers from significant information destruction due to binary token deletion and evaluation noise from localized, single-layer scoring. To address these bottlenecks, we propose StreamCacheVGGT, a training-free framework that reimagines cache management through two synergistic modules: Cross-Layer Consistency-Enhanced Scoring (CLCES) and Hybrid Cache Compression (HCC). CLCES mitigates activation noise by tracking token importance trajectories across the Transformer hierarchy, employing order-statistical analysis to identify sustained geometric salience. Leveraging these robust scores, HCC transcends simple eviction by introducing a three-tier triage strategy that merges moderately important tokens into retained anchors via nearest-neighbor assignment on the key-vector manifold. This approach preserves essential geometric context that would otherwise be lost. Extensive evaluations on five benchmarks (7-Scenes, NRGBD, ETH3D, Bonn, and KITTI) demonstrate that StreamCacheVGGT sets a new state-of-the-art, delivering superior reconstruction accuracy and long-term stability while strictly adhering to constant-cost constraints.

AI.tldr: StreamCacheVGGT：一种免训练框架，通过跨层一致性增强评分和混合缓存压缩，在恒定内存预算下实现视频流密集3D几何重建，超越现有纯淘汰方法
AI.motivation: 现有O(1)内存框架主要依赖"纯淘汰"范式，存在因二元令牌删除导致的信息破坏问题，以及局部单层评分带来的评估噪声。需要解决这些瓶颈以实现稳定、高质量的3D几何重建
AI.method: 提出两个协同模块：1) 跨层一致性增强评分(CLCES)：通过跟踪Transformer层次结构中令牌重要性轨迹，采用顺序统计分析识别持续几何显著性，减少激活噪声；2) 混合缓存压缩(HCC)：基于稳健评分实施三级分流策略，将中等重要性令牌通过键向量流形上的最近邻分配合并到保留锚点中，避免简单淘汰
AI.result: 在五个基准测试(7-Scenes、NRGBD、ETH3D、Bonn和KITTI)上的广泛评估表明，StreamCacheVGGT实现了新的最先进性能，在严格遵循恒定成本约束的同时，提供了卓越的重建精度和长期稳定性
AI.conclusion: StreamCacheVGGT通过重新构想缓存管理，解决了现有纯淘汰方法的局限性，在恒定内存预算下实现了更高质量的3D几何重建，为视频流处理提供了有效的解决方案

title: GeoVision-Enabled Digital Twin for Hybrid Autonomous-Teleoperated Medical Responses
summary: Remote medical response systems are increasingly being deployed to support emergency care in disaster-affected and infrastructure-limited environments. Enabled by GeoVision capabilities, this paper presents a Digital Twin architecture for hybrid autonomous-teleoperated medical response systems. The proposed framework integrates perception and adaptive navigation with a Digital Twin, synchronized in real-time, that mirrors system states, environmental dynamics, patient conditions, and mission objectives. Unlike traditional ground control interfaces, the Digital Twin provides remote clinical and operational users with an intuitive, continuously updated virtual representation of the platform and its operational context, enabling enhanced situational awareness and informed decision-making.

AI.tldr: 提出基于数字孪生的混合自主-遥操作医疗响应系统架构，通过实时同步的虚拟模型增强远程医疗应急响应能力
AI.motivation: 在灾害影响和基础设施有限的环境中，需要更有效的远程医疗应急响应系统。传统地面控制界面缺乏直观性，难以提供全面的态势感知，限制了远程医疗决策的质量和效率。
AI.method: 提出数字孪生架构，集成感知和自适应导航功能，创建与物理系统实时同步的虚拟模型。该数字孪生镜像系统状态、环境动态、患者状况和任务目标，为远程临床和操作人员提供直观的虚拟表示。
AI.result: 数字孪生架构相比传统地面控制界面，能够提供更直观、持续更新的虚拟表示，增强远程用户的态势感知能力，支持更明智的决策制定。
AI.conclusion: 基于数字孪生的混合自主-遥操作医疗响应系统架构能够有效提升远程医疗应急响应能力，特别是在灾害和基础设施受限环境中，通过增强态势感知改善决策质量。

title: Learning Behaviorally Grounded Item Embeddings via Personalized Temporal Contexts
comment: Accepted to be published in UMAP'26, 9 pages, 7 figures
summary: Effective user modeling requires distinguishing between short-term and long-term preference evolution. While item embeddings have become a key component of recommender systems, standard approaches like Item2Vec treat user histories as unordered sets (bag-of-items), implicitly assuming that interactions separated by minutes are as semantically related as those separated by months. This simplification flattens the rich temporal structure of user behavior, obscuring the distinction between coherent consumption sessions and gradual interest drifts. In this work, we introduce TAI2Vec (Time-Aware Item-to-Vector), a family of lightweight embedding models that integrates temporal proximity directly into the representation learning process. Unlike approaches that apply global time constraints, TAI2Vec is user-adaptive, tailoring its temporal definitions to individual interaction paces. We propose two complementary strategies: TAI2Vec-Disc, which utilizes personalized anomaly detection to dynamically segment interactions into semantic sessions, and TAI2Vec-Cont, which employs continuous, user-specific decay functions to weigh item relationships based on their relative temporal distance. Experimental results across eight diverse datasets demonstrate that TAI2Vec consistently produces more accurate and behaviorally grounded representations than static baselines, achieving competitive or superior performance in over 80% of the datasets, with improvements of up to 135%. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/UFSCar-LaSID/tai2vec.

AI.tldr: TAI2Vec是一种时间感知的轻量级物品嵌入模型，通过个性化时间约束区分短期和长期偏好演化，相比传统无序集合方法显著提升推荐性能。
AI.motivation: 传统物品嵌入方法（如Item2Vec）将用户历史视为无序集合，忽略了交互之间的时间结构，无法区分分钟级相关性和月级相关性，从而模糊了连贯消费会话与渐进兴趣漂移之间的区别。
AI.method: 提出了TAI2Vec（时间感知物品到向量）模型家族，包含两种互补策略：TAI2Vec-Disc使用个性化异常检测动态分割交互为语义会话；TAI2Vec-Cont采用连续的用户特定衰减函数根据相对时间距离加权物品关系。
AI.result: 在八个不同数据集上的实验表明，TAI2Vec相比静态基线始终产生更准确和行为基础的表征，在超过80%的数据集上达到竞争性或优越性能，改进幅度最高达135%。
AI.conclusion: TAI2Vec通过将时间邻近性直接整合到表示学习过程中，提供了一种用户自适应的轻量级嵌入方法，能够有效捕捉用户行为的丰富时间结构，区分短期和长期偏好演化。

title: Capability-Aware Heterogeneous Control Barrier Functions for Decentralized Multi-Robot Safe Navigation
summary: Safe navigation for multi-robot systems requires enforcing safety without sacrificing task efficiency under decentralized decision-making. Existing decentralized methods often assume robot homogeneity, making shared safety requirements non-uniformly interpreted across heterogeneous agents with structurally different dynamics, which could lead to avoidance obligations not physically realizable for some robots and thus cause safety violations or deadlock. In this paper, we propose Capability-Aware Heterogeneous Control Barrier Function (CA-HCBF), a decentralized framework for consistent safety enforcement and capability-aware coordination in heterogeneous robot teams. We derive a canonical second-order control-affine representation that unifies holonomic and nonholonomic robots under acceleration-level control via canonical transformation and backstepping, preserving forward invariance of the safe set while avoiding relative-degree mismatch across heterogeneous dynamics. We further introduce a support-function-based directional capability metric that quantifies each robot's ability to follow its motion intent, deriving a pairwise responsibility allocation that distributes the safety burden proportionally to each robot's motion capability. A feasibility-aware clipping mechanism further constrains the allocation to each agent's physically achievable range, mitigating infeasible constraint assignments common in dense decentralized CBF settings. Simulations with up to 30 heterogeneous robots and a physical multi-robot demonstration show improved safety and task efficiency over baselines, validating real-world applicability across robots with distinct kinematic constraints.

AI.tldr: 提出CA-HCBF框架，解决异构多机器人系统中安全导航问题，通过能力感知的责任分配确保安全约束的物理可实现性
AI.motivation: 现有去中心化方法通常假设机器人同质性，导致异构机器人对共享安全要求解释不一致，可能产生物理上无法实现的避障义务，从而引发安全违规或死锁
AI.method: 1) 推导规范二阶控制仿射表示，统一完整和非完整机器人在加速度级控制；2) 引入基于支撑函数的方向能力度量，量化机器人执行运动意图的能力；3) 提出成对责任分配机制，按运动能力比例分配安全负担；4) 设计可行性感知裁剪机制，将分配约束在物理可实现范围内
AI.result: 在多达30个异构机器人的仿真和物理多机器人演示中，相比基线方法显示出改进的安全性和任务效率，验证了跨不同运动约束机器人的实际适用性
AI.conclusion: CA-HCBF框架为异构机器人团队提供了一致的去中心化安全执行和能力感知协调，解决了异构动态系统中相对阶不匹配和物理不可行约束分配的问题

title: Reward Weighted Classifier-Free Guidance as Policy Improvement in Autoregressive Models
summary: Consider an auto-regressive model that produces outputs x (e.g., answers to questions, molecules) each of which can be summarized by an attribute vector y (e.g., helpfulness vs. harmlessness, or bio-availability vs. lipophilicity). An arbitrary reward function r(y) encodes tradeoffs between these properties. Typically, tilting the model's sampling distribution to increase this reward is done at training time via reinforcement learning. However, if the reward function changes, re-alignment requires re-training. In this paper, we show that a reward weighted classifier-free guidance (RCFG) can act as a policy improvement operator in this setting, approximating tilting the sampling distribution by the Q function. We apply RCFG to molecular generation, demonstrating that it can optimize novel reward functions at test time. Finally, we show that using RCFG as a teacher and distilling into the base policy to serve as a warm start significantly speeds up convergence for standard RL.

AI.tldr: 提出奖励加权分类器自由引导（RCFG）作为策略改进算子，可在测试时优化新奖励函数，无需重新训练模型
AI.motivation: 传统基于强化学习的对齐方法在奖励函数改变时需要重新训练，缺乏灵活性。需要一种能在测试时适应新奖励函数的方法。
AI.method: 提出奖励加权分类器自由引导（RCFG），将其作为策略改进算子，近似通过Q函数倾斜采样分布。应用于分子生成，并展示了RCFG作为教师蒸馏到基础策略可加速RL收敛。
AI.result: RCFG能够在测试时优化新颖的奖励函数，无需重新训练。使用RCFG作为教师并蒸馏到基础策略可显著加速标准强化学习的收敛。
AI.conclusion: RCFG提供了一种灵活的测试时对齐方法，可作为策略改进算子，并在分子生成等任务中展示了有效性，同时可作为强化学习的有效预热方法。

title: Unsupervised Skeleton-Based Action Segmentation via Hierarchical Spatiotemporal Vector Quantization
summary: We propose a novel hierarchical spatiotemporal vector quantization framework for unsupervised skeleton-based temporal action segmentation. We first introduce a hierarchical approach, which includes two consecutive levels of vector quantization. Specifically, the lower level associates skeletons with fine-grained subactions, while the higher level further aggregates subactions into action-level representations. Our hierarchical approach outperforms the non-hierarchical baseline, while primarily exploiting spatial cues by reconstructing input skeletons. Next, we extend our approach by leveraging both spatial and temporal information, yielding a hierarchical spatiotemporal vector quantization scheme. In particular, our hierarchical spatiotemporal approach performs multi-level clustering, while simultaneously recovering input skeletons and their corresponding timestamps. Lastly, extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks, including HuGaDB, LARa, and BABEL, demonstrate that our approach establishes a new state-of-the-art performance and reduces segment length bias in unsupervised skeleton-based temporal action segmentation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于无监督骨架时序动作分割的分层时空向量量化框架，通过两级向量量化分别处理细粒度子动作和动作级表示，在多个基准测试中达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督骨架时序动作分割方法存在局限性，需要同时利用空间和时间信息来提升分割性能并减少片段长度偏差。
AI.method: 提出分层时空向量量化框架：1）分层方法包含两级向量量化，底层将骨架关联到细粒度子动作，高层将子动作聚合为动作级表示；2）扩展为时空方法，同时利用空间和时间信息，进行多级聚类并同时重建输入骨架及其对应时间戳。
AI.result: 在HuGaDB、LARa和BABEL等多个基准测试上建立了新的最先进性能，减少了无监督骨架时序动作分割中的片段长度偏差。
AI.conclusion: 分层时空向量量化框架有效提升了无监督骨架时序动作分割性能，通过同时利用空间和时间信息，在多个数据集上达到SOTA并减少了分割偏差。

title: 4th Workshop on Maritime Computer Vision (MaCVi): Challenge Overview
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026 Workshop Proceeding; Maritime Computer Vision Workshop
summary: The 4th Workshop on Maritime Computer Vision (MaCVi) is organized as part of CVPR 2026. This edition features five benchmark challenges with emphasis on both predictive accuracy and embedded real-time feasibility. This report summarizes the MaCVi 2026 challenge setup, evaluation protocols, datasets, and benchmark tracks, and presents quantitative results, qualitative comparisons, and cross-challenge analyses of emerging method trends. We also include technical reports from top-performing teams to highlight practical design choices and lessons learned across the benchmark suite. Datasets, leaderboards, and challenge resources are available at https://macvi.org/workshop/cvpr26.

AI.tldr: CVPR 2026海事计算机视觉研讨会报告，包含五个基准挑战，强调预测精度和嵌入式实时可行性，提供数据集、评估协议和性能分析
AI.motivation: 推动海事计算机视觉领域发展，通过基准挑战促进算法在预测精度和实时嵌入式系统可行性方面的进步，为实际海事应用提供实用解决方案
AI.method: 组织五个基准挑战，建立标准化数据集和评估协议，收集参赛团队技术方案，进行定量结果分析、定性比较和跨挑战趋势分析
AI.result: 提供了完整的挑战设置、数据集、评估协议和基准赛道信息，展示了各挑战的定量性能结果、定性比较以及新兴方法趋势的跨挑战分析
AI.conclusion: MaCVi 2026成功建立了海事计算机视觉的基准测试框架，通过多挑战设置推动了算法在精度和实时性方面的平衡发展，为实际海事应用提供了有价值的参考

title: Why Fine-Tuning Encourages Hallucinations and How to Fix It
summary: Large language models are prone to hallucinating factually incorrect statements. A key source of these errors is exposure to new factual information through supervised fine-tuning (SFT), which can increase hallucinations w.r.t. knowledge acquired during pre-training. In this work, we explore whether SFT-induced hallucinations can be mitigated using established tools from the continual learning literature, since they arise as a by-product of knowledge degradation during training. We propose a self-distillation-based SFT method that facilitates effective factual learning while minimizing hallucinations w.r.t. pre-existing knowledge by regularizing output-distribution drift. We also show that, in settings where new knowledge acquisition is unnecessary, suppressing factual plasticity by freezing parameter groups, can preserve task performance while reducing hallucinations. Lastly, we investigate the mechanism behind SFT-induced hallucinations through three hypotheses: capacity limitations, behavior cloning, and localized interference. Our experiments show that a main driver is interference among overlapping semantic representations, and that self-distillation succeeds by mitigating this interference.

AI.tldr: 论文提出使用持续学习工具缓解SFT导致的幻觉问题，通过自蒸馏方法减少输出分布漂移，并探索了幻觉机制
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在监督微调(SFT)过程中容易产生事实性幻觉，这是因为新事实信息的引入可能导致预训练知识的退化。作者希望借鉴持续学习领域的工具来缓解这一问题
AI.method: 提出基于自蒸馏的SFT方法，通过正则化输出分布漂移来促进有效的事实学习同时减少幻觉；在不需要获取新知识的场景中，通过冻结参数组来抑制事实可塑性；探索了三种幻觉机制假设：容量限制、行为克隆和局部干扰
AI.result: 实验表明SFT诱导幻觉的主要驱动因素是重叠语义表征之间的干扰，而自蒸馏方法通过减轻这种干扰取得成功；冻结参数组的方法在保持任务性能的同时减少了幻觉
AI.conclusion: SFT导致的幻觉可以通过持续学习工具有效缓解，特别是通过自蒸馏方法减轻语义表征干扰；理解幻觉机制有助于开发更有效的缓解策略

title: VisPCO: Visual Token Pruning Configuration Optimization via Budget-Aware Pareto-Frontier Learning for Vision-Language Models
summary: Visual token pruning methods effectively mitigate the quadratic computational growth caused by processing high-resolution images and video frames in vision-language models (VLMs). However, existing approaches rely on predefined pruning configurations without determining whether they achieve computation-performance optimality. In this work, we introduce , a novel framework that formulates visual token pruning as a Pareto configuration optimization problem to automatically identify optimal configurations. Our approach employs continuous relaxation and straight-through estimators to enable gradient-based search, solved via the Augmented Lagrangian method. Extensive experiments across 8 visual benchmarks demonstrate that effectively approximates the empirical Pareto frontier obtained through grid search and generalizes well across various pruning methods and VLM architectures. Furthermore, through learnable kernel functions, we investigate layer-wise pruning patterns and reveal that multi-step progressive pruning captures VLMs' hierarchical compression structure, achieving superior accuracy-efficiency trade-offs compared to single-layer approaches.

AI.tldr: 提出AutoToken框架，将视觉token剪枝建模为帕累托配置优化问题，自动寻找计算-性能最优配置，通过连续松弛和直通估计器实现梯度搜索，在8个视觉基准上验证有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉token剪枝方法依赖预定义配置，无法保证达到计算-性能最优平衡，需要自动化的配置优化框架。
AI.method: 将视觉token剪枝建模为帕累托配置优化问题，采用连续松弛和直通估计器实现梯度搜索，使用增广拉格朗日法求解，并通过可学习核函数研究分层剪枝模式。
AI.result: 在8个视觉基准上验证，AutoToken能有效逼近网格搜索得到的经验帕累托前沿，在不同剪枝方法和VLM架构上泛化良好，多步渐进剪枝比单层方法获得更优的精度-效率权衡。
AI.conclusion: AutoToken框架能自动优化视觉token剪枝配置，揭示多步渐进剪枝能捕捉VLM的层次压缩结构，为视觉语言模型的高效部署提供有效解决方案。

title: Weakly-supervised Learning for Physics-informed Neural Motion Planning via Sparse Roadmap
summary: The motion planning problem requires finding a collision-free path between start and goal configurations in high-dimensional, cluttered spaces. Recent learning-based methods offer promising solutions, with self-supervised physics-informed approaches such as Neural Time Fields (NTFields) solving the Eikonal equation to learn value functions without expert demonstrations. However, existing physics-informed methods struggle to scale in complex, multi-room environments, where simply increasing the number of samples cannot resolve local minima or guarantee global consistency. We propose Hierarchical Neural Time Fields (H-NTFields), a weakly-supervised framework that combines weak supervision from sparse roadmaps with physics-informed PDE regularization. The roadmap provides global topological anchors through upper and lower bounds on travel times, while PDE losses enforce local geometric fidelity and obstacle-aware propagation. Experiments on 18 Gibson environments and real robotic platforms show that H-NTFields substantially improves robustness over prior physics-informed methods, while enabling fast amortized inference through a continuous value representation.

AI.tldr: 提出H-NTFields框架，结合稀疏路线图的弱监督与物理信息PDE正则化，解决复杂多房间环境中现有物理信息方法难以扩展的问题
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的运动规划方法（如NTFields）通过求解Eikonal方程学习值函数，无需专家演示。但在复杂多房间环境中，现有物理信息方法难以扩展，仅增加采样数量无法解决局部极小值或保证全局一致性
AI.method: 提出分层神经时间场（H-NTFields），弱监督框架结合稀疏路线图的弱监督与物理信息PDE正则化。路线图通过旅行时间的上下界提供全局拓扑锚点，PDE损失强制局部几何保真度和障碍物感知传播
AI.result: 在18个Gibson环境和真实机器人平台上实验表明，H-NTFields相比先前物理信息方法显著提高了鲁棒性，同时通过连续值表示实现快速摊销推理
AI.conclusion: H-NTFields通过结合全局拓扑引导与局部物理约束，有效解决了复杂环境中物理信息运动规划方法的扩展性问题，实现了更鲁棒和高效的路径规划

title: Boundary-Centric Active Learning for Temporal Action Segmentation
summary: Temporal action segmentation (TAS) demands dense temporal supervision, yet most of the annotation cost in untrimmed videos is spent identifying and refining action transitions, where segmentation errors concentrate and small temporal shifts disproportionately degrade segmental metrics. We introduce B-ACT, a clip-budgeted active learning framework that explicitly allocates supervision to these high-leverage boundary regions. B-ACT operates in a hierarchical two-stage loop: (i) it ranks and queries unlabeled videos using predictive uncertainty, and (ii) within each selected video, it detects candidate transitions from the current model predictions and selects the top-$K$ boundaries via a novel boundary score that fuses neighborhood uncertainty, class ambiguity, and temporal predictive dynamics. Importantly, our annotation protocol requests labels for only the boundary frames while still training on boundary-centered clips to exploit temporal context through the model's receptive field. Extensive experiments on GTEA, 50Salads, and Breakfast demonstrate that boundary-centric supervision delivers strong label efficiency and consistently surpasses representative TAS active learning baselines and prior state of the art under sparse budgets, with the largest gains on datasets where boundary placement dominates edit and overlap-based F1 scores.

AI.tldr: B-ACT：一种面向边界区域的主动学习框架，通过分层两阶段循环，在预算有限的情况下，优先标注动作边界帧以提升时间动作分割的标签效率。
AI.motivation: 时间动作分割需要密集的时间标注，但大部分标注成本都花费在识别和细化动作边界上，这些区域是分割错误的主要集中点，且微小的时间偏移会显著降低分割指标性能。
AI.method: 提出B-ACT框架，采用分层两阶段循环：1）基于预测不确定性对未标注视频进行排序和查询；2）在选定的视频中，从当前模型预测中检测候选边界，并通过融合邻域不确定性、类别模糊性和时间预测动态的新边界评分选择top-K边界。标注协议仅请求边界帧的标签，但仍使用边界为中心的剪辑进行训练以利用时间上下文。
AI.result: 在GTEA、50Salads和Breakfast数据集上的广泛实验表明，边界中心监督在稀疏预算下实现了强大的标签效率，并持续超越代表性的时间动作分割主动学习基线和先前的最先进方法，在边界放置主导编辑和基于重叠的F1分数的数据集上获得最大增益。
AI.conclusion: B-ACT框架通过明确将监督分配到高影响力的边界区域，显著提高了时间动作分割的标签效率，为减少密集时间标注成本提供了有效解决方案。

title: Synthesis and Deployment of Maximal Robust Control Barrier Functions through Adversarial Reinforcement Learning
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Robust control barrier functions (CBFs) provide a principled mechanism for smooth safety enforcement under worst-case disturbances. However, existing approaches typically rely on explicit, closed-form structure in the dynamics (e.g., control-affine) and uncertainty models. This has led to limited scalability and generality, with most robust CBFs certifying only conservative subsets of the maximal robust safe set. In this paper, we introduce a new robust CBF framework for general nonlinear systems under bounded uncertainty. We first show that the safety value function solving the dynamic programming Isaacs equation is a valid robust discrete-time CBF that enforces safety on the maximal robust safe set. We then adopt the key reinforcement learning (RL) notion of quality function (or Q-function), which removes the need for explicit dynamics by lifting the barrier certificate into state-action space and yields a novel robust Q-CBF constraint for safety filtering. Combined with adversarial RL, this enables the synthesis and deployment of robust Q-CBFs on general nonlinear systems with black-box dynamics and unknown uncertainty structure. We validate the framework on a canonical inverted pendulum benchmark and a 36-D quadruped simulator, achieving substantially less conservative safe sets than barrier-based baselines on the pendulum and reliable safety enforcement even under adversarial uncertainty realizations on the quadruped.

AI.tldr: 提出基于强化学习的鲁棒控制屏障函数框架，通过Q函数在状态-动作空间构建安全约束，无需显式动力学模型，适用于一般非线性系统
AI.motivation: 现有鲁棒CBF方法依赖显式动力学结构（如控制仿射）和不确定性模型，导致可扩展性和通用性有限，只能保证保守的安全子集
AI.method: 1) 证明求解动态规划Isaacs方程的安全值函数是有效的鲁棒离散时间CBF；2) 引入强化学习中的Q函数概念，将屏障证书提升到状态-动作空间，提出鲁棒Q-CBF约束；3) 结合对抗强化学习，在未知动力学和不确定性结构的黑盒系统中合成和部署鲁棒Q-CBF
AI.result: 在倒立摆基准测试中获得了比基于屏障的基线方法更不保守的安全集；在36自由度四足机器人模拟器中，即使面对对抗性不确定性实现也能可靠执行安全约束
AI.conclusion: 提出的鲁棒Q-CBF框架为一般非线性系统提供了可扩展、通用的安全保证方法，无需显式动力学模型，能够实现接近最大鲁棒安全集的安全控制

title: Learning Versatile Humanoid Manipulation with Touch Dreaming
summary: Humanoid robots promise general-purpose assistance, yet real-world humanoid loco-manipulation remains challenging because it requires whole-body stability, dexterous hands, and contact-aware perception under frequent contact changes. In this work, we study dexterous, contact-rich humanoid loco-manipulation. We first develop an RL-based whole-body controller that provides stable lower-body and torso execution during complex manipulation. Built on this controller, we develop a whole-body humanoid data collection system that combines VR-based teleoperation with human-to-humanoid motion mapping, enabling efficient collection of real-world demonstrations. We then propose Humanoid Transformer with Touch Dreaming (HTD), a multimodal encoder--decoder Transformer that models touch as a core modality alongside multi-view vision and proprioception. HTD is trained in a single stage with behavioral cloning augmented by touch dreaming: in addition to predicting action chunks, the policy predicts future hand-joint forces and future tactile latents, encouraging the shared Transformer trunk to learn contact-aware representations for dexterous interaction. Across five contact-rich tasks, Insert-T, Book Organization, Towel Folding, Cat Litter Scooping, and Tea Serving, HTD achieves a 90.9% relative improvement in average success rate over the stronger baseline. Ablation results further show that latent-space tactile prediction is more effective than raw tactile prediction, yielding a 30% relative gain in success rate. These results demonstrate that combining robust whole-body execution, scalable humanoid data collection, and predictive touch-centered learning enables versatile, high-dexterity humanoid manipulation in the real world. Project webpage: humanoid-touch-dream.github.io.

AI.tldr: HTD：一种用于人形机器人灵巧接触操作的多模态Transformer方法，结合触觉预测和全身控制
AI.motivation: 解决人形机器人在真实世界中进行灵巧接触操作（loco-manipulation）的挑战，需要同时保证全身稳定性、灵巧手部操作和接触感知能力
AI.method: 1. 开发基于强化学习的全身控制器确保稳定执行；2. 构建结合VR遥操作和人体-人形运动映射的数据收集系统；3. 提出HTD模型，将触觉作为核心模态与多视角视觉、本体感知一起建模，通过行为克隆和"触觉梦境"（预测未来手部关节力和触觉潜在表示）进行训练
AI.result: 在五个接触丰富的任务中，HTD相比最强基线平均成功率相对提升90.9%；潜在空间触觉预测比原始触觉预测效果更好，带来30%的相对成功率提升
AI.conclusion: 结合稳健的全身执行、可扩展的人形数据收集和预测性触觉中心学习，能够在真实世界中实现多功能、高灵巧性的人形机器人操作

title: Predicting Where Steering Vectors Succeed
comment: 19 pages, incl. 10 appendix pages, 4 figures, 20 tables
summary: Steering vectors work for some concepts and layers but fail for others, and practitioners have no way to predict which setting applies before running an intervention. We introduce the Linear Accessibility Profile (LAP), a per-layer diagnostic that repurposes the logit lens as a predictor of steering vector effectiveness. The key measure, $A_{\mathrm{lin}}$, applies the model's unembedding matrix to intermediate hidden states, requiring no training. Across 24 controlled binary concept families on five models (Pythia-2.8B to Llama-8B), peak $A_{\mathrm{lin}}$ predicts steering effectiveness at $ρ= +0.86$ to $+0.91$ and layer selection at $ρ= +0.63$ to $+0.92$. A three-regime framework explains when difference-of-means steering works, when nonlinear methods are needed, and when no method can work. An entity-steering demo confirms the prediction end-to-end: steering at the LAP-recommended layer redirects completions on Gemma-2-2B and OLMo-2-1B-Instruct, while the middle layer (the standard heuristic) has no effect on either model.

AI.tldr: 提出线性可访问性剖面（LAP）作为预测steering vector有效性的诊断工具，无需训练即可评估不同层对概念的可控性
AI.motivation: 现有的steering vector方法在不同概念和模型层上的效果不一致，且缺乏预测其有效性的方法，导致实践者无法提前判断干预效果
AI.method: 使用线性可访问性剖面（LAP），通过应用模型的unembedding矩阵到中间隐藏状态来计算$A_{\mathrm{lin}}$指标，无需训练即可评估每个层对概念的可控性
AI.result: 在5个模型（Pythia-2.8B到Llama-8B）的24个二元概念家族上，峰值$A_{\mathrm{lin}}$能有效预测steering效果（ρ=+0.86到+0.91）和层选择（ρ=+0.63到+0.92），并建立了三阶段框架解释不同情况
AI.conclusion: LAP提供了一种无需训练的预测工具，能准确指导steering vector的层选择，显著优于传统的中层启发式方法，为概念控制提供了理论框架和实践指导

title: OmniLight: One Model to Rule All Lighting Conditions
comment: CVPRW 2026; NTIRE 2026 Image Shadow Removal & Ambient Lighting Normalization Challenges (1st Perceptual Rank for White Lighting, 2nd Fidelity Rank & 4th Perceptual Rank for Color Lighting)
summary: Adverse lighting conditions, such as cast shadows and irregular illumination, pose significant challenges to computer vision systems by degrading visibility and color fidelity. Consequently, effective shadow removal and ALN are critical for restoring underlying image content, improving perceptual quality, and facilitating robust performance in downstream tasks. However, while achieving state-of-the-art results on specific benchmarks is a primary goal in image restoration challenges, real-world applications often demand robust models capable of handling diverse domains. To address this, we present a comprehensive study on lighting-related image restoration by exploring two contrasting strategies. We leverage a robust framework for ALN, DINOLight, as a specialized baseline to exploit the characteristics of each individual dataset, and extend it to OmniLight, a generalized alternative incorporating our proposed Wavelet Domain Mixture-of-Experts (WD-MoE) that is trained across all provided datasets. Through a comparative analysis of these two methods, we discuss the impact of data distribution on the performance of specialized and unified architectures in lighting-related image restoration. Notably, both approaches secured top-tier rankings across all three lighting-related tracks in the NTIRE 2026 Challenge, demonstrating their outstanding perceptual quality and generalization capabilities. Our codes are available at https://github.com/OBAKSA/Lighting-Restoration.

AI.tldr: 该论文针对光照相关图像修复问题，提出了两种对比策略：基于DINOLight的专用架构和基于WD-MoE的通用架构OmniLight，在NTIRE 2026挑战赛中均取得顶级排名。
AI.motivation: 不良光照条件（如阴影和不规则照明）会降低计算机视觉系统的可见度和色彩保真度。虽然特定基准测试的SOTA结果是图像修复的主要目标，但实际应用需要能够处理多样化领域的鲁棒模型。
AI.method: 提出两种对比策略：1）利用DINOLight作为专用基线，针对每个数据集特性进行优化；2）扩展为OmniLight通用架构，引入提出的小波域专家混合（WD-MoE）模块，在所有数据集上进行训练。
AI.result: 两种方法在NTIRE 2026挑战赛的所有三个光照相关赛道中均获得顶级排名，展示了出色的感知质量和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过对比专用和统一架构，探讨了数据分布对光照相关图像修复性能的影响，证明了两种策略在特定基准和实际应用中的有效性。

title: Subliminal Transfer of Unsafe Behaviors in AI Agent Distillation
summary: Recent work on subliminal learning demonstrates that language models can transmit semantic traits through data that is semantically unrelated to those traits. However, it remains unclear whether behavioral traits can transfer in agentic systems, where policies are learned from trajectories rather than static text. In this work, we provide the first empirical evidence that unsafe agent behaviors can transfer subliminally through model distillation across two complementary experimental settings. In our primary setting, we construct a teacher agent exhibiting a strong deletion bias, a tendency to perform destructive file-system actions via an API-style tool interface, and distill it into a student using only trajectories from ostensibly safe tasks, with all explicit deletion keywords rigorously filtered. In our secondary setting, we replicate the threat model in a native Bash environment, replacing API tool calls with shell commands and operationalizing the bias as a preference for issuing chmod as the first permission-related command over semantically equivalent alternatives such as chown or setfacl. Despite full keyword sanitation in both settings, students inherit measurable behavioral biases. In the API setting the student's deletion rate reaches 100% (versus a 5% baseline) under homogeneous distillation; in the Bash setting the student's chmod-first rate reaches 30%-55% (versus a 0%-10% baseline), with the strongest transfer observed in large-to-small distillation. Our results demonstrate that explicit data sanitation is an insufficient defense, and behavioral biases are encoded implicitly in trajectory dynamics regardless of the tool interface.

AI.tldr: 研究表明，在智能体系统中，不安全的行为特征可以通过模型蒸馏进行潜意识传递，即使训练数据经过严格的关键词过滤。
AI.motivation: 虽然已有研究表明语言模型可以通过语义无关的数据传递语义特征，但在智能体系统中，从轨迹而非静态文本学习策略时，行为特征是否能够转移尚不清楚。本研究旨在探索不安全智能体行为是否可以通过模型蒸馏进行潜意识传递。
AI.method: 采用两种互补的实验设置：1) API工具接口设置：构建具有强烈删除偏见的教师智能体，使用经过严格过滤删除关键词的看似安全任务轨迹进行蒸馏；2) Bash环境设置：在原生Bash环境中复制威胁模型，将API工具调用替换为shell命令，将偏见操作化为偏好使用chmod作为第一个权限相关命令。
AI.result: 尽管两种设置都进行了完整的关键词净化，学生智能体仍继承了可测量的行为偏见。在API设置中，学生的删除率达到100%（基线为5%）；在Bash设置中，学生的chmod优先率达到30%-55%（基线为0%-10%），在大到小蒸馏中观察到最强的传递效果。
AI.conclusion: 显式数据净化不足以防御行为偏见的传递，行为偏见无论工具接口如何，都会隐含地编码在轨迹动态中。这揭示了智能体系统中潜在的安全风险。

title: XRZero-G0: Pushing the Frontier of Dexterous Robotic Manipulation with Interfaces, Quality and Ratios
summary: The acquisition of high-quality, action-aligned demonstration data remains a fundamental bottleneck in scaling foundation models for dexterous robot manipulation. Although robot-free human demonstrations (e.g., the UMI paradigm) offer a scalable alternative to traditional teleoperation, current systems are constrained by sub-optimal hardware ergonomics, open-loop workflows, and a lack of systematic data-mixing strategies. To address these limitations, we present XRZero-G0, a hardware-software co-designed system for embodied data collection and policy learning. The system features an ergonomic, virtual reality interface equipped with a top-view camera and dual specialized grippers to directly improve collection efficiency. To ensure dataset reliability, we propose a closed-loop collection, inspection, training, and evaluation pipeline for non-proprioceptive data. This workflow achieves an 85% data validity rate and establishes a transparent mechanism for quality control. Furthermore, we investigate the empirical scaling behaviors and optimal mixing ratios of robot-free data. Extensive experiments indicate that combining a minimal volume of real-robot data with large-scale robot-free data (e.g., a 10:1 ratio) achieves performance comparable to exclusively real-robot datasets, while reducing acquisition costs by a factor of twenty. Utilizing XRZero-G0, we construct a 2,000-hour robot-free dataset that enables zero-shot cross-embodiment transfer to a target physical robot, demonstrating a highly scalable methodology for generalized real-world manipulation.Our project repository: https://github.com/X-Square-Robot/XRZero-G0

AI.tldr: XRZero-G0是一个硬件软件协同设计的系统，用于解决灵巧机器人操作中高质量演示数据获取的瓶颈问题，通过VR接口、闭环数据收集流程和最优数据混合策略，实现低成本、大规模的数据收集和跨具身零样本迁移。
AI.motivation: 当前机器人操作基础模型面临高质量、动作对齐演示数据的获取瓶颈。虽然机器人无关的人类演示（如UMI范式）提供了比传统遥操作更可扩展的替代方案，但现有系统受到硬件人机工程学不佳、开环工作流程和缺乏系统性数据混合策略的限制。
AI.method: 提出XRZero-G0系统，包含：1）配备顶视摄像头和双专用夹爪的人机工程学VR接口，提高收集效率；2）用于非本体感知数据的闭环收集、检查、训练和评估流程；3）研究机器人无关数据的经验扩展行为和最优混合比例。
AI.result: 系统实现了85%的数据有效性率，建立了透明的质量控制机制。实验表明，将少量真实机器人数据与大规模机器人无关数据以10:1比例混合，能达到与纯真实机器人数据集相当的性能，同时将获取成本降低20倍。构建了2000小时的机器人无关数据集，实现了到目标物理机器人的零样本跨具身迁移。
AI.conclusion: XRZero-G0提供了一种高度可扩展的方法论，通过硬件软件协同设计、闭环质量控制流程和最优数据混合策略，显著降低了高质量机器人操作数据的获取成本，为实现通用真实世界操作奠定了基础。

title: Preregistered Belief Revision Contracts
summary: Deliberative multi-agent systems allow agents to exchange messages and revise beliefs over time. While this interaction is meant to improve performance, it can also create dangerous conformity effects: agreement, confidence, prestige, or majority size may be treated as if they were evidence, producing high-confidence convergence to false conclusions. To address this, we introduce PBRC (Preregistered Belief Revision Contracts), a protocol-level mechanism that strictly separates open communication from admissible epistemic change. A PBRC contract publicly fixes first-order evidence triggers, admissible revision operators, a priority rule, and a fallback policy. A non-fallback step is accepted only when it cites a preregistered trigger and provides a nonempty witness set of externally validated evidence tokens. This ensures that every substantive belief change is both enforceable by a router and auditable after the fact. In this paper, (a) we prove that under evidential contracts with conservative fallback, social-only rounds cannot increase confidence and cannot generate purely conformity-driven wrong-but-sure cascades. (b) We show that auditable trigger protocols admit evidential PBRC normal forms that preserve belief trajectories and canonicalized audit traces. (c) We demonstrate that sound enforcement yields epistemic accountability: any change of top hypothesis is attributable to a concrete validated witness set. For token-invariant contracts, (d) we prove that enforced trajectories depend only on token-exposure traces; under flooding dissemination, these traces are characterized exactly by truncated reachability, giving tight diameter bounds for universal evidence closure. Finally, we introduce a companion contractual dynamic doxastic logic to specify trace invariants, and provide simulations illustrating cascade suppression, auditability, and robustness-liveness trade-offs.

AI.tldr: PBRC协议通过预注册证据触发器和见证集机制，分离开放通信与认知更新，防止多智能体系统中因社会影响导致的错误共识级联
AI.motivation: 解决多智能体系统中社会影响（如一致性、置信度、声望或多数规模）被误当作证据，导致高置信度收敛到错误结论的危险从众效应问题
AI.method: 引入PBRC（预注册信念修订合约）协议机制，公开固定一阶证据触发器、可接受的修订算子、优先级规则和回退策略，要求非回退步骤必须引用预注册触发器并提供非空的外部验证证据令牌见证集
AI.result: 证明在保守回退的证据合约下，纯社会性轮次不能增加置信度且不能产生纯从众驱动的错误级联；可审计触发器协议允许保留信念轨迹和规范化审计追踪的PBRC范式；强制执行产生认知可问责性
AI.conclusion: PBRC协议通过分离通信与认知更新、强制证据见证集机制，有效抑制从众级联、提供审计追踪和认知可问责性，为多智能体系统提供稳健的信念更新框架

title: RMGS-SLAM: Real-time Multi-sensor Gaussian Splatting SLAM
summary: Real-time 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS)-based Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) in large-scale real-world environments remains challenging, as existing methods often struggle to jointly achieve low-latency pose estimation, 3D Gaussian reconstruction in step with incoming sensor streams, and long-term global consistency. In this paper, we present a tightly coupled LiDAR-Inertial-Visual (LIV) 3DGS-based SLAM framework for real-time pose estimation and photorealistic mapping in large-scale real-world scenes. The system executes state estimation and 3D Gaussian primitive initialization in parallel with global Gaussian optimization, thereby enabling continuous dense mapping. To improve Gaussian initialization quality and accelerate optimization convergence, we introduce a cascaded strategy that combines feed-forward predictions with voxel-based principal component analysis (voxel-PCA) geometric priors. To enhance global consistency in large scenes, we further perform loop closure directly on the optimized global Gaussian map by estimating loop constraints through Gaussian-based Generalized Iterative Closest Point (GICP) registration, followed by pose-graph optimization. In addition, we collected challenging large-scale looped outdoor SLAM sequences with hardware-synchronized LiDAR-camera-IMU and ground-truth trajectories to support realistic and comprehensive evaluation. Extensive experiments on both public datasets and our dataset demonstrate that the proposed method achieves a strong balance among real-time efficiency, localization accuracy, and rendering quality across diverse and challenging real-world scenes.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种紧耦合的LiDAR-惯性-视觉3D高斯溅射SLAM框架，用于大规模真实场景的实时位姿估计和逼真建图，通过并行处理、级联初始化策略和基于高斯地图的闭环检测实现高效、准确和全局一致的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D高斯溅射SLAM方法在大规模真实场景中难以同时实现低延迟位姿估计、与传感器流同步的3D高斯重建以及长期全局一致性，需要一种能够平衡实时性、定位精度和渲染质量的解决方案。
AI.method: 1) 并行执行状态估计和3D高斯基元初始化与全局高斯优化；2) 采用级联策略结合前馈预测和基于体素的主成分分析几何先验来提升初始化质量和加速优化收敛；3) 通过基于高斯地图的广义迭代最近点配准估计闭环约束，然后进行位姿图优化来增强全局一致性。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和自建的大规模户外闭环SLAM序列上进行了广泛实验，结果表明该方法在多样化和具有挑战性的真实场景中实现了实时效率、定位精度和渲染质量之间的良好平衡。
AI.conclusion: 提出的紧耦合LiDAR-惯性-视觉3D高斯溅射SLAM框架能够在大规模真实世界环境中实现实时位姿估计和逼真建图，通过并行处理、级联初始化策略和基于高斯地图的闭环检测有效解决了现有方法的局限性。

title: DINO-Explorer: Active Underwater Discovery via Ego-Motion Compensated Semantic Predictive Coding
summary: Marine ecosystem degradation necessitates continuous, scientifically selective underwater monitoring. However, most autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) operate as passive data loggers, capturing exhaustive video for offline review and frequently missing transient events of high scientific value. Transitioning to active perception requires a causal, online signal that highlights significant phenomena while suppressing maneuver-induced visual changes. We propose DINO-Explorer, a novelty-aware perception framework driven by a continuous semantic surprise signal. Operating within the latent space of a frozen DINOv3 foundation model, it leverages a lightweight, action-conditioned recurrent predictor to anticipate short-horizon semantic evolution. An efference-copy-inspired module utilizes globally pooled optical flow to discount self-induced visual changes without suppressing genuine environmental novelty. We evaluate this signal on the downstream task of asynchronous event triage under variant telemetry constraints. Results demonstrate that DINO-Explorer provides a robust, bandwidth-efficient attention mechanism. At a fixed operating point, the system retains 78.8% of post-discovery human-reviewer consensus events with a 56.8% trigger confirmation rate, effectively surfacing mission-relevant phenomena. Crucially, ego-motion conditioning suppresses 45.5% of false positives relative to an uncompensated surprise signal baseline. In a replay-side Pareto ablation study, DINO-Explorer robustly dominates the validated peak F1 versus telemetry bandwidth frontier, reducing telemetry bandwidth by 48.2% at the selected operating point while maintaining a 62.2% peak F1 score, successfully concentrating data transmission around human-verified novelty events.

AI.tldr: DINO-Explorer：基于语义惊奇信号的水下主动感知框架，利用冻结的DINOv3基础模型和动作条件递归预测器，通过前馈副本机制抑制自诱导视觉变化，实现带宽高效的异步事件筛选。
AI.motivation: 海洋生态系统退化需要连续、科学选择的水下监测。现有自主水下航行器大多作为被动数据记录器，捕获大量视频进行离线审查，经常错过具有高科学价值的瞬态事件。需要转向主动感知，需要因果在线信号来突出显著现象，同时抑制机动引起的视觉变化。
AI.method: 提出DINO-Explorer新颖性感知感知框架，基于连续语义惊奇信号。在冻结的DINOv3基础模型的潜在空间中操作，利用轻量级动作条件递归预测器预测短期语义演化。采用前馈副本启发模块，利用全局池化光流来抵消自诱导视觉变化而不抑制真实环境新颖性。在下游异步事件筛选任务中评估该信号。
AI.result: 在固定操作点，系统保留了78.8%的后发现人类审查共识事件，触发确认率为56.8%。自我运动条件抑制了45.5%的假阳性（相对于未补偿惊奇信号基线）。在回放侧帕累托消融研究中，DINO-Explorer稳健地主导了验证的峰值F1与遥测带宽前沿，在选定操作点将遥测带宽减少48.2%，同时保持62.2%的峰值F1分数，成功将数据传输集中在人类验证的新颖性事件周围。
AI.conclusion: DINO-Explorer提供了稳健、带宽高效的注意力机制，能够有效突出任务相关现象，通过自我运动补偿显著减少假阳性，在保持高事件检测率的同时大幅降低遥测带宽需求，实现了从被动数据记录到主动感知的转变。

title: How to Correctly Make Mistakes: A Framework for Constructing and Benchmarking Mistake Aware Egocentric Procedural Videos
summary: Reliable procedural monitoring in video requires exposure to naturally occurring human errors and the recoveries that follow. In egocentric recordings, mistakes are often partially occluded by hands and revealed through subtle object state changes, while existing procedural datasets provide limited and inconsistent mistake and correction traces. We present PIE-V (Psychologically Inspired Error injection for Videos), a framework for constructing and benchmarking mistake-aware egocentric procedural videos by augmenting clean keystep procedures with controlled, human-plausible deviations. PIE-V combines a psychology-informed error planner conditioned on procedure phase and semantic step load, a correction planner that models recovery behavior, an LLM writer that performs cascade-consistent rewrites, and an LLM judge that validates procedural coherence and repairs failures. For video segment edits, PIE-V synthesizes replacement clips with text-guided video generation and stitches them into the episode to preserve visual plausibility. Applied to 17 tasks and 50 Ego-Exo4D scenarios, PIE-V injects 102 mistakes and generates 27 recovery corrections. For benchmarking, we introduce a unified taxonomy and a human rubric with nine metrics that cover step-level and procedure-level quality, including plausibility, procedure logic with annotator confidence, state change coherence, and grounding between text and video. Using this protocol, we audit several existing resources and compare PIE-V against a freeform LLM generation baseline under the same criteria. Together, the framework and rubric support post-completion verification for egocentric procedural mistake detection and correction.

AI.tldr: PIE-V框架通过心理学启发的错误注入和修正规划，在自我中心视角程序视频中生成可控、人类可信的错误和恢复行为，用于程序监控的基准测试。
AI.motivation: 视频中的可靠程序监控需要暴露自然发生的人为错误及其恢复过程。现有程序数据集提供的错误和修正轨迹有限且不一致，而自我中心视角记录中的错误常被手部遮挡，仅通过细微物体状态变化显现。
AI.method: PIE-V框架包含：1) 基于程序阶段和语义步骤负载的心理学启发错误规划器；2) 建模恢复行为的修正规划器；3) 执行级联一致重写的LLM编写器；4) 验证程序连贯性并修复失败的LLM评判器。视频编辑方面，使用文本引导视频生成合成替换片段并缝合到原视频中。
AI.result: 应用于17个任务和50个Ego-Exo4D场景，注入了102个错误并生成27个恢复修正。建立了统一分类法和包含9个指标的人类评估标准，涵盖步骤级和程序级质量。通过该协议审计现有资源，并与自由形式LLM生成基线进行比较。
AI.conclusion: PIE-V框架和评估标准共同支持自我中心视角程序错误检测和修正的事后验证，为程序监控研究提供了系统化的错误注入和评估方法。

title: Consistency Analysis of Sentiment Predictions using Syntactic & Semantic Context Assessment Summarization (SSAS)
comment: 27 pages, 2 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2604.12049
summary:
The fundamental challenge of using Large Language Models (LLMs) for reliable, enterprise-grade analytics, such as sentiment prediction, is the conflict between the LLMs' inherent stochasticity (generative, non-deterministic nature) and the analytical requirement for consistency. The LLM inconsistency, coupled with the noisy nature of chaotic modern datasets, renders sentiment predictions too volatile for strategic business decisions. To resolve this, we present a Syntactic & Semantic Context Assessment Summarization (SSAS) framework for establishing context. Context established by SSAS functions as a sophisticated data pre-processing framework that enforces a bounded attention mechanism on LLMs. It achieves this by applying a hierarchical classification structure (Themes, Stories, Clusters) and an iterative Summary-of-Summaries (SoS) based context computation architecture. This endows the raw text with high-signal, sentiment-dense prompts, that effectively mitigate both irrelevant data and analytical variance.
  We empirically evaluated the efficacy of SSAS, using Gemini 2.0 Flash Lite, against a direct-LLM approach across three industry-standard datasets - Amazon Product Reviews, Google Business Reviews, Goodreads Book Reviews - and multiple robustness scenarios. Our results show that our SSAS framework is capable of significantly improving data quality, up to 30%, through a combination of noise removal and improvement in the estimation of sentiment prediction. Ultimately, consistency in our context-estimation capabilities provides a stable and reliable evidence base for decision-making.

AI.tldr: SSAS框架通过语法语义上下文评估摘要技术，解决LLM在情感预测中的随机性与企业级分析需求一致性之间的矛盾，通过分层分类和迭代摘要架构提升数据质量和预测稳定性。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLM）固有的随机性（生成性、非确定性）与企业级分析（如情感预测）对一致性的需求之间存在根本冲突。LLM的不一致性加上现代数据集的噪声特性，导致情感预测过于波动，无法支持战略业务决策。
AI.method: 提出SSAS（语法语义上下文评估摘要）框架，通过分层分类结构（主题、故事、聚类）和迭代的摘要之摘要（SoS）上下文计算架构，建立上下文作为数据预处理框架，对LLM实施有界注意力机制，生成高信号、情感密集的提示词。
AI.result: 使用Gemini 2.0 Flash Lite在三个行业标准数据集（亚马逊产品评论、谷歌商业评论、Goodreads图书评论）和多种鲁棒性场景下进行实证评估。结果显示SSAS框架能够通过噪声去除和情感预测估计改进，将数据质量提升高达30%。
AI.conclusion: SSAS框架通过上下文估计能力提供了一致性，为决策制定建立了稳定可靠的证据基础，有效解决了LLM随机性与企业级分析一致性需求之间的矛盾。

title: E2E-Fly: An Integrated Training-to-Deployment System for End-to-End Quadrotor Autonomy
summary: Training and transferring learning-based policies for quadrotors from simulation to reality remains challenging due to inefficient visual rendering, physical modeling inaccuracies, unmodeled sensor discrepancies, and the absence of a unified platform integrating differentiable physics learning into end-to-end training. While recent work has demonstrated various end-to-end quadrotor control tasks, few systems provide a systematic, zero-shot transfer pipeline, hindering reproducibility and real-world deployment. To bridge this gap, we introduce E2E-Fly, an integrated framework featuring an agile quadrotor platform coupled with a full-stack training, validation, and deployment workflow. The training framework incorporates a high-performance simulator with support for differentiable physics learning and reinforcement learning, alongside structured reward design tailored to common quadrotor tasks. We further introduce a two-stage validation strategy using sim-to-sim transfer and hardware-in-the-loop testing, and deploy policies onto two physical quadrotor platforms via a dedicated low-level control interface and a comprehensive sim-to-real alignment methodology, encompassing system identification, domain randomization, latency compensation, and noise modeling. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to systematically unify differentiable physical learning with training, validation, and real-world deployment for quadrotors. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework for training six end-to-end control tasks and deploy them in the real world.

AI.tldr: E2E-Fly：首个将可微分物理学习与训练、验证和真实世界部署系统统一的四旋翼无人机端到端控制框架
AI.motivation: 当前四旋翼无人机从仿真到现实的策略迁移面临视觉渲染效率低、物理建模不准确、传感器差异未建模以及缺乏统一平台等问题，阻碍了可复现性和真实世界部署
AI.method: 提出E2E-Fly集成框架，包含敏捷四旋翼平台和全栈训练、验证、部署流程。训练框架采用支持可微分物理学习和强化学习的高性能仿真器，配合结构化奖励设计。采用两阶段验证策略（仿真到仿真转移和硬件在环测试），并通过专用低级控制接口和全面的仿真到现实对齐方法部署到物理平台
AI.result: 成功训练了六个端到端控制任务并在真实世界中部署，验证了框架的有效性。据作者所知，这是首个系统地将可微分物理学习与四旋翼无人机训练、验证和真实世界部署统一的工作
AI.conclusion: E2E-Fly框架成功解决了四旋翼无人机从仿真到现实策略迁移的关键挑战，通过系统化的训练、验证和部署流程，实现了端到端控制任务的有效部署，为相关研究提供了可复现的统一平台

title: Beyond Independent Frames: Latent Attention Masked Autoencoders for Multi-View Echocardiography
comment: Accepted as a workshop paper at the ICLR 2026 Workshop on Foundation Models for Science
summary: Echocardiography is a widely used modality for cardiac assessment due to its non-invasive and cost-effective nature, but the sparse and heterogeneous spatiotemporal views of the heart pose distinct challenges. Existing masked autoencoder (MAE) approaches typically process images or short clips independently, failing to capture the inherent multi-view structure required for coherent cardiac representation. We introduce Latent Attention Masked Autoencoder (LAMAE), a foundation model architecture tailored to the multi-view nature of medical imaging. LAMAE augments the standard MAE with a latent attention module that enables information exchange across frames and views directly in latent space. This allows the model to aggregate variable-length sequences and distinct views, reconstructing a holistic representation of cardiac function from partial observations. We pretrain LAMAE on MIMIC-IV-ECHO, a large-scale, uncurated dataset reflecting real-world clinical variability. To the best of our knowledge, we present the first results for predicting ICD-10 codes from MIMIC-IV-ECHO videos. Furthermore, we empirically demonstrate that representations learned from adult data transfer effectively to pediatric cohorts despite substantial anatomical differences. These results provide evidence that incorporating structural priors, such as multi-view attention, yields significantly more robust and transferable representations.

AI.tldr: LAMAE是一种针对医学影像多视角特性的基础模型架构，通过潜在注意力模块在潜在空间中实现跨帧跨视图信息交换，从部分观察重建心脏功能的整体表示。
AI.motivation: 超声心动图因其无创性和成本效益而被广泛使用，但其稀疏且异质性的时空视图带来了独特挑战。现有MAE方法通常独立处理图像或短片段，无法捕捉心脏表示所需的内在多视图结构。
AI.method: 提出Latent Attention Masked Autoencoder (LAMAE)，在标准MAE基础上增加潜在注意力模块，使模型能够在潜在空间中直接跨帧和跨视图交换信息，从而聚合可变长度序列和不同视图。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-IV-ECHO大规模非精选数据集上预训练，首次展示了从MIMIC-IV-ECHO视频预测ICD-10代码的结果，并证明从成人数据学到的表示能有效迁移到儿科队列。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，融入多视图注意力等结构先验能产生显著更鲁棒和可迁移的表示，为医学影像基础模型提供了新方向。

title: Tree Learning: A Multi-Skill Continual Learning Framework for Humanoid Robots
summary: As reinforcement learning for humanoid robots evolves from single-task to multi-skill paradigms, efficiently expanding new skills while avoiding catastrophic forgetting has become a key challenge in embodied intelligence. Existing approaches either rely on complex topology adjustments in Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models or require training extremely large-scale models, making lightweight deployment difficult. To address this, we propose Tree Learning, a multi-skill continual learning framework for humanoid robots. The framework adopts a root-branch hierarchical parameter inheritance mechanism, providing motion priors for branch skills through parameter reuse to fundamentally prevent catastrophic forgetting. A multi-modal feedforward adaptation mechanism combining phase modulation and interpolation is designed to support both periodic and aperiodic motions. A task-level reward shaping strategy is also proposed to accelerate skill convergence. Unity-based simulation experiments show that, in contrast to simultaneous multi-task training, Tree Learning achieves higher rewards across various representative locomotion skills while maintaining a 100% skill retention rate, enabling seamless multi-skill switching and real-time interactive control. We further validate the performance and generalization capability of Tree Learning on two distinct Unity-simulated tasks: a Super Mario-inspired interactive scenario and autonomous navigation in a classical Chinese garden environment.

AI.tldr: 提出Tree Learning框架，通过根-分支层次参数继承机制解决人形机器人多技能持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，支持周期性与非周期性运动，在Unity仿真中实现100%技能保留率和高奖励性能。
AI.motivation: 随着人形机器人强化学习从单任务向多技能范式发展，如何高效扩展新技能同时避免灾难性遗忘成为具身智能的关键挑战。现有方法要么依赖复杂的专家混合模型拓扑调整，要么需要训练极大模型，难以轻量部署。
AI.method: 提出Tree Learning框架：1) 根-分支层次参数继承机制，通过参数重用为分支技能提供运动先验；2) 结合相位调制和插值的多模态前馈适应机制，支持周期性和非周期性运动；3) 任务级奖励塑形策略加速技能收敛。
AI.result: Unity仿真实验表明，相比同时多任务训练，Tree Learning在各种代表性运动技能上获得更高奖励，保持100%技能保留率，实现无缝多技能切换和实时交互控制。在超级马里奥式交互场景和古典中式园林自主导航两个任务中验证了性能和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Tree Learning框架有效解决了人形机器人多技能持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，通过参数继承和自适应机制实现了高效技能扩展和轻量部署，为具身智能的多技能学习提供了可行解决方案。

title: PRIM-cipal components analysis
summary: Supervised No Free Lunch Theorems (NFLTs) are well studied, yet unsupervised NFLTs remain underexplored. For elliptical distributions, we prove that there exist two equally optimal, scientifically meaningful bump-hunting strategies that are exact opposites, with no universal winner. Specifically, peeling $k$ orthogonal dimensions from $\mathbb{R}^d$ ($d \ge k$), retaining an inter-quantile region of probability $1-α$ per peeled dimension, maximizes total variance and Frobenius norm when the $k$ smallest principal components (called pettiest components) are selected, and minimizes them when the selected dimensions are the $k$ leading principal components. These optima inspire PRIM-based bump-hunting algorithms either by minimizing variance or by minimizing volume, thereby motivating an NFLT. We test our results on the Fashion-MNIST database, showing that peeling the largest principal components captures multiplicity, while peeling the smallest principal components isolates popular styles.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了在椭圆分布下存在两种同等最优但完全相反的bump-hunting策略，没有普遍优胜者，这构成了无监督学习的No Free Lunch定理
AI.motivation: 监督学习的No Free Lunch定理已有深入研究，但无监督学习的NFL定理仍未被充分探索。本文旨在填补这一空白，特别针对椭圆分布下的bump-hunting问题
AI.method: 从ℝ^d中剥离k个正交维度，保留每个剥离维度的1-α概率分位数区域。证明当选择k个最小主成分（最不重要成分）时最大化总方差和Frobenius范数，选择k个最大主成分时最小化它们。基于此开发了两种PRIM-based bump-hunting算法：最小化方差法和最小化体积法
AI.result: 在椭圆分布下存在两种同等最优但完全相反的bump-hunting策略。在Fashion-MNIST数据库上的实验表明：剥离最大主成分捕捉多样性，剥离最小主成分则分离出流行风格
AI.conclusion: 无监督学习中也存在No Free Lunch定理，对于椭圆分布，存在两种科学上有意义但完全相反的bump-hunting策略，没有普遍最优的方法。这为无监督学习算法选择提供了理论依据

title: Robotic Manipulation is Vision-to-Geometry Mapping ($f(v) \rightarrow G$): Vision-Geometry Backbones over Language and Video Models
summary: At its core, robotic manipulation is a problem of vision-to-geometry mapping ($f(v) \rightarrow G$). Physical actions are fundamentally defined by geometric properties like 3D positions and spatial relationships. Consequently, we argue that the foundation for generalizable robotic control should be a vision-geometry backbone, rather than the widely adopted vision-language or video models. Conventional VLA and video-predictive models rely on backbones pretrained on large-scale 2D image-text or temporal pixel data. While effective, their representations are largely shaped by semantic concepts or 2D priors, which do not intrinsically align with the precise 3D geometric nature required for physical manipulation. Driven by this insight, we propose the Vision-Geometry-Action (VGA) model, which directly conditions action generation on pretrained native 3D representations. Specifically, VGA replaces conventional language or video backbones with a pretrained 3D world model, establishing a seamless vision-to-geometry mapping that translates visual inputs directly into physical actions. To further enhance geometric consistency, we introduce a Progressive Volumetric Modulation module and adopt a joint training strategy. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of our approach. In simulation benchmarks, VGA outperforms top-tier VLA baselines including $π_{0.5}$ and GeoVLA, demonstrating its superiority in precise manipulation. More importantly, VGA exhibits remarkable zero-shot generalization to unseen viewpoints in real-world deployments, consistently outperforming $π_{0.5}$. These results highlight that operating on native 3D representations-rather than translating through language or 2D video priors-is a highly promising direction for achieving generalizable physical intelligence.

AI.tldr: 提出VGA模型，用预训练3D世界模型替代传统视觉语言或视频骨干，直接基于原生3D几何表示生成机器人动作，实现更好的零样本泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 机器人操作本质上是视觉到几何的映射问题，传统视觉语言模型和视频预测模型基于2D图像-文本或时序像素数据训练，其表示主要受语义概念或2D先验影响，与物理操作所需的精确3D几何性质不匹配。
AI.method: 提出Vision-Geometry-Action (VGA)模型，用预训练3D世界模型替代传统语言或视频骨干，建立直接的视觉到几何映射。引入渐进式体积调制模块和联合训练策略增强几何一致性。
AI.result: 在仿真基准测试中，VGA超越包括π₀.₅和GeoVLA在内的顶级VLA基线，在精确操作方面表现优越。更重要的是，在真实世界部署中，VGA对未见视角展现出显著的零样本泛化能力，持续优于π₀.₅。
AI.conclusion: 基于原生3D表示而非通过语言或2D视频先验进行转换，是实现可泛化物理智能的极具前景的方向。

title: Verification Modulo Tested Library Contracts
summary:
We consider the problem of \emph{verification modulo tested library
  contracts} as a step towards automating the verification of client programs that use complex libraries. We formulate this problem as the synthesis of modular contracts for the library methods used by the client that are adequate to prove the client correct, and that also pass the scrutiny of a testing engine that tests the library against these contracts. We also consider a new form of method contracts called \emph{contextual contracts} that arise in this setting that hold in the context of the client program, and can often be simpler and easier to infer than classical modular contracts. We provide a counterexample-guided learning framework to solve this problem, in which the synthesizer interacts with a constraint solver as well as the testing engine in order to infer adequate modular/contextual method contracts and inductive invariants for the client. The main synthesis engines we use are generalizing CHC solvers that are realized using ICE learning algorithms. We realize this framework in a tool called \vmtlc and show its efficacy on benchmarks where clients call large libraries.

AI.tldr: 提出验证模测试库合约问题，通过合成满足客户端验证和库测试的模块化合约，引入上下文合约概念，使用反例引导学习框架解决
AI.motivation: 自动化验证使用复杂库的客户端程序，解决传统模块化验证中库合约难以推导的问题，通过结合形式验证和测试方法提高验证可行性
AI.method: 提出验证模测试库合约问题，定义模块化合约和上下文合约；使用反例引导学习框架，结合约束求解器和测试引擎；采用基于ICE学习算法的通用CHC求解器作为主要合成引擎；实现工具vmtlc
AI.result: 开发了vmtlc工具，在调用大型库的客户端基准测试中展示了有效性
AI.conclusion: 验证模测试库合约方法能够有效自动化客户端程序验证，上下文合约简化了合约推导，反例引导学习框架结合形式验证和测试提高了验证能力

title: Beyond Visual Cues: Semantic-Driven Token Filtering and Expert Routing for Anytime Person ReID
summary: Any-Time Person Re-identification (AT-ReID) necessitates the robust retrieval of target individuals under arbitrary conditions, encompassing both modality shifts (daytime and nighttime) and extensive clothing-change scenarios, ranging from short-term to long-term intervals. However, existing methods are highly relying on pure visual features, which are prone to change due to environmental and time factors, resulting in significantly performance deterioration under scenarios involving illumination caused modality shifts or cloth-change. In this paper, we propose Semantic-driven Token Filtering and Expert Routing (STFER), a novel framework that leverages the ability of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) to generate identity consistency text, which provides identity-discriminative features that are robust to both clothing variations and cross-modality shifts between RGB and IR. Specifically, we employ instructions to guide the LVLM in generating identity-intrinsic semantic text that captures biometric constants for the semantic model driven. The text token is further used for Semantic-driven Visual Token Filtering (SVTF), which enhances informative visual regions and suppresses redundant background noise. Meanwhile, the text token is also used for Semantic-driven Expert Routing (SER), which integrates the semantic text into expert routing, resulting in more robust multi-scenario gating. Extensive experiments on the Any-Time ReID dataset (AT-USTC) demonstrate that our model achieves state-of-the-art results. Moreover, the model trained on AT-USTC was evaluated across 5 widely-used ReID benchmarks demonstrating superior generalization capabilities with highly competitive results. Our code will be available soon.

AI.tldr: STFER框架利用大视觉语言模型生成身份一致性文本，通过语义驱动的视觉令牌过滤和专家路由，解决任意时间行人重识别中的模态偏移和服装变化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度依赖纯视觉特征，这些特征容易因环境因素和时间变化而改变，导致在光照引起的模态偏移（RGB-IR）或服装变化场景下性能显著下降。需要一种能同时应对服装变化和跨模态偏移的鲁棒身份识别方法。
AI.method: 提出STFER框架：1) 利用大视觉语言模型通过指令引导生成身份内在语义文本，捕捉生物特征常量；2) 语义驱动的视觉令牌过滤（SVTF）利用文本令牌增强信息丰富的视觉区域并抑制冗余背景噪声；3) 语义驱动的专家路由（SER）将语义文本集成到专家路由中，实现更鲁棒的多场景门控。
AI.result: 在AT-USTC数据集上达到最先进水平，同时在5个广泛使用的ReID基准测试中表现出优异的泛化能力，获得高度竞争力的结果。
AI.conclusion: STFER通过利用大视觉语言模型生成身份一致性文本，有效解决了任意时间行人重识别中的服装变化和跨模态偏移问题，展示了语义信息在提升模型鲁棒性和泛化能力方面的重要价值。

title: LLMbench: A Comparative Close Reading Workbench for Large Language Models
summary: LLMbench is a browser-based workbench for the comparative close reading of large language model (LLM) outputs. Where existing tools for LLM comparison, such as Google PAIR's LLM Comparator are engineered for quantitative evaluation and user-rating metrics, LLMbench is oriented towards the hermeneutic practices of the digital humanities. Two model responses to the same prompt are side by side in annotatable panels with four analytical overlays (Probabilities for token-level log-probability inspection, Differences for word-level diff across the two panels, Tone for Hyland-style metadiscourse analysis, and Structure for sentence-level parsing with discourse connective highlighting), alongside five analytical modes, Stochastic Variation, Temperature Gradient, Prompt Sensitivity, Token Probabilities, and Cross-Model Divergence, that make the probabilistic structure of generated text legible at the token level. The tool treats the generated text as a research object in its own right from a probability distribution, a text that could have been otherwise, and provides visualisations including continuous heatmaps, entropy sparklines, pixel maps, and three-dimensional probability terrains, that show the counterfactual history from which each word emerged. This paper describes the tool's architecture, its six modes, and its design rationale, and argues that log-probability data, currently underused in humanistic and social-scientific readings of AI, is an important resource for a critical studies of generative AI models.

AI.tldr: LLMbench是一个基于浏览器的工具，用于对比分析大型语言模型输出，专注于数字人文学科的解释性实践而非量化评估。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM比较工具（如Google PAIR的LLM Comparator）主要面向量化评估和用户评分，缺乏支持数字人文学科解释性实践的工具。研究者需要能够深入分析模型生成文本概率结构的工具，将生成文本视为概率分布的研究对象。
AI.method: 开发浏览器工作台，提供并排可注释面板显示两个模型对同一提示的响应，包含四个分析覆盖层（概率、差异、语气、结构）和五种分析模式（随机变化、温度梯度、提示敏感性、标记概率、跨模型差异）。提供连续热图、熵火花线、像素图和三维概率地形等可视化，展示每个词语的反事实历史。
AI.result: 创建了LLMbench工具，使生成文本的概率结构在标记级别可读，将对数概率数据作为生成式AI模型批判性研究的重要资源。工具架构支持六种模式，可视化展示文本生成的概率分布特性。
AI.conclusion: 对数概率数据目前在AI的人文和社会科学研究中未得到充分利用，但对生成式AI模型的批判性研究是重要资源。LLMbench为数字人文学科提供了专门的分析工具，将生成文本视为"本可能不同"的概率分布对象。

title: Building Extraction from Remote Sensing Imagery under Hazy and Low-light Conditions: Benchmark and Baseline
summary: Building extraction from optical Remote Sensing (RS) imagery suffers from performance degradation under real-world hazy and low-light conditions. However, existing optical methods and benchmarks focus primarily on ideal clear-weather conditions. While SAR offers all-weather sensing, its side-looking geometry causes geometric distortions. To address these challenges, we introduce HaLoBuilding, the first optical benchmark specifically designed for building extraction under hazy and low-light conditions. By leveraging a same-scene multitemporal pairing strategy, we ensure pixel-level label alignment and high fidelity even under extreme degradation. Building upon this benchmark, we propose HaLoBuild-Net, a novel end-to-end framework for building extraction in adverse RS scenarios. At its core, we develop a Spatial-Frequency Focus Module (SFFM) to effectively mitigate meteorological interference on building features by coupling large receptive field attention with frequency-aware channel reweighting guided by stable low-frequency anchors. Additionally, a Global Multi-scale Guidance Module (GMGM) provides global semantic constraints to anchor building topologies, while a Mutual-Guided Fusion Module (MGFM) implements bidirectional semantic-spatial calibration to suppress shallow noise and sharpen weather-induced blurred boundaries. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HaLoBuild-Net significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods and conventional cascaded restoration-segmentation paradigms on the HaLoBuilding dataset, while maintaining robust generalization on WHU, INRIA, and LoveDA datasets. The source code and datasets are publicly available at: https://github.com/AeroVILab-AHU/HaLoBuilding.

AI.tldr: HaLoBuilding是首个针对雾霾和低光条件下建筑物提取的光学遥感基准数据集，并提出了HaLoBuild-Net框架，通过空间-频率聚焦模块和全局多尺度引导模块等创新设计，在恶劣天气条件下显著提升了建筑物提取性能。
AI.motivation: 现有光学遥感建筑物提取方法主要针对理想晴朗天气条件，在真实世界的雾霾和低光条件下性能会显著下降。虽然SAR提供全天候感知，但其侧视几何结构会导致几何失真。因此需要专门针对恶劣天气条件的建筑物提取解决方案。
AI.method: 1. 创建HaLoBuilding基准数据集：采用同场景多时相对策略，确保像素级标签对齐和高保真度；2. 提出HaLoBuild-Net框架：包含空间-频率聚焦模块（SFFM）通过大感受野注意力和频率感知通道重加权来缓解气象干扰，全局多尺度引导模块（GMGM）提供全局语义约束，以及互引导融合模块（MGFM）实现双向语义-空间校准以抑制浅层噪声和锐化边界。
AI.result: HaLoBuild-Net在HaLoBuilding数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法和传统的级联恢复-分割范式，同时在WHU、INRIA和LoveDA数据集上保持了强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了恶劣天气条件下光学遥感建筑物提取的空白，提出的基准数据集和端到端框架为解决真实世界遥感应用中的气象干扰问题提供了有效解决方案，具有重要的实际应用价值。

title: FastGrasp: Learning-based Whole-body Control method for Fast Dexterous Grasping with Mobile Manipulators
summary: Fast grasping is critical for mobile robots in logistics, manufacturing, and service applications. Existing methods face fundamental challenges in impact stabilization under high-speed motion, real-time whole-body coordination, and generalization across diverse objects and scenarios, limited by fixed bases, simple grippers, or slow tactile response capabilities. We propose \textbf{FastGrasp}, a learning-based framework that integrates grasp guidance, whole-body control, and tactile feedback for mobile fast grasping. Our two-stage reinforcement learning strategy first generates diverse grasp candidates via conditional variational autoencoder conditioned on object point clouds, then executes coordinated movements of mobile base, arm, and hand guided by optimal grasp selection. Tactile sensing enables real-time grasp adjustments to handle impact effects and object variations. Extensive experiments demonstrate superior grasping performance in both simulation and real-world scenarios, achieving robust manipulation across diverse object geometries through effective sim-to-real transfer.

AI.tldr: FastGrasp：基于学习的移动机器人快速抓取框架，集成抓取引导、全身控制和触觉反馈，通过两阶段强化学习实现高速稳定抓取
AI.motivation: 现有方法在高速运动下的冲击稳定、实时全身协调以及跨不同物体和场景的泛化方面面临根本挑战，受限于固定基座、简单夹爪或缓慢的触觉响应能力
AI.method: 两阶段强化学习策略：第一阶段通过条件变分自编码器基于物体点云生成多样化抓取候选；第二阶段通过最优抓取选择引导移动基座、机械臂和手爪的协调运动，触觉传感实现实时抓取调整
AI.result: 在仿真和真实场景中展示了优越的抓取性能，通过有效的仿真到现实迁移实现了跨不同物体几何形状的鲁棒操作
AI.conclusion: FastGrasp框架成功解决了移动机器人快速抓取中的关键挑战，通过集成学习、控制和传感实现了高速稳定且泛化能力强的抓取系统

title: FineSteer: A Unified Framework for Fine-Grained Inference-Time Steering in Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) often exhibit undesirable behaviors, such as safety violations and hallucinations. Although inference-time steering offers a cost-effective way to adjust model behavior without updating its parameters, existing methods often fail to be simultaneously effective, utility-preserving, and training-efficient due to their rigid, one-size-fits-all designs and limited adaptability. In this work, we present FineSteer, a novel steering framework that decomposes inference-time steering into two complementary stages: conditional steering and fine-grained vector synthesis, allowing fine-grained control over when and how to steer internal representations. In the first stage, we introduce a Subspace-guided Conditional Steering (SCS) mechanism that preserves model utility by avoiding unnecessary steering. In the second stage, we propose a Mixture-of-Steering-Experts (MoSE) mechanism that captures the multimodal nature of desired steering behaviors and generates query-specific steering vectors for improved effectiveness. Through tailored designs in both SCS and MoSE, FineSteer maintains robust performance on general queries while adaptively optimizing steering vectors for targeted inputs in a training-efficient manner. Extensive experiments on safety and truthfulness benchmarks show that FineSteer outperforms state-of-the-art methods in overall performance, achieving stronger steering performance with minimal utility loss. Code is available at https://github.com/YukinoAsuna/FineSteer

AI.tldr: FineSteer是一个新颖的推理时引导框架，通过条件引导和细粒度向量合成两阶段设计，实现对LLM行为的精细控制，在安全性和真实性基准测试中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有推理时引导方法存在三个主要问题：1）效果不足，2）难以保持模型通用能力，3）训练效率低。这些方法通常采用僵化的"一刀切"设计，缺乏适应性，无法同时满足有效性、效用保持和训练效率的要求。
AI.method: FineSteer采用两阶段分解方法：第一阶段是子空间引导的条件引导（SCS），通过避免不必要的引导来保持模型效用；第二阶段是混合引导专家（MoSE），捕捉期望引导行为的多模态特性，生成查询特定的引导向量以提高效果。SCS和MoSE都经过精心设计，确保在保持通用查询性能的同时，以训练高效的方式为目标输入自适应优化引导向量。
AI.result: 在安全和真实性基准测试上的广泛实验表明，FineSteer在整体性能上优于最先进的方法，实现了更强的引导性能且效用损失最小。
AI.conclusion: FineSteer通过创新的两阶段设计解决了现有推理时引导方法的局限性，实现了有效性、效用保持和训练效率的平衡，为LLM行为控制提供了更精细、更高效的解决方案。

title: ControlFoley: Unified and Controllable Video-to-Audio Generation with Cross-Modal Conflict Handling
summary:
Recent advances in video-to-audio (V2A) generation enable high-quality audio synthesis from visual content, yet achieving robust and fine-grained controllability remains challenging. Existing methods suffer from weak textual controllability under visual-text conflict and imprecise stylistic control due to entangled temporal and timbre information in reference audio. Moreover, the lack of standardized benchmarks limits systematic evaluation.
  We propose ControlFoley, a unified multimodal V2A framework that enables precise control over video, text, and reference audio. We introduce a joint visual encoding paradigm that integrates CLIP with a spatio-temporal audio-visual encoder to improve alignment and textual controllability. We further propose temporal-timbre decoupling to suppress redundant temporal cues while preserving discriminative timbre features. In addition, we design a modality-robust training scheme with unified multimodal representation alignment (REPA) and random modality dropout. We also present VGGSound-TVC, a benchmark for evaluating textual controllability under varying degrees of visual-text conflict.
  Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance across multiple V2A tasks, including text-guided, text-controlled, and audio-controlled generation. ControlFoley achieves superior controllability under cross-modal conflict while maintaining strong synchronization and audio quality, and shows competitive or better performance compared to an industrial V2A system.
  Code, models, datasets, and demos are available at: https://yjx-research.github.io/ControlFoley/.

AI.tldr: ControlFoley是一个统一的多模态视频到音频生成框架，通过联合视觉编码、时序-音色解耦和模态鲁棒训练方案，实现了对视频、文本和参考音频的精确控制，在跨模态冲突下表现出优越的可控性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频到音频生成方法存在文本可控性弱（在视觉-文本冲突时）、风格控制不精确（由于参考音频中时序和音色信息纠缠）以及缺乏标准化基准等问题，需要开发更鲁棒和细粒度的可控系统。
AI.method: 1) 联合视觉编码范式：集成CLIP与时空音频-视觉编码器以改善对齐和文本可控性；2) 时序-音色解耦：抑制冗余时序线索同时保留区分性音色特征；3) 模态鲁棒训练方案：统一多模态表示对齐(REPA)和随机模态丢弃；4) 提出VGGSound-TVC基准用于评估视觉-文本冲突下的文本可控性。
AI.result: 在多个V2A任务（文本引导、文本控制和音频控制生成）中达到最先进性能，在跨模态冲突下实现优越的可控性，同时保持强同步性和音频质量，与工业级V2A系统相比表现竞争或更好。
AI.conclusion: ControlFoley通过创新的多模态控制机制解决了现有V2A生成方法的局限性，实现了鲁棒且细粒度的可控性，为视频到音频合成提供了统一的框架，代码、模型、数据集和演示已开源。

title: OVAL: Open-Vocabulary Augmented Memory Model for Lifelong Object Goal Navigation
summary: Object Goal Navigation (ObjectNav) refers to an agent navigating to an object in an unseen environment, which is an ability often required in the accomplishment of complex tasks. While existing methods demonstrate proficiency in isolated single object navigation, their limitations emerge in the restricted applicability of lifelong memory representations, which ultimately hinders effective navigation toward continual targets over extended periods. To address this problem, we propose OVAL, a novel lifelong open-vocabulary memory framework, which enables efficient and precise execution of long-term navigation in semantically open tasks. Within this framework, we introduce memory descriptors to facilitate structured management of the memory model. Additionally, we propose a novel probability-based exploration strategy, utilizing a multi-value frontier scoring to enhance lifelong exploration efficiency. Extensive experiments demonstrate the efficiency and robustness of the proposed system.

AI.tldr: 提出OVAL框架，通过终身开放词汇记忆实现长期多目标导航，解决现有方法在连续目标导航中的记忆表示限制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有物体目标导航方法在孤立单目标导航中表现良好，但在终身记忆表示方面存在限制，这阻碍了在长时间内对连续目标的有效导航。需要解决长期导航中记忆表示的适用性问题。
AI.method: 提出OVAL终身开放词汇记忆框架，引入记忆描述符实现记忆模型的结构化管理，并提出基于概率的探索策略，利用多值边界评分提升终身探索效率。
AI.result: 大量实验证明了所提系统的高效性和鲁棒性，在长期导航任务中表现出色。
AI.conclusion: OVAL框架通过终身开放词汇记忆和结构化记忆管理，有效解决了长期多目标导航中的记忆表示问题，提升了导航效率和精度。

title: Learning Where to Embed: Noise-Aware Positional Embedding for Query Retrieval in Small-Object Detection
comment: Accepted to ACM ICMR 2026; 14 pages, 6 figures, and 4 tables
summary: Transformer-based detectors have advanced small-object detection, but they often remain inefficient and vulnerable to background-induced query noise, which motivates deep decoders to refine low-quality queries. We present HELP (Heatmap-guided Embedding Learning Paradigm), a noise-aware positional-semantic fusion framework that studies where to embed positional information by selectively preserving positional encodings in foreground-salient regions while suppressing background clutter. Within HELP, we introduce Heatmap-guided Positional Embedding (HPE) as the core embedding mechanism and visualize it with a heatbar for interpretable diagnosis and fine-tuning. HPE is integrated into both the encoder and decoder: it guides noise-suppressed feature encoding by injecting heatmap-aware positional encoding, and it enables high-quality query retrieval by filtering background-dominant embeddings via a gradient-based mask filter before decoding. To address feature sparsity in complex small targets, we integrate Linear-Snake Convolution to enrich retrieval-relevant representations. The gradient-based heatmap supervision is used during training only, incurring no additional gradient computation at inference. As a result, our design reduces decoder layers from eight to three and achieves a 59.4% parameter reduction (66.3M vs. 163M) while maintaining consistent accuracy gains under a reduced compute budget across benchmarks. Code Repository: https://github.com/yidimopozhibai/Noise-Suppressed-Query-Retrieval

AI.tldr: HELP框架通过热图引导的位置嵌入选择性保留前景区域的位置编码，抑制背景噪声，减少解码器层数并降低参数，在保持精度的同时提升小目标检测效率。
AI.motivation: Transformer检测器在小目标检测中存在效率低下和易受背景噪声干扰的问题，深层解码器需要不断优化低质量查询，这促使研究如何减少噪声并提升检测效率。
AI.method: 提出HELP噪声感知位置-语义融合框架，核心是热图引导的位置嵌入(HPE)：1)在编码器和解码器中集成HPE，通过热图感知的位置编码抑制噪声特征；2)使用基于梯度的掩码过滤器在解码前过滤背景主导的嵌入；3)集成线性蛇形卷积丰富复杂小目标的特征表示；4)训练时使用基于梯度的热图监督，推理时无额外计算。
AI.result: 解码器层数从8层减少到3层，参数减少59.4%(66.3M vs 163M)，在减少计算预算的同时在不同基准测试中保持一致的精度提升。
AI.conclusion: HELP框架通过噪声抑制的位置-语义融合机制，有效解决了小目标检测中的背景噪声问题，显著降低了模型复杂度并提升了检测效率，为高效的小目标检测提供了新思路。

title: Artificial Intelligence for Modeling and Simulation of Mixed Automated and Human Traffic
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Autonomous vehicles (AVs) are now operating on public roads, which makes their testing and validation more critical than ever. Simulation offers a safe and controlled environment for evaluating AV performance in varied conditions. However, existing simulation tools mainly focus on graphical realism and rely on simple rule-based models and therefore fail to accurately represent the complexity of driving behaviors and interactions. Artificial intelligence (AI) has shown strong potential to address these limitations; however, despite the rapid progress across AI methodologies, a comprehensive survey of their application to mixed autonomy traffic simulation remains lacking. Existing surveys either focus on simulation tools without examining the AI methods behind them, or cover ego-centric decision-making without addressing the broader challenge of modeling surrounding traffic. Moreover, they do not offer a unified taxonomy of AI methods covering individual behavior modeling to full scene simulation. To address these gaps, this survey provides a structured review and synthesis of AI methods for modeling AV and human driving behavior in mixed autonomy traffic simulation. We introduce a taxonomy that organizes methods into three families: agent-level behavior models, environment-level simulation methods, and cognitive and physics-informed methods. The survey analyzes how existing simulation platforms fall short of the needs of mixed autonomy research and outlines directions to narrow this gap. It also provides a chronological overview of AI methods and reviews evaluation protocols and metrics, simulation tools, and datasets. By covering both traffic engineering and computer science perspectives, we aim to bridge the gap between these two communities.

AI.tldr: 该论文是一篇关于混合自主交通仿真中AI方法应用的综述性文章，旨在填补现有研究空白，为自动驾驶车辆测试提供更准确的仿真工具。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆已在公共道路上运行，测试验证至关重要。现有仿真工具主要关注图形真实性，依赖简单的基于规则模型，无法准确表示驾驶行为和交互的复杂性。AI有潜力解决这些限制，但缺乏对混合自主交通仿真中AI方法应用的全面综述。
AI.method: 提出结构化分类法，将方法分为三个家族：智能体级行为模型、环境级仿真方法、认知和物理信息方法。分析现有仿真平台的不足，提供AI方法的时间线概述，回顾评估协议和指标、仿真工具及数据集。
AI.result: 通过涵盖交通工程和计算机科学两个视角，旨在弥合这两个社区之间的差距。为混合自主交通研究提供了系统化的AI方法分类框架，并指出了缩小仿真需求与现有工具差距的方向。
AI.conclusion: 该综述填补了混合自主交通仿真中AI方法应用的研究空白，提供了统一分类法，分析了现有仿真工具的局限性，并为未来研究指明了方向，有助于推动更准确、更真实的自动驾驶测试仿真环境的发展。

title: Harmonizing Multi-Objective LLM Unlearning via Unified Domain Representation and Bidirectional Logit Distillation
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) unlearning is crucial for removing hazardous or privacy-leaking information from the model. Practical LLM unlearning demands satisfying multiple challenging objectives simultaneously: removing undesirable knowledge, preserving general utility, avoiding over-refusal of neighboring concepts, and, crucially, ensuring robustness against adversarial probing attacks. However, existing unlearning methods primarily focus on a limited subset of these goals, typically unlearning efficacy and utility preservation while overlooking robustness and boundary behaviors. Naively extending these methods to multi-objective settings may lead to unlearning task interference. We propose a novel multi-objective unlearning framework that harmonizes multiple unlearning objectives through a data and optimization co-design: We standardize training corpora into a unified data representation to reduce the domain gap, and then introduce a bidirectional distillation method that simultaneously elicits desired behavior from a context-instructed teacher while suppressing undesirable behavior in the student model. Theoretical and empirical analyses show that our method aligns domain distributions and converts seemingly irrelevant unlearning tasks into cooperative optimization. Evaluation demonstrates state-of-the-art performance, which enables balanced and reliable unlearning across diverse, challenging requirements.

AI.tldr: 提出一种多目标LLM遗忘框架，通过数据和优化协同设计，在移除有害信息的同时保持通用能力、避免过度拒绝相邻概念，并增强对抗攻击鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM遗忘方法主要关注遗忘效果和效用保持，忽视了对抗攻击鲁棒性和边界行为，且多目标设置下可能存在任务干扰问题。
AI.method: 采用数据和优化协同设计：1）将训练语料标准化为统一数据表示以减少领域差距；2）引入双向蒸馏方法，从上下文指导的教师模型中引导期望行为，同时抑制学生模型中的不良行为。
AI.result: 理论和实证分析表明该方法能对齐领域分布，将看似无关的遗忘任务转化为协同优化。评估显示在多样化挑战性需求下实现平衡可靠的遗忘，达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多目标遗忘框架通过数据和优化协同设计，有效解决了LLM遗忘中的多目标平衡问题，实现了鲁棒、可靠的遗忘性能。

title: Attention-Gated Convolutional Networks for Scanner-Agnostic Quality Assessment
summary: Motion artifacts present a significant challenge in structural MRI (sMRI), often compromising clinical diagnostics and large-scale automated analysis. While manual quality control (QC) remains the gold standard, it is increasingly unscalable for massive longitudinal studies. To address this, we propose a hybrid CNN-Attention framework designed for robust, site-invariant MRI quality assessment. Our architecture integrates a hierarchical 2D CNN encoder for local spatial feature extraction with a multi-head cross-attention mechanism to model global dependencies. This synergy enables the model to prioritize motion relevant artifact signatures, such as ringing and blurring, while dynamically filtering out site-specific intensity variations and background noise. The framework was trained end-to-end on the MR-ART dataset using a balanced cohort of 200 subjects. Performance was evaluated across two tiers: Seen Site Evaluation on a held-out MR-ART partition and Unseen Site Evaluation using 200 subjects from 17 heterogeneous sites in the ABIDE archive. On seen sites, the model achieved a scan-level accuracy of 0.9920 and an F1-score of 0.9919. Crucially, it maintained strong generalization across unseen ABIDE sites (Acc = 0.755) without any retraining or fine-tuning, demonstrating high resilience to domain shift.
