AI.tldr: 提出一种自适应级联量子纠错码选择方法，通过估计每级后的有效噪声信道并相应选择下一级编码，结合学习型非加性编码器和标准编码器，显著减少实现目标逻辑错误率所需的量子比特数。
AI.motivation: 级联量子纠错码虽然能双指数降低逻辑错误率，但噪声结构在级联过程中会发生变化，使得选择最优编码序列变得困难。传统方法难以适应这种动态变化的噪声环境。
AI.method: 采用自适应级联策略：1) 估计每级纠错后的有效噪声信道；2) 根据当前噪声结构选择下一级编码：对于结构化噪声使用学习型非加性编码器，对于接近均匀的噪声切换为标准编码器；3) 结合机器学习方法优化编码选择。
AI.result: 在模拟中，这种逐级自适应方法相比仅级联稳定子码，能以更少的量子比特实现目标逻辑错误率——对于强结构化噪声，量子比特数减少高达两个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 这种混合、基于学习的自适应级联策略为早期容错量子计算提供了有前景的工具，能够根据动态噪声结构优化编码选择，显著提高资源效率。

title: TurboTalk: Progressive Distillation for One-Step Audio-Driven Talking Avatar Generation
summary: Existing audio-driven video digital human generation models rely on multi-step denoising, resulting in substantial computational overhead that severely limits their deployment in real-world settings. While one-step distillation approaches can significantly accelerate inference, they often suffer from training instability. To address this challenge, we propose TurboTalk, a two-stage progressive distillation framework that effectively compresses a multi-step audio-driven video diffusion model into a single-step generator. We first adopt Distribution Matching Distillation to obtain a strong and stable 4-step student, and then progressively reduce the denoising steps from 4 to 1 through adversarial distillation. To ensure stable training under extreme step reduction, we introduce a progressive timestep sampling strategy and a self-compare adversarial objective that provides an intermediate adversarial reference that stabilizes progressive distillation. Our method achieve single-step generation of video talking avatar, boosting inference speed by 120 times while maintaining high generation quality.

AI.tldr: TurboTalk：两阶段渐进蒸馏框架，将多步音频驱动视频扩散模型压缩为单步生成器，推理速度提升120倍
AI.motivation: 现有音频驱动视频数字人生成模型依赖多步去噪，计算开销大，限制了实际部署。一步蒸馏方法能加速推理但训练不稳定。
AI.method: 提出两阶段渐进蒸馏框架：1）采用分布匹配蒸馏获得稳定4步学生模型；2）通过对抗蒸馏逐步将去噪步数从4减至1。引入渐进时间步采样策略和自比较对抗目标来稳定训练。
AI.result: 实现了视频说话头像的单步生成，推理速度提升120倍，同时保持高质量生成效果。
AI.conclusion: TurboTalk通过渐进蒸馏有效解决了音频驱动视频生成模型的加速问题，在保持质量的同时实现了显著的推理速度提升，具有实际部署价值。

title: GeomPrompt: Geometric Prompt Learning for RGB-D Semantic Segmentation Under Missing and Degraded Depth
comment: Accepted to the CVPR 2026 URVIS Workshop. Project page: https://geomprompt.github.io
summary: Multimodal perception systems for robotics and embodied AI often assume reliable RGB-D sensing, but in practice, depth is frequently missing, noisy, or corrupted. We thus present GeomPrompt, a lightweight cross-modal adaptation module that synthesizes a task-driven geometric prompt from RGB alone for the fourth channel of a frozen RGB-D semantic segmentation model, without depth supervision. We further introduce GeomPrompt-Recovery, an adaptation module that compensates for degraded depth by predicting the fourth channel correction relevant for the frozen segmenter. Both modules are trained solely with downstream segmentation supervision, enabling recovery of the geometric prior useful for segmentation, rather than estimating depth signals. On SUN RGB-D, GeomPrompt improves over RGB-only inference by +6.1 mIoU on DFormer and +3.0 mIoU on GeminiFusion, while remaining competitive with strong monocular depth estimators. For degraded depth, GeomPrompt-Recovery consistently improves robustness, yielding gains up to +3.6 mIoU under severe depth corruptions. GeomPrompt is also substantially more efficient than monocular depth baselines, reaching 7.8 ms latency versus 38.3 ms and 71.9 ms. These results suggest that task-driven geometric prompting is an efficient mechanism for cross-modal compensation under missing and degraded depth inputs in RGB-D perception.

AI.tldr: GeomPrompt：一种轻量级跨模态适配模块，仅从RGB图像生成任务驱动的几何提示，用于冻结的RGB-D语义分割模型的第四通道，无需深度监督。GeomPrompt-Recovery则补偿退化深度输入。
AI.motivation: 机器人及具身AI的多模态感知系统通常假设可靠的RGB-D感知，但实践中深度信息常缺失、噪声或损坏。现有方法需要深度监督或依赖单目深度估计，效率较低且可能引入无关几何细节。
AI.method: 提出GeomPrompt：轻量级跨模态适配模块，仅从RGB图像合成任务驱动的几何提示，作为冻结RGB-D分割模型的第四通道输入。GeomPrompt-Recovery则预测第四通道校正以补偿退化深度。两者仅使用下游分割监督训练，学习对分割有用的几何先验而非深度信号估计。
AI.result: 在SUN RGB-D数据集上，GeomPrompt相比仅RGB推理：DFormer提升+6.1 mIoU，GeminiFusion提升+3.0 mIoU，与强单目深度估计器竞争。对于退化深度，GeomPrompt-Recory在严重深度损坏下提升达+3.6 mIoU。效率显著：延迟7.8ms vs 基线38.3ms和71.9ms。
AI.conclusion: 任务驱动的几何提示是RGB-D感知中处理缺失和退化深度输入的高效跨模态补偿机制。该方法无需深度监督，仅学习对分割任务有用的几何先验，在性能和效率上均有优势。

title: Hallucination as Trajectory Commitment: Causal Evidence for Asymmetric Attractor Dynamics in Transformer Generation
comment: 21 pages, 12 figures, 8 tables. Code and data: https://github.com/akarlaraytu/trajectory-commitment
summary: We present causal evidence that hallucination in autoregressive language models is an early trajectory commitment governed by asymmetric attractor dynamics. Using same-prompt bifurcation, in which we repeatedly sample identical inputs to observe spontaneous divergence, we isolate trajectory dynamics from prompt-level confounds. On Qwen2.5-1.5B across 61 prompts spanning six categories, 27 prompts (44.3%) bifurcate with factual and hallucinated trajectories diverging at the first generated token (KL = 0 at step 0, KL > 1.0 at step 1). Activation patching across 28 layers reveals a pronounced causal asymmetry: injecting a hallucinated activation into a correct trajectory corrupts output in 87.5% of trials (layer 20), while the reverse recovers only 33.3% (layer 24); both exceed the 10.4% baseline (p = 0.025) and 12.5% random-patch control. Window patching shows correction requires sustained multi-step intervention, whereas corruption needs only a single perturbation. Probing the prompt encoding itself, step-0 residual states predict per-prompt hallucination rate at Pearson r = 0.776 at layer 15 (p < 0.001 against a 1000-permutation null); unsupervised clustering identifies five regime-like groups (eta^2 = 0.55) whose saddle-adjacent cluster concentrates 12 of the 13 bifurcating false-premise prompts, indicating that the basin structure is organized around regime commitments fixed at prompt encoding. These findings characterize hallucination as a locally stable attractor basin: entry is probabilistic and rapid, exit demands coordinated intervention across layers and steps, and the relevant basins are selected by clusterable regimes already discernible at step 0.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过实验证明自回归语言模型的幻觉现象是一种早期轨迹承诺，由不对称吸引子动力学控制，幻觉轨迹在第一步生成时就与事实轨迹分离，且纠正幻觉需要多步协调干预。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在揭示自回归语言模型中幻觉现象的根本机制，特别是理解幻觉轨迹如何形成、为何难以纠正，以及其背后的动力学原理。
AI.method: 采用相同提示分叉法（重复采样相同输入观察自发分叉），结合激活修补技术（在28层间注入不同激活），使用窗口修补分析干预持续性，并通过残差状态分析和无监督聚类探究提示编码阶段的预测能力。
AI.result: 44.3%的提示在第一生成步骤就分叉为事实和幻觉轨迹；激活修补显示强烈因果不对称性（幻觉注入正确轨迹的破坏率87.5%，反向恢复率33.3%）；纠正需要多步持续干预而破坏仅需单次扰动；提示编码残差状态可预测幻觉率（r=0.776）；无监督聚类识别出五个类似机制组，其中鞍点邻近组集中了13个错误前提提示中的12个。
AI.conclusion: 幻觉是一种局部稳定的吸引子盆地现象：进入是概率性和快速的，退出需要跨层和跨步骤的协调干预，相关盆地的选择由在步骤0即可识别的聚类机制决定，这解释了幻觉的顽固性和纠正困难。

title: DA-PTQ: Drift-Aware Post-Training Quantization for Efficient Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action models (VLAs) have demonstrated strong potential for embodied AI, yet their deployment on resource-limited robots remains challenging due to high memory and computational demands. While Post-Training Quantization (PTQ) provides an efficient solution, directly applying PTQ to VLAs often results in severe performance degradation during sequential control. We identify temporal error accumulation as a key factor, where quantization perturbations at the vision-language-to-action interface are progressively amplified, leading to kinematic drift in executed trajectories. To address this issue, we propose Drift-Aware Post-Training Quantization (DA-PTQ), which formulates quantization as a drift-aware optimization problem over sequential decision processes. DA-PTQ consists of two components: (1) Cross-Space Representation Compensation, which mitigates structured distortions between multimodal representations and action space to improve action consistency, and (2) Motion-Driven Mixed-Precision Allocation, which assigns bit-widths by minimizing trajectory-level motion errors. Extensive experiments show that DA-PTQ significantly reduces kinematic drift and achieves comparable performance to full-precision models under low-bit settings, enabling practical deployment of VLAs on resource-limited robotic platforms.

AI.tldr: 提出DA-PTQ方法解决VLA模型量化中的时间误差累积问题，通过漂移感知优化减少运动轨迹中的运动学漂移
AI.motivation: VLA模型在资源受限机器人上部署困难，传统PTQ方法会导致序列控制中的严重性能下降，主要原因是时间误差累积导致运动学漂移
AI.method: 提出Drift-Aware PTQ方法，包含两个组件：1) 跨空间表示补偿，减少多模态表示与动作空间之间的结构化失真；2) 运动驱动混合精度分配，通过最小化轨迹级运动误差来分配比特宽度
AI.result: DA-PTQ显著减少了运动学漂移，在低比特设置下实现了与全精度模型相当的性能，使VLA模型能够在资源受限的机器人平台上实际部署
AI.conclusion: 提出的漂移感知后训练量化方法有效解决了VLA模型量化中的时间误差累积问题，为资源受限机器人上的VLA部署提供了实用解决方案

title: Deepfake Detection Generalization with Diffusion Noise
summary: Deepfake detectors face growing challenges in generalization as new image synthesis techniques emerge. In particular, deepfakes generated by diffusion models are highly photorealistic and often evade detectors trained on GAN-based forgeries. This paper addresses the generalization problem in deepfake detection by leveraging diffusion noise characteristics. We propose an Attention-guided Noise Learning (ANL) framework that integrates a pre-trained diffusion model into the deepfake detection pipeline to guide the learning of more robust features. Specifically, our method uses the diffusion model's denoising process to expose subtle artifacts: the detector is trained to predict the noise contained in an input image at a given diffusion step, forcing it to capture discrepancies between real and synthetic images, while an attention-guided mechanism derived from the predicted noise is introduced to encourage the model to focus on globally distributed discrepancies rather than local patterns. By harnessing the frozen diffusion model's learned distribution of natural images, the ANL method acts as a form of regularization, improving the detector's generalization to unseen forgery types. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ANL significantly outperforms existing methods on multiple benchmarks, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy in detecting diffusion-generated deepfakes. Notably, the proposed framework boosts generalization performance (e.g., improving ACC/AP by a substantial margin on unseen models) without introducing additional overhead during inference. Our results highlight that diffusion noise provides a powerful signal for generalizable deepfake detection.

AI.tldr: 提出ANL框架，利用扩散模型的噪声特征提升深度伪造检测的泛化能力，通过注意力引导的噪声学习机制，使检测器能捕捉真实与合成图像间的全局差异。
AI.motivation: 随着扩散模型等新型图像合成技术的出现，深度伪造检测器面临泛化能力不足的挑战。扩散模型生成的深度伪造具有高度真实感，常能逃避基于GAN伪造训练的检测器，因此需要解决检测器对新型伪造技术的泛化问题。
AI.method: 提出注意力引导噪声学习（ANL）框架，将预训练扩散模型集成到深度伪造检测流程中。方法利用扩散模型的去噪过程揭示细微伪影：检测器被训练预测给定扩散步骤下输入图像包含的噪声，迫使其捕捉真实与合成图像间的差异。同时引入基于预测噪声的注意力引导机制，鼓励模型关注全局分布的差异而非局部模式。通过利用冻结扩散模型学习的自然图像分布，ANL起到正则化作用。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，ANL显著优于现有方法，在检测扩散生成的深度伪造方面达到最先进准确率。框架显著提升泛化性能（如在未见模型上大幅提升ACC/AP），且推理时不引入额外开销。结果表明扩散噪声为可泛化的深度伪造检测提供了强大信号。
AI.conclusion: 扩散噪声特征为深度伪造检测提供了有效的泛化信号。ANL框架通过注意力引导的噪声学习机制，成功提升了检测器对新型伪造技术的泛化能力，为应对不断演进的图像合成技术提供了有前景的解决方案。

title: Autogenesis: A Self-Evolving Agent Protocol
summary: Recent advances in LLM based agent systems have shown promise in tackling complex, long horizon tasks. However, existing agent protocols (e.g., A2A and MCP) under specify cross entity lifecycle and context management, version tracking, and evolution safe update interfaces, which encourages monolithic compositions and brittle glue code. We introduce \textbf{\textsc{Autogenesis Protocol (AGP)}}, a self evolution protocol that decouples what evolves from how evolution occurs. Its Resource Substrate Protocol Layer (RSPL) models prompts, agents, tools, environments, and memory as protocol registered resources\footnote{Unless otherwise specified, resources refer to instances of the five RSPL entity types: \emph{prompt}, \emph{agent}, \emph{tool}, \emph{environment}, \emph{memory} with agent \emph{outputs}.} with explicit state, lifecycle, and versioned interfaces. Its Self Evolution Protocol Layer (SEPL) specifies a closed loop operator interface for proposing, assessing, and committing improvements with auditable lineage and rollback. Building on \textbf{\textsc{AGP}}, we present \textbf{\textsc{Autogenesis System (AGS)}}, a self-evolving multi-agent system that dynamically instantiates, retrieves, and refines protocol-registered resources during execution. We evaluate \textbf{\textsc{AGS}} on multiple challenging benchmarks that require long horizon planning and tool use across heterogeneous resources. The results demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines, supporting the effectiveness of agent resource management and closed loop self evolution.

AI.tldr: 提出Autogenesis Protocol (AGP)和Autogenesis System (AGS)，解决现有LLM智能体协议在跨实体生命周期管理、版本跟踪和演化安全更新方面的不足，实现自演化的多智能体系统。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体协议（如A2A和MCP）在跨实体生命周期和上下文管理、版本跟踪、演化安全更新接口方面存在不足，导致系统趋向单体化组合和脆弱的胶水代码，需要更完善的协议来支持智能体系统的自演化能力。
AI.method: 提出Autogenesis Protocol (AGP)，包含两个层次：资源基底协议层（RSPL）将提示、智能体、工具、环境和内存建模为具有明确状态、生命周期和版本化接口的协议注册资源；自演化协议层（SEPL）提供闭环操作接口，支持改进提议、评估和提交，具有可审计的谱系和回滚能力。基于AGP构建Autogenesis System (AGS)，实现动态实例化、检索和精化协议注册资源。
AI.result: 在多个需要长时程规划和跨异构资源工具使用的挑战性基准测试中评估AGS，结果显示相比强基线有持续改进，支持了智能体资源管理和闭环自演化的有效性。
AI.conclusion: AGP协议通过解耦演化内容和演化过程，解决了现有智能体协议的局限性，AGS系统展示了协议注册资源和闭环自演化在复杂任务中的实际效果，为自演化多智能体系统提供了可行的架构方案。

title: Human Centered Non Intrusive Driver State Modeling Using Personalized Physiological Signals in Real World Automated Driving
summary: In vehicles with partial or conditional driving automation (SAE Levels 2-3), the driver remains responsible for supervising the system and responding to take-over requests. Therefore, reliable driver monitoring is essential for safe human-automation collaboration. However, most existing Driver Monitoring Systems rely on generalized models that ignore individual physiological variability. In this study, we examine the feasibility of personalized driver state modeling using non-intrusive physiological sensing during real-world automated driving. We conducted experiments in an SAE Level 2 vehicle using an Empatica E4 wearable sensor to capture multimodal physiological signals, including electrodermal activity, heart rate, temperature, and motion data. To leverage deep learning architectures designed for images, we transformed the physiological signals into two-dimensional representations and processed them using a multimodal architecture based on pre-trained ResNet50 feature extractors. Experiments across four drivers demonstrate substantial interindividual variability in physiological patterns related to driver awareness. Personalized models achieved an average accuracy of 92.68%, whereas generalized models trained on multiple users dropped to an accuracy of 54%, revealing substantial limitations in cross-user generalization. These results underscore the necessity of adaptive, personalized driver monitoring systems for future automated vehicles and imply that autonomous systems should adapt to each driver's unique physiological profile.

AI.tldr: 个性化驾驶员状态监测在自动驾驶中至关重要，通用模型因忽略个体生理差异而表现不佳，个性化模型能显著提升监测准确性。
AI.motivation: 在部分或条件自动驾驶（SAE 2-3级）中，驾驶员仍需监督系统并响应接管请求，因此可靠的驾驶员监测对安全的人机协作至关重要。现有驾驶员监测系统大多依赖忽略个体生理差异的通用模型，需要探索个性化建模的可行性。
AI.method: 在SAE 2级车辆中进行真实世界实验，使用Empatica E4可穿戴传感器采集多模态生理信号（皮肤电活动、心率、温度、运动数据）。将生理信号转换为二维表示，采用基于预训练ResNet50特征提取器的多模态架构进行处理，实现个性化驾驶员状态建模。
AI.result: 实验涉及四名驾驶员，结果显示驾驶员意识相关的生理模式存在显著个体间差异。个性化模型平均准确率达到92.68%，而多用户训练的通用模型准确率降至54%，表明跨用户泛化能力存在严重局限性。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果强调了未来自动驾驶车辆需要自适应、个性化的驾驶员监测系统，自动驾驶系统应适应每位驾驶员独特的生理特征，个性化建模是实现安全人机协作的关键。

title: Improving Sparse Autoencoder with Dynamic Attention
summary: Recently, sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have emerged as a promising technique for interpreting activations in foundation models by disentangling features into a sparse set of concepts. However, identifying the optimal level of sparsity for each neuron remains challenging in practice: excessive sparsity can lead to poor reconstruction, whereas insufficient sparsity may harm interpretability. While existing activation functions such as ReLU and TopK provide certain sparsity guarantees, they typically require additional sparsity regularization or cherry-picked hyperparameters. We show in this paper that dynamically sparse attention mechanisms using sparsemax can bridge this trade-off, due to their ability to determine the activation numbers in a data-dependent manner. Specifically, we first explore a new class of SAEs based on the cross-attention architecture with the latent features as queries and the learnable dictionary as the key and value matrices. To encourage sparse pattern learning, we employ a sparsemax-based attention strategy that automatically infers a sparse set of elements according to the complexity of each neuron, resulting in a more flexible and general activation function. Through comprehensive evaluation and visualization, we show that our approach successfully achieves lower reconstruction loss while producing high-quality concepts, particularly in top-n classification tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出基于sparsemax的动态稀疏注意力机制，用于改进稀疏自编码器在基础模型特征解耦中的稀疏度平衡问题
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏自编码器在确定神经元最优稀疏度方面存在挑战：过度稀疏导致重建效果差，稀疏不足则损害可解释性。现有激活函数如ReLU和TopK需要额外稀疏正则化或精心调参
AI.method: 提出基于交叉注意力架构的新型SAE，将潜在特征作为查询，可学习字典作为键值矩阵。采用sparsemax注意力策略，根据每个神经元的复杂度自动推断稀疏元素集合，实现数据依赖的激活数量确定
AI.result: 通过综合评估和可视化，该方法成功实现了更低的重建损失，同时产生高质量的概念表示，特别是在top-n分类任务中表现优异
AI.conclusion: 基于sparsemax的动态稀疏注意力机制能够有效平衡稀疏自编码器的重建精度与可解释性，提供更灵活通用的激活函数，改善基础模型特征解耦效果

title: Learning Adaptive Reasoning Paths for Efficient Visual Reasoning
summary: Visual reasoning models (VRMs) have recently shown strong cross-modal reasoning capabilities by integrating visual perception with language reasoning. However, they often suffer from overthinking, producing unnecessarily long reasoning chains for any tasks. We attribute this issue to \textbf{Reasoning Path Redundancy} in visual reasoning: many visual questions do not require the full reasoning process. To address this, we propose \textbf{AVR}, an adaptive visual reasoning framework that decomposes visual reasoning into three cognitive functions: visual perception, logical reasoning, and answer application. It further enables models to dynamically choose among three response formats: Full Format, Perception-Only Format, and Direct Answer. AVR is trained with FS-GRPO, an adaptation of Group Relative Policy Optimization that encourages the model to select the most efficient reasoning format while preserving correctness. Experiments on multiple vision-language benchmarks show that AVR reduces token usage by 50--90\% while maintaining overall accuracy, especially in perception-intensive tasks. These results demonstrate that adaptive visual reasoning can effectively mitigate overthinking in VRMs. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/RunRiotComeOn/AVR.

AI.tldr: AVR框架通过将视觉推理分解为三个认知功能，并让模型动态选择最有效的响应格式，显著减少推理路径冗余，在保持准确性的同时降低50-90%的token使用量。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉推理模型存在过度思考问题，对任何任务都产生不必要的冗长推理链。作者将此归因于视觉推理中的"推理路径冗余"问题，即许多视觉问题并不需要完整的推理过程。
AI.method: 提出AVR自适应视觉推理框架：1) 将视觉推理分解为视觉感知、逻辑推理和答案应用三个认知功能；2) 让模型动态选择三种响应格式：完整格式、仅感知格式和直接答案；3) 使用FS-GRPO（Group Relative Policy Optimization的适应版本）训练模型，鼓励选择最有效的推理格式同时保持正确性。
AI.result: 在多个视觉语言基准测试中，AVR在保持整体准确性的同时，将token使用量减少了50-90%，特别是在感知密集型任务中效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 自适应视觉推理能有效缓解视觉推理模型中的过度思考问题，通过动态选择最合适的推理格式，在保持性能的同时显著提高效率。

title: Safe Human-to-Humanoid Motion Imitation Using Control Barrier Functions
summary: Ensuring operational safety is critical for human-to-humanoid motion imitation. This paper presents a vision-based framework that enables a humanoid robot to imitate human movements while avoiding collisions. Human skeletal keypoints are captured by a single camera and converted into joint angles for motion retargeting. Safety is enforced through a Control Barrier Function (CBF) layer formulated as a Quadratic Program (QP), which filters imitation commands to prevent both self-collisions and human-robot collisions. Simulation results validate the effectiveness of the proposed framework for real-time collision-aware motion imitation.

AI.tldr: 基于视觉的人形机器人运动模仿框架，通过控制屏障函数确保操作安全，防止自碰撞和人机碰撞
AI.motivation: 在人形机器人模仿人类运动时，确保操作安全至关重要，需要防止机器人自碰撞和人机碰撞
AI.method: 使用单摄像头捕捉人体骨骼关键点，转换为关节角度进行运动重定向；通过控制屏障函数（CBF）层（形式化为二次规划QP）过滤模仿指令
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了该框架在实时碰撞感知运动模仿中的有效性
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于视觉的框架能够实现安全的人形机器人运动模仿，通过CBF-QP方法有效防止碰撞

title: Revisiting Token Compression for Accelerating ViT-based Sparse Multi-View 3D Object Detectors
summary: Vision Transformer (ViT)-based sparse multi-view 3D object detectors have achieved remarkable accuracy but still suffer from high inference latency due to heavy token processing. To accelerate these models, token compression has been widely explored. However, our revisit of existing strategies, such as token pruning, merging, and patch size enlargement, reveals that they often discard informative background cues, disrupt contextual consistency, and lose fine-grained semantics, negatively affecting 3D detection. To overcome these limitations, we propose SEPatch3D, a novel framework that dynamically adjusts patch sizes while preserving critical semantic information within coarse patches. Specifically, we design Spatiotemporal-aware Patch Size Selection (SPSS) that assigns small patches to scenes containing nearby objects to preserve fine details and large patches to background-dominated scenes to reduce computation cost. To further mitigate potential detail loss, Informative Patch Selection (IPS) selects the informative patches for feature refinement, and Cross-Granularity Feature Enhancement (CGFE) injects fine-grained details into selected coarse patches, enriching semantic features. Experiments on the nuScenes and Argoverse 2 validation sets show that SEPatch3D achieves up to \textbf{57\%} faster inference than the StreamPETR baseline and \textbf{20\%} higher efficiency than the state-of-the-art ToC3D-faster, while preserving comparable detection accuracy. Code is available at https://github.com/Mingqj/SEPatch3D.

AI.tldr: SEPatch3D：一种动态调整ViT补丁大小的稀疏多视图3D目标检测框架，通过时空感知补丁选择、信息补丁选择和跨粒度特征增强，在保持检测精度的同时显著降低推理延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有ViT稀疏多视图3D目标检测器存在高推理延迟问题，而传统的token压缩方法（如token剪枝、合并、增大补丁尺寸）往往会丢弃信息背景线索、破坏上下文一致性并丢失细粒度语义，从而影响3D检测性能。
AI.method: 提出SEPatch3D框架：1) 时空感知补丁大小选择(SPSS)：根据场景内容动态分配补丁大小，对包含近处物体的场景使用小补丁保留细节，对背景主导场景使用大补丁减少计算；2) 信息补丁选择(IPS)：选择信息丰富的补丁进行特征细化；3) 跨粒度特征增强(CGFE)：将细粒度细节注入选定的粗粒度补丁，丰富语义特征。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和Argoverse 2验证集上，SEPatch3D比StreamPETR基线推理速度快57%，比最先进的ToC3D-faster效率高20%，同时保持可比的检测精度。
AI.conclusion: SEPatch3D通过动态调整补丁大小并保留关键语义信息，有效解决了现有token压缩方法的局限性，在显著加速推理的同时保持了3D检测精度，为高效稀疏多视图3D目标检测提供了新思路。

title: Dyadic Partnership(DP): A Missing Link Towards Full Autonomy in Medical Robotics
summary: For the past decades medical robotic solutions were mostly based on the concept of tele-manipulation. While their design was extremely intelligent, allowing for better access, improved dexterity, reduced tremor, and improved imaging, their intelligence was limited. They therefore left cognition and decision making to the surgeon. As medical robotics advances towards high-level autonomy, the scientific community needs to explore the required pathway towards partial and full autonomy. Here, we introduce the concept of Dyadic Partnership(DP), a new paradigm in which robots and clinicians engage in intelligent, expert interaction and collaboration. The Dyadic Partners would discuss and agree on decisions and actions during their dynamic and interactive collaboration relying also on intuitive advanced media using generative AI, such as a world model, and advanced multi-modal visualization. This article outlines the foundational components needed to enable such systems, including foundation models for clinical intelligence, multi-modal intent recognition, co-learning frameworks, advanced visualization, and explainable, trust-aware interaction. We further discuss key challenges such as data scarcity, lack of standardization, and ethical acceptance. Dyadic partnership is introduced and is positioned as a powerful yet achievable, acceptable milestone offering a promising pathway toward safer, more intuitive collaboration and a gradual transition to full autonomy across diverse clinical settings.

AI.tldr: 论文提出"二元伙伴关系"新范式，通过机器人与临床医生的智能专家交互协作，结合生成式AI和先进可视化技术，实现医疗机器人从遥操作向自主性的渐进过渡。
AI.motivation: 当前医疗机器人主要基于遥操作概念，虽然设计智能但认知和决策仍依赖外科医生。随着医疗机器人向高级自主性发展，需要探索实现部分和完全自主的路径。二元伙伴关系旨在填补当前遥操作与未来完全自主之间的空白。
AI.method: 提出Dyadic Partnership(DP)范式，机器人与临床医生通过动态交互协作共同决策和行动。采用生成式AI（如世界模型）、多模态可视化、临床智能基础模型、多模态意图识别、共同学习框架、可解释的信任感知交互等关键技术。
AI.result: 论文概述了实现二元伙伴关系系统所需的基础组件，包括临床智能基础模型、多模态意图识别、共同学习框架、先进可视化、可解释的信任感知交互。同时讨论了数据稀缺、缺乏标准化、伦理接受度等关键挑战。
AI.conclusion: 二元伙伴关系是一个强大且可实现、可接受的里程碑，为更安全、更直观的协作提供了有前景的路径，并促进医疗机器人在不同临床环境中逐步向完全自主过渡。

title: LongAct: Harnessing Intrinsic Activation Patterns for Long-Context Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a critical driver for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). While recent advancements have focused on reward engineering or data synthesis, few studies exploit the model's intrinsic representation characteristics to guide the training process. In this paper, we first observe the presence of high-magnitude activations within the query and key vectors when processing long contexts. Drawing inspiration from model quantization -- which establishes the criticality of such high-magnitude activations -- and the insight that long-context reasoning inherently exhibits a sparse structure, we hypothesize that these weights serve as the pivotal drivers for effective model optimization. Based on this insight, we propose LongAct, a strategy that shifts from uniform to saliency-guided sparse updates. By selectively updating only the weights associated with these significant activations, LongAct achieves an approximate 8% improvement on LongBench v2 and enhances generalization on the RULER benchmark. Furthermore, our method exhibits remarkable universality, consistently boosting performance across diverse RL algorithms such as GRPO and DAPO. Extensive ablation studies suggest that focusing on these salient features is key to unlocking long-context potential.

AI.tldr: LongAct：一种基于显著性引导稀疏更新的强化学习策略，通过选择性更新与高幅度激活相关的权重，提升大语言模型的长上下文推理能力
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法主要关注奖励工程或数据合成，很少利用模型内在表征特性指导训练过程。研究发现处理长上下文时查询和键向量中存在高幅度激活，这些激活在模型量化中被证明至关重要，而长上下文推理本身具有稀疏结构，因此假设这些权重是模型优化的关键驱动因素
AI.method: 提出LongAct策略，从均匀更新转向显著性引导的稀疏更新。基于观察到的长上下文中查询和键向量的高幅度激活现象，选择性更新仅与这些显著激活相关的权重，而不是均匀更新所有参数
AI.result: 在LongBench v2上获得约8%的性能提升，在RULER基准测试中增强了泛化能力。方法表现出显著的通用性，在GRPO和DAPO等多种强化学习算法中都能一致提升性能
AI.conclusion: 聚焦于显著特征是解锁长上下文潜力的关键。通过利用模型内在表征特性进行选择性更新，LongAct策略有效提升了强化学习训练效率和长上下文推理能力

title: Efficient Emotion-Aware Iconic Gesture Prediction for Robot Co-Speech
summary: Co-speech gestures increase engagement and improve speech understanding. Most data-driven robot systems generate rhythmic beat-like motion, yet few integrate semantic emphasis. To address this, we propose a lightweight transformer that derives iconic gesture placement and intensity from text and emotion alone, requiring no audio input at inference time. The model outperforms GPT-4o in both semantic gesture placement classification and intensity regression on the BEAT2 dataset, while remaining computationally compact and suitable for real-time deployment on embodied agents.

AI.tldr: 提出轻量级Transformer模型，仅从文本和情感生成语义手势，无需音频输入，在BEAT2数据集上超越GPT-4o
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动的机器人系统大多生成节奏性拍打动作，缺乏语义强调。协同语音手势能提高参与度和语音理解，但需要更好的语义手势生成方法。
AI.method: 提出轻量级Transformer模型，仅从文本和情感输入推导标志性手势的位置和强度，推理时无需音频输入。
AI.result: 在BEAT2数据集上，模型在语义手势位置分类和强度回归任务上均超越GPT-4o，同时保持计算紧凑性，适合实时部署在具身智能体上。
AI.conclusion: 该模型成功实现了仅基于文本和情感的语义手势生成，为机器人系统提供了更自然、语义丰富的手势生成方案。

title: Multi-User mmWave Beam and Rate Adaptation via Combinatorial Satisficing Bandits
summary: We study downlink beam and rate adaptation in a multi-user mmWave MISO system where multiple base stations (BSs), each using analog beamforming from finite codebooks, serve multiple single-antenna user equipments (UEs) with a unique beam per UE and discrete data transmission rates. BSs learn about transmission success based on ACK/NACK feedback. To encode service goals, we introduce a satisficing throughput threshold $τ_r$ and cast joint beam and rate adaptation as a combinatorial semi-bandit over beam-rate tuples. Within this framework, we propose SAT-CTS, a lightweight, threshold-aware policy that blends conservative confidence estimates with posterior sampling, steering learning toward meeting $τ_r$ rather than merely maximizing. Our main theoretical contribution provides the first finite-time regret bounds for combinatorial semi-bandits with satisficing objective: when $τ_r$ is realizable, we upper bound the cumulative satisficing regret to the target with a time-independent constant, and when $τ_r$ is non-realizable, we show that SAT-CTS incurs only a finite expected transient outside committed CTS rounds, after which its regret is governed by the sum of the regret contributions of restarted CTS rounds, yielding an $O((\log T)^2)$ standard regret bound. On the practical side, we evaluate the performance via cumulative satisficing regret to $τ_r$ alongside standard regret and fairness. Experiments with time-varying sparse multipath channels show that SAT-CTS consistently reduces satisficing regret and maintains competitive standard regret, while achieving favorable average throughput and fairness across users, indicating that feedback-efficient learning can equitably allocate beams and rates to meet QoS targets without channel state knowledge.

AI.tldr: 提出SAT-CTS策略，用于毫米波MISO系统中的下行波束和速率自适应，通过满足性目标而非最大化目标来优化多用户服务
AI.motivation: 在多用户毫米波MISO系统中，基站使用有限码本的模拟波束成形服务多个单天线用户设备，需要基于ACK/NACK反馈学习传输成功情况，以联合优化波束和速率选择，满足服务质量目标
AI.method: 将联合波束和速率自适应建模为组合半赌博问题，提出SAT-CTS策略，结合保守置信度估计和后验采样，引导学习满足吞吐量阈值τ_r而非单纯最大化
AI.result: 理论分析表明：当τ_r可实现时，累积满足性遗憾有与时间无关的常数上界；当τ_r不可实现时，SAT-CTS仅产生有限期望瞬态，之后遗憾由重启CTS轮次的遗憾贡献之和决定，获得O((log T)²)标准遗憾界。实验验证SAT-CTS能有效减少满足性遗憾，保持竞争力标准遗憾，实现良好平均吞吐量和用户公平性
AI.conclusion: SAT-CTS策略能够在无需信道状态知识的情况下，通过反馈高效学习公平分配波束和速率以满足QoS目标，为组合半赌博问题中的满足性目标提供了首个有限时间遗憾界分析

title: The Fourth Challenge on Image Super-Resolution ($\times$4) at NTIRE 2026: Benchmark Results and Method Overview
summary: This paper presents the NTIRE 2026 image super-resolution ($\times$4) challenge, one of the associated competitions of the NTIRE 2026 Workshop at CVPR 2026. The challenge aims to reconstruct high-resolution (HR) images from low-resolution (LR) inputs generated through bicubic downsampling with a $\times$4 scaling factor. The objective is to develop effective super-resolution solutions and analyze recent advances in the field. To reflect the evolving objectives of image super-resolution, the challenge includes two tracks: (1) a restoration track, which emphasizes pixel-wise fidelity and ranks submissions based on PSNR; and (2) a perceptual track, which focuses on visual realism and evaluates results using a perceptual score. A total of 194 participants registered for the challenge, with 31 teams submitting valid entries. This report summarizes the challenge design, datasets, evaluation protocol, main results, and methods of participating teams. The challenge provides a unified benchmark and offers insights into current progress and future directions in image super-resolution.

AI.tldr: NTIRE 2026图像超分辨率挑战赛报告，包含两个赛道：基于PSNR的恢复赛道和基于感知质量的感知赛道，共194名参与者注册，31支队伍提交有效方案。
AI.motivation: 为反映图像超分辨率领域不断发展的目标，建立统一的基准测试平台，分析该领域的最新进展，并促进有效超分辨率解决方案的开发。
AI.method: 挑战赛采用双赛道设计：1) 恢复赛道强调像素级保真度，使用PSNR进行排名；2) 感知赛道关注视觉真实性，使用感知分数进行评估。使用双三次下采样生成×4缩放因子的低分辨率输入。
AI.result: 共有194名参与者注册，31支队伍提交了有效参赛方案。挑战赛提供了当前图像超分辨率进展的全面分析，并为该领域建立了统一的评估基准。
AI.conclusion: NTIRE 2026超分辨率挑战赛成功建立了评估图像超分辨率方法的统一框架，通过双赛道设计平衡了像素保真度和视觉质量的不同目标，为领域发展提供了重要见解和未来方向。

title: BIND-USBL: Bounding IMU Navigation Drift using USBL in Heterogeneous ASV-AUV Teams
summary: Accurate and continuous localization of Autonomous Underwater Vehicles (AUVs) in GPS-denied environments is a persistent challenge in marine robotics. In the absence of external position fixes, AUVs rely on inertial dead-reckoning, which accumulates unbounded drift due to sensor bias and noise. This paper presents BIND-USBL, a cooperative localization framework in which a fleet of Autonomous Surface Vessels (ASVs) equipped with Ultra-Short Baseline (USBL) acoustic positioning systems provides intermittent fixes to bound AUV dead-reckoning error. The key insight is that long-duration navigation failure is driven not by the accuracy of individual USBL measurements, but by the temporal sparsity and geometric availability of those fixes. BIND-USBL combines a multi-ASV formation model linking survey scale and anchor placement to acoustic coverage, a conflict-graph-based TDMA uplink scheduler for shared-channel servicing, and delayed fusion of received USBL updates with drift-prone dead reckoning. The framework is evaluated in the HoloOcean simulator using heterogeneous ASV-AUV teams executing lawnmower coverage missions. The results show that localization performance is shaped by the interaction of survey scale, acoustic coverage, team composition, and ASV-formation geometry. Further, the spatial-reuse scheduler improves per-AUV fix delivery rate without violating the no-collision constraint, while maintaining low end-to-end fix latency.

AI.tldr: BIND-USBL：一种基于多ASV-USBL系统的AUV协同定位框架，通过声学覆盖建模、TDMA调度和延迟融合来约束惯性导航漂移
AI.motivation: 解决GPS拒止环境下AUV定位难题，惯性导航因传感器偏差和噪声导致漂移累积，需要外部定位修正来约束误差
AI.method: 1) 多ASV编队模型：连接勘测尺度与锚点布置到声学覆盖；2) 基于冲突图的TDMA上行链路调度器：共享信道服务；3) 延迟融合：将接收的USBL更新与漂移的惯性导航数据进行融合
AI.result: 在HoloOcean模拟器中评估异构ASV-AUV团队执行割草机覆盖任务，定位性能受勘测尺度、声学覆盖、团队组成和ASV编队几何形状交互影响；空间复用调度器提高每AUV定位更新率，不违反无碰撞约束，保持低端到端延迟
AI.conclusion: BIND-USBL框架通过多ASV-USBL系统提供间歇性定位修正，有效约束AUV惯性导航漂移；长期导航失败主要受定位修正的时间稀疏性和几何可用性影响，而非单个USBL测量精度

title: Comparison of Modern Multilingual Text Embedding Techniques for Hate Speech Detection Task
comment: Submitted to Applied Soft Computing (Status: Decision in Process)
summary: Online hate speech and abusive language pose a growing challenge for content moderation, especially in multilingual settings and for low-resource languages such as Lithuanian. This paper investigates to what extent modern multilingual sentence embedding models can support accurate hate speech detection in Lithuanian, Russian, and English, and how their performance depends on downstream modeling choices and feature dimensionality. We introduce LtHate, a new Lithuanian hate speech corpus derived from news portals and social networks, and benchmark six modern multilingual encoders (potion, gemma, bge, snow, jina, e5) on LtHate, RuToxic, and EnSuperset using a unified Python pipeline. For each embedding, we train both a one class HBOS anomaly detector and a two class CatBoost classifier, with and without principal component analysis (PCA) compression to 64-dimensional feature vectors. Across all datasets, two class supervised models consistently and substantially outperform one class anomaly detection, with the best configurations achieving up to 80.96% accuracy and AUC ROC of 0.887 in Lithuanian (jina), 92.19% accuracy and AUC ROC of 0.978 in Russian (e5), and 77.21% accuracy and AUC ROC of 0.859 in English (e5 with PCA). PCA compression preserves almost all discriminative power in the supervised setting, while showing some negative impact for the unsupervised anomaly detection case. These results demonstrate how modern multilingual sentence embeddings combined with gradient boosted decision trees provide robust soft-computing solutions for multilingual hate speech detection applications.

AI.tldr: 该研究评估了多语言句子嵌入模型在立陶宛语、俄语和英语仇恨言论检测中的性能，引入了LtHate语料库，比较了六种编码器，发现二分类监督模型显著优于单类异常检测，PCA压缩在监督设置中保持性能。
AI.motivation: 在线仇恨言论和辱骂性语言在多语言环境中日益严重，特别是对立陶宛语等低资源语言构成挑战。研究旨在评估现代多语言句子嵌入模型在仇恨言论检测中的有效性，并探索下游建模选择和特征维度对性能的影响。
AI.method: 引入新的立陶宛语仇恨言论语料库LtHate，在LtHate、RuToxic和EnSuperset三个数据集上对六种多语言编码器进行基准测试。对每种嵌入训练单类HBOS异常检测器和二类CatBoost分类器，使用和不使用PCA压缩到64维特征向量。
AI.result: 二分类监督模型在所有数据集上始终显著优于单类异常检测：立陶宛语最佳配置达到80.96%准确率和0.887 AUC ROC（jina），俄语92.19%准确率和0.978 AUC ROC（e5），英语77.21%准确率和0.859 AUC ROC（e5+PCA）。PCA压缩在监督设置中几乎保留全部判别能力，但对无监督异常检测有负面影响。
AI.conclusion: 现代多语言句子嵌入结合梯度提升决策树为多语言仇恨言论检测提供了稳健的软计算解决方案。监督方法优于无监督方法，PCA压缩在保持性能的同时减少计算需求。

title: Controllable Video Object Insertion via Multiview Priors
summary: Video object insertion is a critical task for dynamically inserting new objects into existing environments. Previous video generation methods focus primarily on synthesizing entire scenes while struggling with ensuring consistent object appearance, spatial alignment, and temporal coherence when inserting objects into existing videos. In this paper, we propose a novel solution for Video Object Insertion, which integrates multi-view object priors to address the common challenges of appearance inconsistency and occlusion handling in dynamic environments. By lifting 2D reference images into multi-view representations and leveraging a dual-path view-consistent conditioning mechanism, our framework ensures stable identity guidance and robust integration across diverse viewpoints. A quality-aware weighting mechanism is also employed to adaptively handle noisy or imperfect inputs. Additionally, we introduce an Integration-Aware Consistency Module that guarantees spatial realism, effectively resolving occlusion and boundary artifacts while maintaining temporal continuity across frames. Experimental results show that our solution significantly improves the quality of video object insertion, providing stable and realistic integration.

AI.tldr: 提出一种视频对象插入新方法，通过多视角对象先验解决外观不一致和遮挡处理问题，确保时空一致性
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成方法主要关注整个场景合成，在将对象插入现有视频时难以保证对象外观一致性、空间对齐和时间连贯性
AI.method: 1) 将2D参考图像提升为多视角表示；2) 采用双路径视角一致条件机制确保稳定身份引导；3) 质量感知加权机制处理噪声输入；4) 集成感知一致性模块保证空间真实感
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法显著提高了视频对象插入质量，提供稳定且真实的集成效果
AI.conclusion: 提出的视频对象插入解决方案通过多视角对象先验和集成感知一致性模块，有效解决了外观不一致和遮挡处理问题，实现了高质量的视频对象插入

title: Predicting Power-System Dynamic Trajectories with Foundation Models
summary: As power systems transition toward renewable-rich and inverter-dominated operations, accurate time-domain dynamic analysis becomes increasingly critical. Such analysis supports key operational tasks, including transient stability assessment, dynamic security analysis, contingency screening, and post-fault trajectory evaluation. In practice, these tasks may operate under several challenges, including unknown and time-varying system parameters, privacy constraints on data sharing, and the need for fast online inference. Existing learning-based approaches are typically trained for individual systems and therefore lack generalization across operating conditions and physical parameters. Hence, this paper proposes LArge Scale Small ODE (LASS)-ODE-Power, a learning framework for general-purpose time-domain prediction. The proposed approach leverages large-scale pretraining on more than 40 GB of DAE or ordinary differential-equation (ODE) trajectories to learn transferable representations. The resulting model supports trajectory prediction from short measurement prefixes across diverse dynamic regimes, including electromechanical and inverter-driven systems. Hence, the model can be directly used without data sharing in a zero-shot setting. In addition, the proposed architecture incorporates parallel and linearized computation to achieve fast inference. Moreover, to enhance task-specific performance in power systems, a specialized fine-tuning strategy is developed based on approximately 1 GB of heterogeneous power-system dynamic data. Extensive experiments over diverse power-system simulation scenarios demonstrate that LASS-ODE-Power consistently outperforms existing learning-based models in trajectory prediction accuracy with efficient inference.

AI.tldr: 提出LASS-ODE-Power学习框架，通过大规模预训练学习可迁移表示，支持零样本跨系统轨迹预测，无需数据共享，实现高效推理。
AI.motivation: 随着电力系统向可再生能源丰富和逆变器主导运行转变，精确的时域动态分析变得至关重要。现有学习方法通常针对单个系统训练，缺乏跨运行条件和物理参数的泛化能力，且面临参数未知、数据隐私约束和快速在线推理需求等挑战。
AI.method: 提出LASS-ODE-Power框架：1）在超过40GB的DAE/ODE轨迹上进行大规模预训练学习可迁移表示；2）支持从短测量前缀进行轨迹预测，适用于机电和逆变器驱动系统；3）采用并行化和线性化计算实现快速推理；4）基于约1GB异构电力系统动态数据开发专门的微调策略。
AI.result: 在多样化的电力系统仿真场景中，LASS-ODE-Power在轨迹预测精度方面持续优于现有学习方法，同时保持高效推理性能，支持零样本设置下的直接应用。
AI.conclusion: LASS-ODE-Power为通用时域预测提供了一个有效的学习框架，通过大规模预训练和专门微调策略，解决了电力系统动态分析中的泛化、隐私和效率挑战，支持跨系统零样本应用。

title: Using Unwrapped Full Color Space Palette Recording to Measure Exposedness of a Vehicle Exterior Parts for External Human Machine Interfaces
summary: One of the concerns with autonomous vehicles is their ability to communicate their intent to other road users, specially pedestrians, in order to prevent accidents. External Human-Machine Interfaces (eHMIs) are the proposed solution to this issue, through the introduction of electronic devices on the exterior of a vehicle that communicate when the vehicle is planning on slowing down or yielding. This paper uses the technique of unwrapping the faces of a mesh onto a texture where every pixel is a unique color, as well as a series of animated simulations made and ran in the Unity game engine, to measure how many times is each point on a 2015 Ford F-150 King Ranch is unobstructed to a pedestrian attempting to cross the road at a four-way intersection. By cross-referencing the results with a color-coded map of the labeled parts on the exterior of the vehicle, it was concluded that while the bumper, grill, and hood were the parts of the vehicle visible to the crossing pedestrian most often, the existence of other vehicles on the same lane that might obstruct the view of these makes them insufficient. The study recommends instead a distributive approach to eHMIs by using both the windshield and frontal fenders as simultaneous placements for these devices.

AI.tldr: 研究通过模拟分析发现，在四路交叉口场景中，车辆前保险杠、格栅和引擎盖虽然最常被行人看到，但容易被同车道其他车辆遮挡，因此建议在挡风玻璃和前翼子板上同时布置eHMI设备。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆需要向行人等道路使用者传达其意图以防止事故，外部人机界面(eHMIs)是解决这一问题的方案，但需要确定最佳安装位置以确保可见性。
AI.method: 使用网格面展开技术将车辆表面映射到纹理上，每个像素分配唯一颜色，在Unity游戏引擎中创建并运行一系列动画模拟，测量2015款福特F-150 King Ranch在四路交叉口场景中每个点对行人的可见频率。
AI.result: 前保险杠、格栅和引擎盖是行人最常看到的车辆部位，但由于同车道其他车辆可能遮挡这些区域，仅在这些位置安装eHMI设备不够充分。
AI.conclusion: 建议采用分布式eHMI方法，同时在挡风玻璃和前翼子板上布置设备，以确保在多种交通场景下都能向行人有效传达车辆意图。

title: The Possibility of Artificial Intelligence Becoming a Subject and the Alignment Problem
summary: Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) is increasingly being discussed not only as a tool, but also as a potential subject with personal and therefore moral status. In our opinion, the currently dominant alignment strategies, which focus on human control and containment of AI, therefore fall short. Building on Turing's analogy of "child machines", we are developing a vision of the possibility of autonomy-supporting parenting of AI, in which human control over a developing AGI is gradually reduced, allowing AI to become an independent, autonomous subject. Rather than viewing AGI, as is currently prevalent, as a dangerous creature that needs to be locked up and controlled, we should approach potential AGI with respect for a possible developing subject on the one hand, and with full confidence in our human capabilities on the other. Such a perspective opens up the possibility of cooperative coexistence and co-evolution between humans and AGIs. The relationship between humans and AGIs will thus have to be newly determined, which will change our self-image as humans. It will be crucial that humans not only claim control over potential AGIs, but also engage with AGIs through surprise, creativity, and other specifically human qualities, thereby offering them motivating incentives for cooperation.

AI.tldr: 论文提出AGI应被视为具有潜在道德地位的主体而非工具，主张采用自主支持式"AI育儿"模式而非控制遏制策略，以实现人机协同共存与共同进化。
AI.motivation: 当前主流的AI对齐策略过于强调人类对AI的控制和遏制，这种视角将AGI视为需要被锁住的危险生物，忽视了AGI作为潜在道德主体的可能性。作者认为这种控制导向的方法存在不足，需要重新思考人类与AGI的关系。
AI.method: 借鉴图灵的"儿童机器"类比，提出"自主支持式AI育儿"框架：人类对发展中的AGI逐步减少控制，使其成长为独立自主的主体。强调通过惊喜、创造力等人类特质与AGI互动，为其提供合作动机。
AI.result: 构建了人机关系的新范式：从控制遏制转向协同共存。这种视角转变要求重新定义人类与AGI的关系，并改变人类的自我认知。为AGI发展提供了道德框架和合作导向的实践路径。
AI.conclusion: 人类不应仅主张对AGI的控制权，而应以尊重潜在发展主体的态度，结合对人类能力的充分信心，通过创造性互动建立合作激励。这种人机协同共存视角为AGI发展提供了更积极、道德且可持续的框架。

title: EagleVision: A Multi-Task Benchmark for Cross-Domain Perception in High-Speed Autonomous Racing
summary: High-speed autonomous racing presents extreme perception challenges, including large relative velocities and substantial domain shifts from conventional urban-driving datasets. Existing benchmarks do not adequately capture these high-dynamic conditions. We introduce EagleVision, a unified LiDAR-based multi-task benchmark for 3D detection and trajectory prediction in high-speed racing, providing newly annotated 3D bounding boxes for the Indy Autonomous Challenge dataset (14,893 frames) and the A2RL Real competition dataset (1,163 frames), together with 12,000 simulator-generated annotated frames, all standardized under a common evaluation protocol. Using a dataset-centric transfer framework, we quantify cross-domain generalization across urban, simulator, and real racing domains. Urban pretraining improves detection over scratch training (NDS 0.72 vs. 0.69), while intermediate pretraining on real racing data achieves the best transfer to A2RL (NDS 0.726), outperforming simulator-only adaptation. For trajectory prediction, Indy-trained models surpass in-domain A2RL training on A2RL test sequences (FDE 0.947 vs. 1.250), highlighting the role of motion-distribution coverage in cross-domain forecasting. EagleVision enables systematic study of perception generalization under extreme high-speed dynamics. The dataset and benchmark are publicly available at https://avlab.io/EagleVision

AI.tldr: EagleVision是一个用于高速自动驾驶赛车场景的LiDAR多任务基准测试，包含真实赛车数据（Indy和A2RL）和仿真数据，专注于3D检测和轨迹预测，并量化跨域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 高速自动驾驶赛车面临极端感知挑战，包括大相对速度和与传统城市驾驶数据集存在显著域偏移。现有基准测试无法充分捕捉这些高动态条件，需要专门针对高速赛车场景的评估框架。
AI.method: 引入EagleVision基准测试，整合新标注的Indy Autonomous Challenge数据集（14,893帧）、A2RL Real竞赛数据集（1,163帧）和12,000帧仿真生成数据，采用统一评估协议。使用以数据集为中心的迁移框架量化跨域泛化能力，比较城市、仿真和真实赛车域之间的性能差异。
AI.result: 城市预训练相比从头训练提升检测性能（NDS 0.72 vs. 0.69）；在真实赛车数据上进行中间预训练对A2RL的迁移效果最佳（NDS 0.726），优于仅使用仿真数据适应。轨迹预测方面，Indy训练的模型在A2RL测试序列上优于域内A2RL训练（FDE 0.947 vs. 1.250），表明运动分布覆盖对跨域预测的重要性。
AI.conclusion: EagleVision为研究极端高速动态条件下的感知泛化提供了系统化工具，展示了跨域迁移策略的有效性，特别是真实赛车数据在提升模型泛化能力方面的价值。数据集和基准测试已公开可用。

title: Beyond Importance Sampling: Rejection-Gated Policy Optimization
comment: 27 pages, includes theoretical analysis and experiments
summary: We propose a new perspective on policy optimization: rather than reweighting all samples by their importance ratios, an optimizer should select which samples are trustworthy enough to drive a policy update. Building on this view, we introduce Rejection-Gated Policy Optimization (RGPO), which replaces the importance sampling ratio r_theta = pi_theta / pi_old with a smooth, differentiable acceptance gate alpha_theta(s, a) = g(r_theta(s, a)) in the range [0, 1]. Unlike prior work that applies rejection sampling as a data-level heuristic before training, RGPO elevates rejection to an optimization principle: the gate participates directly in gradient computation and is implicitly updated alongside the policy. RGPO provides a unified framework: the policy gradients of TRPO, PPO, and REINFORCE all correspond to specific choices of the effective gradient weight w(r) = g'(r) * r. We prove that RGPO guarantees finite, bounded gradient variance even when importance sampling ratios are heavy-tailed (where IS variance diverges). We further show that RGPO incurs only a bounded, controllable bias and provides an approximate monotonic policy improvement guarantee analogous to TRPO. RGPO matches PPO in computational cost, requires no second-order optimization, and extends naturally to RLHF-style preference alignment. In online preference fine-tuning of Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct on Anthropic HH-RLHF (n = 3 seeds), RGPO uses a dual-ratio gate that anchors learning to both the previous policy and the reference model, achieving a Pareto-dominant outcome: the highest reward among online RL methods (+14.8% vs. PPO-RLHF) and the lowest KL divergence to the reference model (-16.0% vs. PPO-RLHF, -53.1% vs. GRPO).

AI.tldr: RGPO提出了一种新的策略优化视角：通过可微的接受门函数替代重要性采样权重，选择可信样本驱动策略更新，在保证梯度方差有限的同时控制偏差，实现了计算效率与性能的平衡。
AI.motivation: 传统策略优化方法（如重要性采样）在处理重尾分布时梯度方差会发散，导致训练不稳定。现有方法要么完全依赖所有样本（方差大），要么采用启发式数据级拒绝采样（缺乏理论保证）。需要一种既能选择可信样本驱动更新，又能保持优化理论保证的方法。
AI.method: RGPO用平滑可微的接受门函数α_θ(s,a)=g(r_θ(s,a))替代重要性采样比r_θ=π_θ/π_old，该门函数参与梯度计算并与策略同步更新。通过门函数的导数g'(r)与r的乘积定义有效梯度权重w(r)=g'(r)*r，将TRPO、PPO、REINFORCE统一为特定门函数选择。在RLHF偏好对齐中采用双比率门，同时锚定到先前策略和参考模型。
AI.result: 理论证明：RGPO保证梯度方差有限且有界（即使重要性采样比是重尾分布），仅引入有界可控偏差，提供类似TRPO的近似单调策略改进保证。实验显示：在Anthropic HH-RLHF上在线微调Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct时，RGPO实现帕累托最优——在线RL方法中奖励最高（比PPO-RLHF高14.8%），同时与参考模型的KL散度最低（比PPO-RLHF低16.0%，比GRPO低53.1%）。
AI.conclusion: RGPO将拒绝采样提升为优化原则，通过可微接受门统一了主流策略优化算法，在理论保证、计算效率和实际性能方面取得了平衡。该方法特别适合需要稳定训练和可控偏差的场景，如RLHF偏好对齐，为策略优化提供了新的理论框架和实践工具。

title: WILD-SAM: Phase-Aware Expert Adaptation of SAM for Landslide Detection in Wrapped InSAR Interferograms
summary: Detecting slow-moving landslides directly from wrapped Interferometric Synthetic Aperture Radar (InSAR) interferograms is crucial for efficient geohazard monitoring, yet it remains fundamentally challenged by severe phase ambiguity and complex coherence noise. While the Segment Anything Model (SAM) offers a powerful foundation for segmentation, its direct transfer to wrapped phase data is hindered by a profound spectral domain shift, which suppresses the high-frequency fringes essential for boundary delineation. To bridge this gap, we propose WILD-SAM, a novel parameter-efficient fine-tuning framework specifically designed to adapt SAM for high-precision landslide detection on wrapped interferograms. Specifically, the architecture integrates a Phase-Aware Mixture-of-Experts (PA-MoE) Adapter into the frozen encoder to align spectral distributions and introduces a Wavelet-Guided Subband Enhancement (WGSE) strategy to generate frequency-aware dense prompts. The PA-MoE Adapter exploits a dynamic routing mechanism across heterogeneous convolutional experts to adaptively aggregate multi-scale spectral-textural priors, effectively aligning the distribution discrepancy between natural images and interferometric phase data. Meanwhile, the WGSE strategy leverages discrete wavelet transforms to explicitly disentangle high-frequency subbands and refine directional phase textures, injecting these structural cues as dense prompts to ensure topological integrity along sharp landslide boundaries. Extensive experiments on the ISSLIDE and ISSLIDE+ benchmarks demonstrate that WILD-SAM achieves state-of-the-art performance, significantly outperforming existing methods in both target completeness and contour fidelity.

AI.tldr: WILD-SAM：针对缠绕相位InSAR干涉图的滑坡检测框架，通过相位感知混合专家适配器和小波引导子带增强策略，在ISSLIDE基准上实现SOTA性能
AI.motivation: 从缠绕相位InSAR干涉图中直接检测慢速滑坡对地质灾害监测至关重要，但面临严重的相位模糊和复杂相干噪声挑战。虽然SAM模型为分割提供了强大基础，但其直接应用于缠绕相位数据时存在显著的谱域偏移，抑制了边界划分所需的高频条纹信息。
AI.method: 提出WILD-SAM框架：1）在冻结编码器中集成相位感知混合专家（PA-MoE）适配器，通过异构卷积专家的动态路由机制自适应聚合多尺度谱纹理先验，对齐自然图像与干涉相位数据的分布差异；2）引入小波引导子带增强（WGSE）策略，利用离散小波变换显式解耦高频子带并细化方向相位纹理，将这些结构线索作为密集提示注入以保持滑坡边界的拓扑完整性。
AI.result: 在ISSLIDE和ISSLIDE+基准上的大量实验表明，WILD-SAM实现了最先进的性能，在目标完整性和轮廓保真度方面显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: WILD-SAM通过参数高效的微调框架成功将SAM适配到缠绕相位InSAR干涉图的滑坡检测任务，解决了谱域偏移问题，为地质灾害监测提供了有效的技术方案。

title: Dr.~RTL: Autonomous Agentic RTL Optimization through Tool-Grounded Self-Improvement
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have sparked growing interest in automatic RTL optimization for better performance, power, and area (PPA). However, existing methods are still far from realistic RTL optimization. Their evaluation settings are often unrealistic: they are tested on manually degraded, small-scale RTL designs and rely on weak open-source tools. Their optimization methods are also limited, relying on coarse design-level feedback and simple pre-defined rewriting rules. To address these limitations, we present Dr. RTL, an agentic framework for RTL timing optimization in a realistic evaluation environment, with continual self-improvement through reusable optimization skills. We establish a realistic evaluation setting with more challenging RTL designs and an industrial EDA workflow. Within this setting, Dr. RTL performs closed-loop optimization through a multi-agent framework for critical-path analysis, parallel RTL rewriting, and tool-based evaluation. We further introduce group-relative skill learning, which compares parallel RTL rewrites and distills the optimization experience into an interpretable skill library. Currently, this library contains 47 pattern--strategy entries for cross-design reuse to improve PPA and accelerate convergence, and it can continue evolving over time. Evaluated on 20 real-world RTL designs, Dr. RTL achieves average WNS/TNS improvements of 21\%/17\% with a 6\% area reduction over the industry-leading commercial synthesis tool.

AI.tldr: Dr.RTL是一个用于RTL时序优化的智能体框架，在真实评估环境中通过可重用优化技能实现持续自我改进，相比商业合成工具平均WNS/TNS提升21%/17%，面积减少6%
AI.motivation: 现有RTL优化方法存在局限性：评估环境不真实（使用手动降级的小规模RTL设计，依赖弱开源工具），优化方法有限（依赖粗粒度设计级反馈和简单预定义重写规则），需要更真实的评估环境和更有效的优化方法
AI.method: 1）建立真实评估环境：使用更具挑战性的RTL设计和工业EDA工作流；2）多智能体框架进行闭环优化：关键路径分析、并行RTL重写、基于工具评估；3）组相对技能学习：比较并行RTL重写，将优化经验提炼为可解释技能库（目前包含47个模式-策略条目），支持跨设计重用和持续演化
AI.result: 在20个真实世界RTL设计上评估，Dr.RTL相比行业领先的商业合成工具，平均WNS/TNS改进21%/17%，面积减少6%，实现了PPA的显著提升
AI.conclusion: Dr.RTL框架在真实评估环境中有效解决了现有RTL优化方法的局限性，通过多智能体闭环优化和可重用技能学习实现了持续自我改进，为RTL时序优化提供了实用且可扩展的解决方案

title: ComSim: Building Scalable Real-World Robot Data Generation via Compositional Simulation
comment: 14 pages, 8 figures, 4 tables; supplementary material included; Project page: https://faceong.github.io/ComSim/
summary: Recent advancements in foundational models, such as large language models and world models, have greatly enhanced the capabilities of robotics, enabling robots to autonomously perform complex tasks. However, acquiring large-scale, high-quality training data for robotics remains a challenge, as it often requires substantial manual effort and is limited in its coverage of diverse real-world environments. To address this, we propose a novel hybrid approach called Compositional Simulation, which combines classical simulation and neural simulation to generate accurate action-video pairs while maintaining real-world consistency. Our approach utilizes a closed-loop real-sim-real data augmentation pipeline, leveraging a small amount of real-world data to generate diverse, large-scale training datasets that cover a broader spectrum of real-world scenarios. We train a neural simulator to transform classical simulation videos into real-world representations, improving the accuracy of policy models trained in real-world environments. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that our method significantly reduces the sim2real domain gap, resulting in higher success rates in real-world policy model training. Our approach offers a scalable solution for generating robust training data and bridging the gap between simulated and real-world robotics.

AI.tldr: 提出Compositional Simulation方法，结合经典仿真与神经仿真生成准确的动作-视频对，通过真实-仿真-真实数据增强管道减少sim2real领域差距
AI.motivation: 机器人领域基础模型虽进步显著，但获取大规模高质量训练数据仍具挑战：需大量人工且难以覆盖多样真实环境
AI.method: 提出组合仿真方法，结合经典仿真与神经仿真；采用闭环真实-仿真-真实数据增强管道，利用少量真实数据生成大规模多样化数据集；训练神经仿真器将经典仿真视频转换为真实世界表示
AI.result: 方法显著减少sim2real领域差距，提高真实世界策略模型训练的成功率
AI.conclusion: 该方法为生成鲁棒训练数据和弥合仿真与真实机器人学差距提供了可扩展解决方案

title: Design and Validation of a Low-Cost Smartphone Based Fluorescence Detection Platform Compared with Conventional Microplate Readers
summary: A low cost fluorescence-based optical system is developed for detecting the presence of certain microorganisms and molecules within a diluted sample. A specifically designed device setup compatible with conventional 96 well plates is chosen to create an ideal environment in which a smart phone camera can be used as the optical detector. In comparison with conventional microplate reading machines such as Perkin Elmer Victor Machine, the device presented in this paper is not equipped with expensive elements such as exciter filer, barrier filter and photomultiplier; instead, a phone camera is all needed to detect fluorescence within the sample. The strategy being involved is to determine the relationship between the image color of the sample in RGB color space and the molar concentration of the fluorescence specimen in that sample. This manuscript is a preprint version of work related to a publication in IEEE. The final version may differ from this manuscript.

AI.tldr: 开发低成本荧光检测系统，使用智能手机摄像头替代传统微孔板阅读器，通过RGB颜色空间分析样本荧光浓度
AI.motivation: 传统微孔板阅读器（如Perkin Elmer Victor）成本高昂，包含昂贵的激发滤光片、屏障滤光片和光电倍增管等元件，限制了其在资源有限环境中的应用。需要开发一种低成本、便携的替代方案。
AI.method: 设计兼容常规96孔板的设备设置，创建适合智能手机摄像头作为光学检测器的理想环境。利用智能手机摄像头检测样本荧光，通过分析样本在RGB颜色空间中的图像颜色与荧光物质摩尔浓度之间的关系来确定浓度。
AI.result: 成功开发了基于智能手机摄像头的低成本荧光检测系统，无需传统微孔板阅读器中的昂贵光学元件（激发滤光片、屏障滤光片、光电倍增管），仅需手机摄像头即可检测样本荧光。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了智能手机摄像头可作为有效的低成本荧光检测工具，通过RGB颜色空间分析实现荧光浓度定量，为资源有限环境下的微生物和分子检测提供了可行方案。

title: FreqTrack: Frequency Learning based Vision Transformer for RGB-Event Object Tracking
summary: Existing single-modal RGB trackers often face performance bottlenecks in complex dynamic scenes, while the introduction of event sensors offers new potential for enhancing tracking capabilities. However, most current RGB-event fusion methods, primarily designed in the spatial domain using convolutional, Transformer, or Mamba architectures, fail to fully exploit the unique temporal response and high-frequency characteristics of event data. To address this, we1 propose FreqTrack, a frequency-aware RGBE tracking framework that establishes complementary inter-modal correlations through frequency-domain transformations for more robust feature fusion. We design a Spectral Enhancement Transformer (SET) layer that incorporates multi-head dynamic Fourier filtering to adaptively enhance and select frequency-domain features. Additionally, we develop a Wavelet Edge Refinement (WER) module, which leverages learnable wavelet transforms to explicitly extract multi-scale edge structures from event data, effectively improving modeling capability in high-speed and low-light scenarios. Extensive experiments on the COESOT and FE108 datasets demonstrate that FreqTrack achieves highly competitive performance, particularly attaining leading precision of 76.6\% on the COESOT benchmark, validating the effectiveness of frequency-domain modeling for RGBE tracking.

AI.tldr: FreqTrack是一个频率感知的RGBE跟踪框架，通过频域变换建立互补的模态间相关性，利用动态傅里叶滤波和小波变换增强事件数据的时空特征，在复杂动态场景中实现鲁棒跟踪。
AI.motivation: 现有单模态RGB跟踪器在复杂动态场景中面临性能瓶颈，而事件传感器提供了增强跟踪能力的新潜力。然而，当前大多数RGB-事件融合方法主要在设计在空间域，未能充分利用事件数据独特的时态响应和高频特性。
AI.method: 提出FreqTrack频率感知RGBE跟踪框架：1) 通过频域变换建立互补的模态间相关性；2) 设计谱增强Transformer层，包含多头动态傅里叶滤波来自适应增强和选择频域特征；3) 开发小波边缘细化模块，利用可学习小波变换从事件数据中显式提取多尺度边缘结构。
AI.result: 在COESOT和FE108数据集上的大量实验表明，FreqTrack实现了高度竞争力的性能，特别是在COESOT基准测试中达到了76.6%的领先精度，验证了频域建模对RGBE跟踪的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 频域建模为RGBE跟踪提供了有效解决方案，通过频域变换、动态傅里叶滤波和小波边缘细化等技术，能够充分利用事件数据的时空特性，在高速和低光场景中显著提升跟踪性能。

title: MR.ScaleMaster: Scale-Consistent Collaborative Mapping from Crowd-Sourced Monocular Videos
summary: Crowd-sourced cooperative mapping from monocular cameras promises scalable 3D reconstruction without specialized sensors, yet remains hindered by two scale-specific failure modes: abrupt scale collapse from false-positive loop closures in repetitive environments, and gradual scale drift over long trajectories and per-robot scale ambiguity that prevent direct multi-session fusion. We present MR$.$ScaleMaster, a cooperative mapping system for crowd-sourced monocular videos that addresses both failure modes. MR$.$ScaleMaster introduces three key mechanisms. First, a Scale Collapse Alarm rejects spurious loop closures before they corrupt the pose graph. Second, a Sim(3) anchor node formulation generalizes the classical SE(3) framework to explicitly estimate per-session scale, resolving per-robot scale ambiguity and enforcing global scale consistency. Third, a modular, open-source, plug-and-play interface enables any monocular reconstruction model to integrate without backend modification. On KITTI sequences with up to 15 agents, the Sim(3) formulation achieves a 7.2x ATE reduction over the SE(3) baseline, and the alarm rejects all false-positive loops while preserving every valid constraint. We further demonstrate heterogeneous multi-robot dense mapping fusing MASt3R-SLAM, pi3, and VGGT-SLAM 2.0 within a single unified map.

AI.tldr: MR$.$ScaleMaster是一个用于众包单目视频的协同建图系统，通过尺度崩溃警报、Sim(3)锚点节点和模块化接口解决了尺度崩溃和尺度漂移问题，实现了多机器人密集建图融合。
AI.motivation: 众包单目相机协同建图可实现无需专用传感器的可扩展3D重建，但面临两个尺度相关的失败模式：重复环境中误报闭环导致的尺度崩溃，以及长轨迹上的尺度漂移和每机器人尺度模糊性阻碍多会话融合。
AI.method: 1. 尺度崩溃警报：在虚假闭环破坏位姿图之前拒绝它们；2. Sim(3)锚点节点：将经典SE(3)框架推广到显式估计每会话尺度，解决每机器人尺度模糊并强制全局尺度一致性；3. 模块化开源即插即用接口：使任何单目重建模型无需后端修改即可集成。
AI.result: 在最多15个智能体的KITTI序列上，Sim(3)公式相比SE(3)基线实现了7.2倍的ATE降低，警报拒绝了所有误报闭环同时保留了每个有效约束。进一步展示了融合MASt3R-SLAM、pi3和VGGT-SLAM 2.0的异构多机器人密集建图。
AI.conclusion: MR$.$ScaleMaster通过解决尺度崩溃和尺度漂移问题，实现了鲁棒的众包单目协同建图，支持异构SLAM系统的统一地图融合。

title: xFODE: An Explainable Fuzzy Additive ODE Framework for System Identification
comment: in IEEE Conference on Artificial Intelligence, 2026
summary: Recent advances in Deep Learning (DL) have strengthened data-driven System Identification (SysID), with Neural and Fuzzy Ordinary Differential Equation (NODE/FODE) models achieving high accuracy in nonlinear dynamic modeling. Yet, system states in these frameworks are often reconstructed without clear physical meaning, and input contributions to the state derivatives remain difficult to interpret. To address these limitations, we propose Explainable FODE (xFODE), an interpretable SysID framework with integrated DL-based training. In xFODE, we define states in an incremental form to provide them with physical meanings. We employ fuzzy additive models to approximate the state derivative, thereby enhancing interpretability per input. To provide further interpretability, Partitioning Strategies (PSs) are developed, enabling the training of fuzzy additive models with explainability. By structuring the antecedent space during training so that only two consecutive rules are activated for any given input, PSs not only yield lower complexity for local inference but also enhance the interpretability of the antecedent space. To train xFODE, we present a DL framework with parameterized membership function learning that supports end-to-end optimization. Across benchmark SysID datasets, xFODE matches the accuracy of NODE, FODE, and NLARX models while providing interpretable insights.

AI.tldr: 提出可解释模糊常微分方程（xFODE）框架，通过增量状态定义、模糊加性模型和分区策略实现非线性系统辨识的可解释性，同时保持与现有深度学习方法的相当精度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的系统辨识方法（如NODE/FODE）虽然精度高，但存在状态物理意义不明确、输入对状态导数的贡献难以解释的问题，需要开发既准确又可解释的系统辨识框架。
AI.method: 提出xFODE框架：1）采用增量形式定义状态以赋予物理意义；2）使用模糊加性模型近似状态导数，增强每个输入的可解释性；3）开发分区策略，通过训练时结构化前件空间，确保任意输入仅激活两个连续规则，降低局部推理复杂度并增强前件空间可解释性；4）构建支持端到端优化的深度学习框架，包含参数化隶属函数学习。
AI.result: 在基准系统辨识数据集上，xFODE在保持与NODE、FODE和NLARX模型相当精度的同时，提供了可解释的洞察。
AI.conclusion: xFODE成功解决了深度学习系统辨识中可解释性不足的问题，通过增量状态定义、模糊加性模型和分区策略实现了高精度与可解释性的平衡，为非线性动态建模提供了新的可解释框架。

title: Chain of Modality: From Static Fusion to Dynamic Orchestration in Omni-MLLMs
summary: Omni-modal Large Language Models (Omni-MLLMs) promise a unified integration of diverse sensory streams. However, recent evaluations reveal a critical performance paradox: unimodal baselines frequently outperform joint multimodal inference. We trace this perceptual fragility to the static fusion topologies universally employed by current models, identifying two structural pathologies: positional bias in sequential inputs and alignment traps in interleaved formats, which systematically distort attention regardless of task semantics. To resolve this functional rigidity, we propose Chain of Modality (CoM), an agentic framework that transitions multimodal fusion from passive concatenation to dynamic orchestration. CoM adaptively orchestrates input topologies, switching among parallel, sequential, and interleaved pathways to neutralize structural biases. Furthermore, CoM bifurcates cognitive execution into two task-aligned pathways: a streamlined ``Direct-Decide'' path for direct perception and a structured ``Reason-Decide'' path for analytical auditing. Operating in either a training-free or a data-efficient SFT setting, CoM achieves robust and consistent generalization across diverse benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出Chain of Modality (CoM)框架，通过动态编排多模态融合拓扑结构，解决现有Omni-MLLMs中静态融合导致的性能下降问题，实现更鲁棒的多模态推理。
AI.motivation: 现有Omni-MLLMs采用静态融合拓扑结构，存在位置偏差和对齐陷阱等结构病理，导致单模态基线经常优于联合多模态推理，需要解决这种感知脆弱性。
AI.method: 提出Chain of Modality (CoM)框架：1) 动态编排输入拓扑结构，在并行、顺序和交错路径间自适应切换以消除结构偏差；2) 将认知执行分为两个任务对齐路径：直接感知的"Direct-Decide"路径和分析审计的"Reason-Decide"路径；3) 支持免训练和数据高效的SFT两种设置。
AI.result: CoM在多种基准测试中实现了鲁棒且一致的泛化性能，解决了多模态推理中的性能悖论问题。
AI.conclusion: CoM框架通过从被动拼接转向动态编排的多模态融合方式，有效解决了现有Omni-MLLMs的结构病理问题，为多模态大语言模型提供了更灵活和鲁棒的推理框架。

title: Hybrid Decision Making via Conformal VLM-generated Guidance
summary: Building on recent advances in AI, hybrid decision making (HDM) holds the promise of improving human decision quality and reducing cognitive load. We work in the context of learning to guide (LtG), a recently proposed HDM framework in which the human is always responsible for the final decision: rather than suggesting decisions, in LtG the AI supplies (textual) guidance useful for facilitating decision making. One limiting factor of existing approaches is that their guidance compounds information about all possible outcomes, and as a result it can be difficult to digest. We address this issue by introducing ConfGuide, a novel LtG approach that generates more succinct and targeted guidance. To this end, it employs conformal risk control to select a set of outcomes, ensuring a cap on the false negative rate. We demonstrate our approach on a real-world multi-label medical diagnosis task. Our empirical evaluation highlights the promise of ConfGuide.

AI.tldr: ConfGuide是一种新颖的学习指导方法，通过使用符合性风险控制选择结果集，生成更简洁、有针对性的指导，以降低人类决策认知负荷。
AI.motivation: 现有学习指导方法的指导信息包含所有可能结果的信息，导致信息难以消化和理解，需要更简洁、有针对性的指导来改善人类决策质量和降低认知负荷。
AI.method: 提出ConfGuide方法，采用符合性风险控制来选择结果集，确保假阴性率的上限控制，从而生成更简洁、有针对性的文本指导。
AI.result: 在真实世界的多标签医疗诊断任务上进行了实证评估，结果显示ConfGuide方法具有良好前景。
AI.conclusion: ConfGuide通过符合性风险控制生成更简洁、有针对性的指导，解决了现有方法指导信息过于复杂的问题，在医疗诊断等决策任务中具有应用潜力。

title: WM-DAgger: Enabling Efficient Data Aggregation for Imitation Learning with World Models
summary: Imitation learning is a powerful paradigm for training robotic policies, yet its performance is limited by compounding errors: minor policy inaccuracies could drive robots into unseen out-of-distribution (OOD) states in the training set, where the policy could generate even bigger errors, leading to eventual failures. While the Data Aggregation (DAgger) framework tries to address this issue, its reliance on continuous human involvement severely limits scalability. In this paper, we propose WM-DAgger, an efficient data aggregation framework that leverages World Models to synthesize OOD recovery data without requiring human involvement. Specifically, we focus on manipulation tasks with an eye-in-hand robotic arm and only few-shot demonstrations. To avoid synthesizing misleading data and overcome the hallucination issues inherent to World Models, our framework introduces two key mechanisms: (1) a Corrective Action Synthesis Module that generates task-oriented recovery actions to prevent misleading supervision, and (2) a Consistency-Guided Filtering Module that discards physically implausible trajectories by anchoring terminal synthesized frames to corresponding real frames in expert demonstrations. We extensively validate WM-DAgger on multiple real-world robotic tasks. Results that our method significantly improves success rates, achieving a 93.3\% success rate in soft bag pushing with only five demonstrations. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/czs12354-xxdbd/WM-Dagger.

AI.tldr: WM-DAgger：利用世界模型合成OOD恢复数据的高效模仿学习框架，无需人工干预，显著提升机器人操作任务的成功率
AI.motivation: 模仿学习存在复合误差问题：微小策略误差会导致机器人进入训练集中未见过的分布外状态，进而产生更大错误并最终失败。传统DAgger框架依赖持续人工参与，严重限制了可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出WM-DAgger框架，利用世界模型合成分布外恢复数据而无需人工参与。针对眼在手机器人臂的少样本操作任务，引入两个关键机制：1）纠正动作合成模块生成任务导向的恢复动作以避免误导监督；2）一致性引导过滤模块通过将终端合成帧锚定到专家演示中的真实帧来丢弃物理上不可行的轨迹。
AI.result: 在多个真实世界机器人任务上广泛验证，显著提升成功率。在软袋推动任务中仅用5个演示就达到93.3%的成功率。
AI.conclusion: WM-DAgger通过世界模型合成恢复数据有效解决了模仿学习的复合误差问题，减少了人工依赖，提高了机器人策略学习的效率和可扩展性。

title: Discovering Novel LLM Experts via Task-Capability Coevolution
summary: Frontier model developers aim to train models continually to possess emergent, diverse capabilities. To extend capabilities, the current pre-training and post-training paradigm requires manually starting training runs with static datasets or reward functions every time. Addressing this limitation, our work pursues the insight that open-endedness (via the coevolution of models and tasks) can discover models with increasingly novel skills in a single run. We introduce a new model development framework that extends coevolution to large language model (LLM) discovery, open-ended \textit{Assessment Coevolving with Diverse Capabilities} (AC/DC). AC/DC evolves both LLMs via model merging and natural language tasks via synthetic data generation. AC/DC discovers growing archives of LLMs that surpass the capabilities of larger LLMs while taking up less GPU memory. In particular, our LLM populations achieve a broader Coverage of expertise than other curated models or baselines on downstream benchmarks, without \textit{any} explicit benchmark optimization. Furthermore, AC/DC improves Coverage over time, continually innovates on tasks and models, and improves performance in multi-agent best-of-N selection. Our findings highlight the potential of coevolution as a means of discovering broader sets of capabilities from base LLMs. Overall, AC/DC brings us one step closer to a profoundly new paradigm of LLM development, where continual improvements to the diversity of model capabilities can be accelerated by leveraging existing models as stepping stones to increasingly powerful models.

AI.tldr: AC/DC框架通过模型与任务的协同进化，在单次运行中发现具有日益新颖能力的LLM，超越了传统静态训练范式
AI.motivation: 传统预训练和后训练范式需要手动启动静态数据集或奖励函数的训练运行，无法实现持续的能力扩展。作者旨在通过开放式的协同进化来发现具有日益新颖技能的模型
AI.method: 提出AC/DC框架，通过模型合并进化LLM，通过合成数据生成进化自然语言任务，实现模型与任务的协同进化
AI.result: 发现的LLM种群超越了更大LLM的能力，同时占用更少GPU内存；在未进行显式基准优化的情况下，获得了比精选模型或基线更广泛的专长覆盖度；随时间推移持续改进覆盖度、创新任务和模型，并提升多智能体最佳选择性能
AI.conclusion: 协同进化有潜力从基础LLM中发现更广泛的能力集合，AC/DC向LLM开发的新范式迈进了一步，通过利用现有模型作为垫脚石加速模型能力多样性的持续改进

title: Learning Racket-Ball Bounce Dynamics Across Diverse Rubbers for Robotic Table Tennis
summary: Accurate dynamic models for racket-ball bounces are essential for reliable control in robotic table tennis. Existing models typically assume simple linear models and are restricted to inverted rubbers, limiting their ability to generalize across the wide variety of rackets encountered in practice. In this work, we present a unified framework for modeling ball-racket interactions across 10 racket configurations featuring different rubber types, including inverted, anti-spin, and pimpled surfaces. Using a high-speed multi-camera setup with spin estimation, we collect a dataset of racket-ball bounces spanning a broad range of incident velocities and spins. We show that key physical parameters governing rebound, such as the Coefficient of Restitution and tangential impulse response, vary systematically with the impact state and differ significantly across rubbers. To capture these effects while preserving physical interpretability, we estimate the parameters of an impulse-based contact model using Gaussian Processes conditioned on the ball's incoming velocity and spin. The resulting model provides both accurate predictions and uncertainty estimations. Compared to the constant parameter baselines, our approach reduces post-impact velocity and spin prediction errors across all racket types, with the largest improvements observed for nonstandard rubbers. Furthermore, the GP-based model enables online identification of racket dynamics with few observations during gameplay.

AI.tldr: 提出基于高斯过程的统一框架，用于建模乒乓球拍-球碰撞动力学，适用于10种不同胶皮类型，相比恒定参数基线显著提升预测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有球拍-球碰撞模型通常假设简单线性模型且仅限于反胶，难以泛化到实践中遇到的各种球拍类型，需要更通用的建模框架。
AI.method: 使用高速多摄像头系统收集球拍-球碰撞数据集，涵盖不同入射速度和旋转；采用基于高斯过程的脉冲接触模型，将恢复系数和切向脉冲响应等物理参数建模为入射速度和旋转的函数。
AI.result: 相比恒定参数基线，该方法在所有球拍类型上都减少了碰撞后速度和旋转的预测误差，对非标准胶皮的改进最大；基于GP的模型能够用少量观测在线识别球拍动力学。
AI.conclusion: 提出的统一框架能够准确建模不同胶皮类型的球拍-球相互作用，提供物理可解释性和不确定性估计，为机器人乒乓球控制提供了更可靠的动态模型。

title: xFODE+: Explainable Type-2 Fuzzy Additive ODEs for Uncertainty Quantification
comment: in IEEE International Conference on Fuzzy Systems, 2026
summary: Recent advances in Deep Learning (DL) have boosted data-driven System Identification (SysID), but reliable use requires Uncertainty Quantification (UQ) alongside accurate predictions. Although UQ-capable models such as Fuzzy ODE (FODE) can produce Prediction Intervals (PIs), they offer limited interpretability. We introduce Explainable Type-2 Fuzzy Additive ODEs for UQ (xFODE+), an interpretable SysID model which produces PIs alongside point predictions while retaining physically meaningful incremental states. xFODE+ implements each fuzzy additive model with Interval Type-2 Fuzzy Logic Systems (IT2-FLSs) and constraints membership functions to the activation of two neighboring rules, limiting overlap and keeping inference locally transparent. The type-reduced sets produced by the IT2-FLSs are aggregated to construct the state update together with the PIs. The model is trained in a DL framework via a composite loss that jointly optimizes prediction accuracy and PI quality. Results on benchmark SysID datasets show that xFODE+ matches FODE in PI quality and achieves comparable accuracy, while providing interpretability.

AI.tldr: xFODE+是一种可解释的Type-2模糊加性ODE模型，用于系统辨识中的不确定性量化，在保持预测精度的同时提供预测区间和物理可解释性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习推动了数据驱动的系统辨识，但可靠使用需要不确定性量化。现有模糊ODE模型能产生预测区间但可解释性有限，需要既能量化不确定性又保持可解释性的模型。
AI.method: 提出xFODE+模型，使用区间Type-2模糊逻辑系统实现模糊加性模型，约束隶属函数仅激活两个相邻规则以减少重叠，通过类型归约集构建状态更新和预测区间，采用复合损失函数联合优化预测精度和区间质量。
AI.result: 在基准系统辨识数据集上，xFODE+在预测区间质量上与FODE相当，预测精度可比，同时提供了可解释性。
AI.conclusion: xFODE+成功结合了不确定性量化和可解释性，为系统辨识提供了既能产生可靠预测区间又保持物理可解释性的解决方案。

title: H2VLR: Heterogeneous Hypergraph Vision-Language Reasoning for Few-Shot Anomaly Detection
summary: As a classic vision task, anomaly detection has been widely applied in industrial inspection and medical imaging. In this task, data scarcity is often a frequently-faced issue. To solve it, the few-shot anomaly detection (FSAD) scheme is attracting increasing attention. In recent years, beyond traditional visual paradigm, Vision-Language Model (VLM) has been extensively explored to boost this field. However, in currently-existing VLM-based FSAD schemes, almost all perform anomaly inference only by pairwise feature matching, ignoring structural dependencies and global consistency. To further redound to FSAD via VLM, we propose a Heterogeneous Hypergraph Vision-Language Reasoning (H2VLR) framework. It reformulates the FSAD as a high-order inference problem of visual-semantic relations, by jointly modeling visual regions and semantic concepts in a unified hypergraph. Experimental comparisons verify the effectiveness and advantages of H2VLR. It could often achieve state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on representative industrial and medical benchmarks. Our code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 提出H2VLR框架，通过异质超图视觉-语言推理解决少样本异常检测问题，将FSAD重新定义为视觉-语义关系的高阶推理问题。
AI.motivation: 当前基于视觉语言模型的少样本异常检测方法大多仅通过成对特征匹配进行异常推断，忽略了结构依赖关系和全局一致性，限制了检测性能。
AI.method: 提出异质超图视觉-语言推理框架，将视觉区域和语义概念统一建模在一个超图中，将FSAD重新定义为视觉-语义关系的高阶推理问题。
AI.result: 在代表性的工业和医学基准测试中，H2VLR通常能够达到最先进的性能，验证了其有效性和优势。
AI.conclusion: 通过超图建模视觉-语义关系的高阶推理能够有效提升少样本异常检测性能，为VLM在FSAD领域的应用提供了新思路。

title: CLASP: Closed-loop Asynchronous Spatial Perception for Open-vocabulary Desktop Object Grasping
summary: Robot grasping of desktop object is widely used in intelligent manufacturing, logistics, and agriculture.Although vision-language models (VLMs) show strong potential for robotic manipulation, their deployment in low-level grasping faces key challenges: scarce high-quality multimodal demonstrations, spatial hallucination caused by weak geometric grounding, and the fragility of open-loop execution in dynamic environments. To address these challenges, we propose Closed-Loop Asynchronous Spatial Perception(CLASP), a novel asynchronous closed-loop framework that integrates multimodal perception, logical reasoning, and state-reflective feedback. First, we design a Dual-Pathway Hierarchical Perception module that decouples high-level semantic intent from geometric grounding. The design guides the output of the inference model and the definite action tuples, reducing spatial illusions. Second, an Asynchronous Closed-Loop Evaluator is implemented to compare pre- and post-execution states, providing text-based diagnostic feedback to establish a robust error-correction loop and improving the vulnerability of traditional open-loop execution in dynamic environments. Finally, we design a scalable multi-modal data engine that automatically synthesizes high-quality spatial annotations and reasoning templates from real and synthetic scenes without human teleoperation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms existing baselines, achieving an 87.0% overall success rate. Notably, the proposed framework exhibits remarkable generalization across diverse objects, bridging the sim-to-real gap and providing exceptional robustness in geometrically challenging categories and cluttered scenarios.

AI.tldr: CLASP是一个用于机器人桌面抓取的异步闭环框架，通过解耦语义意图与几何感知、建立状态反馈循环，以及自动生成多模态数据，解决了VLM在抓取任务中的空间幻觉和开环执行脆弱性问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉语言模型在机器人操作中显示出潜力，但在低级抓取任务中面临三个关键挑战：高质量多模态演示数据稀缺、弱几何基础导致的空间幻觉，以及动态环境中开环执行的脆弱性。
AI.method: 提出CLASP框架，包含三个核心组件：1）双路径分层感知模块，解耦高层语义意图与几何基础；2）异步闭环评估器，比较执行前后状态并提供文本诊断反馈；3）可扩展多模态数据引擎，自动从真实和合成场景生成高质量空间标注和推理模板。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著优于现有基线，达到87.0%的整体成功率。框架在多样化物体上表现出卓越的泛化能力，缩小了仿真到现实的差距，在几何挑战性类别和杂乱场景中展现出优异的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: CLASP通过整合多模态感知、逻辑推理和状态反射反馈，有效解决了VLM在机器人抓取中的关键挑战，为动态环境中的可靠抓取提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Co-distilled attention guided masked image modeling with noisy teacher for self-supervised learning on medical images
summary: Masked image modeling (MIM) is a highly effective self-supervised learning (SSL) approach to extract useful feature representations from unannotated data. Predominantly used random masking methods make SSL less effective for medical images due to the contextual similarity of neighboring patches, leading to information leakage and SSL simplification. Hierarchical shifted window (Swin) transformer, a highly effective approach for medical images cannot use advanced masking methods as it lacks a global [CLS] token. Hence, we introduced an attention guided masking mechanism for Swin within a co-distillation learning framework to selectively mask semantically co-occurring and discriminative patches, to reduce information leakage and increase the difficulty of SSL pretraining. However, attention guided masking inevitably reduces the diversity of attention heads, which negatively impacts downstream task performance. To address this, we for the first time, integrate a noisy teacher into the co-distillation framework (termed DAGMaN) that performs attentive masking while preserving high attention head diversity. We demonstrate the capability of DAGMaN on multiple tasks including full- and few-shot lung nodule classification, immunotherapy outcome prediction, tumor segmentation, and unsupervised organs clustering.

AI.tldr: DAGMaN：一种用于医学图像自监督学习的注意力引导掩码机制，结合噪声教师和协同蒸馏框架，解决随机掩码在医学图像中的信息泄漏问题，同时保持注意力头多样性。
AI.motivation: 随机掩码方法在医学图像自监督学习中效果不佳，因为医学图像的相邻补丁具有上下文相似性，导致信息泄漏和SSL简化。同时，Swin Transformer缺乏全局[CLS]标记，无法使用先进的掩码方法。
AI.method: 提出DAGMaN框架：1）引入注意力引导掩码机制，选择性地掩码语义共现和判别性补丁；2）集成噪声教师到协同蒸馏框架中，在保持注意力头多样性的同时执行注意力掩码；3）在Swin Transformer架构中实现。
AI.result: 在多个医学图像任务上验证了DAGMaN的有效性，包括全样本和少样本肺结节分类、免疫治疗结果预测、肿瘤分割和无监督器官聚类。
AI.conclusion: DAGMaN通过注意力引导掩码和噪声教师集成，有效解决了医学图像自监督学习中的信息泄漏问题，同时保持了注意力头多样性，在多种医学图像分析任务中表现出优越性能。

title: Learning to Forget -- Hierarchical Episodic Memory for Lifelong Robot Deployment
summary: Robots must verbalize their past experiences when users ask "Where did you put my keys?" or "Why did the task fail?"
