Yet maintaining life-long episodic memory (EM) from continuous multimodal perception quickly exceeds storage limits and makes real-time query impractical, calling for selective forgetting that adapts to users' notions of relevance. We present H$^2$-EMV, a framework enabling humanoids to learn what to remember through user interaction. Our approach incrementally constructs hierarchical EM, selectively forgets using language-model-based relevance estimation conditioned on learned natural-language rules, and updates these rules given user feedback about forgotten details. Evaluations on simulated household tasks and 20.5-hour-long real-world recordings from ARMAR-7 demonstrate that H$^2$-EMV maintains question-answering accuracy while reducing memory size by 45% and query-time compute by 35%. Critically, performance improves over time - accuracy increases 70% in second-round queries by adapting to user-specific priorities - demonstrating that learned forgetting enables scalable, personalized EM for long-term human-robot collaboration.

AI.tldr: H²-EMV框架让机器人通过用户交互学习选择性记忆，构建层次化情景记忆，基于语言模型估计相关性进行选择性遗忘，并通过用户反馈更新遗忘规则，实现可扩展的个性化记忆系统。
AI.motivation: 机器人需要回答关于过去经历的问题，但持续的多模态感知会产生海量情景记忆，超出存储限制且查询效率低下，需要根据用户相关性概念进行选择性遗忘。
AI.method: 提出H²-EMV框架：1) 增量构建层次化情景记忆；2) 使用基于语言模型的相关性估计进行选择性遗忘，条件于学习的自然语言规则；3) 根据用户对遗忘细节的反馈更新这些规则。
AI.result: 在模拟家务任务和20.5小时真实世界记录上的评估显示：保持问答准确率的同时，内存大小减少45%，查询时间计算减少35%；第二轮查询准确率提高70%，表明能适应用户特定优先级。
AI.conclusion: 学习性遗忘使机器人能够实现可扩展、个性化的情景记忆系统，支持长期人机协作，通过适应用户特定优先级持续改进性能。

title: Does RL Expand the Capability Boundary of LLM Agents? A PASS@(k,T) Analysis
summary: Does reinforcement learning genuinely expand what LLM agents can do, or merely make them more reliable? For static reasoning, recent work answers the second: base and RL pass@k curves converge at large k. We ask whether this holds for agentic tool use, where T rounds of interaction enable compositional strategies that re-sampling cannot recover. We introduce PASS@(k,T), a two-dimensional metric that jointly varies sampling budget k and interaction depth T, separating capability expansion from efficiency improvement. Our main finding is that, contrary to the static-reasoning result, tool-use RL genuinely enlarges the capability boundary: the RL agent's pass-curve pulls above the base model's and the gap widens at large k rather than converging. The expansion is specific to compositional, sequential information gathering; on simpler tasks RL behaves as prior work predicts. Under matched training data, supervised fine-tuning regresses the boundary on the same compositional tasks, isolating self-directed exploration as the causal factor. Mechanism analysis shows RL reweights the base strategy distribution toward the subset whose downstream reasoning more often yields a correct answer, with the improvement concentrated on how the agent integrates retrieved information. These results reconcile optimistic and pessimistic readings of RL for LLMs: both are correct, on different task types.

AI.tldr: RL在工具使用任务中真正扩展了LLM能力边界，而不仅仅是提高可靠性，这与静态推理任务中的发现相反
AI.motivation: 探究强化学习在LLM智能体工具使用任务中是否真正扩展能力边界，而非仅提高可靠性，特别关注组合式、顺序信息收集任务
AI.method: 引入PASS@(k,T)二维度量，联合变化采样预算k和交互深度T，分离能力扩展与效率改进；对比RL与基础模型在工具使用任务上的表现
AI.result: RL在工具使用任务中真正扩展了能力边界：RL智能体的通过曲线高于基础模型，且差距随k增大而扩大而非收敛；这种扩展特定于组合式顺序信息收集任务
AI.conclusion: RL对LLM的影响因任务类型而异：在静态推理任务中仅提高可靠性，在组合式工具使用任务中真正扩展能力边界，自我导向探索是关键因素

title: 3D-Anchored Lookahead Planning for Persistent Robotic Scene Memory via World-Model-Based MCTS
summary: We present 3D-Anchored Lookahead Planning (3D-ALP), a System 2 reasoning engine for robotic manipulation that combines Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) with a 3D-consistent world model as the rollout oracle. Unlike reactive policies that evaluate actions from the current camera frame only, 3D-ALP maintains a persistent camera-to-world (c2w) anchor that survives occlusion, enabling accurate replanning to object positions that are no longer directly observable. On a 5-step sequential reach task requiring spatial memory (Experiment E3), 3D-ALP achieves 0.650 0.109 success rate on memory-required steps versus 0.006 0.008 for a greedy reactive baseline (Δ=+0.645), while step 5 success reaches 0.822 against 0.000 for greedy. An ablation study (30 episodes, 3 seeds) isolates tree search spatial memory as the primary driver (+0.533, 82% of gain) with additional benefit from deeper lookahead (+0.111, 17%). We also identify and resolve four structural failure modes in applying UCT-MCTS (Upper Confidence Bounds applied to Trees [10]) to continuous robotic manipulation.

AI.tldr: 3D-ALP是一种用于机器人操作的System 2推理引擎，结合MCTS和3D一致世界模型作为推演预言机，通过持久相机到世界锚点解决遮挡问题，在需要空间记忆的序列任务中显著优于反应式基线。
AI.motivation: 现有反应式策略仅从当前相机帧评估动作，无法处理遮挡和需要空间记忆的复杂操作任务。需要开发能够维持持久空间表示、支持准确重规划的推理系统。
AI.method: 提出3D-ALP系统，结合蒙特卡洛树搜索(MCTS)与3D一致世界模型作为推演预言机。关键创新是维护持久相机到世界(c2w)锚点，即使目标被遮挡也能保持空间记忆。解决了将UCT-MCTS应用于连续机器人操作的四个结构性问题。
AI.result: 在5步序列到达任务(E3实验)中，3D-ALP在需要记忆的步骤上获得0.650±0.109成功率，而贪婪反应式基线仅为0.006±0.008(Δ=+0.645)。第5步成功率0.822对0.000。消融研究表明树搜索空间记忆是主要贡献因素(+0.533，占增益82%)，更深前瞻提供额外收益(+0.111，17%)。
AI.conclusion: 3D-ALP通过结合MCTS和持久3D锚点，显著提升了机器人操作任务中处理遮挡和空间记忆的能力，为复杂操作任务提供了有效的System 2推理框架。

title: Regret Tail Characterization of Optimal Bandit Algorithms with Generic Rewards
summary:
We study the tail behavior of regret in stochastic multi-armed bandits for algorithms that are asymptotically optimal in expectation. While minimizing expected regret is the classical objective, recent work shows that even such algorithms can exhibit heavy regret tails, incurring large regret with non-negligible probability. Existing sharp characterizations of regret tails are largely restricted to parametric settings, such as single-parameter exponential families.
  In this work, we extend the $\KLinf$-UCB algorithm of to a broad nonparametric class of reward distributions satisfying mild assumptions, and establish its asymptotic optimality in expectation. We then analyze the tail behavior of its regret and derive a novel upper bound on the regret tail probability. As special cases, our results recover regret-tail guarantees for both bounded-support and heavy-tailed (moment-bounded) bandit models. Moreover, for the special case of finitely-supported reward distributions, our upper bound matches the known lower bound exactly. Our results thus provide a unified and tight characterization of regret tails for asymptotically optimal KL-based UCB algorithms, going beyond parametric models.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了随机多臂老虎机中期望渐近最优算法的遗憾尾部行为，将KLinf-UCB算法扩展到非参数奖励分布类，建立了期望渐近最优性，并推导了遗憾尾部概率的新上界，为KL-based UCB算法提供了统一且紧致的遗憾尾部表征。
AI.motivation: 虽然最小化期望遗憾是经典目标，但最近研究表明即使期望渐近最优算法也可能表现出重尾遗憾，以不可忽略的概率产生大遗憾。现有的遗憾尾部尖锐表征主要局限于参数化设置（如单参数指数族），需要扩展到更广泛的非参数分布类。
AI.method: 将KLinf-UCB算法扩展到满足温和假设的广泛非参数奖励分布类，建立其期望渐近最优性，然后分析其遗憾尾部行为，推导遗憾尾部概率的新上界。特别考虑了有界支撑和重尾（矩有界）老虎机模型作为特例。
AI.result: 1) 扩展的KLinf-UCB算法在期望意义下是渐近最优的；2) 推导了遗憾尾部概率的新上界；3) 对于有界支撑和重尾模型，结果恢复了已知的遗憾尾部保证；4) 对于有限支撑奖励分布的特殊情况，上界与已知下界精确匹配。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为渐近最优的KL-based UCB算法提供了超越参数化模型的统一且紧致的遗憾尾部表征，将KLinf-UCB算法扩展到非参数分布类，并建立了其期望渐近最优性和遗憾尾部行为的完整理论框架。

title: FAIR Universe Weak Lensing ML Uncertainty Challenge: Handling Uncertainties and Distribution Shifts for Precision Cosmology
comment: Whitepaper for the FAIR Universe Weak Lensing ML Uncertainty Challenge Competition. More info is available at our GitHub repository https://github.com/FAIR-Universe/Cosmology_Challenge. 13 pages, 5 figures, 1 table
summary: Weak gravitational lensing, the correlated distortion of background galaxy shapes by foreground structures, is a powerful probe of the matter distribution in our universe and allows accurate constraints on the cosmological model. In recent years, high-order statistics and machine learning (ML) techniques have been applied to weak lensing data to extract the nonlinear information beyond traditional two-point analysis. However, these methods typically rely on cosmological simulations, which poses several challenges: simulations are computationally expensive, limiting most realistic setups to a low training data regime; inaccurate modeling of systematics in the simulations create distribution shifts that can bias cosmological parameter constraints; and varying simulation setups across studies make method comparison difficult. To address these difficulties, we present the first weak lensing benchmark dataset with several realistic systematics and launch the FAIR Universe Weak Lensing Machine Learning Uncertainty Challenge. The challenge focuses on measuring the fundamental properties of the universe from weak lensing data with limited training set and potential distribution shifts, while providing a standardized benchmark for rigorous comparison across methods. Organized in two phases, the challenge will bring together the physics and ML communities to advance the methodologies for handling systematic uncertainties, data efficiency, and distribution shifts in weak lensing analysis with ML, ultimately facilitating the deployment of ML approaches into upcoming weak lensing survey analysis.

AI.tldr: 提出首个包含多种真实系统效应的弱引力透镜基准数据集，并启动FAIR宇宙弱透镜机器学习不确定性挑战，旨在解决模拟数据有限、分布偏移等问题，为不同方法提供标准化比较基准。
AI.motivation: 传统弱透镜分析依赖高成本宇宙学模拟，面临训练数据有限、系统效应建模不准确导致分布偏移、不同研究模拟设置不一致难以比较方法等挑战。
AI.method: 创建首个包含多种真实系统效应的弱引力透镜基准数据集，并组织FAIR宇宙弱透镜机器学习不确定性挑战，分为两个阶段，聚焦有限训练集和潜在分布偏移下的宇宙参数测量。
AI.result: 建立了标准化基准数据集和挑战框架，为物理和机器学习社区提供统一平台，促进处理系统不确定性、数据效率和分布偏移的方法发展。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过标准化基准和挑战，将推动机器学习方法在弱透镜分析中的实际应用，为未来弱透镜巡天数据分析奠定基础。

title: WavAlign: Enhancing Intelligence and Expressiveness in Spoken Dialogue Models via Adaptive Hybrid Post-Training
summary: End-to-end spoken dialogue models have garnered significant attention because they offer a higher potential ceiling in expressiveness and perceptual ability than cascaded systems. However, the intelligence and expressiveness of current open-source spoken dialogue models often remain below expectations. Motivated by the success of online reinforcement learning(RL) in other domains, one might attempt to directly apply preference optimization to spoken dialogue models, yet this transfer is non-trivial. We analyze these obstacles from the perspectives of reward modeling and rollout sampling, focusing on how sparse preference supervision interacts with dense speech generation under shared-parameter updates. Based on the analysis, we propose a modality-aware adaptive post-training recipe that makes RL practical for spoken dialogue: it constrains preference updates to the semantic channel and improves acoustic behavior via explicit anchoring, while dynamically regulating their mixture from rollout statistics to avoid unreliable preference gradients. We evaluate the method across multiple spoken dialogue benchmarks and representative architectures, and observe consistent improvements in semantic quality and speech expressiveness.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种模态感知的自适应后训练方法，使强化学习能够有效应用于语音对话模型，通过约束偏好更新到语义通道、改进声学行为，并动态调节两者混合来提升语义质量和语音表现力。
AI.motivation: 当前开源语音对话模型的智能性和表现力往往低于预期。虽然端到端语音对话模型比级联系统具有更高的表达潜力，但直接应用偏好优化到语音对话模型存在困难，需要解决奖励建模和采样策略中的挑战。
AI.method: 提出模态感知的自适应后训练方法：1）约束偏好更新到语义通道；2）通过显式锚定改进声学行为；3）基于采样统计动态调节语义和声学更新的混合，避免不可靠的偏好梯度。
AI.result: 在多个语音对话基准测试和代表性架构上评估该方法，观察到语义质量和语音表现力的一致改进。
AI.conclusion: 该研究使强化学习在语音对话模型中变得实用，通过分析稀疏偏好监督与密集语音生成在共享参数更新下的相互作用，并提出有效的训练策略来解决相关挑战。

title: Modeling, Analysis and Activation of Planar Viscoelastically-combined Rimless Wheels
comment: This is a corrected version of the IROS 2022 paper. A typographical error in Eq. (14) has been corrected
summary: This paper proposes novel passive-dynamic walkers formed by two cross-shaped frames and eight viscoelastic elements. Since it is a combination of two four-legged rimless wheels via viscoelastic elements, we call it viscoelastically-combined rimless wheel (VCRW). Two types of VCRWs consisting of different cross-shaped frames are introduced; one is formed by combining two Greek-cross-shaped frames (VCRW1), and the other is formed by combining two-link cross-shaped frames that can rotate freely around the central axis (VCRW2). First, we describe the model assumptions and equations of motion and collision. Second, we numerically analyze the basic gait properties of passive dynamic walking. Furthermore, we consider an activation of VCRW2 for generating a stable level gait, and discuss the significance of the study as a novel walking support device.

AI.tldr: 提出两种新型被动动态行走器VCRW1和VCRW2，通过粘弹性元件连接两个十字形框架，分析其被动行走特性并探讨作为步行辅助设备的潜力
AI.motivation: 开发一种新型被动动态行走器，通过粘弹性元件连接两个四腿无轮缘轮子，创造更自然的行走机制，探索作为步行辅助设备的应用潜力
AI.method: 提出两种VCRW模型：VCRW1由两个希腊十字形框架组成，VCRW2由两个可绕中心轴自由旋转的两连杆十字形框架组成；建立运动方程和碰撞模型，进行数值分析，并考虑激活VCRW2以生成稳定水平步态
AI.result: 成功构建了两种VCRW模型，分析了被动动态行走的基本步态特性，探讨了VCRW2的激活机制对生成稳定水平步态的影响
AI.conclusion: VCRW作为一种新型被动动态行走器具有独特的机械特性，通过粘弹性连接实现了自然的行走机制，在作为步行辅助设备方面具有重要研究价值和潜在应用前景

title: Crowdsourcing of Real-world Image Annotation via Visual Properties
summary: Recent advances in data-centric artificial intelligence highlight inherent limitations in object recognition datasets. One of the primary issues stems from the semantic gap problem, which results in complex many-to-many mappings between visual data and linguistic descriptions. This bias adversely affects performance in computer vision tasks. This paper proposes an image annotation methodology that integrates knowledge representation, natural language processing, and computer vision techniques, aiming to reduce annotator subjectivity by applying visual property constraints. We introduce an interactive crowdsourcing framework that dynamically asks questions based on a predefined object category hierarchy and annotator feedback, guiding image annotation by visual properties. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of this methodology, and annotator feedback is discussed to optimize the crowdsourcing setup.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合知识表示、自然语言处理和计算机视觉技术的图像标注方法，通过视觉属性约束减少标注者主观性，并引入基于对象类别层次结构和标注者反馈的交互式众包框架
AI.motivation: 数据为中心的人工智能方法在目标识别数据集中存在语义鸿沟问题，导致视觉数据与语言描述之间存在复杂的多对多映射关系，这种偏差影响了计算机视觉任务的性能
AI.method: 提出图像标注方法，整合知识表示、自然语言处理和计算机视觉技术，通过视觉属性约束减少标注者主观性；引入交互式众包框架，基于预定义的对象类别层次结构和标注者反馈动态提问，引导图像标注过程
AI.result: 实验证明了该方法的有效性，并通过标注者反馈讨论了如何优化众包设置
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法通过整合多种技术减少了标注主观性，交互式众包框架能够有效引导图像标注过程，为改进目标识别数据集的质量提供了可行方案

title: CLAW: Composable Language-Annotated Whole-body Motion Generation
summary: Training language-conditioned whole-body controllers for humanoid robots demands large-scale motion-language datasets. Existing approaches based on motion capture are costly and limited in diversity, while text-to-motion generative models produce purely kinematic outputs that are not guaranteed to be physically feasible. We present CLAW, a pipeline for scalable generation of language-annotated whole-body motion data for the Unitree G1 humanoid robot. CLAW composes motion primitives from a kinematic planner, parameterized by movement, heading, speed, pelvis height, and duration, and provides two browser-based interfaces--a real-time keyboard mode and a timeline-based sequence editor--for exploratory and batch data collection. A low-level controller tracks these references in MuJoCo simulation, yielding physically grounded trajectories. In parallel, a template-based engine generates diverse natural-language annotations at both segment and trajectory levels. To support scalable generation of motion-language paired data for humanoid robot learning, we make our system publicly available at: https://github.com/JianuoCao/CLAW

AI.tldr: CLAW是一个用于为Unitree G1人形机器人生成大规模语言标注全身运动数据的可扩展流水线，通过组合运动基元、物理仿真和模板化语言标注来解决现有方法成本高、多样性有限和物理不可行的问题。
AI.motivation: 训练人形机器人的语言条件全身控制器需要大规模的运动-语言数据集。现有基于动作捕捉的方法成本高昂且多样性有限，而文本到运动生成模型产生的纯运动学输出不能保证物理可行性。
AI.method: CLAW流水线包含：1）从运动规划器组合运动基元（参数化包括移动、朝向、速度、骨盆高度和持续时间）；2）提供两种基于浏览器的界面（实时键盘模式和基于时间线的序列编辑器）进行探索性和批量数据收集；3）低级控制器在MuJoCo仿真中跟踪这些参考轨迹，生成物理可行的轨迹；4）基于模板的引擎在片段和轨迹级别生成多样化的自然语言标注。
AI.result: 开发了一个公开可用的系统，支持为人形机器人学习生成可扩展的运动-语言配对数据，解决了现有方法在成本、多样性和物理可行性方面的限制。
AI.conclusion: CLAW提供了一个可扩展的解决方案，用于生成物理可行且语言标注的全身运动数据，为人形机器人的语言条件控制学习提供了重要数据基础，系统已开源供社区使用。

title: Best of both worlds: Stochastic & adversarial best-arm identification
comment: Published in Conference on Learning Theory (COLT 2018)
summary: We study bandit best-arm identification with arbitrary and potentially adversarial rewards. A simple random uniform learner obtains the optimal rate of error in the adversarial scenario. However, this type of strategy is suboptimal when the rewards are sampled stochastically. Therefore, we ask: Can we design a learner that performs optimally in both the stochastic and adversarial problems while not being aware of the nature of the rewards? First, we show that designing such a learner is impossible in general. In particular, to be robust to adversarial rewards, we can only guarantee optimal rates of error on a subset of the stochastic problems. We give a lower bound that characterizes the optimal rate in stochastic problems if the strategy is constrained to be robust to adversarial rewards. Finally, we design a simple parameter-free algorithm and show that its probability of error matches (up to log factors) the lower bound in stochastic problems, and it is also robust to adversarial ones.

AI.tldr: 研究在随机和对抗性奖励下都能最优的bandit最佳臂识别算法，证明通用最优解不可能，提出参数自由算法在随机问题上达到下界且对抗鲁棒
AI.motivation: 传统的随机均匀学习器在对抗性奖励下能达到最优错误率，但在随机奖励下表现次优。需要设计一个既能处理随机奖励又能处理对抗性奖励的自适应学习器，而无需预先知道奖励类型。
AI.method: 首先证明通用最优学习器不可能存在：对抗鲁棒性限制了在随机问题上的最优性。给出随机问题中对抗鲁棒策略的下界。设计一个参数自由算法，在随机问题上匹配下界（对数因子内），同时保持对抗鲁棒性。
AI.result: 理论证明：不存在同时在随机和对抗性奖励下都最优的通用学习器。给出了对抗鲁棒策略在随机问题上的最优错误率下界。算法实验：提出的参数自由算法在随机问题上达到下界（对数因子内），同时在对抗性场景下保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 在bandit最佳臂识别中，随机和对抗性奖励之间存在根本性权衡。对抗鲁棒性限制了随机问题上的最优性能，但可以设计算法在随机问题上接近最优下界的同时保持对抗鲁棒性。

title: Zero-Ablation Overstates Register Content Dependence in DINO Vision Transformers
comment: 12 pages, 10 figures, to be published in CVPR 2026 HOW Vision Interpretability Workshop Proceedings
summary: Zero-ablation -- replacing token activations with zero vectors -- is widely used to probe token function in vision transformers. Register zeroing in DINOv2+registers and DINOv3 produces large drops (up to $-36.6$\,pp classification, $-30.9$\,pp segmentation), suggesting registers are functionally indispensable. However, three replacement controls -- mean-substitution, noise-substitution, and cross-image register-shuffling -- preserve performance across classification, correspondence, and segmentation, remaining within ${\sim}1$\,pp of the unmodified baseline. Per-patch cosine similarity shows these replacements genuinely perturb internal representations, while zeroing causes disproportionately large perturbations, consistent with why it alone degrades tasks. We conclude that zero-ablation overstates dependence on exact register content. In the frozen-feature evaluations we test, performance depends on plausible register-like activations rather than on exact image-specific values. Registers nevertheless buffer dense features from \texttt{[CLS]} dependence and are associated with compressed patch geometry. These findings, including the replacement-control results, replicate at ViT-B scale.

AI.tldr: 零消融（zero-ablation）在视觉Transformer中高估了对寄存器精确内容的依赖，而均值替换、噪声替换和跨图像寄存器混洗等控制方法能保持性能，表明任务依赖的是合理的寄存器类激活而非精确的图像特定值。
AI.motivation: 研究零消融在视觉Transformer寄存器功能分析中的局限性，检验寄存器是否真的对任务性能不可或缺，还是零消融方法本身导致了性能下降的误导性结论。
AI.method: 使用三种替换控制方法：均值替换、噪声替换和跨图像寄存器混洗，与零消融进行对比。通过分类、对应关系和分割任务评估性能，并使用每块余弦相似度分析内部表示扰动程度。
AI.result: 零消融导致性能大幅下降（分类下降36.6个百分点，分割下降30.9个百分点），但三种替换控制方法在各项任务中均能保持性能，与未修改基线相差约1个百分点。余弦相似度分析显示替换方法确实扰动了内部表示，但零消融造成了不成比例的大扰动。
AI.conclusion: 零消融夸大了对寄存器精确内容的依赖。在测试的冻结特征评估中，性能依赖于合理的寄存器类激活而非精确的图像特定值。寄存器仍然起到缓冲密集特征免受[CLS]依赖的作用，并与压缩的块几何结构相关。这些发现在ViT-B规模上可复现。

title: EmbodiedGovBench: A Benchmark for Governance, Recovery, and Upgrade Safety in Embodied Agent Systems
summary: Recent progress in embodied AI has produced a growing ecosystem of robot policies, foundation models, and modular runtimes. However, current evaluation remains dominated by task success metrics such as completion rate or manipulation accuracy. These metrics leave a critical gap: they do not measure whether embodied systems are governable -- whether they respect capability boundaries, enforce policies, recover safely, maintain audit trails, and respond to human oversight. We present EmbodiedGovBench, a benchmark for governance-oriented evaluation of embodied agent systems. Rather than asking only whether a robot can complete a task, EmbodiedGovBench evaluates whether the system remains controllable, policy-bounded, recoverable, auditable, and evolution-safe under realistic perturbations. The benchmark covers seven governance dimensions: unauthorized capability invocation, runtime drift robustness, recovery success, policy portability, version upgrade safety, human override responsiveness, and audit completeness. We define a benchmark structure spanning single-robot and fleet settings, with scenario templates, perturbation operators, governance metrics, and baseline evaluation protocols. We describe how the benchmark can be instantiated over embodied capability runtimes with modular interfaces and contract-aware upgrade workflows. Our analysis suggests that embodied governance should become a first-class evaluation target. EmbodiedGovBench provides the initial measurement framework for that shift.

AI.tldr: EmbodiedGovBench：面向具身AI系统治理评估的基准，关注可控性、策略边界、可恢复性、可审计性和演进安全性等治理维度，而非仅任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 当前具身AI评估主要关注任务成功率（如完成率、操作精度），但缺乏对系统治理能力的评估，包括是否尊重能力边界、执行策略、安全恢复、维护审计轨迹和响应人工监督等关键治理维度。
AI.method: 提出EmbodiedGovBench基准框架，涵盖七个治理维度：未经授权能力调用、运行时漂移鲁棒性、恢复成功率、策略可移植性、版本升级安全性、人工覆盖响应性和审计完整性。基准结构包括单机器人和集群设置、场景模板、扰动算子、治理指标和基线评估协议，可在具身能力运行时上实例化，具有模块化接口和合约感知升级工作流。
AI.result: 建立了首个面向具身AI系统治理的评估基准框架，定义了具体的治理维度和评估指标，为具身治理成为一级评估目标提供了初始测量框架。
AI.conclusion: 具身治理应成为具身AI系统的一级评估目标，EmbodiedGovBench为实现这一转变提供了初始测量框架，填补了当前评估体系中治理能力评估的关键空白。

title: M3R: Localized Rainfall Nowcasting with Meteorology-Informed MultiModal Attention
comment: Accepted at IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo (ICME) 2026
summary: Accurate and timely rainfall nowcasting is crucial for disaster mitigation and water resource management. Despite recent advances in deep learning, precipitation prediction remains challenging due to limitations in effectively leveraging diverse multimedia data sources. We introduce M3R, a Meteorology-informed MultiModal attention-based architecture for direct Rainfall prediction that synergistically combines visual NEXRAD radar imagery with numerical Personal Weather Station (PWS) measurements, using a comprehensive pipeline for temporal alignment of heterogeneous meteorological data. With specialized multimodal attention mechanisms, M3R novelly leverages weather station time series as queries to selectively attend to spatial radar features, enabling focused extraction of precipitation signatures. Experimental results for three spatial areas of 100 km * 100 km centered at NEXRAD radar stations demonstrate that M3R outperforms existing approaches, achieving substantial improvements in accuracy, efficiency, and precipitation detection capabilities. Our work establishes new benchmarks for multimedia-based precipitation nowcasting and provides practical tools for operational weather prediction systems. The source code is available at https://github.com/Sanjeev97/M3Rain

AI.tldr: M3R是一种基于多模态注意力机制的降雨临近预报模型，通过融合NEXRAD雷达图像和个人气象站数据，利用专门的多模态注意力机制提升降水预测精度。
AI.motivation: 准确的降雨临近预报对灾害缓解和水资源管理至关重要。现有深度学习方法在有效利用多样化多媒体数据源方面存在局限，需要开发能协同利用不同气象数据源的预测模型。
AI.method: 提出M3R架构，将视觉NEXRAD雷达图像与数值个人气象站测量数据相结合，采用时间对齐管道处理异构气象数据。使用专门的多模态注意力机制，以气象站时间序列作为查询，选择性关注空间雷达特征，聚焦提取降水特征。
AI.result: 在三个100km×100km的NEXRAD雷达站中心区域进行实验，M3R在准确性、效率和降水检测能力方面均优于现有方法，实现了显著改进。
AI.conclusion: M3R为基于多媒体的降水临近预报建立了新基准，为业务天气预报系统提供了实用工具，代码已开源。

title: ViserDex: Visual Sim-to-Real for Robust Dexterous In-hand Reorientation
summary: In-hand object reorientation requires precise estimation of the object pose to handle complex task dynamics. While RGB sensing offers rich semantic cues for pose tracking, existing solutions rely on multi-camera setups or costly ray tracing. We present a sim-to-real framework for monocular RGB in-hand reorientation that integrates 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) to bridge the visual sim-to-real gap. Our key insight is performing domain randomization in the Gaussian representation space: by applying physically consistent, pre-rendering augmentations to 3D Gaussians, we generate photorealistic, randomized visual data for object pose estimation. The manipulation policy is trained using curriculum-based reinforcement learning with teacher-student distillation, enabling efficient learning of complex behaviors. Importantly, both perception and control models can be trained independently on consumer-grade hardware, eliminating the need for large compute clusters. Experiments show that the pose estimator trained with 3DGS data outperforms those trained using conventional rendering data in challenging visual environments. We validate the system on a physical multi-fingered hand equipped with an RGB camera, demonstrating robust reorientation of five diverse objects even under challenging lighting conditions. Our results highlight Gaussian splatting as a practical path for RGB-only dexterous manipulation. For videos of the hardware deployments and additional supplementary materials, please refer to the project website: https://rffr.leggedrobotics.com/works/viserdex/

AI.tldr: 提出基于3D高斯溅射的sim-to-real框架，用于单目RGB手内物体重定向，通过在Gaussian表示空间进行域随机化来生成逼真数据，实现高效训练和硬件部署
AI.motivation: 手内物体重定向需要精确的姿态估计来处理复杂任务动态。虽然RGB感知提供丰富的语义线索，但现有解决方案依赖多相机设置或昂贵的射线追踪。需要一种能在消费级硬件上训练、仅使用单目RGB的实用方法
AI.method: 提出sim-to-real框架，集成3D高斯溅射(3DGS)来弥合视觉sim-to-real差距。核心创新是在Gaussian表示空间进行域随机化：通过对3D高斯应用物理一致、预渲染增强，生成逼真的随机化视觉数据进行姿态估计。使用基于课程的强化学习与师生蒸馏训练操作策略
AI.result: 使用3DGS数据训练的位姿估计器在挑战性视觉环境中优于传统渲染数据训练的模型。在配备RGB相机的物理多指手上验证系统，展示了五种不同物体在挑战性光照条件下的稳健重定向
AI.conclusion: 3D高斯溅射为仅使用RGB的灵巧操作提供了实用路径，实现了感知和控制模型在消费级硬件上的独立训练，消除了对大型计算集群的需求

title: Nautilus: An Auto-Scheduling Tensor Compiler for Efficient Tiled GPU Kernels
summary: We present Nautilus, a novel tensor compiler that moves toward fully automated math-to-kernel optimization. Nautilus compiles a high-level algebraic specification of tensor operators into efficient tiled GPU kernels. Nautilus's successive lowering design allows high-level optimizations, expression rewrites, and tile optimizations to be jointly applied in a single end-to-end system. Nautilus presents a novel auto-scheduler that discovers sequences of high-level optimizations, while preserving the regular program structure needed by tile optimizers. Nautilus's auto-scheduler captures complex interactions and trade-offs in the high-level optimizations, including aggressive global transformations like advanced reduction fusion. Nautilus is the first end-to-end tensor compiler capable of starting from a math-like description of attention and automatically discovering FlashAttention-3-like kernels, offloading the entire burden of optimization from the programmer to the compiler. Across five transformer-based models and 150 evaluation configurations on NVIDIA GH200 and RTX 5090 GPUs, Nautilus achieves up to 23% higher throughput than state-of-the-art compilers on GH200 and up to 42% on RTX 5090, while matching or exceeding manually written cuDNN kernels on many long-sequence configurations.

AI.tldr: Nautilus是一个新颖的张量编译器，能够从高级数学表达式自动生成高效的GPU内核，实现了从数学描述到内核优化的全自动化，在多种配置下性能优于现有编译器和手动优化内核。
AI.motivation: 当前张量编译器需要程序员手动进行大量优化工作，特别是在复杂算子（如注意力机制）的实现中。现有系统难以自动化地发现和组合高级优化与平铺优化，导致优化负担重且性能受限。
AI.method: Nautilus采用渐进式降低设计，将高级代数规范编译为高效的平铺GPU内核。系统包含新颖的自动调度器，能够发现高级优化序列，同时保持平铺优化器所需的规则程序结构。支持高级优化、表达式重写和平铺优化的联合应用。
AI.result: 在NVIDIA GH200和RTX 5090 GPU上，对5个基于Transformer的模型和150个评估配置进行测试：在GH200上比最先进编译器吞吐量提升最高23%，在RTX 5090上提升最高42%。能够自动从注意力机制的数学描述中发现类似FlashAttention-3的内核，并在许多长序列配置中匹配或超过手动编写的cuDNN内核。
AI.conclusion: Nautilus实现了从数学描述到内核优化的全自动化张量编译，首次能够从注意力机制的数学描述自动发现高性能内核，将优化负担从程序员完全转移到编译器，在多种配置下展现出显著性能优势。

title: Zoom Consistency: A Free Confidence Signal in Multi-Step Visual Grounding Pipelines
summary: Multi-step zoom-in pipelines are widely used for GUI grounding, yet the intermediate predictions they produce are typically discarded after coordinate remapping. We observe that these intermediate outputs contain a useful confidence signal for free: zoom consistency, the distance between a model's step-2 prediction and the crop center. Unlike log-probabilities or token-level uncertainty, zoom consistency is a geometric quantity in a shared coordinate space, making it directly comparable across architecturally different VLMs without calibration. We prove this quantity is a linear estimator of step-1 spatial error under idealized conditions (perfect step-2, target within crop) and show it correlates with prediction correctness across two VLMs (AUC = 0.60; Spearman rho = -0.14, p < 10^{-6} for KV-Ground-8B; rho = -0.11, p = 0.0003 for Qwen3.5-27B). The correlation is small but consistent across models, application categories, and operating systems. As a proof-of-concept, we use zoom consistency to route between a specialist and generalist model, capturing 16.5% of the oracle headroom between them (+0.8%, McNemar p = 0.19). Code is available at https://github.com/omxyz/zoom-consistency-routing.

AI.tldr: 论文提出"缩放一致性"作为多步缩放GUI定位中的免费置信度信号，通过中间预测与裁剪中心的几何距离来评估预测可靠性，并用于模型路由决策。
AI.motivation: 多步缩放GUI定位管道中的中间预测通常被丢弃，但这些预测包含有用的置信度信号。现有基于对数概率或token级不确定性的方法在不同架构的视觉语言模型之间难以直接比较，需要校准。
AI.method: 提出"缩放一致性"概念，定义为模型第二步预测与裁剪中心之间的几何距离。在理想条件下证明该量是第一步空间误差的线性估计器。在两个VLMs（KV-Ground-8B和Qwen3.5-27B）上验证其与预测正确性的相关性，并作为概念验证用于专家模型和通用模型之间的路由决策。
AI.result: 缩放一致性在不同模型、应用类别和操作系统间显示出稳定但较小的相关性（AUC=0.60；Spearman rho=-0.14，p<10^{-6}用于KV-Ground-8B；rho=-0.11，p=0.0003用于Qwen3.5-27B）。使用缩放一致性进行模型路由可捕获专家模型和通用模型之间16.5%的理想性能差距（+0.8%，McNemar p=0.19）。
AI.conclusion: 缩放一致性是多步缩放GUI定位中一个简单有效的免费置信度信号，可在共享坐标空间中跨不同架构模型直接比较，为模型选择和路由决策提供实用指标。

title: AIM: Intent-Aware Unified world action Modeling with Spatial Value Maps
summary: Pretrained video generation models provide strong priors for robot control, but existing unified world action models still struggle to decode reliable actions without substantial robot-specific training. We attribute this limitation to a structural mismatch: while video models capture how scenes evolve, action generation requires explicit reasoning about where to interact and the underlying manipulation intent. We introduce AIM, an intent-aware unified world action model that bridges this gap via an explicit spatial interface. Instead of decoding actions directly from future visual representations, AIM predicts an aligned spatial value map that encodes task-relevant interaction structure, enabling a control-oriented abstraction of future dynamics. Built on a pretrained video generation model, AIM jointly models future observations and value maps within a shared mixture-of-transformers architecture. It employs intent-causal attention to route future information to the action branch exclusively through the value representation. We further propose a self-distillation reinforcement learning stage that freezes the video and value branches and optimizes only the action head using dense rewards derived from projected value-map responses together with sparse task-level signals. To support training and evaluation, we construct a simulation dataset of 30K manipulation trajectories with synchronized multi-view observations, actions, and value-map annotations. Experiments on RoboTwin 2.0 benchmark show that AIM achieves a 94.0% average success rate, significantly outperforming prior unified world action baselines. Notably, the improvement is more pronounced in long-horizon and contact-sensitive manipulation tasks, demonstrating the effectiveness of explicit spatial-intent modeling as a bridge between visual world modeling and robot control.

AI.tldr: AIM是一个意图感知的统一世界动作模型，通过显式的空间接口桥接视频生成模型与机器人控制，使用空间价值图编码任务相关交互结构，并通过自蒸馏强化学习优化动作生成。
AI.motivation: 现有的统一世界动作模型难以从预训练视频生成模型中解码可靠动作，因为存在结构不匹配：视频模型捕捉场景演化，而动作生成需要显式推理交互位置和操作意图。
AI.method: 1) 预测对齐的空间价值图编码任务相关交互结构；2) 基于预训练视频生成模型，在共享混合变换器架构中联合建模未来观测和价值图；3) 使用意图因果注意力将未来信息通过价值表示路由到动作分支；4) 提出自蒸馏强化学习阶段，冻结视频和价值分支，仅使用从投影价值图响应和稀疏任务级信号导出的密集奖励优化动作头。
AI.result: 在RoboTwin 2.0基准测试中，AIM达到94.0%的平均成功率，显著优于先前的统一世界动作基线。在长时域和接触敏感的操作任务中改进尤为明显。
AI.conclusion: 显式的空间意图建模作为视觉世界建模与机器人控制之间的桥梁是有效的，AIM通过空间价值图接口成功桥接了预训练视频生成模型与可靠动作生成之间的差距。

title: FoodSense: A Multisensory Food Dataset and Benchmark for Predicting Taste, Smell, Texture, and Sound from Images
summary: Humans routinely infer taste, smell, texture, and even sound from food images a phenomenon well studied in cognitive science. However, prior vision language research on food has focused primarily on recognition tasks such as meal identification, ingredient detection, and nutrition estimation. Image-based prediction of multisensory experience remains largely unexplored. We introduce FoodSense, a human-annotated dataset for cross-sensory inference containing 66,842 participant-image pairs across 2,987 unique food images. Each pair includes numeric ratings (1-5) and free-text descriptors for four sensory dimensions: taste, smell, texture, and sound. To enable models to both predict and explain sensory expectations, we expand short human annotations into image-grounded reasoning traces. A large language model generates visual justifications conditioned on the image, ratings, and descriptors. Using these annotations, we train FoodSense-VL, a vision language benchmark model to produce both multisensory ratings and grounded explanations directly from food images. This work connects cognitive science findings on cross-sensory perception with modern instruction tuning for multimodal models and shows that many popular evaluation metrics are insufficient for visually sensory inference.

AI.tldr: FoodSense：首个用于从食物图像预测多感官体验（味觉、嗅觉、触觉、听觉）的数据集和基准模型，包含66,842个人类标注的图像-参与者对，并生成基于图像的推理轨迹来训练模型进行多感官评分和解释。
AI.motivation: 人类能够从食物图像中推断出味觉、嗅觉、质地甚至声音等感官体验，这一现象在认知科学中已有研究，但先前视觉语言研究主要关注识别任务（如餐食识别、成分检测、营养估计）。基于图像的多感官体验预测在很大程度上尚未被探索，存在研究空白。
AI.method: 1. 构建FoodSense数据集：包含66,842个参与者-图像对，覆盖2,987张独特食物图像，每个对包含四个感官维度（味觉、嗅觉、质地、声音）的数值评分（1-5）和自由文本描述。2. 扩展短标注为基于图像的推理轨迹：使用大语言模型根据图像、评分和描述生成视觉理由。3. 训练FoodSense-VL基准模型：基于这些标注训练视觉语言模型，直接从食物图像生成多感官评分和基于图像的解释。
AI.result: 创建了首个用于跨感官推理的人类标注数据集FoodSense，开发了FoodSense-VL基准模型，能够从食物图像预测多感官体验并提供基于图像的解释。研究还发现许多流行的评估指标对于视觉感官推理任务不够充分。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将认知科学中关于跨感官感知的发现与现代多模态模型的指令调优相结合，填补了从食物图像预测多感官体验的研究空白，并揭示了现有评估指标在该任务上的局限性，为未来研究提供了新的数据集和基准。

title: Simulator Adaptation for Sim-to-Real Learning of Legged Locomotion via Proprioceptive Distribution Matching
summary: Simulation trained legged locomotion policies often exhibit performance loss on hardware due to dynamics discrepancies between the simulator and the real world, highlighting the need for approaches that adapt the simulator itself to better match hardware behavior. Prior work typically quantify these discrepancies through precise, time-aligned matching of joint and base trajectories. This process requires motion capture, privileged sensing, and carefully controlled initial conditions. We introduce a practical alternative based on proprioceptive distribution matching, which compares hardware and simulation rollouts as distributions of joint observations and actions, eliminating the need for time alignment or external sensing. Using this metric as a black-box objective, we explore adapting simulator dynamics through parameter identification, action-delta models, and residual actuator models. Our approach matches the parameter recovery and policy-performance gains of privileged state-matching baselines across extensive sim-to-sim ablations on the Go2 quadruped. Real-world experiments demonstrate substantial drift reduction using less than five minutes of hardware data, even for a challenging two-legged walking behavior. These results demonstrate that proprioceptive distribution matching provides a practical and effective route to simulator adaptation for sim-to-real transfer of learned legged locomotion.

AI.tldr: 通过本体感觉分布匹配实现仿真器自适应，无需运动捕捉或时间对齐，显著提升四足机器人仿真到现实的迁移性能
AI.motivation: 仿真训练的四足运动策略在硬件上常因动力学差异而性能下降，现有方法需要运动捕捉、特权传感和精确时间对齐，过程复杂且不实用
AI.method: 提出基于本体感觉分布匹配的方法，将硬件和仿真数据视为关节观测和动作的分布进行比较，无需时间对齐或外部传感；使用该指标作为黑盒目标，通过参数识别、动作增量模型和残差执行器模型自适应仿真器动力学
AI.result: 在Go2四足机器人上，该方法在仿真到仿真消融实验中达到与特权状态匹配基线相当的参数恢复和策略性能增益；真实世界实验显示，使用不到5分钟的硬件数据即可显著减少漂移，即使对于具有挑战性的两足行走行为也有效
AI.conclusion: 本体感觉分布匹配为学习型四足运动的仿真到现实迁移提供了一种实用有效的仿真器自适应途径

title: Step-level Denoising-time Diffusion Alignment with Multiple Objectives
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a powerful tool for aligning diffusion models with human preferences, typically by optimizing a single reward function under a KL regularization constraint. In practice, however, human preferences are inherently pluralistic, and aligned models must balance multiple downstream objectives, such as aesthetic quality and text-image consistency. Existing multi-objective approaches either rely on costly multi-objective RL fine-tuning or on fusing separately aligned models at denoising time, but they generally require access to reward values (or their gradients) and/or introduce approximation error in the resulting denoising objectives. In this paper, we revisit the problem of RL fine-tuning for diffusion models and address the intractability of identifying the optimal policy by introducing a step-level RL formulation. Building on this, we further propose Multi-objective Step-level Denoising-time Diffusion Alignment (MSDDA), a retraining-free framework for aligning diffusion models with multiple objectives, obtaining the optimal reverse denoising distribution in closed form, with mean and variance expressed directly in terms of single-objective base models. We prove that this denoising-time objective is exactly equivalent to the step-level RL fine-tuning, introducing no approximation error. Moreover, we provide numerical results, which indicate our method outperforms existing denoising-time approaches.

AI.tldr: 提出MSDDA框架，无需重新训练即可对齐扩散模型与多个目标，通过步级RL公式获得闭式最优去噪分布，避免近似误差。
AI.motivation: 人类偏好本质上是多元的，对齐模型需要平衡多个下游目标（如美学质量和图文一致性）。现有多目标方法要么依赖昂贵的多目标RL微调，要么在去噪时融合单独对齐的模型，通常需要奖励值（或其梯度）访问权限，并引入近似误差。
AI.method: 引入步级RL公式解决最优策略识别难题，提出MSDDA框架：无需重新训练，通过闭式解获得最优反向去噪分布，均值和方差直接由单目标基础模型表达。证明该去噪时目标与步级RL微调完全等价，无近似误差。
AI.result: 数值结果表明该方法优于现有去噪时方法，能够有效对齐扩散模型与多个目标，平衡不同偏好。
AI.conclusion: MSDDA提供了一个理论严谨且实用的框架，用于多目标扩散模型对齐，避免了传统方法的计算成本和近似误差，在保持性能的同时提高了效率。

title: Governing Reflective Human-AI Collaboration: A Framework for Epistemic Scaffolding and Traceable Reasoning
summary:
Large language models have advanced rapidly, from pattern recognition to emerging forms of reasoning, yet they remain confined to linguistic simulation rather than grounded understanding. They can produce fluent outputs that resemble reflection, but lack temporal continuity, causal feedback, and anchoring in real-world interaction. This paper proposes a complementary approach in which reasoning is treated as a relational process distributed between human and model rather than an internal capability of either.
  Building on recent work on "System-2" learning, we relocate reflective reasoning to the interaction layer. Instead of engineering reasoning solely within models, we frame it as a cognitive protocol that can be structured, measured, and governed using existing systems. This perspective emphasizes collaborative intelligence, combining human judgment and contextual understanding with machine speed, memory, and associative capacity.
  We introduce "The Architect's Pen" as a practical method. Like an architect who thinks through drawing, the human uses the model as an external medium for structured reflection. By embedding phases of articulation, critique, and revision into human-AI interaction, the dialogue itself becomes a reasoning loop: human abstraction -> model articulation -> human reflection.
  This reframes the question from whether the model can think to whether the human-AI system can reason. The framework enables auditable reasoning traces and supports alignment with emerging governance standards, including the EU AI Act and ISO/IEC 42001. It provides a practical path toward more transparent, controllable, and accountable AI use without requiring new model architectures.

AI.tldr: 提出将推理视为人与模型之间的分布式关系过程，而非模型内部能力，通过"建筑师之笔"方法实现结构化人机协作推理
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型虽然具备模式识别和推理能力，但仅限于语言模拟而非真实理解，缺乏时间连续性、因果反馈和现实世界交互锚定。需要一种互补方法将推理重新定位为人机交互层面的关系过程。
AI.method: 提出"建筑师之笔"方法，将推理视为认知协议，在人机交互中嵌入表达、批判和修订阶段，形成"人类抽象->模型表达->人类反思"的推理循环，将模型作为结构化反思的外部媒介。
AI.result: 该方法将问题从"模型是否能思考"转变为"人机系统是否能推理"，支持可审计的推理轨迹，符合欧盟AI法案和ISO/IEC 42001等治理标准，为透明、可控、可问责的AI使用提供实用路径。
AI.conclusion: 通过将推理重新定位为人机交互层面的关系过程，可以实现协作智能，结合人类判断与上下文理解以及机器的速度、记忆和联想能力，无需新的模型架构即可实现更透明、可控、可问责的AI系统。

title: Federated Single-Agent Robotics: Multi-Robot Coordination Without Intra-Robot Multi-Agent Fragmentation
summary: As embodied robots move toward fleet-scale operation, multi-robot coordination is becoming a central systems challenge. Existing approaches often treat this as motivation for increasing internal multi-agent decomposition within each robot. We argue for a different principle: multi-robot coordination does not require intra-robot multi-agent fragmentation. Each robot should remain a single embodied agent with its own persistent runtime, local policy scope, capability state, and recovery authority, while coordination emerges through federation across robots at the fleet level. We present Federated Single-Agent Robotics (FSAR), a runtime architecture for multi-robot coordination built on single-agent robot runtimes. Each robot exposes a governed capability surface rather than an internally fragmented agent society. Fleet coordination is achieved through shared capability registries, cross-robot task delegation, policy-aware authority assignment, trust-scoped interaction, and layered recovery protocols. We formalize key coordination relations including authority delegation, inter-robot capability requests, local-versus-fleet recovery boundaries, and hierarchical human supervision, and describe a fleet runtime architecture supporting shared Embodied Capability Module (ECM) discovery, contract-aware cross-robot coordination, and fleet-level governance. We evaluate FSAR on representative multi-robot coordination scenarios against decomposition-heavy baselines. Results show statistically significant gains in governance locality (d=2.91, p<.001 vs. centralized control) and recovery containment (d=4.88, p<.001 vs. decomposition-heavy), while reducing authority conflicts and policy violations across all scenarios. Our results support the view that the path from embodied agents to embodied fleets is better served by federation across coherent robot runtimes than by fragmentation within them.

AI.tldr: FSAR提出了一种多机器人协调架构，主张每个机器人保持为单一智能体，通过运行时联邦实现舰队级协调，而非在机器人内部进行多智能体分解。
AI.motivation: 随着机器人向舰队规模发展，多机器人协调成为系统挑战。现有方法倾向于在每个机器人内部增加多智能体分解，但作者认为多机器人协调不需要机器人内部的多智能体碎片化。
AI.method: 提出联邦单智能体机器人（FSAR）运行时架构，每个机器人保持为单一具身智能体，具有持久运行时、本地策略范围、能力状态和恢复权限。通过共享能力注册表、跨机器人任务委托、策略感知权限分配、信任范围交互和分层恢复协议实现舰队协调。
AI.result: 在代表性多机器人协调场景中，相比分解密集型基线，FSAR在治理局部性（d=2.91, p<.001）和恢复包容性（d=4.88, p<.001）方面取得显著提升，同时减少了所有场景中的权限冲突和策略违规。
AI.conclusion: 从具身智能体到具身舰队的路径更适合通过跨一致机器人运行时的联邦实现，而非在机器人内部进行碎片化分解。FSAR架构支持共享具身能力模块发现、合约感知的跨机器人协调和舰队级治理。

title: Expert-Guided Class-Conditional Goodness-of-Fit Scores for Interpretable Classification with Informative Missingness: An Application to Seismic Monitoring
summary: We study a classification problem with three key challenges: pervasive informative missingness, the integration of partial prior expert knowledge into the learning process, and the need for interpretable decision rules. We propose a framework that encodes prior knowledge through an expert-guided class-conditional model for one or more classes, and use this model to construct a small set of interpretable goodness-of-fit features. The features quantify how well the observed data agree with the expert model, isolating the contributions of different aspects of the data, including both observed and missing components. These features are combined with a few transparent auxiliary summaries in a simple discriminative classifier, resulting in a decision rule that is easy to inspect and justify. We develop and apply the framework in the context of seismic monitoring used to assess compliance with the Comprehensive Nuclear-Test-Ban Treaty. We show that the method has strong potential as a transparent screening tool, reducing workload for expert analysts. A simulation designed to isolate the contribution of the proposed framework shows that this interpretable expert-guided method can even outperform strong standard machine-learning classifiers, particularly when training samples are small.

AI.tldr: 提出一个处理信息性缺失、整合专家先验知识、生成可解释决策规则的分类框架，应用于地震监测领域
AI.motivation: 解决分类问题中的三个关键挑战：普遍的信息性缺失、将部分专家先验知识整合到学习过程中、需要可解释的决策规则
AI.method: 通过专家引导的类条件模型编码先验知识，构建一组可解释的拟合优度特征，量化观测数据与专家模型的一致性，结合少量透明辅助摘要构建简单判别分类器
AI.result: 该方法在核试验禁令条约地震监测中显示出作为透明筛查工具的潜力，能减少专家工作量；模拟实验表明在小样本情况下，这种可解释的专家引导方法甚至能超越标准机器学习分类器
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架成功解决了信息性缺失、专家知识整合和可解释性需求，在特定领域应用中表现出色，特别是在小样本情况下具有优势

title: SatBLIP: Context Understanding and Feature Identification from Satellite Imagery with Vision-Language Learning
summary: Rural environmental risks are shaped by place-based conditions (e.g., housing quality, road access, land-surface patterns), yet standard vulnerability indices are coarse and provide limited insight into risk contexts. We propose SatBLIP, a satellite-specific vision-language framework for rural context understanding and feature identification that predicts county-level Social Vulnerability Index (SVI). SatBLIP addresses limitations of prior remote sensing pipelines-handcrafted features, manual virtual audits, and natural-image-trained VLMs-by coupling contrastive image-text alignment with bootstrapped captioning tailored to satellite semantics. We use GPT-4o to generate structured descriptions of satellite tiles (roof type/condition, house size, yard attributes, greenery, and road context), then fine-tune a satellite-adapted BLIP model to generate captions for unseen images. Captions are encoded with CLIP and fused with LLM-derived embeddings via attention for SVI estimation under spatial aggregation. Using SHAP, we identify salient attributes (e.g., roof form/condition, street width, vegetation, cars/open space) that consistently drive robust predictions, enabling interpretable mapping of rural risk environments.

AI.tldr: SatBLIP：一种基于卫星视觉语言框架的农村环境风险理解方法，通过对比图像-文本对齐和引导式字幕生成预测县级社会脆弱性指数，解决了传统遥感方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 农村环境风险受地方特定条件（如住房质量、道路通达性、地表模式）影响，但现有脆弱性指数过于粗糙且无法深入理解风险背景。传统遥感方法存在手工特征提取、人工虚拟审核和自然图像训练VLM等局限性。
AI.method: 提出SatBLIP框架：1）使用GPT-4o生成卫星图块的结构化描述（屋顶类型/状况、房屋大小、庭院属性、绿化、道路背景）；2）微调卫星适应的BLIP模型为未见图像生成字幕；3）通过CLIP编码字幕并与LLM衍生嵌入通过注意力机制融合；4）在空间聚合下进行SVI估计；5）使用SHAP识别关键属性。
AI.result: SatBLIP能够识别驱动稳健预测的关键属性（如屋顶形式/状况、街道宽度、植被、汽车/开放空间），实现农村风险环境的可解释性映射。该方法克服了传统遥感方法的局限性，提供了更精细的农村环境风险理解。
AI.conclusion: SatBLIP通过结合对比图像-文本对齐和卫星语义定制的引导式字幕生成，为农村环境风险理解提供了有效的视觉语言框架，能够生成可解释的县级社会脆弱性预测，为农村风险环境映射提供了新方法。

title: Inferring World Belief States in Dynamic Real-World Environments
summary: We investigate estimating a human's world belief state using a robot's observations in a dynamic, 3D, and partially observable environment. The methods are grounded in mental model theory, which posits that human decision making, contextual reasoning, situation awareness, and behavior planning draw from an internal simulation or world belief state. When in teams, the mental model also includes a team model of each teammate's beliefs and capabilities, enabling fluent teamwork without the need for constant and explicit communication. In this work we replicate a core component of the team model by inferring a teammate's belief state, or level one situation awareness, as a human-robot team navigates a household environment. We evaluate our methods in a realistic simulation, extend to a real-world robot platform, and demonstrate a downstream application of the belief state through an active assistance semantic reasoning task.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过机器人观测来估计人类在动态、三维、部分可观测环境中的世界信念状态，基于心智模型理论，并应用于人机团队在家庭环境中的导航任务。
AI.motivation: 研究动机源于心智模型理论，该理论认为人类的决策、情境推理、态势感知和行为规划都基于内部模拟或世界信念状态。在团队协作中，心智模型还包括对队友信念和能力的团队模型，从而实现无需持续显式通信的流畅协作。本研究旨在复制团队模型的核心组件，通过推断队友的信念状态（一级态势感知）来提升人机团队在家庭环境中的导航协作。
AI.method: 研究方法基于心智模型理论，通过机器人的观测来推断人类的信念状态。研究在真实仿真环境中进行评估，并将方法扩展到真实机器人平台。此外，研究还通过主动辅助语义推理任务展示了信念状态的下游应用。
AI.result: 研究在真实仿真环境中评估了所提出的方法，并成功将其扩展到真实机器人平台。通过主动辅助语义推理任务，研究展示了信念状态估计的实际应用价值，证明了该方法在人机团队协作中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功实现了通过机器人观测来估计人类在动态、三维、部分可观测环境中的信念状态，验证了基于心智模型理论的方法在人机团队协作中的可行性。研究不仅提供了理论框架，还通过仿真和真实平台验证了方法的实用性，并通过下游应用展示了其实际价值，为人机协作系统的开发提供了重要参考。

title: The Cost of Language: Centroid Erasure Exposes and Exploits Modal Competition in Multimodal Language Models
summary: Multimodal language models systematically underperform on visual perception tasks, yet the structure underlying this failure remains poorly understood. We propose centroid replacement, collapsing each token to its nearest K-means centroid, as a controlled probe for modal dependence. Across seven models spanning three architecture families, erasing text centroid structure costs 4$\times$ more accuracy than erasing visual centroid structure, exposing a universal imbalance where language representations overshadow vision even on tasks that demand visual reasoning. We exploit this asymmetry through text centroid contrastive decoding, recovering up to +16.9% accuracy on individual tasks by contrastively decoding against a text-centroid-erased reference. This intervention varies meaningfully with training approaches: standard fine-tuned models show larger gains (+5.6% on average) than preference-optimized models (+1.5% on average). Our findings suggest that modal competition is structurally localized, correctable at inference time without retraining, and quantifiable as a diagnostic signal to guide future multimodal training.

AI.tldr: 通过质心替换技术分析多模态语言模型中视觉与文本模态的不平衡性，并提出文本质心对比解码方法提升视觉感知任务性能
AI.motivation: 多模态语言模型在视觉感知任务上系统性表现不佳，但其失败的根本结构原因尚不清楚。研究者希望探究模态依赖的结构性特征，理解视觉与文本表征之间的不平衡关系。
AI.method: 提出质心替换方法，将每个token替换为其最近的K-means质心，作为模态依赖性的受控探针。在涵盖三种架构家族的七个模型上进行实验，测量擦除文本质心结构与视觉质心结构对准确率的影响差异。基于发现的不对称性，开发文本质心对比解码方法，在推理时通过对比解码对抗文本质心擦除的参考模型来提升性能。
AI.result: 擦除文本质心结构比擦除视觉质心结构多损失4倍准确率，揭示了语言表征在需要视觉推理的任务上仍然压制视觉表征的普遍不平衡现象。文本质心对比解码方法可在单个任务上恢复高达+16.9%的准确率提升。标准微调模型平均增益更大（+5.6%），而偏好优化模型增益较小（+1.5%）。
AI.conclusion: 模态竞争在结构上是局部化的，可以在推理时无需重新训练进行校正，并且可作为诊断信号来指导未来的多模态训练。该研究为理解多模态模型中的模态不平衡提供了量化框架和有效的干预方法。

title: MVAdapt: Zero-Shot Multi-Vehicle Adaptation for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
summary: End-to-End (E2E) autonomous driving models are usually trained and evaluated with a fixed ego-vehicle, even though their driving policy is implicitly tied to vehicle dynamics. When such a model is deployed on a vehicle with different size, mass, or drivetrain characteristics, its performance can degrade substantially; we refer to this problem as the vehicle-domain gap. To address it, we propose MVAdapt, a physics-conditioned adaptation framework for multi-vehicle E2E driving. MVAdapt combines a frozen TransFuser++ scene encoder with a lightweight physics encoder and a cross-attention module that conditions scene features on vehicle properties before waypoint decoding. In the CARLA Leaderboard 1.0 benchmark, MVAdapt improves over naive transfer and multi-embodiment adaptation baselines on both in-distribution and unseen vehicles. We further show two complementary behaviors: strong zero-shot transfer on many unseen vehicles, and data-efficient few-shot calibration for severe physical outliers. These results suggest that explicitly conditioning E2E driving policies on vehicle physics is an effective step toward more transferable autonomous driving models. All codes are available at https://github.com/hae-sung-oh/MVAdapt

AI.tldr: MVAdapt：一个物理条件化的多车辆端到端自动驾驶适应框架，通过显式地将驾驶策略与车辆物理特性关联来解决车辆领域差距问题
AI.motivation: 传统的端到端自动驾驶模型通常在固定自车配置下训练和评估，但其驾驶策略隐式依赖于车辆动力学。当部署到具有不同尺寸、质量或传动特性的车辆上时，性能会显著下降，这一问题被称为车辆领域差距
AI.method: MVAdapt结合了冻结的TransFuser++场景编码器、轻量级物理编码器和交叉注意力模块，该模块在路径点解码前将场景特征条件化于车辆属性。物理编码器提取车辆物理特性，交叉注意力模块将这些特性与场景特征融合
AI.result: 在CARLA Leaderboard 1.0基准测试中，MVAdapt在分布内和未见车辆上都优于朴素迁移和多体现适应基线。展示了两种互补行为：对许多未见车辆的强零样本迁移能力，以及对严重物理异常值的数据高效少样本校准
AI.conclusion: 显式地将端到端驾驶策略条件化于车辆物理特性是迈向更具可迁移性自动驾驶模型的有效步骤。MVAdapt框架为解决车辆领域差距问题提供了有前景的解决方案

title: Interpretable Human Activity Recognition for Subtle Robbery Detection in Surveillance Videos
summary: Non-violent street robberies (snatch-and-run) are difficult to detect automatically because they are brief, subtle, and often indistinguishable from benign human interactions in unconstrained surveillance footage. This paper presents a hybrid, pose-driven approach for detecting snatch-and-run events that combines real-time perception with an interpretable classification stage suitable for edge deployment. The system uses a YOLO-based pose estimator to extract body keypoints for each tracked person and computes kinematic and interaction features describing hand speed, arm extension, proximity, and relative motion between an aggressor-victim pair. A Random Forest classifier is trained on these descriptors, and a temporal hysteresis filter is applied to stabilize frame-level predictions and reduce spurious alarms. We evaluate the method on a staged dataset and on a disjoint test set collected from internet videos, demonstrating promising generalization across different scenes and camera viewpoints. Finally, we implement the complete pipeline on an NVIDIA Jetson Nano and report real-time performance, supporting the feasibility of proactive, on-device robbery detection.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于姿态的混合方法，用于实时检测非暴力街头抢劫（抢夺逃跑），结合实时感知与可解释分类，适合边缘设备部署。
AI.motivation: 非暴力街头抢劫（抢夺逃跑）难以自动检测，因为事件短暂、细微，在无约束监控视频中与良性人际互动难以区分。
AI.method: 使用YOLO姿态估计器提取人体关键点，计算手部速度、手臂伸展、接近度和相对运动等运动学和交互特征，通过随机森林分类器训练，并应用时间滞后滤波器稳定帧级预测。
AI.result: 在模拟数据集和互联网视频独立测试集上评估，展示了跨不同场景和摄像机视角的良好泛化能力，在NVIDIA Jetson Nano上实现实时性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法支持主动的、设备端的抢劫检测可行性，为边缘部署提供了一种有效的解决方案。

title: Ψ-Map: Panoptic Surface Integrated Mapping Enables Real2Sim Transfer
summary: Open-vocabulary panoptic reconstruction is essential for advanced robotics perception and simulation. However, existing methods based on 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) often struggle to simultaneously achieve geometric accuracy, coherent panoptic understanding, and real-time inference frequency in large-scale scenes. In this paper, we propose a comprehensive framework that integrates geometric reinforcement, end-to-end panoptic learning, and efficient rendering. First, to ensure physical realism in large-scale environments, we leverage LiDAR data to construct plane-constrained multimodal Gaussian Mixture Models (GMMs) and employ 2D Gaussian surfels as the map representation, enabling high-precision surface alignment and continuous geometric supervision. Building upon this, to overcome the error accumulation and cumbersome cross-frame association inherent in traditional multi-stage panoptic segmentation pipelines, we design a query-guided end-to-end learning architecture. By utilizing a local cross-attention mechanism within the view frustum, the system lifts 2D mask features directly into 3D space, achieving globally consistent panoptic understanding. Finally, addressing the computational bottlenecks caused by high-dimensional semantic features, we introduce Precise Tile Intersection and a Top-K Hard Selection strategy to optimize the rendering pipeline. Experimental results demonstrate that our system achieves superior geometric and panoptic reconstruction quality in large-scale scenes while maintaining an inference rate exceeding 40 FPS, meeting the real-time requirements of robotic control loops.

AI.tldr: 提出一个用于大规模场景开放词汇全景重建的综合性框架，通过几何强化、端到端全景学习和高效渲染，在保持40+FPS实时推理的同时实现几何精度和全景一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于3D高斯泼溅的方法在大规模场景中难以同时实现几何精度、连贯的全景理解和实时推理频率，需要解决几何真实性、全景一致性以及计算效率三个关键问题。
AI.method: 1) 利用LiDAR数据构建平面约束的多模态高斯混合模型，采用2D高斯面元作为地图表示，实现高精度表面对齐和连续几何监督；2) 设计查询引导的端到端学习架构，通过视锥体内的局部交叉注意力机制将2D掩码特征直接提升到3D空间；3) 引入精确瓦片相交和Top-K硬选择策略优化渲染流水线。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，系统在大规模场景中实现了卓越的几何和全景重建质量，同时保持超过40 FPS的推理速率，满足机器人控制回路的实时性要求。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功解决了大规模开放词汇全景重建中几何精度、全景一致性和实时性能的平衡问题，为机器人感知和仿真提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Constraint-based Pre-training: From Structured Constraints to Scalable Model Initialization
summary: The pre-training and fine-tuning paradigm has become the dominant approach for model adaptation. However, conventional pre-training typically yields models at a fixed scale, whereas practical deployment often requires models of varying sizes, exposing its limitations when target model scales differ from those used during pre-training. To address this, we propose an innovative constraint-based pre-training paradigm that imposes structured constraints during pre-training to disentangle size-agnostic knowledge into reusable weight templates, while assigning size-specific adaptation to lightweight weight scalers, thereby reformulating variable-sized model initialization as a multi-task adaptation problem. Within this paradigm, we further introduce WeiT, which employs Kronecker-based constraints to regularize the pre-training process. Specifically, model parameters are represented as compositions of weight templates via concatenation and weighted aggregation, with adaptive connections governed by lightweight weight scalers whose parameters are learned from limited data. This design enables flexible and efficient construction of model weights across diverse downstream scales. Extensive experiments demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of WeiT, achieving state-of-the-art performance in initializing models with varying depths and widths across a broad range of perception and embodied learning tasks, including Image Classification, Image Generation, and Embodied Control. Moreover, its effectiveness generalizes to both Transformer-based and Convolution-based architectures, consistently enabling faster convergence and improved performance even under full training.

AI.tldr: 提出基于约束的预训练范式WeiT，通过Kronecker约束将尺寸无关知识解耦到可重用权重模板中，将尺寸特定适配分配给轻量权重缩放器，实现可变尺寸模型初始化
AI.motivation: 传统预训练产生固定尺度模型，而实际部署需要不同尺寸模型，当目标模型尺度与预训练尺度不同时存在局限性
AI.method: 提出约束基预训练范式，通过结构化约束在预训练中将尺寸无关知识解耦到可重用权重模板，尺寸特定适配分配给轻量权重缩放器；具体实现WeiT采用Kronecker约束，模型参数通过连接和加权聚合表示为权重模板的组合，由轻量权重缩放器控制自适应连接
AI.result: 在Image Classification、Image Generation和Embodied Control等感知和具身学习任务中，WeiT在初始化不同深度和宽度模型时达到SOTA性能；对Transformer和Convolution架构均有效，实现更快收敛和更好性能
AI.conclusion: WeiT提出的约束基预训练范式成功解决了可变尺寸模型初始化问题，将尺寸无关知识解耦到可重用模板中，实现了灵活高效的下游模型权重构建

title: MemoSight: Unifying Context Compression and Multi Token Prediction for Reasoning Acceleration
summary: While Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning enables LLMs to solve challenging reasoning problems, as KV cache grows linearly with the number of generated tokens, CoT reasoning faces scaling issues in terms of speed and memory usage. In this work, we propose MemoSight (Memory-Foresight-based reasoning), a unified framework that integrates both context compression and multi-token prediction to mitigate the efficiency issues while maintaining CoT reasoning performance. Our framework adopts the same minimalist design for both context compression and multi-token prediction via special tokens and their corresponding position layout tailored to each token type. Comprehensive experiments on four reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that MemoSight reduces the KV cache footprint by up to 66% and accelerates inference by 1.56x, while outperforming existing CoT compression methods.

AI.tldr: MemoSight：通过上下文压缩和多令牌预测的统一框架，在保持CoT推理性能的同时解决KV缓存线性增长问题
AI.motivation: CoT推理虽然能解决复杂推理问题，但KV缓存随生成令牌数量线性增长，导致推理速度和内存使用面临扩展性问题
AI.method: 提出MemoSight统一框架，集成上下文压缩和多令牌预测，通过特殊令牌及其对应的位置布局设计来减少KV缓存占用
AI.result: 在四个推理基准测试中，MemoSight将KV缓存占用减少高达66%，推理速度提升1.56倍，同时优于现有CoT压缩方法
AI.conclusion: MemoSight有效解决了CoT推理的效率瓶颈，在保持性能的同时显著提升了推理速度和内存效率

title: Geometrically Consistent Multi-View Scene Generation from Freehand Sketches
summary:
We tackle a new problem: generating geometrically consistent multi-view scenes from a single freehand sketch. Freehand sketches are the most geometrically impoverished input one could offer a multi-view generator. They convey scene intent through abstract strokes while introducing spatial distortions that actively conflict with any consistent 3D interpretation. No prior method attempts this; existing multi-view approaches require photographs or text, while sketch-to-3D methods need multiple views or costly per-scene optimisation.
  We address three compounding challenges; absent training data, the need for geometric reasoning from distorted 2D input, and cross-view consistency, through three mutually reinforcing contributions: (i) a curated dataset of $\sim$9k sketch-to-multiview samples, constructed via an automated generation and filtering pipeline; (ii) Parallel Camera-Aware Attention Adapters (CA3) that inject geometric inductive biases into the video transformer; and (iii) a Sparse Correspondence Supervision Loss (CSL) derived from Structure-from-Motion reconstructions.
  Our framework synthesizes all views in a single denoising process without requiring reference images, iterative refinement, or per-scene optimization. Our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art two-stage baselines, improving realism (FID) by over 60% and geometric consistency (Corr-Acc) by 23%, while providing up to a 3.7$\times$ inference speedup.

AI.tldr: 从单张手绘草图生成几何一致的多视角场景，解决了训练数据缺失、几何推理和跨视角一致性三大挑战
AI.motivation: 手绘草图是最几何信息贫乏的多视角生成输入，现有方法需要照片或文本输入，而草图到3D方法需要多视角或昂贵的逐场景优化，缺乏从单张草图直接生成多视角场景的方法
AI.method: 提出三个相互增强的贡献：(1) 构建约9k个草图到多视角样本的数据集；(2) 平行相机感知注意力适配器(CA3)将几何归纳偏置注入视频变换器；(3) 从运动恢复结构重建中推导的稀疏对应监督损失(CSL)
AI.result: 在单次去噪过程中合成所有视角，无需参考图像、迭代细化或逐场景优化。相比最先进的两阶段基线，真实感(FID)提升60%以上，几何一致性(Corr-Acc)提升23%，推理速度提升3.7倍
AI.conclusion: 首次实现了从单张手绘草图生成几何一致的多视角场景，通过数据集构建、几何感知架构和监督损失解决了关键挑战，为草图驱动的3D内容创作提供了高效解决方案

title: Exploiting Correlations in Federated Learning: Opportunities and Practical Limitations
comment: 14 pages, 7 figures, submitted for possible publication
summary: The communication bottleneck in federated learning (FL) has spurred extensive research into techniques to reduce the volume of data exchanged between client devices and the central parameter server. In this paper, we systematically classify gradient and model compression schemes into three categories based on the type of correlations they exploit: structural, temporal, and spatial. We examine the sources of such correlations, propose quantitative metrics for measuring their magnitude, and reinterpret existing compression methods through this unified correlation-based framework. Our experimental studies demonstrate that the degrees of structural, temporal, and spatial correlations vary significantly depending on task complexity, model architecture, and algorithmic configurations. These findings suggest that algorithm designers should carefully evaluate correlation assumptions under specific deployment scenarios rather than assuming that they are always present. Motivated by these findings, we propose two adaptive compression designs that actively switch between different compression modes based on the measured correlation strength, and we evaluate their performance gains relative to conventional non-adaptive approaches. In summary, our unified taxonomy provides a clean and principled foundation for developing more effective and application-specific compression techniques for FL systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于相关性的联邦学习压缩技术统一分类框架，将梯度/模型压缩方案分为结构、时间和空间三类，并开发了自适应压缩设计。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中的通信瓶颈促使研究者开发各种数据压缩技术，但现有方法缺乏统一的理论框架。本文旨在通过基于相关性的分类来系统化理解不同压缩方案，并揭示相关性假设在不同场景下的适用性差异。
AI.method: 1) 提出基于相关性类型的压缩技术分类框架：结构相关性、时间相关性、空间相关性；2) 分析这些相关性的来源并设计量化度量指标；3) 将现有压缩方法重新解释为该统一框架下的实例；4) 通过实验研究不同任务复杂度、模型架构和算法配置下的相关性变化；5) 提出两种自适应压缩设计，根据测量的相关性强度在不同压缩模式间主动切换。
AI.result: 实验研究表明：结构、时间和空间相关性的程度显著依赖于任务复杂度、模型架构和算法配置。这意味着算法设计者不应假设相关性总是存在，而应在具体部署场景下仔细评估相关性假设。提出的自适应压缩设计相比传统非自适应方法获得了性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的统一分类法为开发更有效、应用特定的联邦学习系统压缩技术提供了清晰且有原则的基础。研究强调需要根据实际相关性特征设计自适应压缩方案，而非盲目应用固定压缩策略。

title: One Token per Highly Selective Frame: Towards Extreme Compression for Long Video Understanding
comment: Appear in the proceedings of NeurIPS 2025
summary: Long video understanding is inherently challenging for vision-language models (VLMs) because of the extensive number of frames. With each video frame typically expanding into tens or hundreds of tokens, the limited context length of large language models (LLMs) forces the VLMs to perceive the frames sparsely and lose temporal information. To address this, we explore extreme video token compression towards one token per frame at the final LLM layer. Our key insight is that heuristic-based compression, widely adopted by previous methods, is prone to information loss, and this necessitates supervising LLM layers into learnable and progressive modules for token-level compression (LP-Comp). Such compression enables our VLM to digest 2x-4x more frames with improved performance. To further increase the token efficiency, we investigate frame-level compression, which selects the frames most relevant to the queries via the internal attention scores of the LLM layers, named question-conditioned compression (QC-Comp). As a notable distinction from previous studies, we mitigate the position bias of LLM attention in long contexts, i.e., the over-concentration on the beginning and end of a sequence, by splitting long videos into short segments and employing local attention. Collectively, our combined token-level and frame-level leads to an extreme compression model for long video understanding, named XComp, achieving a significantly larger compression ratio and enabling denser frame sampling. Our XComp is finetuned from VideoChat-Flash with a data-efficient supervised compression tuning stage that only requires 2.5% of the supervised fine-tuning data, yet boosts the accuracy from 42.9% to 46.2% on LVBench and enhances multiple other long video benchmarks.

AI.tldr: XComp：一种用于长视频理解的极端压缩模型，通过可学习的渐进式token级压缩和问题条件帧级压缩，实现每帧一个token的极端压缩，显著提升长视频理解性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在处理长视频时面临挑战：视频帧数多，每帧生成大量token，而大语言模型的上下文长度有限，导致只能稀疏感知帧并丢失时间信息。
AI.method: 提出XComp模型，包含两个核心组件：1）LP-Comp（可学习的渐进式token级压缩），监督LLM层学习token级压缩；2）QC-Comp（问题条件帧级压缩），基于LLM内部注意力分数选择与查询最相关的帧。同时通过分割长视频为短片段并使用局部注意力来缓解LLM的位置偏差。
AI.result: XComp能够处理2-4倍更多的帧数，性能提升。在LVBench上准确率从42.9%提升至46.2%，并在多个长视频基准测试中表现优异。仅需2.5%的监督微调数据即可实现高效压缩调整。
AI.conclusion: XComp通过token级和帧级压缩的协同作用，实现了极端压缩比和更密集的帧采样，显著提升了长视频理解能力，为处理长视频内容提供了高效解决方案。

title: Cooperate to Compete: Strategic Data Generation and Incentivization Framework for Coopetitive Cross-Silo Federated Learning
comment: Competition-aware Federated Learning, Strategic data generation approaches, A payoff-redistribution based incentive mechanism, Potential game, Social welfare
summary: In data-sensitive domains such as healthcare, cross-silo federated learning (CFL) allows organizations to collaboratively train AI models without sharing raw data. However, practical CFL deployments are inherently coopetitive, in which organizations cooperate during model training while competing in downstream markets. In such settings, training contributions, including data volume, quality, and diversity, can improve the global model yet inadvertently strengthen rivals. This dilemma is amplified by non-IID data, which leads to asymmetric learning gains and undermines sustained participation. While existing competition-aware CFL and incentive-design approaches reward organizations based on marginal training contributions, they fail to account for the costs of strengthening competitors. In this paper, we introduce CoCoGen+, a coopetition-compatible data generation and incentivization framework that jointly models non-IID data and inter-organizational competition while endogenizing GenAI-based synthetic data generation as a strategic decision. Specifically, CoCoGen+ formulates each training round as a weighted potential game, where organizations strategically decide how much synthetic data to generate by balancing learning performance gains against computational costs and competition-caused utility losses. We then provide a tractable equilibrium characterization and derive implementable generation strategies to maximize social welfare. To promote long-term collaboration, we integrate a payoff redistribution-based incentive mechanism to compensate organizations for their contributions and competition-caused utility degradation. Experiments on varying learning tasks validate the feasibility of CoCoGen+. The results show how non-IID data, competition intensity, and incentives shape organizational strategies and social welfare, while CoCoGen+ outperforms baselines in efficiency.

AI.tldr: CoCoGen+：一个面向跨机构联邦学习的合作竞争兼容框架，通过生成式AI合成数据和激励机制解决非独立同分布数据与机构间竞争冲突问题
AI.motivation: 在医疗等数据敏感领域，跨机构联邦学习（CFL）允许组织在不共享原始数据的情况下协作训练AI模型。然而，实际部署中存在合作竞争困境：组织在模型训练中合作，但在下游市场竞争。非独立同分布数据导致学习收益不对称，现有激励机制未考虑强化竞争对手的成本，这削弱了持续参与意愿。
AI.method: CoCoGen+框架将每轮训练建模为加权势博弈，组织战略性地决定生成多少合成数据，平衡学习性能提升、计算成本和竞争导致的效用损失。提供可处理的均衡表征和可实施的生成策略以最大化社会福利。集成基于收益再分配的激励机制，补偿组织的贡献和竞争导致的效用退化。
AI.result: 在不同学习任务上的实验验证了CoCoGen+的可行性。结果表明非独立同分布数据、竞争强度和激励机制如何影响组织策略和社会福利，同时CoCoGen+在效率上优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CoCoGen+成功解决了跨机构联邦学习中的合作竞争困境，通过内生化的生成式AI合成数据生成和激励机制，在非独立同分布数据和机构间竞争环境下实现了可持续的协作训练。

title: Seedance 2.0: Advancing Video Generation for World Complexity
summary: Seedance 2.0 is a new native multi-modal audio-video generation model, officially released in China in early February 2026. Compared with its predecessors, Seedance 1.0 and 1.5 Pro, Seedance 2.0 adopts a unified, highly efficient, and large-scale architecture for multi-modal audio-video joint generation. This allows it to support four input modalities: text, image, audio, and video, by integrating one of the most comprehensive suites of multi-modal content reference and editing capabilities available in the industry to date. It delivers substantial, well-rounded improvements across all key sub-dimensions of video and audio generation. In both expert evaluations and public user tests, the model has demonstrated performance on par with the leading levels in the field. Seedance 2.0 supports direct generation of audio-video content with durations ranging from 4 to 15 seconds, with native output resolutions of 480p and 720p. For multi-modal inputs as reference, its current open platform supports up to 3 video clips, 9 images, and 3 audio clips. In addition, we provide Seedance 2.0 Fast version, an accelerated variant of Seedance 2.0 designed to boost generation speed for low-latency scenarios. Seedance 2.0 has delivered significant improvements to its foundational generation capabilities and multi-modal generation performance, bringing an enhanced creative experience for end users.

AI.tldr: Seedance 2.0是中国2026年2月发布的新一代原生多模态音视频生成模型，采用统一高效的大规模架构，支持文本、图像、音频、视频四种输入模态，具备行业最全面的多模态内容参考和编辑能力，在音视频生成各方面均有显著提升。
AI.motivation: 开发更先进的多模态音视频生成模型，超越前代Seedance 1.0和1.5 Pro，通过统一高效架构实现更全面的多模态输入支持和生成能力，提升用户体验和创作效率。
AI.method: 采用统一、高效、大规模的多模态音视频联合生成架构，支持文本、图像、音频、视频四种输入模态，提供行业最全面的多模态内容参考和编辑能力套件，并推出加速版本Seedance 2.0 Fast以满足低延迟场景需求。
AI.result: 在专家评估和公开用户测试中达到领域领先水平，支持生成4-15秒音视频内容，原生输出分辨率480p和720p，多模态输入支持最多3个视频片段、9张图像、3个音频片段，基础生成能力和多模态生成性能均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: Seedance 2.0在多模态音视频生成领域实现了重要突破，通过统一架构和全面能力为终端用户带来增强的创作体验，代表了该领域的技术进步。

title: Fast-SegSim: Real-Time Open-Vocabulary Segmentation for Robotics in Simulation
summary: Open-vocabulary panoptic reconstruction is crucial for advanced robotics and simulation. However, existing 3D reconstruction methods, such as NeRF or Gaussian Splatting variants, often struggle to achieve the real-time inference frequency required by robotic control loops. Existing methods incur prohibitive latency when processing the high-dimensional features required for robust open-vocabulary segmentation. We propose Fast-SegSim, a novel, simple, and end-to-end framework built upon 2D Gaussian Splatting, designed to realize real-time, high-fidelity, and 3D-consistent open-vocabulary segmentation reconstruction. Our core contribution is a highly optimized rendering pipeline that specifically addresses the computational bottleneck of high-channel segmentation feature accumulation. We introduce two key optimizations: Precise Tile Intersection to reduce rasterization redundancy, and a novel Top-K Hard Selection strategy. This strategy leverages the geometric sparsity inherent in the 2D Gaussian representation to greatly simplify feature accumulation and alleviate bandwidth limitations, achieving render rates exceeding 40 FPS. Fast-SegSim provides critical value in robotic applications: it serves both as a high-frequency sensor input for simulation platforms like Gazebo, and its 3D-consistent outputs provide essential multi-view 'ground truth' labels for fine-tuning downstream perception tasks. We demonstrate this utility by using the generated labels to fine-tune the perception module in object goal navigation, successfully doubling the navigation success rate. Our superior rendering speed and practical utility underscore Fast-SegSim's potential to bridge the sim-to-real gap.

AI.tldr: Fast-SegSim：基于2D高斯泼溅的实时开放词汇全景重建框架，通过优化渲染流水线实现超过40FPS的渲染速度，用于机器人仿真和感知任务微调。
AI.motivation: 现有3D重建方法（如NeRF或高斯泼溅变体）在处理开放词汇分割所需的高维特征时存在过高延迟，无法满足机器人控制回路所需的实时推理频率。需要一种能够实现实时、高保真、3D一致的开放词汇分割重建方法。
AI.method: 基于2D高斯泼溅构建端到端框架，核心贡献是高度优化的渲染流水线，专门解决高通道分割特征累积的计算瓶颈。引入两个关键优化：1）精确瓦片相交以减少光栅化冗余；2）新颖的Top-K硬选择策略，利用2D高斯表示的几何稀疏性简化特征累积并缓解带宽限制。
AI.result: 实现超过40FPS的渲染速率，显著提升渲染速度。在机器人应用中具有关键价值：既可作为Gazebo等仿真平台的高频传感器输入，其3D一致输出为下游感知任务微调提供多视角"真实"标签。通过生成标签微调目标导航的感知模块，成功将导航成功率提高一倍。
AI.conclusion: Fast-SegSim通过优化的渲染流水线实现了实时开放词汇全景重建，其卓越的渲染速度和实际应用价值展示了弥合仿真与现实差距的潜力，为机器人应用提供了高效的3D感知解决方案。

title: The Missing Knowledge Layer in AI: A Framework for Stable Human-AI Reasoning
summary:
Large language models are increasingly integrated into decision-making in areas such as healthcare, law, finance, engineering, and government. Yet they share a critical limitation: they produce fluent outputs even when their internal reasoning has drifted. A confident answer can conceal uncertainty, speculation, or inconsistency, and small changes in phrasing can lead to different conclusions. This makes LLMs useful assistants but unreliable partners in high-stakes contexts.
  Humans exhibit a similar weakness, often mistaking fluency for reliability. When a model responds smoothly, users tend to trust it, even when both model and user are drifting together. This paper is the first in a five-paper research series on stabilising human-AI reasoning. The series proposes a two-layer approach: Parts II-IV introduce human-side mechanisms such as uncertainty cues, conflict surfacing, and auditable reasoning traces, while Part V develops a model-side Epistemic Control Loop (ECL) that detects instability and modulates generation accordingly.
  Together, these layers form a missing operational substrate for governance by increasing signal-to-noise at the point of use. Stabilising interaction makes uncertainty and drift visible before enforcement is applied, enabling more precise capability governance. This aligns with emerging compliance expectations, including the EU AI Act and ISO/IEC 42001, by making reasoning processes traceable under real conditions of use.
  The central claim is that fluency is not reliability. Without structures that stabilise both human and model reasoning, AI cannot be trusted or governed where it matters most.

AI.tldr: 该论文是五篇研究系列的第一篇，提出通过稳定人机推理来解决LLM在关键决策中可靠性不足的问题，强调流畅性不等于可靠性。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在医疗、法律、金融等高风险领域决策中日益重要，但它们存在关键局限：即使内部推理已偏离，仍能产生流畅输出。流畅的回答可能掩盖不确定性、推测或不一致性，且微小的措辞变化可能导致不同结论。这使得LLM成为有用的助手，但在高风险情境中不可靠。人类也表现出类似弱点，常将流畅性误认为可靠性。
AI.method: 提出两层方法：第二部分至第四部分引入人类侧机制，如不确定性提示、冲突呈现和可审计推理痕迹；第五部分开发模型侧认知控制循环，检测不稳定性并相应调节生成。这些层共同形成治理所需的操作基础，通过在使用点增加信噪比来稳定交互。
AI.result: 该系列研究提出了一种系统框架，使不确定性和漂移在执行前可见，从而实现更精确的能力治理。这与欧盟AI法案和ISO/IEC 42001等新兴合规期望保持一致，通过在真实使用条件下使推理过程可追溯。
AI.conclusion: 核心主张是流畅性不等于可靠性。如果没有稳定人类和模型推理的结构，AI在最关键的领域既不可信也不可治理。稳定交互使不确定性和漂移在执行前可见，为治理提供了缺失的操作基础。

title: HY-World 2.0: A Multi-Modal World Model for Reconstructing, Generating, and Simulating 3D Worlds
summary: We introduce HY-World 2.0, a multi-modal world model framework that advances our prior project HY-World 1.0. HY-World 2.0 accommodates diverse input modalities, including text prompts, single-view images, multi-view images, and videos, and produces 3D world representations. With text or single-view image inputs, the model performs world generation, synthesizing high-fidelity, navigable 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) scenes. This is achieved through a four-stage method: a) Panorama Generation with HY-Pano 2.0, b) Trajectory Planning with WorldNav, c) World Expansion with WorldStereo 2.0, and d) World Composition with WorldMirror 2.0. Specifically, we introduce key innovations to enhance panorama fidelity, enable 3D scene understanding and planning, and upgrade WorldStereo, our keyframe-based view generation model with consistent memory. We also upgrade WorldMirror, a feed-forward model for universal 3D prediction, by refining model architecture and learning strategy, enabling world reconstruction from multi-view images or videos. Also, we introduce WorldLens, a high-performance 3DGS rendering platform featuring a flexible engine-agnostic architecture, automatic IBL lighting, efficient collision detection, and training-rendering co-design, enabling interactive exploration of 3D worlds with character support. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HY-World 2.0 achieves state-of-the-art performance on several benchmarks among open-source approaches, delivering results comparable to the closed-source model Marble. We release all model weights, code, and technical details to facilitate reproducibility and support further research on 3D world models.

AI.tldr: HY-World 2.0是一个多模态世界模型框架，能够处理文本、单视图图像、多视图图像和视频输入，生成可导航的3D高斯溅射场景，通过四阶段方法实现世界生成和重建。
AI.motivation: 在HY-World 1.0基础上，开发一个更先进的多模态世界模型框架，能够从多种输入模态生成高质量的3D世界表示，实现从文本或单视图图像的世界生成，以及从多视图图像或视频的世界重建。
AI.method: 采用四阶段方法：1) HY-Pano 2.0全景图生成；2) WorldNav轨迹规划；3) WorldStereo 2.0世界扩展；4) WorldMirror 2.0世界组合。引入关键创新提升全景图保真度、3D场景理解和规划能力，升级关键帧视图生成模型和通用3D预测模型。还开发了WorldLens高性能3DGS渲染平台。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中达到开源方法的最先进性能，结果与闭源模型Marble相当。能够生成高保真、可导航的3D高斯溅射场景，支持交互式3D世界探索。
AI.conclusion: HY-World 2.0成功构建了一个强大的多模态世界模型框架，实现了从多种输入生成高质量3D世界表示的能力，通过开源模型权重、代码和技术细节促进可重复性和进一步研究。

title: Teaching Robots to Interpret Social Interactions through Lexically-guided Dynamic Graph Learning
summary: For a robot to be called socially intelligent, it must be able to infer users internal states from their current behaviour, predict the users future behaviour, and if required, respond appropriately. In this work, we investigate how robots can be endowed with such social intelligence by modelling the dynamic relationship between user's internal states (latent) and actions (observable state). Our premise is that these states arise from the same underlying socio-cognitive process and influence each other dynamically. Drawing inspiration from theories in Cognitive Science, we propose a novel multi-task learning framework, termed as \textbf{SocialLDG} that explicitly models the dynamic relationship among the states represent as six distinct tasks. Our framework uses a language model to introduce lexical priors for each task and employs dynamic graph learning to model task affinity evolving with time. SocialLDG has three advantages: First, it achieves state-of-the-art performance on two challenging human-robot social interaction datasets available publicly. Second, it supports strong task scalability by learning new tasks seamlessly without catastrophic forgetting. Finally, benefiting from explicit modelling task affinity, it offers insights on how different interactions unfolds in time and how the internal states and observable actions influence each other in human decision making.

AI.tldr: 提出SocialLDG框架，通过多任务学习建模人类内部状态与可观察行为间的动态关系，实现社交智能机器人
AI.motivation: 为使机器人具备社交智能，需要能够从用户当前行为推断其内部状态、预测未来行为并适当响应。现有方法未能充分建模内部状态（潜在）与行为（可观察）之间的动态关系
AI.method: 提出SocialLDG多任务学习框架，将六个不同任务表示为状态，使用语言模型为每个任务引入词汇先验，采用动态图学习建模随时间演化的任务亲和性
AI.result: 在两个公开的人类-机器人社交交互数据集上达到最先进性能；支持强大的任务可扩展性，能够无缝学习新任务而不会发生灾难性遗忘；通过显式建模任务亲和性，提供了关于不同交互如何随时间展开以及内部状态和可观察行为如何相互影响的见解
AI.conclusion: SocialLDG框架通过建模内部状态与可观察行为之间的动态关系，成功赋予机器人社交智能，在性能、可扩展性和可解释性方面均表现出色

title: Expressivity of Transformers: A Tropical Geometry Perspective
