summary: To quantify the geometric expressivity of transformers, we introduce a tropical geometry framework to characterize their exact spatial partitioning capabilities. By modeling self-attention as a vector-valued tropical rational map, we prove it evaluates exactly to a Power Voronoi Diagram in the zero-temperature limit. Building on this equivalence, we establish a combinatorial rationale for Multi-Head Self-Attention (MHSA): via the Minkowski sum of Newton polytopes, multi-head aggregation expands the polyhedral complexity to $\mathcal{O}(N^H)$, overcoming the $\mathcal{O}(N)$ bottleneck of single heads. Extending this to deep architectures, we derive the first tight asymptotic bounds on the number of linear regions in transformers ($Θ(N^{d_{\text{model}}L})$), demonstrating a combinatorial explosion driven intrinsically by sequence length $N$, ambient embedding dimension $d_{\text{model}}$, and network depth $L$. Importantly, we guarantee that this idealized polyhedral skeleton is geometrically stable: finite-temperature soft attention preserves these topological partitions via exponentially tight differential approximation bounds.

AI.tldr: 论文通过热带几何框架量化Transformer的几何表达能力，证明自注意力在零温极限下精确计算为Power Voronoi图，多头自注意力通过Minkowski和实现组合复杂度爆炸，并推导出Transformer线性区域数量的紧渐近界。
AI.motivation: 量化Transformer的几何表达能力，理解其空间划分能力，特别是自注意力的精确几何表达和多头注意力的组合复杂性，为深度架构的理论分析提供几何视角。
AI.method: 引入热带几何框架，将自注意力建模为向量值热带有理映射，证明其在零温极限下等价于Power Voronoi图；通过Minkowski和牛顿多面体分析多头注意力的组合复杂性；推导深度Transformer架构中线性区域数量的渐近界。
AI.result: 1. 自注意力在零温极限下精确计算为Power Voronoi图；2. 多头自注意力通过Minkowski和实现复杂度从O(N)提升到O(N^H)；3. 深度Transformer线性区域数量为Θ(N^{d_model L})，呈现组合爆炸；4. 有限温度软注意力通过指数紧微分近似保持拓扑划分的几何稳定性。
AI.conclusion: Transformer具有强大的几何表达能力，其空间划分能力可通过热带几何精确刻画；多头机制和深度架构导致组合复杂性爆炸；这些理想化多面体骨架在有限温度下保持几何稳定性，为理解Transformer的表达能力提供了严格的数学框架。

title: SpatialEvo: Self-Evolving Spatial Intelligence via Deterministic Geometric Environments
summary: Spatial reasoning over three-dimensional scenes is a core capability for embodied intelligence, yet continuous model improvement remains bottlenecked by the cost of geometric annotation. The self-evolving paradigm offers a promising path, but its reliance on model consensus to construct pseudo-labels causes training to reinforce rather than correct the model's own geometric errors. We identify a property unique to 3D spatial reasoning that circumvents this limitation: ground truth is a deterministic consequence of the underlying geometry, computable exactly from point clouds and camera poses without any model involvement. Building on this insight, we present SpatialEvo, a self-evolving framework for 3D spatial reasoning, centered on the Deterministic Geometric Environment (DGE). The DGE formalizes 16 spatial reasoning task categories under explicit geometric validation rules and converts unannotated 3D scenes into zero-noise interactive oracles, replacing model consensus with objective physical feedback. A single shared-parameter policy co-evolves across questioner and solver roles under DGE constraints: the questioner generates physically valid spatial questions grounded in scene observations, while the solver derives precise answers against DGE-verified ground truth. A task-adaptive scheduler endogenously concentrates training on the model's weakest categories, producing a dynamic curriculum without manual design. Experiments across nine benchmarks demonstrate that SpatialEvo achieves the highest average score at both 3B and 7B scales, with consistent gains on spatial reasoning benchmarks and no degradation on general visual understanding.

AI.tldr: SpatialEvo：基于确定性几何环境（DGE）的自进化3D空间推理框架，通过几何验证规则生成零噪声伪标签，避免模型共识导致的误差累积，在多个基准测试中取得最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 3D空间推理是具身智能的核心能力，但连续模型改进受限于几何标注成本。现有自进化范式依赖模型共识构建伪标签，导致训练过程强化而非纠正模型的几何错误。研究发现3D空间推理具有独特属性：真实标签是底层几何的确定性结果，可直接从点云和相机位姿计算得到，无需模型参与。
AI.method: 提出SpatialEvo框架，核心是确定性几何环境（DGE）。DGE将16个空间推理任务类别形式化为显式几何验证规则，将未标注的3D场景转换为零噪声交互式oracle，用客观物理反馈替代模型共识。单一共享参数策略在提问者和求解者角色下协同进化：提问者基于场景观察生成物理有效的空间问题，求解者根据DGE验证的真实标签推导精确答案。任务自适应调度器内生地集中训练模型最弱的类别，无需人工设计动态课程。
AI.result: 在9个基准测试上的实验表明，SpatialEvo在3B和7B规模上均取得最高平均分数，在空间推理基准上获得一致提升，且在通用视觉理解任务上无性能下降。
AI.conclusion: SpatialEvo通过利用3D空间推理的确定性几何特性，构建了无需标注的自进化框架，有效解决了传统自进化方法中误差累积的问题，为3D空间推理模型的持续改进提供了新范式。

title: GenRec: A Preference-Oriented Generative Framework for Large-Scale Recommendation
summary: Generative Retrieval (GR) offers a promising paradigm for recommendation through next-token prediction (NTP). However, scaling it to large-scale industrial systems introduces three challenges: (i) within a single request, the identical model inputs may produce inconsistent outputs due to the pagination request mechanism; (ii) the prohibitive cost of encoding long user behavior sequences with multi-token item representations based on semantic IDs, and (iii) aligning the generative policy with nuanced user preference signals. We present GenRec, a preference-oriented generative framework deployed on the JD App that addresses above challenges within a single decoder-only architecture. For training objective, we propose Page-wise NTP task, which supervises over an entire interaction page rather than each interacted item individually, providing denser gradient signal and resolving the one-to-many ambiguity of point-wise training. On the prefilling side, an asymmetric linear Token Merger compresses multi-token Semantic IDs in the prompt while preserving full-resolution decoding, reducing input length by ~2X with negligible accuracy loss. To further align outputs with user satisfaction, we introduce GRPO-SR, a reinforcement learning method that pairs Group Relative Policy Optimization with NLL regularization for training stability, and employs Hybrid Rewards combining a dense reward model with a relevance gate to mitigate reward hacking. In month-long online A/B tests serving production traffic, GenRec achieves 9.5% improvement in click count and 8.7% in transaction count over the existing pipeline.

AI.tldr: GenRec是一个面向偏好的生成式推荐框架，通过页面级NTP训练、非对称线性Token合并器和GRPO-SR强化学习解决生成式检索在工业部署中的三大挑战，在JD App上实现了显著的在线指标提升。
AI.motivation: 生成式检索通过下一个token预测为推荐系统提供了有前景的范式，但在大规模工业系统部署中面临三个主要挑战：1) 分页请求机制下相同模型输入可能产生不一致输出；2) 基于语义ID的多token项目表示编码长用户行为序列的成本过高；3) 生成策略与细粒度用户偏好信号的对齐问题。
AI.method: 提出GenRec框架，包含三个核心技术：1) 页面级NTP任务，监督整个交互页面而非单个项目，提供更密集的梯度信号并解决点式训练的一对多歧义；2) 非对称线性Token合并器，压缩提示中的多token语义ID同时保持全分辨率解码，将输入长度减少约2倍；3) GRPO-SR强化学习方法，结合组相对策略优化和NLL正则化确保训练稳定性，并使用混合奖励（密集奖励模型+相关性门控）缓解奖励黑客问题。
AI.result: 在为期一个月的在线A/B测试中，GenRec在生产流量上相比现有流水线实现了点击量提升9.5%和交易量提升8.7%的显著改进。
AI.conclusion: GenRec成功解决了生成式检索在工业规模部署中的关键挑战，通过统一的仅解码器架构实现了偏好导向的生成式推荐，在实际生产环境中验证了其有效性，为大规模推荐系统的生成式方法提供了可行的解决方案。

title: HECTOR: Human-centric Hierarchical Coordination and Supervision of Robotic Fleets under Continual Temporal Tasks
summary: Robotic fleets can be extremely efficient when working concurrently and collaboratively, e.g., for delivery, surveillance, search and rescue. However, it can be demanding or even impractical for an operator to directly control each robot. Thus, autonomy of the fleet and its online interaction with the operator are both essential, particularly in dynamic and partially unknown environments. The operator might need to add new tasks, cancel some tasks, change priorities and modify planning results. How to design the procedure for these interactions and efficient algorithms to fulfill these needs have been mostly neglected in the related literature. Thus, this work proposes a human-centric coordination and supervision scheme (HECTOR) for large-scale robotic fleets under continual and uncertain temporal tasks. It consists of three hierarchical layers: (I) the bidirectional and multimodal protocol of online human-fleet interaction, where the operator interacts with and supervises the whole fleet; (II) the rolling assignment of currently-known tasks to teams within a certain horizon, and (III) the dynamic coordination within a team given the detected subtasks during online execution. The overall mission can be as general as temporal logic formulas over collaborative actions. Such hierarchical structure allows human interaction and supervision at different granularities and triggering conditions, to both improve computational efficiency and reduce human effort. Extensive human-in-the-loop simulations are performed over heterogeneous fleets under various temporal tasks and environmental uncertainties.

AI.tldr: HECTOR：面向大规模机器人编队的人本协调与监督框架，支持在线人机交互、滚动任务分配和动态团队协调，以应对持续不确定的时序任务。
AI.motivation: 大规模机器人编队需要同时协作执行任务（如配送、监视、搜救），但直接控制每个机器人对操作员来说过于繁重。现有研究缺乏有效的人机交互设计，无法满足操作员在线添加、取消、修改任务和优先级的需求。
AI.method: 提出三层分层架构HECTOR：(I)双向多模态人机交互协议，支持操作员与整个编队的在线交互和监督；(II)滚动任务分配，在特定时间范围内将已知任务分配给团队；(III)动态团队协调，根据在线执行中检测到的子任务进行实时协调。支持时序逻辑公式描述的通用任务。
AI.result: 通过人机回路仿真验证，在异构编队、各种时序任务和环境不确定性条件下，该框架能够提高计算效率并减少人工工作量，支持不同粒度的人机交互和监督。
AI.conclusion: HECTOR为大规模机器人编队提供了一种有效的人本协调与监督方案，通过分层架构实现了高效的人机交互、任务分配和动态协调，适用于动态和部分未知环境中的持续不确定任务。

title: Geometric Context Transformer for Streaming 3D Reconstruction
summary: Streaming 3D reconstruction aims to recover 3D information, such as camera poses and point clouds, from a video stream, which necessitates geometric accuracy, temporal consistency, and computational efficiency. Motivated by the principles of Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM), we introduce LingBot-Map, a feed-forward 3D foundation model for reconstructing scenes from streaming data, built upon a geometric context transformer (GCT) architecture. A defining aspect of LingBot-Map lies in its carefully designed attention mechanism, which integrates an anchor context, a pose-reference window, and a trajectory memory to address coordinate grounding, dense geometric cues, and long-range drift correction, respectively. This design keeps the streaming state compact while retaining rich geometric context, enabling stable efficient inference at around 20 FPS on 518 x 378 resolution inputs over long sequences exceeding 10,000 frames. Extensive evaluations across a variety of benchmarks demonstrate that our approach achieves superior performance compared to both existing streaming and iterative optimization-based approaches.

AI.tldr: LingBot-Map是一个基于几何上下文Transformer架构的前馈3D基础模型，用于从流式数据重建场景，通过精心设计的注意力机制实现坐标锚定、密集几何线索和长距离漂移校正，在518×378分辨率输入上以约20FPS的速度稳定运行超过10,000帧。
AI.motivation: 流式3D重建需要从视频流中恢复相机姿态和点云等3D信息，这要求几何精度、时间一致性和计算效率。受SLAM原理启发，作者旨在开发一个能够处理流式数据的3D基础模型，解决坐标锚定、密集几何线索和长距离漂移校正等关键问题。
AI.method: 基于几何上下文Transformer架构构建LingBot-Map模型，其核心是精心设计的注意力机制，集成了三个关键组件：锚点上下文用于坐标锚定，姿态参考窗口用于密集几何线索，轨迹记忆用于长距离漂移校正。这种设计保持流式状态紧凑同时保留丰富的几何上下文。
AI.result: 模型在518×378分辨率输入上以约20FPS的速度稳定运行，能够处理超过10,000帧的长序列。在多个基准测试上的广泛评估表明，该方法在性能上优于现有的流式方法和基于迭代优化的方法。
AI.conclusion: LingBot-Map通过创新的注意力机制设计，成功解决了流式3D重建中的关键挑战，实现了高效、准确且稳定的场景重建，为流式3D重建提供了一个强大的基础模型解决方案。

title: Vibe-Coding: Feedback-Based Automated Verification with no Human Code Inspection, a Feasibility Study
summary:
Vibe coding inherently assumes iterative refinement of LLM-generated code through feedback loops. While effective for conventional software tasks, its reliability in runtime-adaptive systems is unclear -- especially when generated code is not manually inspected. This paper studies feedback-based automated verification of LLM-generated adaptation managers in Collective Adaptive Systems (CAS). We focus on the key challenges of verification in the loop: how to detect failures of generated code at runtime and how to report them precisely enough for an LLM to fix them.
  We combine the adaptation loop with a vibe-coding feedback loop where correctness is checked against (i) generic architectural constraints and (ii) functional constraints formalized in Functional Constraints Logic (FCL), a novel first-order temporal logic over potentially finite traces. Conducting the Dragon Hunt CAS case study, we show that fine-grained constraint violations provide actionable feedback that typically yields a valid adaptation manager within a few iterations, while simple coarse metric-based feedback often stalls. Our findings suggest that feedback precision is the dominant factor for reliable vibe coding in systems designed by domain experts with no programming skills, thereby obviating the need for human code inspection.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在集体自适应系统中，通过结合架构约束和功能约束的形式化验证，为LLM生成的适应管理器提供精确反馈，实现无需人工代码检查的可靠vibe coding。
AI.motivation: 传统vibe coding在运行时自适应系统中的可靠性不明确，特别是当生成的代码未经人工检查时。需要研究如何检测生成代码的运行时故障，并提供足够精确的反馈供LLM修复。
AI.method: 将适应循环与vibe coding反馈循环结合，通过两种约束检查正确性：(1)通用架构约束；(2)使用新型一阶时序逻辑FCL形式化的功能约束。在Dragon Hunt CAS案例研究中验证方法。
AI.result: 细粒度约束违规提供了可操作的反馈，通常在几次迭代内就能产生有效的适应管理器，而简单的粗粒度基于指标的反馈常常停滞。反馈精度是可靠vibe coding的主导因素。
AI.conclusion: 对于由无编程技能的领域专家设计的系统，精确的反馈机制使得无需人工代码检查的可靠vibe coding成为可能，反馈精度是关键成功因素。

title: BridgeSim: Unveiling the OL-CL Gap in End-to-End Autonomous Driving
summary: Open-loop (OL) to closed-loop (CL) gap (OL-CL gap) exists when OL-pretrained policies scoring high in OL evaluations fail to transfer effectively in closed-loop (CL) deployment. In this paper, we unveil the root causes of this systemic failure and propose a practical remedy. Specifically, we demonstrate that OL policies suffer from Observational Domain Shift and Objective Mismatch. We show that while the former is largely recoverable with adaptation techniques, the latter creates a structural inability to model complex reactive behaviors, which forms the primary OL-CL gap. We find that a wide range of OL policies learn a biased Q-value estimator that neglects both the reactive nature of CL simulations and the temporal awareness needed to reduce compounding errors. To this end, we propose a Test-Time Adaptation (TTA) framework that calibrates observational shift, reduces state-action biases, and enforces temporal consistency. Extensive experiments show that TTA effectively mitigates planning biases and yields superior scaling dynamics than its baseline counterparts. Furthermore, our analysis highlights the existence of blind spots in standard OL evaluation protocols that fail to capture the realities of closed-loop deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了开环到闭环性能差距的根本原因，并提出了一种测试时自适应框架来解决这一问题。
AI.motivation: 开环预训练策略在开环评估中表现良好，但在实际闭环部署中却无法有效转移，存在系统性失败。这种开环-闭环性能差距阻碍了策略的实际应用。
AI.method: 提出测试时自适应框架，通过校准观测偏移、减少状态-动作偏差并强制时间一致性来缓解规划偏差。该框架能够适应闭环模拟的反应性本质。
AI.result: 实验表明测试时自适应框架有效缓解了规划偏差，相比基线方法展现出更优的扩展动态。分析还揭示了标准开环评估协议存在盲点，无法捕捉闭环部署的实际需求。
AI.conclusion: 开环策略的主要失败源于目标不匹配导致的复杂反应行为建模能力不足。测试时自适应框架通过校准观测偏移和强制时间一致性，为开环-闭环性能差距提供了实用解决方案。

title: RELOAD: A Robust and Efficient Learned Query Optimizer for Database Systems
comment: This work is currently under review
summary: Recent advances in query optimization have shifted from traditional rule-based and cost-based techniques towards machine learning-driven approaches. Among these, reinforcement learning (RL) has attracted significant attention due to its ability to optimize long-term performance by learning policies over query planning. However, existing RL-based query optimizers often exhibit unstable performance at the level of individual queries, including severe performance regressions, and require prolonged training to reach the plan quality of expert, cost-based optimizers. These shortcomings make learned query optimizers difficult to deploy in practice and remain a major barrier to their adoption in production database systems. To address these challenges, we present RELOAD, a robust and efficient learned query optimizer for database systems. RELOAD focuses on (i) robustness, by minimizing query-level performance regressions and ensuring consistent optimization behavior across executions, and (ii) efficiency, by accelerating convergence to expert-level plan quality. Through extensive experiments on standard benchmarks, including Join Order Benchmark, TPC-DS, and Star Schema Benchmark, RELOAD demonstrates up to 2.4x higher robustness and 3.1x greater efficiency compared to state-of-the-art RL-based query optimization techniques.

AI.tldr: RELOAD是一个基于强化学习的鲁棒高效查询优化器，通过最小化查询级性能回归和加速收敛到专家级计划质量，解决了现有RL优化器的不稳定性和训练时间长的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于强化学习的查询优化器存在两个主要问题：1）在单个查询级别上性能不稳定，可能出现严重的性能回归；2）需要长时间训练才能达到基于成本的专家优化器的计划质量。这些问题使得学习型查询优化器难以在实际生产中部署。
AI.method: RELOAD是一个鲁棒且高效的学习型查询优化器，专注于两个方面：1）鲁棒性：通过最小化查询级性能回归，确保跨执行的一致优化行为；2）效率：加速收敛到专家级计划质量。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试（包括Join Order Benchmark、TPC-DS和Star Schema Benchmark）上的广泛实验表明，RELOAD相比最先进的基于RL的查询优化技术，鲁棒性提高了2.4倍，效率提高了3.1倍。
AI.conclusion: RELOAD通过解决现有RL查询优化器的鲁棒性和效率问题，为学习型查询优化器在实际数据库系统中的部署提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Don't Let the Video Speak: Audio-Contrastive Preference Optimization for Audio-Visual Language Models
summary: While Audio-Visual Language Models (AVLMs) have achieved remarkable progress over recent years, their reliability is bottlenecked by cross-modal hallucination. A particularly pervasive manifestation is video-driven audio hallucination: models routinely exploit visual shortcuts to hallucinate expected sounds, discarding true auditory evidence. To counteract this deeply ingrained visual dominance, we propose Audio-Contrastive Preference Optimization (ACPO). This dual-axis preference learning framework introduces an output-contrastive objective to penalize visual descriptions masquerading as audio facts, alongside an input-contrastive objective that swaps audio tracks to explicitly penalize generation invariant to the true auditory signal. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ACPO establishes highly faithful audio grounding and mitigates audio hallucination without compromising overarching multimodal capabilities.

AI.tldr: ACPO是一种双轴偏好优化框架，通过输出对比和输入对比目标来减少音频-视觉语言模型中的跨模态幻觉，特别是视频驱动的音频幻觉问题。
AI.motivation: 音频-视觉语言模型存在跨模态幻觉瓶颈，特别是视频驱动的音频幻觉问题：模型经常利用视觉捷径来幻觉预期声音，而忽略真实的听觉证据。这种视觉主导现象严重影响了模型的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出了音频对比偏好优化（ACPO）框架，包含两个目标：1）输出对比目标 - 惩罚伪装成音频事实的视觉描述；2）输入对比目标 - 通过交换音频轨道来明确惩罚对真实听觉信号不变的生成。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，ACPO建立了高度忠实的音频基础，减轻了音频幻觉问题，同时不损害整体的多模态能力。
AI.conclusion: ACPO通过双轴偏好学习有效对抗了音频-视觉语言模型中根深蒂固的视觉主导问题，提高了模型的可靠性和音频基础能力。

title: HO-Flow: Generalizable Hand-Object Interaction Generation with Latent Flow Matching
summary: Generating realistic 3D hand-object interactions (HOI) is a fundamental challenge in computer vision and robotics, requiring both temporal coherence and high-fidelity physical plausibility. Existing methods remain limited in their ability to learn expressive motion representations for generation and perform temporal reasoning. In this paper, we present HO-Flow, a framework for synthesizing realistic hand-object motion sequences from texts and canoncial 3D objects. HO-Flow first employs an interaction-aware variational autoencoder to encode sequences of hand and object motions into a unified latent manifold by incorporating hand and object kinematics, enabling the representation to capture rich interaction dynamics. It then leverages a masked flow matching model that combines auto-regressive temporal reasoning with continuous latent generation, improving temporal coherence. To further enhance generalization, HO-Flow predicts object motions relative to the initial frame, enabling effective pre-training on large-scale synthetic data. Experiments on the GRAB, OakInk, and DexYCB benchmarks demonstrate that HO-Flow achieves state-of-the-art performance in both physical plausibility and motion diversity for interaction motion synthesis.

AI.tldr: HO-Flow：基于文本和规范3D对象生成逼真手-物体交互运动序列的框架，通过交互感知变分自编码器和掩码流匹配模型实现时空一致性和物理合理性
AI.motivation: 现有方法在学习表达性运动表示和进行时间推理方面存在局限，难以生成既具有时间一致性又具有高保真物理合理性的3D手-物体交互运动
AI.method: 1. 交互感知变分自编码器：将手和物体运动序列编码到统一潜在流形，结合手和物体运动学捕捉丰富的交互动态；2. 掩码流匹配模型：结合自回归时间推理和连续潜在生成，提升时间一致性；3. 相对运动预测：预测物体相对于初始帧的运动，支持大规模合成数据预训练
AI.result: 在GRAB、OakInk和DexYCB基准测试中，HO-Flow在交互运动合成的物理合理性和运动多样性方面均达到最先进性能
AI.conclusion: HO-Flow通过统一的潜在表示学习和改进的时间推理机制，有效解决了手-物体交互运动生成中的时空一致性和物理合理性问题，为计算机视觉和机器人学中的3D交互生成提供了新方法

title: WARPED: Wrist-Aligned Rendering for Robot Policy Learning from Egocentric Human Demonstrations
summary: Recent advancements in learning from human demonstration have shown promising results in addressing the scalability and high cost of data collection required to train robust visuomotor policies. However, existing approaches are often constrained by a reliance on multiview camera setups, depth sensors, or custom hardware and are typically limited to policy execution from third-person or egocentric cameras. In this paper, we present WARPED, a framework designed to synthesize realistic wrist-view observations from human demonstration videos to facilitate the training of visuomotor policies using only monocular RGB data. With data collected from an egocentric RGB camera, our system leverages vision foundation models to initialize the interactive scene. A hand-object interaction pipeline is then employed to track the hand and manipulated object and retarget the trajectories to a robotic end-effector. Lastly, photo-realistic wrist-view observations are synthesized via Gaussian Splatting to directly train a robotic policy. We demonstrate that WARPED achieves success rates comparable to policies trained on teleoperated demonstration data for five tabletop manipulation tasks, while requiring 5-8x less data collection time.

AI.tldr: WARPED框架利用单目RGB视频合成逼真的腕部视角观察，用于训练视觉运动策略，减少数据收集时间5-8倍
AI.motivation: 现有从人类演示中学习的方法通常依赖多视角相机、深度传感器或定制硬件，且仅限于第三人称或自我中心视角的策略执行，限制了可扩展性和实用性
AI.method: 使用自我中心RGB相机收集数据，利用视觉基础模型初始化交互场景，通过手-物体交互流程跟踪手和操纵物体并将轨迹重定向到机器人末端执行器，最后通过高斯泼溅合成逼真的腕部视角观察来训练机器人策略
AI.result: WARPED在五个桌面操作任务中实现了与基于遥操作演示数据训练的策略相当的成功率，同时数据收集时间减少了5-8倍
AI.conclusion: WARPED框架通过从单目RGB视频合成逼真的腕部视角观察，显著降低了机器人策略训练的数据收集成本，为从人类演示中学习提供了更高效和实用的解决方案

title: A Mechanistic Account of Attention Sinks in GPT-2: One Circuit, Broader Implications for Mitigation
summary: Transformers commonly exhibit an attention sink: disproportionately high attention to the first position. We study this behavior in GPT-2-style models with learned query biases and absolute positional embeddings. Combining structural analysis with causal interventions, validated across natural-language, mathematical, and code inputs, we find that the sink arises from the interaction among (i) a learned query bias, (ii) the first-layer MLP transformation of the positional encoding, and (iii) structure in the key projection. Crucially, each component we identify is individually dispensable: architectures omitting each of them robustly exhibit sinks. This indicates that attention sinks may arise through distinct circuits across architectures. These findings inform mitigation of sinks, and motivate broader investigation into why sinks emerge.

AI.tldr: 研究发现Transformer中的注意力汇聚现象（attention sink）是由学习到的查询偏置、第一层MLP对位置编码的变换以及键投影结构三者共同作用导致的，这些组件各自独立可被移除，表明注意力汇聚可能通过不同架构中的不同电路产生。
AI.motivation: 研究Transformer模型中常见的注意力汇聚现象（对第一个位置表现出不成比例的高注意力），旨在理解这一行为的成因机制，为缓解该现象提供理论基础，并推动对注意力汇聚为何出现的更广泛研究。
AI.method: 采用结构分析与因果干预相结合的方法，在GPT-2风格模型（具有学习到的查询偏置和绝对位置嵌入）上进行研究，验证范围涵盖自然语言、数学和代码输入。
AI.result: 发现注意力汇聚由三个组件相互作用产生：1）学习到的查询偏置；2）第一层MLP对位置编码的变换；3）键投影的结构。关键发现是每个组件都是独立可被移除的，省略其中任何一个的架构仍会表现出注意力汇聚现象。
AI.conclusion: 注意力汇聚可能通过不同架构中的不同电路产生，这一发现为缓解注意力汇聚提供了信息，并激励了对注意力汇聚为何出现的更广泛研究。

title: UI-Zoomer: Uncertainty-Driven Adaptive Zoom-In for GUI Grounding
summary: GUI grounding, which localizes interface elements from screenshots given natural language queries, remains challenging for small icons and dense layouts. Test-time zoom-in methods improve localization by cropping and re-running inference at higher resolution, but apply cropping uniformly across all instances with fixed crop sizes, ignoring whether the model is actually uncertain on each case. We propose \textbf{UI-Zoomer}, a training-free adaptive zoom-in framework that treats both the trigger and scale of zoom-in as a prediction uncertainty quantification problem. A confidence-aware gate fuses spatial consensus among stochastic candidates with token-level generation confidence to selectively trigger zoom-in only when localization is uncertain. When triggered, an uncertainty-driven crop sizing module decomposes prediction variance into inter-sample positional spread and intra-sample box extent, deriving a per-instance crop radius via the law of total variance. Extensive experiments on ScreenSpot-Pro, UI-Vision, and ScreenSpot-v2 demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines across multiple model architectures, achieving gains of up to +13.4\%, +10.3\%, and +4.2\% respectively, with no additional training required.

AI.tldr: UI-Zoomer：一种无需训练的自适应放大框架，通过预测不确定性量化来选择性地触发放大，在GUI定位任务中显著提升小图标和密集布局的定位精度。
AI.motivation: 当前测试时放大方法对所有实例采用统一的裁剪尺寸和固定放大策略，忽略了模型对每个案例的实际不确定性，导致资源浪费且无法针对性地提升困难案例的定位精度。
AI.method: 提出训练免费的自适应放大框架UI-Zoomer：1）置信感知门控机制融合随机候选的空间共识和token级生成置信度，仅在定位不确定时触发放大；2）不确定性驱动的裁剪尺寸模块将预测方差分解为样本间位置扩散和样本内边界框范围，通过全方差定律计算每个实例的裁剪半径。
AI.result: 在ScreenSpot-Pro、UI-Vision和ScreenSpot-v2三个数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法在多种模型架构上均优于强基线，分别实现了+13.4%、+10.3%和+4.2%的性能提升，且无需额外训练。
AI.conclusion: UI-Zoomer通过将放大触发和尺度作为预测不确定性量化问题，实现了更智能、自适应的GUI定位放大策略，显著提升了小图标和密集布局的定位精度，同时避免了不必要的计算开销。

title: Benchmarks for Trajectory Safety Evaluation and Diagnosis in OpenClaw and Codex: ATBench-Claw and ATBench-CodeX
summary: As agent systems move into increasingly diverse execution settings, trajectory-level safety evaluation and diagnosis require benchmarks that evolve with them. ATBench is a diverse and realistic agent trajectory benchmark for safety evaluation and diagnosis. This report presents ATBench-Claw and ATBench-CodeX, two domain-customized extensions that carry ATBench into the OpenClaw and OpenAI Codex / Codex-runtime settings. The key adaptation mechanism is to analyze each new setting, customize the three-dimensional Safety Taxonomy over risk source, failure mode, and real-world harm, and then use that customized taxonomy to define the benchmark specification consumed by the shared ATBench construction pipeline. This extensibility matters because agent frameworks remain relatively stable at the architectural level even as their concrete execution settings, tool ecosystems, and product capabilities evolve quickly. Concretely, ATBench-Claw targets OpenClaw-sensitive execution chains over tools, skills, sessions, and external actions, while ATBench-CodeX targets trajectories in the OpenAI Codex / Codex-runtime setting over repositories, shells, patches, dependencies, approvals, and runtime policy boundaries. Our emphasis therefore falls on taxonomy customization, domain-specific risk coverage, and benchmark design under a shared ATBench generation framework.

AI.tldr: ATBench扩展为ATBench-Claw和ATBench-CodeX，针对OpenClaw和OpenAI Codex环境的安全评估基准，通过定制化三维安全分类法实现跨领域扩展。
AI.motivation: 随着智能体系统在多样化执行环境中的部署，需要能够适应不同领域的安全评估基准。现有基准需要扩展以覆盖新的执行设置、工具生态系统和产品能力。
AI.method: 通过分析新环境，定制三维安全分类法（风险来源、故障模式、现实危害），然后使用该定制分类法定义基准规范，通过共享的ATBench构建流水线生成基准。
AI.result: 开发了ATBench-Claw（针对OpenClaw环境，覆盖工具、技能、会话和外部操作）和ATBench-CodeX（针对OpenAI Codex环境，覆盖仓库、shell、补丁、依赖、审批和运行时策略边界）两个领域定制扩展。
AI.conclusion: ATBench框架通过可扩展的分类法定制机制，能够适应不同智能体执行环境，为轨迹级安全评估和诊断提供多样化、现实的基准，支持智能体系统在架构稳定而具体执行环境快速演变的情况下的安全评估需求。

title: LIDEA: Human-to-Robot Imitation Learning via Implicit Feature Distillation and Explicit Geometry Alignment
summary: Scaling up robot learning is hindered by the scarcity of robotic demonstrations, whereas human videos offer a vast, untapped source of interaction data. However, bridging the embodiment gap between human hands and robot arms remains a critical challenge. Existing cross-embodiment transfer strategies typically rely on visual editing, but they often introduce visual artifacts due to intrinsic discrepancies in visual appearance and 3D geometry. To address these limitations, we introduce LIDEA (Implicit Feature Distillation and Explicit Geometric Alignment), an imitation learning framework in which policy learning benefits from human demonstrations. In the 2D visual domain, LIDEA employs a dual-stage transitive distillation pipeline that aligns human and robot representations in a shared latent space. In the 3D geometric domain, we propose an embodiment-agnostic alignment strategy that explicitly decouples embodiment from interaction geometry, ensuring consistent 3D-aware perception. Extensive experiments empirically validate LIDEA from two perspectives: data efficiency and OOD robustness. Results show that human data substitutes up to 80% of costly robot demonstrations, and the framework successfully transfers unseen patterns from human videos for out-of-distribution generalization.

AI.tldr: LIDEA框架通过隐式特征蒸馏和显式几何对齐，利用人类视频数据提升机器人模仿学习的数据效率和OOD泛化能力
AI.motivation: 机器人学习面临演示数据稀缺问题，而人类视频提供了丰富的交互数据资源。现有跨具身迁移方法依赖视觉编辑，但会因视觉外观和3D几何差异产生视觉伪影，需要解决人类手与机器人臂之间的具身差距
AI.method: 提出LIDEA框架：1) 2D视觉域采用双阶段传递蒸馏管道，在共享潜在空间中对齐人类和机器人表示；2) 3D几何域提出具身无关对齐策略，显式解耦具身与交互几何，确保一致的3D感知
AI.result: 人类数据可替代高达80%的昂贵机器人演示，框架成功从人类视频中迁移未见模式，实现分布外泛化，在数据效率和OOD鲁棒性方面得到实验验证
AI.conclusion: LIDEA通过隐式特征蒸馏和显式几何对齐有效桥接人类与机器人之间的具身差距，显著提升模仿学习的数据效率和泛化能力，为利用丰富人类视频数据提供了可行方案

title: A deep learning framework for glomeruli segmentation with boundary attention
summary: Accurate detection and segmentation of glomeruli in kidney tissue are essential for diagnostic applications. Traditional deep learning methods primarily rely on semantic segmentation, which often fails to precisely delineate adjacent glomeruli. To address this challenge, we propose a novel glomerulus detection and segmentation model that emphasises boundary separation. Leveraging pathology foundation models, the proposed U-Net-based architecture incorporates a specialised attention decoder designed to highlight critical regions and improve instancelevel segmentation. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that our approach surpasses state-of-the-art methods in both Dice score and Intersection over Union, indicating superior performance in glomerular delineation.

AI.tldr: 提出基于病理基础模型的U-Net架构，通过专门设计的注意力解码器增强边界分离能力，实现肾小球检测与分割的改进
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习方法主要依赖语义分割，难以精确区分相邻肾小球，需要解决边界分离问题以提高诊断准确性
AI.method: 基于U-Net架构，利用病理基础模型，设计专门的注意力解码器来突出关键区域并改进实例级分割
AI.result: 实验评估显示该方法在Dice分数和IoU指标上均优于现有最先进方法，在肾小球轮廓描绘方面表现更优
AI.conclusion: 提出的强调边界分离的肾小球检测与分割模型能够更精确地描绘肾小球，为诊断应用提供了更有效的解决方案

title: OmniUMI: Towards Physically Grounded Robot Learning via Human-Aligned Multimodal Interaction
summary: UMI-style interfaces enable scalable robot learning, but existing systems remain largely visuomotor, relying primarily on RGB observations and trajectory while providing only limited access to physical interaction signals. This becomes a fundamental limitation in contact-rich manipulation, where success depends on contact dynamics such as tactile interaction, internal grasping force, and external interaction wrench that are difficult to infer from vision alone. We present OmniUMI, a unified framework for physically grounded robot learning via human-aligned multimodal interaction. OmniUMI synchronously captures RGB, depth, trajectory, tactile sensing, internal grasping force, and external interaction wrench within a compact handheld system, while maintaining collection--deployment consistency through a shared embodiment design. To support human-aligned demonstration, OmniUMI provides dual-force feedback through bilateral gripper feedback and natural perception of external interaction wrench in the handheld embodiment. Built on this interface, we extend diffusion policy with visual, tactile, and force-related observations, and deploy the learned policy through impedance-based execution for unified regulation of motion and contact behavior. Experiments demonstrate reliable sensing and strong downstream performance on force-sensitive pick-and-place, interactive surface erasing, and tactile-informed selective release. Overall, OmniUMI combines physically grounded multimodal data acquisition with human-aligned interaction, providing a scalable foundation for learning contact-rich manipulation.

AI.tldr: OmniUMI：通过人类对齐的多模态交互实现物理基础机器人学习的统一框架，集成了视觉、触觉、力觉等多种传感器，用于接触丰富的操作任务学习。
AI.motivation: 现有UMI风格接口主要依赖视觉和轨迹，缺乏物理交互信号（如触觉、抓握力、外部交互力矩），这在接触丰富的操作任务中成为根本限制，因为这些接触动力学难以仅从视觉推断。
AI.method: 开发OmniUMI框架，同步采集RGB、深度、轨迹、触觉传感、内部抓握力和外部交互力矩，采用紧凑手持系统设计保持采集-部署一致性。提供双力反馈（双边夹持器反馈和手持设备中的外部交互力矩自然感知）。基于此接口扩展扩散策略，整合视觉、触觉和力相关观测，通过基于阻抗的执行部署学习策略以统一调节运动和接触行为。
AI.result: 实验展示了可靠的传感能力和强大的下游性能，包括力敏感拾放、交互式表面擦除和触觉信息选择性释放任务。
AI.conclusion: OmniUMI将物理基础的多模态数据采集与人类对齐交互相结合，为学习接触丰富的操作提供了可扩展的基础。

title: Gating Enables Curvature: A Geometric Expressivity Gap in Attention
summary: Multiplicative gating is widely used in neural architectures and has recently been applied to attention layers to improve performance and training stability in large language models. Despite the success of gated attention, the mathematical implications of gated attention mechanisms remain poorly understood. We study attention through the geometry of its representations by modeling outputs as mean parameters of Gaussian distributions and analyzing the induced Fisher--Rao geometry. We show that ungated attention operator is restricted to intrinsically flat statistical manifolds due to its affine structure, while multiplicative gating enables non-flat geometries, including positively curved manifolds that are unattainable in the ungated setting. These results establish a geometric expressivity gap between ungated and gated attention. Empirically, we show that gated models exhibit higher representation curvature and improved performance on tasks requiring nonlinear decision boundaries whereas they provide no consistent advantage on tasks with linear decision boundaries. Furthermore, we identify a structured regime in which curvature accumulates under composition, yielding a systematic depth amplification effect.

AI.tldr: 论文通过几何视角分析注意力机制，发现无门控注意力局限于平坦统计流形，而乘性门控能实现非平坦几何（包括正曲率流形），建立了门控与非门控注意力的几何表达能力差距。
AI.motivation: 尽管门控注意力在大型语言模型中已成功应用并改善了性能和训练稳定性，但其数学含义仍未被充分理解。研究者希望通过几何视角分析注意力机制，特别是研究门控如何影响表示的几何结构。
AI.method: 通过将注意力输出建模为高斯分布的均值参数，分析诱导的Fisher-Rao几何。研究无门控注意力算子的仿射结构限制，以及乘性门控如何实现非平坦几何结构。
AI.result: 无门控注意力受限于内在平坦的统计流形，而乘性门控能实现非平坦几何，包括正曲率流形。门控模型表现出更高的表示曲率，在需要非线性决策边界的任务上性能更好，但在线性决策边界任务上没有一致优势。还发现了曲率在组合下积累的结构化机制，产生系统性的深度放大效应。
AI.conclusion: 研究建立了门控与非门控注意力之间的几何表达能力差距，为理解门控机制提供了数学基础，并解释了门控在需要非线性表示的任务中的优势。

title: Mean Flow Policy Optimization
summary: Diffusion models have recently emerged as expressive policy representations for online reinforcement learning (RL). However, their iterative generative processes introduce substantial training and inference overhead. To overcome this limitation, we propose to represent policies using MeanFlow models, a class of few-step flow-based generative models, to improve training and inference efficiency over diffusion-based RL approaches. To promote exploration, we optimize MeanFlow policies under the maximum entropy RL framework via soft policy iteration, and address two key challenges specific to MeanFlow policies: action likelihood evaluation and soft policy improvement. Experiments on MuJoCo and DeepMind Control Suite benchmarks demonstrate that our method, Mean Flow Policy Optimization (MFPO), achieves performance comparable to or exceeding current diffusion-based baselines while considerably reducing training and inference time. Our code is available at https://github.com/MFPolicy/MFPO.

AI.tldr: 提出MeanFlow模型作为扩散模型的替代，用于强化学习策略表示，显著提升训练和推理效率，同时保持或超越扩散模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型作为强化学习策略表示虽然表达能力强，但其迭代生成过程导致训练和推理开销巨大，需要更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 提出MeanFlow模型（少步流式生成模型）表示策略，在最大熵强化学习框架下通过软策略迭代优化，解决了MeanFlow策略特有的动作似然评估和软策略改进两个关键挑战。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo和DeepMind Control Suite基准测试中，Mean Flow Policy Optimization (MFPO)方法达到或超过当前扩散基线的性能，同时显著减少训练和推理时间。
AI.conclusion: MeanFlow模型作为扩散模型的高效替代，在强化学习中实现了性能与效率的良好平衡，为实际应用提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Towards Unconstrained Human-Object Interaction
comment: Accepted to the 20th IEEE International Conference on Automatic Face and Gesture Recognition (FG 2026)
summary: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection is a longstanding computer vision problem concerned with predicting the interaction between humans and objects. Current HOI models rely on a vocabulary of interactions at training and inference time, limiting their applicability to static environments. With the advent of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), it has become feasible to explore more flexible paradigms for interaction recognition. In this work, we revisit HOI detection through the lens of MLLMs and apply them to in-the-wild HOI detection. We define the Unconstrained HOI (U-HOI) task, a novel HOI domain that removes the requirement for a predefined list of interactions at both training and inference. We evaluate a range of MLLMs on this setting and introduce a pipeline that includes test-time inference and language-to-graph conversion to extract structured interactions from free-form text. Our findings highlight the limitations of current HOI detectors and the value of MLLMs for U-HOI. Code will be available at https://github.com/francescotonini/anyhoi

AI.tldr: 该论文提出无约束人-物交互检测任务，利用多模态大语言模型在开放环境中识别任意交互，突破了传统方法对预定义交互词汇表的依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统人-物交互检测模型依赖预定义的交互词汇表，限制了其在动态开放环境中的应用。多模态大语言模型的出现为实现更灵活的交互识别范式提供了可能。
AI.method: 提出无约束人-物交互任务定义，评估多种MLLM在该设置下的表现，并引入包含测试时推理和语言到图转换的流程，从自由文本中提取结构化交互信息。
AI.result: 研究结果揭示了当前HOI检测器的局限性，并证明了MLLM在无约束人-物交互检测中的价值。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模态大语言模型重新审视人-物交互检测，提出的无约束HOI任务为开放环境中的交互识别提供了新范式，展现了MLLM在该领域的应用潜力。

title: MonoEM-GS: Monocular Expectation-Maximization Gaussian Splatting SLAM
summary: Feed-forward geometric foundation models can infer dense point clouds and camera motion directly from RGB streams, providing priors for monocular SLAM. However, their predictions are often view-dependent and noisy: geometry can vary across viewpoints and under image transformations, and local metric properties may drift between frames. We present MonoEM-GS, a monocular mapping pipeline that integrates such geometric predictions into a global Gaussian Splatting representation while explicitly addressing these inconsistencies. MonoEM-GS couples Gaussian Splatting with an Expectation--Maximization formulation to stabilize geometry, and employs ICP-based alignment for monocular pose estimation. Beyond geometry, MonoEM-GS parameterizes Gaussians with multi-modal features, enabling in-place open-set segmentation and other downstream queries directly on the reconstructed map. We evaluate MonoEM-GS on 7-Scenes, TUM RGB-D and Replica, and compare against recent baselines.

AI.tldr: MonoEM-GS：一种单目建图管线，将前馈几何基础模型的预测集成到全局高斯泼溅表示中，通过期望最大化稳定几何，并支持多模态特征查询。
AI.motivation: 前馈几何基础模型可以从RGB流中直接推断密集点云和相机运动，为单目SLAM提供先验。但这些预测存在视图依赖性和噪声问题：几何在不同视角和图像变换下会变化，局部度量属性在帧间可能漂移。
AI.method: MonoEM-GS将高斯泼溅与期望最大化公式结合以稳定几何，采用基于ICP的对齐方法进行单目姿态估计。此外，该方法使用多模态特征参数化高斯，支持在重建地图上直接进行开放集分割和其他下游查询。
AI.result: 在7-Scenes、TUM RGB-D和Replica数据集上评估MonoEM-GS，并与近期基线方法进行比较。
AI.conclusion: MonoEM-GS通过集成几何基础模型预测到高斯泼溅表示，解决了视图依赖性和噪声问题，同时支持多模态特征查询，为单目建图提供了更稳定和功能丰富的解决方案。

title: OneHOI: Unifying Human-Object Interaction Generation and Editing
comment: Accepted at CVPR2026. This paper moves toward unifying HOI generation and editing within a single model
summary: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) modelling captures how humans act upon and relate to objects, typically expressed as <person, action, object> triplets. Existing approaches split into two disjoint families: HOI generation synthesises scenes from structured triplets and layout, but fails to integrate mixed conditions like HOI and object-only entities; and HOI editing modifies interactions via text, yet struggles to decouple pose from physical contact and scale to multiple interactions. We introduce OneHOI, a unified diffusion transformer framework that consolidates HOI generation and editing into a single conditional denoising process driven by shared structured interaction representations. At its core, the Relational Diffusion Transformer (R-DiT) models verb-mediated relations through role- and instance-aware HOI tokens, layout-based spatial Action Grounding, a Structured HOI Attention to enforce interaction topology, and HOI RoPE to disentangle multi-HOI scenes. Trained jointly with modality dropout on our HOI-Edit-44K, along with HOI and object-centric datasets, OneHOI supports layout-guided, layout-free, arbitrary-mask, and mixed-condition control, achieving state-of-the-art results across both HOI generation and editing. Code is available at https://jiuntian.github.io/OneHOI/.

AI.tldr: OneHOI是一个统一的扩散Transformer框架，将HOI生成和编辑整合到单个条件去噪过程中，通过共享的结构化交互表示实现混合条件控制。
AI.motivation: 现有HOI方法存在局限性：HOI生成方法只能从结构化三元组和布局合成场景，无法整合混合条件（如HOI和仅对象实体）；HOI编辑方法通过文本修改交互，但难以解耦姿势与物理接触，且难以扩展到多个交互。
AI.method: 提出OneHOI框架，核心是关系扩散Transformer（R-DiT），通过角色和实例感知的HOI令牌、基于布局的空间动作定位、结构化HOI注意力来强制交互拓扑、以及HOI RoPE来解耦多HOI场景。采用模态丢弃联合训练，支持布局引导、无布局、任意掩码和混合条件控制。
AI.result: 在HOI生成和编辑任务上均取得最先进结果，支持多种控制方式，包括布局引导、无布局、任意掩码和混合条件控制。
AI.conclusion: OneHOI统一了HOI生成和编辑，通过共享的结构化交互表示和创新的R-DiT架构，解决了现有方法的局限性，实现了更灵活和强大的HOI建模能力。

title: AffordGen: Generating Diverse Demonstrations for Generalizable Object Manipulation with Afford Correspondence
summary: Despite the recent success of modern imitation learning methods in robot manipulation, their performance is often constrained by geometric variations due to limited data diversity. Leveraging powerful 3D generative models and vision foundation models (VFMs), the proposed AffordGen framework overcomes this limitation by utilizing the semantic correspondence of meaningful keypoints across large-scale 3D meshes to generate new robot manipulation trajectories. This large-scale, affordance-aware dataset is then used to train a robust, closed-loop visuomotor policy, combining the semantic generalizability of affordances with the reactive robustness of end-to-end learning. Experiments in simulation and the real world show that policies trained with AffordGen achieve high success rates and enable zero-shot generalization to truly unseen objects, significantly improving data efficiency in robot learning.

AI.tldr: AffordGen框架利用3D生成模型和视觉基础模型，通过大规模3D网格的语义关键点对应关系生成新的机器人操作轨迹，训练鲁棒的闭环视觉运动策略，实现零样本泛化到未见物体。
AI.motivation: 现代模仿学习方法在机器人操作中受限于几何变化导致的数据多样性不足，需要提高数据效率和泛化能力。
AI.method: 利用3D生成模型和视觉基础模型，通过大规模3D网格的语义关键点对应关系生成新的机器人操作轨迹，构建大规模、可供性感知的数据集，训练闭环视觉运动策略。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实世界实验中，AffordGen训练的策略达到高成功率，实现零样本泛化到真正未见过的物体，显著提高机器人学习的数据效率。
AI.conclusion: AffordGen框架成功结合了可供性的语义泛化能力和端到端学习的反应鲁棒性，为机器人操作学习提供了高效的数据生成和泛化解决方案。

title: Free Geometry: Refining 3D Reconstruction from Longer Versions of Itself
summary: Feed-forward 3D reconstruction models are efficient but rigid: once trained, they perform inference in a zero-shot manner and cannot adapt to the test scene. As a result, visually plausible reconstructions often contain errors, particularly under occlusions, specularities, and ambiguous cues. To address this, we introduce Free Geometry, a framework that enables feed-forward 3D reconstruction models to self-evolve at test time without any 3D ground truth. Our key insight is that, when the model receives more views, it produces more reliable and view-consistent reconstructions. Leveraging this property, given a testing sequence, we mask a subset of frames to construct a self-supervised task. Free Geometry enforces cross-view feature consistency between representations from full and partial observations, while maintaining the pairwise relations implied by the held-out frames. This self-supervision allows for fast recalibration via lightweight LoRA updates, taking less than 2 minutes per dataset on a single GPU. Our approach consistently improves state-of-the-art foundation models, including Depth Anything 3 and VGGT, across 4 benchmark datasets, yielding an average improvement of 3.73% in camera pose accuracy and 2.88% in point map prediction. Code is available at https://github.com/hiteacherIamhumble/Free-Geometry .

AI.tldr: Free Geometry框架使前馈3D重建模型能够在测试时自我进化，通过跨视图特征一致性自监督和轻量级LoRA更新，无需3D真值即可提升重建质量。
AI.motivation: 前馈3D重建模型在训练后以零样本方式推理，无法适应测试场景，导致在遮挡、镜面反射和模糊线索下产生错误。需要一种方法让模型在测试时自我改进。
AI.method: 提出Free Geometry框架：1) 利用模型在更多视图下产生更可靠重建的特性；2) 在测试序列中掩码部分帧构建自监督任务；3) 强制完整观测和部分观测之间的跨视图特征一致性；4) 保持被保留帧的成对关系；5) 通过轻量级LoRA更新进行快速重新校准。
AI.result: 在单个GPU上每个数据集不到2分钟即可完成更新。在4个基准数据集上持续改进包括Depth Anything 3和VGGT在内的最先进基础模型，相机姿态精度平均提升3.73%，点云图预测平均提升2.88%。
AI.conclusion: Free Geometry通过自监督学习和轻量级适应，使前馈3D重建模型能够在测试时自我进化，显著提升重建质量，特别是在具有挑战性的场景条件下。

title: Intermediate Layers Encode Optimal Biological Representations in Single-Cell Foundation Models
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures, 4 tables. Accepted at the LMRL (Learning Meaningful Representations of Life) Workshop at ICLR 2026
summary: Current single-cell foundation model benchmarks universally extract final layer embeddings, assuming these represent optimal feature spaces. We systematically evaluate layer-wise representations from scFoundation (100M parameters) and Tahoe-X1 (1.3B parameters) across trajectory inference and perturbation response prediction. Our analysis reveals that optimal layers are task-dependent (trajectory peaks at 60% depth, 31% above final layers) and context-dependent (perturbation optima shift 0-96% across T cell activation states). Notably, first-layer embeddings outperform all deeper layers in quiescent cells, challenging assumptions about hierarchical feature abstraction. These findings demonstrate that "where" to extract features matters as much as "what" the model learns, necessitating systematic layer evaluation tailored to biological task and cellular context rather than defaulting to final-layer embeddings.

AI.tldr: 研究发现单细胞基础模型的最佳特征提取层是任务和上下文依赖的，而非默认的最终层，需要针对具体生物任务和细胞状态进行系统性的层评估
AI.motivation: 当前单细胞基础模型基准测试普遍提取最终层嵌入，假设这些代表了最优特征空间。本文旨在系统评估不同层的表示能力，挑战这一默认假设。
AI.method: 系统评估scFoundation（1亿参数）和Tahoe-X1（13亿参数）的逐层表示，在轨迹推断和扰动响应预测两个任务上进行对比分析。
AI.result: 最优层是任务依赖的（轨迹推断在60%深度达到峰值，比最终层高31%）和上下文依赖的（扰动预测最优层在T细胞激活状态间偏移0-96%）。第一层嵌入在静息细胞中优于所有深层，挑战了层次特征抽象的假设。
AI.conclusion: 特征提取的"位置"与模型学习"内容"同等重要，需要针对生物任务和细胞上下文进行系统性层评估，而非默认使用最终层嵌入。

title: AgentGA: Evolving Code Solutions in Agent-Seed Space
summary: We present AgentGA, a framework that evolves autonomous code-generation runs by optimizing the agent seed: the task prompt plus optional parent archives that initialize a fresh workspace. The outer loop searches over these reusable starting conditions rather than editing code directly. Each generation launches a fresh autonomous run from a reset workspace, while selected parent archives provide inherited artifacts that descendants can inspect and reuse. AgentGA couples a population-level genetic algorithm with long-horizon agents; selection uses deterministic 1:1 elite tournaments and operator allocation is adapted online with a modified Hedge controller. We instantiate the approach for tabular AutoML on the 16-competition Weco-Kaggle Lite benchmark. On the 10 benchmark runs reported here, AgentGA averages 74.52% Exceeds % of Human versus 54.15% for AIDE. Across 1135 parent-child comparisons, descendants given parent archives outperform runs started from scratch, indicating that inherited artifacts improve later autonomous runs. These findings support agent-seed optimization as a practical design point for autonomous code-search systems.

AI.tldr: AgentGA是一个通过优化智能体种子（任务提示+父代存档）来进化自主代码生成运行的框架，使用遗传算法外层循环搜索可复用的起始条件，在表格AutoML任务上表现优于基线
AI.motivation: 当前自主代码生成系统通常从零开始每次运行，缺乏继承和重用先前运行中生成的有价值工件的能力。研究者希望开发一种能够通过优化智能体种子来进化自主运行的方法，使后代运行能够继承和重用父代运行中的有用成果
AI.method: AgentGA框架包含外层遗传算法和内层长视野智能体。外层搜索可复用的智能体种子（任务提示+父代存档），每代从重置的工作空间启动新的自主运行，选中的父代存档提供可被后代检查和重用的继承工件。使用确定性1:1精英锦标赛进行选择，通过改进的Hedge控制器在线调整算子分配
AI.result: 在Weco-Kaggle Lite基准测试的16个竞赛中，AgentGA在10个报告运行中平均达到74.52%的"超越人类百分比"，显著优于AIDE的54.15%。在1135个父子比较中，获得父代存档的后代运行表现优于从零开始的运行，表明继承工件确实改进了后续自主运行
AI.conclusion: 智能体种子优化是自主代码搜索系统的一个实用设计点，通过优化可复用的起始条件（包括任务提示和继承工件）能够有效提升自主代码生成系统的性能，继承机制使后代运行能够利用先前运行的有价值成果

title: Decoding the Delta: Unifying Remote Sensing Change Detection and Understanding with Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) excel in general vision-language tasks, their application to remote sensing change understanding is hindered by a fundamental "temporal blindness". Existing architectures lack intrinsic mechanisms for multi-temporal contrastive reasoning and struggle with precise spatial grounding. To address this, we first introduce Delta-QA, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 180k visual question-answering samples. Delta-QA unifies pixel-level segmentation and visual question answering across bi- and tri-temporal scenarios, structuring change interpretation into four progressive cognitive dimensions. Methodologically, we propose Delta-LLaVA, a novel MLLM framework explicitly tailored for multi-temporal remote sensing interpretation. It overcomes the limitations of naive feature concatenation through three core innovations: a Change-Enhanced Attention module that systematically isolates and amplifies visual differences, a Change-SEG module utilizing Change Prior Embedding to extract differentiable difference features as input for the LLM, and Local Causal Attention to prevent cross-temporal contextual leakage. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Delta-LLaVA decisively outperforms leading generalist MLLMs and specialized segmentation models in complex change deduction and high-precision boundary localization, establishing a unified framework for earth observation intelligence.

AI.tldr: Delta-LLaVA：针对多时相遥感变化理解的新型MLLM框架，通过Delta-QA基准和三个核心创新模块解决MLLM的"时间盲区"问题
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在通用视觉-语言任务中表现出色，但在遥感变化理解应用中存在"时间盲区"问题。现有架构缺乏内在的多时相对比推理机制，难以实现精确的空间定位，限制了其在遥感变化分析中的应用。
AI.method: 提出Delta-LLaVA框架，包含三个核心创新：1) Change-Enhanced Attention模块，系统性地隔离和增强视觉差异；2) Change-SEG模块，利用Change Prior Embedding提取可微分的差异特征作为LLM输入；3) Local Causal Attention，防止跨时相上下文泄漏。同时构建了包含18万样本的Delta-QA基准数据集。
AI.result: Delta-LLaVA在复杂变化推理和高精度边界定位方面显著优于领先的通用MLLM和专用分割模型。实验证明该框架能够有效解决多时相遥感解释中的"时间盲区"问题。
AI.conclusion: Delta-LLaVA为地球观测智能提供了一个统一的框架，通过专门设计的注意力机制和特征提取模块，成功克服了MLLM在多时相遥感变化理解中的局限性，实现了像素级分割和视觉问答的统一处理。

title: Beyond Literal Summarization: Redefining Hallucination for Medical SOAP Note Evaluation
summary:
Evaluating large language models (LLMs) for clinical documentation tasks such as SOAP note generation remains challenging. Unlike standard summarization, these tasks require clinical abstraction, normalization of colloquial language, and medically grounded inference. However, prevailing evaluation methods including automated metrics and LLM as judge frameworks rely on lexical faithfulness, often labeling any information not explicitly present in the transcript as hallucination.
  We show that such approaches systematically misclassify clinically valid outputs as errors, inflating hallucination rates and distorting model assessment. Our analysis reveals that many flagged hallucinations correspond to legitimate clinical transformations, including synonym mapping, abstraction of examination findings, diagnostic inference, and guideline consistent care planning.
  By aligning evaluation criteria with clinical reasoning through calibrated prompting and retrieval grounded in medical ontologies we observe a significant shift in outcomes. Under a lexical evaluation regime, the mean hallucination rate is 35%, heavily penalizing valid reasoning. With inference aware evaluation, this drops to 9%, with remaining cases reflecting genuine safety concerns. These findings suggest that current evaluation practices over penalize valid clinical reasoning and may measure artifacts of evaluation design rather than true errors, underscoring the need for clinically informed evaluation in high context domains like medicine.

AI.tldr: 当前评估方法错误地将临床有效推理标记为幻觉，导致LLM在临床文档任务中被过度惩罚；通过临床推理对齐的评估可将幻觉率从35%降至9%
AI.motivation: 评估大型语言模型在临床文档任务（如SOAP笔记生成）时面临挑战，现有评估方法依赖词汇忠实度，将临床有效推理错误标记为幻觉，扭曲模型评估
AI.method: 通过校准提示和基于医学本体的检索，将评估标准与临床推理对齐，创建推理感知的评估框架，区分真正的安全问题和有效的临床转换
AI.result: 词汇评估下平均幻觉率为35%，严重惩罚有效推理；推理感知评估下降至9%，剩余案例反映真正的安全问题，表明当前评估实践过度惩罚有效临床推理
AI.conclusion: 当前评估方法可能测量的是评估设计的人工产物而非真实错误，强调在医学等高语境领域需要临床知情的评估框架

title: VLN-NF: Feasibility-Aware Vision-and-Language Navigation with False-Premise Instructions
comment: Accepted at ACL 2026. The first two authors contributed equally to the technical work
summary: Conventional Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) benchmarks assume instructions are feasible and the referenced target exists, leaving agents ill-equipped to handle false-premise goals. We introduce VLN-NF, a benchmark with false-premise instructions where the target is absent from the specified room and agents must navigate, gather evidence through in-room exploration, and explicitly output NOT-FOUND. VLN-NF is constructed via a scalable pipeline that rewrites VLN instructions using an LLM and verifies target absence with a VLM, producing plausible yet factually incorrect goals. We further propose REV-SPL to jointly evaluate room reaching, exploration coverage, and decision correctness. To address this challenge, we present ROAM, a two-stage hybrid that combines supervised room-level navigation with LLM/VLM-driven in-room exploration guided by a free-space clearance prior. ROAM achieves the best REV-SPL among compared methods, while baselines often under-explore and terminate prematurely under unreliable instructions. VLN-NF project page can be found at https://vln-nf.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 提出了VLN-NF基准测试，针对视觉语言导航中错误前提指令问题，要求智能体在目标不存在时导航、探索并明确输出NOT-FOUND，并提出了ROAM方法解决该挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉语言导航基准假设指令可行且目标存在，导致智能体无法处理错误前提目标。需要构建包含错误前提指令的基准，使智能体能够处理目标不存在的情况。
AI.method: 1. 构建VLN-NF基准：使用LLM重写VLN指令，VLM验证目标不存在，生成合理但事实错误的目标。2. 提出REV-SPL评估指标：联合评估房间到达、探索覆盖和决策正确性。3. 提出ROAM方法：两阶段混合方法，结合监督式房间级导航和LLM/VLM驱动的室内探索，使用自由空间清除先验指导。
AI.result: ROAM方法在比较方法中取得最佳REV-SPL性能，而基线方法通常在不可靠指令下探索不足并过早终止。VLN-NF基准有效评估智能体处理错误前提指令的能力。
AI.conclusion: VLN-NF基准填补了视觉语言导航中处理错误前提指令的空白，提出的ROAM方法通过结合监督导航和LLM/VLM探索有效解决了这一挑战，为更鲁棒的导航系统提供了基础。

title: PRoID: Predicted Rate of Information Delivery in Multi-Robot Exploration and Relaying
summary: We address Multi-Robot Exploration and Relaying (MRER): a team of robots must explore an unknown environment and deliver acquired information to a fixed base station within a mission time limit. The central challenge is deciding when each robot should stop exploring and relay: this depends on what the robot is likely to find ahead, what information it uniquely holds, and whether immediate or future delivery is more valuable. Prior approaches either ignore the reporting requirement entirely or rely on fixed-schedule relay strategies that cannot adapt to environment structure, team composition, or mission progress. We introduce PRoID (Predicted Rate of Information Delivery), a relay criterion that uses learned map prediction to estimate each robot's future information gain along its planned path, accounting for what teammates are already relaying. PRoID triggers relay when immediate return yields higher information delivery per unit time. We further propose PRoID-Safe, a failure-aware extension that incorporates robot survival probability into the relay criterion, naturally biasing decisions toward earlier relay as failure risk grows. We evaluate on real-world indoor floor plan datasets and show that PRoID and PRoID-Safe outperform fixed-schedule baselines, with stronger relative gains in failure scenarios.

AI.tldr: PRoID和PRoID-Safe：基于预测信息传递率的多机器人探索中继决策框架，通过预测未来信息增益和生存概率优化中继时机
AI.motivation: 解决多机器人探索与中继(MRER)中的核心挑战：确定每个机器人何时停止探索并开始中继。现有方法要么完全忽略报告需求，要么依赖无法适应环境结构、团队组成或任务进度的固定调度策略。
AI.method: 提出PRoID（预测信息传递率）中继准则，使用学习的地图预测来估计每个机器人沿计划路径的未来信息增益，同时考虑队友正在中继的信息。PRoID-Safe扩展版本将机器人生存概率纳入中继准则，随着失败风险增加自然偏向早期中继。
AI.result: 在真实室内平面图数据集上评估显示，PRoID和PRoID-Safe优于固定调度基线方法，在故障场景下表现出更强的相对优势。
AI.conclusion: PRoID框架通过预测未来信息增益和考虑生存概率，为多机器人探索中继提供了自适应、优化的中继决策机制，显著提升了信息传递效率。

title: CURaTE: Continual Unlearning in Real Time with Ensured Preservation of LLM Knowledge
summary: The inability to filter out in advance all potentially problematic data from the pre-training of large language models has given rise to the need for methods for unlearning specific pieces of knowledge after training. Existing techniques overlook the need for continuous and immediate action, causing them to suffer from degraded utility as updates accumulate and protracted exposure of sensitive information. To address these issues, we propose Continual Unlearning in Real Time with Ensured Preservation of LLM Knowledge (CURaTE). Our method begins by training a sentence embedding model on a dataset designed to enable the formation of sharp decision boundaries for determining whether a given input prompt corresponds to any stored forget requests. The similarity of a given input to the forget requests is then used to determine whether to answer or return a refusal response. We show that even with such a simple approach, not only does CURaTE achieve more effective forgetting than existing methods, but by avoiding modification of the language model parameters, it also maintains near perfect knowledge preservation over any number of updates and is the only method capable of continual unlearning in real-time.

AI.tldr: CURaTE是一种实时持续遗忘方法，通过训练句子嵌入模型来识别遗忘请求，避免修改LLM参数，实现高效遗忘和知识保留
AI.motivation: 现有遗忘方法无法持续实时处理，导致效用下降和敏感信息长期暴露。需要一种能在训练后持续、立即遗忘特定知识的方法
AI.method: 训练句子嵌入模型在专门数据集上形成清晰决策边界，根据输入提示与遗忘请求的相似度决定是否回答或拒绝响应，避免修改语言模型参数
AI.result: CURaTE比现有方法遗忘更有效，通过避免修改参数实现近乎完美的知识保留，支持任意数量的更新，是唯一能实时持续遗忘的方法
AI.conclusion: CURaTE提供了一种简单有效的实时持续遗忘解决方案，在保持LLM知识完整性的同时实现高效遗忘，解决了现有方法的局限性

title: AnySlot: Goal-Conditioned Vision-Language-Action Policies for Zero-Shot Slot-Level Placement
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies have emerged as a versatile paradigm for generalist robotic manipulation. However, precise object placement under compositional language instructions remains a major challenge for modern monolithic VLA policies. Slot-level tasks require both reliable slot grounding and sub-centimeter execution accuracy. To this end, we propose AnySlot, a framework that reduces compositional complexity by introducing an explicit spatial visual goal as an intermediate representation between language grounding and control. AnySlot turns language into an explicit visual goal by generating a scene marker, then executes this goal with a goal-conditioned VLA policy. This hierarchical design effectively decouples high-level slot selection from low-level execution, ensuring both semantic accuracy and spatial robustness. Furthermore, recognizing the lack of existing benchmarks for such precision-demanding tasks, we introduce SlotBench, a comprehensive simulation benchmark featuring nine task categories tailored to evaluate structured spatial reasoning in slot-level placement. Extensive experiments show that AnySlot significantly outperforms flat VLA baselines and previous modular grounding methods in zero-shot slot-level placement.

AI.tldr: AnySlot框架通过引入显式空间视觉目标作为中间表示，将语言指令转换为场景标记，再通过目标条件VLA策略执行，显著提升了组合式语言指令下的精确物体放置性能。
AI.motivation: 现代单体VLA策略在组合式语言指令下的精确物体放置（槽位级任务）面临挑战，需要可靠的槽位定位和亚厘米级执行精度。现有方法难以同时满足语义准确性和空间鲁棒性要求。
AI.method: 提出AnySlot框架：1）将语言指令转换为显式视觉目标（生成场景标记）；2）使用目标条件VLA策略执行该目标。这种分层设计将高层槽位选择与低层执行解耦，并引入SlotBench基准测试评估结构化空间推理能力。
AI.result: AnySlot在零样本槽位级放置任务中显著优于平面VLA基线和先前的模块化定位方法。实验验证了该框架在语义准确性和空间鲁棒性方面的优势。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入显式空间视觉目标作为中间表示，AnySlot有效解决了组合式语言指令下的精确物体放置问题，为槽位级任务提供了更可靠的解决方案，并建立了相应的评估基准。

title: Feed-Forward 3D Scene Modeling: A Problem-Driven Perspective
comment: 67 pages, 395 references. Project page: https://ff3d-survey.github.io. Code: https://github.com/ziplab/Awesome-Feed-Forward-3D. This work has been submitted to Springer for possible publication
summary: Reconstructing 3D representations from 2D inputs is a fundamental task in computer vision and graphics, serving as a cornerstone for understanding and interacting with the physical world. While traditional methods achieve high fidelity, they are limited by slow per-scene optimization or category-specific training, which hinders their practical deployment and scalability. Hence, generalizable feed-forward 3D reconstruction has witnessed rapid development in recent years. By learning a model that maps images directly to 3D representations in a single forward pass, these methods enable efficient reconstruction and robust cross-scene generalization. Our survey is motivated by a critical observation: despite the diverse geometric output representations, ranging from implicit fields to explicit primitives, existing feed-forward approaches share similar high-level architectural patterns, such as image feature extraction backbones, multi-view information fusion mechanisms, and geometry-aware design principles. Consequently, we abstract away from these representation differences and instead focus on model design, proposing a novel taxonomy centered on model design strategies that are agnostic to the output format. Our proposed taxonomy organizes the research directions into five key problems that drive recent research development: feature enhancement, geometry awareness, model efficiency, augmentation strategies and temporal-aware models. To support this taxonomy with empirical grounding and standardized evaluation, we further comprehensively review related benchmarks and datasets, and extensively discuss and categorize real-world applications based on feed-forward 3D models. Finally, we outline future directions to address open challenges such as scalability, evaluation standards, and world modeling.

AI.tldr: 该论文是一篇关于前馈式3D重建方法的综述，提出了一种基于模型设计策略的新分类法，重点关注特征增强、几何感知、模型效率、增强策略和时间感知模型五个关键问题。
AI.motivation: 传统3D重建方法存在每场景优化慢或类别特定训练的限制，影响了实际部署和可扩展性。尽管前馈式3D重建方法发展迅速且输出表示多样，但作者观察到这些方法共享相似的高层架构模式，因此需要一种不依赖于输出格式的模型设计分类法来系统化该领域研究。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种新颖的分类法，抽象掉几何输出表示的差异，专注于模型设计策略。该分类法将研究方向组织为五个关键问题：特征增强、几何感知、模型效率、增强策略和时间感知模型。同时全面回顾了相关基准测试和数据集，并基于前馈式3D模型对实际应用进行了分类讨论。
AI.result: 论文建立了系统化的前馈式3D重建方法分类框架，提供了该领域的全面综述。通过关注模型设计而非输出表示，为研究人员提供了更统一的视角来理解不同方法之间的共性和差异，并为标准化评估和未来研究方向奠定了基础。
AI.conclusion: 该综述论文通过提出基于模型设计策略的新分类法，为前馈式3D重建领域提供了系统化的组织框架。论文不仅总结了当前研究进展，还指出了未来的挑战方向，包括可扩展性、评估标准和世界建模等开放性问题，为该领域的进一步发展提供了指导。

title: Point2Pose: Occlusion-Recovering 6D Pose Tracking and 3D Reconstruction for Multiple Unknown Objects Via 2D Point Trackers
summary: We present Point2Pose, a model-free method for causal 6D pose tracking of multiple rigid objects from monocular RGB-D video. Initialized only from sparse image points on the objects to be tracked, our approach tracks multiple unseen objects without requiring object CAD models or category priors. Point2Pose leverages a 2D point tracker to obtain long-range correspondences, enabling instant recovery after complete occlusion. Simultaneously, the system incrementally reconstructs an online Truncated Signed Distance Function (TSDF) representation of the tracked targets. Alongside the method, we introduce a new multi-object tracking dataset comprising both simulation and real-world sequences, with motion-capture ground truth for evaluation. Experiments show that Point2Pose achieves performance comparable to the state-of-the-art methods on a severe-occlusion benchmark, while additionally supporting multi-object tracking and recovery from complete occlusion, capabilities that are not supported by previous model-free tracking approaches.

AI.tldr: Point2Pose：一种无需模型的因果6D姿态跟踪方法，仅从稀疏图像点初始化，可跟踪多个未见物体，无需CAD模型或类别先验，支持完全遮挡恢复和多目标跟踪。
AI.motivation: 现有模型无关的6D姿态跟踪方法通常需要物体CAD模型或类别先验，且难以处理多目标跟踪和完全遮挡恢复问题。Point2Pose旨在开发一种更灵活的方法，仅从稀疏图像点初始化，支持多目标跟踪和遮挡恢复。
AI.method: Point2Pose利用2D点跟踪器获取长程对应关系，支持完全遮挡后的即时恢复。同时，系统增量重建被跟踪目标的在线TSDF表示。该方法仅需稀疏图像点初始化，无需物体CAD模型或类别先验。
AI.result: 在严重遮挡基准测试中，Point2Pose性能与最先进方法相当，同时支持多目标跟踪和完全遮挡恢复，这是先前模型无关跟踪方法不具备的能力。作者还创建了包含仿真和真实序列的多目标跟踪数据集。
AI.conclusion: Point2Pose提供了一种灵活、无需模型的6D姿态跟踪解决方案，仅需稀疏图像点初始化即可跟踪多个未见物体，支持完全遮挡恢复，为模型无关跟踪开辟了新方向。

title: Sequence Search: Automated Sequence Design using Neural Architecture Search
summary: Developing an MR sequence is challenging and remains largely constrained by human intuition. Recently, AI-driven approaches have been proposed; however, most require an initial sequence for parameter optimization or extensive training datasets, limiting their general applicability. In this study, we propose "Sequence Search," an automated sequence design framework based on neural architecture search. The method takes tissue properties, imaging parameters, and design objectives as inputs and generates pulse sequences satisfying the design objectives, without requiring prior knowledge of conventional sequence structures. Sequence Search iteratively generates candidate sequences through neural architecture search and optimizes them via a differentiable Bloch simulator and objective-specific loss functions using gradient-based learning. The framework successfully replicated conventional spin-echo, T2-weighted spin-echo, and inversion recovery sequences. Less intuitive solutions were also discovered, such as three-RF spin-echo-like sequences with reduced RF energy and refocusing phases deviating from the conventional Hahn-echo. This work establishes a generalizable framework for automated MR sequence design, highlighting the potential to explore configurations beyond conventional designs based on human intuition.

AI.tldr: 提出基于神经架构搜索的自动化MRI序列设计框架"Sequence Search"，无需先验序列知识即可根据组织特性、成像参数和设计目标生成满足要求的脉冲序列
AI.motivation: 传统MRI序列开发依赖人类直觉且具有挑战性，现有AI方法需要初始序列参数优化或大量训练数据，限制了通用性。需要一种无需先验序列结构知识的自动化设计框架
AI.method: 基于神经架构搜索的自动化序列设计框架，输入组织特性、成像参数和设计目标，通过神经架构搜索迭代生成候选序列，使用可微分Bloch模拟器和目标特定损失函数进行梯度优化
AI.result: 成功复现了传统自旋回波、T2加权自旋回波和反转恢复序列；发现了非直观解决方案，如三射频自旋回波样序列（降低射频能量）和偏离传统Hahn回波的重聚焦相位序列
AI.conclusion: 建立了通用的自动化MRI序列设计框架，展示了探索超越人类直觉传统设计的配置潜力，为MRI序列开发提供了新范式

title: ELMoE-3D: Leveraging Intrinsic Elasticity of MoE for Hybrid-Bonding-Enabled Self-Speculative Decoding in On-Premises Serving
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models have become the dominant architecture for large-scale language models, yet on-premises serving remains fundamentally memory-bound as batching turns sparse per-token compute into dense memory activation. Memory-centric architectures (PIM, NMP) improve bandwidth but leave compute underutilized under MoE's low arithmetic intensity at high batch sizes. Speculative decoding (SD) trades idle compute for fewer target invocations, yet verification must load experts even for rejected tokens, severely limiting its benefit in MoE especially at low batch sizes. We propose ELMoE-3D, a hybrid-bonding (HB)-based HW-SW co-designed framework that unifies cache-based acceleration and speculative decoding to offer overall speedup across batch sizes. We identify two intrinsic elasticity axes of MoE-expert and bit-and jointly scale them to construct Elastic Self-Speculative Decoding (Elastic-SD), which serves as both an expert cache and a strongly aligned self-draft model accelerated by high HB bandwidth. Our LSB-augmented bit-sliced architecture exploits inherent redundancy in bit-slice representations to natively support bit-nested execution. On our 3D-stacked hardware, ELMoE-3D achieves an average $6.6\times$ speedup and $4.4\times$ energy efficiency gain over naive MoE serving on xPU across batch sizes 1-16, and delivers $2.2\times$ speedup and $1.4\times$ energy efficiency gain over the best-performing prior accelerator baseline.

AI.tldr: ELMoE-3D是一个基于混合键合技术的软硬件协同设计框架，通过统一缓存加速和推测解码，为MoE模型提供跨批次大小的整体加速。
AI.motivation: MoE模型已成为大规模语言模型的主流架构，但在本地部署时面临内存瓶颈问题。现有内存中心架构在MoE的低算术强度下计算利用率不足，而推测解码在MoE中因需要加载专家模型而受限，尤其是在小批次情况下。
AI.method: 提出ELMoE-3D框架，结合混合键合技术，通过弹性自推测解码同时作为专家缓存和强对齐的自草稿模型，利用LSB增强的位切片架构支持位嵌套执行，在3D堆叠硬件上实现加速。
AI.result: 在批次大小1-16范围内，ELMoE-3D相比朴素MoE服务平均获得6.6倍加速和4.4倍能效提升，相比最佳现有加速器基线获得2.2倍加速和1.4倍能效提升。
AI.conclusion: ELMoE-3D通过软硬件协同设计，有效解决了MoE模型在本地部署中的内存瓶颈问题，为不同批次大小提供了统一的加速解决方案。

title: Depth-Aware Image and Video Orientation Estimation
summary: This paper introduces a novel approach for image and video orientation estimation by leveraging depth distribution in natural images. The proposed method estimates the orientation based on the depth distribution across different quadrants of the image, providing a robust framework for orientation estimation suited for applications such as virtual reality (VR), augmented reality (AR), autonomous navigation, and interactive surveillance systems. To further enhance fine-scale perceptual alignment, we incorporate depth gradient consistency (DGC) and horizontal symmetry analysis (HSA), enabling precise orientation correction. This hybrid strategy effectively exploits depth cues to support spatial coherence and perceptual stability in immersive visual content. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate the robustness and accuracy of the proposed approach, outperforming existing techniques across diverse scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出基于深度分布估计图像和视频方向的新方法，通过分析图像不同象限的深度分布，结合深度梯度一致性和水平对称性分析，实现精确的方向估计和校正。
AI.motivation: 为虚拟现实、增强现实、自主导航和交互式监控系统等应用提供鲁棒的图像和视频方向估计框架，解决现有方法在复杂场景下的精度和稳定性问题。
AI.method: 基于图像不同象限的深度分布进行方向估计，结合深度梯度一致性（DGC）和水平对称性分析（HSA）进行精细尺度感知对齐，形成混合策略以利用深度线索支持空间连贯性和感知稳定性。
AI.result: 定性和定量评估表明该方法具有鲁棒性和准确性，在多样化场景中优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于深度分布的方向估计方法为沉浸式视觉内容提供了有效的方向估计解决方案，通过深度线索的利用实现了空间连贯性和感知稳定性。

title: CogEvolution: A Human-like Generative Educational Agent to Simulate Student's Cognitive Evolution
summary: Generative Agents, owing to their precise modeling and simulation capabilities of human behavior, have become a pivotal tool in the field of Artificial Intelligence in Education (AIEd) for uncovering complex cognitive processes of learners. However, existing educational agents predominantly rely on static personas to simulate student learning behaviors, neglecting the decisive role of deep cognitive capabilities in learning outcomes during practice interactions. Furthermore, they struggle to characterize the dynamic fluidity of knowledge internalization, transfer, and cognitive state transitions. To overcome this bottleneck, this paper proposes a human-like educational agent capable of simulating student cognitive evolution: CogEvolution. Specifically, we first construct a cognitive depth perceptron based on the Interactive, Constructive, Active, Passive (ICAP) taxonomy from cognitive psychology, achieving precise quantification of learner cognitive engagement. Subsequently, we propose a memory retrieval method based on Item Response Theory (IRT) to simulate the connection and assimilation of new and prior knowledge. Finally, we design a dynamic cognitive update mechanism based on evolutionary algorithms to simulate the real-time integration of student learning behaviors and cognitive evolution processes. Comprehensive evaluations demonstrate that CogEvolution not only significantly outperforms baseline models in behavioral fidelity and learning curve fitting but also uniquely reproduces plausible and robust cognitive evolutionary paths consistent with educational psychology expectations, providing a novel paradigm for constructing highly interpretable educational agents.

AI.tldr: CogEvolution是一个能够模拟学生认知演化的人类化教育智能体，通过认知深度感知器、基于IRT的记忆检索和动态认知更新机制，解决了现有教育智能体在模拟深度认知能力和知识动态内化方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有教育智能体主要依赖静态角色模拟学生学习行为，忽视了深度认知能力在学习结果中的决定性作用，且难以刻画知识内化、迁移和认知状态转换的动态流动性。需要构建能够模拟学生认知演化的智能体来突破这一瓶颈。
AI.method: 1. 基于认知心理学ICAP分类构建认知深度感知器，实现学习者认知参与的精确量化；2. 提出基于项目反应理论(IRT)的记忆检索方法，模拟新旧知识的连接与同化；3. 设计基于进化算法的动态认知更新机制，模拟学生学习行为与认知演化过程的实时整合。
AI.result: 综合评估表明，CogEvolution在行为保真度和学习曲线拟合方面显著优于基线模型，并且独特地再现了符合教育心理学预期的合理且稳健的认知演化路径，为构建高可解释性教育智能体提供了新范式。
AI.conclusion: CogEvolution通过模拟学生认知演化，解决了现有教育智能体在深度认知建模和动态知识内化方面的局限性，为AIEd领域提供了能够揭示学习者复杂认知过程的新工具。

title: Differentially Private Conformal Prediction
summary: Conformal prediction (CP) has attracted broad attention as a simple and flexible framework for uncertainty quantification through prediction sets. In this work, we study how to deploy CP under differential privacy (DP) in a statistically efficient manner. We first introduce differential CP, a non-splitting conformal procedure that avoids the efficiency loss caused by data splitting and serves as a bridge between oracle CP and private conformal inference. By exploiting the stability properties of DP mechanisms, differential CP establishes a direct connection to oracle CP and inherits corresponding validity behavior. Building on this idea, we develop Differentially Private Conformal Prediction (DPCP), a fully private procedure that combines DP model training with a private quantile mechanism for calibration. We establish the end-to-end privacy guarantee of DPCP and investigate its coverage properties under additional regularity conditions. We further study the efficiency of both differential CP and DPCP under empirical risk minimization and general regression models, showing that DPCP can produce tighter prediction sets than existing private split conformal approaches under the same privacy budget. Numerical experiments on synthetic and real datasets demonstrate the practical effectiveness of the proposed methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在差分隐私下进行保形预测的统计高效方法，包括非分割的差分保形预测和完全私有的DPCP方法，避免了数据分割带来的效率损失。
AI.motivation: 传统保形预测在差分隐私设置下通常采用数据分割方法，这会导致统计效率损失。需要开发既能保证隐私又能保持统计效率的保形预测方法。
AI.method: 提出了两种方法：1) 差分保形预测：非分割的保形过程，利用DP机制的稳定性建立与oracle保形预测的直接联系；2) DPCP：完全私有过程，结合DP模型训练和私有分位数机制进行校准。
AI.result: 建立了DPCP的端到端隐私保证，在额外正则条件下研究了其覆盖特性。理论分析表明，在相同隐私预算下，DPCP比现有私有分割保形方法能产生更紧的预测集。数值实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的差分保形预测和DPCP方法在差分隐私下实现了统计高效的保形预测，避免了数据分割的效率损失，为私有不确定性量化提供了有效解决方案。

title: Remote Sensing Image Super-Resolution for Imbalanced Textures: A Texture-Aware Diffusion Framework
summary: Generative diffusion priors have recently achieved state-of-the-art performance in natural image super-resolution, demonstrating a powerful capability to synthesize photorealistic details. However, their direct application to remote sensing image super-resolution (RSISR) reveals significant shortcomings. Unlike natural images, remote sensing images exhibit a unique texture distribution where ground objects are globally stochastic yet locally clustered, leading to highly imbalanced textures. This imbalance severely hinders the model's spatial perception. To address this, we propose TexADiff, a novel framework that begins by estimating a Relative Texture Density Map (RTDM) to represent the texture distribution. TexADiff then leverages this RTDM in three synergistic ways: as an explicit spatial conditioning to guide the diffusion process, as a loss modulation term to prioritize texture-rich regions, and as a dynamic adapter for the sampling schedule. These modifications are designed to endow the model with explicit texture-aware capabilities. Experiments demonstrate that TexADiff achieves superior or competitive quantitative metrics. Furthermore, qualitative results show that our model generates faithful high-frequency details while effectively suppressing texture hallucinations. This improved reconstruction quality also results in significant gains in downstream task performance. The source code of our method can be found at https://github.com/ZezFuture/TexAdiff.

AI.tldr: TexADiff是一个针对遥感图像超分辨率的生成扩散先验框架，通过相对纹理密度图(RTDM)来显式建模遥感图像特有的全局随机但局部聚集的不平衡纹理分布，从而提升空间感知和细节重建质量。
AI.motivation: 传统生成扩散先验在自然图像超分辨率中表现出色，但直接应用于遥感图像超分辨率(RSISR)存在显著不足。遥感图像具有独特的纹理分布特征：地面物体在全局上呈现随机性，但在局部呈现聚集性，导致高度不平衡的纹理分布。这种不平衡严重阻碍了模型的空间感知能力。
AI.method: 提出TexADiff框架：1) 首先估计相对纹理密度图(RTDM)来表示纹理分布；2) 将RTDM作为显式空间条件来引导扩散过程；3) 将RTDM作为损失调制项以优先处理纹理丰富区域；4) 将RTDM作为采样计划的动态适配器。这些修改旨在赋予模型显式的纹理感知能力。
AI.result: 实验表明TexADiff在定量指标上达到优越或具有竞争力的性能。定性结果显示模型能够生成忠实的高频细节，同时有效抑制纹理幻觉。改进的重建质量还带来了下游任务性能的显著提升。
AI.conclusion: TexADiff通过显式建模遥感图像特有的不平衡纹理分布，成功解决了生成扩散先验在遥感图像超分辨率中的局限性，实现了更高质量的重建效果，并提升了下游任务性能。

title: MirrorBench: Evaluating Self-centric Intelligence in MLLMs by Introducing a Mirror
summary: Recent progress in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) has demonstrated remarkable advances in perception and reasoning, suggesting their potential for embodied intelligence. While recent studies have evaluated embodied MLLMs in interactive settings, current benchmarks mainly target capabilities to perceive, understand, and interact with external objects, lacking a systematic evaluation of self-centric intelligence. To address this, we introduce MirrorBench, a simulation-based benchmark inspired by the classical Mirror Self-Recognition (MSR) test in psychology. MirrorBench extends this paradigm to embodied MLLMs through a tiered framework of progressively challenging tasks, assessing agents from basic visual perception to high-level self-representation. Experiments on leading MLLMs show that even at the lowest level, their performance remains substantially inferior to human performance, revealing fundamental limitations in self-referential understanding. Our study bridges psychological paradigms and embodied intelligence, offering a principled framework for evaluating the emergence of general intelligence in large models. Project page: https://fflahm.github.io/mirror-bench-page/.

AI.tldr: MirrorBench：基于心理学镜像自我识别测试的仿真基准，用于系统评估具身多模态大语言模型的自中心智能能力
AI.motivation: 当前具身MLLM基准主要关注对外部物体的感知、理解和交互能力，缺乏对自中心智能的系统性评估。心理学中的镜像自我识别测试为评估自我认知提供了经典范式，但尚未应用于具身AI评估。
AI.method: 提出MirrorBench基准，将心理学镜像自我识别范式扩展到具身MLLMs，采用分层框架设计渐进挑战性任务，从基础视觉感知到高级自我表征能力进行系统评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，即使在最低难度级别，领先MLLMs的表现也显著低于人类水平，揭示了这些模型在自我参照理解方面的根本局限性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究将心理学范式与具身智能相结合，为评估大模型中通用智能的出现提供了原则性框架，揭示了当前MLLMs在自我认知方面的不足。

title: The Acoustic Camouflage Phenomenon: Re-evaluating Speech Features for Financial Risk Prediction
summary: In computational paralinguistics, detecting cognitive load and deception from speech signals is a heavily researched domain. Recent efforts have attempted to apply these acoustic frameworks to corporate earnings calls to predict catastrophic stock market volatility. In this study, we empirically investigate the limits of acoustic feature extraction (pitch, jitter, and hesitation) when applied to highly trained speakers in in-the-wild teleconference environments. Utilizing a two-stream late-fusion architecture, we contrast an acoustic-based stream with a baseline Natural Language Processing (NLP) stream. The isolated NLP model achieved a recall of 66.25% for tail-risk downside events. Surprisingly, integrating acoustic features via late fusion significantly degraded performance, reducing recall to 47.08%. We identify this degradation as Acoustic Camouflage, where media-trained vocal regulation introduces contradictory noise that disrupts multimodal meta-learners. We present these findings as a boundary condition for speech processing applications in high-stakes financial forecasting.

AI.tldr: 语音特征（音高、抖动、犹豫）在预测企业财报电话会议中的极端市场波动时效果有限，甚至损害了纯文本模型的性能
AI.motivation: 研究在计算副语言学中，语音特征（如音高、抖动、犹豫）在预测企业财报电话会议中极端市场波动时的应用极限，特别是在高度训练过的演讲者在真实电话会议环境中的表现
AI.method: 采用双流后期融合架构，对比基于声学的特征流与基线自然语言处理流。声学特征包括音高、抖动和犹豫等，在高度训练过的演讲者的真实电话会议环境中提取
AI.result: 纯NLP模型对尾部风险下跌事件的召回率达到66.25%，但通过后期融合加入声学特征后，性能显著下降至47.08%，出现了"声学伪装"现象
AI.conclusion: 提出了"声学伪装"概念，即媒体训练过的声音调节会引入矛盾噪声，破坏多模态元学习器。这为语音处理在高风险金融预测中的应用设定了边界条件

title: Reward Design for Physical Reasoning in Vision-Language Models
summary: Physical reasoning over visual inputs demands tight integration of visual perception, domain knowledge, and multi-step symbolic inference. Yet even state-of-the-art Vision Language Models (VLMs) fall far short of human performance on physics benchmarks. While post-training algorithms such as Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) have demonstrated strong reasoning gains in language models, how reward design shapes VLM physical reasoning behavior remains poorly understood. We present a systematic reward ablation study for GRPO-based VLM training on physical reasoning. We compare four reward signals of increasing semantic richness: format compliance, answer accuracy, a composite rubric reward (answer correctness, physics principle identification, and unit consistency), and a novel internal reward derived from model attention weights over input image regions. We evaluate on PhyX, a 3,000-problem benchmark spanning six physics domains and six reasoning types across multiple-choice and open-ended formats, using IBM Granite Vision 3.3 (2B). Across both formats, GRPO with accuracy-based rewards outperforms SFT on most domains, though gains vary substantially by reward type and domain. Reward design does not uniformly improve performance. Instead, it induces domain-specific reasoning behaviors. Accuracy-based rewards provide the strongest overall gains. Rubric rewards improve structured reasoning quality without consistent accuracy improvements. Attention-based rewards enhance spatial reasoning while degrading performance in symbolic domains. Our internal attention-weight reward requires no spatial annotations and improves spatial relation accuracy from 0.27 to 0.50, suggesting that supervising where the model attends during generation is a promising direction for visually grounded physical reasoning.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统研究了不同奖励信号对基于GRPO的视觉语言模型在物理推理任务上的影响，发现奖励设计会诱导领域特定的推理行为，而非统一提升性能。
