AI.motivation: 尽管监督微调(SFT)和组相对策略优化(GRPO)等后训练算法在语言模型中显示出强大的推理增益，但奖励设计如何影响视觉语言模型(VLM)的物理推理行为仍不清楚。当前最先进的VLM在物理基准测试上仍远低于人类表现，需要深入理解奖励信号对物理推理行为的影响。
AI.method: 在PhyX基准测试(3000个问题，涵盖6个物理领域和6种推理类型)上，使用IBM Granite Vision 3.3 (2B)模型，系统比较了四种语义丰富度递增的奖励信号：格式合规性、答案准确性、复合评分奖励(答案正确性、物理原理识别和单位一致性)，以及基于模型对输入图像区域注意力权重的新型内部奖励。
AI.result: 基于准确性的奖励在大多数领域上优于SFT，但增益因奖励类型和领域而异。奖励设计不会统一提升性能，而是诱导领域特定的推理行为：准确性奖励提供最强的整体增益；评分奖励提高结构化推理质量但无一致的准确性改进；注意力奖励增强空间推理但降低符号领域的性能；内部注意力权重奖励无需空间标注，将空间关系准确性从0.27提升到0.50。
AI.conclusion: 奖励设计对VLM物理推理行为具有领域特异性影响，而非统一改进。监督模型在生成过程中的注意力分布是视觉基础物理推理的有前景方向，特别是基于注意力权重的内部奖励能显著提升空间推理能力，且无需空间标注。

title: CoTEvol: Self-Evolving Chain-of-Thoughts for Data Synthesis in Mathematical Reasoning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit strong mathematical reasoning when trained on high-quality Chain-of-Thought (CoT) that articulates intermediate steps, yet costly CoT curation hinders further progress. While existing remedies such as distillation from stronger LLMs and self-synthesis based on test-time search alleviate this issue, they often suffer from diminishing returns or high computing overhead.In this work, we propose CoTEvol, a genetic evolutionary framework that casts CoT generation as a population-based search over reasoning trajectories.Candidate trajectories are iteratively evolved through reflective global crossover at the trajectory level and local mutation guided by uncertainty at the step level, enabling holistic recombination and fine-grained refinement. Lightweight, task-aware fitness functions are designed to guide the evolutionary process toward accurate and diverse reasoning. Empirically, CoTEvol improves correct-CoT synthesis success by over 30% and enhances structural diversity, with markedly improved efficiency. LLMs trained on these evolutionary CoT data achieve an average gain of 6.6% across eight math benchmarks, outperforming previous distillation and self-synthesis approaches. These results underscore the promise of evolutionary CoT synthesis as a scalable and effective method for mathematical reasoning tasks.

AI.tldr: CoTEvol：一种基于遗传进化的框架，通过种群搜索生成推理轨迹，提升思维链生成质量与多样性，显著改善数学推理性能
AI.motivation: 现有思维链生成方法（如从强LLM蒸馏、基于测试时搜索的自合成）存在收益递减或计算开销大的问题，高质量思维链标注成本高昂阻碍了数学推理的进一步发展
AI.method: CoTEvol框架将思维链生成视为基于种群的推理轨迹搜索，通过轨迹级的全局交叉反射和步骤级的不确定性引导局部突变进行迭代进化，使用轻量级任务感知适应度函数引导进化过程
AI.result: 正确思维链合成成功率提升30%以上，结构多样性增强，效率显著提高；基于进化思维链数据训练的LLM在八个数学基准上平均增益6.6%，优于现有蒸馏和自合成方法
AI.conclusion: 进化思维链合成是一种可扩展且有效的数学推理方法，为高质量思维链生成提供了新途径

title: A Coordinate-Invariant Local Representation of Motion and Force Trajectories for Identification and Generalization Across Coordinate Systems
comment: This preprint has been accepted for presentation at the 17th World Symposium on the Algorithmic Foundations of Robotics (WAFR 2026). The preprint corresponds to the version submitted for peer review
summary: Identifying the trajectories of rigid bodies and of interaction forces is essential for a wide range of tasks in robotics, biomechanics, and related domains. These tasks include trajectory segmentation, recognition, and prediction. For these tasks, a key challenge lies in achieving consistent results when the trajectory is expressed in different coordinate systems. A way to address this challenge is to utilize trajectory models that can generalize across coordinate systems. The focus of this paper is on such trajectory models obtained by transforming the trajectory into a coordinate-invariant representation. However, coordinate-invariant representations often suffer from sensitivity to measurement noise and the manifestation of singularities in the representation, where the representation is not uniquely defined. This paper aims to address this limitation by introducing the novel Dual-Upper-Triangular Invariant Representation (DUTIR), with improved robustness to singularities, along with its computational algorithm. The proposed representation is formulated at a level of abstraction that makes it applicable to both rigid-body trajectories and interaction-force trajectories, hence making it a versatile tool for robotics, biomechanics, and related domains.

AI.tldr: 提出DUTIR（双上三角不变表示）方法，用于刚体轨迹和交互力轨迹的坐标不变表示，提高对奇异点的鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 在机器人学、生物力学等领域，需要识别刚体轨迹和交互力轨迹以进行分割、识别和预测等任务。关键挑战在于不同坐标系下结果的一致性。坐标不变表示虽能解决此问题，但通常对测量噪声敏感且存在奇异点问题。
AI.method: 提出新颖的Dual-Upper-Triangular Invariant Representation (DUTIR)方法，将轨迹转换为坐标不变表示，并开发了相应的计算算法。该方法在抽象层面设计，适用于刚体轨迹和交互力轨迹。
AI.result: DUTIR方法改进了对奇异点的鲁棒性，提供了更稳健的坐标不变表示，使其成为机器人学、生物力学及相关领域的通用工具。
AI.conclusion: DUTIR方法有效解决了坐标不变表示中的奇异点敏感性问题，为刚体轨迹和交互力轨迹分析提供了更稳健的坐标不变表示框架，具有广泛的应用价值。

title: Retrieve, Then Classify: Corpus-Grounded Automation of Clinical Value Set Authoring
summary: Clinical value set authoring -- the task of identifying all codes in a standardized vocabulary that define a clinical concept -- is a recurring bottleneck in clinical quality measurement and phenotyping. A natural approach is to prompt a large language model (LLM) to generate the required codes directly, but structured clinical vocabularies are large, version-controlled, and not reliably memorized during pretraining. We propose Retrieval-Augmented Set Completion (RASC): retrieve the $K$ most similar existing value sets from a curated corpus to form a candidate pool, then apply a classifier to each candidate code. Theoretically, retrieve-and-select can reduce statistical complexity by shrinking the effective output space from the full vocabulary to a much smaller retrieved candidate pool. We demonstrate the utility of RASC on 11,803 publicly available VSAC value sets, constructing the first large-scale benchmark for this task. A cross-encoder fine-tuned on SAPBert achieves AUROC~0.852 and value-set-level F1~0.298, outperforming a simpler three-layer Multilayer Perceptron (AUROC~0.799, F1~0.250) and both reduce the number of irrelevant candidates per true positive from 12.3 (retrieval-only) to approximately 3.2 and 4.4 respectively. Zero-shot GPT-4o achieves value-set-level F1~0.105, with 48.6\% of returned codes absent from VSAC entirely. This performance gap widens with increasing value set size, consistent with RASC's theoretical advantage. We observe similar performance gains across two other classifier model types, namely a cross-encoder initialized from pre-trained SAPBert and a LightGBM model, demonstrating that RASC's benefits extend beyond a single model class. The code to download and create the benchmark dataset, as well as the model training code is available at: \href{https://github.com/mukhes3/RASC}{https://github.com/mukhes3/RASC}.

AI.tldr: 提出RASC（检索增强集合补全）方法解决临床价值集构建瓶颈，通过检索相似价值集形成候选池，再用分类器筛选代码，显著优于直接使用LLM生成的方法。
AI.motivation: 临床价值集构建是临床质量测量和表型分析中的重复性瓶颈。虽然自然想到使用大语言模型直接生成所需代码，但结构化临床词汇表规模大、版本控制严格，且预训练时未可靠记忆，因此需要更有效的方法。
AI.method: 提出RASC方法：1）从已标注语料库中检索K个最相似的现有价值集形成候选代码池；2）对每个候选代码应用分类器进行筛选。理论优势在于将输出空间从完整词汇表缩小到较小的检索候选池。
AI.result: 在11,803个公开VSAC价值集上构建首个大规模基准。基于SAPBert微调的交叉编码器达到AUROC~0.852和价值集级F1~0.298，优于三层MLP（AUROC~0.799，F1~0.250）。零样本GPT-4o仅达到F1~0.105，且48.6%返回代码不在VSAC中。RASC将每个真阳性相关候选数从12.3（仅检索）降至约3.2-4.4。
AI.conclusion: RASC方法通过检索-选择策略有效解决了临床价值集构建问题，显著优于直接使用LLM的方法，且其优势随价值集规模增大而增强。该方法在不同模型类型（交叉编码器、LightGBM）上均表现良好，证明了其通用性。

title: HiProto: Hierarchical Prototype Learning for Interpretable Object Detection Under Low-quality Conditions
summary: Interpretability is essential for deploying object detection systems in critical applications, especially under low-quality imaging conditions that degrade visual information and increase prediction uncertainty. Existing methods either enhance image quality or design complex architectures, but often lack interpretability and fail to improve semantic discrimination. In contrast, prototype learning enables interpretable modeling by associating features with class-centered semantics, which can provide more stable and interpretable representations under degradation. Motivated by this, we propose HiProto, a new paradigm for interpretable object detection based on hierarchical prototype learning. By constructing structured prototype representations across multiple feature levels, HiProto effectively models class-specific semantics, thereby enhancing both semantic discrimination and interpretability. Building upon prototype modeling, we first propose a Region-to-Prototype Contrastive Loss (RPC-Loss) to enhance the semantic focus of prototypes on target regions. Then, we propose a Prototype Regularization Loss (PR-Loss) to improve the distinctiveness among class prototypes. Finally, we propose a Scale-aware Pseudo Label Generation Strategy (SPLGS) to suppress mismatched supervision for RPC-Loss, thereby preserving the robustness of low-level prototype representations. Experiments on ExDark, RTTS, and VOC2012-FOG demonstrate that HiProto achieves competitive results while offering clear interpretability through prototype responses, without relying on image enhancement or complex architectures. Our code will be available at https://github.com/xjlDestiny/HiProto.git.

AI.tldr: HiProto：基于分层原型学习的可解释目标检测新范式，通过多层级原型表示增强语义区分和可解释性，特别适用于低质量成像条件
AI.motivation: 在关键应用中部署目标检测系统时，可解释性至关重要，特别是在低质量成像条件下，视觉信息退化会增加预测不确定性。现有方法要么增强图像质量，要么设计复杂架构，但往往缺乏可解释性且未能改善语义区分。原型学习通过将特征与类中心语义关联，能够在退化条件下提供更稳定和可解释的表示
AI.method: 提出HiProto框架，基于分层原型学习构建多特征层级的结构化原型表示。具体包括：1) 区域到原型对比损失(RPC-Loss)增强原型对目标区域的语义关注；2) 原型正则化损失(PR-Loss)提高类原型间的区分度；3) 尺度感知伪标签生成策略(SPLGS)抑制RPC-Loss中的不匹配监督，保护低层原型表示的鲁棒性
AI.result: 在ExDark、RTTS和VOC2012-FOG数据集上的实验表明，HiProto在保持竞争力的检测性能的同时，通过原型响应提供了清晰的可解释性，且不依赖图像增强或复杂架构
AI.conclusion: HiProto通过分层原型学习为低质量成像条件下的目标检测提供了一种可解释的新范式，能够有效建模类特定语义，增强语义区分和可解释性，为关键应用中的目标检测系统部署提供了可靠解决方案

title: Temporal Cross-Modal Knowledge-Distillation-Based Transfer-Learning for Gas Turbine Vibration Fault Detection
summary: Preventing machine failure is inherently superior to reactive remediation, particularly for critical assets like gas turbines, where early fault detection (FD) is a cornerstone of industrial sustainability. However, modern deep learning-based FD models often face a significant trade-off between architectural complexity and real-time operational constraints, often hindered by a lack of temporal context within restricted vibration signal windows. To address these challenges, this study proposes a Temporal Cross-Modal Knowledge-Distillation Transfer-Learning (TCMKDTL) framework. The framework employs a "privileged" teacher model trained on expansive temporal windows incorporating both past and future signal context to distill latent feature-based knowledge into a compact student model. To mitigate issues of data scarcity and domain shift, the framework leverages robust pre-training on benchmark datasets (such as CWRU) followed by adaptation to target industrial data. Extensive evaluation using experimental and industrial gas turbine (MGT-40) datasets demonstrates that TCMKDTL achieves superior feature separability and diagnostic accuracy compared to conventional pre-trained architectures. Ultimately, this approach enables high-performance, unsupervised anomaly detection suitable for deployment on resource-constrained industrial hardware.

AI.tldr: 提出TCMKDTL框架，通过时间跨模态知识蒸馏解决燃气轮机故障检测中模型复杂度与实时性矛盾，利用大时间窗口教师模型向紧凑学生模型传递特征知识，实现高性能无监督异常检测。
AI.motivation: 燃气轮机等关键设备的故障预防优于事后修复，但现有深度学习故障检测模型面临架构复杂性与实时操作约束的权衡，且受限于振动信号窗口缺乏时间上下文信息。
AI.method: 提出时间跨模态知识蒸馏迁移学习框架：1）训练"特权"教师模型，使用包含过去和未来信号上下文的大时间窗口；2）将潜在特征知识蒸馏到紧凑学生模型；3）利用基准数据集预训练缓解数据稀缺和域偏移问题；4）适应目标工业数据。
AI.result: 在实验和工业燃气轮机数据集上的评估表明，TCMKDTL相比传统预训练架构实现了更优的特征可分性和诊断准确性，适合在资源受限的工业硬件上部署。
AI.conclusion: TCMKDTL框架通过知识蒸馏和迁移学习解决了工业故障检测中的复杂性与实时性矛盾，实现了高性能无监督异常检测，为资源受限环境下的关键设备故障预防提供了有效解决方案。

title: ReaLiTy and LADS: A Unified Framework and Dataset Suite for LiDAR Adaptation Across Sensors and Adverse Weather Conditions
summary: Reliable LiDAR perception requires robustness across sensors, environments, and adverse weather. However, existing datasets rarely provide physically consistent observations of the same scene under varying sensor configurations and weather conditions, limiting systematic analysis of domain shifts. This work presents ReaLiTy, a unified physics-informed framework that transforms LiDAR data to match target sensor specifications and weather conditions. The framework integrates physically grounded cues with a learning-based module to generate realistic intensity patterns, while a physics-based weather model introduces consistent geometric and radiometric degradations. Building on this framework, we introduce the LiDAR Adaptation Dataset Suite (LADS), a collection of physically consistent, transformation-ready point clouds with one-to-one correspondence to original datasets. Experiments demonstrate improved cross-domain consistency and realistic weather effects. ReaLiTy and LADS provide a reproducible foundation for studying LiDAR adaptation and simulation-driven perception in intelligent transportation systems.

AI.tldr: ReaLiTy是一个统一的物理信息框架，用于将LiDAR数据转换为匹配目标传感器规格和天气条件，并引入LiDAR适应数据集套件(LADS)用于系统性的跨域分析。
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR数据集很少提供相同场景在不同传感器配置和天气条件下的物理一致观测，这限制了领域偏移的系统性分析。可靠的LiDAR感知需要在传感器、环境和恶劣天气条件下具有鲁棒性。
AI.method: ReaLiTy框架整合物理基础线索与学习模块生成真实强度模式，同时使用基于物理的天气模型引入一致的几何和辐射度退化。基于此框架开发了LiDAR适应数据集套件(LADS)，包含物理一致、可转换的点云数据。
AI.result: 实验证明该方法提高了跨域一致性并生成了真实的天气效果。ReaLiTy和LADS为研究LiDAR适应和仿真驱动感知提供了可复现的基础。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提出了一个统一的物理信息框架和数据集套件，为智能交通系统中的LiDAR适应和仿真驱动感知研究提供了系统性的解决方案。

title: Tight Bounds for Learning Polyhedra with a Margin
summary: We give an algorithm for PAC learning intersections of $k$ halfspaces with a $ρ$ margin to within error $\varepsilon$ that runs in time $\textsf{poly}(k, \varepsilon^{-1}, ρ^{-1}) \cdot \exp \left(O(\sqrt{n \log(1/ρ) \log k})\right)$. Notably, this improves on prior work which had an exponential dependence on either $k$ or $ρ^{-1}$ and matches known cryptographic and Statistical Query lower bounds up to the logarithmic factors in $k$ and $ρ$ in the exponent. Our learning algorithm extends to the more general setting when we are only promised that most points have distance at least $ρ$ from the boundary of the polyhedron, making it applicable to continuous distributions as well.

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效学习k个半空间交集的PAC算法，时间复杂度为poly(k,ε⁻¹,ρ⁻¹)·exp(O(√(n log(1/ρ) log k)))，显著改进先前指数依赖，匹配密码学和统计查询下界
AI.motivation: 先前学习k个半空间交集的方法在k或ρ⁻¹上具有指数依赖，这在实际应用中不可行。需要开发更高效的算法来匹配已知的理论下界，并扩展到更一般的分布设置
AI.method: 设计多项式时间算法，其指数部分仅依赖于√(n log(1/ρ) log k)。算法可扩展到更一般情况：仅要求大多数点距离多面体边界至少ρ，适用于连续分布
AI.result: 算法时间复杂度为poly(k,ε⁻¹,ρ⁻¹)·exp(O(√(n log(1/ρ) log k)))，相比先前指数依赖有显著改进。与密码学和统计查询下界匹配，仅相差k和ρ对数的对数因子
AI.conclusion: 该算法在k和ρ⁻¹上实现多项式依赖，指数部分仅依赖于√n，匹配理论下界。扩展性使其适用于更一般的分布设置，为半空间交集学习提供了高效解决方案

title: MApLe: Multi-instance Alignment of Diagnostic Reports and Large Medical Images
comment: Accepted for MIDL 2026; Reviews available at https://openreview.net/forum?id=M8OO3CRbL9#discussion
summary: In diagnostic reports, experts encode complex imaging data into clinically actionable information. They describe subtle pathological findings that are meaningful in their anatomical context. Reports follow relatively consistent structures, expressing diagnostic information with few words that are often associated with tiny but consequential image observations. Standard vision language models struggle to identify the associations between these informative text components and small locations in the images. Here, we propose "MApLe", a multi-task, multi-instance vision language alignment approach that overcomes these limitations. It disentangles the concepts of anatomical region and diagnostic finding, and links local image information to sentences in a patch-wise approach. Our method consists of a text embedding trained to capture anatomical and diagnostic concepts in sentences, a patch-wise image encoder conditioned on anatomical structures, and a multi-instance alignment of these representations. We demonstrate that MApLe can successfully align different image regions and multiple diagnostic findings in free-text reports. We show that our model improves the alignment performance compared to state-of-the-art baseline models when evaluated on several downstream tasks. The code is available at https://github.com/cirmuw/MApLe.

AI.tldr: MApLe是一种多任务、多实例的视觉语言对齐方法，专门针对医学影像诊断报告，能够将文本中的解剖区域和诊断发现概念与图像中的微小区域进行精确对齐。
AI.motivation: 医学诊断报告将复杂的影像数据编码为临床可操作信息，描述解剖背景下的细微病理发现。标准视觉语言模型难以识别这些信息丰富的文本成分与图像中微小但重要的位置之间的关联。
AI.method: 提出MApLe方法：1) 训练文本嵌入来捕捉句子中的解剖和诊断概念；2) 基于解剖结构条件的patch-wise图像编码器；3) 这些表示的多实例对齐。该方法解耦解剖区域和诊断发现概念，以patch-wise方式将局部图像信息与句子关联。
AI.result: MApLe能够成功对齐不同图像区域和自由文本报告中的多个诊断发现。与最先进的基线模型相比，在多个下游任务评估中显示出更好的对齐性能。
AI.conclusion: MApLe通过多任务、多实例的视觉语言对齐方法，有效解决了医学影像诊断报告中文本与图像微小区域对齐的挑战，为医学影像分析提供了更精确的跨模态理解能力。

title: Which bird does not have wings: Negative-constrained KGQA with Schema-guided Semantic Matching and Self-directed Refinement
summary: Large language models still struggle with faithfulness and hallucinations despite their remarkable reasoning abilities. In Knowledge Graph Question Answering (KGQA), semantic parsing-based approaches address the limitations by understanding constraints in a user's question and converting them into a logical form to execute on a knowledge graph. However, existing KGQA benchmarks and methods are biased toward positive and calculation constraints. Negative constraints are neglected, although they frequently appear in real-world questions. In this paper, we introduce a new task, NEgative-conSTrained (NEST) KGQA, where each question contains at least one negative constraint, and a corresponding dataset, NestKGQA. We also design PyLF, a Python-formatted logical form, since existing logical forms are hardly suitable to express negation clearly while maintaining readability. Furthermore, NEST questions naturally contain multiple constraints. To mitigate their semantic complexity, we present a novel framework named CUCKOO, specialized to multiple-constrained questions and ensuring semantic executability. CUCKOO first generates a constraint-aware logical form draft and performs schema-guided semantic matching. It then selectively applies self-directed refinement only when executing improper logical forms yields an empty result, reducing cost while improving robustness. Experimental results demonstrate that CUCKOO consistently outperforms baselines on both conventional KGQA and NEST-KGQA benchmarks under few-shot settings.

AI.tldr: 该论文针对知识图谱问答中负约束被忽视的问题，提出了NEST-KGQA任务和数据集，设计了PyLF逻辑形式，并开发了CUCKOO框架来处理多约束问题，在少样本设置下优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型具有强大的推理能力，但在忠实性和幻觉方面仍存在问题。在知识图谱问答中，基于语义解析的方法通过理解用户问题中的约束并将其转换为逻辑形式来执行，但现有的KGQA基准和方法偏向于正向和计算约束，而负约束虽然在实际问题中频繁出现却被忽视。
AI.method: 1. 引入NEST-KGQA任务（包含至少一个负约束的问题）和NestKGQA数据集；2. 设计PyLF（Python格式的逻辑形式），能清晰表达否定同时保持可读性；3. 提出CUCKOO框架，专门处理多约束问题并确保语义可执行性：首先生成约束感知的逻辑形式草稿，进行模式引导的语义匹配，然后仅在执行不当逻辑形式产生空结果时选择性应用自导向精炼。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，CUCKOO在少样本设置下，在传统KGQA和NEST-KGQA基准上都持续优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该论文通过引入负约束KGQA任务、新数据集和专门框架，解决了现有KGQA系统在处理负约束和多约束问题时的不足，为更真实世界的问题提供了有效的解决方案。

title: ConfLayers: Adaptive Confidence-based Layer Skipping for Self-Speculative Decoding
summary: Self-speculative decoding is an inference technique for large language models designed to speed up generation without sacrificing output quality. It combines fast, approximate decoding using a compact version of the model as a draft model with selective re-evaluation by the full target model. Some existing methods form the draft model by dynamically learning which layers to skip during inference, effectively creating a smaller subnetwork to speed up computation. However, using heuristic-based approaches to select layers to skip can often be simpler and more effective. In this paper, we propose ConfLayers, a dynamic plug-and-play approach to forming the draft model in self-speculative decoding via confidence-based intermediate layer skipping. The process iteratively computes confidence scores for all layers, selects layers to skip based on an adaptive threshold, evaluates the performance of the resulting set, and updates the best selection until no further improvement is achieved or a maximum number of iterations is reached. This framework avoids the overhead and complexity of training a layer skipping policy and can provide more consistent speed-quality trade-offs while preserving the adaptivity of the draft model to diverse tasks and datasets. The performance evaluation of ConfLayers across different models and datasets shows that our novel approach offers up to 1.4x speedup over vanilla LLM generation.

AI.tldr: ConfLayers提出了一种基于置信度的动态层跳过方法，用于自推测解码中的草稿模型构建，无需训练即可实现1.4倍加速。
AI.motivation: 现有自推测解码方法中，动态学习跳过层的草稿模型构建方法复杂且训练开销大，而启发式方法虽然简单但效果有限。需要一种既能保持自适应能力又无需训练开销的层选择方案。
AI.method: ConfLayers采用基于置信度的动态即插即用方法：迭代计算所有层的置信度分数，基于自适应阈值选择要跳过的层，评估性能后更新最佳选择，直到性能不再提升或达到最大迭代次数。
AI.result: 在不同模型和数据集上的评估显示，ConfLayers相比原始LLM生成实现了最高1.4倍的加速，同时保持了输出质量，提供了更一致的加速-质量权衡。
AI.conclusion: ConfLayers通过置信度驱动的动态层跳过，避免了训练开销，保持了草稿模型对不同任务和数据集的自适应性，在自推测解码中实现了有效的加速效果。

title: Disentangle-then-Refine: LLM-Guided Decoupling and Structure-Aware Refinement for Graph Contrastive Learning
summary: Conventional Graph Contrastive Learning (GCL) on Text-Attributed Graphs (TAGs) relies on blind stochastic augmentations, inadvertently entangling task-relevant signals with noise. We propose SDM-SCR, a robust framework anchored in Approximate Orthogonal Decomposition. First, the Semantic Decoupling Module (SDM) leverages the instruction-following capability of Large Language Models (LLMs) to actively parse raw attributes into asymmetric, task-oriented signal and noise views. This shifts the paradigm from random perturbation to semantic-aware disentanglement. Subsequently, Semantic Consistency Regularization (SCR) exploits the spectral observation that semantic signals are topologically smooth while residual noise is high-frequency. SCR functions as a selective spectral filter, enforcing consistency only on the signal subspace to eliminate LLM hallucinations without over-smoothing. This ``Disentangle-then-Refine'' mechanism ensures rigorous signal purification. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SDM-SCR achieves SOTA performance in accuracy and efficiency.

AI.tldr: SDM-SCR是一个基于近似正交分解的图对比学习框架，通过LLM主动解耦文本属性图中的语义信号与噪声，并使用选择性谱滤波进行信号纯化，显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统文本属性图上的图对比学习依赖于盲目的随机增强，无意中将任务相关信号与噪声纠缠在一起，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 1. 语义解耦模块：利用LLM的指令跟随能力，将原始属性主动解析为不对称的任务导向信号视图和噪声视图；2. 语义一致性正则化：基于谱分析观察（语义信号拓扑平滑而噪声高频），作为选择性谱滤波器，仅在信号子空间上强制执行一致性，消除LLM幻觉且不过度平滑。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，SDM-SCR在准确性和效率方面达到了最先进的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 提出的"解耦-精炼"机制确保了严格的信号纯化，将图对比学习范式从随机扰动转变为语义感知的解缠结。

title: MoRI: Mixture of RL and IL Experts for Long-Horizon Manipulation Tasks
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) and Imitation Learning (IL) are the standard frameworks for policy acquisition in manipulation. While IL offers efficient policy derivation, it suffers from compounding errors and distribution shift. Conversely, RL facilitates autonomous exploration but is frequently hindered by low sample efficiency and the high cost of trial and error. Since existing hybrid methods often struggle with complex tasks, we introduce Mixture of RL and IL Experts (MoRI). This system dynamically switches between IL and RL experts based on the variance of expert actions to handle coarse movements and fine-grained manipulations. MoRI employs an offline pre-training stage followed by online fine-tuning to accelerate convergence. To maintain exploration safety and minimize human intervention, the system applies IL-based regularization to the RL component. Evaluation across four complex real-world tasks shows that MoRI achieves an average success rate of 97.5% within 2 to 5 hours of fine-tuning. Compared to baseline RL algorithms, MoRI reduces human intervention by 85.8% and shortens convergence time by 21%, demonstrating its capability in robotic manipulation.

AI.tldr: MoRI是一种结合强化学习和模仿学习的混合专家系统，通过动态切换IL和RL专家来处理机器人操作中的粗粒度运动和细粒度操作，显著提高成功率和减少人工干预。
AI.motivation: 现有混合方法在处理复杂任务时存在困难，模仿学习存在复合误差和分布偏移问题，而强化学习则面临样本效率低和试错成本高的挑战，需要一种更有效的策略获取框架。
AI.method: 提出MoRI系统，基于专家动作方差动态切换IL和RL专家；采用离线预训练和在线微调两阶段方法加速收敛；通过IL正则化确保RL探索安全性并减少人工干预。
AI.result: 在四个复杂现实任务中，MoRI在2-5小时微调后平均成功率97.5%；相比基线RL算法，减少85.8%人工干预，缩短21%收敛时间。
AI.conclusion: MoRI通过有效结合IL和RL优势，在机器人操作任务中实现了高成功率、低人工干预和快速收敛，展示了混合专家系统在复杂任务处理中的强大能力。

title: A Synonymous Variational Perspective on the Rate-Distortion-Perception Tradeoff
comment: 23 pages, 6 figures. This paper is submitted to the special issue on "Data Compression: Classical Theories Meet Modern Advances" of the IEEE Journal of Selected Areas in Information Theory (IEEE JSAIT)
summary: The fundamental limit of natural signal compression has traditionally been characterized by classical rate-distortion (RD) theory through the tradeoff between coding rate and reconstruction distortion, while the rate-distortion-perception (RDP) framework introduces a divergence-based measure of perceptual quality as a modeling principle rather than a theoretically-derived principle, leaving its theoretical origin unclear. In this paper, motivated by a synonymity-based semantic information perspective, we reformulate perceptual reconstruction as recovering any admissible sample within an ideal synonymous set (synset) associated with the source, rather than the source sample itself, and correspondingly establish a synonymous source coding architecture. On this basis, we develop a synonymous variational inference (SVI) analysis framework with a synonymous variational lower bound (SVLBO) for tractable analysis of synset-oriented compression. Within this framework, we establish a synonymity-perception consistency principle, showing that optimal identification of semantic information is theoretically consistent with perceptual optimization. Based on its derivation result, we prove a synonymous RDP tradeoff for the proposed synonymous source coding. These analytical results show that the distributional divergence term arises naturally from the synset-based reconstruction objective, clarify its compatibility with existing RDP formulations and classical RD theory, and suggest the potential advantages of synonymous source coding.

AI.tldr: 论文从语义信息视角重新定义感知重建，提出基于同义集（synset）的源编码架构，建立了同义变分推理框架，证明了同义性与感知一致性原则，并推导出同义率失真感知权衡。
AI.motivation: 传统率失真理论仅关注编码率与重建失真之间的权衡，而率失真感知框架引入基于散度的感知质量度量作为建模原则而非理论推导原则，其理论起源不明确。本文从同义性语义信息视角出发，旨在为感知重建提供理论基础。
AI.method: 1. 将感知重建重新定义为恢复源相关理想同义集（synset）内的任何可接受样本，而非源样本本身；2. 建立同义源编码架构；3. 开发同义变分推理分析框架，包含同义变分下界用于可处理的同义集导向压缩分析。
AI.result: 1. 建立了同义性-感知一致性原则，证明语义信息的最优识别在理论上与感知优化一致；2. 推导出所提同义源编码的同义率失真感知权衡；3. 分析结果表明分布散度项自然源于基于同义集的重建目标，澄清了其与现有RDP公式和经典RD理论的兼容性。
AI.conclusion: 论文从语义信息视角为感知重建提供了理论基础，提出的同义源编码架构和同义变分推理框架不仅解释了分布散度项的理论起源，还展示了与现有理论的兼容性，并暗示了同义源编码的潜在优势。

title: Heuristic Style Transfer for Real-Time, Efficient Weather Attribute Detection
summary: We present lightweight and efficient architectures to detect weather conditions from RGB images, predicting the weather type (sunny, rain, snow, fog) and 11 complementary attributes such as intensity, visibility, and ground condition, for a total of 53 classes across the tasks. This work examines to what extent weather conditions manifest as variations in visual style. We investigate style-inspired techniques, including Gram matrices, a truncated ResNet-50 targeting lower and intermediate layers, and PatchGAN-style architectures, within a multi-task framework with attention mechanisms. Two families are introduced: RTM (ResNet50-Truncated-MultiTasks) and PMG (PatchGAN-MultiTasks-Gram), together with their variants. Our contributions include automation of Gram-matrix computation, integration of PatchGAN into supervised multi-task learning, and local style capture through local Gram for improved spatial coherence. We also release a dataset of 503,875 images annotated with 12 weather attributes under a Creative Commons Attribution (CC-BY) license. The models achieve F1 scores above 96 percent on our internal test set and above 78 percent in zero-shot evaluation on several external datasets, confirming their generalization ability. The PMG architecture, with fewer than 5 million parameters, runs in real time with a small memory footprint, making it suitable for embedded systems. The modular design of the models also allows style-related or weather-related tasks to be added or removed as needed.

AI.tldr: 提出轻量高效的天气检测架构，通过视觉风格变化预测天气类型和11个补充属性，引入RTM和PMG两大家族模型，在保持高精度的同时实现实时运行和小内存占用。
AI.motivation: 研究天气条件在多大程度上表现为视觉风格的变化，开发能够从RGB图像中检测多种天气条件和属性的轻量级系统，适用于嵌入式设备。
AI.method: 采用风格启发技术（Gram矩阵、截断ResNet-50、PatchGAN风格架构）构建多任务框架，引入RTM（ResNet50截断多任务）和PMG（PatchGAN多任务Gram）两大家族模型，自动化Gram矩阵计算，集成PatchGAN到监督多任务学习，通过局部Gram改进空间一致性。
AI.result: 在内部测试集上F1分数超过96%，在多个外部数据集上零样本评估超过78%，PMG架构参数少于500万，能够实时运行且内存占用小，模型模块化设计支持灵活添加或移除任务。
AI.conclusion: 天气条件确实表现为视觉风格变化，提出的轻量级架构在保持高精度的同时实现了实时性能和模块化设计，适用于嵌入式系统，并发布了包含503,875张图像的数据集。

title: Personalized and Context-Aware Transformer Models for Predicting Post-Intervention Physiological Responses from Wearable Sensor Data
summary: Consumer wearables enable continuous measurement of physiological data related to stress and recovery, but turning these streams into actionable, personalized stress-management recommendations remains a challenge. In practice, users often do not know how a given intervention, defined as an activity intended to reduce stress, will affect heart rate (HR), heart rate variability (HRV), or inter-beat intervals (BBI) over the next 15 to 120 minutes. We present a framework that predicts post-intervention trajectories and the direction of change for these physiological indicators across time windows. Our methodology combines a Transformer model for multi-horizon trajectories of percent change relative to a pre-intervention baseline, direction-of-change calls (positive, negative, or neutral) at each horizon, and an empirical study using wearable sensor data overlaid with user-tagged events and interventions. This proof of concept shows that personalized post-intervention prediction is feasible. We encourage future integration into stress-management tools for personalized intervention recommendations tailored to each person's day following further validation in larger studies and, where applicable, appropriate regulatory review.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个基于Transformer的框架，用于预测个性化干预后生理指标（心率、心率变异性等）的变化轨迹和方向，为可穿戴设备提供个性化压力管理建议。
AI.motivation: 虽然消费级可穿戴设备能够连续测量与压力和恢复相关的生理数据，但将这些数据流转化为可操作的、个性化的压力管理建议仍然是一个挑战。用户通常不知道特定干预措施（旨在减轻压力的活动）会如何影响未来15-120分钟的心率、心率变异性或心跳间隔。
AI.method: 提出了一个结合Transformer模型的框架：1）预测相对于干预前基线的多时间窗口百分比变化轨迹；2）在每个时间窗口进行变化方向判断（正向、负向或中性）；3）使用可穿戴传感器数据叠加用户标记的事件和干预措施进行实证研究。
AI.result: 概念验证表明，个性化干预后预测是可行的。该框架能够预测干预后生理指标的轨迹和变化方向，为个性化压力管理建议提供了技术基础。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了将个性化干预后预测整合到压力管理工具中的潜力，建议在更大规模研究中进一步验证，并在适用时进行适当的监管审查，最终实现为每个人量身定制的个性化干预建议。

title: A Ray Intersection Algorithm for Fast Growth Distance Computation Between Convex Sets
summary: In this paper, we discuss an efficient algorithm for computing the growth distance between two compact convex sets with representable support functions. The growth distance between two sets is the minimum scaling factor such that the sets intersect when scaled about some center points. Unlike the minimum distance between sets, the growth distance provides a unified measure for set intersection and separation. We first reduce the growth distance problem to an equivalent ray intersection problem on the Minkowski difference set. Then, we propose an algorithm to solve the ray intersection problem by iteratively constructing inner and outer polyhedral approximations of the Minkowski difference set. We show that our algorithm satisfies several key properties, such as primal and dual feasibility and monotone convergence. We provide extensive benchmark results for our algorithm and show that our open-source implementation achieves state-of-the-art performance across a wide variety of convex sets. Finally, we demonstrate robotics applications of our algorithm in motion planning and rigid-body simulation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种计算两个紧凸集之间增长距离的高效算法，通过将问题转化为Minkowski差集上的射线相交问题，并采用内外多面体逼近迭代求解。
AI.motivation: 增长距离为集合相交和分离提供了统一的度量标准，相比最小距离更具一般性。在机器人运动规划和刚体仿真等应用中，需要高效计算凸集之间的增长距离。
AI.method: 首先将增长距离问题转化为Minkowski差集上的射线相交问题，然后通过迭代构造Minkowski差集的内外多面体逼近来求解射线相交问题，算法保证原始和对偶可行性以及单调收敛性。
AI.result: 算法在广泛测试中表现出最先进的性能，开源实现验证了其高效性，并在机器人运动规划和刚体仿真应用中展示了实用价值。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为计算凸集增长距离提供了高效可靠的解决方案，具有理论保证和实际应用价值，特别适用于机器人学中的几何计算问题。

title: CLion: Efficient Cautious Lion Optimizer with Enhanced Generalization
summary:
Lion optimizer is a popular learning-based optimization algorithm in machine learning, which shows impressive performance in training many deep learning models. Although convergence property of the Lion optimizer has been studied, its generalization analysis is still missing. To fill this gap, we study generalization property of the Lion via algorithmic stability based on the mathematical induction. Specifically, we prove that the Lion has a generalization error of $O(\frac{1}{Nτ^T})$, where $N$ is training sample size, and $τ>0$ denotes the smallest absolute value of non-zero element in gradient estimator, and $T$ is the total iteration number. In addition, we obtain an interesting byproduct that the SignSGD algorithm has the same generalization error as the Lion. To enhance generalization of the Lion, we design a novel efficient Cautious Lion (i.e., CLion) optimizer by cautiously using sign function. Moreover, we prove that our CLion has a lower generalization error of $O(\frac{1}{N})$ than $O(\frac{1}{Nτ^T})$ of the Lion, since the parameter $τ$ generally is very small. Meanwhile, we study convergence property of our CLion optimizer, and prove that our CLion has a fast convergence rate of $O(\frac{\sqrt{d}}{T^{1/4}})$ under $\ell_1$-norm of gradient for nonconvex stochastic optimization, where $d$ denotes the model dimension.
  Extensive numerical experiments demonstrate effectiveness of our CLion optimizer.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了Lion优化器的泛化性能，提出了具有更低泛化误差的CLion优化器，并证明了其收敛性。
AI.motivation: 尽管Lion优化器在机器学习中表现出色且其收敛性已被研究，但其泛化分析仍然缺失。本文旨在填补这一空白，研究Lion优化器的泛化特性，并设计具有更好泛化性能的改进版本。
AI.method: 基于数学归纳法，通过算法稳定性分析Lion优化器的泛化性能。设计了一种新颖的CLion优化器，通过谨慎使用符号函数来增强泛化能力。使用理论分析证明了CLion的泛化误差和收敛速率。
AI.result: 证明了Lion优化器的泛化误差为O(1/(Nτ^T))，其中N是训练样本数，τ是梯度估计器中非零元素的最小绝对值，T是总迭代次数。发现SignSGD具有与Lion相同的泛化误差。提出的CLion优化器具有更低的泛化误差O(1/N)，并在非凸随机优化下具有O(√d/T^{1/4})的快速收敛速率。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次对Lion优化器进行了泛化分析，提出了具有更好泛化性能的CLion优化器。理论分析和实验结果表明CLion在保持快速收敛的同时，显著降低了泛化误差，为基于符号的优化算法提供了新的理论见解和改进方案。

title: SceneGlue: Scene-Aware Transformer for Feature Matching without Scene-Level Annotation
summary: Local feature matching plays a critical role in understanding the correspondence between cross-view images. However, traditional methods are constrained by the inherent local nature of feature descriptors, limiting their ability to capture non-local scene information that is essential for accurate cross-view correspondence. In this paper, we introduce SceneGlue, a scene-aware feature matching framework designed to overcome these limitations. SceneGlue leverages a hybridizable matching paradigm that integrates implicit parallel attention and explicit cross-view visibility estimation. The parallel attention mechanism simultaneously exchanges information among local descriptors within and across images, enhancing the scene's global context. To further enrich the scene awareness, we propose the Visibility Transformer, which explicitly categorizes features into visible and invisible regions, providing an understanding of cross-view scene visibility. By combining explicit and implicit scene-level awareness, SceneGlue effectively compensates for the local descriptor constraints. Notably, SceneGlue is trained using only local feature matches, without requiring scene-level groundtruth annotations. This scene-aware approach not only improves accuracy and robustness but also enhances interpretability compared to traditional methods. Extensive experiments on applications such as homography estimation, pose estimation, image matching, and visual localization validate SceneGlue's superior performance. The source code is available at https://github.com/songlin-du/SceneGlue.

AI.tldr: SceneGlue是一个场景感知的特征匹配框架，通过混合匹配范式结合隐式并行注意力和显式跨视图可见性估计，克服传统局部特征描述符的局限性，提升跨视图图像对应关系的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统局部特征匹配方法受限于特征描述符的局部性质，难以捕捉对跨视图对应关系至关重要的非局部场景信息，需要一种能够理解场景全局上下文的方法。
AI.method: 提出SceneGlue框架，采用混合匹配范式：1) 隐式并行注意力机制，在图像内和跨图像间同时交换局部描述符信息以增强全局上下文；2) 显式可见性变换器，将特征分类为可见和不可见区域以理解跨视图场景可见性。
AI.result: SceneGlue在单应性估计、姿态估计、图像匹配和视觉定位等应用中表现出优越性能，仅使用局部特征匹配进行训练，无需场景级标注，在准确性和鲁棒性方面均优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: SceneGlue通过结合显式和隐式场景级感知，有效补偿了局部描述符的局限性，不仅提高了匹配精度和鲁棒性，还增强了可解释性，为跨视图图像对应关系理解提供了有效解决方案。

title: Natural Gradient Gaussian Approximation Filter on Lie Groups for Robot State Estimation
summary: Accurate state estimation for robotic systems evolving on Lie group manifolds, such as legged robots, is a prerequisite for achieving agile control. However, this task is challenged by nonlinear observation models defined on curved manifolds, where existing filters rely on local linearization in the tangent space to handle such nonlinearity, leading to accumulated estimation errors. To address this limitation, we reformulate manifold filtering as a parameter optimization problem over a Gaussian-distributed increment variable, thereby avoiding linearization. Under this formulation, the increment can be mapped to the Lie group through the exponential operator, where it acts multiplicatively on the prior estimate to yield the posterior state. We further propose a natural gradient optimization scheme for solving this problem, whose iteration process leverages the Fisher information matrix of the increment variable to account for the curvature of the tangent space. This results in an iterative algorithm named the Natural Gradient Gaussian Approximation on Lie Groups (NANO-L) filter. Leveraging the perturbation model in Lie derivative, we prove that for the invariant observation model widely adopted in robotic localization tasks, the covariance update in NANO-L admits an exact closed-form solution, eliminating the need for iterative updates thus improving computational efficiency. Hardware experiments on a Unitree GO2 legged robot operating across different terrains demonstrate that NANO-L achieves approximately 40% lower estimation error than commonly used filters at a comparable computational cost.

AI.tldr: 提出NANO-L滤波器：一种基于自然梯度优化的李群状态估计算法，避免局部线性化，在足式机器人上实现约40%的估计误差降低
AI.motivation: 李群流形上的机器人状态估计面临非线性观测模型的挑战，现有滤波器依赖切空间的局部线性化，导致累积估计误差。需要一种避免线性化的精确估计算法。
AI.method: 将流形滤波重新表述为高斯分布增量变量的参数优化问题，通过指数映射将增量映射到李群，提出自然梯度优化方案，利用增量变量的Fisher信息矩阵考虑切空间曲率，得到NANO-L滤波器。对于不变观测模型，协方差更新有精确闭式解。
AI.result: 在Unitree GO2足式机器人不同地形实验中，NANO-L相比常用滤波器实现约40%的估计误差降低，计算成本相当。
AI.conclusion: NANO-L滤波器通过避免线性化和利用自然梯度优化，显著提高了李群流形上机器人状态估计的精度，特别适用于足式机器人等具有不变观测模型的应用场景。

title: Prompt-Driven Code Summarization: A Systematic Literature Review
comment: 42 pages, 9 figures, 10 tables. Systematic Literature Review. This work is currently under review at ACM TOSEM
summary: Software documentation is essential for program comprehension, developer onboarding, code review, and long-term maintenance. Yet producing quality documentation manually is time-consuming and frequently yields incomplete or inconsistent results. Large language models (LLMs) offer a promising solution by automatically generating natural language descriptions from source code, helping developers understand code more efficiently, facilitating maintenance, and supporting downstream activities such as defect localization and commit message generation. However, the effectiveness of LLMs in documentation tasks critically depends on how they are prompted. Properly structured instructions can substantially improve model performance, making prompt engineering-the design of input prompts to guide model behavior-a foundational technique in LLM-based software engineering. Approaches such as few-shot prompting, chain-of-thought reasoning, retrieval-augmented generation, and zero-shot learning show promise for code summarization, yet current research remains fragmented. There is limited understanding of which prompting strategies work best, for which models, and under what conditions. Moreover, evaluation practices vary widely, with most studies relying on overlap-based metrics that may not capture semantic quality. This systematic literature review consolidates existing evidence, categorizes prompting paradigms, examines their effectiveness, and identifies gaps to guide future research and practical adoption.

AI.tldr: 系统综述LLM在代码文档生成中的提示工程方法，分析不同提示策略的有效性、适用条件及评估实践，为未来研究和实践提供指导
AI.motivation: 软件文档对程序理解、开发人员入职、代码审查和长期维护至关重要，但手动编写高质量文档耗时且结果常不完整或不一致。LLM为自动生成代码文档提供了有前景的解决方案，但其效果高度依赖于提示设计，而当前研究碎片化，缺乏对最佳提示策略、适用模型和条件的系统理解，且评估实践差异大。
AI.method: 采用系统文献综述方法，整合现有证据，对提示范式进行分类（如少样本提示、思维链推理、检索增强生成、零样本学习等），分析其在代码摘要任务中的有效性，并考察不同评估实践的优缺点。
AI.result: 综述发现：1) 提示工程是LLM软件工程的基础技术，结构化指令能显著提升模型性能；2) 不同提示策略在不同模型和条件下效果各异，缺乏统一的最佳实践指导；3) 当前评估主要依赖重叠度指标，可能无法充分捕捉语义质量；4) 研究碎片化，需要更系统的评估框架和标准化实践。
AI.conclusion: LLM在代码文档生成中具有重要潜力，但提示工程是关键瓶颈。需要更系统研究不同提示策略的有效性、模型特性和任务条件，开发更全面的评估指标，建立标准化实践，以推动LLM在软件工程中的实际应用。

title: A Multi-Stage Optimization Pipeline for Bethesda Cell Detection in Pap Smear Cytology
comment: ISBI 2026 Accepted Paper & Second Place Solution for the RIVA Cervical Cytology Challenge Track B
summary: Computer vision techniques have advanced significantly in recent years, finding diverse and impactful applications within the medical field. In this paper, we introduce a new framework for the detection of Bethesda cells in Pap smear images, developed for Track B of the Riva Cytology Challenge held in association with the International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI). This work focuses on enhancing computer vision models for cell detection, with performance evaluated using the mAP50-95 metric. We propose a solution based on an ensemble of YOLO and U-Net architectures, followed by a refinement stage utilizing overlap removal techniques and a binary classifier. Our framework achieved second place with a mAP50-95 score of 0.5909 in the competition. The implementation and source code are available at the following repository: github.com/martinamster/riva-trackb

AI.tldr: 提出基于YOLO和U-Net集成的新框架，用于Pap涂片图像中Bethesda细胞检测，在Riva细胞学挑战赛Track B中获得第二名，mAP50-95得分为0.5909
AI.motivation: 计算机视觉技术在医学领域应用日益广泛，特别是在细胞检测方面。本文旨在开发一个用于Pap涂片图像中Bethesda细胞检测的框架，参与Riva细胞学挑战赛Track B，提升计算机视觉模型在细胞检测任务中的性能。
AI.method: 提出基于YOLO和U-Net架构集成的解决方案，包含重叠去除技术和二元分类器的细化阶段。具体采用集成学习策略，结合不同架构的优势，并通过后处理优化检测结果。
AI.result: 在Riva细胞学挑战赛Track B中获得第二名，mAP50-95得分为0.5909，表明该框架在细胞检测任务中具有良好性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的集成框架在Pap涂片细胞检测任务中表现优异，证明了YOLO和U-Net架构结合的有效性，为医学图像分析提供了有价值的解决方案，代码已开源供研究使用。

title: STRONG-VLA: Decoupled Robustness Learning for Vision-Language-Action Models under Multimodal Perturbations
summary: Despite their strong performance in embodied tasks, recent Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models remain highly fragile under multimodal perturbations, where visual corruption and linguistic noise jointly induce distribution shifts that degrade task-level execution. Existing robustness approaches typically rely on joint training with perturbed data, treating robustness as a static objective, which leads to conflicting optimization between robustness and task fidelity. In this work, we propose STRONG-VLA, a decoupled fine-tuning framework that explicitly separates robustness acquisition from task-aligned refinement. In Stage I, the model is exposed to a curriculum of multimodal perturbations with increasing difficulty, enabling progressive robustness learning under controlled distribution shifts. In Stage II, the model is re-aligned with clean task distributions to recover execution fidelity while preserving robustness. We further establish a comprehensive benchmark with 28 perturbation types spanning both textual and visual modalities, grounded in realistic sources of sensor noise, occlusion, and instruction corruption. Extensive experiments on the LIBERO benchmark show that STRONG-VLA consistently improves task success rates across multiple VLA architectures. On OpenVLA, our method achieves gains of up to 12.60% under seen perturbations and 7.77% under unseen perturbations. Notably, similar or larger improvements are observed on OpenVLA-OFT (+14.48% / +13.81%) and pi0 (+16.49% / +5.58%), demonstrating strong cross-architecture generalization. Real-world experiments on an AIRBOT robotic platform further validate its practical effectiveness. These results highlight the importance of decoupled optimization for multimodal robustness and establish STRONG-VLA as a simple yet principled framework for robust embodied control.

AI.tldr: STRONG-VLA提出解耦微调框架，通过两阶段训练分离鲁棒性获取与任务对齐优化，显著提升VLA模型在视觉-语言扰动下的任务执行成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型在多模态扰动（视觉损坏和语言噪声）下表现脆弱，现有鲁棒性方法通常依赖扰动数据联合训练，将鲁棒性视为静态目标，导致鲁棒性与任务保真度之间的优化冲突。
AI.method: 提出STRONG-VLA解耦微调框架：第一阶段通过难度递增的多模态扰动课程学习，实现渐进式鲁棒性获取；第二阶段与干净任务分布重新对齐，恢复执行保真度同时保持鲁棒性。建立包含28种扰动类型的综合基准。
AI.result: 在LIBERO基准测试中，STRONG-VLA显著提升多个VLA架构的任务成功率：OpenVLA在已见扰动下提升12.60%，未见扰动下提升7.77%；OpenVLA-OFT提升14.48%/13.81%；pi0提升16.49%/5.58%。AIRBOT机器人平台实验验证了实际有效性。
AI.conclusion: 解耦优化对多模态鲁棒性至关重要，STRONG-VLA为鲁棒具身控制提供了一个简单而原则性的框架，具有跨架构泛化能力和实际应用价值。

title: Bounded Autonomy for Enterprise AI: Typed Action Contracts and Consumer-Side Execution
summary: Large language models are increasingly used as natural-language interfaces to enterprise software, but their direct use as system operators remains unsafe. Model errors can propagate into unauthorized actions, malformed requests, cross-workspace execution, and other costly failures. We argue this is primarily an execution architecture problem. We present a bounded-autonomy architecture in which language models may interpret intent and propose actions, but all executable behavior is constrained by typed action contracts, permission-aware capability exposure, scoped context, validation before side effects, consumer-side execution boundaries, and optional human approval. The enterprise application remains the source of truth for business logic and authorization, while the orchestration engine operates over an explicit published actions manifest. We evaluate the architecture in a deployed multi-tenant enterprise application across three conditions: manual operation, unconstrained AI with safety layers disabled, and full bounded autonomy. Across 25 scenario trials spanning seven failure families, the bounded-autonomy system completed 23 of 25 tasks with zero unsafe executions, while the unconstrained configuration completed only 17 of 25. Two wrong-entity mutations escaped all consumer-contributed layers; only disambiguation and confirmation mechanisms intercept this class. Both AI conditions delivered 13-18x speedup over manual operation. Critically, removing safety layers made the system less useful: structured validation feedback guided the model to correct outcomes in fewer turns, while the unconstrained system hallucinated success. Several safety properties are structurally enforced by code and intercepted all targeted violations regardless of model output. The result is a practical, deployed architecture for making imperfect language models operationally useful in enterprise systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一种有界自主架构，通过类型化动作契约、权限感知能力暴露、作用域上下文等机制，在保持LLM作为自然语言接口的同时，约束其执行行为，确保企业应用安全。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型作为企业软件的自然语言接口时，直接作为系统操作员存在安全隐患：模型错误可能导致未经授权的操作、格式错误的请求、跨工作空间执行等代价高昂的故障。
AI.method: 采用有界自主架构：语言模型解释意图并提出动作，但所有可执行行为都受类型化动作契约、权限感知能力暴露、作用域上下文、副作用前验证、消费者侧执行边界和可选人工批准的约束。企业应用保持业务逻辑和授权的单一真实来源，编排引擎基于显式发布的操作清单运行。
AI.result: 在部署的多租户企业应用中评估三种条件：手动操作、无约束AI（安全层禁用）和完全有界自主。25个场景试验中，有界自主系统完成23/25任务且零不安全执行，无约束配置仅完成17/25。两种AI条件相比手动操作实现13-18倍加速。移除安全层反而降低系统实用性：结构化验证反馈引导模型以更少轮次达到正确结果，而无约束系统则产生成功幻觉。
AI.conclusion: 该架构通过代码结构性地强制执行多项安全属性，拦截所有目标违规行为，为在企业系统中使用不完美的语言模型提供了一种实用、可部署的架构方案。

title: Towards Multi-Source Domain Generalization for Sleep Staging with Noisy Labels
comment: The benchmark and code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/KNWang970918/FF-TRUST.git
summary: Automatic sleep staging is a multimodal learning problem involving heterogeneous physiological signals such as EEG and EOG, which often suffer from domain shifts across institutions, devices, and populations. In practice, these data are also affected by noisy annotations, yet label-noise-robust multi-source domain generalization remains underexplored. We present the first benchmark for Noisy Labels in Multi-Source Domain-Generalized Sleep Staging (NL-DGSS) and show that existing noisy-label learning methods degrade substantially when domain shifts and label noise coexist. To address this challenge, we propose FF-TRUST, a domain-invariant multimodal sleep staging framework with Joint Time-Frequency Early Learning Regularization (JTF-ELR). By jointly exploiting temporal and spectral consistency together with confidence-diversity regularization, FF-TRUST improves robustness under noisy supervision. Experiments on five public datasets demonstrate consistent state-of-the-art performance under diverse symmetric and asymmetric noise settings. The benchmark and code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/KNWang970918/FF-TRUST.git.

AI.tldr: 提出首个多源域泛化睡眠分期中的噪声标签基准(NL-DGSS)，并开发FF-TRUST框架，通过联合时频早期学习正则化(JTF-ELR)解决域偏移和标签噪声共存问题。
AI.motivation: 自动睡眠分期面临多模态生理信号(如EEG、EOG)的域偏移问题，同时实际数据常受噪声标注影响。现有噪声标签学习方法在域偏移和标签噪声共存时性能显著下降，而这一问题尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 提出FF-TRUST框架，采用联合时频早期学习正则化(JTF-ELR)，同时利用时域和频域一致性以及置信度多样性正则化，增强在噪声监督下的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在五个公共数据集上的实验表明，FF-TRUST在对称和非对称噪声设置下均取得一致的先进性能，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了多源域泛化睡眠分期中噪声标签学习的空白，提出的FF-TRUST框架有效解决了域偏移和标签噪声共存问题，为实际临床应用提供了可靠解决方案。

title: ASTER: Latent Pseudo-Anomaly Generation for Unsupervised Time-Series Anomaly Detection
summary: Time-series anomaly detection (TSAD) is critical in domains such as industrial monitoring, healthcare, and cybersecurity, but it remains challenging due to rare and heterogeneous anomalies and the scarcity of labelled data. This scarcity makes unsupervised approaches predominant, yet existing methods often rely on reconstruction or forecasting, which struggle with complex data, or on embedding-based approaches that require domain-specific anomaly synthesis and fixed distance metrics. We propose ASTER, a framework that generates pseudo-anomalies directly in the latent space, avoiding handcrafted anomaly injections and the need for domain expertise. A latent-space decoder produces tailored pseudo-anomalies to train a Transformer-based anomaly classifier, while a pre-trained LLM enriches the temporal and contextual representations of this space. Experiments on three benchmark datasets show that ASTER achieves state-of-the-art performance and sets a new standard for LLM-based TSAD.

AI.tldr: ASTER框架通过潜在空间生成伪异常，结合预训练LLM增强时序表示，实现无监督时间序列异常检测的SOTA性能
AI.motivation: 时间序列异常检测面临标注数据稀缺、异常罕见且异质性的挑战。现有无监督方法依赖重构或预测，难以处理复杂数据；嵌入方法需要领域特定异常合成和固定距离度量。
AI.method: 提出ASTER框架：1) 在潜在空间直接生成伪异常，避免手工异常注入和领域专业知识需求；2) 潜在空间解码器生成定制伪异常训练Transformer异常分类器；3) 预训练LLM增强潜在空间的时序和上下文表示。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上的实验表明，ASTER实现了最先进的性能，为基于LLM的时间序列异常检测设立了新标准。
AI.conclusion: ASTER通过潜在空间伪异常生成和LLM增强表示，有效解决了无监督时间序列异常检测的挑战，无需领域专业知识或手工异常注入。

title: The Agentification of Scientific Research: A Physicist's Perspective
summary: This article argues that the most important significance of the AI revolution, especially the rise of large language models, lies not simply in automation, but in a fundamental change in how complex information and human know-how are carried, replicated, and shared. From this perspective, AI for Science is especially important because it may transform not only the efficiency of research, but also the structure of scientific collaboration, discovery, publishing, and evaluation. The article outlines a gradual path from AI as a research tool to AI as a scientific collaborator, and discusses how AI is likely to fundamentally reshape scientific publication. It also argues that continuous learning and diversity of ideas are essential if AI is to play a meaningful role in original scientific discovery.

AI.tldr: AI革命的核心意义在于改变复杂信息和人类知识的承载、复制与共享方式，而AI for Science将不仅提升研究效率，更将重塑科学合作、发现、出版与评估的结构。
AI.motivation: 本文旨在探讨AI革命（特别是大语言模型）的真正意义，强调其不仅在于自动化，更在于从根本上改变复杂信息和人类知识的承载、复制与共享方式。特别关注AI for Science领域，因为它可能彻底改变科学研究的方式和结构。
AI.method: 文章采用理论分析框架，从AI作为研究工具到科学合作者的渐进路径进行阐述，探讨AI如何重塑科学出版体系，并论证持续学习和思想多样性对于AI在原创科学发现中发挥有意义作用的重要性。
AI.result: 提出了AI革命的核心价值在于知识承载和共享方式的根本性转变，而非简单的自动化。特别指出AI for Science将深刻影响科学研究的结构，包括合作模式、发现过程、出版体系和评估机制。
AI.conclusion: AI革命最重要的意义在于改变知识和信息的承载与共享方式，AI for Science将重塑科学研究的整个生态系统。要使AI在原创科学发现中发挥真正作用，必须确保其具备持续学习能力和思想多样性。

title: GPU-Accelerated Continuous-Time Successive Convexification for Contact-Implicit Legged Locomotion
summary: Contact-implicit trajectory optimization (CITO) enables the automatic discovery of contact sequences, but most methods rely on fine time discretization to capture all contact events accurately, which increases problem size and runtime while tying solution quality to grid resolution. We extend the recently proposed sequential convex programming (SCP) approach for trajectory optimization, continuous-time successive convexification (ct-SCvx), to CITO by introducing integral cross-complementarity constraints, which eliminate the risk of missing contact events between discretization nodes while preserving the flexibility of contact mode changes. The resulting framework, contact-implicit successive convexification (ci-SCvx), models full multibody dynamics in maximal coordinates, including stick-slip friction and partially elastic impacts. To handle complementarity constraints, we embed a backtracking homotopy scheme within SCP for reliable convergence. We implement this framework in a stand-alone Python software, leveraging JAX for GPU acceleration and a custom canonical-form parser for the convex subproblems of SCP to avoid the overhead of general-purpose modeling tools such as CVXPY. We demonstrate ci-SCvx on diverse legged-locomotion tasks. In particular, we validate the approach in MuJoCo with the Gymnasium HalfCheetah model against the MuJoCo MPC baseline, showing that a tracking simulation with the optimized torque profiles from ci-SCvx produces physically consistent trajectories with lesser energy consumption. We also show that the resulting software achieves faster solve times than existing state-of-the-art SCP implementations by over an order of magnitude, thereby demonstrating a practically important contribution to scalable real-time trajectory optimization.

AI.tldr: 提出ci-SCvx框架，将连续时间逐次凸化方法扩展到接触隐式轨迹优化，通过积分交叉互补约束避免离散化节点间接触事件丢失，实现更高效的求解。
AI.motivation: 传统接触隐式轨迹优化方法依赖精细时间离散化来准确捕捉接触事件，这增加了问题规模和求解时间，同时将解的质量与网格分辨率绑定。需要一种既能准确处理接触事件又能保持计算效率的方法。
AI.method: 扩展连续时间逐次凸化方法到接触隐式轨迹优化，引入积分交叉互补约束来避免离散化节点间接触事件丢失。采用回溯同伦方案处理互补约束，在JAX中实现GPU加速，使用自定义规范形式解析器避免通用建模工具开销。
AI.result: 在多种足式运动任务上验证了ci-SCvx的有效性。与MuJoCo MPC基线相比，优化的扭矩配置文件在跟踪模拟中产生物理一致的轨迹且能耗更低。求解速度比现有最先进的SCP实现快一个数量级以上。
AI.conclusion: ci-SCvx框架通过积分交叉互补约束成功解决了接触隐式轨迹优化中的离散化问题，实现了更高效的求解，为可扩展的实时轨迹优化做出了重要贡献。

title: CableTract: A Co-Designed Cable-Driven Field Robot for Low-Compaction, Off-Grid Capable Agriculture
summary: Conventional field operations spend most of their energy moving the tractor body, not the implement. Yet feasibility studies for novel agricultural vehicles rarely tie mechanics, energy harvest, draft, field geometry, economics, life-cycle CO2, and uncertainty quantification together on a single reproducible code path. This paper builds such a framework and applies it to CableTract, a two-module cable-driven field robot. A stationary Main Unit (winch + motor + battery + harvester module) (MU) and a lighter Anchor module (held by helical screw piles) tension a cable across a strip while a lightweight implement carriage rolls along it. The heavy bodies stay on the headland; only the carriage enters the field. The carriage runs a 10-implement library co-designed for the cable architecture. This co-design is the paper's central analytical lever. The framework is prototype-free. It chains a catenary cable model, a drivetrain efficiency chain, a stochastic draft model fitted to the co-designed library, an hourly solar + wind + battery simulator on six sites, a polygon coverage planner on a 50-field corpus, a contact-pressure compaction model, a discounted cash-flow economics engine with battery replacement and life-cycle CO2, and a global sensitivity analysis on 20 inputs. An operating-envelope sweep and an architectural-variant comparison close the loop. The full implementation is open source. Applied to the codesigned reference, the framework yields energy, compaction advantages and potential off-grid operation.

AI.tldr: 提出一个综合框架分析农业机器人CableTract，该机器人使用电缆驱动系统，将重型主体留在田头，仅轻量工具架进入田间，通过协同设计工具库实现能源、压实等优势。
AI.motivation: 传统田间作业大部分能量用于移动拖拉机本体而非农具，现有新型农业车辆可行性研究缺乏将力学、能源收集、牵引力、田间几何、经济学、生命周期CO2和不确定性量化整合到单一可复现代码路径的综合框架。
AI.method: 构建原型无关的综合分析框架，包含悬链线电缆模型、传动效率链、基于协同设计工具库的随机牵引力模型、六站点小时级太阳能+风能+电池模拟器、50个田块的多边形覆盖规划器、接触压力压实模型、含电池更换和生命周期CO2的折现现金流经济引擎、20个输入的全局敏感性分析，最后进行运行包络扫描和架构变体比较。
AI.result: 应用于协同设计的参考系统，该框架显示出能源优势、压实优势以及潜在的离网运行能力，完整实现已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过构建综合框架分析CableTract电缆驱动农业机器人，证明了协同设计工具库作为核心分析杠杆的有效性，展示了该架构在能源效率、土壤压实减少和潜在离网运行方面的优势。

title: Blind Bitstream-corrupted Video Recovery via Metadata-guided Diffusion Model
summary: Bitstream-corrupted video recovery aims to restore realistic content degraded during video storage or transmission. Existing methods typically assume that predefined masks of corrupted regions are available, but manually annotating these masks is labor-intensive and impractical in real-world scenarios. To address this limitation, we introduce a new blind video recovery setting that removes the reliance on predefined masks. This setting presents two major challenges: accurately identifying corrupted regions and recovering content from extensive and irregular degradations. We propose a Metadata-Guided Diffusion Model (M-GDM) to tackle these challenges. Specifically, intrinsic video metadata are leveraged as corruption indicators through a dual-stream metadata encoder that separately embeds motion vectors and frame types before fusing them into a unified representation. This representation interacts with corrupted latent features via cross-attention at each diffusion step. To preserve intact regions, we design a prior-driven mask predictor that generates pseudo masks using both metadata and diffusion priors, enabling the separation and recombination of intact and recovered regions through hard masking. To mitigate boundary artifacts caused by imperfect masks, a post-refinement module enhances consistency between intact and recovered regions. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method and its superiority in blind video recovery. Code is available at: https://github.com/Shuyun-Wang/M-GDM.

AI.tldr: 提出M-GDM方法解决比特流损坏视频的盲恢复问题，无需预定义掩码，利用元数据指导扩散模型识别损坏区域并恢复内容
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖预定义的损坏区域掩码，但手动标注掩码耗时且不切实际，需要开发无需掩码的盲视频恢复方法
AI.method: 提出元数据引导的扩散模型(M-GDM)：1) 双流元数据编码器利用运动矢量和帧类型作为损坏指示器；2) 先验驱动的掩码预测器生成伪掩码；3) 后细化模块减少边界伪影
AI.result: 大量实验证明该方法在盲视频恢复中的有效性，代码已开源
AI.conclusion: M-GDM成功解决了无需预定义掩码的盲视频恢复问题，在准确识别损坏区域和恢复内容方面表现出色

title: DINO_4D: Semantic-Aware 4D Reconstruction
summary: In the intersection of computer vision and robotic perception, 4D reconstruction of dynamic scenes serve as the critical bridge connecting low-level geometric sensing with high-level semantic understanding. We present DINO\_4D, introducing frozen DINOv3 features as structural priors, injecting semantic awareness into the reconstruction process to effectively suppress semantic drift during dynamic tracking. Experiments on the Point Odyssey and TUM-Dynamics benchmarks demonstrate that our method maintains the linear time complexity $O(T)$ of its predecessors while significantly improving Tracking Accuracy (APD) and Reconstruction Completeness. DINO\_4D establishes a new paradigm for constructing 4D World Models that possess both geometric precision and semantic understanding.

AI.tldr: DINO_4D利用冻结的DINOv3特征作为结构先验，将语义感知注入动态场景4D重建过程，有效抑制语义漂移，在保持线性时间复杂度的同时显著提升跟踪精度和重建完整性。
AI.motivation: 在计算机视觉与机器人感知的交叉领域，动态场景的4D重建是连接低层几何感知与高层语义理解的关键桥梁。现有方法在动态跟踪过程中容易发生语义漂移，需要引入语义感知来提升重建质量。
AI.method: 提出DINO_4D方法，引入冻结的DINOv3特征作为结构先验，将语义感知注入重建过程。该方法在保持前驱方法线性时间复杂度O(T)的同时，通过语义特征有效抑制动态跟踪过程中的语义漂移。
AI.result: 在Point Odyssey和TUM-Dynamics基准测试上的实验表明，该方法在保持线性时间复杂度的同时，显著提高了跟踪精度(APD)和重建完整性，建立了新的性能标准。
AI.conclusion: DINO_4D为构建兼具几何精度和语义理解的4D世界模型建立了新范式，通过语义先验的注入有效解决了动态场景重建中的语义漂移问题。

title: DEEP-GAP: Deep-learning Evaluation of Execution Parallelism in GPU Architectural Performance
comment: 16 pages, 42 figures. Evaluation of inference performance on NVIDIA T4 and L4 GPUs across precision modes (FP32, FP16, INT8)
summary:
Modern datacenters increasingly rely on low-power, single-slot inference accelerators to balance performance, energy efficiency, and rack density constraints. The NVIDIA T4 GPU has become widely deployed due to strong performance per watt and mature software support. Its successor, the NVIDIA L4 GPU, introduces improvements in Tensor Core throughput, cache capacity, memory bandwidth, and parallel execution capability. However, limited empirical evidence quantifies the practical inference performance gap between these two generations under controlled and reproducible conditions.
  This work introduces DEEP-GAP, a systematic evaluation extending the GDEV-AI methodology to GPU inference. Using identical configurations and workloads, we evaluate ResNet18, ResNet50, and ResNet101 across FP32, FP16, and INT8 precision modes using PyTorch and TensorRT.
  Results show that reduced precision significantly improves performance, with INT8 achieving up to 58x throughput improvement over CPU baselines. L4 achieves up to 4.4x higher throughput than T4 while reaching peak efficiency at smaller batch sizes between 16 and 32, improving latency-throughput tradeoffs for latency-sensitive workloads. T4 remains competitive for large batch workloads where cost or power efficiency is important.
  DEEP-GAP provides practical guidance for selecting precision modes, batch sizes, and GPU architectures for modern inference deployments.

AI.tldr: DEEP-GAP系统评估了NVIDIA T4和L4 GPU在推理性能上的差异，发现L4在吞吐量上比T4提升高达4.4倍，在较小批量（16-32）时达到峰值效率，而T4在大批量工作负载中仍具竞争力。
AI.motivation: 现代数据中心越来越多地采用低功耗、单槽推理加速器来平衡性能、能效和机架密度约束。虽然NVIDIA T4 GPU因出色的性能功耗比和成熟的软件支持而广泛部署，其继任者L4 GPU在张量核心吞吐量、缓存容量、内存带宽和并行执行能力方面都有改进，但缺乏在受控和可重复条件下量化两代GPU实际推理性能差距的实证证据。
AI.method: 本研究引入了DEEP-GAP，这是一个系统评估框架，扩展了GDEV-AI方法到GPU推理领域。在相同配置和工作负载下，评估了ResNet18、ResNet50和ResNet101模型在FP32、FP16和INT8精度模式下使用PyTorch和TensorRT的性能表现。
AI.result: 结果显示：1）降低精度显著提升性能，INT8相比CPU基准实现高达58倍的吞吐量提升；2）L4相比T4实现高达4.4倍的吞吐量提升；3）L4在较小批量大小（16-32）时达到峰值效率，改善了延迟敏感工作负载的延迟-吞吐量权衡；4）T4在大批量工作负载中仍保持竞争力，特别是在成本或能效重要的情况下。
AI.conclusion: DEEP-GAP为现代推理部署提供了选择精度模式、批量大小和GPU架构的实用指导。L4在延迟敏感场景中表现更优，而T4在大批量工作负载中仍具价值，特别是在考虑成本效益的情况下。

title: Rethinking Image-to-3D Generation with Sparse Queries: Efficiency, Capacity, and Input-View Bias
summary: We present SparseGen, a novel framework for efficient image-to-3D generation, which exhibits low input-view bias while being significantly faster. Unlike traditional approaches that rely on dense volumetric grids, triplanes, or pixel-aligned primitives, we model scenes with a compact sparse set of learned 3D anchor queries and a learned expansion operator that decodes each transformed query into a small local set of 3D Gaussian primitives. Trained under a rectified-flow reconstruction objective without 3D supervision, our model learns to allocate representation capacity where geometry and appearance matter, achieving significant reductions in memory and inference time while preserving multi-view fidelity. We introduce quantitative measures of input-view bias and utilization to show that sparse queries reduce overfitting to conditioning views while being representationally efficient. Our results argue that sparse set-latent expansion is a principled, practical alternative for efficient 3D generative modeling.

AI.tldr: SparseGen：一种基于稀疏3D锚点查询和扩展算子的高效图像到3D生成框架，显著降低输入视角偏差并大幅提升速度
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖密集体积网格、三平面或像素对齐基元，存在内存占用大、推理时间长、容易过拟合输入视角的问题，需要更高效且减少视角偏差的3D生成方案
AI.method: 使用紧凑的稀疏学习3D锚点查询集和扩展算子，将每个变换后的查询解码为局部3D高斯基元集合；在无3D监督的整流流重建目标下训练，学习在几何和外观重要的区域分配表示能力
AI.result: 显著减少内存占用和推理时间，同时保持多视角保真度；引入输入视角偏差和利用率量化指标，证明稀疏查询减少对条件视角的过拟合，同时保持表示效率
AI.conclusion: 稀疏集合潜在扩展是高效3D生成建模的原理性、实用替代方案，为图像到3D生成提供了更高效且减少视角偏差的新范式

title: VeriGraphi: A Multi-Agent Framework of Hierarchical RTL Generation for Large Hardware Designs
summary: Generating synthesizable Verilog for large, hierarchical hardware designs remains a significant challenge for large language models (LLMs), which struggle to replicate the structured reasoning that human experts employ when translating complex specifications into RTL. When tasked with producing hierarchical Verilog, LLMs frequently lose context across modules, hallucinate interfaces, fabricate inter-module wiring, and fail to maintain structural coherence - failures that intensify as design complexity grows and specifications involve informal prose, figures, and tables that resist direct operationalization. To address these challenges, we present VeriGraphi, a framework that introduces a spec-anchored Knowledge Graph as the architectural substrate driving the RTL generation pipeline. VeriGraphi constructs a HDA, a structured knowledge graph that explicitly encodes module hierarchy, port-level interfaces, wiring semantics, and inter-module dependencies as first-class graph entities and relations. Built through iterative multi-agent analysis of the specification, this Knowledge Graph provides a deterministic, machine-checkable structural scaffold before code generation. Guided by the KG, a progressive coding module incrementally generates pseudo-code and synthesizable RTL while enforcing interface consistency and dependency correctness at each submodule stage. We evaluate VeriGraphi on a benchmark of three representative specification documents from the National Institute of Standards and Technology and their corresponding implementations, and we present a RV32I processor as a detailed case study to illustrate the full pipeline. The results demonstrate that VeriGraphi enables reliable hierarchical RTL generation with minimal human intervention for RISC-V, marking a significant milestone for LLM-generated hardware design while maintaining strong functional correctness.

AI.tldr: VeriGraphi框架通过构建规范锚定的知识图谱来指导LLM生成可综合的层次化Verilog，解决了LLM在复杂硬件设计中的上下文丢失、接口幻觉和结构一致性等问题。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在生成层次化Verilog时面临重大挑战：难以复制人类专家的结构化推理能力，经常在模块间丢失上下文、产生接口幻觉、虚构模块间连线，且随着设计复杂度增加和规范涉及非正式文本、图表时，这些问题更加严重。
AI.method: 提出VeriGraphi框架，引入规范锚定的知识图谱作为RTL生成管道的架构基础。通过多智能体迭代分析规范构建HDA（结构化知识图谱），显式编码模块层次、端口级接口、连线语义和模块间依赖关系。基于知识图谱，渐进式编码模块逐步生成伪代码和可综合RTL，在每个子模块阶段强制实施接口一致性和依赖正确性。
AI.result: 在NIST的三个代表性规范文档及其对应实现上进行评估，并以RV32I处理器作为详细案例研究展示完整流程。结果表明VeriGraphi能够以最少人工干预可靠地生成RISC-V的层次化RTL，在保持强功能正确性的同时，标志着LLM生成硬件设计的重大里程碑。
AI.conclusion: VeriGraphi通过知识图谱驱动的结构化方法，成功解决了LLM在复杂硬件设计中的关键限制，实现了可靠、一致的层次化RTL生成，为LLM在硬件设计领域的应用开辟了新途径。

title: SynHAT: A Two-stage Coarse-to-Fine Diffusion Framework for Synthesizing Human Activity Traces
summary: Human activity traces (HATs) are critical for many applications, including human mobility modeling and point-of-interest (POI) recommendation. However, growing privacy concerns have severely limited access to authentic large-scale HAT datasets. Recent advances in generative AI provide new opportunities to synthesize realistic and privacy-preserving HATs for such applications. Yet two major challenges remain: (i) HATs are highly irregular and dynamic, with long and varying time intervals, making it difficult to capture their complex spatio-temporal dependencies and underlying distributions; and (ii) generative models are often computationally expensive, making long-term, fine-grained HAT synthesis inefficient. To address these challenges, we propose SynHAT, a computationally efficient coarse-to-fine HAT synthesis framework built on a novel spatio-temporal denoising diffusion model. In Stage 1, we develop Coarse-HADiff, which models the overall spatio-temporal dependencies of coarse-grained latent spatio-temporal traces. It incorporates a novel Latent Spatio-Temporal U-Net with dual Drift-Jitter branches to jointly model smooth spatial transitions and temporal variations during denoising. In Stage 2, we introduce a three-step pipeline consisting of Behavior Pattern Extraction, Fine-HADiff, which shares the same architecture as Coarse-HADiff, and Semantic Alignment to generate fine-grained latent spatio-temporal traces from the Stage 1 outputs. We extensively evaluate SynHAT in terms of data fidelity, utility, privacy, robustness, and scalability. Experiments on real-world HAT datasets from four cities across three countries show that SynHAT substantially outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving 52% and 33% improvements on spatial and temporal metrics, respectively.

AI.tldr: SynHAT：基于扩散模型的粗到细人类活动轨迹合成框架，解决真实HAT数据隐私限制问题，通过两阶段方法高效生成保真、隐私保护的活动轨迹
AI.motivation: 人类活动轨迹对许多应用至关重要，但隐私问题限制了真实大规模数据集的可访问性。现有生成方法面临两大挑战：HAT的高度不规则性和动态性难以建模复杂时空依赖；生成模型计算成本高，导致细粒度合成效率低下。
AI.method: 提出SynHAT两阶段框架：1) Coarse-HADiff：使用具有双Drift-Jitter分支的潜在时空U-Net建模粗粒度潜在时空轨迹的整体时空依赖；2) 三步流程：行为模式提取、Fine-HADiff（与Coarse-HADiff相同架构）和语义对齐，从第一阶段输出生成细粒度潜在时空轨迹。
AI.result: 在来自三个国家四个城市的真实HAT数据集上评估，SynHAT在数据保真度、实用性、隐私性、鲁棒性和可扩展性方面显著优于现有基线方法，空间和时间指标分别提升52%和33%。
AI.conclusion: SynHAT通过新颖的粗到细扩散模型框架，有效解决了人类活动轨迹合成中的不规则性、动态性和计算效率问题，为隐私保护下的大规模HAT生成提供了高效解决方案。

title: Perception Is All You Need: A Neuroscience Framework for Low Cost Sensorless Gaze in HRI
summary: Gaze-following in child-robot interaction improves attention, recall, and learning, but requires expensive platforms (\$30,000+), sensors, algorithms, and raises privacy concerns. We propose a framework that avoids sensors and computation entirely, instead relying on the human visual system's assumption of convexity to produce perceptual gaze-following between a robot and its viewer. Specifically, we motivate sub-dollar cardboard robot design that directly implements the brain's own gaze computation pipeline in reverse, making the viewer's perceptual system the robot's "actuator", with no sensors, no power, and no privacy concerns. We ground this framework in three converging lines of theoretical and empirical neuroscience evidence. Namely, the distributed face processing network that computes gaze direction via the superior temporal sulcus, the high-precision convexity prior that causes the brain to perceive concave faces as convex, and the predictive processing hierarchy in which top-down face knowledge overrides bottom-up depth signals. These mechanisms explain why a concave eye socket with a painted pupil produces the perception of mutual gaze from any viewing angle. We derive design constraints from perceptual science, present a sub-dollar open-template robot with parameterized interchangeable eye inserts, and identify boundary conditions (developmental, clinical, and geometric) that predict where the framework will succeed and where it will fail. If leveraged, two decades of HRI gaze findings become deliverable at population scale.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需传感器和计算的低成本机器人设计框架，利用人类视觉系统的凸性先验实现感知性注视跟随，成本低于1美元
AI.motivation: 传统机器人注视跟随技术昂贵（3万美元以上）、需要复杂传感器和算法、存在隐私问题，限制了在儿童教育等场景的大规模应用
AI.method: 利用人类视觉系统的凸性先验，设计凹形眼窝和绘制瞳孔的纸板机器人，使大脑将凹面感知为凸面，实现从任何视角都能产生相互注视的感知效果
AI.result: 开发了低于1美元的开源模板机器人，具有参数化可互换眼睛插入件，基于神经科学理论解释了其工作原理，并确定了发展、临床和几何边界条件
AI.conclusion: 该框架使20年的人机交互注视研究成果能够以人口规模交付，无需传感器、电源或隐私担忧，为大规模教育应用提供了可行方案

title: VoxSafeBench: Not Just What Is Said, but Who, How, and Where
summary: As speech language models (SLMs) transition from personal devices into shared, multi-user environments, their responses must account for far more than the words alone. Who is speaking, how they sound, and where the conversation takes place can each turn an otherwise benign request into one that is unsafe, unfair, or privacy-violating. Existing benchmarks, however, largely focus on basic audio comprehension, study individual risks in isolation, or conflate content that is inherently harmful with content that only becomes problematic due to its acoustic context. We introduce VoxSafeBench, among the first benchmarks to jointly evaluate social alignment in SLMs across three dimensions: safety, fairness, and privacy. VoxSafeBench adopts a Two-Tier design: Tier1 evaluates content-centric risks using matched text and audio inputs, while Tier2 targets audio-conditioned risks in which the transcript is benign but the appropriate response hinges on the speaker, paralinguistic cues, or the surrounding environment. To validate Tier2, we include intermediate perception probes and confirm that frontier SLMs can successfully detect these acoustic cues yet still fail to act on them appropriately. Across 22 tasks with bilingual coverage, we find that safeguards appearing robust on text often degrade in speech: safety awareness drops for speaker- and scene-conditioned risks, fairness erodes when demographic differences are conveyed vocally, and privacy protections falter when contextual cues arrive acoustically. Together, these results expose a pervasive speech grounding gap: current SLMs frequently recognize the relevant social norm in text but fail to apply it when the decisive cue must be grounded in speech. Code and data are publicly available at: https://amphionteam.github.io/VoxSafeBench_demopage/

AI.tldr: VoxSafeBench是一个评估语音语言模型在社会对齐方面的基准测试，重点关注安全性、公平性和隐私性，采用双层设计分别评估内容中心风险和音频条件风险。
AI.motivation: 随着语音语言模型从个人设备扩展到多用户共享环境，其响应需要考虑更多因素：说话者身份、声音特征和对话环境都可能使原本良性的请求变得不安全、不公平或侵犯隐私。现有基准主要关注基本音频理解能力，孤立研究个别风险，或将固有有害内容与因声学上下文而变得有问题的内容混为一谈。
AI.method: VoxSafeBench采用双层设计：Tier1使用匹配的文本和音频输入评估内容中心风险；Tier2针对音频条件风险，其中转录文本是良性的，但适当响应取决于说话者、副语言线索或周围环境。基准包含22个任务，支持双语覆盖，并包含中间感知探针来验证Tier2。
AI.result: 研究发现：1) 在文本上看似稳健的安全措施在语音中经常退化；2) 对于说话者和场景条件风险，安全意识下降；3) 当人口统计学差异通过声音传达时，公平性受到侵蚀；4) 当上下文线索以声学方式到达时，隐私保护失效。前沿语音语言模型能够成功检测这些声学线索，但未能适当地据此行动。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了普遍的语音接地差距：当前语音语言模型经常在文本中识别相关社会规范，但当决定性线索必须基于语音接地面时却无法应用。这表明需要开发能够更好地将声学上下文与社会对齐考虑相结合的语音语言模型。

title: PostureObjectstitch: Anomaly Image Generation Considering Assembly Relationships in Industrial Scenarios
summary: Image generation technology can synthesize condition-specific images to supplement real-world industrial anomaly data and enhance anomaly detection model performance. Existing generation techniques rarely account for the pose and orientation of industrial components in assembly, making the generated images difficult to utilize for downstream application. To solve this, we propose a novel image synthesis approach, called PostureObjectStitch, that achieves accurate generation to meet the requirement of industrial assembly. A condition decoupling approach is introduced to separate input multi-view images into high-frequency, texture, and RGB features. The feature temporal modulation mechanism adapts these features across diffusion model time-steps, enabling progressive generation from coarse to fine details while maintaining consistency. To ensure semantic accuracy, we introduce a conditional loss that enhances critical industrial elements and a geometric prior that guides component positioning for correct assembly relationships. Comprehensive experimental results on the MureCom dataset, our newly contributed DreamAssembly dataset, and the downstream application validate the outstanding performance of our method.

AI.tldr: 提出PostureObjectStitch方法，通过条件解耦和特征时序调制实现工业组件姿态和方向准确的图像合成，补充工业异常检测数据
AI.motivation: 现有图像生成技术很少考虑工业组件在装配中的姿态和方向，导致生成的图像难以用于下游应用，需要解决工业装配需求
AI.method: 1) 条件解耦方法将多视角图像分离为高频、纹理和RGB特征；2) 特征时序调制机制在不同扩散模型时间步中适配这些特征，实现从粗到细的渐进生成；3) 引入条件损失增强关键工业元素，几何先验指导组件定位确保正确装配关系
AI.result: 在MureCom数据集、新贡献的DreamAssembly数据集和下游应用上的综合实验结果验证了方法的优异性能
AI.conclusion: PostureObjectStitch方法能够准确生成满足工业装配要求的图像，有效补充工业异常检测数据并提升模型性能

title: CAMO: An Agentic Framework for Automated Causal Discovery from Micro Behaviors to Macro Emergence in LLM Agent Simulations
summary: LLM-empowered agent simulations are increasingly used to study social emergence, yet the micro-to-macro causal mechanisms behind macro outcomes often remain unclear. This is challenging because emergence arises from intertwined agent interactions and meso-level feedback and nonlinearity, making generative mechanisms hard to disentangle. To this end, we introduce \textbf{\textsc{CAMO}}, an automated \textbf{Ca}usal discovery framework from \textbf{M}icr\textbf{o} behaviors to \textbf{M}acr\textbf{o} Emergence in LLM agent simulations. \textsc{CAMO} converts mechanistic hypotheses into computable factors grounded in simulation records and learns a compact causal representation centered on an emergent target $Y$. \textsc{CAMO} outputs a computable Markov boundary and a minimal upstream explanatory subgraph, yielding interpretable causal chains and actionable intervention levers. It also uses simulator-internal counterfactual probing to orient ambiguous edges and revise hypotheses when evidence contradicts the current view. Experiments across four emergent settings demonstrate the promise of \textsc{CAMO}.

AI.tldr: CAMO是一个从微观行为到宏观涌现的自动因果发现框架，用于LLM智能体模拟，通过将机制假设转化为可计算因素，学习以涌现目标为中心的紧凑因果表示。
AI.motivation: LLM赋能的智能体模拟越来越多地用于研究社会涌现现象，但宏观结果背后的微观到宏观因果机制往往不清晰。涌现源于相互交织的智能体交互、中观层面反馈和非线性，使得生成机制难以解耦。
AI.method: CAMO将机制假设转化为基于模拟记录的可计算因素，学习以涌现目标Y为中心的紧凑因果表示。它输出可计算的马尔可夫边界和最小上游解释子图，产生可解释的因果链和可操作的干预杠杆。还使用模拟器内部反事实探测来定向模糊边，并在证据与当前观点矛盾时修正假设。
AI.result: 在四个涌现设置上的实验证明了CAMO的潜力。
AI.conclusion: CAMO为LLM智能体模拟中的涌现现象提供了自动化的因果发现框架，能够揭示微观行为到宏观结果的因果机制，并支持可解释的干预策略。

title: Predicting Post-Traumatic Epilepsy from Clinical Records using Large Language Model Embeddings
summary: Objective: Post-traumatic epilepsy (PTE) is a debilitating neurological disorder that develops after traumatic brain injury (TBI). Early prediction of PTE remains challenging due to heterogeneous clinical data, limited positive cases, and reliance on resource-intensive neuroimaging data. We investigate whether routinely collected acute clinical records alone can support early PTE prediction using language model-based approaches. Methods: Using a curated subset of the TRACK-TBI cohort, we developed an automated PTE prediction framework that implements pretrained large language models (LLMs) as fixed feature extractors to encode clinical records. Tabular features, LLM-generated embeddings, and hybrid feature representations were evaluated using gradient-boosted tree classifiers under stratified cross-validation. Results: LLM embeddings achieved performance improvements by capturing contextual clinical information compared to using tabular features alone. The best performance was achieved by a modality-aware feature fusion strategy combining tabular features and LLM embeddings, achieving an AUC-ROC of 0.892 and AUPRC of 0.798. Acute post-traumatic seizures, injury severity, neurosurgical intervention, and ICU stay are key contributors to the predictive performance. Significance: These findings demonstrate that routine acute clinical records contain information suitable for early PTE risk prediction using LLM embeddings in conjunction with gradient-boosted tree classifiers. This approach represents a promising complement to imaging-based prediction.

AI.tldr: 使用预训练大语言模型编码临床记录，结合梯度提升树分类器实现创伤后癫痫早期预测，AUC-ROC达0.892
AI.motivation: 创伤后癫痫（PTE）是创伤性脑损伤后的严重并发症，早期预测面临临床数据异质性、阳性病例有限、依赖资源密集型神经影像数据等挑战。研究探索仅使用常规收集的急性期临床记录能否支持早期PTE预测。
AI.method: 使用TRACK-TBI队列的精选子集，开发自动化PTE预测框架：1）将预训练大语言模型作为固定特征提取器编码临床记录；2）评估表格特征、LLM生成嵌入和混合特征表示；3）在分层交叉验证下使用梯度提升树分类器进行预测。
AI.result: LLM嵌入通过捕捉上下文临床信息，相比单独使用表格特征实现了性能提升。最佳性能通过结合表格特征和LLM嵌入的模态感知特征融合策略实现：AUC-ROC为0.892，AUPRC为0.798。急性创伤后癫痫发作、损伤严重程度、神经外科干预和ICU住院是关键预测因素。
AI.conclusion: 常规急性期临床记录包含适合早期PTE风险预测的信息，使用LLM嵌入结合梯度提升树分类器的方法具有可行性。该方法是影像学预测的有前景的补充，为资源有限环境下的PTE早期识别提供了新途径。

title: Any3DAvatar: Fast and High-Quality Full-Head 3D Avatar Reconstruction from Single Portrait Image
summary: Reconstructing a complete 3D head from a single portrait remains challenging because existing methods still face a sharp quality-speed trade-off: high-fidelity pipelines often rely on multi-stage processing and per-subject optimization, while fast feed-forward models struggle with complete geometry and fine appearance details. To bridge this gap, we propose Any3DAvatar, a fast and high-quality method for single-image 3D Gaussian head avatar generation, whose fastest setting reconstructs a full head in under one second while preserving high-fidelity geometry and texture.
