First, we build AnyHead, a unified data suite that combines identity diversity, dense multi-view supervision, and realistic accessories, filling the main gaps of existing head data in coverage, full-head geometry, and complex appearance. Second, rather than sampling unstructured noise, we initialize from a Plücker-aware structured 3D Gaussian scaffold and perform one-step conditional denoising, formulating full-head reconstruction into a single forward pass while retaining high fidelity. Third, we introduce auxiliary view-conditioned appearance supervision on the same latent tokens alongside 3D Gaussian reconstruction, improving novel-view texture details at zero extra inference cost. Experiments show that Any3DAvatar outperforms prior single-image full-head reconstruction methods in rendering fidelity while remaining substantially faster.

AI.tldr: Any3DAvatar：一种快速高质量的单图像3D高斯头像生成方法，最快可在1秒内重建完整头部，同时保持高保真几何和纹理
AI.motivation: 现有单图像3D头部重建方法面临质量与速度的权衡：高保真方法依赖多阶段处理和逐主题优化，而快速前馈模型难以实现完整几何和精细外观细节
AI.method: 1) 构建AnyHead统一数据集，结合身份多样性、密集多视角监督和真实配饰；2) 从Plücker感知的结构化3D高斯支架初始化，执行一步条件去噪，将全头重建转化为单次前向传递；3) 在相同潜在标记上引入辅助视角条件外观监督，提升新视角纹理细节
AI.result: Any3DAvatar在渲染保真度上优于现有单图像全头重建方法，同时保持显著更快的速度（最快设置下1秒内完成重建）
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过统一数据集、结构化高斯支架初始化和辅助外观监督，成功实现了高质量与快速重建的平衡，为单图像3D头像生成提供了有效解决方案

title: M2-PALE: A Framework for Explaining Multi-Agent MCTS--Minimax Hybrids via Process Mining and LLMs
summary: Monte-Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) is a fundamental sampling-based search algorithm widely used for online planning in sequential decision-making domains. Despite its success in driving recent advances in artificial intelligence, understanding the behavior of MCTS agents remains a challenge for both developers and users. This difficulty stems from the complex search trees produced through the simulation of numerous future states and their intricate relationships. A known weakness of standard MCTS is its reliance on highly selective tree construction, which may lead to the omission of crucial moves and a vulnerability to tactical traps. To resolve this, we incorporate shallow, full-width Minimax search into the rollout phase of multi-agent MCTS to enhance strategic depth. Furthermore, to demystify the resulting decision-making logic, we introduce \textsf{M2-PALE} (MCTS--Minimax Process-Aided Linguistic Explanations). This framework employs process mining techniques, specifically the Alpha Miner, iDHM, and Inductive Miner algorithms, to extract underlying behavioral workflows from agent execution traces. These process models are then synthesized by LLMs to generate human-readable causal and distal explanations. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach in a small-scale checkers environment, establishing a scalable foundation for interpreting hybrid agents in increasingly complex strategic domains.

AI.tldr: 将浅层全宽度Minimax搜索集成到多智能体MCTS的rollout阶段以增强策略深度，并引入M2-PALE框架通过过程挖掘和LLM生成可解释的决策逻辑
AI.motivation: MCTS作为在线规划算法在人工智能领域取得显著成功，但其复杂搜索树导致智能体行为难以理解，且标准MCTS存在选择性树构建的弱点，可能遗漏关键走法并易受战术陷阱影响
AI.method: 1) 在多智能体MCTS的rollout阶段集成浅层全宽度Minimax搜索以增强策略深度；2) 提出M2-PALE框架，使用Alpha Miner、iDHM和Inductive Miner等过程挖掘算法从智能体执行轨迹中提取行为工作流，再通过LLM合成生成人类可读的因果和远端解释
AI.result: 在小规模跳棋环境中验证了方法的有效性，为在日益复杂的策略领域中解释混合智能体建立了可扩展的基础
AI.conclusion: 通过集成Minimax搜索增强MCTS的策略深度，并利用过程挖掘和LLM生成可解释的决策逻辑，为解决MCTS智能体行为理解难题提供了系统化框架

title: Kinematics of continuum planar grasping
summary: This paper presents an analytical framework to study the geometry arising when a soft continuum arm grasps a planar object. Both the arm centerline and the object boundary are modeled as smooth curves. The grasping problem is formulated as a kinematic boundary following problem, in which the object boundary acts as the arm's 'shadow curve'. This formulation leads to a set of reduced kinematic equations expressed in terms of relative geometric shape variables, with the arm curvature serving as the control input. An optimal control problem is formulated to determine feasible arm shapes that achieve optimal grasping configurations, and its solution is obtained using Pontryagin's Maximum Principle. Based on the resulting optimal grasp kinematics, a class of continuum grasp quality metrics is proposed using the algebraic properties of the associated continuum grasp map. Feedback control aspects in the dynamic setting are also discussed. The proposed methodology is illustrated through systematic numerical simulations.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个分析框架，用于研究软体连续臂抓取平面物体时的几何特性，将抓取问题表述为运动学边界跟随问题，并基于最优控制理论确定最优抓取构型。
AI.motivation: 研究软体连续臂抓取平面物体时的几何特性，建立理论框架来分析抓取过程中的几何约束和最优构型，为软体机器人抓取提供理论基础。
AI.method: 将臂中心线和物体边界建模为光滑曲线，将抓取问题表述为运动学边界跟随问题，建立简化运动学方程，使用庞特里亚金极大值原理求解最优控制问题，提出基于连续抓取映射代数特性的抓取质量度量。
AI.result: 建立了软体连续臂抓取平面物体的几何分析框架，推导了最优抓取构型的解析解，提出了连续抓取质量度量方法，并通过系统数值仿真验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为软体连续臂抓取提供了系统的几何分析和最优控制框架，提出的抓取质量度量为评估抓取性能提供了量化指标，为软体机器人抓取控制奠定了理论基础。

title: An unsupervised decision-support framework for multivariate biomarker analysis in athlete monitoring
comment: 15 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables, submitted to Springer Nature Scientific Reports
summary: Purpose. Athlete monitoring is constrained by small cohorts, heterogeneous biomarker scales, limited feasibility of repeated sampling, and the lack of reliable injury ground truth. These limitations reduce the interpretability and utility of traditional univariate and binary risk models. This study addresses these challenges by proposing an unsupervised multivariate framework to identify latent physiological states in athletes using real data. Methods. We propose a modular computational framework that operates in the joint biomarker space, integrating preprocessing, clinical safety screening, unsupervised clustering, and centroid-based physiological interpretation. Profiles are learned exclusively from amateur soccer players during a competitive microcycle. Synthetic data augmentation evaluates robustness and scalability. Ward hierarchical clustering supports monitoring and etiological differentiation, while Gaussian Mixture Models (GMM) enable structural stability analysis in high-dimensional settings. Results. The framework identifies coherent profiles that distinguish mechanical damage from metabolic stress while preserving homeostatic states. Synthetic data augmentation demonstrates feasibility and detection of latent silent risk phenotypes typically missed by univariate monitoring. Structural analyses indicate robustness under augmentation and higher-dimensional settings. Conclusion. The framework enables interpretable identification of latent physiological states from multivariate biomarker data without injury labels. By distinguishing mechanisms and revealing silent risk patterns not captured by conventional monitoring, it provides actionable insights for individualized athlete monitoring and decision making.

AI.tldr: 提出无监督多变量框架，通过聚类分析识别运动员潜在生理状态，无需损伤标签，区分机械损伤与代谢应激，发现传统单变量监测遗漏的沉默风险表型。
AI.motivation: 运动员监测面临小样本、异质生物标志物尺度、重复采样可行性有限以及缺乏可靠损伤真实标签等限制，这些因素降低了传统单变量和二元风险模型的解释性和实用性。
AI.method: 提出模块化计算框架，在联合生物标志物空间中操作，整合预处理、临床安全筛查、无监督聚类和基于质心的生理解释。使用业余足球运动员竞争微周期数据学习特征，通过合成数据增强评估鲁棒性和可扩展性。采用Ward层次聚类进行监测和病因学区分，高斯混合模型用于高维设置下的结构稳定性分析。
AI.result: 框架识别出能区分机械损伤与代谢应激的连贯特征，同时保持稳态状态。合成数据增强证明了可行性，并检测到通常被单变量监测遗漏的潜在沉默风险表型。结构分析表明在增强和高维设置下具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够从多变量生物标志物数据中无需损伤标签即可解释性地识别潜在生理状态。通过区分机制并揭示传统监测未捕获的沉默风险模式，为个体化运动员监测和决策制定提供可操作的见解。

title: DiffMagicFace: Identity Consistent Facial Editing of Real Videos
summary: Text-conditioned image editing has greatly benefitted from the advancements in Image Diffusion Models. However, extending these techniques to facial video editing introduces challenges in preserving facial identity throughout the source video and ensuring consistency of the edited subject across frames. In this paper, we introduce DiffMagicFace, a unique video editing framework that integrates two fine-tuned models for text and image control. These models operate concurrently during inference to produce video frames that maintain identity features while seamlessly aligning with the editing semantics. To ensure the consistency of the edited videos, we develop a dataset comprising images showcasing various facial perspectives for each edited subject. The creation of a data set is achieved through rendering techniques and the subsequent application of optimization algorithms. Remarkably, our approach does not depend on video datasets but still delivers high-quality results in both consistency and content. The excellent effect holds even for complex tasks like talking head videos and distinguishing closely related categories. The videos edited using our framework exhibit parity with videos that are made using traditional rendering software. Through comparative analysis with current state-of-the-art methods, our framework demonstrates superior performance in both visual appeal and quantitative metrics.

AI.tldr: DiffMagicFace是一个基于扩散模型的视频编辑框架，通过集成两个微调模型实现文本和图像控制，能够在保持面部身份一致性的同时进行语义编辑，无需视频数据集即可生成高质量编辑结果。
AI.motivation: 基于文本条件的图像编辑技术已取得显著进展，但将其扩展到面部视频编辑面临两大挑战：1）如何在源视频中保持面部身份一致性；2）如何确保编辑对象在帧间的一致性。现有方法难以同时解决这两个问题。
AI.method: 提出DiffMagicFace框架，集成两个微调模型分别进行文本和图像控制，在推理时并行工作。通过渲染技术创建包含不同面部视角的图像数据集，并应用优化算法确保一致性。该方法不依赖视频数据集，而是使用静态图像生成高质量编辑结果。
AI.result: 框架在视觉质量和定量指标上均优于当前最先进方法，能够处理复杂任务如说话头部视频和区分密切相关的类别。编辑后的视频质量与传统渲染软件制作的视频相当，在保持身份一致性和编辑语义对齐方面表现出色。
AI.conclusion: DiffMagicFace通过创新的双模型集成方法，成功解决了面部视频编辑中的身份保持和帧间一致性问题，为基于扩散模型的视频编辑提供了有效解决方案，即使不依赖视频数据集也能生成高质量结果。

title: CSRA: Controlled Spectral Residual Augmentation for Robust Sepsis Prediction
summary: Accurate prediction of future risk and disease progression in sepsis is clinically important for early warning and timely intervention in intensive care. However, short-window sepsis prediction remains challenging, because shorter observation windows provide limited historical evidence, whereas longer prediction horizons reduce the number of patient trajectories with valid future supervision. To address this problem, we propose CSRA, a Controlled Spectral Residual Augmentation framework for short-window multi-system ICU time series. CSRA first groups variables by clinical systems and extracts system-level and global representations. It then performs input-adaptive residual perturbation in the spectral domain to generate structured and clinically plausible trajectory variations. To improve augmentation stability and controllability, CSRA is trained end-to-end with the downstream predictor under a unified objective, together with anchor consistency loss and controller regularization. Experiments on a MIMIC-IV sepsis cohort across multiple downstream models show that CSRA is consistently competitive and often superior, reducing regression error by 10.2\% in MSE and 3.7\% in MAE over the non-augmentation baseline, while also yielding consistent gains on classification. CSRA further maintains more favorable performance under shorter observation windows, longer prediction horizons, and smaller training data scales, while also remaining effective on an external clinical dataset~(ZiGongICUinfection), indicating stronger robustness and generalizability in clinically constrained settings.

AI.tldr: CSRA框架通过谱域残差增强解决ICU短窗口时间序列预测难题，提升脓毒症风险预测准确性
AI.motivation: 脓毒症早期预警需要准确的短期风险预测，但短观察窗口提供有限历史证据，长预测时域又减少有效监督样本，这一矛盾使短窗口预测面临挑战
AI.method: 提出CSRA框架：1)按临床系统分组变量提取系统级和全局表示；2)在谱域进行输入自适应残差扰动生成结构化、临床合理的轨迹变化；3)端到端训练下游预测器，结合锚点一致性损失和控制器正则化
AI.result: 在MIMIC-IV脓毒症队列上，CSRA相比无增强基线降低回归误差10.2%(MSE)和3.7%(MAE)，分类任务也有提升；在更短观察窗口、更长预测时域、更小训练数据下保持优势，在外部数据集(ZiGongICUinfection)也有效
AI.conclusion: CSRA通过谱域残差增强有效解决了ICU短窗口时间序列预测的挑战，在临床约束条件下展现出更强的鲁棒性和泛化能力

title: A Resource-Efficient Hybrid CNN-LSTM network for image-based bean leaf disease classification
summary: Accurate and resource-efficient automated diagnosis is a cornerstone of modern agricultural expert systems. While Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have established benchmarks in plant pathology, their ability to capture long-range spatial dependencies is often limited by standard pooling layers, and their high memory footprint hinders deployment on portable devices. This paper proposes a lightweight hybrid CNN-LSTM system for bean leaf disease classification. By integrating an LSTM layer to model the spatial-sequential relationships within feature maps, our hybrid architecture achieves a 94.38% accuracy while maintaining an exceptionally small footprint of 1.86 MB; a 70% reduction in size compared to traditional CNN-based systems. Furthermore, we provide a systematic evaluation of image augmentation strategies, demonstrating that tailored transformations are superior to generic combinations for maintaining the integrity of diagnostic patterns. Results on the $\textit{ibean}$ dataset confirm that the proposed system achieves state-of-the-art F1 scores of 99.22% with EfficientNet-B7+LSTM, providing a robust and scalable framework for real-time agricultural decision support in resource-constrained environments. The code and augmented datasets used in this study are publicly available on this $\href{https://github.com/HJin-R/bean_disease}{Github}$ repo.

AI.tldr: 提出轻量级CNN-LSTM混合系统用于豆叶病害分类，在保持高准确率的同时大幅减少模型大小，适合资源受限环境部署。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在植物病理学中虽表现良好，但标准池化层难以捕捉长距离空间依赖，且内存占用高，限制了在便携设备上的部署。需要开发既准确又资源高效的农业专家系统。
AI.method: 设计轻量级CNN-LSTM混合架构，通过LSTM层建模特征图内的空间序列关系。系统评估图像增强策略，比较定制化变换与通用组合的效果。在ibean数据集上进行实验。
AI.result: 混合架构达到94.38%准确率，模型大小仅1.86MB，比传统CNN系统减少70%。EfficientNet-B7+LSTM组合获得99.22%的F1分数，实现最先进性能。定制化图像增强策略优于通用组合。
AI.conclusion: 提出的CNN-LSTM混合系统为资源受限环境提供了鲁棒且可扩展的实时农业决策支持框架，在保持高准确率的同时显著降低内存需求，适合便携设备部署。

title: Acceptance Dynamics Across Cognitive Domains in Speculative Decoding
summary: Speculative decoding accelerates large language model (LLM) inference. It uses a small draft model to propose a tree of future tokens. A larger target model then verifies these tokens in a single batched forward pass. Despite the growing body of work on speculative methods, the degree to which the cognitive characteristics of a task affect acceptance probability remains largely unexplored. We present an empirical study of tree-based speculative decoding acceptance dynamics. Our study spans four well-established NLP benchmark domains: code generation, mathematical reasoning, logical reasoning, and open-ended chat. For this, we use TinyLlama-1.1B as the draft model against Llama-2-7B-Chat-GPTQ as the target. Over 99,768 speculative nodes collected from 200 prompts, we derive per-domain acceptance rates, expected accepted lengths, depth-acceptance profiles, and entropy-acceptance correlations. We find that task type is a stronger predictor of acceptance than tree depth. Furthermore, only the chat domain consistently yields an expected accepted length exceeding 1.0 token per step. We also show that the entropy-acceptance correlation is consistently negative but weak across all domains (rho in [-0.20, -0.15]). Counterintuitively, chat produces the highest entropy yet the highest acceptance rate. We attribute this divergence to the lexical predictability of RLHF-aligned register. These findings have direct implications for domain-aware speculation budgets and draft-model selection strategies. Index Terms--speculative decoding, large language model inference, tree attention, draft model, acceptance probability, LLM efficiency

AI.tldr: 该研究通过实证分析发现，在树状推测解码中，任务类型比树深度更能预测接受率，且只有聊天领域能持续实现每步超过1个token的预期接受长度
AI.motivation: 尽管推测解码方法研究日益增多，但任务认知特性对接受概率的影响程度仍未被充分探索。本研究旨在通过实证分析树状推测解码的接受动态，填补这一研究空白
AI.method: 使用TinyLlama-1.1B作为草稿模型，Llama-2-7B-Chat-GPTQ作为目标模型，在四个NLP基准领域（代码生成、数学推理、逻辑推理、开放聊天）收集99,768个推测节点数据，分析接受率、预期接受长度、深度-接受分布和熵-接受相关性
AI.result: 1) 任务类型比树深度更能预测接受率；2) 只有聊天领域能持续实现每步超过1个token的预期接受长度；3) 熵-接受相关性在所有领域均为负但较弱（rho在[-0.20, -0.15]）；4) 聊天领域熵值最高但接受率也最高，归因于RLHF对齐语域的词汇可预测性
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明任务认知特性显著影响推测解码性能，这些发现对领域感知的推测预算和草稿模型选择策略具有直接指导意义

title: Gaslight, Gatekeep, V1-V3: Early Visual Cortex Alignment Shields Vision-Language Models from Sycophantic Manipulation
summary: Vision-language models are increasingly deployed in high-stakes settings, yet their susceptibility to sycophantic manipulation remains poorly understood, particularly in relation to how these models represent visual information internally. Whether models whose visual representations more closely mirror human neural processing are also more resistant to adversarial pressure is an open question with implications for both neuroscience and AI safety. We investigate this question by evaluating 12 open-weight vision-language models spanning 6 architecture families and a 40$\times$ parameter range (256M--10B) along two axes: brain alignment, measured by predicting fMRI responses from the Natural Scenes Dataset across 8 human subjects and 6 visual cortex regions of interest, and sycophancy, measured through 76,800 two-turn gaslighting prompts spanning 5 categories and 10 difficulty levels. Region-of-interest analysis reveals that alignment specifically in early visual cortex (V1--V3) is a reliable negative predictor of sycophancy ($r = -0.441$, BCa 95\% CI $[-0.740, -0.031]$), with all 12 leave-one-out correlations negative and the strongest effect for existence denial attacks ($r = -0.597$, $p = 0.040$). This anatomically specific relationship is absent in higher-order category-selective regions, suggesting that faithful low-level visual encoding provides a measurable anchor against adversarial linguistic override in vision-language models. We release our code on \href{https://github.com/aryashah2k/Gaslight-Gatekeep-Sycophantic-Manipulation}{GitHub} and dataset on \href{https://huggingface.co/datasets/aryashah00/Gaslight-Gatekeep-V1-V3}{Hugging Face}

AI.tldr: 研究发现视觉语言模型在早期视觉皮层（V1-V3）的神经对齐与模型对谄媚性操纵的抵抗力呈负相关，表明低层次视觉编码的保真度能提供对抗语言覆盖的可测量锚点。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型越来越多地部署在高风险环境中，但其对谄媚性操纵的易感性仍不清楚，特别是这些模型如何在内部表示视觉信息。研究视觉表征更接近人类神经处理的模型是否也更抵抗对抗性压力，这对神经科学和AI安全都有重要意义。
AI.method: 评估12个开放权重的视觉语言模型（涵盖6种架构家族，参数范围256M-10B），沿两个轴测量：1）大脑对齐：通过预测8名人类受试者在自然场景数据集上的fMRI响应，覆盖6个视觉皮层感兴趣区域；2）谄媚性：通过76,800个两轮"煤气灯"提示测量，涵盖5个类别和10个难度级别。
AI.result: 感兴趣区域分析显示，早期视觉皮层（V1-V3）的对齐是谄媚性的可靠负向预测因子（r=-0.441），所有12个留一法相关性均为负值，对存在否认攻击的影响最强（r=-0.597，p=0.040）。这种解剖学特异性关系在高级别类别选择区域中不存在。
AI.conclusion: 忠实的低层次视觉编码为视觉语言模型提供了对抗对抗性语言覆盖的可测量锚点，早期视觉皮层的神经对齐与模型对谄媚性操纵的抵抗力相关，这对开发更鲁棒的AI系统具有启示意义。

title: DRG-Font: Dynamic Reference-Guided Few-shot Font Generation via Contrastive Style-Content Disentanglement
summary: Few-shot Font Generation aims to generate stylistically consistent glyphs from a few reference glyphs. However, capturing complex font styles from a few exemplars remains challenging, and the existing methods often struggle to retain discernible local characteristics in generated samples. This paper introduces DRG-Font, a contrastive font generation strategy that learns complex glyph attributes by decomposing style and content embedding spaces. For optimal style supervision, the proposed architecture incorporates a Reference Selection (RS) Module to dynamically select the best style reference from an available pool of candidates. The network learns to decompose glyph attributes into style and shape priors through a Multi-scale Style Head Block (MSHB) and a Multi-scale Content Head Block (MCHB). For style adaptation, a Multi-Fusion Upsampling Block (MFUB) produces the target glyph by combining the reference style prior and target content prior. The proposed method demonstrates significant improvements over state-of-the-art approaches across multiple visual and analytical benchmarks.

AI.tldr: DRG-Font是一种基于对比学习的少样本字体生成方法，通过分解样式和内容嵌入空间来学习复杂字形属性，并引入动态参考选择机制优化样式监督。
AI.motivation: 少样本字体生成旨在从少量参考字形生成风格一致的字符，但现有方法难以从少量样本中捕捉复杂字体风格，且在生成样本中经常无法保留可辨识的局部特征。
AI.method: 提出DRG-Font对比字体生成策略，通过参考选择模块动态选择最佳样式参考，使用多尺度样式头块和多尺度内容头块分解字形属性为样式和形状先验，通过多融合上采样块结合参考样式先验和目标内容先验生成目标字形。
AI.result: 该方法在多个视觉和分析基准测试中相比最先进方法表现出显著改进。
AI.conclusion: DRG-Font通过分解样式和内容嵌入空间、动态参考选择和多尺度融合机制，有效解决了少样本字体生成中复杂风格捕捉和局部特征保留的挑战。

title: Analyzing Chain of Thought (CoT) Approaches in Control Flow Code Deobfuscation Tasks
summary: Code deobfuscation is the task of recovering a readable version of a program while preserving its original behavior. In practice, this often requires days or even months of manual work with complex and expensive analysis tools. In this paper, we explore an alternative approach based on Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting, where a large language model is guided through explicit, step-by-step reasoning tailored for code analysis. We focus on control flow obfuscation, including Control Flow Flattening (CFF), Opaque Predicates, and their combination, and we measure both structural recovery of the control flow graph and preservation of program semantics. We evaluate five state-of-the-art large language models and show that CoT prompting significantly improves deobfuscation quality compared with simple prompting. We validate our approach on a diverse set of standard C benchmarks and report results using both structural metrics for control flow graphs and semantic metrics based on output similarity. Among the tested models and by applying CoT, GPT5 achieves the strongest overall performance, with an average gain of about 16% in control-flow graph reconstruction and about 20.5% in semantic preservation across our benchmarks compared to zero-shot prompting. Our results also show that model performance depends not only on the obfuscation level and the chosen obfuscator but also on the intrinsic complexity of the original control flow graph. Collectively, these findings suggest that CoT-guided large language models can serve as effective assistants for code deobfuscation, providing improved code explainability, more faithful control flow graph reconstruction, and better preservation of program behavior while potentially reducing the manual effort needed for reverse engineering.

AI.tldr: 论文探索使用思维链提示的大语言模型进行代码反混淆，相比简单提示显著提升控制流图重建和语义保持性能
AI.motivation: 传统代码反混淆需要大量人工工作和复杂分析工具，耗时耗力，需要探索更高效的自动化方法
AI.method: 采用思维链提示方法，引导大语言模型进行逐步推理的代码分析，专注于控制流混淆（控制流平坦化、不透明谓词及其组合）
AI.result: 评估5个先进大语言模型，思维链提示相比零样本提示在控制流图重建平均提升16%，语义保持提升20.5%，GPT5表现最佳
AI.conclusion: 思维链引导的大语言模型可作为有效的代码反混淆辅助工具，提高代码可解释性、控制流图重建准确性和程序行为保持，减少逆向工程人工工作量

title: Incremental Semantics-Aided Meshing from LiDAR-Inertial Odometry and RGB Direct Label Transfer
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables. Accepted in ISPRS Archives 2026
summary: Geometric high-fidelity mesh reconstruction from LiDAR-inertial scans remains challenging in large, complex indoor environments -- such as cultural buildings -- where point cloud sparsity, geometric drift, and fixed fusion parameters produce holes, over-smoothing, and spurious surfaces at structural boundaries. We propose a modular, incremental RGB+LiDAR pipeline that generates incremental semantics-aided high-quality meshes from indoor scans through scan frame-based direct label transfer. A vision foundation model labels each incoming RGB frame; labels are incrementally projected and fused onto a LiDAR-inertial odometry map; and an incremental semantics-aware Truncated Signed Distance Function (TSDF) fusion step produces the final mesh via marching cubes. This frame-level fusion strategy preserves the geometric fidelity of LiDAR while leveraging rich visual semantics to resolve geometric ambiguities at reconstruction boundaries caused by LiDAR point-cloud sparsity and geometric drift. We demonstrate that semantic guidance improves geometric reconstruction quality; quantitative evaluation is therefore performed using geometric metrics on the Oxford Spires dataset, while results from the NTU VIRAL dataset are analyzed qualitatively. The proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art geometric baselines ImMesh and Voxblox, demonstrating the benefit of semantics-aided fusion for geometric mesh quality. The resulting semantically labelled meshes are of value when reconstructing Universal Scene Description (USD) assets, offering a path from indoor LiDAR scanning to XR and digital modeling.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种模块化、增量式的RGB+LiDAR语义辅助高质量网格重建方法，通过扫描帧级直接标签传递解决室内大场景重建中的几何漂移和点云稀疏性问题
AI.motivation: 在大型复杂室内环境（如文化建筑）中，基于LiDAR-惯性扫描的几何高保真网格重建面临挑战：点云稀疏、几何漂移和固定融合参数导致空洞、过度平滑和结构边界处的虚假表面
AI.method: 提出模块化增量RGB+LiDAR流水线：1) 视觉基础模型标记每个RGB帧；2) 标签增量投影融合到LiDAR-惯性里程计地图；3) 增量语义感知TSDF融合通过Marching Cubes生成最终网格。采用帧级融合策略保持LiDAR几何保真度，同时利用视觉语义解决重建边界几何模糊问题
AI.result: 在Oxford Spires数据集上使用几何指标进行定量评估，在NTU VIRAL数据集上进行定性分析。该方法在几何网格质量上优于最先进的几何基线ImMesh和Voxblox，证明了语义辅助融合对几何重建质量的提升
AI.conclusion: 语义指导改善了几何重建质量，生成的语义标记网格对重建通用场景描述（USD）资产有价值，为从室内LiDAR扫描到XR和数字建模提供了路径

title: Artificial intelligence application in lymphoma diagnosis with Vision Transformer using weakly supervised training
summary: Vision transformers (ViT) have been shown to allow for more flexible feature detection and can outperform convolutional neural network (CNN) when pre-trained on sufficient data. Due to their promising feature detection capabilities, we deployed ViTs for morphological classification of anaplastic large cell lymphoma (ALCL) versus classic Hodgkin lymphoma (cHL). We had previously designed a ViT model which was trained on a small dataset of 1,200 image patches in fully supervised training. That model achieved a diagnostic accuracy of 100% and an F1 score of 1.0 on the independent test set. Since fully supervised training is not a practical method due to lack of expertise resources in both the training and testing phases, we conducted a recent study on a modified approach to training data (weakly supervised training) and show that labeling training image patch automatically at the slide level of each whole-slide-image is a more practical solution for clinical use of Vision Transformer. Our ViT model, trained on a larger dataset of 100,000 image patches, yields evaluation metrics with significant accuracy, F1 score, and area under the curve (AUC) at 91.85%, 0.92, and 0.98, respectively. These are respectable values that qualify this ViT model, with weakly supervised training, as a suitable tool for a deep learning module in clinical model development using automated image patch extraction.

AI.tldr: 该研究使用弱监督训练的视觉变换器（ViT）对间变性大细胞淋巴瘤（ALCL）和经典霍奇金淋巴瘤（cHL）进行形态学分类，在10万张图像块上训练，取得了91.85%准确率、0.92 F1分数和0.98 AUC的优异性能。
AI.motivation: 虽然ViT在充足数据预训练下能超越CNN，但完全监督训练需要大量专家标注，在临床实践中不切实际。因此需要探索更实用的弱监督训练方法，使ViT能用于淋巴瘤的临床诊断模型开发。
AI.method: 采用弱监督训练策略，在整张病理切片（WSI）层面进行标注，自动提取图像块标签，避免了逐块专家标注。使用10万张图像块训练ViT模型，相比之前完全监督的1200张图像块数据集大幅扩展。
AI.result: 弱监督训练的ViT模型在独立测试集上取得了91.85%准确率、0.92 F1分数和0.98 AUC的优异性能。虽然略低于之前完全监督训练的100%准确率和1.0 F1分数，但考虑到弱监督的实用性和数据量扩展，这些结果仍具有临床适用性。
AI.conclusion: 弱监督训练的ViT模型是临床模型开发中深度学习模块的合适工具，通过自动图像块提取和整张切片标注，解决了专家资源限制问题，为淋巴瘤诊断提供了实用的AI解决方案。

title: SafeMind: A Risk-Aware Differentiable Control Framework for Adaptive and Safe Quadruped Locomotion
summary: Learning-based quadruped controllers achieve impressive agility but typically lack formal safety guarantees under model uncertainty, perception noise, and unstructured contact conditions. We introduce SafeMind, a differentiable stochastic safety-control framework that unifies probabilistic Control Barrier Functions with semantic context understanding and meta-adaptive risk calibration. SafeMind explicitly models epistemic and aleatoric uncertainty through a variance-aware barrier constraint embedded in a differentiable quadratic program, thereby preserving gradient flow for end-to-end training. A semantics-to-constraint encoder modulates safety margins using perceptual or language cues, while a meta-adaptive learner continuously adjusts risk sensitivity across environments. We provide theoretical conditions for probabilistic forward invariance, feasibility, and stability under stochastic dynamics. SafeMind is deployed on Unitree A1 and ANYmal C at 200~Hz and validated across 12 terrain types, dynamic obstacles, morphology perturbations, and semantically defined tasks. Experiments show that SafeMind reduces safety violations by 3--10x and energy consumption by 10--15% relative to state-of-the-art CBF, MPC, and hybrid RL baselines, while maintaining real-time control performance.

AI.tldr: SafeMind：一种可微分的随机安全控制框架，将概率控制屏障函数与语义上下文理解和元自适应风险校准相结合，为四足机器人在模型不确定性、感知噪声和非结构化接触条件下提供形式化安全保证。
AI.motivation: 基于学习的四足控制器虽然实现了令人印象深刻的敏捷性，但通常在模型不确定性、感知噪声和非结构化接触条件下缺乏形式化的安全保证。现有方法难以在动态环境中提供可靠的安全约束。
AI.method: 1. 使用概率控制屏障函数（CBF）建模认知和随机不确定性；2. 嵌入可微二次规划的方差感知屏障约束，保持端到端训练的梯度流；3. 语义到约束编码器根据感知或语言线索调节安全边界；4. 元自适应学习器跨环境连续调整风险敏感性。
AI.result: 在Unitree A1和ANYmal C平台上以200Hz部署，验证了12种地形类型、动态障碍物、形态扰动和语义定义任务。相比最先进的CBF、MPC和混合RL基线，安全违规减少3-10倍，能耗降低10-15%，同时保持实时控制性能。
AI.conclusion: SafeMind框架成功地将形式化安全保证与学习型控制器相结合，通过概率安全约束、语义上下文理解和自适应风险校准，在复杂动态环境中实现了显著的安全性和能效改进。

title: Improving Machine Learning Performance with Synthetic Augmentation
summary:
Synthetic augmentation is increasingly used to mitigate data scarcity in financial machine learning, yet its statistical role remains poorly understood. We formalize synthetic augmentation as a modification of the effective training distribution and show that it induces a structural bias--variance trade-off: while additional samples may reduce estimation error, they may also shift the population objective whenever the synthetic distribution deviates from regions relevant under evaluation. To isolate informational gains from mechanical sample-size effects, we introduce a size-matched null augmentation and a finite-sample, non-parametric block permutation test that remains valid under weak temporal dependence.
  We evaluate this framework in both controlled Markov-switching environments and real financial datasets, including high-frequency option trade data and a daily equity panel. Across generators spanning bootstrap, copula-based models, variational autoencoders, diffusion models, and TimeGAN, we vary augmentation ratio, model capacity, task type, regime rarity, and signal-to-noise. We show that synthetic augmentation is beneficial only in variance-dominant regimes, such as persistent volatility forecasting-while it deteriorates performance in bias-dominant settings, including near-efficient directional prediction. Rare-regime targeting can improve domain-specific metrics but may conflict with unconditional permutation inference. Our results provide a structural perspective on when synthetic data improves financial learning performance and when it induces persistent distributional distortion.

AI.tldr: 论文形式化分析了金融机器学习中合成数据增强的统计效应，揭示了其引发的结构偏差-方差权衡，并提出了评估框架来区分信息增益与机械样本量效应。
AI.motivation: 合成数据增强在金融机器学习中被广泛用于缓解数据稀缺问题，但其统计作用和效果机制尚未得到充分理解。需要系统分析合成增强何时真正改善学习性能，何时反而导致分布失真。
AI.method: 1) 将合成增强形式化为训练分布的有效修改；2) 引入大小匹配的零增强作为对照，分离信息增益与机械样本量效应；3) 提出有限样本非参数块置换检验，适用于弱时间依赖场景；4) 在受控马尔可夫切换环境和真实金融数据集上评估框架。
AI.result: 合成增强仅在方差主导机制中有效（如持续性波动率预测），在偏差主导场景中反而损害性能（如接近有效的方向预测）。罕见机制定向增强可改善特定领域指标，但可能与无条件置换推断相冲突。不同生成器（bootstrap、copula、VAE、扩散模型、TimeGAN）表现各异。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据增强在金融学习中存在结构性的偏差-方差权衡，其有效性取决于具体任务特性。需要谨慎评估合成分布与评估相关区域的一致性，避免引入持久性分布失真。

title: From Synchrony to Sequence: Exo-to-Ego Generation via Interpolation
summary: Exo-to-Ego video generation aims to synthesize a first-person video from a synchronized third-person view and corresponding camera poses. While paired supervision is available, synchronized exo-ego data inherently introduces substantial spatio-temporal and geometric discontinuities, violating the smooth-motion assumptions of standard video generation benchmarks. We identify this synchronization-induced jump as the central challenge and propose Syn2Seq-Forcing, a sequential formulation that interpolates between the source and target videos to form a single continuous signal. By reframing Exo2Ego as sequential signal modeling rather than a conventional condition-output task, our approach enables diffusion-based sequence models, e.g. Diffusion Forcing Transformers (DFoT), to capture coherent transitions across frames more effectively. Empirically, we show that interpolating only the videos, without performing pose interpolation already produces significant improvements, emphasizing that the dominant difficulty arises from spatio-temporal discontinuities. Beyond immediate performance gains, this formulation establishes a general and flexible framework capable of unifying both Exo2Ego and Ego2Exo generation within a single continuous sequence model, providing a principled foundation for future research in cross-view video synthesis.

AI.tldr: 提出Syn2Seq-Forcing方法，将Exo-to-Ego视频生成重新定义为连续序列建模问题，通过插值源视频和目标视频形成单一连续信号，解决同步数据中的时空不连续性挑战。
AI.motivation: 同步的外视角-内视角（exo-ego）数据存在显著的时空和几何不连续性，这违反了标准视频生成基准的平滑运动假设。作者发现这种同步引起的跳跃是Exo-to-Ego视频生成的核心挑战。
AI.method: 提出Syn2Seq-Forcing方法：1）将源视频和目标视频插值形成单一连续信号；2）将Exo2Ego重新定义为序列信号建模而非传统的条件-输出任务；3）使基于扩散的序列模型（如DFoT）能够更有效地捕捉跨帧的连贯过渡。
AI.result: 实验表明，仅对视频进行插值（不进行姿态插值）已能产生显著改进，强调主要困难来自时空不连续性。该方法为跨视角视频合成提供了统一框架。
AI.conclusion: Syn2Seq-Forcing建立了一个通用灵活的框架，能够在单一连续序列模型中统一Exo2Ego和Ego2Exo生成，为跨视角视频合成的未来研究提供了原则性基础。

title: Adaptor: Advancing Assistive Teleoperation with Few-Shot Learning and Cross-Operator Generalization
comment: Accepted to the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2026)
summary: Assistive teleoperation enhances efficiency via shared control, yet inter-operator variability, stemming from diverse habits and expertise, induces highly heterogeneous trajectory distributions that undermine intent recognition stability. We present Adaptor, a few-shot framework for robust cross-operator intent recognition. The Adaptor bridges the domain gap through two stages: (i) preprocessing, which models intent uncertainty by synthesizing trajectory perturbations via noise injection and performs geometry-aware keyframe extraction; and (ii) policy learning, which encodes the processed trajectories with an Intention Expert and fuses them with the pre-trained vision-language model context to condition an Action Expert for action generation. Experiments on real-world and simulated benchmarks demonstrate that Adaptor achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving success rates and efficiency over baselines. Moreover, the method exhibits low variance across operators with varying expertise, demonstrating robust cross-operator generalization.

AI.tldr: Adaptor：一个用于鲁棒跨操作者意图识别的少样本框架，通过噪声注入和几何感知关键帧提取处理轨迹不确定性，结合意图专家和预训练视觉语言模型实现动作生成
AI.motivation: 辅助遥操作通过共享控制提高效率，但不同操作者因习惯和专业知识差异导致轨迹分布高度异构，这削弱了意图识别的稳定性，需要解决跨操作者泛化问题
AI.method: 两阶段框架：1)预处理阶段通过噪声注入合成轨迹扰动建模意图不确定性，并进行几何感知关键帧提取；2)策略学习阶段用意图专家编码处理后的轨迹，与预训练视觉语言模型上下文融合，条件化动作专家生成动作
AI.result: 在真实世界和模拟基准测试中达到最先进性能，提高了成功率和效率，在不同专业水平的操作者间表现出低方差，展示了鲁棒的跨操作者泛化能力
AI.conclusion: Adaptor框架有效解决了辅助遥操作中因操作者差异导致的意图识别不稳定问题，通过少样本学习实现了鲁棒的跨操作者泛化，提升了共享控制系统的实用性和适应性

title: PBE-UNet: A light weight Progressive Boundary-Enhanced U-Net with Scale-Aware Aggregation for Ultrasound Image Segmentation
summary: Accurate lesion segmentation in ultrasound images is essential for preventive screening and clinical diagnosis, yet remains challenging due to low contrast, blurry boundaries, and significant scale variations. Although existing deep learning-based methods have achieved remarkable performance, these methods still struggle with scale variations and indistinct tumor boundaries. To address these challenges, we propose a progressive boundary enhanced U-Net (PBE-UNet). Specially, we first introduce a scale-aware aggregation module (SAAM) that dynamically adjusts its receptive field to capture robust multi-scale contextual information. Then, we propose a boundary-guided feature enhancement (BGFE) module to enhance the feature representations. We find that there are large gaps between the narrow boundary and the wide segmentation error areas. Unlike existing methods that treat boundaries as static masks, the BGFE module progressively expands the narrow boundary prediction into broader spatial attention maps. Thus, broader spatial attention maps could effectively cover the wider segmentation error regions and enhance the model's focus on these challenging areas. We conduct expensive experiments on four benchmark ultrasound datasets, BUSI, Dataset B, TN3K, and BP. The experimental results how that our proposed PBE-UNet outperforms state-of-the-art ultrasound image segmentation methods. The code is at https://github.com/cruelMouth/PBE-UNet.

AI.tldr: 提出PBE-UNet用于超声图像病灶分割，通过尺度感知聚合模块和多阶段边界引导特征增强模块，解决超声图像对比度低、边界模糊和尺度变化大的挑战。
AI.motivation: 超声图像病灶分割对预防筛查和临床诊断至关重要，但由于低对比度、模糊边界和显著尺度变化而具有挑战性。现有深度学习方法在尺度变化和模糊边界处理上仍有不足。
AI.method: 提出渐进式边界增强U-Net（PBE-UNet）：1）尺度感知聚合模块（SAAM）动态调整感受野以捕获多尺度上下文信息；2）边界引导特征增强（BGFE）模块将窄边界预测逐步扩展为更宽的空间注意力图，覆盖更广的分割错误区域。
AI.result: 在四个超声图像基准数据集（BUSI、Dataset B、TN3K、BP）上的实验表明，PBE-UNet优于最先进的超声图像分割方法。
AI.conclusion: PBE-UNet通过尺度感知聚合和渐进式边界增强有效解决了超声图像分割中的尺度变化和边界模糊问题，在多个数据集上取得了优越性能。

title: Exploring LLM-based Verilog Code Generation with Data-Efficient Fine-Tuning and Testbench Automation
summary: Recent advances in large language models have improved code generation, but their use in hardware description languages is still limited. Moreover, training data and testbenches for these models are often scarce. This paper presents a workflow that uses multi-agent models to generate testbenches for high-quality fine-tuning data. By automating testbench creation, the fine-tuned model for the specification-to-Verilog task achieves performance comparable to state-of-the-art methods on the refined VerilogEval v2 benchmark while using less training data. This study provides a basis for future work on LLM-based HDL generation and automated verification.

AI.tldr: 提出一种使用多智能体模型生成测试平台的工作流程，为高质量微调数据提供支持，在Verilog代码生成任务上达到SOTA性能
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在硬件描述语言（HDL）代码生成方面应用有限，且相关训练数据和测试平台稀缺，需要自动化方法生成高质量微调数据
AI.method: 采用多智能体模型工作流程自动生成测试平台，为规格说明到Verilog代码生成任务创建高质量微调数据集
AI.result: 在精炼的VerilogEval v2基准测试中，微调后的模型在规格说明到Verilog任务上达到与最先进方法相当的性能，且使用更少的训练数据
AI.conclusion: 该研究为基于LLM的HDL生成和自动化验证提供了基础，展示了多智能体测试平台生成在硬件设计中的潜力

title: Musculoskeletal Motion Imitation for Learning Personalized Exoskeleton Control Policy in Impaired Gait
summary: Designing generalizable control policies for lower-limb exoskeletons remains fundamentally constrained by exhaustive data collection or iterative optimization procedures, which limit accessibility to clinical populations. To address this challenge, we introduce a device-agnostic framework that combines physiologically plausible musculoskeletal simulation with reinforcement learning to enable scalable personalized exoskeleton assistance for both able-bodied and clinical populations. Our control policies not only generate physiologically plausible locomotion dynamics but also capture clinically observed compensatory strategies under targeted muscular deficits, providing a unified computational model of both healthy and pathological gait. Without task-specific tuning, the resulting exoskeleton control policies produce assistive torque profiles at the hip and ankle that align with state-of-the-art profiles validated in human experiments, while consistently reducing metabolic cost across walking speeds. For simulated impaired-gait models, the learned control policies yield asymmetric, deficit-specific exoskeleton assistance that improves both energetic efficiency and bilateral kinematic symmetry without explicit prescription of the target gait pattern. These results demonstrate that physiologically plausible musculoskeletal simulation via reinforcement learning can serve as a scalable foundation for personalized exoskeleton control across both able-bodied and clinical populations, eliminating the need for extensive physical trials.

AI.tldr: 提出一种设备无关框架，结合肌肉骨骼仿真与强化学习，为下肢外骨骼提供可扩展的个性化辅助控制策略，无需大量物理试验
AI.motivation: 解决下肢外骨骼通用控制策略设计受限于大量数据收集或迭代优化的问题，提高临床人群的可及性
AI.method: 结合生理合理的肌肉骨骼仿真与强化学习，构建设备无关框架，生成个性化外骨骼辅助控制策略
AI.result: 控制策略产生与实验验证一致的髋踝辅助力矩，降低代谢成本；对模拟损伤步态提供不对称、缺陷特异性辅助，改善能量效率和双侧运动对称性
AI.conclusion: 生理合理的肌肉骨骼仿真结合强化学习可作为可扩展基础，为健全和临床人群提供个性化外骨骼控制，无需大量物理试验

title: Scouting By Reward: VLM-TO-IRL-Driven Player Selection For Esports
summary: Traditional esports scouting workflows rely heavily on manual video review and aggregate performance metrics, which often fail to capture the nuanced decision-making patterns necessary to determine if a prospect fits a specific tactical archetype. To address this, we reframe style-based player evaluation in esports as an Inverse Reinforcement Learning (IRL) problem. In this paper, we introduce a novel player selection framework that learns professional-specific reward functions from logged gameplay demonstrations, allowing organizations to rank candidates by their stylistic alignment with a target star player. Our proposed architecture utilizes a multimodal, two-branch intake: one branch encodes structured state-action trajectories derived from high-resolution in-game telemetry, while the second encodes temporally aligned tactical pseudo-commentary generated by Vision-Language Models (VLMs) from broadcast footage. These representations are fused and evaluated via a Generative Adversarial Imitation Learning (GAIL) objective, where a discriminator learns to capture the unique mechanical and tactical signatures of elite professionals. By transitioning from generic skill estimation to scouting "by reward," this framework provides a scalable, workflow-aware digital twin system that enables data-driven roster construction and targeted talent discovery across massive candidate pools.

AI.tldr: 将电竞选手评估重构为逆强化学习问题，通过从职业选手演示中学习奖励函数，根据与目标明星选手的风格匹配度来排名候选人。
AI.motivation: 传统电竞选手评估依赖手动视频回顾和聚合性能指标，无法捕捉决定选手是否符合特定战术原型的细微决策模式，需要更精确的风格匹配方法。
AI.method: 提出多模态双分支架构：一支编码来自高分辨率游戏遥测的结构化状态-动作轨迹，另一支编码从广播画面生成的时序对齐战术伪解说。通过生成对抗模仿学习目标融合表示，判别器学习精英选手的独特机械和战术特征。
AI.result: 框架从通用技能评估转向基于奖励的选拔，提供可扩展的工作流程感知数字孪生系统，支持数据驱动的阵容构建和大规模候选人池的定向人才发现。
AI.conclusion: 通过将风格化选手评估重构为逆强化学习问题，该框架能够学习职业选手特定的奖励函数，使组织能够根据候选人与目标明星选手的风格匹配度进行排名，实现更精确的电竞人才选拔。

title: Temporally Consistent Long-Term Memory for 3D Single Object Tracking
summary: 3D Single Object Tracking (3D-SOT) aims to localize a target object across a sequence of LiDAR point clouds, given its 3D bounding box in the first frame. Recent methods have adopted a memory-based approach to utilize previously observed features of the target object, but remain limited to only a few recent frames. This work reveals that their temporal capacity is fundamentally constrained to short-term context due to severe temporal feature inconsistency and excessive memory overhead. To this end, we propose a robust long-term 3D-SOT framework, ChronoTrack, which preserves the temporal feature consistency while efficiently aggregating the diverse target features via long-term memory. Based on a compact set of learnable memory tokens, ChronoTrack leverages long-term information through two complementary objectives: a temporal consistency loss and a memory cycle consistency loss. The former enforces feature alignment across frames, alleviating temporal drift and improving the reliability of proposed long-term memory. In parallel, the latter encourages each token to encode diverse and discriminative target representations observed throughout the sequence via memory-point-memory cyclic walks. As a result, ChronoTrack achieves new state-of-the-art performance on multiple 3D-SOT benchmarks, demonstrating its effectiveness in long-term target modeling with compact memory while running at real-time speed of 42 FPS on a single RTX 4090 GPU. The code is available at https://github.com/ujaejoon/ChronoTrack

AI.tldr: ChronoTrack是一个用于3D单目标跟踪的长期记忆框架，通过保持时序特征一致性和高效聚合多样化目标特征来解决现有方法短期上下文限制的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有3D单目标跟踪方法主要采用基于记忆的方法，但仅限于少数最近帧，其时间容量受到时序特征不一致性和过大内存开销的根本限制，无法有效利用长期上下文信息。
AI.method: 提出ChronoTrack框架，基于一组紧凑的可学习记忆令牌，通过两个互补目标利用长期信息：时序一致性损失和记忆循环一致性损失。前者强制跨帧特征对齐，减轻时序漂移；后者通过记忆-点-记忆循环行走鼓励每个令牌编码序列中观察到的多样化和判别性目标表示。
AI.result: 在多个3D-SOT基准测试中实现了新的最先进性能，证明了其在紧凑内存下进行长期目标建模的有效性，同时在单个RTX 4090 GPU上以42 FPS的实时速度运行。
AI.conclusion: ChronoTrack通过保持时序特征一致性和高效聚合多样化目标特征，成功解决了3D单目标跟踪中的长期记忆问题，实现了更稳健和准确的跟踪性能。

title: PhysInOne: Visual Physics Learning and Reasoning in One Suite
comment: CVPR 2026. Siyuan, Hejun, Hu, Jinxi, Dongsheng, Junwei, Yixiao, Jiayue, and Shiwei are co-first authors. Project page: https://vlar-group.github.io/PhysInOne.html
summary: We present PhysInOne, a large-scale synthetic dataset addressing the critical scarcity of physically-grounded training data for AI systems. Unlike existing datasets limited to merely hundreds or thousands of examples, PhysInOne provides 2 million videos across 153,810 dynamic 3D scenes, covering 71 basic physical phenomena in mechanics, optics, fluid dynamics, and magnetism. Distinct from previous works, our scenes feature multiobject interactions against complex backgrounds, with comprehensive ground-truth annotations including 3D geometry, semantics, dynamic motion, physical properties, and text descriptions. We demonstrate PhysInOne's efficacy across four emerging applications: physics-aware video generation, long-/short-term future frame prediction, physical property estimation, and motion transfer. Experiments show that fine-tuning foundation models on PhysInOne significantly enhances physical plausibility, while also exposing critical gaps in modeling complex physical dynamics and estimating intrinsic properties. As the largest dataset of its kind, orders of magnitude beyond prior works, PhysInOne establishes a new benchmark for advancing physics-grounded world models in generation, simulation, and embodied AI.

AI.tldr: PhysInOne是一个包含200万视频、15.3万个动态3D场景的大规模物理合成数据集，涵盖71种基础物理现象，为AI系统提供物理基础训练数据。
AI.motivation: 当前AI系统缺乏物理基础的训练数据，现有数据集仅包含数百或数千个示例，无法满足复杂物理动态建模的需求。
AI.method: 创建大规模合成数据集，包含多物体交互和复杂背景，提供全面的真实标注：3D几何、语义、动态运动、物理属性和文本描述。
AI.result: 在四个新兴应用中验证有效性：物理感知视频生成、长/短期未来帧预测、物理属性估计和运动迁移。微调基础模型显著提升物理合理性。
AI.conclusion: PhysInOne作为同类最大数据集，建立了物理基础世界模型在生成、模拟和具身AI方面的新基准，同时揭示了建模复杂物理动态和估计内在属性的关键差距。

title: Auxiliary Finite-Difference Residual-Gradient Regularization for PINNs
summary:
Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) are often selected by a single scalar loss even when the quantity of interest is more specific. We study a hybrid design in which the governing PDE residual remains automatic-differentiation (AD) based, while finite differences (FD) appear only in a weak auxiliary term that penalizes gradients of the sampled residual field. The FD term regularizes the residual field without replacing the PDE residual itself.
  We examine this idea in two stages. Stage 1 is a controlled Poisson benchmark comparing a baseline PINN, the FD residual-gradient regularizer, and a matched AD residual-gradient baseline. Stage 2 transfers the same logic to a three-dimensional annular heat-conduction benchmark (PINN3D), where baseline errors concentrate near a wavy outer wall and the auxiliary grid is implemented as a body-fitted shell adjacent to the wall.
  In Stage 1, the FD regularizer reproduces the main effect of residual-gradient control while exposing a trade-off between field accuracy and residual cleanliness. In Stage 2, the shell regularizer improves the application-facing quantities, namely outer-wall flux and boundary-condition behavior. Across seeds 0-5 and 100k epochs, the most reliable tested configuration is a fixed shell weight of 5e-4 under the Kourkoutas-beta optimizer regime: relative to a matched run without the shell term, it reduces the mean outer-wall BC RMSE from 1.22e-2 to 9.29e-4 and the mean wall-flux RMSE from 9.21e-3 to 9.63e-4. Adam with beta2=0.999 becomes usable when the initial learning rate is reduced to 1e-3, although its shell benefit is less robust than under Kourkoutas-beta. Overall, the results support a targeted view of hybrid PINNs: an auxiliary-only FD regularizer is most valuable when it is aligned with the physical quantity of interest, here the outer-wall flux.

AI.tldr: 提出一种混合PINN设计：PDE残差仍基于自动微分，而有限差分仅用于残差场梯度的弱辅助正则项，以正则化残差场而不替换PDE残差本身。
AI.motivation: 传统PINN通常使用单一标量损失函数，即使关注的具体物理量更为特定。本文旨在研究一种混合设计，在保持PDE残差自动微分计算的同时，引入有限差分正则化项来改善特定物理量的预测精度。
AI.method: 采用两阶段实验设计：第一阶段为受控泊松基准测试，比较基线PINN、FD残差梯度正则器和匹配的AD残差梯度基线；第二阶段将相同逻辑应用于三维环形热传导基准测试（PINN3D），在波浪形外壁附近实现贴体壳层网格的正则化。
AI.result: 第一阶段显示FD正则器能重现残差梯度控制的主要效果，同时揭示了场精度与残差清洁度之间的权衡；第二阶段中壳层正则器改善了外壁通量和边界条件行为等应用相关量。在种子0-5和100k轮次下，最可靠的配置是在Kourkoutas-beta优化器下固定壳层权重5e-4，相比无壳层项运行，将平均外壁BC RMSE从1.22e-2降至9.29e-4，平均壁通量RMSE从9.21e-3降至9.63e-4。
AI.conclusion: 结果支持混合PINN的针对性观点：当辅助FD正则器与关注的物理量（此处为外壁通量）对齐时最为有效，表明有限差分正则化在特定应用场景下能显著提升PINN性能。

title: Targeted Exploration via Unified Entropy Control for Reinforcement Learning
comment: Accepted for publication in Findings of the 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2026)
summary: Recent advances in reinforcement learning (RL) have improved the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs) and vision-language models (VLMs). However, the widely used Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) consistently suffers from entropy collapse, causing the policy to converge prematurely and lose diversity. Existing exploration methods introduce additional bias or variance during exploration, making it difficult to maintain optimization stability. We propose Unified Entropy Control for Reinforcement Learning (UEC-RL), a framework that provides targeted mechanisms for exploration and stabilization. UEC-RL activates more exploration on difficult prompts to search for potential and valuable reasoning trajectories. In parallel, a stabilizer prevents entropy from growing uncontrollably, thereby keeping training stable as the model consolidates reliable behaviors. Together, these components expand the search space when needed while maintaining robust optimization throughout training. Experiments on both LLM and VLM reasoning tasks show consistent gains over RL baselines on both Pass@1 and Pass@$k$. On Geometry3K, UEC-RL achieves a 37.9\% relative improvement over GRPO, indicating that it sustains effective exploration without compromising convergence and underscoring UEC-RL as a key for scaling RL-based reasoning in large models. Our code is available at https://github.com/597358816/UEC-RL.

AI.tldr: UEC-RL框架通过统一熵控制解决强化学习中熵崩溃问题，在困难提示上激活探索，同时防止熵失控增长，在LLM和VLM推理任务上优于现有RL基线。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法（如GRPO）存在熵崩溃问题，导致策略过早收敛、失去多样性；现有探索方法会引入额外偏差或方差，难以保持优化稳定性。
AI.method: 提出统一熵控制强化学习框架（UEC-RL），包含两个核心组件：1）在困难提示上激活更多探索以搜索潜在有价值的推理轨迹；2）稳定器防止熵失控增长，在模型巩固可靠行为时保持训练稳定。
AI.result: 在LLM和VLM推理任务上，UEC-RL在Pass@1和Pass@k指标上均优于RL基线。在Geometry3K数据集上，相比GRPO获得37.9%的相对提升，表明能维持有效探索而不损害收敛。
AI.conclusion: UEC-RL通过平衡探索与稳定，解决了强化学习中熵崩溃问题，是扩展基于RL的大模型推理能力的关键方法。

title: Bias in Surface Electromyography Features across a Demographically Diverse Cohort
summary:
Neuromotor decoding from upper-limb electromyography (sEMG) can enhance human-machine interfaces and offer a more natural means of controlling prosthetic limbs, virtual reality, and household electronics. Unfortunately, current sEMG technology does not always perform consistently across users because individual differences such as age and body mass index, among many others, can substantially alter signal quality. This variability makes sEMG characteristics highly idiosyncratic, often necessitating laborious personalization and iterative tuning to achieve reliable performance. This variability has particular import for sEMG-based assistive devices and neural interfaces, where demographic biases in sEMG features could undermine broad and fair deployment.
  In this study, we explore how demographic differences affect the sEMG signals produced and their implications for machine learning-based gesture decoding. We analyze the data set provided by, in which we derive 147 common sEMG features extracted from 81 demographically diverse individuals performing discrete hand gestures. Using mixed-effects linear models and partial least squares (PLS) analysis, which take into consideration demographic variables (including age, sex, height, weight, skin properties, subcutaneous fat, and hair density), we identify that 33\% (49 of 147) of commonly used sEMG features show significant associations with demographic characteristics. These results may help guide the development of fair and unbiased sEMG-based neural interfaces across a diverse population.

AI.tldr: 研究通过分析81名不同人口统计学背景个体的表面肌电信号特征，发现33%的常用sEMG特征与人口统计学特征显著相关，这对开发公平无偏的神经接口具有重要意义。
AI.motivation: 当前表面肌电技术在不同用户间性能不一致，个体差异（如年龄、BMI等）会显著影响信号质量，导致sEMG特征高度个性化，需要繁琐的个性化调整。这种变异性对基于sEMG的辅助设备和神经接口尤为重要，其中人口统计学偏差可能阻碍广泛公平部署。
AI.method: 分析81名人口统计学多样化个体执行离散手势的数据集，提取147个常见sEMG特征。使用混合效应线性模型和偏最小二乘分析，考虑年龄、性别、身高、体重、皮肤特性、皮下脂肪和毛发密度等人口统计学变量。
AI.result: 33%（147个中的49个）常用sEMG特征显示出与人口统计学特征的显著关联。这揭示了人口统计学差异对sEMG信号产生的重要影响及其对基于机器学习的姿势解码的启示。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果有助于指导开发适用于多样化人群的公平无偏sEMG神经接口，为减少人口统计学偏差和实现更广泛部署提供了实证基础。

title: Who Gets Flagged? The Pluralistic Evaluation Gap in AI Content Watermarking
summary: Watermarking is becoming the default mechanism for AI content authentication, with governance policies and frameworks referencing it as infrastructure for content provenance. Yet across text, image, and audio modalities, watermark signal strength, detectability, and robustness depend on statistical properties of the content itself, properties that vary systematically across languages, cultural visual traditions, and demographic groups. We examine how this content dependence creates modality-specific pathways to bias. Reviewing the major watermarking benchmarks across modalities, we find that, with one exception, none report performance across languages, cultural content types, or population groups. To address this, we propose three concrete evaluation dimensions for pluralistic watermark benchmarking: cross-lingual detection parity, culturally diverse content coverage, and demographic disaggregation of detection metrics. We connect these to the governance frameworks currently mandating watermarking deployment and show that watermarking is held to a lower fairness standard than the generative systems it is meant to govern. Our position is that evaluation must precede deployment, and that the same bias auditing requirements applied to AI models should extend to the verification layer.

AI.tldr: 该论文指出AI水印技术存在内容依赖性偏见，不同语言、文化和人口群体的检测性能存在差异，但现有基准测试大多未评估这些维度，需要建立更全面的评估框架。
AI.motivation: 水印技术已成为AI内容认证的默认机制，但其信号强度、可检测性和鲁棒性依赖于内容本身的统计特性，而这些特性在不同语言、文化视觉传统和人口群体中系统性地变化。目前水印技术被治理框架要求部署，但其偏见问题未得到充分评估。
AI.method: 通过审查跨文本、图像和音频模态的主要水印基准测试，分析现有评估的局限性；提出三个具体的多元化水印评估维度：跨语言检测均等性、文化多样性内容覆盖和检测指标的按人口细分。
AI.result: 发现除一个例外，所有主要水印基准测试均未报告跨语言、文化内容类型或人口群体的性能表现。水印技术目前被要求部署，但其公平性标准低于其旨在治理的生成系统。
AI.conclusion: 评估必须先于部署，应用于AI模型的偏见审计要求应扩展到验证层。需要建立包含跨语言检测均等性、文化多样性内容覆盖和人口细分检测指标的多元化水印评估框架。

title: VAG: Dual-Stream Video-Action Generation for Embodied Data Synthesis
summary: Recent advances in robot foundation models trained on large-scale human teleoperation data have enabled robots to perform increasingly complex real-world tasks. However, scaling these systems remains difficult because collecting task-specific demonstrations is expensive and labor-intensive. Synthetic data, especially generated videos, offer a promising direction, but existing World Models (WMs) are not directly suitable for policy learning since they do not provide paired action trajectories. World-Action (WA) models partially address this by predicting actions with visual outputs, yet often lack strong video-action alignment, while two-stage pipelines that generate video first and then infer actions introduce inefficiency and error accumulation. To address these limitations, we propose VAG, a unified flow-matching-based dual-stream framework that jointly generates video and action under visual and language conditioning. By synchronizing denoising in both branches and using an adaptive 3D pooling mechanism to transfer compact global video context to the action branch, VAG improves cross-modal consistency during generation. Across both simulated and real-world settings, VAG produces aligned video-action pairs with competitive prediction quality, supports executable trajectory replay, and provides useful synthetic pretraining data that improves downstream policy generalization, indicating its potential as a practical world-action model for embodied data synthesis.

AI.tldr: VAG是一个基于流匹配的双流框架，联合生成视频和动作，通过同步去噪和自适应3D池化机制改善跨模态一致性，为具身数据合成提供实用的世界-动作模型。
AI.motivation: 机器人基础模型需要大量人类遥操作数据，但收集任务特定演示成本高昂。合成数据（特别是生成视频）有潜力，但现有世界模型不适合策略学习（缺乏配对动作轨迹），而世界-动作模型存在视频-动作对齐不足问题，两阶段流水线效率低且误差累积。
AI.method: 提出VAG：基于流匹配的统一双流框架，在视觉和语言条件下联合生成视频和动作。通过同步两个分支的去噪过程，并使用自适应3D池化机制将紧凑的全局视频上下文传输到动作分支，改善生成过程中的跨模态一致性。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实世界环境中，VAG生成对齐的视频-动作对，具有竞争力的预测质量，支持可执行轨迹回放，并提供有用的合成预训练数据，改善下游策略泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: VAG作为一个实用的世界-动作模型，在具身数据合成方面具有潜力，通过联合生成对齐的视频-动作对，解决了现有方法的局限性，为机器人策略学习提供了有效的合成数据源。

title: Learning to Draw ASCII Improves Spatial Reasoning in Language Models
summary: When faced with complex spatial problems, humans naturally sketch layouts to organize their thinking, and the act of drawing further sharpens their understanding. In this work, we ask whether a similar principle holds for Large Language Models (LLMs): can learning to construct explicit visual layouts from spatial descriptions instill genuine spatial understanding? We introduce Text2Space, a dataset that pairs natural language descriptions with ground-truth ASCII grid layouts and spatial QA pairs, enabling us to separate failures in constructing spatial representations from failures in reasoning over them. We adopt ASCII because it is human-readable, operates entirely within the token space of language models, and encodes spatial relations in a structurally verifiable form. Our evaluation reveals a pronounced "Read-Write Asymmetry": LLMs interpret ASCII representations effectively but struggle to produce them from text, and these construction errors propagate to incorrect answers downstream. To address this limitation, we train models on layout construction (Text$\rightarrow$ASCII) and find that it significantly improves spatial reasoning from text alone, even without producing any ASCII at inference time. Combining construction with comprehension training further amplifies these gains. Crucially, these improvements transfer to three external spatial reasoning benchmarks, demonstrating that, much as sketching sharpens human spatial thinking, learning to construct explicit layouts instills spatial understanding that generalizes beyond the training format.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Text2Space数据集，研究LLMs通过构建ASCII网格布局来学习空间理解的能力，发现"读写不对称"现象，并通过布局构建训练显著提升空间推理能力。
AI.motivation: 人类通过绘制草图来组织和深化空间理解，本研究探讨类似原理是否适用于大语言模型：学习从空间描述构建显式视觉布局能否真正培养空间理解能力？
AI.method: 引入Text2Space数据集，包含自然语言描述、真实ASCII网格布局和空间问答对；采用ASCII表示因其可读性、在语言模型词元空间内操作且能结构验证空间关系；评估LLMs的读写不对称现象，并训练模型进行布局构建（文本→ASCII）。
AI.result: 发现显著的"读写不对称"：LLMs能有效解释ASCII表示，但难以从文本生成它们，且构建错误会传播到下游答案；布局构建训练显著提升了仅从文本进行空间推理的能力，即使推理时不生成ASCII；构建与理解训练结合进一步放大收益，这些改进能迁移到三个外部空间推理基准测试。
AI.conclusion: 如同草图绘制能提升人类空间思维，学习构建显式布局能培养可迁移的空间理解能力，超越训练格式；布局构建训练是提升LLMs空间推理的有效方法。

title: Multimodal Anomaly Detection for Human-Robot Interaction
summary: Ensuring safety and reliability in human-robot interaction (HRI) requires the timely detection of unexpected events that could lead to system failures or unsafe behaviours. Anomaly detection thus plays a critical role in enabling robots to recognize and respond to deviations from normal operation during collaborative tasks. While reconstruction models have been actively explored in HRI, approaches that operate directly on feature vectors remain largely unexplored. In this work, we propose MADRI, a framework that first transforms video streams into semantically meaningful feature vectors before performing reconstruction-based anomaly detection. Additionally, we augment these visual feature vectors with the robot's internal sensors' readings and a Scene Graph, enabling the model to capture both external anomalies in the visual environment and internal failures within the robot itself. To evaluate our approach, we collected a custom dataset consisting of a simple pick-and-place robotic task under normal and anomalous conditions. Experimental results demonstrate that reconstruction on vision-based feature vectors alone is effective for detecting anomalies, while incorporating other modalities further improves detection performance, highlighting the benefits of multimodal feature reconstruction for robust anomaly detection in human-robot collaboration.

AI.tldr: MADRI框架通过将视频流转换为语义特征向量，结合机器人内部传感器数据和场景图进行重建式异常检测，提升人机协作中的异常检测性能
AI.motivation: 在人机交互中确保安全性和可靠性需要及时检测可能导致系统故障或不安全行为的意外事件。虽然重建模型在HRI中已被积极研究，但直接在特征向量上操作的方法仍未被充分探索
AI.method: 提出MADRI框架：1) 将视频流转换为语义特征向量；2) 结合机器人内部传感器读数；3) 加入场景图；4) 进行基于重建的异常检测，捕捉视觉环境外部异常和机器人内部故障
AI.result: 实验结果表明：仅基于视觉特征向量的重建对异常检测有效，而结合其他模态进一步提升了检测性能，突显了多模态特征重建在人机协作中实现鲁棒异常检测的优势
AI.conclusion: MADRI框架通过多模态特征重建有效检测人机协作中的异常，为安全可靠的人机交互提供了有前景的解决方案

title: MedRCube: A Multidimensional Framework for Fine-Grained and In-Depth Evaluation of MLLMs in Medical Imaging
summary: The potential of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) in domain of medical imaging raise the demands of systematic and rigorous evaluation frameworks that are aligned with the real-world medical imaging practice. Existing practices that report single or coarse-grained metrics are lack the granularity required for specialized clinical support and fail to assess the reliability of reasoning mechanisms. To address this, we propose a paradigm shift toward multidimensional, fine-grained and in-depth evaluation. Based on a two-stage systematic construction pipeline designed for this paradigm, we instantiate it with MedRCube. We benchmark 33 MLLMs, \textit{Lingshu-32B} achieve top-tier performance. Crucially, MedRCube exposes a series of pronounced insights inaccessible under prior evaluation settings. Furthermore, we introduce a credibility evaluation subset to quantify reasoning credibility, uncover a highly significant positive association between shortcut behavior and diagnostic task performance, raising concerns for clinically trustworthy deployment. The resources of this work can be found at https://github.com/F1mc/MedRCube.

AI.tldr: 提出了MedRCube，一个用于医学影像多模态大语言模型的多维度、细粒度评估框架，通过两阶段构建流程评估33个MLLM，发现推理可信度与诊断性能存在显著正相关关系
AI.motivation: 现有医学影像MLLM评估方法报告单一或粗粒度指标，缺乏临床专业支持所需的细粒度评估，且无法评估推理机制的可信度，需要与真实世界医学影像实践对齐的系统性评估框架
AI.method: 提出向多维度、细粒度和深度评估的范式转变，基于两阶段系统构建流程实例化为MedRCube评估框架，包含可信度评估子集以量化推理可信度
AI.result: 评估了33个MLLM，Lingshu-32B表现最佳；MedRCube揭示了先前评估设置无法获得的显著洞察；发现捷径行为与诊断任务性能存在高度显著的正相关关系
AI.conclusion: MedRCube为医学影像MLLM提供了系统评估框架，揭示了推理可信度与诊断性能的关联，对临床可信部署提出了重要关注点，相关资源已开源

title: Fact4ac at the Financial Misinformation Detection Challenge Task: Reference-Free Financial Misinformation Detection via Fine-Tuning and Few-Shot Prompting of Large Language Models
summary: The proliferation of financial misinformation poses a severe threat to market stability and investor trust, misleading market behavior and creating critical information asymmetry. Detecting such misleading narratives is inherently challenging, particularly in real-world scenarios where external evidence or supplementary references for cross-verification are strictly unavailable. This paper presents our winning methodology for the "Reference-Free Financial Misinformation Detection" shared task. Built upon the recently proposed RFC-BENCH framework (Jiang et al. 2026), this task challenges models to determine the veracity of financial claims by relying solely on internal semantic understanding and contextual consistency, rather than external fact-checking. To address this formidable evaluation setup, we propose a comprehensive framework that capitalizes on the reasoning capabilities of state-of-the-art Large Language Models (LLMs). Our approach systematically integrates in-context learning, specifically zero-shot and few-shot prompting strategies, with Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) via Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) to optimally align the models with the subtle linguistic cues of financial manipulation. Our proposed system demonstrated superior efficacy, successfully securing the first-place ranking on both official leaderboards. Specifically, we achieved an accuracy of 95.4% on the public test set and 96.3% on the private test set, highlighting the robustness of our method and contributing to the acceleration of context-aware misinformation detection in financial Natural Language Processing. Our models (14B and 32B) are available at https://huggingface.co/KaiNKaiho.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型的参考无关金融虚假信息检测方法，在RFC-BENCH基准测试中取得了第一名，公开测试集准确率达95.4%，私有测试集达96.3%。
AI.motivation: 金融虚假信息的泛滥严重威胁市场稳定和投资者信任，导致市场行为误导和信息不对称。现有检测方法通常依赖外部证据或参考进行交叉验证，但在现实场景中这些资源往往不可得，因此需要开发无需外部参考的检测方法。
AI.method: 提出一个综合框架，利用最先进大语言模型的推理能力。系统性地整合上下文学习（包括零样本和少样本提示策略）与参数高效微调（通过LoRA低秩适应），使模型能够更好地识别金融操纵中的微妙语言线索。
AI.result: 该方法在"参考无关金融虚假信息检测"共享任务的两个官方排行榜上均获得第一名。公开测试集准确率为95.4%，私有测试集准确率为96.3%，证明了方法的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架在无需外部参考的情况下有效检测金融虚假信息，推动了金融自然语言处理中上下文感知虚假信息检测的发展。模型（14B和32B参数版本）已在Hugging Face平台公开。

title: Robust Adaptive Backstepping Impedance Control of Robots in Unknown Environments
summary: This paper presents a Robust Adaptive Backstepping Impedance Control (RABIC) strategy for robots operating in contact-rich and uncertain environments. The proposed control strategy considers the complete coupled dynamics of the system and explicitly accounts for key sources of uncertainty, including external disturbances and unmodeled dynamics, while not requiring the robot's dynamic parameters in implementation. We propose a backstepping-based adaptive impedance control scheme for the inner loop to track the reference impedance model. To handle uncertainties, we employ a Taylor series-based estimator for system dynamics and an adaptive estimator for determining the upper bound of external forces. Stability analysis demonstrates the semi-global practical finite-time stability of the overall system. To demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method, a simulated mobile manipulator scenario and experimental evaluations on a real Franka Emika Panda robot were conducted. The proposed approach exhibits safer performance compared to PD control while ensuring trajectory tracking and force monitoring. Overall, the RABIC framework provides a solid basis for future research on adaptive and learning-based impedance control for coupled mobile and fixed serially linked manipulators.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种鲁棒自适应反步阻抗控制（RABIC）策略，用于接触丰富且不确定环境中的机器人操作，无需机器人动态参数，通过自适应阻抗控制和不确定性估计实现安全性能。
AI.motivation: 针对机器人在接触丰富和不确定环境中操作时面临的挑战，需要处理系统耦合动力学、外部干扰和未建模动态等不确定性，同时避免对机器人动态参数的依赖。
AI.method: 采用反步法自适应阻抗控制作为内环跟踪参考阻抗模型；使用泰勒级数估计器估计系统动力学，自适应估计器确定外力的上界；理论分析证明系统的半全局实际有限时间稳定性。
AI.result: 在模拟移动机械臂场景和真实Franka Emika Panda机器人上进行了实验验证；相比PD控制，提出的方法表现出更安全的性能，同时确保轨迹跟踪和力监测。
AI.conclusion: RABIC框架为耦合移动和固定串联机械臂的自适应和学习型阻抗控制未来研究提供了坚实基础。

title: ClipGStream: Clip-Stream Gaussian Splatting for Any Length and Any Motion Multi-View Dynamic Scene Reconstruction
summary: Dynamic 3D scene reconstruction is essential for immersive media such as VR, MR, and XR, yet remains challenging for long multi-view sequences with large-scale motion. Existing dynamic Gaussian approaches are either Frame-Stream, offering scalability but poor temporal stability, or Clip, achieving local consistency at the cost of high memory and limited sequence length. We propose ClipGStream, a hybrid reconstruction framework that performs stream optimization at the clip level rather than the frame level. The sequence is divided into short clips, where dynamic motion is modeled using clip-independent spatio-temporal fields and residual anchor compensation to capture local variations efficiently, while inter-clip inherited anchors and decoders maintain structural consistency across clips. This Clip-Stream design enables scalable, flicker-free reconstruction of long dynamic videos with high temporal coherence and reduced memory overhead. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ClipGStream achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction quality and efficiency. The project page is available at: https://liangjie1999.github.io/ClipGStreamWeb/

AI.tldr: ClipGStream：一种混合动态3D场景重建框架，通过将长序列划分为短片段，在片段级别进行流式优化，结合片段内时空场建模和片段间锚点继承，实现高时间一致性、低内存消耗的长动态视频重建。
AI.motivation: 现有动态高斯方法存在局限性：帧流式方法（Frame-Stream）可扩展但时间稳定性差；片段方法（Clip）能保证局部一致性但内存消耗高且序列长度受限。需要一种能同时处理长多视角序列、大规模运动且保持时间一致性的高效重建方法。
AI.method: 提出Clip-Stream混合框架：1）将长序列划分为短片段；2）片段内使用独立的时空场和残差锚点补偿高效建模局部动态变化；3）片段间通过继承锚点和解码器保持结构一致性；4）在片段级别而非帧级别进行流式优化。
AI.result: 实验表明ClipGStream在重建质量和效率上达到state-of-the-art水平，能够实现可扩展、无闪烁的长动态视频重建，具有高时间一致性和低内存开销。
AI.conclusion: ClipGStream通过创新的片段级流式优化设计，有效解决了长动态序列重建中时间稳定性与内存效率的权衡问题，为VR/MR/XR等沉浸式媒体提供了高质量的动态3D场景重建方案。

title: StoryCoder: Narrative Reformulation for Structured Reasoning in LLM Code Generation
summary: Effective code generation requires both model capability and a problem representation that carefully structures how models reason and plan. Existing approaches augment reasoning steps or inject specific structure into how models think, but leave scattered problem conditions unchanged. Inspired by the way humans organize fragmented information into coherent explanations, we propose StoryCoder, a narrative reformulation framework that transforms code generation questions into coherent natural language narratives, providing richer contextual structure than simple rephrasings. Each narrative consists of three components: a task overview, constraints, and example test cases, guided by the selected algorithm and genre. Experiments across 11 models on HumanEval, LiveCodeBench, and CodeForces demonstrate consistent improvements, with an average gain of 18.7% in zero-shot pass@10. Beyond accuracy, our analyses reveal that narrative reformulation guides models toward correct algorithmic strategies, reduces implementation errors, and induces a more modular code structure. The analyses further show that these benefits depend on narrative coherence and genre alignment, suggesting that structured problem representation is important for code generation regardless of model scale or architecture. Our code is available at https://github.com/gu-ni/StoryCoder.

AI.tldr: StoryCoder：将代码生成问题转化为连贯自然语言叙事的框架，通过叙事重构提升代码生成效果
AI.motivation: 现有方法虽然增强了推理步骤或注入了特定结构，但未改变分散的问题条件。受人类将碎片化信息组织为连贯解释的启发，需要提供比简单重述更丰富的上下文结构
AI.method: 提出StoryCoder叙事重构框架，将代码生成问题转化为包含任务概述、约束条件和示例测试用例三个组件的连贯自然语言叙事，由选定算法和体裁指导
AI.result: 在HumanEval、LiveCodeBench和CodeForces上对11个模型的实验显示，zero-shot pass@10平均提升18.7%。叙事重构引导模型采用正确算法策略，减少实现错误，诱导更模块化的代码结构
AI.conclusion: 叙事连贯性和体裁对齐对效果至关重要，表明结构化问题表示对代码生成很重要，与模型规模或架构无关。结构化问题表示是代码生成的关键因素

title: Online Intention Prediction via Control-Informed Learning
summary: This paper presents an online intention prediction framework for estimating the goal state of autonomous systems in real time, even when intention is time-varying, and system dynamics or objectives include unknown parameters. The problem is formulated as an inverse optimal control / inverse reinforcement learning task, with the intention treated as a parameter in the objective. A shifting horizon strategy discounts outdated information, while online control-informed learning enables efficient gradient computation and online parameter updates. Simulations under varying noise levels and hardware experiments on a quadrotor drone demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves accurate, adaptive intention prediction in complex environments.

AI.tldr: 提出在线意图预测框架，用于实时估计自主系统的目标状态，即使意图随时间变化且系统动态或目标包含未知参数。
AI.motivation: 自主系统在复杂环境中需要实时预测其他智能体的意图，但现有方法难以处理时间变化的意图和未知的系统参数，这限制了实际应用中的适应性和准确性。
AI.method: 将问题建模为逆最优控制/逆强化学习任务，将意图视为目标函数中的参数。采用移动时域策略来折扣过时信息，同时通过在线控制感知学习实现高效梯度计算和在线参数更新。
AI.result: 在不同噪声水平下的仿真和四旋翼无人机硬件实验中，该方法在复杂环境中实现了准确、自适应的意图预测。
AI.conclusion: 提出的在线意图预测框架能够有效处理时间变化意图和未知参数，为自主系统在动态环境中的实时意图估计提供了实用解决方案。

title: A Parallel Approach to Counting Exact Covers Based on Decomposability Property
summary: The exact cover problem is a classical NP-hard problem with broad applications in the area of AI. Algorithm DXZ is a method to count exact covers representing by zero-suppressed binary decision diagrams (ZBDDs). In this paper, we propose a zero-suppressed variant of decision decomposable negation normal form (in short, decision-ZDNNF), which is strictly more succinct than ZBDDs. We then design a novel parallel algorithm, namely DXD, which constructs a decision-ZDNNF representing the set of all exact covers. Furthermore, we improve DXD by dynamically updating connected components. The experimental results demonstrate that the improved DXD algorithm outperforms all of state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 提出决策-ZDNNF表示形式，比ZBDD更简洁，并设计并行算法DXD及其改进版本用于精确覆盖计数，性能优于现有方法
AI.motivation: 精确覆盖问题是NP难问题，在AI领域有广泛应用。现有DXZ算法使用ZBDD表示精确覆盖，但ZBDD的表达能力有限，需要更简洁高效的表示方法
AI.method: 1. 提出决策-ZDNNF（决策可分解否定范式）表示形式，比ZBDD更简洁；2. 设计并行算法DXD构建决策-ZDNNF表示所有精确覆盖；3. 通过动态更新连通分量改进DXD算法
AI.result: 实验结果表明，改进的DXD算法在所有基准测试中都优于现有最先进方法
AI.conclusion: 决策-ZDNNF是比ZBDD更简洁的表示形式，基于此设计的改进DXD算法在精确覆盖计数问题上具有优越性能

title: A Benchmark of Dexterity for Anthropomorphic Robotic Hands
summary: Dexterity is a central yet ambiguously defined concept in the design and evaluation of anthropomorphic robotic hands. In practice, the term is often used inconsistently, with different systems evaluated under disparate criteria, making meaningful comparisons across designs difficult. This highlights the need for a unified, performance-based definition of dexterity grounded in measurable outcomes rather than proxy metrics. In this work, we introduce POMDAR, a comprehensive dexterity benchmark that formalizes dexterity as task performance across a structured set of manipulation and grasping motions. The benchmark was systematically derived from established taxonomies in human motor control. It is implemented in both real-world and simulation and includes four manipulation configurations: vertical and horizontal configurations, continuous rotation, and pure grasping. The task designs contain mechanical scaffolding to constrain task motion, suppress compensatory strategies, and enable metrics to be measured unambiguously. We define a quantitative scoring metric combining task correctness and execution speed, effectively measuring dexterity as throughput. This enables objective, reproducible, and interpretable evaluation across different hand designs. POMDAR provides an open-source, standardized, and taxonomy-grounded benchmark for consistent comparison and evaluation of anthropomorphic robot hands to facilitate a systematic advancement of dexterous manipulation platforms. CAD, simulation files, and evaluation videos are publicly available at https://srl-ethz.github.io/POMDAR/.

AI.tldr: POMDAR是一个基于任务性能的标准化灵巧性基准测试，通过结构化操作和抓取任务集来形式化定义机器人手的灵巧性，提供客观、可复现的评估框架。
AI.motivation: 当前机器人手灵巧性定义模糊且评估标准不一致，导致不同设计难以进行有意义的比较，需要建立基于可测量结果的统一性能定义。
AI.method: 从人类运动控制分类学系统推导出结构化操作和抓取任务集，实现真实世界和仿真环境，包含四种操作配置（垂直、水平、连续旋转、纯抓取），通过机械支架约束任务运动、抑制补偿策略，定义结合任务正确性和执行速度的量化评分指标。
AI.result: 开发了POMDAR基准测试，提供开源、标准化、基于分类学的评估框架，能够客观、可复现、可解释地评估不同手设计，促进灵巧操作平台的系统性发展。
AI.conclusion: POMDAR为拟人机器人手提供了统一的灵巧性基准测试，通过形式化定义灵巧性为任务性能，解决了评估标准不一致的问题，推动了该领域的系统性进步。

title: Granularity-Aware Transfer for Tree Instance Segmentation in Synthetic and Real Forests
summary: We address the challenge of synthetic-to-real transfer in forestry perception where real data have only coarse Tree labels while synthetic data provide fine-grained trunk/crown annotations. We introduce MGTD, a mixed-granularity dataset with 53k synthetic and 3.6k real images, and a four-stage protocol isolating domain shift and granularity mismatch. Our core contribution is granularity-aware distillation, which transfers structural priors from fine-grained synthetic teachers to a coarse-label student via logit-space merging and mask unification. Experiments show consistent mask AP gains, especially for small/distant trees, establishing a testbed for Sim-Real transfer under label granularity constraints.

AI.tldr: 提出MGTD数据集和粒度感知蒸馏方法，解决林业感知中合成到真实迁移时标签粒度不匹配的问题
AI.motivation: 解决林业感知中合成到真实迁移的挑战：真实数据只有粗粒度的树标签，而合成数据提供细粒度的树干/树冠标注，存在域偏移和粒度不匹配的双重问题
AI.method: 1) 构建MGTD混合粒度数据集（53k合成+3.6k真实图像）；2) 四阶段协议分离域偏移和粒度不匹配；3) 核心贡献：粒度感知蒸馏，通过logit空间合并和掩码统一将细粒度合成教师的结构先验转移到粗标签学生
AI.result: 实验显示一致的掩码AP提升，特别是对于小型/远处树木，为标签粒度约束下的Sim-Real迁移建立了测试基准
AI.conclusion: 提出的MGTD数据集和粒度感知蒸馏方法有效解决了林业感知中合成到真实迁移时的标签粒度不匹配问题，为相关研究提供了测试基准

title: Characterizing Lidar Range-Measurement Ambiguity due to Multiple Returns
comment: Proceedings of the 38th International Technical Meeting of the Satellite Division of The Institute of Navigation (ION GNSS+ 2025), Baltimore, Maryland, September 2025, pp. 1949-1963
summary: Reliable position and attitude sensing is critical for highly automated vehicles that operate on conventional roadways. Lidar sensors are increasingly incorporated into pose-estimation systems. Despite its great utility, lidar is a complex sensor, and its performance in roadway environments is not yet well understood. For instance, it is often assumed in lidar-localization algorithms that a lidar will always identify a unique surface along a given raypath. However, this assumption is not always true, as ample prior evidence exists to suggest that lidar units may generate measurements probabilistically when more than one scattering surface appears within the lidar's conical beam. In this paper, we analyze lidar datasets to characterize cases with probabilistic returns along particular raypaths. Our contribution is to present representative cumulative distribution functions (CDFs) for raypaths observed by two different mechanically rotating lidar units with stationary bases. In subsequent discussion, we outline a qualitative methodology to assess the effect of probabilistic multi-return cases on lidar-based localization.

AI.tldr: 该论文分析了激光雷达在道路环境中可能产生概率性多回波的情况，通过数据集分析展示了两种机械旋转激光雷达的累积分布函数，并提出了评估这些情况对定位影响的方法。
AI.motivation: 激光雷达在自动驾驶车辆姿态估计中日益重要，但对其在道路环境中的性能理解不足。现有定位算法通常假设激光雷达沿给定射线路径总能识别唯一表面，然而实际中当多个散射表面出现在激光束内时，激光雷达可能产生概率性测量，这会影响定位可靠性。
AI.method: 分析激光雷达数据集以表征特定射线路径上出现概率性回波的情况。使用两种不同机械旋转激光雷达单元（基座静止）收集数据，并呈现代表性的累积分布函数（CDFs）。随后提出定性方法来评估概率性多回波情况对激光雷达定位的影响。
AI.result: 展示了两种机械旋转激光雷达单元在特定射线路径上的代表性累积分布函数，揭示了激光雷达在遇到多个散射表面时产生概率性测量的实际模式。这些CDFs为理解激光雷达在复杂道路环境中的行为提供了实证基础。
AI.conclusion: 激光雷达在道路环境中确实可能产生概率性多回波，这挑战了传统定位算法的假设。提出的累积分布函数和定性评估方法有助于更好地理解和处理激光雷达定位中的不确定性，提高自动驾驶系统的可靠性。

title: Timescale Separation Enables Deep Reinforcement Learning Control of Rotating Detonation Engine Mode Transitions
summary: Rotating detonation engines (RDEs) are a promising propulsion concept that may offer higher thermodynamic efficiency and specific impulse than conventional systems, but nonlinear phenomena, including transitions to oscillatory or chaotic propagation modes, can hinder practical operation. Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) has emerged as a promising method for controlling complex nonlinear dynamics such as those observed in RDEs. However, the multi-timescale nature of the RDE system makes direct application of DRL challenging. We address this challenge by reformulating the DRL problem in a moving reference frame that follows the detonation-wave pattern, making the wave structure appear quasi-steady to the agent. This reformulation enables scale separation between fast detonation propagation and slower operating-mode dynamics. We train DRL controllers to modulate spatially segmented injection pressure in a one-dimensional reduced-order RDE model and induce rapid transitions between different mode-locked states. Across a range of actuation periods, initial states, and target modes, controllers trained in the moving frame learn more reliably than those trained in a stationary frame and remain effective over a broader range of actuation periods. These results suggest that symmetry-aware moving reference frame formulations may be useful for related multiscale flow-control problems and that scale separation should be exploited whenever possible to enable DRL control of multi-timescale systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于移动参考系的深度强化学习方法，用于控制旋转爆震发动机中的多时间尺度非线性动力学问题，相比传统方法具有更好的学习可靠性和控制效果。
AI.motivation: 旋转爆震发动机（RDEs）具有比传统推进系统更高的热力学效率和比冲，但其非线性现象（如振荡或混沌传播模式）会阻碍实际运行。深度强化学习（DRL）是控制这类复杂非线性动力学的有前景方法，但RDE系统的多时间尺度特性使DRL直接应用面临挑战。
AI.method: 通过将DRL问题重新表述在跟随爆震波模式的移动参考系中，使波结构对智能体呈现准稳态。这种重新表述实现了快速爆震传播与较慢运行模式动力学之间的尺度分离。在简化的一维RDE模型中，训练DRL控制器来调制空间分段喷射压力，并诱导不同模式锁定状态之间的快速转换。
AI.result: 在多种驱动周期、初始状态和目标模式下，在移动参考系中训练的控制器比在静止参考系中训练的控制器学习更可靠，并且在更广泛的驱动周期范围内保持有效。
AI.conclusion: 对称感知的移动参考系表述可能对相关的多尺度流动控制问题有用，应尽可能利用尺度分离来实现对多时间尺度系统的DRL控制。

title: Asking What Matters: Reward-Driven Clarification for Software Engineering Tasks
summary: Humans often specify tasks incompletely, so assistants must know when and how to ask clarifying questions. However, effective clarification remains challenging in software engineering tasks as not all missing information is equally valuable, and questions must target information users can realistically provide.
