summary: This paper proposes a common interface for real-time low-level motion planning of collaborative robotic arms, aimed at enabling broader applicability and improved portability across heterogeneous hardware platforms. In previous work, we introduced WinGs Operating Studio (WOS), a middleware solution that abstracts diverse robotic components into uniform software resources and provides a broad suite of language-agnostic APIs. This paper specifically focuses on its minimal yet flexible interface for real-time end-effector trajectory control. By employing an n-degree polynomial interpolator in conjunction with a quadratic programming solver, the proposed method generates smooth, continuously differentiable trajectories with precise position, velocity, and acceleration profiles. We validate our approach in three distinct scenarios. First, in an offline demonstration, a collaborative arm accurately draws various geometric shapes on paper. Second, in an interruptible, low-frequency re-planning setting, a robotic manipulator grasps a dynamic object placed on a moving mobile robot. Finally, we conducted a teleoperation experiment in which one robotic arm controlled another to perform a series of dexterous manipulations, confirming the proposed method's reliability, versatility, and ease of use.

AI.tldr: 提出用于协作机械臂实时低级运动规划的通用接口，通过多项式插值和二次规划求解器生成平滑轨迹，在离线绘图、动态抓取和遥操作三个场景中验证
AI.motivation: 为异构硬件平台的协作机械臂提供通用接口，提升应用范围和可移植性，解决不同机器人组件统一抽象和实时末端执行器轨迹控制的需求
AI.method: 基于WinGs Operating Studio中间件，提供最小化但灵活的实时末端执行器轨迹控制接口，采用n次多项式插值器和二次规划求解器生成平滑、连续可微的轨迹，精确控制位置、速度和加速度
AI.result: 在三个场景中验证：1) 离线演示中机械臂精确绘制几何图形；2) 可中断的低频重规划场景中机械臂抓取移动机器人上的动态物体；3) 遥操作实验中一个机械臂控制另一个执行灵巧操作
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在可靠性、多功能性和易用性方面得到验证，为异构机器人平台的实时低级运动规划提供了有效的通用接口解决方案

title: Free Lunch for Unified Multimodal Models: Enhancing Generation via Reflective Rectification with Inherent Understanding
summary: Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) aim to integrate visual understanding and generation within a single structure. However, these models exhibit a notable capability mismatch, where their understanding capability significantly outperforms their generation. This mismatch indicates that the model's rich internal knowledge, while effective for understanding tasks, remains underactivated during generation. To address this, we draw inspiration from the human ``Thinking-While-Drawing'' paradigm, where humans continuously reflect to activate their knowledge and rectify intermediate results. In this paper, we propose UniRect-CoT, a training-free unified rectification chain-of-thought framework. Our approach unlocks the ``free lunch'' hidden in the UMM's powerful inherent understanding to continuously reflect, activating its internal knowledge and rectifying intermediate results during generation.We regard the diffusion denoising process in UMMs as an intrinsic visual reasoning process and align the intermediate results with the target instruction understood by the model, serving as a self-supervisory signal to rectify UMM generation.Extensive experiments demonstrate that UniRect-CoT can be easily integrated into existing UMMs, significantly enhancing generation quality across diverse complex tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出UniRect-CoT框架，通过"边思考边绘制"范式激活统一多模态模型的理解能力来纠正生成过程，无需额外训练即可提升生成质量
AI.motivation: 统一多模态模型存在理解能力显著优于生成能力的不匹配问题，模型丰富的内部知识在生成过程中未被充分激活，需要解决这一能力差距
AI.method: 提出UniRect-CoT框架，将扩散去噪过程视为内在视觉推理过程，通过将中间结果与模型理解的目标指令对齐，作为自监督信号来纠正生成
AI.result: 实验表明UniRect-CoT可轻松集成到现有统一多模态模型中，显著提升多种复杂任务的生成质量
AI.conclusion: 通过激活模型内在理解能力来纠正生成过程是有效的，UniRect-CoT为提升统一多模态模型生成质量提供了无需训练的解决方案

title: Toward Hardware-Agnostic Quadrupedal World Models via Morphology Conditioning
summary: World models promise a paradigm shift in robotics, where an agent learns the underlying physics of its environment once to enable efficient planning and behavior learning. However, current world models are often hardware-locked specialists: a model trained on a Boston Dynamics Spot robot fails catastrophically on a Unitree Go1 due to the mismatch in kinematic and dynamic properties, as the model overfits to specific embodiment constraints rather than capturing the universal locomotion dynamics. Consequently, a slight change in actuator dynamics or limb length necessitates training a new model from scratch. In this work, we take a step towards a framework for training a generalizable Quadrupedal World Model (QWM) that disentangles environmental dynamics from robot morphology. We address the limitations of implicit system identification, where treating static physical properties (like mass or limb length) as latent variables to be inferred from motion history creates an adaptation lag that can compromise zero-shot safety and efficiency. Instead, we explicitly condition the generative dynamics on the robot's engineering specifications. By integrating a physical morphology encoder and a reward normalizer, we enable the model to serve as a neural simulator capable of generalizing across morphologies. This capability unlocks zero-shot control across a range of embodiments. We introduce, for the first time, a world model that enables zero-shot generalization to new morphologies for locomotion. While we carefully study the limitations of our method, QWM operates as a distribution-bounded interpolator within the quadrupedal morphology family rather than a universal physics engine, this work represents a significant step toward morphology-conditioned world models for legged locomotion.

AI.tldr: 提出QWM框架，通过显式编码机器人形态学参数，实现四足机器人世界模型在不同形态间的零样本泛化，解决现有模型对特定硬件过拟合的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前世界模型存在硬件锁定问题：针对特定机器人（如波士顿动力Spot）训练的模型无法泛化到其他形态（如宇树Go1），因为模型过度拟合特定硬件约束而非学习通用运动动力学。微小的执行器动态或肢体长度变化都需要重新训练模型，限制了世界模型的通用性。
AI.method: 提出四足世界模型（QWM）框架，通过显式条件化生成动态于机器人工程规格，而非隐式系统辨识。集成物理形态编码器和奖励归一器，使模型能够作为神经模拟器在不同形态间泛化。将环境动力学与机器人形态学解耦，实现零样本控制。
AI.result: 首次实现了能够在不同形态四足机器人间进行零样本泛化的世界模型。QWM作为四足形态家族内的分布有界插值器，而非通用物理引擎，但显著推进了形态条件化世界模型的发展。
AI.conclusion: QWM代表了向腿部运动形态条件化世界模型的重要一步，通过显式编码机器人形态参数解决了硬件锁定问题，实现了跨形态零样本泛化能力，为通用机器人世界模型提供了新框架。

title: Temporal Contrastive Decoding: A Training-Free Method for Large Audio-Language Models
summary: Large audio-language models (LALMs) generalize across speech, sound, and music, but unified decoders can exhibit a \emph{temporal smoothing bias}: transient acoustic cues may be underutilized in favor of temporally smooth context that is better supported by language priors, leading to less specific audio-grounded outputs. We propose \emph{Temporal Contrastive Decoding} (TCD), a training-free decoding method for unified LALMs that mitigates this effect at inference time. TCD constructs a temporally blurred slow-path view by smoothing the input waveform and re-encoding it, then contrasts next-token logits from the original and slow-path views. The contrastive signal is applied as a token-level logit update restricted to a small candidate set. A self-normalized stability score sets the blur window and update scale, and a step-wise gate based on uncertainty and audio reliance activates the update only when needed. Experiments on MMAU and AIR-Bench show consistent improvements on strong unified LALMs. We further conduct ablations and an architectural applicability study to analyze the contributions of key components and how TCD behaves across large audio-language model designs.

AI.tldr: TCD是一种无需训练的解码方法，通过对比原始音频和时域模糊音频的token logits来缓解统一音频-语言模型中的时间平滑偏差问题，提高音频grounding的准确性。
AI.motivation: 统一音频-语言模型存在时间平滑偏差问题：模型倾向于利用时间平滑的上下文（语言先验支持）而非瞬态声学线索，导致音频grounding的输出不够具体。
AI.method: 提出Temporal Contrastive Decoding：1）通过平滑输入波形创建时域模糊的慢路径视图并重新编码；2）对比原始视图和慢路径视图的next-token logits；3）将对比信号作为token级logit更新，限制在小候选集内；4）使用自归一化稳定性分数设置模糊窗口和更新尺度；5）基于不确定性和音频依赖的步进门控机制仅在需要时激活更新。
AI.result: 在MMAU和AIR-Bench基准测试中，TCD在强大的统一音频-语言模型上表现出一致的改进。消融实验和架构适用性研究分析了关键组件的贡献以及TCD在不同大型音频-语言模型设计中的行为。
AI.conclusion: TCD是一种有效的训练免费解码方法，能够缓解统一音频-语言模型中的时间平滑偏差，提高模型对瞬态声学线索的利用，从而生成更具体的音频grounding输出。

title: Task-Aware Bimanual Affordance Prediction via VLM-Guided Semantic-Geometric Reasoning
summary: Bimanual manipulation requires reasoning about where to interact with an object and which arm should perform each action, a joint affordance localization and arm allocation problem that geometry-only planners cannot resolve without semantic understanding of task intent. Existing approaches either treat affordance prediction as coarse part segmentation or rely on geometric heuristics for arm assignment, failing to jointly reason about task-relevant contact regions and arm allocation. We reframe bimanual manipulation as a joint affordance localization and arm allocation problem and propose a hierarchical framework for task-aware bimanual affordance prediction that leverages a Vision-Language Model (VLM) to generalize across object categories and task descriptions without requiring category-specific training. Our approach fuses multi-view RGB-D observations into a consistent 3D scene representation and generates global 6-DoF grasp candidates, which are then spatially and semantically filtered by querying the VLM for task-relevant affordance regions on each object, as well as for arm allocation to the individual objects, thereby ensuring geometric validity while respecting task semantics. We evaluate our method on a dual-arm platform across nine real-world manipulation tasks spanning four categories: parallel manipulation, coordinated stabilization, tool use, and human handover. Our approach achieves consistently higher task success rates than geometric and semantic baselines for task-oriented grasping, demonstrating that explicit semantic reasoning over affordances and arm allocation helps enable reliable bimanual manipulation in unstructured environments.

AI.tldr: 提出一个分层框架，利用视觉语言模型进行任务感知的双臂操作可负担性预测，联合解决可负担性定位和手臂分配问题
AI.motivation: 双臂操作需要同时考虑与物体的交互位置和手臂分配，这是一个几何规划器无法单独解决的联合问题。现有方法要么将可负担性预测视为粗略的部分分割，要么依赖几何启发式进行手臂分配，未能联合推理任务相关的接触区域和手臂分配
AI.method: 分层框架：1) 将多视角RGB-D观测融合为一致的3D场景表示，生成全局6自由度抓取候选；2) 查询视觉语言模型对每个物体进行任务相关的可负担性区域空间和语义过滤；3) 查询视觉语言模型进行手臂分配到各个物体，确保几何有效性同时尊重任务语义
AI.result: 在双臂平台上评估了9个真实世界操作任务，涵盖4个类别：并行操作、协调稳定、工具使用和人类交接。相比几何和语义基线，在任务导向抓取方面实现了更高的任务成功率
AI.conclusion: 对可负担性和手臂分配的显式语义推理有助于在非结构化环境中实现可靠的双臂操作，视觉语言模型能够泛化到不同物体类别和任务描述，无需类别特定训练

title: Momentum Further Constrains Sharpness at the Edge of Stochastic Stability
summary: Recent work suggests that (stochastic) gradient descent self-organizes near an instability boundary, shaping both optimization and the solutions found. Momentum and mini-batch gradients are widely used in practical deep learning optimization, but it remains unclear whether they operate in a comparable regime of instability. We demonstrate that SGD with momentum exhibits an Edge of Stochastic Stability (EoSS)-like regime with batch-size-dependent behavior that cannot be explained by a single momentum-adjusted stability threshold. Batch Sharpness (the expected directional mini-batch curvature) stabilizes in two distinct regimes: at small batch sizes it converges to a lower plateau $2(1-β)/η$, reflecting amplification of stochastic fluctuations by momentum and favoring flatter regions than vanilla SGD; at large batch sizes it converges to a higher plateau $2(1+β)/η$, where momentum recovers its classical stabilizing effect and favors sharper regions consistent with full-batch dynamics. We further show that this aligns with linear stability thresholds and discuss the implications for hyperparameter tuning and coupling.

AI.tldr: 动量SGD在批量大小依赖的稳定性边界附近自组织，表现出两种不同的稳定性机制：小批量时动量放大随机波动促进平坦区域，大批量时动量恢复经典稳定效应偏好尖锐区域。
AI.motivation: 虽然动量和小批量梯度在深度学习中广泛应用，但尚不清楚它们是否在可比较的不稳定性机制下运行。需要研究动量SGD如何在小批量和大批量情况下表现出不同的稳定性行为。
AI.method: 通过分析SGD with momentum的稳定性边界，引入批量锐度概念（期望方向性小批量曲率），研究其在两种批量大小机制下的收敛行为。结合线性稳定性阈值进行分析。
AI.result: 动量SGD表现出类似随机稳定性边界的行为，具有批量大小依赖性。小批量时批量锐度收敛到较低平台2(1-β)/η，动量放大随机波动，偏好比普通SGD更平坦的区域；大批量时收敛到较高平台2(1+β)/η，动量恢复经典稳定效应，偏好与全批量动力学一致的更尖锐区域。
AI.conclusion: 动量SGD的稳定性机制具有批量大小依赖性，无法用单一动量调整的稳定性阈值解释。这一发现对超参数调优和耦合有重要影响，表明需要根据批量大小调整优化策略。

title: DiT as Real-Time Rerenderer: Streaming Video Stylization with Autoregressive Diffusion Transformer
summary: Recent advances in video generation models has significantly accelerated video generation and related downstream tasks. Among these, video stylization holds important research value in areas such as immersive applications and artistic creation, attracting widespread attention. However, existing diffusion-based video stylization methods struggle to maintain stability and consistency when processing long videos, and their high computational cost and multi-step denoising make them difficult to apply in practical scenarios. In this work, we propose RTR-DiT (DiT as Real-Time Rerenderer), a steaming video stylization framework built upon Diffusion Transformer. We first fine-tune a bidirectional teacher model on a curated video stylization dataset, supporting both text-guided and reference-guided video stylization tasks, and subsequently distill it into a few-step autoregressive model via post-training with Self Forcing and Distribution Matching Distillation. Furthermore, we propose a reference-preserving KV cache update strategy that not only enables stable and consistent processing of long videos, but also supports real-time switching between text prompts and reference images. Experimental results show that RTR-DiT outperforms existing methods in both text-guided and reference-guided video stylization tasks, in terms of quantitative metrics and visual quality, and demonstrates excellent performance in real-time long video stylization and interactive style-switching applications.

AI.tldr: RTR-DiT：基于Diffusion Transformer的实时流式视频风格化框架，通过教师模型微调和知识蒸馏实现稳定、一致的长视频风格化，支持文本引导和参考图像引导两种模式。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散的视频风格化方法在处理长视频时难以保持稳定性和一致性，且计算成本高、多步去噪过程使其难以应用于实际场景，需要一种实时、高效的视频风格化解决方案。
AI.method: 1. 在精选的视频风格化数据集上微调双向教师模型，支持文本引导和参考引导视频风格化；2. 通过后训练使用Self Forcing和Distribution Matching Distillation将教师模型蒸馏为少步自回归模型；3. 提出参考保持的KV缓存更新策略，实现长视频稳定处理和实时风格切换。
AI.result: RTR-DiT在文本引导和参考引导视频风格化任务中均优于现有方法，在定量指标和视觉质量上表现优异，在实时长视频风格化和交互式风格切换应用中展现出卓越性能。
AI.conclusion: RTR-DiT框架成功解决了现有视频风格化方法在长视频处理中的稳定性和一致性难题，实现了实时、高效的视频风格化，为沉浸式应用和艺术创作提供了实用解决方案。

title: LMGenDrive: Bridging Multimodal Understanding and Generative World Modeling for End-to-End Driving
summary: Recent years have seen remarkable progress in autonomous driving, yet generalization to long-tail and open-world scenarios remains a major bottleneck for large-scale deployment. To address this challenge, some works use LLMs and VLMs for vision-language understanding and reasoning, enabling vehicles to interpret rare and safety-critical situations when generating actions. Others study generative world models to capture the spatio-temporal evolution of driving scenes, allowing agents to imagine possible futures before acting. Inspired by human intelligence, which unifies understanding and imagination, we explore a unified model for autonomous driving. We present LMGenDrive, the first framework that combines LLM-based multimodal understanding with generative world models for end-to-end closed-loop driving. Given multi-view camera inputs and natural-language instructions, LMGenDrive generates both future driving videos and control signals. This design provides complementary benefits: video prediction improves spatio-temporal scene modeling, while the LLM contributes strong semantic priors and instruction grounding from large-scale pretraining. We further propose a progressive three-stage training strategy, from vision pretraining to multi-step long-horizon driving, to improve stability and performance. LMGenDrive supports both low-latency online planning and autoregressive offline video generation. Experiments show that it significantly outperforms prior methods on challenging closed-loop benchmarks, with clear gains in instruction following, spatio-temporal understanding, and robustness to rare scenarios. These results suggest that unifying multimodal understanding and generation is a promising direction for more generalizable and robust embodied decision-making systems.

AI.tldr: LMGenDrive：首个结合LLM多模态理解与生成世界模型的端到端闭环驾驶框架，通过统一理解和想象能力提升自动驾驶在长尾场景的泛化性
AI.motivation: 当前自动驾驶在长尾和开放世界场景的泛化能力不足，现有方法要么使用LLM/VLM进行视觉语言理解推理，要么研究生成世界模型捕捉时空演化，但人类智能统一了理解和想象能力，因此需要探索统一模型
AI.method: 提出LMGenDrive框架，结合LLM多模态理解与生成世界模型，给定多视角摄像头输入和自然语言指令，同时生成未来驾驶视频和控制信号；采用渐进式三阶段训练策略：视觉预训练→多步长时域驾驶；支持低延迟在线规划和自回归离线视频生成
AI.result: 在挑战性闭环基准测试中显著优于现有方法，在指令跟随、时空理解和罕见场景鲁棒性方面有明显提升
AI.conclusion: 统一多模态理解和生成是构建更通用、鲁棒具身决策系统的有前景方向

title: Reinforcement Learning via Value Gradient Flow
summary: We study behavior-regularized reinforcement learning (RL), where regularization toward a reference distribution (the dataset in offline RL or the base model in LLM RL finetuning) is essential to prevent value over-optimization caused by erroneous out-of-distribution extrapolation. Existing methods either rely on reparameterized policy gradient, which are difficult to scale to large generative models, or on reject sampling, which can be overly conservative when attempting to move beyond the behavior support. In this paper, we propose Value Gradient Flow (VGF), a scalable new paradigm for behavior-regularized RL. VGF casts behavior-regularized RL as an optimal transport problem that maps the reference distribution to the value-induced optimal policy distribution. We solve this transport problem via discrete gradient flow, where value gradients guide particles initialized from the reference distribution. Our analysis shows that VGF imposes regularization implicitly by controlling the transport budget. VGF eliminates explicit policy parameterization while remaining expressive and flexible, this enables adaptive test-time scaling by adjusting the transport budget. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VGF significantly outperforms prior methods, achieving state-of-the-art results on offline RL benchmarks (D4RL, OGBench) and LLM RL tasks. Code and runs can be found at https://ryanxhr.github.io/vgf.

AI.tldr: 提出Value Gradient Flow (VGF)，一种用于行为正则化强化学习的新范式，将问题转化为最优传输问题，通过离散梯度流求解，无需显式策略参数化。
AI.motivation: 现有行为正则化RL方法存在局限性：基于重参数化策略梯度的方法难以扩展到大型生成模型，而拒绝采样方法在试图超越行为支持时可能过于保守。需要一种可扩展且灵活的新方法。
AI.method: 将行为正则化RL建模为最优传输问题，将参考分布映射到价值诱导的最优策略分布。通过离散梯度流求解，其中价值梯度引导从参考分布初始化的粒子。通过控制传输预算实现隐式正则化。
AI.result: 在离线RL基准（D4RL, OGBench）和LLM RL任务上显著优于现有方法，达到最先进水平。VGF消除了显式策略参数化，同时保持表达性和灵活性，支持通过调整传输预算实现自适应测试时缩放。
AI.conclusion: VGF为行为正则化RL提供了一个可扩展的新范式，通过最优传输框架和离散梯度流方法有效解决了现有方法的局限性，在多个基准测试中表现出优越性能。

title: Enhancing Mixture-of-Experts Specialization via Cluster-Aware Upcycling
summary: Sparse Upcycling provides an efficient way to initialize a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model from pretrained dense weights instead of training from scratch. However, since all experts start from identical weights and the router is randomly initialized, the model suffers from expert symmetry and limited early specialization. We propose Cluster-aware Upcycling, a strategy that incorporates semantic structure into MoE initialization. Our method first partitions the dense model's input activations into semantic clusters. Each expert is then initialized using the subspace representations of its corresponding cluster via truncated SVD, while setting the router's initial weights to the cluster centroids. This cluster-aware initialization breaks expert symmetry and encourages early specialization aligned with the data distribution. Furthermore, we introduce an expert-ensemble self-distillation loss that stabilizes training by providing reliable routing guidance using an ensemble teacher. When evaluated on CLIP ViT-B/32 and ViT-B/16, Cluster-aware Upcycling consistently outperforms existing methods across both zero-shot and few-shot benchmarks. The proposed method also produces more diverse and disentangled expert representations, reduces inter-expert similarity, and leads to more confident routing behavior. Project page: https://sanghyeokchu.github.io/cluster-aware-upcycling/

AI.tldr: 提出Cluster-aware Upcycling方法，通过语义聚类初始化MoE模型，打破专家对称性并促进早期专业化，提升CLIP模型的零样本和少样本性能
AI.motivation: 现有Sparse Upcycling方法从预训练密集权重初始化MoE模型，但由于所有专家从相同权重开始且路由器随机初始化，存在专家对称性和早期专业化受限的问题
AI.method: 首先将密集模型的输入激活划分为语义聚类，然后通过截断SVD使用对应聚类的子空间表示初始化每个专家，同时将路由器的初始权重设置为聚类中心点；还引入专家集成自蒸馏损失，通过集成教师提供可靠的路由指导来稳定训练
AI.result: 在CLIP ViT-B/32和ViT-B/16上评估，Cluster-aware Upcycling在零样本和少样本基准测试中始终优于现有方法；该方法还产生更多样化和解耦的专家表示，降低专家间相似度，并导致更自信的路由行为
AI.conclusion: Cluster-aware Upcycling通过将语义结构融入MoE初始化，有效解决了专家对称性问题，促进了早期专业化，显著提升了模型性能，并产生了更优的专家表示和路由行为

title: ADP-DiT: Text-Guided Diffusion Transformer for Brain Image Generation in Alzheimer's Disease Progression
summary: Alzheimer's disease (AD) progresses heterogeneously across individuals, motivating subject-specific synthesis of follow-up magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) to support progression assessment. While Diffusion Transformers (DiT), an emerging transformer-based diffusion model, offer a scalable backbone for image synthesis, longitudinal AD MRI generation with clinically interpretable control over follow-up time and participant metadata remains underexplored. We present ADP-DiT, an interval-aware, clinically text-conditioned diffusion transformer for longitudinal AD MRI synthesis. ADP-DiT encodes follow-up interval together with multi-domain demographic, diagnostic (CN/MCI/AD), and neuropsychological information as a natural-language prompt, enabling time-specific control beyond coarse diagnostic stages. To inject this conditioning effectively, we use dual text encoders-OpenCLIP for vision-language alignment and T5 for richer clinical-language understanding. Their embeddings are fused into DiT through cross-attention for fine-grained guidance and adaptive layer normalization for global modulation. We further enhance anatomical fidelity by applying rotary positional embeddings to image tokens and performing diffusion in a pre-trained SDXL-VAE latent space to enable efficient high-resolution reconstruction. On 3,321 longitudinal 3T T1-weighted scans from 712 participants (259,038 image slices), ADP-DiT achieves SSIM 0.8739 and PSNR 29.32 dB, improving over a DiT baseline by +0.1087 SSIM and +6.08 dB PSNR while capturing progression-related changes such as ventricular enlargement and shrinking hippocampus. These results suggest that integrating comprehensive, subject-specific clinical conditions with architectures can improve longitudinal AD MRI synthesis.

AI.tldr: ADP-DiT：一种基于扩散变换器的纵向阿尔茨海默病MRI合成方法，通过临床文本条件控制随访时间和患者元数据
AI.motivation: 阿尔茨海默病在不同个体间进展异质性显著，需要针对特定患者的随访MRI合成来支持进展评估。现有方法在纵向AD MRI生成中，对随访时间和患者元数据的临床可解释控制仍不足。
AI.method: 提出ADP-DiT模型，采用区间感知的临床文本条件扩散变换器。使用双文本编码器（OpenCLIP用于视觉-语言对齐，T5用于临床语言理解）将随访间隔、人口统计学、诊断信息和神经心理学数据编码为自然语言提示。通过交叉注意力进行细粒度指导，自适应层归一化进行全局调制。在预训练的SDXL-VAE潜在空间中进行扩散，并应用旋转位置嵌入增强解剖保真度。
AI.result: 在3,321个纵向3T T1加权扫描（712名参与者，259,038个图像切片）上，ADP-DiT达到SSIM 0.8739和PSNR 29.32 dB，相比DiT基线分别提升0.1087 SSIM和6.08 dB PSNR，能够捕捉脑室扩大和海马萎缩等进展相关变化。
AI.conclusion: 将全面的、特定于患者的临床条件与扩散变换器架构相结合，能够显著改善纵向AD MRI合成质量，为阿尔茨海默病进展评估提供更精确的影像学支持。

title: Dissecting Failure Dynamics in Large Language Model Reasoning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve strong performance through extended inference-time deliberation, yet how their reasoning failures arise remains poorly understood. By analyzing model-generated reasoning trajectories, we find that errors are not uniformly distributed but often originate from a small number of early transition points, after which reasoning remains locally coherent but globally incorrect. These transitions coincide with localized spikes in token-level entropy, and alternative continuations from the same intermediate state can still lead to correct solutions. Based on these observations, we introduce GUARD, a targeted inference-time framework that probes and redirects critical transitions using uncertainty signals. Empirical evaluations across multiple benchmarks confirm that interventions guided by these failure dynamics lead to more reliable reasoning outcomes. Our findings highlight the importance of understanding when and how reasoning first deviates, complementing existing approaches that focus on scaling inference-time computation.

AI.tldr: GUARD框架通过探测和重定向LLM推理中的关键过渡点来提升推理可靠性，这些过渡点表现为早期熵值尖峰，是推理失败的主要来源。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型语言模型通过扩展推理时间思考获得强大性能，但对其推理失败如何产生仍缺乏深入理解。现有研究主要关注扩展推理时间计算，而忽略了推理过程中何时以及如何首次偏离正确路径这一关键问题。
AI.method: 通过分析模型生成的推理轨迹，发现错误并非均匀分布，而是源于少数早期过渡点，这些点伴随局部熵值尖峰。基于此观察，提出GUARD框架，利用不确定性信号探测和重定向这些关键过渡点。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上的实证评估证实，基于这些失败动态的干预能够带来更可靠的推理结果。研究发现从相同中间状态的替代延续仍可导向正确解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 理解推理何时以及如何首次偏离对于提升LLM推理可靠性至关重要，这补充了现有主要关注扩展推理时间计算的方法。GUARD框架通过针对性地干预关键过渡点，为改进推理过程提供了新途径。

title: Generative Simulation for Policy Learning in Physical Human-Robot Interaction
summary: Developing autonomous physical human-robot interaction (pHRI) systems is limited by the scarcity of large-scale training data to learn robust robot behaviors for real-world applications. In this paper, we introduce a zero-shot "text2sim2real" generative simulation framework that automatically synthesizes diverse pHRI scenarios from high-level natural-language prompts. Leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs), our pipeline procedurally generates soft-body human models, scene layouts, and robot motion trajectories for assistive tasks. We utilize this framework to autonomously collect large-scale synthetic demonstration datasets and then train vision-based imitation learning policies operating on segmented point clouds. We evaluate our approach through a user study on two physically assistive tasks: scratching and bathing. Our learned policies successfully achieve zero-shot sim-to-real transfer, attaining success rates exceeding 80% and demonstrating resilience to unscripted human motion. Overall, we introduce the first generative simulation pipeline for pHRI applications, automating simulation environment synthesis, data collection, and policy learning. Additional information may be found on our project website: https://rchi-lab.github.io/gen_phri/

AI.tldr: 提出首个用于物理人机交互的零样本"文本到仿真到现实"生成式仿真框架，通过自然语言提示自动合成多样化pHRI场景，实现大规模合成数据收集和视觉模仿学习策略训练
AI.motivation: 物理人机交互系统开发受限于大规模训练数据的稀缺性，难以学习适用于现实应用的鲁棒机器人行为
AI.method: 利用大语言模型和视觉语言模型构建生成式仿真流水线，从高级自然语言提示自动生成软体人体模型、场景布局和机器人运动轨迹，收集大规模合成演示数据集，训练基于分割点云的视觉模仿学习策略
AI.result: 在抓挠和沐浴两个辅助任务上实现零样本仿真到现实迁移，成功率超过80%，对非脚本化人体运动具有鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: 提出了首个用于pHRI应用的生成式仿真流水线，实现了仿真环境合成、数据收集和策略学习的自动化，为物理人机交互系统开发提供了有效的数据生成解决方案

title: Quantifying Cross-Query Contradictions in Multi-Query LLM Reasoning
comment: Accepted at the ICLR 2026 Workshop on Logical Reasoning of Large Language Models. 9 pages, 6 tables, code and data at https://huggingface.co/datasets/rohitspider/cross_query_benchmark
summary: Large language models frequently produce mutually inconsistent answers when reasoning over multiple related queries. We study case-file logical consistency: maintaining a globally satisfiable belief state across interdependent queries. We introduce a benchmark of 390 multi-query reasoning instances with entailment/contradiction/unknown labels and propose set-level metrics including Case Satisfiability Rate, Contradiction Density and Revision Cost. Our solver-augmented approach extracts commitments, verifies global satisfiability and performs counterexample-guided repair. Across four reasoning domains, our method substantially reduces cross-query contradictions (SetCons: 0.56 to 0.94) while preserving per-query accuracy, demonstrating that global coherence is critical for robust multi-query reasoning.

AI.tldr: 论文提出解决大语言模型在多查询推理中逻辑不一致问题的方法，通过承诺提取、全局可满足性验证和反例引导修复来确保跨查询的一致性
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在处理多个相关查询时经常产生相互矛盾的答案，缺乏全局一致的信念状态，这影响了多查询推理的可靠性
AI.method: 提出基于求解器增强的方法：1) 从模型回答中提取承诺；2) 验证全局可满足性；3) 进行反例引导修复；同时引入包含390个多查询推理实例的基准和集合级评估指标
AI.result: 在四个推理领域中，该方法显著减少了跨查询矛盾（SetCons从0.56提升到0.94），同时保持了单查询准确性，证明全局一致性对鲁棒多查询推理至关重要
AI.conclusion: 全局一致性是多查询推理的关键要素，提出的求解器增强方法能有效减少大语言模型的逻辑不一致性，提高推理的鲁棒性和可靠性

title: SIM1: Physics-Aligned Simulator as Zero-Shot Data Scaler in Deformable Worlds
summary: Robotic manipulation with deformable objects represents a data-intensive regime in embodied learning, where shape, contact, and topology co-evolve in ways that far exceed the variability of rigids. Although simulation promises relief from the cost of real-world data acquisition, prevailing sim-to-real pipelines remain rooted in rigid-body abstractions, producing mismatched geometry, fragile soft dynamics, and motion primitives poorly suited for cloth interaction. We posit that simulation fails not for being synthetic, but for being ungrounded. To address this, we introduce SIM1, a physics-aligned real-to-sim-to-real data engine that grounds simulation in the physical world. Given limited demonstrations, the system digitizes scenes into metric-consistent twins, calibrates deformable dynamics through elastic modeling, and expands behaviors via diffusion-based trajectory generation with quality filtering. This pipeline transforms sparse observations into scaled synthetic supervision with near-demonstration fidelity. Experiments show that policies trained on purely synthetic data achieve parity with real-data baselines at a 1:15 equivalence ratio, while delivering 90% zero-shot success and 50% generalization gains in real-world deployment. These results validate physics-aligned simulation as scalable supervision for deformable manipulation and a practical pathway for data-efficient policy learning.

AI.tldr: SIM1：基于物理对齐的真实-仿真-真实数据引擎，通过将仿真建立在物理世界基础上，为可变形物体操作提供可扩展的合成监督，实现数据高效策略学习。
AI.motivation: 当前基于刚体抽象的仿真到真实流水线在处理可变形物体时存在几何不匹配、软体动力学脆弱、运动基元不适配等问题。仿真失败的原因不是合成性，而是缺乏物理基础。
AI.method: SIM1系统：1) 将有限演示场景数字化为度量一致的双胞胎；2) 通过弹性建模校准可变形动力学；3) 使用基于扩散的轨迹生成和质量过滤扩展行为。将稀疏观察转化为具有接近演示保真度的规模化合成监督。
AI.result: 纯合成数据训练的策略在1:15等效比下达到与真实数据基线相当的性能，在真实世界部署中实现90%的零样本成功率和50%的泛化增益。
AI.conclusion: 物理对齐的仿真可作为可变形物体操作的可扩展监督方法，为数据高效策略学习提供实用途径。

title: Multistage Conditional Compositional Optimization
summary: We introduce Multistage Conditional Compositional Optimization (MCCO) as a new paradigm for decision-making under uncertainty that combines aspects of multistage stochastic programming and conditional stochastic optimization. MCCO minimizes a nest of conditional expectations and nonlinear cost functions. It has numerous applications and arises, for example, in optimal stopping, linear-quadratic regulator problems, distributionally robust contextual bandits, as well as in problems involving dynamic risk measures. The naïve nested sampling approach for MCCO suffers from the curse of dimensionality familiar from scenario tree-based multistage stochastic programming, that is, its scenario complexity grows exponentially with the number of nests. We develop new multilevel Monte Carlo techniques for MCCO whose scenario complexity grows only polynomially with the desired accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出多阶段条件组合优化(MCCO)新范式，结合多阶段随机规划和条件随机优化，解决嵌套条件期望和非线性成本函数最小化问题，应用广泛但传统方法面临维度灾难，新方法使用多层蒙特卡洛技术实现多项式复杂度
AI.motivation: 传统多阶段随机规划使用场景树方法面临维度灾难问题，场景复杂度随嵌套层数指数增长。需要开发新的计算方法来解决决策不确定性下的嵌套条件期望优化问题，特别是在最优停止、线性二次调节器、分布鲁棒上下文赌博机等应用中
AI.method: 提出多阶段条件组合优化(MCCO)新范式，结合多阶段随机规划和条件随机优化。开发多层蒙特卡洛技术，通过多级采样策略避免传统嵌套采样的指数复杂度，实现多项式复杂度的近似计算
AI.result: 新方法显著降低了计算复杂度，场景复杂度从指数增长改进为多项式增长，仅随所需精度多项式增长，解决了传统方法的维度灾难问题
AI.conclusion: MCCO为不确定性下的决策提供了新框架，多层蒙特卡洛技术有效解决了计算复杂度问题，为最优停止、线性二次调节器、分布鲁棒上下文赌博机等应用提供了可行的计算方法

title: Enhanced Text-to-Image Generation by Fine-grained Multimodal Reasoning
summary: With the rapid progress of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), unified MLLMs that jointly perform image understanding and generation have advanced significantly. However, despite the inherent reasoning capabilities of unified MLLMs for self-reflection and self-refinement, their use in text-to-image generation remains largely underexplored. Meanwhile, existing multimodal reasoning-based image generation methods mostly rely on holistic image-text alignment judgments, without fine-grained reflection and refinement of detailed prompt attributes, leading to limited fine-grained control. Therefore, we propose Fine-grained Multimodal Reasoning (FiMR), a framework that leverages decomposed visual question answering (VQA) to break down an input prompt into minimal semantic units-such as entities and attributes-and verify each unit via VQA to generate explicit, fine-grained feedback. Based on this feedback, FiMR then applies targeted, localized refinements. This fine-grained self-reasoning and self-refinement enable MLLMs to achieve more precise improvements in image-prompt alignment and overall generation quality at test time. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FiMR consistently outperforms image generation baselines, including reasoning-based methods, particularly on compositional text-to-image benchmarks. The code and models are available at https://github.com/KU-AGI/FiMR

AI.tldr: FiMR是一个利用分解视觉问答进行细粒度多模态推理的框架，通过将输入提示分解为最小语义单元并验证每个单元，生成明确的细粒度反馈，然后进行针对性局部优化，提升图像-提示对齐和生成质量。
AI.motivation: 当前统一多模态大语言模型在图像理解和生成方面取得显著进展，但其在文本到图像生成中的自反思和自优化能力尚未充分探索。现有基于多模态推理的图像生成方法主要依赖整体图像-文本对齐判断，缺乏对详细提示属性的细粒度反思和优化，导致细粒度控制有限。
AI.method: FiMR框架采用分解视觉问答方法：1）将输入提示分解为最小语义单元（如实体和属性）；2）通过VQA验证每个单元生成明确的细粒度反馈；3）基于反馈进行针对性局部优化。这种细粒度自推理和自优化使MLLM能够在测试时实现更精确的图像-提示对齐和整体生成质量改进。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，FiMR在图像生成基准测试中始终优于基线方法，包括基于推理的方法，特别是在组合文本到图像基准测试上表现优异。代码和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: FiMR通过细粒度多模态推理框架，利用分解VQA实现精确的提示属性验证和针对性优化，显著提升了统一MLLM在文本到图像生成中的细粒度控制和生成质量，为多模态推理在图像生成中的应用提供了新思路。

title: Mind DeepResearch Technical Report
summary: We present Mind DeepResearch (MindDR), an efficient multi-agent deep research framework that achieves leading performance with only ~30B-parameter models through a meticulously designed data synthesis and multi-stage training pipeline. The core innovation of MindDR lies in a collaborative three-agent architecture (Planning Agent, DeepSearch Agent, and Report Agent) and a four-stage agent-specialized training pipeline comprising SFT cold-start, Search-RL, Report-RL and preference alignment. With this regime, MindDR demonstrates competitive performance even with ~30B-scale models. Specifically, MindDR achieves 45.7% on BrowseComp-ZH, 42.8% on BrowseComp, 46.5% on WideSearch, 75.0% on xbench-DS, and 52.5 on DeepResearch Bench, outperforming comparable-scale open-source agent systems and rivaling larger-scale models. MindDR has been deployed as an online product in Li Auto. Furthermore, we introduce MindDR Bench, a curated benchmark of 500 real-world Chinese queries from our internal product user interactions, evaluated through a comprehensive multi-dimensional rubric system rather than relying on a single RACE metric. On MindDR Bench, MindDR achieves a state-of-the-art score of 51.8.

AI.tldr: MindDR是一个高效的多智能体深度研究框架，通过精心设计的数据合成和多阶段训练流程，仅使用约300亿参数模型就能实现领先性能。该框架采用三智能体协作架构和四阶段专业化训练，在多个基准测试中表现出色，并已部署为理想汽车的在线产品。
AI.motivation: 开发一个高效的多智能体深度研究框架，能够在相对较小的模型规模（约300亿参数）下实现与更大规模模型相媲美的性能，同时满足实际产品部署的需求。
AI.method: 1. 三智能体协作架构：规划智能体、深度搜索智能体和报告智能体；2. 四阶段专业化训练流程：SFT冷启动、搜索强化学习、报告强化学习和偏好对齐；3. 精心设计的数据合成和多阶段训练管道。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中取得优异表现：BrowseComp-ZH 45.7%、BrowseComp 42.8%、WideSearch 46.5%、xbench-DS 75.0%、DeepResearch Bench 52.5分。在自建的MindDR Bench（500个真实中文查询）上达到最先进的51.8分。性能超越同规模开源智能体系统，可与更大规模模型竞争。
AI.conclusion: MindDR通过创新的多智能体架构和专业化训练流程，证明了在相对较小的模型规模下也能实现高质量的深度研究能力。该框架已成功部署为理想汽车的在线产品，并建立了专门的评估基准来更全面地衡量真实场景下的性能。

title: Fail2Drive: Benchmarking Closed-Loop Driving Generalization
summary: Generalization under distribution shift remains a central bottleneck for closed-loop autonomous driving. Although simulators like CARLA enable safe and scalable testing, existing benchmarks rarely measure true generalization: they typically reuse training scenarios at test time. Success can therefore reflect memorization rather than robust driving behavior. We introduce Fail2Drive, the first paired-route benchmark for closed-loop generalization in CARLA, with 200 routes and 17 new scenario classes spanning appearance, layout, behavioral, and robustness shifts. Each shifted route is matched with an in-distribution counterpart, isolating the effect of the shift and turning qualitative failures into quantitative diagnostics. Evaluating multiple state-of-the-art models reveals consistent degradation, with an average success-rate drop of 22.8\%. Our analysis uncovers unexpected failure modes, such as ignoring objects clearly visible in the LiDAR and failing to learn the fundamental concepts of free and occupied space. To accelerate follow-up work, Fail2Drive includes an open-source toolbox for creating new scenarios and validating solvability via a privileged expert policy. Together, these components establish a reproducible foundation for benchmarking and improving closed-loop driving generalization. We open-source all code, data, and tools at https://github.com/autonomousvision/fail2drive .

AI.tldr: Fail2Drive是首个用于CARLA中闭环自动驾驶泛化评估的配对路线基准，包含200条路线和17种新场景类别，通过隔离分布偏移效应来量化泛化能力下降
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶基准测试通常重用训练场景进行测试，导致成功可能反映的是记忆而非鲁棒驾驶行为，缺乏对真实泛化能力的评估
AI.method: 提出配对路线基准方法，每条偏移路线都匹配一个分布内对应路线，隔离偏移效应；包含200条路线和17种新场景类别，涵盖外观、布局、行为和鲁棒性偏移；提供开源工具箱用于创建新场景并通过特权专家策略验证可解性
AI.result: 评估多个最先进模型显示一致的性能退化，平均成功率下降22.8%；分析揭示了意外失败模式，如忽略LiDAR中清晰可见的物体，以及未能学习自由空间和占用空间的基本概念
AI.conclusion: Fail2Drive为基准测试和改进闭环驾驶泛化能力建立了可复现的基础，通过开源代码、数据和工具加速后续研究

title: Neural architectures for resolving references in program code
summary: Resolving and rewriting references is fundamental in programming languages. Motivated by a real-world decompilation task, we abstract reference rewriting into the problems of direct and indirect indexing by permutation. We create synthetic benchmarks for these tasks and show that well-known sequence-to-sequence machine learning architectures are struggling on these benchmarks. We introduce new sequence-to-sequence architectures for both problems. Our measurements show that our architectures outperform the baselines in both robustness and scalability: our models can handle examples that are ten times longer compared to the best baseline. We measure the impact of our architecture in the real-world task of decompiling switch statements, which has an indexing subtask. According to our measurements, the extended model decreases the error rate by 42%. Multiple ablation studies show that all components of our architectures are essential.

AI.tldr: 提出新的序列到序列架构用于解决编程语言中的引用重写问题，在直接和间接索引排列任务上表现优于基线，并能处理更长的序列，在实际反编译switch语句任务中降低42%错误率
AI.motivation: 基于实际反编译任务的需求，将引用重写问题抽象为直接和间接索引排列问题，现有序列到序列机器学习架构在这些任务上表现不佳
AI.method: 为直接和间接索引排列问题设计新的序列到序列架构，创建合成基准测试，通过消融研究验证架构各组件的重要性
AI.result: 新架构在鲁棒性和可扩展性上均优于基线，能处理比最佳基线长10倍的序列；在实际反编译switch语句任务中，扩展模型将错误率降低42%
AI.conclusion: 提出的新序列到序列架构能有效解决编程语言中的引用重写问题，特别是在索引排列任务上表现优异，为实际反编译应用提供了有效解决方案

title: Learning Class Difficulty in Imbalanced Histopathology Segmentation via Dynamic Focal Attention
summary: Semantic segmentation of histopathology images under class imbalance is typically addressed through frequency-based loss reweighting, which implicitly assumes that rare classes are difficult. However, true difficulty also arises from morphological variability, boundary ambiguity, and contextual similarity-factors that frequency cannot capture. We propose Dynamic Focal Attention (DFA), a simple and efficient mechanism that learns class-specific difficulty directly within the cross-attention of query-based mask decoders. DFA introduces a learnable per-class bias to attention logits, enabling representation-level reweighting prior to prediction rather than gradient-level reweighting after prediction. Initialised from a log-frequency prior to prevent gradient starvation, the bias is optimised end-to-end, allowing the model to adaptively capture difficulty signals through training, effectively unifying frequency-based and difficulty-aware approaches under a common attention-bias framework. On three histopathology benchmarks (BDSA, BCSS, CRAG), DFA consistently improves Dice and IoU, matching or exceeding a difficulty-aware baseline without a separate estimator or additional training stage. These results demonstrate that encoding class difficulty at the representation level provides a principled alternative to conventional loss reweighting for imbalanced segmentation.

AI.tldr: 提出动态焦点注意力（DFA），一种在查询式掩码解码器的交叉注意力中直接学习类别特定难度的机制，用于解决组织病理学图像语义分割中的类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 传统基于频率的损失重加权方法隐含假设稀有类别就是困难类别，但实际困难还来自形态学变异性、边界模糊性和上下文相似性等因素，这些是频率无法捕捉的。需要一种能直接学习类别难度的方法。
AI.method: DFA在交叉注意力logits中引入可学习的每类别偏置，实现预测前的表示级重加权而非预测后的梯度级重加权。偏置从对数频率先验初始化以防止梯度饥饿，并通过端到端优化自适应捕获难度信号。
AI.result: 在三个组织病理学基准（BDSA、BCSS、CRAG）上，DFA持续改进Dice和IoU指标，匹配或超过需要单独估计器或额外训练阶段的难度感知基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 在表示级别编码类别难度为不平衡分割提供了传统损失重加权的原则性替代方案，将基于频率和难度感知的方法统一在共同的注意力偏置框架下。

title: Perspective on Bias in Biomedical AI: Preventing Downstream Healthcare Disparities
summary: Healthcare disparities persist across socioeconomic boundaries, often attributed to unequal access to screening, diagnostics, and therapeutics. However, this perspective highlights that critical biases can emerge much earlier, during data collection and research prioritization, long before clinical implementation in cases where the focus of the studies and the data that is collected is at the molecular level. A vast number of studies focus on collecting omics data but the demographic information associated with these datasets is often not reported in the studies, and when it is reported, it shows big biases. An automated analysis of 4719 PubMed-indexed omics publications from 2015 to 2024 reveals that only a small fraction report ancestry or ethnicity information, with ancestry reporting improving slightly. Analysis of large-scale datasets commonly used for model training, such as CellxGene and GEO, reveals substantial population bias where European-ancestry data dominates. As biomedical foundation models become central to biomedical discovery with a paradigm in which base models are pretrained on large datasets and reusing them time and again for many different downstream tasks, they risk perpetuating or amplifying these early-stage biases, leading to cascading inequities that regulatory interventions cannot fully reverse. We propose a community-wide focus on three foundational principles: Provenance, Openness, and Evaluation Transparency to improve equity and robustness in biomedical AI. This approach aims to foster biomedical innovation that more effectively serves underserved populations and improves health outcomes.

AI.tldr: 论文揭示生物医学研究中组学数据收集阶段存在严重的人口统计学偏倚，欧洲血统数据占主导地位，且人口信息报告率低，这可能导致基础模型放大早期偏倚，加剧医疗不平等。
AI.motivation: 医疗不平等通常归因于筛查、诊断和治疗的不平等获取，但本文指出偏倚在数据收集和研究优先级设定阶段就已产生。组学研究大量收集组学数据，但相关人口统计学信息往往缺失或存在偏倚，这可能使生物医学基础模型延续并放大这些早期偏倚，导致监管干预无法完全逆转的级联不平等。
AI.method: 对2015-2024年4719篇PubMed索引的组学出版物进行自动化分析，评估其人口统计学信息报告情况；分析CellxGene和GEO等常用于模型训练的大规模数据集，揭示其人口分布偏倚；提出基于三个基础原则（来源、开放性和评估透明度）的社区解决方案。
AI.result: 分析显示只有很小比例的组学出版物报告血统或种族信息，血统报告略有改善；大规模数据集存在显著人口偏倚，欧洲血统数据占主导地位；生物医学基础模型可能延续并放大这些早期偏倚，导致级联不平等。
AI.conclusion: 为改善生物医学AI的公平性和鲁棒性，需要社区范围内关注三个基础原则：来源（Provenance）、开放性（Openness）和评估透明度（Evaluation Transparency），以促进更有效服务未充分服务人群的生物医学创新，改善健康结果。

title: ActiveGlasses: Learning Manipulation with Active Vision from Ego-centric Human Demonstration
summary: Large-scale real-world robot data collection is a prerequisite for bringing robots into everyday deployment. However, existing pipelines often rely on specialized handheld devices to bridge the embodiment gap, which not only increases operator burden and limits scalability, but also makes it difficult to capture the naturally coordinated perception-manipulation behaviors of human daily interaction. This challenge calls for a more natural system that can faithfully capture human manipulation and perception behaviors while enabling zero-shot transfer to robotic platforms. We introduce ActiveGlasses, a system for learning robot manipulation from ego-centric human demonstrations with active vision. A stereo camera mounted on smart glasses serves as the sole perception device for both data collection and policy inference: the operator wears it during bare-hand demonstrations, and the same camera is mounted on a 6-DoF perception arm during deployment to reproduce human active vision. To enable zero-transfer, we extract object trajectories from demonstrations and use an object-centric point-cloud policy to jointly predict manipulation and head movement. Across several challenging tasks involving occlusion and precise interaction, ActiveGlasses achieves zero-shot transfer with active vision, consistently outperforms strong baselines under the same hardware setup, and generalizes across two robot platforms.

AI.tldr: ActiveGlasses：通过智能眼镜上的主动视觉系统，从第一人称人类演示中学习机器人操作，实现零样本迁移
AI.motivation: 现有机器人数据收集管道依赖专用手持设备，增加了操作者负担、限制了可扩展性，且难以捕捉人类日常交互中自然协调的感知-操作行为。需要一种更自然的系统，能够忠实记录人类操作和感知行为，同时实现到机器人平台的零样本迁移。
AI.method: 1. 使用安装在智能眼镜上的立体相机作为唯一感知设备，用于数据收集和策略推断；2. 操作者在裸手演示时佩戴该设备，部署时同一相机安装在6自由度感知臂上以复现人类主动视觉；3. 从演示中提取物体轨迹，使用以物体为中心的点云策略联合预测操作和头部运动。
AI.result: 在涉及遮挡和精确交互的多个挑战性任务中，ActiveGlasses实现了带主动视觉的零样本迁移，在相同硬件设置下始终优于强基线，并在两个机器人平台上展现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: ActiveGlasses提供了一种更自然、可扩展的机器人操作学习系统，通过主动视觉从人类演示中学习，实现了零样本迁移，为大规模真实世界机器人数据收集提供了有效解决方案。

title: GUI-Perturbed: Domain Randomization Reveals Systematic Brittleness in GUI Grounding Models
summary: GUI grounding models report over 85% accuracy on standard benchmarks, yet drop 27-56 percentage points when instructions require spatial reasoning rather than direct element naming. Current benchmarks miss this because they evaluate each screenshot once with a single fixed instruction. We introduce GUI-Perturbed, a controlled perturbation framework that independently varies visual scenes and instructions to measure grounding robustness. Evaluating three 7B models from the same architecture lineage, we find that relational instructions cause systematic accuracy collapse across all models, a 70% browser zoom produces statistically significant degradation, and rank-8 LoRA fine-tuning with augmented data degrades performance rather than improving it. By perturbing along independent axes, GUI-Perturbed isolates which specific capability axes are affected-spatial reasoning, visual robustness, reasoning calibration-providing diagnostic signal that aggregate benchmarks cannot. We release the dataset, augmentation pipeline, and a fine-tuned model.

AI.tldr: GUI-Perturbed框架通过独立扰动视觉场景和指令来评估GUI grounding模型的鲁棒性，发现现有模型在空间推理指令上存在系统性性能崩溃
AI.motivation: 现有GUI grounding模型在标准基准测试中报告超过85%的准确率，但当指令需要空间推理而非直接元素命名时，性能下降27-56个百分点。当前基准测试的局限性在于每个截图仅使用单一固定指令进行评估，无法全面衡量模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 引入GUI-Perturbed框架，通过独立变化视觉场景和指令来测量grounding鲁棒性。评估了来自同一架构谱系的三个7B模型，分析了关系指令、浏览器缩放（70%缩放）和LoRA微调（rank-8）对性能的影响。
AI.result: 1) 关系指令导致所有模型系统性准确率崩溃；2) 70%浏览器缩放产生统计显著性能下降；3) 使用增强数据的rank-8 LoRA微调反而降低性能而非提升。通过独立扰动轴，GUI-Perturbed能够隔离特定能力轴（空间推理、视觉鲁棒性、推理校准）的影响。
AI.conclusion: GUI-Perturbed框架提供了聚合基准测试无法提供的诊断信号，能够识别模型在空间推理、视觉鲁棒性和推理校准方面的具体弱点。作者发布了数据集、增强管道和微调模型。

title: A Comparative Study of Dynamic Programming and Reinforcement Learning in Finite Horizon Dynamic Pricing
summary: This paper provides a systematic comparison between Fitted Dynamic Programming (DP), where demand is estimated from data, and Reinforcement Learning (RL) methods in finite-horizon dynamic pricing problems. We analyze their performance across environments of increasing structural complexity, ranging from a single typology benchmark to multi-typology settings with heterogeneous demand and inter-temporal revenue constraints. Unlike simplified comparisons that restrict DP to low-dimensional settings, we apply dynamic programming in richer, multi-dimensional environments with multiple product types and constraints. We evaluate revenue performance, stability, constraint satisfaction behavior, and computational scaling, highlighting the trade-offs between explicit expectation-based optimization and trajectory-based learning.

AI.tldr: 系统比较了基于数据估计需求的拟合动态规划(DP)与强化学习(RL)在有限时域动态定价问题中的性能，涵盖从单一类型基准到多类型异质需求和跨期收入约束的复杂环境。
AI.motivation: 传统比较通常将DP限制在低维环境中，本文旨在在更丰富的多维度环境（多产品类型和约束）中系统比较DP和RL方法，分析它们在动态定价问题中的实际性能差异。
AI.method: 在有限时域动态定价问题中，应用拟合动态规划（需求从数据估计）和强化学习方法，在复杂度递增的环境中测试：从单一类型基准到多类型异质需求环境，再到包含跨期收入约束的复杂环境。
AI.result: 评估了收入性能、稳定性、约束满足行为和计算扩展性，揭示了基于显式期望的优化（DP）与基于轨迹的学习（RL）之间的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 系统比较了DP和RL在动态定价中的表现，为方法选择提供了实证依据，强调了两种方法在不同环境复杂度下的性能权衡。

title: NewsTorch: A PyTorch-based Toolkit for Learner-oriented News Recommendation
summary: News recommender systems are devised to alleviate the information overload, attracting more and more researchers' attention in recent years. The lack of a dedicated learner-oriented news recommendation toolkit hinders the advancement of research in news recommendation. We propose a PyTorch-based news recommendation toolkit called NewsTorch, developed to support learners in acquiring both conceptual understanding and practical experience. This toolkit provides a modular, decoupled, and extensible framework with a learner-friendly GUI platform that supports dataset downloading and preprocessing. It also enables training, validation, and testing of state-of-the-art neural news recommendation models with standardized evaluation metrics, ensuring fair comparison and reproducible experiments. Our open-source toolkit is released on Github: https://github.com/whonor/NewsTorch.

AI.tldr: NewsTorch：一个基于PyTorch的新闻推荐系统工具包，为学习者提供模块化、可扩展的框架和用户友好的GUI平台，支持数据集处理、模型训练和标准化评估。
AI.motivation: 新闻推荐系统研究缺乏专门面向学习者的工具包，这阻碍了该领域研究的进展。现有工具在易用性、模块化和可扩展性方面存在不足，难以支持学习者同时获得概念理解和实践经验。
AI.method: 开发了基于PyTorch的新闻推荐工具包NewsTorch，采用模块化、解耦和可扩展的架构设计。提供学习者友好的GUI平台，支持数据集下载和预处理，能够训练、验证和测试最先进的神经新闻推荐模型，并使用标准化评估指标确保公平比较和实验可复现性。
AI.result: 成功开发并开源了NewsTorch工具包，已在GitHub上发布。该工具包为新闻推荐研究提供了统一的实验平台，支持多种先进模型，通过标准化流程确保实验的公平性和可复现性。
AI.conclusion: NewsTorch填补了新闻推荐系统研究领域缺乏专门学习者工具包的空白，通过提供模块化、易用的框架促进了该领域的研究进展，有助于学习者同时获得理论知识和实践经验。

title: 3D-VCD: Hallucination Mitigation in 3D-LLM Embodied Agents through Visual Contrastive Decoding
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, Accepted at IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026
summary: Large multimodal models are increasingly used as the reasoning core of embodied agents operating in 3D environments, yet they remain prone to hallucinations that can produce unsafe and ungrounded decisions. Existing inference-time hallucination mitigation methods largely target 2D vision-language settings and do not transfer to embodied 3D reasoning, where failures arise from object presence, spatial layout, and geometric grounding rather than pixel-level inconsistencies. We introduce 3D-VCD, the first inference-time visual contrastive decoding framework for hallucination mitigation in 3D embodied agents. 3D-VCD constructs a distorted 3D scene graph by applying semantic and geometric perturbations to object-centric representations, such as category substitutions and coordinate or extent corruption. By contrasting predictions under the original and distorted 3D contexts, our method suppresses tokens that are insensitive to grounded scene evidence and are therefore likely driven by language priors. We evaluate 3D-VCD on the 3D-POPE and HEAL benchmarks and show that it consistently improves grounded reasoning without any retraining, establishing inference-time contrastive decoding over structured 3D representations as an effective and practical route to more reliable embodied intelligence.

AI.tldr: 3D-VCD：首个针对3D具身智能体的推理时视觉对比解码框架，通过对比原始和扭曲的3D场景图来缓解幻觉问题
AI.motivation: 大型多模态模型作为3D环境中具身智能体的推理核心时，容易产生幻觉，导致不安全和不接地的决策。现有的推理时幻觉缓解方法主要针对2D视觉语言设置，无法迁移到具身3D推理场景，因为3D环境中的失败源于物体存在性、空间布局和几何接地问题，而非像素级不一致性。
AI.method: 提出3D-VCD框架，通过对以物体为中心的表示应用语义和几何扰动来构建扭曲的3D场景图，包括类别替换、坐标或范围破坏等。通过对比原始和扭曲3D上下文下的预测，抑制那些对场景证据不敏感、可能由语言先验驱动的token。
AI.result: 在3D-POPE和HEAL基准测试中评估，3D-VCD无需任何重新训练就能持续改进接地推理，证明了基于结构化3D表示的推理时对比解码是提高具身智能可靠性的有效实用途径。
AI.conclusion: 3D-VCD是首个针对3D具身智能体的推理时视觉对比解码框架，通过结构化3D表示的对比解码有效缓解幻觉问题，为更可靠的具身智能提供了实用解决方案。

title: $π$-Play: Multi-Agent Self-Play via Privileged Self-Distillation without External Data
summary: Deep search agents have emerged as a promising paradigm for addressing complex information-seeking tasks, but their training remains challenging due to sparse rewards, weak credit assignment, and limited labeled data. Self-play offers a scalable route to reduce data dependence, but conventional self-play optimizes students only through sparse outcome rewards, leading to low learning efficiency. In this work, we observe that self-play naturally produces a question construction path (QCP) during task generation, an intermediate artifact that captures the reverse solution process. This reveals a new source of privileged information for self-distillation: self-play can itself provide high-quality privileged context for the teacher model in a low-cost and scalable manner, without relying on human feedback or curated privileged information. Leveraging this insight, we propose Privileged Information Self-Play ($π$-Play), a multi-agent self-evolution framework. In $π$-Play, an examiner generates tasks together with their QCPs, and a teacher model leverages QCP as privileged context to densely supervise a student via self-distillation. This design transforms conventional sparse-reward self-play into a dense-feedback self-evolution loop. Extensive experiments show that data-free $π$-Play surpasses fully supervised search agents and improves evolutionary efficiency by 2-3$\times$ over conventional self-play.

AI.tldr: 提出π-Play框架，利用自对弈过程中自然产生的问题构建路径作为特权信息，通过自蒸馏实现密集监督，显著提升深度搜索智能体的训练效率。
AI.motivation: 深度搜索智能体的训练面临稀疏奖励、信用分配困难和标注数据有限等挑战。传统自对弈仅通过稀疏结果奖励优化学生模型，学习效率低下。研究发现自对弈过程中自然产生的问题构建路径可作为特权信息，为教师模型提供高质量监督信号。
AI.method: 提出π-Play多智能体自进化框架：考官生成任务及其问题构建路径；教师模型利用QCP作为特权上下文，通过自蒸馏对学生进行密集监督；将传统稀疏奖励自对弈转变为密集反馈自进化循环。
AI.result: 无数据π-Play超越完全监督的搜索智能体，进化效率比传统自对弈提高2-3倍。
AI.conclusion: 自对弈过程中自然产生的问题构建路径可作为低成本、可扩展的特权信息源，通过π-Play框架实现密集监督，显著提升深度搜索智能体的训练效率和性能。

title: A Study of Failure Modes in Two-Stage Human-Object Interaction Detection
comment: Accepted to SAUAFG Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary: Human-object interaction (HOI) detection aims to detect interactions between humans and objects in images. While recent advances have improved performance on existing benchmarks, their evaluations mainly focus on overall prediction accuracy and provide limited insight into the underlying causes of model failures. In particular, modern models often struggle in complex scenes involving multiple people and rare interaction combinations. In this work, we present a study to better understand the failure modes of two-stage HOI models, which form the basis of many current HOI detection approaches. Rather than constructing a large-scale benchmark, we instead decompose HOI detection into multiple interpretable perspectives and analyze model behavior across these dimensions to study different types of failure patterns. We curate a subset of images from an existing HOI dataset organized by human-object-interaction configurations (e.g., multi-person interactions and object sharing), and analyze model behavior under these configurations to examine different failure modes. This design allows us to analyze how these HOI models behave under different scene compositions and why their predictions fail. Importantly, high overall benchmark performance does not necessarily reflect robust visual reasoning about human-object relationships. We hope that this study can provide useful insights into the limitations of HOI models and offer observations for future research in this area.

AI.tldr: 该研究深入分析了两阶段人-物交互检测模型的失败模式，通过分解多个可解释视角来理解模型在复杂场景中的局限性，而非构建新的大规模基准。
AI.motivation: 现有HOI检测模型虽然在基准测试上表现良好，但主要关注整体预测精度，对模型失败的根本原因缺乏深入理解。特别是在涉及多人和罕见交互组合的复杂场景中，现代模型经常表现不佳。需要更好地理解HOI模型的失败模式，以评估其是否真正具备稳健的视觉推理能力。
AI.method: 研究采用分析性方法而非构建新基准：1）将HOI检测分解为多个可解释视角；2）从现有HOI数据集中精心挑选图像子集，按人-物-交互配置（如多人交互、物体共享等）组织；3）分析两阶段HOI模型在这些配置下的行为，检查不同类型的失败模式；4）研究不同场景组合下模型的行为及其预测失败的原因。
AI.result: 研究发现高整体基准性能并不一定反映模型对人-物关系的稳健视觉推理能力。通过分析模型在不同配置下的行为，揭示了多种失败模式，特别是在复杂场景中的局限性。研究提供了对HOI模型局限性的深入见解。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解HOI检测模型的失败模式提供了系统分析框架，揭示了高基准性能背后的实际推理能力不足。研究希望为未来HOI研究提供有价值的观察和见解，促进更稳健的人-物关系理解模型的发展。

title: MaMe & MaRe: Matrix-Based Token Merging and Restoration for Efficient Visual Perception and Synthesis
comment: 20 pages. Extended version of CVPR 2026 Findings paper. Neurocomputing (Elsevier) under review
summary: Token compression is crucial for mitigating the quadratic complexity of self-attention mechanisms in Vision Transformers (ViTs), which often involve numerous input tokens. Existing methods, such as ToMe, rely on GPU-inefficient operations (e.g., sorting, scattered writes), introducing overheads that limit their effectiveness. We introduce MaMe, a training-free, differentiable token merging method based entirely on matrix operations, which is GPU-friendly to accelerate ViTs. Additionally, we present MaRe, its inverse operation, for token restoration, forming a MaMe+MaRe pipeline for image synthesis. When applied to pre-trained models, MaMe doubles ViT-B throughput with a 2% accuracy drop. Notably, fine-tuning the last layer with MaMe boosts ViT-B accuracy by 1.0% at 1.1x speed. In SigLIP2-B@512 zero-shot classification, MaMe provides 1.3x acceleration with negligible performance degradation. In video tasks, MaMe accelerates VideoMAE-L by 48.5% on Kinetics-400 with only a 0.84% accuracy loss. Furthermore, MaMe achieves simultaneous improvements in both performance and speed on some tasks. In image synthesis, the MaMe+MaRe pipeline enhances quality while reducing Stable Diffusion v2.1 generation latency by 31%. Collectively, these results demonstrate MaMe's and MaRe's effectiveness in accelerating vision models. The code is available at https://github.com/cominder/mame}{https://github.com/cominder/mame.

AI.tldr: MaMe是一种基于矩阵运算的训练免费、可微分的token合并方法，用于加速Vision Transformers，其逆操作MaRe用于token恢复，形成图像合成管道。
AI.motivation: 现有token压缩方法（如ToMe）依赖GPU效率低下的操作（排序、分散写入），引入开销限制了其有效性，需要一种完全基于矩阵运算的GPU友好方法。
AI.method: 提出MaMe：完全基于矩阵运算的训练免费、可微分token合并方法；以及MaRe：其逆操作用于token恢复，形成MaMe+MaRe图像合成管道。
AI.result: MaMe使ViT-B吞吐量翻倍，精度仅下降2%；微调最后一层后精度提升1.0%，速度1.1倍；SigLIP2-B@512加速1.3倍；VideoMAE-L加速48.5%；图像合成中Stable Diffusion v2.1延迟降低31%。
AI.conclusion: MaMe和MaRe通过完全基于矩阵运算的GPU友好设计，有效加速视觉模型，在多个任务中实现性能与速度的同时提升。

title: Geometric Metrics for MoE Specialization: From Fisher Information to Early Failure Detection
summary: Expert specialization is fundamental to Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model success, yet existing metrics (cosine similarity, routing entropy) lack theoretical grounding and yield inconsistent conclusions under reparameterization. We present an information-geometric framework providing the first rigorous characterization of MoE specialization dynamics. Our key insight is that expert routing distributions evolve on the probability simplex equipped with the Fisher information metric, enabling formal analysis via Riemannian geometry. We prove that standard heuristic metrics violate parameterization invariance (Theorem 1), establish that specialization corresponds to geodesic flow with quantified approximation bounds (Theorem 2), and derive a failure predictor with theoretical threshold justification (Theorem 3). The framework introduces two principled metrics: Fisher Specialization Index (FSI) achieving r=0.91+/-0.02 correlation with downstream performance, and Fisher Heterogeneity Score (FHS) predicting training failure at 10% completion with AUC=0.89+/-0.03 -- outperforming validation-loss-based early stopping by 23% while requiring 40x fewer compute cycles. We validate intervention protocols achieving 87% recovery rate when FHS>1 is detected. Comprehensive experiments across language modeling (WikiText-103, C4), vision MoE (ImageNet), and scaling studies (8-64 experts, 125M-2.7B parameters) validate our theoretical predictions.

AI.tldr: 提出信息几何框架，为MoE专家专业化提供首个严格理论表征，证明传统启发式指标违反参数化不变性，引入FSI和FHS两个新指标，在性能预测和训练失败预警方面显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有MoE专家专业化度量指标（余弦相似度、路由熵）缺乏理论基础，在不同参数化下结论不一致，需要建立理论严谨的框架来准确表征MoE专业化动态。
AI.method: 采用信息几何框架，将专家路由分布视为概率单纯形上的演化过程，使用Fisher信息度量进行黎曼几何分析，提出Fisher专业化指数（FSI）和Fisher异质性分数（FHS）两个新指标。
AI.result: FSI与下游性能相关性达0.91±0.02；FHS在训练完成10%时预测失败AUC为0.89±0.03，比基于验证损失的早停方法提升23%且计算需求减少40倍；干预协议在FHS>1时恢复率达87%。
AI.conclusion: 信息几何框架为MoE专业化提供了首个理论严谨的表征方法，新指标在性能预测和训练监控方面显著优于传统启发式方法，具有实际应用价值。

title: Sumo: Dynamic and Generalizable Whole-Body Loco-Manipulation
summary: This paper presents a sim-to-real approach that enables legged robots to dynamically manipulate large and heavy objects with whole-body dexterity. Our key insight is that by performing test-time steering of a pre-trained whole-body control policy with a sample-based planner, we can enable these robots to solve a variety of dynamic loco-manipulation tasks. Interestingly, we find our method generalizes to a diverse set of objects and tasks with no additional tuning or training, and can be further enhanced by flexibly adjusting the cost function at test time. We demonstrate the capabilities of our approach through a variety of challenging loco-manipulation tasks on a Spot quadruped robot in the real world, including uprighting a tire heavier than the robot's nominal lifting capacity and dragging a crowd-control barrier larger and taller than the robot itself. Additionally, we show that the same approach can be generalized to humanoid loco-manipulation tasks, such as opening a door and pushing a table, in simulation. Project code and videos are available at https://sumo.rai-inst.com/.

AI.tldr: 提出一种sim-to-real方法，使腿式机器人能够动态操纵大型重物，通过测试时引导预训练全身控制策略与基于采样的规划器相结合，实现多样化的动态移动操纵任务。
AI.motivation: 解决腿式机器人动态操纵大型重物时面临的挑战，传统方法难以处理超出机器人额定能力的物体，需要一种能够适应多样化任务且无需额外调优的通用方法。
AI.method: 采用sim-to-real方法，结合预训练的全身控制策略与基于采样的规划器进行测试时引导，通过灵活调整成本函数增强性能，实现无需额外训练即可适应多样化对象和任务。
AI.result: 在真实世界的Spot四足机器人上成功完成多项挑战性移动操纵任务，包括扶正超过机器人额定提升能力的轮胎、拖动比机器人更大更高的防暴屏障；在仿真中成功应用于人形机器人开门、推桌等任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法展示了通过测试时引导预训练策略实现腿式机器人动态操纵大型重物的可行性，具有良好泛化能力且无需额外调优，为复杂移动操纵任务提供了有效解决方案。

title: A Unified Conditional Flow for Motion Generation, Editing, and Intra-Structural Retargeting
summary: Text-driven motion editing and intra-structural retargeting, where source and target share topology but may differ in bone lengths, are traditionally handled by fragmented pipelines with incompatible inputs and representations: editing relies on specialized generative steering, while retargeting is deferred to geometric post-processing. We present a unifying perspective where both tasks are cast as instances of conditional transport within a single generative framework. By leveraging recent advances in flow matching, we demonstrate that editing and retargeting are fundamentally the same generative task, distinguished only by which conditioning signal, semantic or structural, is modulated during inference. We implement this vision via a rectified-flow motion model jointly conditioned on text prompts and target skeletal structures. Our architecture extends a DiT-style transformer with per-joint tokenization and explicit joint self-attention to strictly enforce kinematic dependencies, while a multi-condition classifier-free guidance strategy balances text adherence with skeletal conformity. Experiments on SnapMoGen and a multi-character Mixamo subset show that a single trained model supports text-to-motion generation, zero-shot editing, and zero-shot intra-structural retargeting. This unified approach simplifies deployment and improves structural consistency compared to task-specific baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出统一框架，将文本驱动运动编辑和同拓扑结构重定向视为条件传输的同一生成任务，仅通过调节语义或结构条件信号区分。
AI.motivation: 传统方法中，运动编辑和结构重定向采用碎片化流程，使用不兼容的输入和表示：编辑依赖专门的生成引导，而重定向则推迟到几何后处理。需要统一视角简化部署并提高结构一致性。
AI.method: 基于流匹配技术，构建联合条件于文本提示和目标骨骼结构的整流流运动模型。采用DiT风格transformer，通过每关节标记化和显式关节自注意力严格实施运动学依赖，多条件分类器无引导策略平衡文本遵循与骨骼一致性。
AI.result: 在SnapMoGen和Mixamo多角色子集上的实验表明，单一训练模型支持文本到运动生成、零样本编辑和零样本同拓扑结构重定向，相比任务特定基线简化部署并提高结构一致性。
AI.conclusion: 编辑和重定向本质上是同一生成任务，仅通过调节不同条件信号区分。统一框架通过单一模型实现多种功能，简化部署流程并提高结构一致性。

title: Density-Driven Optimal Control: Convergence Guarantees for Stochastic LTI Multi-Agent Systems
summary: This paper addresses the decentralized non-uniform area coverage problem for multi-agent systems, a critical task in missions with high spatial priority and resource constraints. While existing density-based methods often rely on computationally heavy Eulerian PDE solvers or heuristic planning, we propose Stochastic Density-Driven Optimal Control (D$^2$OC). This is a rigorous Lagrangian framework that bridges the gap between individual agent dynamics and collective distribution matching. By formulating a stochastic MPC-like problem that minimizes the Wasserstein distance as a running cost, our approach ensures that the time-averaged empirical distribution converges to a non-parametric target density under stochastic LTI dynamics. A key contribution is the formal convergence guarantee established via reachability analysis, providing a bounded tracking error even in the presence of process and measurement noise. Numerical results verify that Stochastic D$^2$OC achieves robust, decentralized coverage while outperforming previous heuristic methods in optimality and consistency.

AI.tldr: 提出随机密度驱动最优控制(D²OC)方法，解决多智能体系统的去中心化非均匀区域覆盖问题，通过最小化Wasserstein距离作为运行成本，确保经验分布收敛到目标密度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于密度的方法通常依赖计算量大的欧拉PDE求解器或启发式规划，需要一种能够桥接个体智能体动力学与集体分布匹配的严格拉格朗日框架。
AI.method: 提出随机密度驱动最优控制(D²OC)，这是一个严格的拉格朗日框架，将问题表述为最小化Wasserstein距离作为运行成本的随机MPC类问题，在随机LTI动力学下确保时间平均经验分布收敛到非参数目标密度。
AI.result: 通过可达性分析建立了形式收敛保证，即使在过程和测量噪声存在的情况下也能提供有界跟踪误差。数值结果表明，随机D²OC在最优性和一致性方面优于先前的启发式方法，实现了鲁棒的分散覆盖。
AI.conclusion: 随机D²OC为多智能体系统的去中心化非均匀区域覆盖提供了一种严格、鲁棒且最优的解决方案，通过拉格朗日框架桥接了微观动力学与宏观分布匹配，具有形式收敛保证。

title: Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning with Runtime Safety Shielding for Power Grid Operation
summary:
Reinforcement learning has shown promise for automating power-grid operation tasks such as topology control and congestion management. However, its deployment in real-world power systems remains limited by strict safety requirements, brittleness under rare disturbances, and poor generalization to unseen grid topologies. In safety-critical infrastructure, catastrophic failures cannot be tolerated, and learning-based controllers must operate within hard physical constraints.
  This paper proposes a safety-constrained hierarchical control framework for power-grid operation that explicitly decouples long-horizon decision-making from real-time feasibility enforcement. A high-level reinforcement learning policy proposes abstract control actions, while a deterministic runtime safety shield filters unsafe actions using fast forward simulation. Safety is enforced as a runtime invariant, independent of policy quality or training distribution.
  The proposed framework is evaluated on the Grid2Op benchmark suite under nominal conditions, forced line-outage stress tests, and zero-shot deployment on the ICAPS 2021 large-scale transmission grid without retraining. Results show that flat reinforcement learning policies are brittle under stress, while safety-only methods are overly conservative. In contrast, the proposed hierarchical and safety-aware approach achieves longer episode survival, lower peak line loading, and robust zero-shot generalization to unseen grids.
  These results indicate that safety and generalization in power-grid control are best achieved through architectural design rather than increasingly complex reward engineering, providing a practical path toward deployable learning-based controllers for real-world energy systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于电网运行的安全约束分层控制框架，将长期决策与实时可行性执行解耦，通过运行时安全屏蔽确保安全约束，在多种测试场景下表现出优于传统方法的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 强化学习在电网自动化操作中虽有潜力，但在实际部署中面临严格安全要求、罕见扰动下的脆弱性以及未见电网拓扑泛化能力差等限制。安全关键基础设施无法容忍灾难性故障，学习型控制器必须在硬物理约束内运行。
AI.method: 提出安全约束分层控制框架：高层强化学习策略提出抽象控制动作，确定性运行时安全屏蔽通过快速前向模拟过滤不安全动作。安全作为运行时不变量强制执行，独立于策略质量或训练分布。
AI.result: 在Grid2Op基准套件上评估，包括正常条件、强制线路停运压力测试以及在ICAPS 2021大规模输电网上零样本部署。结果显示：平坦强化学习策略在压力下脆弱，纯安全方法过于保守；而所提分层安全感知方法实现更长的episode生存时间、更低的峰值线路负载，并对未见电网具有鲁棒的零样本泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 电网控制中的安全性和泛化能力最好通过架构设计而非日益复杂的奖励工程来实现，为实际能源系统中可部署的学习型控制器提供了实用路径。

title: LEGO: Latent-space Exploration for Geometry-aware Optimization of Humanoid Kinematic Design
summary: Designing robot morphologies and kinematics has traditionally relied on human intuition, with little systematic foundation. Motion-design co-optimization offers a promising path toward automation, but two major challenges remain: (i) the vast, unstructured design space and (ii) the difficulty of constructing task-specific loss functions. We propose a new paradigm that minimizes human involvement by (i) learning the design search space from existing mechanical designs, rather than hand-crafting it, and (ii) defining the loss directly from human motion data via motion retargeting and Procrustes analysis. Using screw-theory-based joint axis representation and isometric manifold learning, we construct a compact, geometry-preserving latent space of humanoid upper body designs in which optimization is tractable. We then solve design optimization in this latent space using gradient-free optimization. Our approach establishes a principled framework for data-driven robot design and demonstrates that leveraging existing designs and human motion can effectively guide the automated discovery of novel robot design.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于数据驱动的机器人设计新范式，通过从现有机械设计中学习设计搜索空间，并利用人体运动数据定义损失函数，实现人形机器人上半身设计的自动化优化。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人形态和运动学设计依赖人类直觉，缺乏系统化基础。运动设计协同优化面临两大挑战：巨大的非结构化设计空间和任务特定损失函数构建困难。需要减少人工参与，实现自动化设计发现。
AI.method: 1) 从现有机械设计中学习设计搜索空间而非手工构建；2) 通过运动重定向和Procrustes分析直接从人体运动数据定义损失函数；3) 使用基于螺旋理论的关节轴表示和等距流形学习构建紧凑、保持几何特性的潜在空间；4) 在潜在空间中使用无梯度优化解决设计优化问题。
AI.result: 建立了一个基于数据驱动的机器人设计原则框架，证明了利用现有设计和人体运动数据可以有效指导新型机器人设计的自动化发现。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法通过减少人工参与，利用现有设计知识和人体运动数据，为机器人形态和运动学设计的自动化提供了一种系统化、数据驱动的新范式。

title: Continual Learning for fMRI-Based Brain Disorder Diagnosis via Functional Connectivity Matrices Generative Replay
comment: manuscript accepted by CVPR 2026, code is available from \url{https://github.com/4me808/FORGE}
summary: Functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) is widely used for studying and diagnosing brain disorders, with functional connectivity (FC) matrices providing powerful representations of large-scale neural interactions. However, existing diagnostic models are trained either on a single site or under full multi-site access, making them unsuitable for real-world scenarios where clinical data arrive sequentially from different institutions. This results in limited generalization and severe catastrophic forgetting. This paper presents the first continual learning framework specifically designed for fMRI-based diagnosis across heterogeneous clinical sites. Our framework introduces a structure-aware variational autoencoder that synthesizes realistic FC matrices for both patient and control groups. Built on this generative backbone, we develop a multi-level knowledge distillation strategy that aligns predictions and graph representations between new-site data and replayed samples. To further enhance efficiency, we incorporate a hierarchical contextual bandit scheme for adaptive replay sampling. Experiments on multi-site datasets for major depressive disorder (MDD), schizophrenia (SZ), and autism spectrum disorder (ASD) show that the proposed generative model enhances data augmentation quality, and the overall continual learning framework substantially outperforms existing methods in mitigating catastrophic forgetting. Our code is available at https://github.com/4me808/FORGE.

AI.tldr: 提出首个针对fMRI诊断的持续学习框架FORGE，通过结构感知变分自编码器生成真实FC矩阵，结合多级知识蒸馏和分层上下文老虎机策略，有效缓解临床多站点数据顺序到达时的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有fMRI诊断模型通常在单站点或完全多站点访问下训练，不适用于真实临床场景中数据从不同机构顺序到达的情况，导致泛化能力有限和严重的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.method: 1) 结构感知变分自编码器生成患者和对照组的真实FC矩阵；2) 基于生成骨干的多级知识蒸馏策略，对齐新站点数据和重放样本的预测与图表示；3) 分层上下文老虎机方案进行自适应重放采样以提高效率。
AI.result: 在MDD、SZ和ASD多站点数据集上的实验表明，提出的生成模型提升了数据增强质量，整体持续学习框架在缓解灾难性遗忘方面显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: FORGE是首个专门为fMRI诊断设计的持续学习框架，通过生成建模和多级知识蒸馏有效解决了临床多站点数据顺序到达时的灾难性遗忘问题，为现实世界脑疾病诊断提供了实用解决方案。

title: VibeFlow: Versatile Video Chroma-Lux Editing through Self-Supervised Learning
summary: Video chroma-lux editing, which aims to modify illumination and color while preserving structural and temporal fidelity, remains a significant challenge. Existing methods typically rely on expensive supervised training with synthetic paired data. This paper proposes VibeFlow, a novel self-supervised framework that unleashes the intrinsic physical understanding of pre-trained video generation models. Instead of learning color and light transitions from scratch, we introduce a disentangled data perturbation pipeline that enforces the model to adaptively recombine structure from source videos and color-illumination cues from reference images, enabling robust disentanglement in a self-supervised manner. Furthermore, to rectify discretization errors inherent in flow-based models, we introduce Residual Velocity Fields alongside a Structural Distortion Consistency Regularization, ensuring rigorous structural preservation and temporal coherence. Our framework eliminates the need for costly training resources and generalizes in a zero-shot manner to diverse applications, including video relighting, recoloring, low-light enhancement, day-night translation, and object-specific color editing. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VibeFlow achieves impressive visual quality with significantly reduced computational overhead. Our project is publicly available at https://lyf1212.github.io/VibeFlow-webpage.

AI.tldr: VibeFlow是一种自监督视频色彩-光照编辑框架，利用预训练视频生成模型的物理理解能力，通过解耦数据扰动实现结构保持和色彩-光照编辑，无需昂贵的监督训练。
AI.motivation: 视频色彩-光照编辑需要在修改光照和颜色的同时保持结构和时间一致性，现有方法依赖昂贵的监督训练和合成配对数据，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 提出自监督框架VibeFlow：1) 利用预训练视频生成模型的物理理解能力；2) 引入解耦数据扰动管道，自适应重组源视频结构和参考图像色彩-光照线索；3) 提出残差速度场和结构失真一致性正则化，修正基于流模型的离散化误差，确保结构保持和时间一致性。
AI.result: VibeFlow在零样本设置下泛化到多种应用：视频重光照、重新着色、低光增强、日夜转换和对象特定颜色编辑。实验表明，该方法在显著减少计算开销的同时实现了令人印象深刻的视觉质量。
AI.conclusion: VibeFlow通过自监督方式实现了鲁棒的视频色彩-光照编辑，消除了对昂贵训练资源的需求，在保持结构保真度和时间一致性的同时，提供了高质量的视频编辑效果。

title: Pushing the Limits of On-Device Streaming ASR: A Compact, High-Accuracy English Model for Low-Latency Inference
summary: Deploying high-quality automatic speech recognition (ASR) on edge devices requires models that jointly optimize accuracy, latency, and memory footprint while operating entirely on CPU without GPU acceleration. We conduct a systematic empirical study of state-of-the-art ASR architectures, encompassing encoder-decoder, transducer, and LLM-based paradigms, evaluated across batch, chunked, and streaming inference modes. Through a comprehensive benchmark of over 50 configurations spanning OpenAI Whisper, NVIDIA Nemotron, Parakeet TDT, Canary, Conformer Transducer, and Qwen3-ASR, we identify NVIDIA's Nemotron Speech Streaming as the strongest candidate for real-time English streaming on resource-constrained hardware. We then re-implement the complete streaming inference pipeline in ONNX Runtime and conduct a controlled evaluation of multiple post-training quantization strategies, including importance-weighted k-quant, mixed-precision schemes, and round-to-nearest quantization, combined with graph-level operator fusion. These optimizations reduce the model from 2.47 GB to as little as 0.67 GB while maintaining word error rate (WER) within 1% absolute of the full-precision PyTorch baseline. Our recommended configuration, the int4 k-quant variant, achieves 8.20% average streaming WER across eight standard benchmarks, running comfortably faster than real-time on CPU with 0.56 s algorithmic latency, establishing a new quality-efficiency Pareto point for on-device streaming ASR.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统评估了多种ASR架构在边缘设备上的性能，发现NVIDIA Nemotron Speech Streaming在资源受限硬件上表现最佳，并通过量化优化将模型从2.47GB压缩至0.67GB，同时保持WER在基线1%以内。
AI.motivation: 在边缘设备上部署高质量ASR需要模型在CPU上同时优化准确性、延迟和内存占用，而无需GPU加速。现有研究缺乏对不同ASR架构在资源受限环境下的系统性评估和优化。
AI.method: 1. 对超过50种配置的ASR架构进行系统实证研究，包括编码器-解码器、转换器和LLM基范式，评估批量、分块和流式推理模式；2. 在ONNX Runtime中重新实现完整的流式推理流水线；3. 评估多种后训练量化策略，包括重要性加权k-quant、混合精度方案和最近舍入量化，结合图级算子融合。
AI.result: 1. NVIDIA Nemotron Speech Streaming被确定为资源受限硬件上实时英语流式ASR的最佳候选；2. 量化优化将模型从2.47GB压缩至0.67GB，同时保持WER在完整精度PyTorch基线的1%绝对误差内；3. 推荐的int4 k-quant变体在8个标准基准测试中实现8.20%的平均流式WER，在CPU上以0.56秒算法延迟舒适地快于实时处理。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统架构评估和量化优化，该研究为设备端流式ASR建立了新的质量-效率帕累托最优点，证明了在资源受限边缘设备上部署高质量ASR的可行性。

title: CrashSight: A Phase-Aware, Infrastructure-Centric Video Benchmark for Traffic Crash Scene Understanding and Reasoning
summary: Cooperative autonomous driving requires traffic scene understanding from both vehicle and infrastructure perspectives. While vision-language models (VLMs) show strong general reasoning capabilities, their performance in safety-critical traffic scenarios remains insufficiently evaluated due to the ego-vehicle focus of existing benchmarks. To bridge this gap, we present \textbf{CrashSight}, a large-scale vision-language benchmark for roadway crash understanding using real-world roadside camera data. The dataset comprises 250 crash videos, annotated with 13K multiple-choice question-answer pairs organized under a two-tier taxonomy. Tier 1 evaluates the visual grounding of scene context and involved parties, while Tier 2 probes higher-level reasoning, including crash mechanics, causal attribution, temporal progression, and post-crash outcomes. We benchmark 8 state-of-the-art VLMs and show that, despite strong scene description capabilities, current models struggle with temporal and causal reasoning in safety-critical scenarios. We provide a detailed analysis of failure scenarios and discuss directions for improving VLM crash understanding. The benchmark provides a standardized evaluation framework for infrastructure-assisted perception in cooperative autonomous driving. The CrashSight benchmark, including the full dataset and code, is accessible at https://mcgrche.github.io/crashsight.

AI.tldr: CrashSight是一个用于道路碰撞理解的大规模视觉语言基准测试，包含250个真实世界路边摄像头碰撞视频和13K个多选题问答对，用于评估VLM在安全关键交通场景中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试主要关注自车视角，缺乏对基础设施视角下安全关键交通场景的充分评估，需要填补这一空白以支持协同自动驾驶的发展。
AI.method: 构建包含250个真实碰撞视频的数据集，采用双层分类法标注13K个多选题问答对：第一层评估场景上下文和参与方的视觉定位，第二层评估碰撞机制、因果归因、时间进展和碰撞后结果等高级推理能力。
AI.result: 对8个最先进的VLM进行基准测试，发现尽管模型在场景描述方面表现良好，但在安全关键场景中的时间和因果推理方面存在困难，并详细分析了失败场景。
AI.conclusion: CrashSight为基础设施辅助感知提供了标准化评估框架，揭示了当前VLM在安全关键交通场景中的局限性，并指出了改进方向，有助于推动协同自动驾驶的发展。

title: InfoChess: A Game of Adversarial Inference and a Laboratory for Quantifiable Information Control
comment: Accepted at Adaptive and Learning Agents Workshop, AAMAS 2026. Project page: https://github.com/murphyka/infochess
summary: We propose InfoChess, a symmetric adversarial game that elevates competitive information acquisition to the primary objective. There is no piece capture, removing material incentives that would otherwise confound the role of information. Instead, pieces are used to alter visibility. Players are scored on their probabilistic inference of the opponent's king location over the duration of the game. To explore the space of strategies for playing InfoChess, we introduce a hierarchy of heuristic agents defined by increasing levels of opponent modeling, and train a reinforcement learning agent that outperforms these baselines. Leveraging the discrete structure of the game, we analyze gameplay through natural information-theoretic characterizations that include belief entropy, oracle cross entropy, and predictive log score under the action-induced observation channel. These measures disentangle epistemic uncertainty, calibration mismatch, and uncertainty induced by adversarial movement. The design of InfoChess renders it a testbed for studying multi-agent inference under partial observability. We release code for the environment and agents, and a public interface to encourage further study.

AI.tldr: InfoChess是一个对称对抗游戏，将竞争性信息获取作为主要目标，通过棋子改变可见性而非捕获，玩家根据对对手国王位置的推断评分。
AI.motivation: 设计一个专门研究多智能体在部分可观测环境下推理的测试平台，消除传统棋类游戏中物质激励对信息获取角色的干扰。
AI.method: 提出InfoChess游戏规则（无棋子捕获，棋子用于改变可见性），构建启发式智能体层次结构，训练强化学习智能体，并采用信息论方法分析游戏过程。
AI.result: 强化学习智能体优于启发式基线，信息论度量（信念熵、oracle交叉熵、预测对数得分）能够解耦认知不确定性、校准不匹配和对抗移动引起的不确定性。
AI.conclusion: InfoChess为研究部分可观测下的多智能体推理提供了有效测试平台，其离散结构支持自然的信息论分析，有助于理解对抗环境中的信息获取策略。

title: Physically-Guided Optical Inversion Enable Non-Contact Side-Channel Attack on Isolated Screens
summary: Noncontact exfiltration of electronic screen content poses a security challenge, with side-channel incursions as the principal vector. We introduce an optical projection side-channel paradigm that confronts two core instabilities: (i) the near-singular Jacobian spectrum of projection mapping breaches Hadamard stability, rendering inversion hypersensitive to perturbations; (ii) irreversible compression in light transport obliterates global semantic cues, magnifying reconstruction ambiguity.
