Exploiting passive speckle patterns formed by diffuse reflection, our Irradiance Robust Radiometric Inversion Network (IR4Net) fuses a Physically Regularized Irradiance Approximation (PRIrr-Approximation), which embeds the radiative transfer equation in a learnable optimizer, with a contour-to-detail cross-scale reconstruction mechanism that arrests noise propagation. Moreover, an Irreversibility Constrained Semantic Reprojection (ICSR) module reinstates lost global structure through context-driven semantic mapping. Evaluated across four scene categories, IR4Net achieves fidelity beyond competing neural approaches while retaining resilience to illumination perturbations.

AI.tldr: IR4Net通过光学投影侧信道实现非接触式屏幕内容提取，解决了投影映射的雅可比谱奇异性和光传输不可逆压缩两大核心不稳定性问题，在保持对光照扰动鲁棒性的同时超越了现有神经方法的重建保真度。
AI.motivation: 非接触式电子屏幕内容提取面临安全挑战，光学投影侧信道存在两个核心不稳定性：1) 投影映射的近奇异雅可比谱违反Hadamard稳定性，导致反演对扰动高度敏感；2) 光传输中的不可逆压缩破坏了全局语义线索，放大了重建模糊性。
AI.method: 提出IR4Net框架，包含：1) 物理正则化辐照度近似(PRIrr-Approximation)，将辐射传输方程嵌入可学习优化器；2) 轮廓到细节的跨尺度重建机制，抑制噪声传播；3) 不可逆约束语义重投影(ICSR)模块，通过上下文驱动的语义映射恢复丢失的全局结构。利用漫反射形成的被动散斑模式。
AI.result: 在四个场景类别上评估，IR4Net实现了超越竞争神经方法的重建保真度，同时保持了对光照扰动的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: IR4Net通过融合物理正则化辐照度近似和跨尺度重建机制，有效解决了光学投影侧信道中的两个核心不稳定性问题，为屏幕内容提取提供了高保真且鲁棒的解决方案。

title: Exascale Multi-Task Graph Foundation Models for Imbalanced, Multi-Fidelity Atomistic Data
summary: We present an exascale workflow for materials discovery using atomistic graph foundation models built on HydraGNN. We jointly train on 16 open first-principles datasets (544+ million structures covering 85+ elements) using a multi-task architecture with per-dataset heads and a scalable ADIOS2/DDStore data pipeline. On Frontier, we execute six large-scale DeepHyper hyperparameter optimization campaigns in FP64 and promote the top-performing message-passing models to sustained 2,048-node training, yielding a PaiNN-based lead model. The resulting model enables billion-scale screening, evaluating 1.1 billion atomistic structures in 50 seconds, compressing a workload that would require years of first-principles computation, and supports data-scarce fine-tuning across diverse downstream tasks. We quantify precision-performance tradeoffs (BF16/FP32/FP64), demonstrate transfer across twelve chemically diverse downstream tasks, and establish seamless strong- and weak-scaling across Frontier, Aurora, and Perlmutter. This work allows fast and reliable exploration of vast chemical design spaces that are otherwise inaccessible to first-principles methods.

AI.tldr: 开发基于HydraGNN的原子图基础模型工作流，用于材料发现，通过多任务架构在16个数据集上联合训练，实现十亿级结构快速筛选
AI.motivation: 传统第一性原理计算方法在探索广阔化学设计空间时计算成本极高，需要开发能够快速可靠探索的材料发现方法
AI.method: 基于HydraGNN构建原子图基础模型，使用多任务架构在16个开放第一性原理数据集上联合训练，采用ADIOS2/DDStore数据管道，在Frontier上进行大规模超参数优化，最终选择PaiNN作为主导模型
AI.result: 模型在50秒内评估11亿个原子结构，压缩了原本需要数年第一性原理计算的工作量；量化了精度-性能权衡，在12个化学多样性下游任务上展示了迁移能力，并在多个超算系统上实现了无缝强扩展和弱扩展
AI.conclusion: 该工作实现了对传统第一性原理方法无法访问的广阔化学设计空间的快速可靠探索，为材料发现提供了高效工具

title: BLaDA: Bridging Language to Functional Dexterous Actions within 3DGS Fields
comment: Code will be publicly available at https://github.com/PopeyePxx/BLaDA
summary: In unstructured environments, functional dexterous grasping calls for the tight integration of semantic understanding, precise 3D functional localization, and physically interpretable execution. Modular hierarchical methods are more controllable and interpretable than end-to-end VLA approaches, but existing ones still rely on predefined affordance labels and lack the tight semantic--pose coupling needed for functional dexterous manipulation. To address this, we propose BLaDA (Bridging Language to Dexterous Actions in 3DGS fields), an interpretable zero-shot framework that grounds open-vocabulary instructions as perceptual and control constraints for functional dexterous manipulation. BLaDA establishes an interpretable reasoning chain by first parsing natural language into a structured sextuple of manipulation constraints via a Knowledge-guided Language Parsing (KLP) module. To achieve pose-consistent spatial reasoning, we introduce the Triangular Functional Point Localization (TriLocation) module, which utilizes 3D Gaussian Splatting as a continuous scene representation and identifies functional regions under triangular geometric constraints. Finally, the 3D Keypoint Grasp Matrix Transformation Execution (KGT3D+) module decodes these semantic-geometric constraints into physically plausible wrist poses and finger-level commands. Extensive experiments on complex benchmarks demonstrate that BLaDA significantly outperforms existing methods in both affordance grounding precision and the success rate of functional manipulation across diverse categories and tasks. Code will be publicly available at https://github.com/PopeyePxx/BLaDA.

AI.tldr: BLaDA是一个可解释的零样本框架，通过语言解析、三角功能点定位和关键点抓取矩阵变换，将开放词汇指令转化为感知和控制约束，实现功能性灵巧操作。
AI.motivation: 在非结构化环境中，功能性灵巧抓取需要语义理解、精确的3D功能定位和物理可解释执行的紧密结合。现有的模块化分层方法虽然比端到端VLA方法更可控和可解释，但仍依赖预定义的affordance标签，缺乏功能性灵巧操作所需的紧密语义-姿态耦合。
AI.method: 1. 知识引导语言解析(KLP)：将自然语言解析为结构化六元组操作约束；2. 三角功能点定位(TriLocation)：利用3D高斯泼溅作为连续场景表示，在三角几何约束下识别功能区域；3. 3D关键点抓取矩阵变换执行(KGT3D+)：将语义几何约束解码为物理合理的手腕姿态和手指级命令。
AI.result: 在复杂基准测试上的广泛实验表明，BLaDA在affordance grounding精度和功能性操作成功率方面显著优于现有方法，适用于多种类别和任务。
AI.conclusion: BLaDA通过建立可解释的推理链，实现了开放词汇指令到功能性灵巧操作的零样本转换，在语义理解、3D功能定位和物理可解释执行之间建立了紧密集成。

title: Parameter Importance is Not Static: Evolving Parameter Isolation for Supervised Fine-Tuning
summary: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) of large language models often suffers from task interference and catastrophic forgetting. Recent approaches alleviate this issue by isolating task-critical parameters during training. However, these methods represent a static solution to a dynamic problem, assuming that parameter importance remains fixed once identified. In this work, we empirically demonstrate that parameter importance exhibits temporal drift over the course of training. To address this, we propose Evolving Parameter Isolation (EPI), a fine-tuning framework that adapts isolation decisions based on online estimates of parameter importance. Instead of freezing a fixed subset of parameters, EPI periodically updates isolation masks using gradient-based signals, enabling the model to protect emerging task-critical parameters while releasing outdated ones to recover plasticity. Experiments on diverse multi-task benchmarks demonstrate that EPI consistently reduces interference and forgetting compared to static isolation and standard fine-tuning, while improving overall generalization. Our analysis highlights the necessity of synchronizing isolation mechanisms with the evolving dynamics of learning diverse abilities.

AI.tldr: EPI（演化参数隔离）是一种动态参数隔离的微调框架，通过周期性更新隔离掩码来适应训练过程中参数重要性的变化，相比静态隔离方法能更好地减少任务干扰和灾难性遗忘。
AI.motivation: 现有参数隔离方法假设参数重要性在训练过程中保持不变，采用静态隔离策略。但作者通过实证研究发现参数重要性会随时间漂移，静态隔离无法适应这种动态变化，导致次优的性能表现。
AI.method: 提出EPI框架，在微调过程中周期性更新参数隔离掩码。基于梯度信号在线估计参数重要性，动态调整哪些参数被隔离（保护）或释放（恢复可塑性），使模型能够保护新出现的任务关键参数，同时释放过时的参数。
AI.result: 在多个多任务基准测试上的实验表明，EPI相比静态隔离方法和标准微调，能持续减少任务干扰和遗忘，同时提高整体泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 参数隔离机制需要与学习动态演化同步，动态适应参数重要性的变化是实现有效多任务微调的关键。EPI框架为这一方向提供了有效的解决方案。

title: A Unified Multi-Layer Framework for Skill Acquisition from Imperfect Human Demonstrations
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures. Submitted to a conference proceeding
summary: Current Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) systems for skill teaching are fragmented, and existing approaches in the literature do not offer a cohesive framework that is simultaneously efficient, intuitive, and universally safe. This paper presents a novel, layered control framework that addresses this fundamental gap by enabling robust, compliant Learning from Demonstration (LfD) built upon a foundation of universal robot compliance. The proposed approach is structured in three progressive and interconnected stages. First, we introduce a real-time LfD method that learns both the trajectory and variable impedance from a single demonstration, significantly improving efficiency and reproduction fidelity. To ensure high-quality and intuitive {kinesthetic teaching}, we then present a null-space optimization strategy that proactively manages singularities and provides a consistent interaction feel during human demonstration. Finally, to ensure generalized safety, we introduce a foundational null-space compliance method that enables the entire robot body to compliantly adapt to post-learning external interactions without compromising main task performance. This final contribution transforms the system into a versatile HRI platform, moving beyond end-effector (EE)-specific applications. We validate the complete framework through comprehensive comparative experiments on a 7-DOF KUKA LWR robot. The results demonstrate a safer, more intuitive, and more efficient unified system for a wide range of human-robot collaborative tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出一种三层控制框架，通过实时学习示教轨迹与变阻抗、零空间优化管理奇异点、以及全机器人零空间柔顺，实现高效、直观且安全的机器人技能教学系统。
AI.motivation: 当前人机交互技能教学系统碎片化，缺乏同时具备高效性、直观性和通用安全性的统一框架。需要解决从演示学习到安全交互的完整闭环问题。
AI.method: 提出三层渐进式控制框架：1) 实时学习示教方法，从单次演示中同时学习轨迹和变阻抗；2) 零空间优化策略，主动管理奇异点并提供一致的交互感受；3) 基础零空间柔顺方法，使整个机器人身体能够柔顺适应外部交互而不影响主任务性能。
AI.result: 在7自由度KUKA LWR机器人上进行全面对比实验验证，结果表明该系统为广泛的人机协作任务提供了更安全、更直观、更高效的一体化解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 该分层控制框架通过整合实时学习示教、零空间优化和全机器人柔顺，创建了一个多功能的人机交互平台，超越了传统末端执行器特定应用的限制，实现了高效、直观且安全的统一技能教学系统。

title: GFT: From Imitation to Reward Fine-Tuning with Unbiased Group Advantages and Dynamic Coefficient Rectification
summary: Large language models are typically post-trained using supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning (RL), yet effectively unifying efficient knowledge injection with robust generalization remains challenging. In this work, we provide a training-dynamics analysis showing that SFT can be interpreted as a special case of policy gradient optimization with an extremely sparse implicit reward and unstable inverse-probability weighting, which together lead to single-path dependency, entropy collapse, and gradient explosion. Motivated by this diagnosis, we propose Group Fine-Tuning (GFT), a unified post-training framework that addresses these intrinsic limitations through two mechanisms: Group Advantage Learning, which constructs diverse response groups and derives normalized contrastive supervision to alleviate reward sparsity, and Dynamic Coefficient Rectification, which adaptively bounds inverse-probability weights to stabilize optimization while preserving efficient knowledge injection. Experiments demonstrate that GFT consistently surpasses SFT-based methods and yields policies that integrate more smoothly with subsequent RL training.

AI.tldr: GFT提出了一种新的后训练框架，通过分组优势学习和动态系数校正解决SFT的奖励稀疏性和优化不稳定问题，实现更好的知识注入和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM后训练通常使用SFT和RL，但难以同时实现高效知识注入和鲁棒泛化。研究发现SFT本质上是具有极端稀疏隐式奖励和不稳定逆概率加权的策略梯度优化，导致单一路径依赖、熵崩溃和梯度爆炸。
AI.method: 提出Group Fine-Tuning (GFT)框架：1) Group Advantage Learning：构建多样化响应组，推导归一化对比监督以缓解奖励稀疏性；2) Dynamic Coefficient Rectification：自适应限制逆概率权重以稳定优化，同时保持高效知识注入。
AI.result: 实验表明GFT持续超越基于SFT的方法，并产生与后续RL训练更平滑集成的策略。
AI.conclusion: GFT通过诊断SFT的内在局限性并设计相应机制，提供了一种统一的后训练框架，能更好地平衡知识注入效率和泛化鲁棒性。

title: Response-Aware User Memory Selection for LLM Personalization
summary: A common approach to personalization in large language models (LLMs) is to incorporate a subset of the user memory into the prompt at inference time to guide the model's generation. Existing methods select these subsets primarily using similarity between user memory items and input queries, ignoring how features actually affect the model's response distribution. We propose Response-Utility optimization for Memory Selection (RUMS), a novel method that selects user memory items by measuring the mutual information between a subset of memory and the model's outputs, identifying items that reduce response uncertainty and sharpen predictions beyond semantic similarity. We demonstrate that this information-theoretic foundation enables more principled user memory selection that aligns more closely with human selection compared to state-of-the-art methods, and models $400\times$ larger. Additionally, we show that memory items selected using RUMS result in better response quality compared to existing approaches, while having up to $95\%$ reduction in computational cost.

AI.tldr: RUMS是一种基于信息论的用户记忆选择方法，通过测量记忆子集与模型输出之间的互信息来选择记忆项，相比基于语义相似性的方法能更有效地减少响应不确定性并提升预测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型语言模型个性化方法主要基于用户记忆项与输入查询之间的语义相似性来选择记忆子集，忽略了这些特征如何实际影响模型的响应分布。需要一种更原则性的方法来选择真正能改善模型响应的记忆项。
AI.method: 提出了响应效用优化的记忆选择方法（RUMS），该方法通过测量记忆子集与模型输出之间的互信息来选择用户记忆项。具体来说，RUMS识别那些能减少响应不确定性并锐化预测的记忆项，超越了单纯的语义相似性匹配。
AI.result: 1. RUMS相比最先进的方法和400倍大的模型，能更接近人类选择的记忆项；2. 使用RUMS选择的记忆项能带来更好的响应质量；3. 计算成本最多可减少95%。
AI.conclusion: 基于信息论的记忆选择方法RUMS为大型语言模型的个性化提供了一种更原则性的方法，相比基于语义相似性的方法能更有效地选择真正有用的用户记忆，同时显著降低计算成本。

title: EMMa: End-Effector Stability-Oriented Mobile Manipulation for Tracked Rescue Robots
summary: The autonomous operation of tracked mobile manipulators in rescue missions requires not only ensuring the reachability and safety of robot motion but also maintaining stable end-effector manipulation under diverse task demands. However, existing studies have overlooked many end-effector motion properties at both the planning and control levels. This paper presents a motion generation framework for tracked mobile manipulators to achieve stable end-effector operation in complex rescue scenarios. The framework formulates a coordinated path optimization model that couples end-effector and mobile base states and designs compact cost/constraint representations to mitigate nonlinearities and reduce computational complexity. Furthermore, an isolated control scheme with feedforward compensation and feedback regulation is developed to enable coordinated path tracking for the robot. Extensive simulated and real-world experiments on rescue scenarios demonstrate that the proposed framework consistently outperforms SOTA methods across key metrics, including task success rate and end-effector motion stability, validating its effectiveness and robustness in complex mobile manipulation tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出用于履带式移动机械臂的协调运动生成框架，通过耦合末端执行器与移动基座状态的优化模型和隔离控制方案，实现复杂救援场景中的稳定末端操作。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在规划和控制层面忽视了末端执行器的多种运动特性，而救援任务中的自主操作不仅需要确保机器人运动的可达性和安全性，还需在不同任务需求下保持稳定的末端执行器操作。
AI.method: 1. 提出协调路径优化模型，耦合末端执行器与移动基座状态；2. 设计紧凑的成本/约束表示以减轻非线性和降低计算复杂度；3. 开发具有前馈补偿和反馈调节的隔离控制方案，实现机器人协调路径跟踪。
AI.result: 在救援场景的大量仿真和真实世界实验中，该框架在任务成功率和末端执行器运动稳定性等关键指标上持续优于最先进方法，验证了其在复杂移动操作任务中的有效性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该运动生成框架能够有效实现履带式移动机械臂在复杂救援场景中的稳定末端操作，通过协调优化和控制方案解决了现有研究中被忽视的末端执行器运动特性问题。

title: Diffusion Language Models for Speech Recognition
summary: Diffusion language models have recently emerged as a leading alternative to standard language models, due to their ability for bidirectional attention and parallel text generation. In this work, we explore variants for their use in speech recognition. Specifically, we introduce a comprehensive guide to incorporating masked diffusion language models (MDLM) and uniform-state diffusion models (USDMs) for rescoring ASR hypotheses. Additionally, we design a new joint-decoding method that combines CTC and USDM by integrating the framewise probability distributions derived from CTC with the labelwise probability distributions computed by USDM at each decoding step, thereby generating new candidates that combine strong language knowledge from USDM and acoustic information from CTC. Our findings reveal that USDM, as well as MDLM, can significantly improve the accuracy of recognized text. We publish all our code and recipes.

AI.tldr: 该论文探索了扩散语言模型在语音识别中的应用，提出了基于掩码扩散语言模型和均匀状态扩散模型的ASR假设重评分方法，并设计了一种结合CTC和USDM的联合解码方法。
AI.motivation: 扩散语言模型因其双向注意力和并行文本生成能力成为标准语言模型的有力替代品，本文旨在探索其在语音识别中的应用潜力，特别是用于ASR假设重评分。
AI.method: 1. 引入掩码扩散语言模型和均匀状态扩散模型用于ASR假设重评分；2. 设计新的联合解码方法，将CTC的帧级概率分布与USDM的标签级概率分布在每个解码步骤中结合，生成结合USDM语言知识和CTC声学信息的新候选。
AI.result: 研究发现USDM和MDLM都能显著提高识别文本的准确性，证明了扩散语言模型在语音识别中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 扩散语言模型是语音识别中有效的重评分工具，提出的联合解码方法能够结合声学和语言信息，作者公开了所有代码和配方。

title: EvoGymCM: Harnessing Continuous Material Stiffness for Soft Robot Co-Design
comment: 8 pages, 11 figures. Preprint. Under review at IROS 2026
summary: In the automated co-design of soft robots, precisely adapting the material stiffness field to task environments is crucial for unlocking their full physical potential. However, mainstream platforms (e.g., EvoGym) strictly discretize the material dimension, artificially restricting the design space and performance of soft robots. To address this, we propose EvoGymCM (EvoGym with Continuous Materials), a benchmark suite formally establishing continuous material stiffness as a first-class design variable alongside morphology and control. Aligning with real-world material mechanisms, EvoGymCM introduces two settings: (i) EvoGymCM-R (Reactive), motivated by programmable materials with dynamically tunable stiffness; and (ii) EvoGymCM-I (Invariant), motivated by traditional materials with invariant stiffness fields. To tackle the resulting high-dimensional coupling, we formulate two Morphology-Material-Control co-design paradigms: (i) Reactive-Material Co-Design, which learns real-time stiffness tuning policies to guide programmable materials; and (ii) Invariant-Material Co-Design, which jointly optimizes morphology and fixed material fields to guide traditional material fabrication. Systematic experiments across diverse tasks demonstrate that continuous material optimization boosts performance and unlocks synergy across morphology, material, and control.

AI.tldr: EvoGymCM扩展了软体机器人协同设计基准，将连续材料刚度作为与形态和控制并列的一类设计变量，包含反应性和不变性两种材料设置，并提出相应的协同设计范式。
AI.motivation: 现有软体机器人协同设计平台（如EvoGym）将材料维度严格离散化，人为限制了设计空间和性能。需要建立连续材料刚度作为一类设计变量的基准，以充分挖掘软体机器人的物理潜力。
AI.method: 提出EvoGymCM基准套件，包含两种材料设置：EvoGymCM-R（反应性材料，对应可编程材料）和EvoGymCM-I（不变性材料，对应传统材料）。针对高维耦合问题，提出两种形态-材料-控制协同设计范式：反应性材料协同设计（学习实时刚度调节策略）和不变性材料协同设计（联合优化形态和固定材料场）。
AI.result: 系统实验表明，连续材料优化能够提升性能，并解锁形态、材料和控制之间的协同效应。
AI.conclusion: 将连续材料刚度作为一类设计变量对于软体机器人协同设计至关重要，EvoGymCM基准套件为此提供了正式框架，两种协同设计范式能够有效处理高维耦合问题，提升软体机器人的整体性能。

title: Improving Human Performance with Value-Aware Interventions: A Case Study in Chess
summary: AI systems are increasingly used to assist humans in sequential decision-making tasks, yet determining when and how an AI assistant should intervene remains a fundamental challenge. A potential baseline is to recommend the optimal action according to a strong model. However, such actions assume optimal follow-up actions, which human decision makers may fail to execute, potentially reducing overall performance. In this work, we propose and study value-aware interventions, motivated by a basic principle in reinforcement learning: under the Bellman equation, the optimal policy selects actions that maximize the immediate reward plus the value function. When a decision maker follows a suboptimal policy, this policy-value consistency no longer holds, creating discrepancies between the actions taken by the policy and those that maximize the immediate reward plus the value of the next state. We show that these policy-value inconsistencies naturally identify opportunities for intervention. We formalize this problem in a Markov decision process where an AI assistant may override human actions under an intervention budget. In the single-intervention regime, we show that the optimal strategy is to recommend the action that maximizes the human value function. For settings with multiple interventions, we propose a tractable approximation that prioritizes interventions based on the magnitude of the policy-value discrepancy. We evaluate these ideas in the domain of chess by learning models of humans from large-scale gameplay data. In simulation, our approach consistently outperforms interventions based on the strongest chess engine (Stockfish) in a wide range of settings. A within-subject human study with 20 players and 600 games further shows that our interventions significantly improve performance for low- and mid-skill players while matching expert-engine interventions for high-skill players.

AI.tldr: 提出基于价值感知的AI干预方法，通过检测策略-价值不一致性来识别干预时机，在棋类游戏中优于传统最优动作推荐
AI.motivation: AI系统在顺序决策任务中辅助人类时，如何确定干预时机和方式是关键挑战。传统方法推荐最优动作，但假设人类能完美执行后续动作，而实际上人类可能无法做到，导致整体性能下降
AI.method: 基于强化学习中的贝尔曼方程原理，当决策者遵循次优策略时，策略与价值函数之间会出现不一致性。作者将问题形式化为马尔可夫决策过程，AI助手可在干预预算内覆盖人类动作。在单次干预场景中，最优策略是推荐最大化人类价值函数的动作；在多次干预场景中，提出基于策略-价值差异幅度的可处理近似方法
AI.result: 在国际象棋领域，从大规模游戏数据中学习人类模型进行仿真。结果显示，该方法在各种设置下始终优于基于最强象棋引擎（Stockfish）的干预方法。在20名玩家、600场游戏的人体研究中，该方法显著提高了低技能和中技能玩家的表现，同时在高技能玩家中与专家引擎干预效果相当
AI.conclusion: 基于价值感知的干预方法通过检测策略-价值不一致性来识别干预机会，能够更有效地辅助人类决策者，特别是在人类可能无法完美执行后续动作的现实场景中，相比传统的最优动作推荐方法具有显著优势

title: State and Trajectory Estimation of Tensegrity Robots via Factor Graphs and Chebyshev Polynomials
summary: Tensegrity robots offer compliance and adaptability, but their nonlinear, and underconstrained dynamics make state estimation challenging. Reliable continuous-time estimation of all rigid links is crucial for closed-loop control, system identification, and machine learning; however, conventional methods often fall short. This paper proposes a two-stage approach for robust state or trajectory estimation (i.e., filtering or smoothing) of a cable-driven tensegrity robot. For online state estimation, this work introduces a factor-graph-based method, which fuses measurements from an RGB-D camera with on-board cable length sensors. To the best of the authors' knowledge, this is the first application of factor graphs in this domain. Factor graphs are a natural choice, as they exploit the robot's structural properties and provide effective sensor fusion solutions capable of handling nonlinearities in practice. Both the Mahalanobis distance-based clustering algorithm, used to handle noise, and the Chebyshev polynomial method, used to estimate the most probable velocities and intermediate states, are shown to perform well on simulated and real-world data, compared to an ICP-based algorithm. Results show that the approach provides high fidelity, continuous-time state and trajectory estimates for complex tensegrity robot motions.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于因子图的两阶段方法，用于缆索驱动张拉整体机器人的鲁棒状态/轨迹估计，融合RGB-D相机和缆索长度传感器数据
AI.motivation: 张拉整体机器人具有柔顺性和适应性，但其非线性、欠约束动力学使状态估计具有挑战性。可靠的连续时间刚性连杆估计对于闭环控制、系统识别和机器学习至关重要，而传统方法往往不足
AI.method: 提出两阶段方法：1) 基于因子图的在线状态估计，融合RGB-D相机和缆索长度传感器数据；2) 使用马氏距离聚类算法处理噪声，切比雪夫多项式方法估计最可能速度和中间状态
AI.result: 与基于ICP的算法相比，该方法在仿真和真实数据上表现良好，为复杂张拉整体机器人运动提供高保真度的连续时间状态和轨迹估计
AI.conclusion: 这是因子图在该领域的首次应用，利用机器人结构特性并提供有效的传感器融合解决方案，能够处理实际非线性问题

title: Adaptive Conformal Prediction for Improving Factuality of Generations by Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are prone to generating factually incorrect outputs. Recent work has applied conformal prediction to provide uncertainty estimates and statistical guarantees for the factuality of LLM generations. However, existing approaches are typically not prompt-adaptive, limiting their ability to capture input-dependent variability. As a result, they may filter out too few items (leading to over-coverage) or too many (under-coverage) for a given task or prompt. We propose an adaptive conformal prediction approach that extends conformal score transformation methods to LLMs, with applications to long-form generation and multiple-choice question answering. This enables prompt-dependent calibration, retaining marginal coverage guarantees while improving conditional coverage. In addition, the approach naturally supports selective prediction, allowing unreliable claims or answer choices to be filtered out in downstream applications. We evaluate our approach on multiple white-box models across diverse domains and show that it significantly outperforms existing baselines in terms of conditional coverage.

AI.tldr: 提出一种自适应保形预测方法，用于大语言模型的事实性不确定性估计，通过提示依赖的校准改善条件覆盖率
AI.motivation: 大语言模型容易生成事实不正确的输出，现有保形预测方法通常不是提示自适应的，无法捕捉输入依赖的变异性，导致覆盖率问题
AI.method: 提出自适应保形预测方法，将保形分数变换方法扩展到LLMs，支持提示依赖的校准，保持边际覆盖率保证的同时改善条件覆盖率，并支持选择性预测
AI.result: 在多个白盒模型和不同领域上评估，该方法在条件覆盖率方面显著优于现有基线方法
AI.conclusion: 自适应保形预测方法能够为LLM生成提供更好的不确定性估计和统计保证，通过提示依赖的校准改善条件覆盖率，支持下游应用中的选择性预测

title: FocalLens: Visualizing Narratives through Focalization
summary: Visualizing narratives is useful to writers to reflect on unfinished drafts and identify unintentional biases and inconsistencies. Literary scholars can use the visualizations to identify nuanced patterns and literary styles from written text. Current narrative visualization is limited to representing character and location co-occurrences in a timeline, omitting important and complex narrative components such as focalization, causality, and speech. This paper aims to capture and visualize underexplored, complex narrative components as a basis for narrative visualization. As a starting point, we propose a new narrative visualization, named FocalLens, that uses focalization, the component that establishes who sees or perceives the events in a narrative, for representing the narrative. We provide the theoretical foundation of focalization and describe various types and facets of focalization. The details are incorporated in the novel visualization that captures how different characters perceive an event, who directly participate in an event, who indirectly observe the event, and who narrate the event. We also developed a tool that provides fluid interaction between the text and the proposed visualization. The tool was evaluated with four writers and scholars in a qualitative study, where writers analyzed their draft stories and scholars analyzed well-known stories. The findings suggest the tool added a new dimension to the workflow for writers and scholars, an analytical lens that is not available otherwise. We conclude by identifying design implications and future directions.

AI.tldr: FocalLens：一种基于叙事聚焦理论的新型可视化工具，用于捕捉和展示传统时间线方法忽略的复杂叙事元素，如人物视角、因果关系和言语表达。
AI.motivation: 现有叙事可视化主要局限于时间线上的人物和地点共现关系，忽略了聚焦、因果关系、言语表达等重要而复杂的叙事成分。作者希望开发能够捕捉和可视化这些未被充分探索的复杂叙事成分的工具，为叙事分析提供新维度。
AI.method: 提出FocalLens可视化方法，基于叙事聚焦理论（谁感知叙事事件），将聚焦理论的各种类型和方面融入新颖的可视化设计中。开发了支持文本与可视化之间流畅交互的工具，并通过定性研究对四名作家和学者进行评估。
AI.result: 评估结果显示，该工具为作家和学者的工作流程增加了新维度，提供了原本无法获得的叙事分析视角。作家能够分析自己的草稿故事，学者能够分析知名作品，发现了传统方法难以察觉的叙事模式。
AI.conclusion: FocalLens成功捕捉了传统叙事可视化忽略的复杂叙事成分，为叙事分析提供了有价值的工具。研究识别了设计启示和未来方向，表明基于聚焦理论的叙事可视化具有重要应用价值。

title: ViVa: A Video-Generative Value Model for Robot Reinforcement Learning
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have advanced robot manipulation through large-scale pretraining, but real-world deployment remains challenging due to partial observability and delayed feedback. Reinforcement learning addresses this via value functions, which assess task progress and guide policy improvement. However, existing value models built on vision-language models (VLMs) struggle to capture temporal dynamics, undermining reliable value estimation in long-horizon tasks. In this paper, we propose ViVa, a video-generative value model that repurposes a pretrained video generator for value estimation. Taking the current observation and robot proprioception as input, ViVa jointly predicts future proprioception and a scalar value for the current state. By leveraging the spatiotemporal priors of a pretrained video generator, our approach grounds value estimation in anticipated embodiment dynamics, moving beyond static snapshots to intrinsically couple value with foresight. Integrated into RECAP, ViVa delivers substantial improvements on real-world box assembly. Qualitative analysis across all three tasks confirms that ViVa produces more reliable value signals, accurately reflecting task progress. By leveraging spatiotemporal priors from video corpora, ViVa also generalizes to novel objects, highlighting the promise of video-generative models for value estimation.

AI.tldr: ViVa：基于视频生成模型的视觉-语言-动作价值估计方法，通过预测未来本体感知来改进长时域任务中的价值估计
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉-语言模型的价值模型难以捕捉时间动态，在长时域任务中价值估计不可靠，限制了视觉-语言-动作模型在机器人操作中的实际部署
AI.method: 提出ViVa视频生成价值模型，利用预训练视频生成器进行价值估计。以当前观测和机器人本体感知为输入，联合预测未来本体感知和当前状态标量价值，通过视频生成器的时空先验将价值估计建立在预期的具身动态基础上
AI.result: 在真实世界盒子组装任务中，ViVa集成到RECAP框架后带来显著改进。定性分析显示ViVa产生更可靠的价值信号，准确反映任务进展，并能泛化到新物体
AI.conclusion: 视频生成模型通过其时空先验为价值估计提供了有前景的途径，ViVa展示了将视频生成能力重新用于价值估计的有效性，为视觉-语言-动作模型的现实部署提供了更好的价值估计基础

title: PRiMeFlow: Capturing Complex Expression Heterogeneity in Perturbation Response Modelling
summary: Predicting the effects of perturbations in-silico on cell state can identify drivers of cell behavior at scale and accelerate drug discovery. However, modeling challenges remain due to the inherent heterogeneity of single cell gene expression and the complex, latent gene dependencies. Here, we present PRiMeFlow, an end-to-end flow matching based approach to directly model the effects of genetic and small molecule perturbations in the gene expression space. The distribution-fitting approach taken by PRiMeFlow enables it to accurately approximate the empirical distribution of single-cell gene expression, which we demonstrate through extensive benchmarking inside PerturBench. Through ablation studies, we also validate important model design choices such as operating in gene expression space and parameterizing the velocity field with a U-Net architecture. The PRiMeFlow architecture was used as the basis for the model that won the Generalist Prize in the first ARC Virtual Cell Challenge.

AI.tldr: PRiMeFlow是一种基于流匹配的端到端方法，直接在基因表达空间中建模遗传和小分子扰动效应，能够准确近似单细胞基因表达的经验分布。
AI.motivation: 预测细胞状态扰动效应可以大规模识别细胞行为驱动因素并加速药物发现，但单细胞基因表达的异质性和复杂的潜在基因依赖性给建模带来挑战。
AI.method: 采用基于流匹配的端到端方法，直接在基因表达空间中建模扰动效应；使用U-Net架构参数化速度场；通过分布拟合方法近似单细胞基因表达的经验分布。
AI.result: 在PerturBench中通过广泛基准测试证明能准确近似单细胞基因表达分布；消融研究验证了在基因表达空间操作和使用U-Net架构等设计选择；基于PRiMeFlow架构的模型在首届ARC虚拟细胞挑战赛中获得了通用奖。
AI.conclusion: PRiMeFlow为单细胞扰动效应建模提供了有效的端到端解决方案，其分布拟合方法能够处理基因表达的异质性和复杂依赖性，在基准测试和竞赛中表现出色。

title: Complementary Filtering on SO(3) for Attitude Estimation with Scalar Measurements
summary: Attitude estimation using scalar measurements, corresponding to partial vectorial observations, arises naturally when inertial vectors are not fully observed but only measured along specific body-frame vectors. Such measurements arise in problems involving incomplete vector measurements or attitude constraints derived from heterogeneous sensor information. Building on the classical complementary filter on SO(3), we propose an observer with a modified innovation term tailored to this scalar-output structure. The main result shows that almost-global asymptotic stability is recovered, under suitable persistence of excitation conditions, when at least three inertial vectors are measured along a common body-frame vector, which is consistent with the three-dimensional structure of SO(3). For two-scalar configurations - corresponding either to one inertial vector measured along two body-frame vectors, or to two inertial vectors measured along a common body-frame vector - we further derive sufficient conditions guaranteeing convergence within a reduced basin of attraction. Different examples and numerical results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed scalar-based complementary filter for attitude estimation in challenging scenarios involving reduced sensing and/or novel sensing modalities.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于标量测量的姿态估计互补滤波器，适用于惯性向量仅沿特定体坐标系向量部分观测的场景，通过改进创新项实现了几乎全局渐近稳定性。
AI.motivation: 当惯性向量无法完全观测而只能沿特定体坐标系向量测量时，姿态估计需要使用标量测量。这种场景出现在不完全向量测量或异构传感器信息推导的姿态约束问题中，需要专门设计适用于标量输出结构的观测器。
AI.method: 基于SO(3)上的经典互补滤波器，提出了改进创新项的观测器，专门针对标量输出结构设计。当至少三个惯性向量沿共同体坐标系向量测量时，在适当的持续激励条件下恢复几乎全局渐近稳定性。对于两种标量配置（一个惯性向量沿两个体坐标系向量测量，或两个惯性向量沿共同体坐标系向量测量），推导了保证收敛的充分条件。
AI.result: 理论分析表明，在至少三个惯性向量沿共同体坐标系向量测量的情况下，观测器具有几乎全局渐近稳定性，这与SO(3)的三维结构一致。对于两种标量配置，确定了保证在减小吸引域内收敛的充分条件。数值结果验证了所提标量互补滤波器在挑战性场景中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的标量测量互补滤波器为姿态估计提供了有效解决方案，特别适用于减少传感或新型传感模式下的挑战性场景，扩展了传统互补滤波器在标量输出结构中的应用范围。

title: Governed Capability Evolution for Embodied Agents: Safe Upgrade, Compatibility Checking, and Runtime Rollback for Embodied Capability Modules
summary:
Embodied agents are increasingly expected to improve over time by updating their executable capabilities rather than rewriting the agent itself. Prior work has separately studied modular capability packaging, capability evolution, and runtime governance. However, a key systems problem remains underexplored: once an embodied capability module evolves into a new version, how can the hosting system deploy it safely without breaking policy constraints, execution assumptions, or recovery guarantees?
  We formulate governed capability evolution as a first-class systems problem for embodied agents. We propose a lifecycle-aware upgrade framework in which every new capability version is treated as a governed deployment candidate rather than an immediately executable replacement. The framework introduces four upgrade compatibility checks -- interface, policy, behavioral, and recovery -- and organizes them into a staged runtime pipeline comprising candidate validation, sandbox evaluation, shadow deployment, gated activation, online monitoring, and rollback.
  We evaluate over 6 rounds of capability upgrade with 15 random seeds. Naive upgrade achieves 72.9% task success but drives unsafe activation to 60% by the final round; governed upgrade retains comparable success (67.4%) while maintaining zero unsafe activations across all rounds (Wilcoxon p=0.003). Shadow deployment reveals 40% of regressions invisible to sandbox evaluation alone, and rollback succeeds in 79.8% of post-activation drift scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出一个面向具身智能体的生命周期感知升级框架，通过四类兼容性检查和分阶段运行时管道，确保能力模块升级时的安全部署，避免破坏策略约束、执行假设和恢复保证。
AI.motivation: 具身智能体需要在不重写智能体本身的情况下通过更新可执行能力来持续改进。现有研究分别探讨了模块化能力打包、能力演化和运行时治理，但一个关键系统问题尚未充分探索：一旦具身能力模块演化为新版本，宿主系统如何在不破坏策略约束、执行假设或恢复保证的情况下安全部署它？
AI.method: 提出生命周期感知升级框架，将每个新能力版本视为受治理的部署候选而非立即可执行的替换。框架引入四种升级兼容性检查（接口、策略、行为和恢复），并将其组织成包含候选验证、沙盒评估、影子部署、门控激活、在线监控和回滚的分阶段运行时管道。
AI.result: 在6轮能力升级和15个随机种子的评估中：朴素升级实现72.9%任务成功率，但最终轮次不安全激活率达60%；受治理升级保持可比成功率（67.4%）且在所有轮次中维持零不安全激活（Wilcoxon p=0.003）。影子部署揭示了沙盒评估单独无法发现的40%回归，回滚在79.8%的激活后漂移场景中成功。
AI.conclusion: 将受治理能力演化确立为具身智能体的首要系统问题，提出的生命周期感知升级框架通过系统化的兼容性检查和分阶段部署管道，显著提高了能力升级的安全性，同时保持了任务成功率。

title: How Can We Synthesize High-Quality Pretraining Data? A Systematic Study of Prompt Design, Generator Model, and Source Data
summary: Synthetic data is a standard component in training large language models, yet systematic comparisons across design dimensions, including rephrasing strategy, generator model, and source data, remain absent. We conduct extensive controlled experiments, generating over one trillion tokens, to identify critical factors in rephrasing web text into synthetic pretraining data. Our results reveal that structured output formats, such as tables, math problems, FAQs, and tutorials, consistently outperform both curated web baselines and prior synthetic methods. Notably, increasing the size of the generator model beyond 1B parameters provides no additional benefit. Our analysis also demonstrates that the selection of the original data used for mixing substantially influences performance. By applying our findings, we develop \textbf{\textsc{FinePhrase}}, a 486-billion-token open dataset of rephrased web text. We show that \textsc{FinePhrase} outperforms all existing synthetic data baselines while reducing generation costs by up to 30 times. We provide the dataset, all prompts, and the generation framework to the research community.

AI.tldr: FinePhrase：通过结构化重述网页文本生成高质量合成预训练数据，在降低30倍成本的同时超越现有合成数据基准
AI.motivation: 合成数据是训练大语言模型的标准组件，但缺乏对重述策略、生成模型和源数据等设计维度的系统比较。需要确定将网页文本重述为合成预训练数据的关键因素。
AI.method: 进行大规模受控实验，生成超过一万亿token，比较不同重述策略（表格、数学问题、FAQ、教程等结构化格式）、生成模型大小和源数据选择的影响。
AI.result: 结构化输出格式（表格、数学问题、FAQ、教程）始终优于精选网页基准和先前合成方法；生成模型大小超过10亿参数无额外收益；源数据选择对性能有显著影响；FinePhrase数据集（4860亿token）超越所有现有合成数据基准，同时降低30倍生成成本。
AI.conclusion: 结构化重述是生成高质量合成预训练数据的关键策略，FinePhrase数据集为研究社区提供了高效、高质量的合成数据资源，推动了合成数据生成方法的标准化和优化。

title: PriPG-RL: Privileged Planner-Guided Reinforcement Learning for Partially Observable Systems with Anytime-Feasible MPC
summary: This paper addresses the problem of training a reinforcement learning (RL) policy under partial observability by exploiting a privileged, anytime-feasible planner agent available exclusively during training. We formalize this as a Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP) in which a planner agent with access to an approximate dynamical model and privileged state information guides a learning agent that observes only a lossy projection of the true state. To realize this framework, we introduce an anytime-feasible Model Predictive Control (MPC) algorithm that serves as the planner agent. For the learning agent, we propose Planner-to-Policy Soft Actor-Critic (P2P-SAC), a method that distills the planner agent's privileged knowledge to mitigate partial observability and thereby improve both sample efficiency and final policy performance. We support this framework with rigorous theoretical analysis. Finally, we validate our approach in simulation using NVIDIA Isaac Lab and successfully deploy it on a real-world Unitree Go2 quadruped navigating complex, obstacle-rich environments.

AI.tldr: 提出P2P-SAC方法，利用训练时可用的特权规划器来缓解部分可观测性，提高强化学习策略的样本效率和最终性能
AI.motivation: 解决部分可观测环境下强化学习训练困难的问题，通过利用训练时可用但部署时不可用的特权规划器来指导学习智能体
AI.method: 将问题形式化为POMDP，引入随时可行的MPC算法作为规划器智能体，提出P2P-SAC方法将规划器的特权知识蒸馏到学习智能体策略中
AI.result: 在NVIDIA Isaac Lab仿真中验证了方法有效性，并成功部署到Unitree Go2四足机器人上，在复杂障碍环境中实现导航
AI.conclusion: 通过特权规划器指导的蒸馏方法能有效缓解部分可观测性，提高强化学习策略的样本效率和最终性能，并在真实机器人上验证了可行性

title: Hierarchical vs. Flat Iteration in Shared-Weight Transformers
summary: We present an empirical study of whether hierarchically structured, shared-weight recurrence can match the representational quality of independent-layer stacking in a Transformer-based language model. HRM-LM replaces L independent Transformer layers with a two-speed recurrent pair: a Fast module operating at every step for local refinement, and a Slow module operating every T steps for global compression. This recurrent hierarchy is unrolled for M = N x T steps with shared parameters. The central and most robust finding, supported by a parameter-matched Universal Transformer ablation (UniTF, 1.2B) across five independent runs, is a sharp empirical gap between the two approaches.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了分层递归共享权重结构与独立层堆叠在Transformer语言模型中的表征质量差异，发现两者存在显著性能差距
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探索分层结构化、共享权重的递归架构是否能够达到独立层堆叠Transformer的表征质量，旨在验证递归架构在语言建模中的有效性
AI.method: 提出HRM-LM模型，用两速递归对替代L个独立Transformer层：Fast模块每步运行进行局部细化，Slow模块每T步运行进行全局压缩。该递归层次展开M=N×T步并共享参数。通过参数匹配的Universal Transformer消融实验（UniTF，12亿参数）在五个独立运行中进行验证
AI.result: 最核心且稳健的发现是两种方法之间存在显著的实证差距，分层递归共享权重架构未能匹配独立层堆叠Transformer的表征质量
AI.conclusion: 分层结构化、共享权重的递归架构在语言建模任务中无法达到独立层堆叠Transformer的表征质量，表明递归架构在该场景下存在局限性

title: "Why This Avoidance Maneuver?" Contrastive Explanations in Human-Supervised Maritime Autonomous Navigation
comment: Submitted to IEEE Intelligent Transportation Systems Conference (ITSC) 2026
summary: Automated maritime collision avoidance will rely on human supervision for the foreseeable future. This necessitates transparency into how the system perceives a scenario and plans a maneuver. However, the causal logic behind avoidance maneuvers is often complex and difficult to convey to a navigator. This paper explores how to explain these factors in a selective, understandable manner for supervisors with a nautical background. We propose a method for generating contrastive explanations, which provide human-centric insights by comparing a system's proposed solution against relevant alternatives. To evaluate this, we developed a framework that uses visual and textual cues to highlight key objectives from a state-of-the-art collision avoidance system. An exploratory user study with four experienced marine officers suggests that contrastive explanations support the understanding of the system's objectives. However, our findings also reveal that while these explanations are highly valuable in complex multi-vessel encounters, they can increase cognitive workload, suggesting that future maritime interfaces may benefit most from demand-driven or scenario-specific explanation strategies.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种为海事碰撞避免系统生成对比解释的方法，通过比较系统建议方案与相关替代方案，为具有航海背景的监督人员提供选择性、可理解的解释。
AI.motivation: 自动化海事碰撞避免系统在可预见的未来仍需要人类监督，这要求系统能够透明展示其如何感知场景和规划机动。然而，避免机动的因果逻辑通常复杂且难以向导航员传达，需要为具有航海背景的监督人员提供选择性、可理解的解释。
AI.method: 提出了一种生成对比解释的方法，通过比较系统建议方案与相关替代方案，提供以人为中心的洞察。开发了一个框架，使用视觉和文本线索来突出最先进碰撞避免系统的关键目标。
AI.result: 对四名经验丰富的海事官员进行的探索性用户研究表明，对比解释有助于理解系统的目标。然而，研究发现这些解释虽然在复杂的多船相遇场景中非常有价值，但会增加认知负荷。
AI.conclusion: 对比解释能够支持对系统目标的理解，特别是在复杂多船相遇场景中。然而，由于会增加认知负荷，未来的海事界面可能最受益于需求驱动或场景特定的解释策略。

title: HINTBench: Horizon-agent Intrinsic Non-attack Trajectory Benchmark
summary: Existing agent-safety evaluation has focused mainly on externally induced risks. Yet agents may still enter unsafe trajectories under benign conditions. We study this complementary but underexplored setting through the lens of \emph{intrinsic} risk, where intrinsic failures remain latent, propagate across long-horizon execution, and eventually lead to high-consequence outcomes. To evaluate this setting, we introduce \emph{non-attack intrinsic risk auditing} and present \textbf{HINTBench}, a benchmark of 629 agent trajectories (523 risky, 106 safe; 33 steps on average) supporting three tasks: risk detection, risk-step localization, and intrinsic failure-type identification. Its annotations are organized under a unified five-constraint taxonomy. Experiments reveal a substantial capability gap: strong LLMs perform well on trajectory-level risk detection, but their performance drops to below 35 Strict-F1 on risk-step localization, while fine-grained failure diagnosis proves even harder. Existing guard models transfer poorly to this setting. These findings establish intrinsic risk auditing as an open challenge for agent safety.

AI.tldr: HINTBench是一个专注于评估智能体内在风险的基准测试，包含629条轨迹，支持风险检测、风险步骤定位和内在故障类型识别三个任务，揭示了现有模型在内在风险评估方面的显著能力差距。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体安全评估主要关注外部诱导风险，但智能体在良性条件下仍可能进入不安全轨迹。作者研究这种被忽视但重要的内在风险设置，其中内在故障保持潜伏状态，在长期执行中传播，最终导致严重后果。
AI.method: 引入非攻击性内在风险审计方法，提出HINTBench基准测试，包含629条智能体轨迹（523条有风险，106条安全），平均33步。标注基于统一的五约束分类法，支持三个评估任务：风险检测、风险步骤定位和内在故障类型识别。
AI.result: 实验显示显著能力差距：强大LLM在轨迹级风险检测上表现良好，但在风险步骤定位上的Strict-F1分数低于35%，细粒度故障诊断更加困难。现有防护模型在此设置下迁移效果差。
AI.conclusion: 内在风险审计是智能体安全领域的一个开放挑战，需要开发新的评估方法和模型来应对智能体在良性条件下的内在风险问题。

title: LLMs taking shortcuts in test generation: A study with SAP HANA and LevelDB
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved impressive results on public benchmarks, often leading to claims of advanced reasoning and understanding. However, recent research in cognitive science reveals that these models sometimes rely on shallow heuristics and memorization, taking shortcuts rather than demonstrating genuine cognitive abilities. This paper investigates LLM behavior in automated test generation for software, contrasting performance on an open-source system (LevelDB) with SAP HANA, one of the most widely deployed commercial database systems worldwide, whose proprietary codebase is guaranteed to be absent from training data. We combine cognitive evaluation principles, drawing on Mitchell's mechanism-focused assessment methodology, with empirical software testing, employing mutation score and iterative compiler-feedback repair loops to assess both accuracy and underlying reasoning strategies. Results show that LLMs excel on familiar, open-source benchmarks but struggle with unseen, complex domains, often prioritizing compilability over semantic effectiveness. These findings provide independent software engineering evidence for the broader claim that current LLMs lack robust reasoning, and highlight the need for evaluation frameworks that penalize trivial shortcuts and reward true generalization.

AI.tldr: LLMs在公开基准测试表现出色，但在未见过复杂领域（如专有商业数据库系统）中表现不佳，依赖浅层启发式而非真正推理能力
AI.motivation: 研究LLMs在软件自动化测试生成中的真实推理能力，而非仅仅依赖公开基准测试的表现。通过对比开源系统（LevelDB）与专有商业系统（SAP HANA）来评估LLMs是否真正具备泛化能力
AI.method: 结合认知评估原则（Mitchell的机制聚焦评估方法）与实证软件测试方法，使用变异分数和迭代编译器反馈修复循环来评估准确性和底层推理策略
AI.result: LLMs在熟悉的开源基准测试上表现出色，但在未见过、复杂的专有领域（SAP HANA）中表现不佳，往往优先考虑可编译性而非语义有效性
AI.conclusion: 当前LLMs缺乏稳健的推理能力，需要能够惩罚简单捷径、奖励真正泛化能力的评估框架，为认知科学中关于LLMs依赖浅层启发式的观点提供了独立的软件工程证据

title: Open-Ended Instruction Realization with LLM-Enabled Multi-Planner Scheduling in Autonomous Vehicles
summary: Most Human-Machine Interaction (HMI) research overlooks the maneuvering needs of passengers in autonomous driving (AD). Natural language offers an intuitive interface, yet translating passenger open-ended instructions into control signals, without sacrificing interpretability and traceability, remains a challenge. This study proposes an instruction-realization framework that leverages a large language model (LLM) to interpret instructions, generates executable scripts that schedule multiple model predictive control (MPC)-based motion planners based on real-time feedback, and converts planned trajectories into control signals. This scheduling-centric design decouples semantic reasoning from vehicle control at different timescales, establishing a transparent, traceable decision-making chain from high-level instructions to low-level actions. Due to the absence of high-fidelity evaluation tools, this study introduces a benchmark for open-ended instruction realization in a closed-loop setting. Comprehensive experiments reveal that the framework significantly improves task-completion rates over instruction-realization baselines, reduces LLM query costs, achieves safety and compliance on par with specialized AD approaches, and exhibits considerable tolerance to LLM inference latency. For more qualitative illustrations and a clearer understanding.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于大语言模型的指令实现框架，将乘客自然语言指令转化为自动驾驶控制信号，通过调度多个MPC运动规划器实现透明可追溯的决策链。
AI.motivation: 当前人机交互研究忽视自动驾驶中乘客的操控需求，自然语言作为直观接口面临挑战：如何将开放式指令转化为控制信号而不牺牲可解释性和可追溯性。
AI.method: 提出指令实现框架：1) 使用LLM解释指令；2) 生成可执行脚本调度多个基于MPC的运动规划器；3) 将规划轨迹转化为控制信号。采用调度中心设计，在不同时间尺度上解耦语义推理和车辆控制。
AI.result: 框架显著提高任务完成率，降低LLM查询成本，安全性和合规性与专业AD方法相当，对LLM推理延迟具有较大容忍度。引入闭环设置下的开放式指令实现基准。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为自动驾驶中自然语言指令实现提供了透明、可追溯的解决方案，通过调度中心设计平衡了语义理解和实时控制需求，为开放式指令交互建立了新基准。

title: Geometric Routing Enables Causal Expert Control in Mixture of Experts
summary:
Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models scale parameters while fixing active computation per token, but the specialization of individual experts remains opaque. In a companion paper we showed that routing topology is quality-neutral: five structurally different configurations converge to statistically equivalent language modeling quality. Here we show that expert identity is nonetheless causally meaningful: individual rank-1 experts are monosemantic by construction, and cosine-similarity routing in a low-dimensional metric space makes their specialization directly inspectable.
  We present four lines of evidence. First, projecting expert output vectors through the unembedding matrix yields a Semantic Dictionary: 15% of experts are monosemantic specialists spanning 10 categories (temporal, geographic, cardinal, discourse, emotional, financial, military, scientific). Second, routing exhibits a frequency-to-syntax gradient: early layers separate tokens by word frequency, deeper layers by syntactic class (Zipf-confound controls, all $p < 0.001$). Third, causal interventions confirm these labels: steering toward a temporal expert's centroid increases P(temporal) by +321% (median across 44 prompts); suppressing a geographic expert drops P(geographic) by -23%; rewriting an expert's output vector halves target-category probability, and effects compose additively across layers. Fourth, the interventions are not unique to cosine routing: linear routers support comparable steering, but only cosine routing provides geometric transparency -- expert specialization is readable directly from the centroid matrix.
  MoE expert-level specialization is a first-class interpretability primitive: architecturally monosemantic, causally validated, and controllable at inference with zero overhead.

AI.tldr: 该研究证明稀疏混合专家模型中专家身份具有因果意义：通过余弦相似度路由在低维度量空间中，构造的秩-1专家是单语义的，其专业化可直接检查。
AI.motivation: 尽管先前研究表明路由拓扑结构对质量无影响，但研究者希望探究专家身份是否具有因果意义，以及能否使专家专业化变得可解释和可检查。
AI.method: 采用四种证据线：1) 通过解嵌入矩阵投影专家输出向量构建语义词典；2) 分析路由中的频率-句法梯度；3) 进行因果干预实验验证专家标签；4) 比较余弦路由与线性路由的透明度。
AI.result: 15%的专家是单语义专家，涵盖10个语义类别；路由显示早期层按词频分离标记，深层按句法类别分离；因果干预证实专家标签有效性，且效应在层间可加；余弦路由提供几何透明度，使专家专业化可直接从质心矩阵读取。
AI.conclusion: MoE专家级专业化是一流的可解释性原语：架构上单语义、因果验证有效，且在推理时可零开销控制，余弦路由提供了几何透明度使专家专业化可直接检查。

title: AgiPIX: Bridging Simulation and Reality in Indoor Aerial Inspection
summary: Autonomous indoor flight for critical asset inspection presents fundamental challenges in perception, planning, control, and learning. Despite rapid progress, there is still a lack of a compact, active-sensing, open-source platform that is reproducible across simulation and real-world operation. To address this gap, we present Agipix, a co-designed open hardware and software platform for indoor aerial autonomy and critical asset inspection. Agipix features a compact, hardware-synchronized active-sensing platform with onboard GPU-accelerated compute that is capable of agile flight; a containerized ROS~2-based modular autonomy stack; and a photorealistic digital twin of the hardware platform together with a reliable UI. These elements enable rapid iteration via zero-shot transfer of containerized autonomy components between simulation and real flights. We demonstrate trajectory tracking and exploration performance using onboard sensing in industrial indoor environments. All hardware designs, simulation assets, and containerized software are released openly together with documentation.

AI.tldr: Agipix是一个开源软硬件平台，用于室内自主飞行和关键资产检查，具备紧凑的主动感知设计、容器化ROS 2自主堆栈和逼真数字孪生，支持仿真与真实飞行间的零样本迁移。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏一个紧凑、主动感知、开源且能在仿真和真实世界操作中复现的平台，用于室内自主飞行和关键资产检查。
AI.method: 开发了Agipix平台，包含：1) 紧凑的硬件同步主动感知平台，具备机载GPU加速计算能力；2) 容器化的ROS 2模块化自主堆栈；3) 硬件平台的逼真数字孪生和可靠UI；支持容器化自主组件在仿真和真实飞行间的零样本迁移。
AI.result: 在工业室内环境中展示了基于机载感知的轨迹跟踪和探索性能，所有硬件设计、仿真资产和容器化软件均已开源发布。
AI.conclusion: Agipix填补了室内自主飞行平台的空白，通过软硬件协同设计和容器化架构实现了仿真与真实操作的无缝集成，为关键资产检查提供了可复现的解决方案。

title: Unsupervised Anomaly Detection in Process-Complex Industrial Time Series: A Real-World Case Study
summary:
Industrial time-series data from real production environments exhibits substantially higher complexity than commonly used benchmark datasets, primarily due to heterogeneous, multi-stage operational processes. As a result, anomaly detection methods validated under simplified conditions often fail to generalize to industrial settings. This work presents an empirical study on a unique dataset collected from fully operational industrial machinery, explicitly capturing pronounced process-induced variability.
  We evaluate which model classes are capable of capturing this complexity, starting with a classical Isolation Forest baseline and extending to multiple autoencoder architectures. Experimental results show that Isolation Forest is insufficient for modeling the non-periodic, multi-scale dynamics present in the data, whereas autoencoders consistently perform better. Among them, temporal convolutional autoencoders achieve the most robust performance, while recurrent and variational variants require more careful tuning.

AI.tldr: 该研究评估了不同异常检测模型在复杂工业时间序列数据上的性能，发现自编码器优于孤立森林，其中时序卷积自编码器表现最稳健。
AI.motivation: 工业时间序列数据比常用基准数据集复杂得多，主要由于异构的多阶段操作过程。在简化条件下验证的异常检测方法往往无法泛化到工业环境，因此需要评估哪些模型能够捕捉这种复杂性。
AI.method: 使用从完全运行的工业机械收集的独特数据集进行实证研究，评估了从经典的孤立森林基线到多种自编码器架构的模型性能，包括时序卷积自编码器、循环自编码器和变分自编码器。
AI.result: 孤立森林不足以建模数据中的非周期性、多尺度动态，而自编码器表现更好。其中时序卷积自编码器实现最稳健的性能，而循环和变分变体需要更仔细的调优。
AI.conclusion: 工业时间序列数据的复杂性需要专门设计的模型，时序卷积自编码器在捕捉工业过程诱导的变异性方面表现最佳，为工业异常检测提供了实用的解决方案。

title: HEX: Humanoid-Aligned Experts for Cross-Embodiment Whole-Body Manipulation
summary: Humans achieve complex manipulation through coordinated whole-body control, whereas most Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models treat robot body parts largely independently, making high-DoF humanoid control challenging and often unstable. We present HEX, a state-centric framework for coordinated manipulation on full-sized bipedal humanoid robots. HEX introduces a humanoid-aligned universal state representation for scalable learning across heterogeneous embodiments, and incorporates a Mixture-of-Experts Unified Proprioceptive Predictor to model whole-body coordination and temporal motion dynamics from large-scale multi-embodiment trajectory data. To efficiently capture temporal visual context, HEX uses lightweight history tokens to summarize past observations, avoiding repeated encoding of historical images during inference. It further employs a residual-gated fusion mechanism with a flow-matching action head to adaptively integrate visual-language cues with proprioceptive dynamics for action generation. Experiments on real-world humanoid manipulation tasks show that HEX achieves state-of-the-art performance in task success rate and generalization, particularly in fast-reaction and long-horizon scenarios.

AI.tldr: HEX是一个面向全尺寸双足人形机器人的状态中心化协调操作框架，通过统一状态表示、混合专家本体感知预测器和轻量历史标记等技术，实现了稳定高效的全身协调控制。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作模型通常独立处理机器人身体各部分，难以实现复杂的全身协调控制，导致高自由度人形机器人控制不稳定且具有挑战性。需要开发能够实现协调全身操作的方法。
AI.method: 1. 引入人形对齐的通用状态表示，支持跨异构体现的可扩展学习；2. 采用混合专家统一本体感知预测器，从大规模多体现轨迹数据中建模全身协调和时序运动动态；3. 使用轻量历史标记总结过去观测，避免推理时重复编码历史图像；4. 采用残差门控融合机制和流匹配动作头，自适应整合视觉-语言线索与本体感知动态生成动作。
AI.result: 在真实世界人形机器人操作任务上的实验表明，HEX在任务成功率和泛化能力方面达到最先进性能，特别是在快速反应和长时域场景中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: HEX框架通过状态中心化设计、协调建模和高效时序处理，成功实现了稳定高效的全尺寸双足人形机器人协调操作，为高自由度人形控制提供了有效解决方案。

title: Demonstration of Pneuma-Seeker: Agentic System for Reifying and Fulfilling Information Needs on Tabular Data
summary: Data analysts working with relational data often start with vague or underspecified questions and refine them iteratively as they explore the data. To support this iterative process, we demonstrate Pneuma-Seeker, a system that reifies a user's information need as explicit, inspectable relational specifications, enabling iterative refinement of the information need, targeted data discovery, and provenance-aware execution. Through two real-world procurement use cases, we show how Pneuma-Seeker leverages LLMs as transparent, interactive analytical collaborators rather than opaque answer engines.

AI.tldr: Pneuma-Seeker系统将用户信息需求显式化为可检查的关系规范，支持迭代细化、针对性数据发现和溯源感知执行，利用LLM作为透明交互分析协作者而非黑盒答案引擎。
AI.motivation: 数据分析师在处理关系数据时通常从模糊或不完整的问题开始，需要迭代细化。现有工具缺乏对信息需求进行显式化、可检查规范的支持，无法有效支持迭代探索过程。
AI.method: 开发Pneuma-Seeker系统，将用户信息需求具体化为明确、可检查的关系规范。系统支持信息需求的迭代细化、针对性数据发现和溯源感知执行，利用LLM作为透明交互分析协作者。
AI.result: 通过两个实际采购用例展示了Pneuma-Seeker如何有效支持迭代数据探索过程，将LLM用作透明分析协作者而非黑盒答案引擎，提升了数据分析的交互性和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: Pneuma-Seeker通过将信息需求显式化为关系规范，为数据分析师提供了强大的迭代探索支持框架，展示了LLM作为透明分析协作者而非黑盒答案引擎的新应用范式。

title: Karma Mechanisms for Decentralised, Cooperative Multi Agent Path Finding
summary: Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) is a fundamental coordination problem in large-scale robotic and cyber-physical systems, where multiple agents must compute conflict-free trajectories with limited computational and communication resources. While centralised optimal solvers provide guarantees on solution optimality, their exponential computational complexity limits scalability to large-scale systems and real-time applicability. Existing decentralised heuristics are faster, but result in suboptimal outcomes and high cost disparities. This paper proposes a decentralised coordination framework for cooperative MAPF based on Karma mechanisms - artificial, non-tradeable credits that account for agents' past cooperative behaviour and regulate future conflict resolution decisions. The approach formulates conflict resolution as a bilateral negotiation process that enables agents to resolve conflicts through pairwise replanning while promoting long-term fairness under limited communication and without global priority structures. The mechanism is evaluated in a lifelong robotic warehouse multi-agent pickup-and-delivery scenario with kinematic orientation constraints. The results highlight that the Karma mechanism balances replanning effort across agents, reducing disparity in service times without sacrificing overall efficiency. Code: https://github.com/DerKevinRiehl/karma_dmapf

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Karma机制的去中心化多智能体路径规划框架，通过不可交易的信用点数记录智能体历史合作行为，调节未来冲突解决决策，在有限通信下实现公平协调。
AI.motivation: 集中式最优求解器虽然能保证解的最优性，但指数级计算复杂度限制了大规模系统的可扩展性和实时应用。现有的去中心化启发式方法虽然更快，但会导致次优结果和高成本差异。因此需要一种既能保持效率又能促进长期公平的去中心化协调框架。
AI.method: 提出基于Karma机制的去中心化协调框架，Karma是不可交易的人工信用点数，记录智能体历史合作行为。将冲突解决建模为双边协商过程，通过成对重规划解决冲突，在有限通信和无全局优先级结构下促进长期公平。在具有运动学方向约束的终身机器人仓库多智能体拾取-交付场景中实现。
AI.result: Karma机制能在智能体间平衡重规划工作量，减少服务时间差异，同时不牺牲整体效率。在终身机器人仓库场景中验证了该机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于Karma机制的去中心化协调框架为大规模多智能体路径规划提供了一种有效的解决方案，能够在有限通信资源下实现冲突解决，同时促进长期公平性，平衡了效率和公平性之间的权衡。

title: Nested Fourier-enhanced neural operator for efficient modeling of radiation transfer in fires
summary: Computational fluid dynamics (CFD) has become an essential tool for predicting fire behavior, yet maintaining both efficiency and accuracy remains challenging. A major source of computational cost in fire simulations is the modeling of radiation transfer, which is usually the dominant heat transfer mechanism in fires. Solving the high-dimensional radiative transfer equation (RTE) with traditional numerical methods can be a performance bottleneck. Here, we present a machine learning framework based on Fourier-enhanced multiple-input neural operators (Fourier-MIONet) as an efficient alternative to direct numerical integration of the RTE. We first investigate the performance of neural operator architectures for a small-scale 2D pool fire and find that Fourier-MIONet provides the most accurate radiative solution predictions. The approach is then extended to 3D CFD fire simulations, where the computational mesh is locally refined across multiple levels. In these high-resolution settings, monolithic surrogate models for direct field-to-field mapping become difficult to train and computationally inefficient. To address this issue, a nested Fourier-MIONet is proposed to predict radiation solutions across multiple mesh-refinement levels. We validate the approach on 3D McCaffrey pool fires simulated with FireFOAM, including fixed fire sizes and a unified model trained over a continuous range of heat release rates (HRRs). The proposed method achieves global relative errors of 2-4% for 3D varying-HRR scenarios while providing faster inference than the estimated cost of one finite-volume radiation solve in FireFOAM for the 16-solid-angle case. With fast and accurate inference, the surrogate makes higher-fidelity radiation treatments practical and enables the incorporation of more spectrally resolved radiation models into CFD fire simulations for engineering applications.

AI.tldr: 提出基于傅里叶增强多输入神经算子(Fourier-MIONet)的机器学习框架，替代传统辐射传输方程数值求解，提升火灾CFD模拟中辐射计算效率与精度
AI.motivation: 火灾CFD模拟中辐射传输计算是主要性能瓶颈，传统数值方法求解高维辐射传输方程计算成本高，需要更高效准确的替代方案
AI.method: 1) 在2D池火中测试神经算子架构，确定Fourier-MIONet最准确；2) 扩展到3D CFD火灾模拟，提出嵌套Fourier-MIONet处理多级网格细化；3) 在FireFOAM模拟的3D McCaffrey池火上验证，包括固定火源和连续热释放率范围训练的统一模型
AI.result: 1) 3D变HRR场景全局相对误差2-4%；2) 推理速度比FireFOAM中16立体角有限体积辐射求解估计成本更快；3) 使高保真辐射处理和光谱分辨辐射模型在工程应用中更实用
AI.conclusion: Fourier-MIONet框架为火灾CFD模拟中的辐射计算提供了高效准确的替代方案，通过快速准确推理使高保真辐射处理更实用，支持工程应用中更精细的辐射模型集成

title: Equifinality in Mixture of Experts: Routing Topology Does Not Determine Language Modeling Quality
summary: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures employ increasingly sophisticated routing mechanisms -- learned routers, multi-hop trajectories, token-dependent gating. We ask: does routing topology actually determine language modeling quality? We build a geometric MoE (ST-MoE) using cosine-similarity routing against learned centroids in a low-dimensional space ($d_{space} = 64$), requiring 80% fewer routing parameters than standard linear routers. Through 62 controlled experiments on WikiText-103 at 76--84M parameters trained to convergence (50K steps, 1.64B tokens), we find that routing topology does not determine asymptotic perplexity (PPL): five cosine-routing variants are statistically equivalent within a 1-PPL margin (Two One-Sided Tests [TOST], $p < 0.05$ for all 10 pairwise comparisons; 15 runs across 3 seeds, observed range 33.93--34.72). The finding extends to hash, random-fixed, and top-1 routing (single-seed; graceful 1.1--2.2 PPL degradation) and replicates on OpenWebText (0.03 PPL gap, 6 runs, 3 seeds each). A standard linear router with 5.3$\times$ more routing parameters reaches PPL 32.76, but iso-parameter cosine routing closes 67% of this gap -- the true mechanism advantage is $\sim$1.2%. The mechanistic explanation is convergent redundancy: multi-hop updates are collinear ($\cos(Δh_0, Δh_1) = 0.805$), implementing magnitude amplification rather than compositional reasoning; a single learnable scalar replicates multi-hop performance. As a practical payoff, zero-shot relative-norm halting saves 25% of MoE FLOPs at +0.12% PPL. Expert-level specialization and causal controllability -- which coexist with topology-level equifinality -- are explored in a companion paper.

AI.tldr: 研究发现路由拓扑结构并不决定语言建模的渐近困惑度，五种余弦路由变体在统计上等效，标准线性路由器的优势主要来自参数数量而非路由机制本身。
AI.motivation: 探究稀疏混合专家架构中路由拓扑结构是否真正决定语言建模质量，挑战当前越来越复杂的路由机制设计假设。
AI.method: 构建几何MoE（ST-MoE），使用余弦相似度路由在低维空间（d_space=64）中学习中心点，比标准线性路由器减少80%路由参数。通过62个对照实验，在WikiText-103上训练76-84M参数模型至收敛（50K步，1.64B tokens），比较不同路由变体。
AI.result: 路由拓扑不决定渐近困惑度：五种余弦路由变体在1-PPL范围内统计等效（TOST检验p<0.05）。该发现扩展到哈希、随机固定和top-1路由（单种子；1.1-2.2 PPL优雅退化），在OpenWebText上可复现（0.03 PPL差距）。标准线性路由器有5.3倍更多路由参数，但等参数余弦路由可缩小67%差距，机制优势仅约1.2%。
AI.conclusion: 路由机制存在收敛冗余：多跳更新是共线性的，实现幅度放大而非组合推理；单个可学习标量即可复制多跳性能。实际应用中，零样本相对范数停止可节省25% MoE FLOPs，仅增加0.12% PPL。专家级专业化和因果可控性与拓扑级等终性共存。

title: WorldMAP: Bootstrapping Vision-Language Navigation Trajectory Prediction with Generative World Models
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) and generative world models are opening new opportunities for embodied navigation. VLMs are increasingly used as direct planners or trajectory predictors, while world models support look-ahead reasoning by imagining future views. Yet predicting a reliable trajectory from a single egocentric observation remains challenging. Current VLMs often generate unstable trajectories, and world models, though able to synthesize plausible futures, do not directly provide the grounded signals needed for navigation learning. This raises a central question: how can generated futures be turned into supervision for grounded trajectory prediction? We present WorldMAP, a teacher--student framework that converts world-model-generated futures into persistent semantic-spatial structure and planning-derived supervision. Its world-model-driven teacher builds semantic-spatial memory from generated videos, grounds task-relevant targets and obstacles, and produces trajectory pseudo-labels through explicit planning. A lightweight student with a multi-hypothesis trajectory head is then trained to predict navigation trajectories directly from vision-language inputs. On Target-Bench, WorldMAP achieves the best ADE and FDE among compared methods, reducing ADE by 18.0% and FDE by 42.1% relative to the best competing baseline, while lifting a small open-source VLM to DTW performance competitive with proprietary models. More broadly, the results suggest that, in embodied navigation, the value of world models may lie less in supplying action-ready imagined evidence than in synthesizing structured supervision for navigation learning.

AI.tldr: WorldMAP：通过世界模型生成未来视频，构建语义空间记忆，为导航学习提供结构化监督的教师-学生框架
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型（VLMs）在导航轨迹预测中不稳定，而世界模型虽然能合成未来视图，但无法直接为导航学习提供接地气的监督信号。核心问题是如何将生成的未来转换为轨迹预测的监督信号。
AI.method: 提出WorldMAP教师-学生框架：教师端使用世界模型生成未来视频，构建持久性语义空间记忆，定位任务相关目标和障碍物，通过显式规划生成轨迹伪标签；学生端采用轻量级多假设轨迹头，直接从视觉语言输入预测导航轨迹。
AI.result: 在Target-Bench上，WorldMAP在ADE和FDE指标上均优于对比方法，ADE降低18.0%，FDE降低42.1%，并将小型开源VLM提升到与专有模型竞争的DTW性能。
AI.conclusion: 在具身导航中，世界模型的价值可能不在于提供可直接用于行动的想象证据，而在于为导航学习合成结构化监督信号。WorldMAP框架成功地将世界模型生成的未来转换为有效的导航学习监督。

title: DiPO: Disentangled Perplexity Policy Optimization for Fine-grained Exploration-Exploitation Trade-Off
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has catalyzed significant advances in the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, effectively managing the exploration and exploitation trade-off remains a critical challenge. In this paper, we fully analyze the exploration and exploitation dilemma of extremely hard and easy samples during the training and propose a new fine-grained trade-off mechanism. Concretely, we introduce a perplexity space disentangling strategy that divides the sample space into distinct exploration (high perplexity) and exploitation (low perplexity) subspaces, thereby mining fine-grained samples requiring exploration-exploitation trade-off. Subsequently, we propose a bidirectional reward allocation mechanism with a minimum impact on verification rewards to implement perplexity-guided exploration and exploitation, enabling more stable policy optimization. Finally, we have evaluated our method on two mainstream tasks: mathematical reasoning and function calling, and experimental results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method, confirming its effectiveness in enhancing LLM performance by fine-grained exploration-exploitation trade-off.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用于强化学习与可验证奖励（RLVR）的细粒度探索-利用权衡机制，通过困惑度空间解耦策略和双向奖励分配机制，在数学推理和函数调用任务上提升了LLM性能。
AI.motivation: 虽然RLVR显著提升了LLM的推理能力，但有效管理探索与利用的权衡仍然是一个关键挑战。特别是在训练过程中，极难和极易样本的探索-利用困境需要更精细的处理。
AI.method: 1. 困惑度空间解耦策略：将样本空间划分为高困惑度（探索）和低困惑度（利用）子空间，挖掘需要权衡的细粒度样本；2. 双向奖励分配机制：以最小化对验证奖励影响的方式实现困惑度引导的探索与利用，确保更稳定的策略优化。
AI.result: 在两个主流任务（数学推理和函数调用）上的实验结果表明，所提方法具有优越性，证实了通过细粒度探索-利用权衡能够有效提升LLM性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出的细粒度探索-利用权衡机制能够有效解决RLVR训练中的探索-利用困境，通过困惑度空间划分和双向奖励分配实现了更稳定的策略优化，为提升LLM推理能力提供了有效方法。

title: Incremental Residual Reinforcement Learning Toward Real-World Learning for Social Navigation
summary: As the demand for mobile robots continues to increase, social navigation has emerged as a critical task, driving active research into deep reinforcement learning (RL) approaches. However, because pedestrian dynamics and social conventions vary widely across different regions, simulations cannot easily encompass all possible real-world scenarios. Real-world RL, in which agents learn while operating directly in physical environments, presents a promising solution to this issue. Nevertheless, this approach faces significant challenges, particularly regarding constrained computational resources on edge devices and learning efficiency. In this study, we propose incremental residual RL (IRRL). This method integrates incremental learning, which is a lightweight process that operates without a replay buffer or batch updates, with residual RL, which enhances learning efficiency by training only on the residuals relative to a base policy. Through the simulation experiments, we demonstrated that, despite lacking a replay buffer, IRRL achieved performance comparable to those of conventional replay buffer-based methods and outperformed existing incremental learning approaches. Furthermore, the real-world experiments confirmed that IRRL can enable robots to effectively adapt to previously unseen environments through the real-world learning.

AI.tldr: 提出增量残差强化学习(IRRL)方法，结合增量学习和残差强化学习，解决移动机器人社会导航中计算资源受限和学习效率问题
AI.motivation: 移动机器人社会导航需求增长，但行人动态和社会规范存在地区差异，仿真难以覆盖所有真实场景。真实世界强化学习面临边缘设备计算资源受限和学习效率挑战
AI.method: 提出增量残差强化学习(IRRL)，整合增量学习（无需重放缓冲区或批量更新的轻量级过程）和残差强化学习（仅训练相对于基础策略的残差以提高学习效率）
AI.result: 仿真实验显示，尽管缺乏重放缓冲区，IRRL性能与基于重放缓冲区的传统方法相当，并优于现有增量学习方法。真实世界实验证实IRRL能使机器人通过真实世界学习有效适应未见环境
AI.conclusion: IRRL方法成功解决了移动机器人社会导航中真实世界强化学习面临的计算资源和学习效率问题，使机器人能够在边缘设备上有效适应新环境

title: MolCryst-MLIPs: A Machine-Learned Interatomic Potentials Database for Molecular Crystals
summary: We present an open Molecular Crystal (MC) database of Machine-Learned Interatomic Potentials (MLIP) called MolCryst-MLIPs. The first release comprises fine-tuned MACE models for nine molecular crystal systems -- Benzamide, Benzoic acid, Coumarin, Durene, Isonicotinamide, Niacinamide, Nicotinamide, Pyrazinamide, and Resorcinol -- developed using the Automated Machine Learning Pipeline (AMLP), which streamlines the entire MLIP development workflow, from reference data generation to model training and validation, into a reproducible and user-friendly pipeline. Models are fine-tuned from the MACE-MH-1 foundation model (omol head), yielding a mean energy MAE of 0.141 kJ/mol/atom and a mean force MAE of 0.648 kJ/mol/Angstrom across all systems. Dynamical stability and structural integrity, as assessed through energy conservation, P2 orientational order parameters, and radial distribution functions, are evaluated using molecular dynamics simulations. The released models and datasets constitute a growing open database of validated MLIPs, ready for production MD simulations of molecular crystal polymorphism under different thermodynamic conditions.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个名为MolCryst-MLIPs的开放分子晶体机器学习原子间势数据库，包含9个分子晶体系统的微调MACE模型，通过自动化机器学习流程构建，用于分子晶体多晶型模拟。
AI.motivation: 为分子晶体多晶型研究提供经过验证的、可直接用于生产级分子动力学模拟的机器学习原子间势数据库，解决传统力场精度不足和从头算方法计算成本高的问题。
AI.method: 采用自动化机器学习流程(AMLP)，从MACE-MH-1基础模型微调得到9个分子晶体系统的MACE模型，通过分子动力学模拟评估模型稳定性，包括能量守恒、P2取向序参数和径向分布函数分析。
AI.result: 所有系统的平均能量MAE为0.141 kJ/mol/atom，平均力MAE为0.648 kJ/mol/Å，模型表现出良好的动力学稳定性和结构完整性，可用于不同热力学条件下的分子晶体多晶型模拟。
AI.conclusion: MolCryst-MLIPs数据库提供了经过验证的、可直接用于生产级分子动力学模拟的机器学习原子间势，为分子晶体多晶型研究提供了可靠的计算工具，数据库将持续扩展。

title: On-Policy Distillation of Language Models for Autonomous Vehicle Motion Planning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have recently demonstrated strong potential for autonomous vehicle motion planning by reformulating trajectory prediction as a language generation problem. However, deploying capable LLMs in resource-constrained onboard systems remains a fundamental challenge. In this paper, we study how to effectively transfer motion planning knowledge from a large teacher LLM to a smaller, more deployable student model. We build on the GPT-Driver framework, which represents driving scenes as language prompts and generates waypoint trajectories with chain-of-thought reasoning, and investigate two student training paradigms: (i) on-policy generalized knowledge distillation (GKD), which trains the student on its own self-generated outputs using dense token-level feedback from the teacher, and (ii) a dense-feedback reinforcement learning (RL) baseline that uses the teacher's log-probabilities as per-token reward signals in a policy gradient framework. Experiments on the nuScenes benchmark show that GKD substantially outperforms the RL baseline and closely approaches teacher-level performance despite a 5$\times$ reduction in model size. These results highlight the practical value of on-policy distillation as a principled and effective approach to deploying LLM-based planners in autonomous driving systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于广义知识蒸馏（GKD）的方法，将大型语言模型在自动驾驶运动规划中的知识迁移到更小的可部署学生模型中，在模型尺寸减少5倍的情况下仍能接近教师模型性能。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在自动驾驶运动规划中表现出潜力，但将其部署到资源受限的车载系统面临挑战。需要将大型教师LLM的运动规划知识有效迁移到更小、更易部署的学生模型中。
AI.method: 基于GPT-Driver框架，将驾驶场景表示为语言提示，通过思维链推理生成轨迹点。研究两种学生训练范式：1) 基于策略的广义知识蒸馏（GKD），使用教师模型的密集token级反馈训练学生模型自身生成的输出；2) 密集反馈强化学习基线，将教师模型的log概率作为每token奖励信号用于策略梯度框架。
AI.result: 在nuScenes基准测试中，GKD显著优于RL基线，在模型尺寸减少5倍的情况下仍能接近教师模型性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 基于策略的知识蒸馏是一种原则性且有效的方法，可用于在自动驾驶系统中部署基于LLM的规划器，为资源受限环境下的LLM部署提供了实用解决方案。

title: RAGE-XY: RADAR-Aided Longitudinal and Lateral Forces Estimation For Autonomous Race Cars
summary: In this work, we present RAGE-XY, an extended version of RAGE, a real-time estimation framework that simultaneously infers vehicle velocity, tire slip angles, and the forces acting on the vehicle using only standard onboard sensors such as IMUs and RADARs. Compared to the original formulation, the proposed method incorporates an online RADAR calibration module, improving the accuracy of lateral velocity estimation in the presence of sensor misalignment. Furthermore, we extend the underlying vehicle model from a single-track approximation to a tricycle model, enabling the estimation of rear longitudinal tire forces in addition to lateral dynamics. We validate the proposed approach through both high-fidelity simulations and real-world experiments conducted on the EAV-24 autonomous race car, demonstrating improved accuracy and robustness in estimating both lateral and longitudinal vehicle dynamics.

AI.tldr: RAGE-XY扩展了RAGE实时估计框架，通过在线RADAR校准模块和三轮车模型改进车辆动力学估计，能同时估计车速、轮胎侧偏角和受力，仅使用标准车载传感器。
AI.motivation: 原始RAGE框架在传感器未对准时横向速度估计精度有限，且仅使用单轨模型限制了纵向力的估计能力。需要改进估计精度并扩展动力学覆盖范围。
AI.method: 1. 引入在线RADAR校准模块处理传感器未对准问题；2. 将车辆模型从单轨近似扩展到三轮车模型；3. 使用标准车载传感器（IMU和RADAR）实时估计车辆速度、轮胎侧偏角和受力。
AI.result: 通过高保真仿真和EAV-24自动驾驶赛车真实实验验证，在横向和纵向车辆动力学估计方面均表现出改进的精度和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: RAGE-XY框架通过在线传感器校准和扩展的车辆模型，显著提升了车辆动力学估计的准确性和鲁棒性，为自动驾驶系统提供了更可靠的实时状态估计。

title: Generating Concept Lexicalizations via Dictionary-Based Cross-Lingual Sense Projection
comment: To be published in the proceedings of Canadian AI 2026
summary: We study the task of automatically expanding WordNet-style lexical resources to new languages through sense generation. We generate senses by associating target-language lemmas with existing lexical concepts via semantic projection. Given a sense-tagged English corpus and its translation, our method projects English synsets onto aligned target-language tokens and assigns the corresponding lemmas to those synsets. To generate these alignments and ensure their quality, we augment a pre-trained base aligner with a bilingual dictionary, which is also used to filter out incorrect sense projections. We evaluate the method on multiple languages, comparing it to prior methods, as well as dictionary-based and large language model baselines. Results show that the proposed project-and-filter strategy improves precision while remaining interpretable and requiring few external resources. We plan to make our code, documentation, and generated sense inventories accessible.

AI.tldr: 通过语义投影自动扩展WordNet式词汇资源到新语言的方法，利用对齐的语料库将英语同义词集映射到目标语言词汇，并通过双语词典过滤确保质量
AI.motivation: 解决跨语言词汇资源扩展的自动化问题，特别是WordNet式词汇资源向新语言的扩展，减少人工标注成本
AI.method: 基于语义投影的方法：使用英语语料及其翻译，将英语同义词集投影到对齐的目标语言词汇上，通过双语词典增强预训练对齐器并过滤错误投影
AI.result: 在多种语言上评估显示，提出的投影-过滤策略提高了精度，同时保持可解释性且需要较少外部资源
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自动扩展跨语言词汇资源提供了有效解决方案，计划公开代码、文档和生成的词汇清单

title: The Sustainability Gap in Robotics: A Large-Scale Survey of Sustainability Awareness in 50,000 Research Articles
summary:
We present a large-scale survey of sustainability communication and motivation in robotics research. Our analysis covers nearly 50,000 open-access papers from arXiv's cs.RO category published between 2015 and early 2026. In this study, we quantify how often papers mention social, ecological, and sustainability impacts, and we analyse their alignment with the UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).
  The results reveal a persistent gap between the field's potential and its stated intent. While a large fraction of robotics papers can be mapped to SDG-relevant domains, explicit sustainability motivation remains remarkably low. Specifically, mentions of sustainability-related impacts are typically below 2%, explicit SDG references stay below 0.1%, and the proportion of sustainability-motivated papers remains below 5%. These trends suggest that while the field of robotics is advancing rapidly, sustainability is not yet a standard part of research framing.
  We conclude by proposing concrete actions for researchers, conferences, and institutions to close these awareness and motivation gaps, supporting a shift toward more intentional and responsible innovation.

AI.tldr: 对arXiv cs.RO类别近5万篇论文的大规模调查显示，机器人学研究中可持续性沟通和动机存在显著差距，尽管许多研究可映射到可持续发展目标相关领域，但明确提及可持续性影响的比例极低。
AI.motivation: 评估机器人学研究领域对可持续性问题的关注程度，量化研究论文中社会、生态和可持续性影响的提及频率，分析其与联合国可持续发展目标的对齐情况，揭示该领域潜在贡献与实际表述意图之间的差距。
AI.method: 对arXiv cs.RO类别2015年至2026年初发表的近50,000篇开放获取论文进行大规模文本分析，量化提及社会、生态和可持续性影响的频率，分析论文内容与联合国可持续发展目标的对齐情况。
AI.result: 研究显示机器人学领域存在显著的可持续性沟通差距：可持续性相关影响提及率通常低于2%，明确引用可持续发展目标的比例低于0.1%，可持续性动机驱动的论文比例低于5%。尽管大量机器人学论文可映射到可持续发展目标相关领域，但明确的可持续性动机表述仍然极低。
AI.conclusion: 机器人学领域虽然发展迅速，但可持续性尚未成为研究框架的标准组成部分。建议研究人员、会议和机构采取具体行动，缩小意识和动机差距，支持向更有意识和负责任的创新转变。

title: Evaluating Supervised Machine Learning Models: Principles, Pitfalls, and Metric Selection
summary: The evaluation of supervised machine learning models is a critical stage in the development of reliable predictive systems. Despite the widespread availability of machine learning libraries and automated workflows, model assessment is often reduced to the reporting of a small set of aggregate metrics, which can lead to misleading conclusions about real-world performance. This paper examines the principles, challenges, and practical considerations involved in evaluating supervised learning algorithms across classification and regression tasks. In particular, it discusses how evaluation outcomes are influenced by dataset characteristics, validation design, class imbalance, asymmetric error costs, and the choice of performance metrics. Through a series of controlled experimental scenarios using diverse benchmark datasets, the study highlights common pitfalls such as the accuracy paradox, data leakage, inappropriate metric selection, and overreliance on scalar summary measures. The paper also compares alternative validation strategies and emphasizes the importance of aligning model evaluation with the intended operational objective of the task. By presenting evaluation as a decision-oriented and context-dependent process, this work provides a structured foundation for selecting metrics and validation protocols that support statistically sound, robust, and trustworthy supervised machine learning systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨监督机器学习模型评估的原则、挑战和实践考虑，强调避免仅依赖少数聚合指标，需考虑数据集特性、验证设计、类别不平衡等因素，通过实验展示常见评估陷阱，并提出决策导向的评估框架。
AI.motivation: 尽管机器学习库和自动化流程广泛可用，模型评估常简化为报告少量聚合指标，这可能导致对真实世界性能的误导性结论。当前评估实践缺乏对数据集特性、验证设计、类别不平衡、非对称错误成本等关键因素的充分考虑。
AI.method: 通过使用多样化基准数据集进行一系列受控实验场景，分析评估结果如何受数据集特性、验证设计、类别不平衡、非对称错误成本和性能指标选择的影响。比较替代验证策略，强调模型评估与任务操作目标的对齐。
AI.result: 研究揭示了常见评估陷阱，如准确率悖论、数据泄露、不适当的指标选择以及过度依赖标量汇总度量。实验表明，仅依赖少数聚合指标可能导致对模型真实性能的误解，特别是在存在类别不平衡或非对称错误成本的情况下。
AI.conclusion: 模型评估应视为决策导向和上下文依赖的过程。论文提供了选择指标和验证协议的结构化基础，以支持统计上可靠、稳健且可信赖的监督机器学习系统。评估必须与任务的操作目标保持一致，而不仅仅是优化技术指标。

title: ParkSense: Where Should a Delivery Driver Park? Leveraging Idle AV Compute and Vision-Language Models
comment: 7 pages, 3 tables. No university resources were used for this work
summary: Finding parking consumes a disproportionate share of food delivery time, yet no system addresses precise parking-spot selection relative to merchant entrances. We propose ParkSense, a framework that repurposes idle compute during low-risk AV states -- queuing at red lights, traffic congestion, parking-lot crawl -- to run a Vision-Language Model (VLM) on pre-cached satellite and street view imagery, identifying entrances and legal parking zones. We formalize the Delivery-Aware Precision Parking (DAPP) problem, show that a quantized 7B VLM completes inference in 4-8 seconds on HW4-class hardware, and estimate annual per-driver income gains of 3,000-8,000 USD in the U.S. Five open research directions are identified at this unexplored intersection of autonomous driving, computer vision, and last-mile logistics.

AI.tldr: ParkSense利用自动驾驶车辆空闲计算资源运行视觉语言模型，通过卫星和街景图像识别商户入口和合法停车位，解决外卖配送中的精确停车问题
AI.motivation: 外卖配送中寻找停车位消耗了不成比例的时间，但目前没有系统能够根据商户入口位置精确选择停车位
AI.method: 提出ParkSense框架，在自动驾驶车辆低风险状态（如等红灯、交通拥堵、停车场慢行）时利用空闲计算资源，运行量化7B参数视觉语言模型处理预缓存的卫星和街景图像，识别商户入口和合法停车区域
AI.result: 量化7B VLM在HW4级硬件上4-8秒完成推理，在美国每年可为每位司机带来3,000-8,000美元的收入增长，并提出了五个开放研究方向
AI.conclusion: ParkSense展示了在自动驾驶、计算机视觉和最后一公里物流交叉领域的新研究方向，通过利用空闲计算资源解决精确停车问题，具有显著的经济效益

title: Drowsiness-Aware Adaptive Autonomous Braking System based on Deep Reinforcement Learning for Enhanced Road Safety
comment: 16 pages, 12 figures. Under review at IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Vehicles
summary: Driver drowsiness significantly impairs the ability to accurately judge safe braking distances and is estimated to contribute to 10%-20% of road accidents in Europe. Traditional driver-assistance systems lack adaptability to real-time physiological states such as drowsiness. This paper proposes a deep reinforcement learning-based autonomous braking system that integrates vehicle dynamics with driver physiological data.
