Drowsiness is detected from ECG signals using a Recurrent Neural Network (RNN), selected through an extensive benchmark analysis of 2-minute windows with varying segmentation and overlap configurations. The inferred drowsiness state is incorporated into the observable state space of a Double-Dueling Deep Q-Network (DQN) agent, where driver impairment is modeled as an action delay. The system is implemented and evaluated in a high-fidelity CARLA simulation environment. Experimental results show that the proposed agent achieves a 99.99% success rate in avoiding collisions under both drowsy and non-drowsy conditions. These findings demonstrate the effectiveness of physiology-aware control strategies for enhancing adaptive and intelligent driving safety systems.

AI.tldr: 提出基于深度强化学习的自主制动系统，整合车辆动力学与驾驶员生理数据，通过RNN检测ECG信号中的困倦状态，在CARLA仿真中实现99.99%的避撞成功率
AI.motivation: 驾驶员困倦会显著影响安全刹车距离判断，导致欧洲10%-20%的道路事故。传统驾驶辅助系统缺乏对困倦等实时生理状态的适应性，需要更智能的安全系统。
AI.method: 使用RNN从ECG信号检测困倦状态（基于2分钟窗口的基准分析），将困倦状态作为Double-Dueling DQN智能体的可观测状态空间，将驾驶员损伤建模为动作延迟，在CARLA高保真仿真环境中实现和评估。
AI.result: 在困倦和非困倦条件下，提出的智能体实现了99.99%的避撞成功率，证明了生理感知控制策略对增强自适应智能驾驶安全系统的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于深度强化学习的生理感知自主制动系统能有效整合驾驶员生理状态与车辆控制，显著提高驾驶安全性，为自适应智能驾驶系统提供了新方向。

title: Harnessing Embodied Agents: Runtime Governance for Policy-Constrained Execution
summary:
Embodied agents are evolving from passive reasoning systems into active executors that interact with tools, robots, and physical environments. Once granted execution authority, the central challenge becomes how to keep actions governable at runtime. Existing approaches embed safety and recovery logic inside the agent loop, making execution control difficult to standardize, audit, and adapt.
  This paper argues that embodied intelligence requires not only stronger agents, but stronger runtime governance. We propose a framework for policy-constrained execution that separates agent cognition from execution oversight. Governance is externalized into a dedicated runtime layer performing policy checking, capability admission, execution monitoring, rollback handling, and human override.
  We formalize the control boundary among the embodied agent, Embodied Capability Modules (ECMs), and runtime governance layer, and validate through 1000 randomized simulation trials across three governance dimensions. Results show 96.2% interception of unauthorized actions, reduction of unsafe continuation from 100% to 22.2% under runtime drift, and 91.4% recovery success with full policy compliance, substantially outperforming all baselines (p<0.001). By reframing runtime governance as a first-class systems problem, this paper positions policy-constrained execution as a key design principle for embodied agent systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一个用于具身智能体的策略约束执行框架，将认知与执行监管分离，通过外部化运行时治理层实现动作控制、能力准入、执行监控、回滚处理和人工干预。
AI.motivation: 随着具身智能体从被动推理系统演变为与工具、机器人和物理环境交互的主动执行器，一旦授予执行权限，核心挑战就变成了如何在运行时保持动作的可治理性。现有方法将安全和恢复逻辑嵌入到智能体循环内部，使得执行控制难以标准化、审计和适应。
AI.method: 提出策略约束执行框架，将智能体认知与执行监管分离。治理被外部化为专门的运行时层，执行策略检查、能力准入、执行监控、回滚处理和人工干预。形式化了具身智能体、具身能力模块和运行时治理层之间的控制边界。
AI.result: 通过1000个随机模拟试验在三个治理维度上进行验证：结果显示96.2%的未授权动作被拦截；在运行时漂移下，不安全持续率从100%降至22.2%；91.4%的恢复成功率且完全符合策略要求，显著优于所有基线（p<0.001）。
AI.conclusion: 通过将运行时治理重构为一类系统问题，本文定位策略约束执行为具身智能体系统的关键设计原则，强调不仅需要更强的智能体，还需要更强的运行时治理。

title: Learning Without Losing Identity: Capability Evolution for Embodied Agents
summary: Embodied agents are expected to operate persistently in dynamic physical environments, continuously acquiring new capabilities over time. Existing approaches to improving agent performance often rely on modifying the agent itself -- through prompt engineering, policy updates, or structural redesign -- leading to instability and loss of identity in long-lived systems. In this work, we propose a capability-centric evolution paradigm for embodied agents. We argue that a robot should maintain a persistent agent as its cognitive identity, while enabling continuous improvement through the evolution of its capabilities. Specifically, we introduce the concept of Embodied Capability Modules (ECMs), which represent modular, versioned units of embodied functionality that can be learned, refined, and composed over time. We present a unified framework in which capability evolution is decoupled from agent identity. Capabilities evolve through a closed-loop process involving task execution, experience collection, model refinement, and module updating, while all executions are governed by a runtime layer that enforces safety and policy constraints. We demonstrate through simulated embodied tasks that capability evolution improves task success rates from 32.4% to 91.3% over 20 iterations, outperforming both agent-modification baselines and established skill-learning methods (SPiRL, SkiMo), while preserving zero policy drift and zero safety violations. Our results suggest that separating agent identity from capability evolution provides a scalable and safe foundation for long-term embodied intelligence.

AI.tldr: 提出能力中心演化范式，将具身智能体的身份与能力演化分离，通过模块化、版本化的具身能力模块实现持续改进，同时保持智能体认知身份稳定。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过修改智能体本身（提示工程、策略更新或结构重设计）来提升性能，导致长寿命系统不稳定和身份丢失。需要一种既能持续改进又能保持智能体认知身份的方法。
AI.method: 引入具身能力模块概念，作为模块化、版本化的功能单元。提出统一框架，将能力演化与智能体身份解耦。能力通过任务执行、经验收集、模型精炼和模块更新的闭环过程演化，所有执行由运行时层管理以确保安全和策略约束。
AI.result: 在模拟具身任务中，能力演化在20次迭代后将任务成功率从32.4%提升至91.3%，优于智能体修改基线和现有技能学习方法（SPiRL、SkiMo），同时保持零策略漂移和零安全违规。
AI.conclusion: 将智能体身份与能力演化分离为长期具身智能提供了可扩展且安全的基础，使智能体能在保持认知身份的同时持续改进能力。

title: Gradient Descent's Last Iterate is Often (slightly) Suboptimal
summary: We consider the well-studied setting of minimizing a convex Lipschitz function using either gradient descent (GD) or its stochastic variant (SGD), and examine the last iterate convergence. By now, it is known that standard stepsize choices lead to a last iterate convergence rate of $\log T/\sqrt{T}$ after $T$ steps. A breakthrough result of Jain et al. [2019] recovered the optimal $1/\sqrt{T}$ rate by constructing a non-standard stepsize sequence. However, this sequence requires choosing $T$ in advance, as opposed to common stepsize schedules which apply for any time horizon. Moreover, Jain et al. conjectured that without prior knowledge of $T$, no stepsize sequence can ensure the optimal error for SGD's last iterate, a claim which so far remained unproven. We prove this conjecture, and in fact show that even in the noiseless case of GD, it is impossible to avoid an excess poly-log factor in $T$ when considering an anytime last iterate guarantee. Our proof further suggests that such (slightly) suboptimal stopping times are unavoidably common.

AI.tldr: 该论文证明了在凸Lipschitz函数优化中，对于梯度下降（GD）和随机梯度下降（SGD）的最后迭代点收敛，如果不预先知道总迭代次数T，则无法避免额外的poly-log因子，即无法达到最优的1/√T收敛率。
AI.motivation: 研究凸Lipschitz函数优化中梯度下降和随机梯度下降的最后迭代点收敛问题。Jain等人(2019)虽然通过构造非标准步长序列达到了最优的1/√T收敛率，但该序列需要预先知道总迭代次数T。作者旨在证明：如果没有T的先验知识，任何步长序列都无法确保SGD最后迭代点的最优误差，这一猜想此前未被证明。
AI.method: 通过理论证明的方法，建立了在不知道总迭代次数T的情况下，梯度下降和随机梯度下降最后迭代点收敛的下界。证明表明，即使在没有噪声的梯度下降情况下，也无法避免额外的poly-log因子。
AI.result: 证明了Jain等人的猜想：如果没有总迭代次数T的先验知识，任何步长序列都无法确保SGD最后迭代点的最优1/√T收敛率。即使在无噪声的梯度下降情况下，任何时间（anytime）的最后迭代保证也无法避免额外的poly-log因子。证明还表明这种（略微）次优的停止时间是不可避免的普遍现象。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为凸优化中最后迭代点收敛的理论理解提供了重要贡献，证明了在没有总迭代次数先验知识的情况下，达到最优收敛率在理论上是不可能的。这一结果对实际优化算法的设计和理论分析具有指导意义，表明略微次优的停止时间在实际应用中可能是不可避免的。

title: RoboAgent: Chaining Basic Capabilities for Embodied Task Planning
summary: This paper focuses on embodied task planning, where an agent acquires visual observations from the environment and executes atomic actions to accomplish a given task. Although recent Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved impressive results in multimodal understanding and reasoning, their performance remains limited when applied to embodied planning that involves multi-turn interaction, long-horizon reasoning, and extended context analysis. To bridge this gap, we propose RoboAgent, a capability-driven planning pipeline in which the model actively invokes different sub-capabilities. Each capability maintains its own context, and produces intermediate reasoning results or interacts with the environment according to the query given by a scheduler. This framework decomposes complex planning into a sequence of basic vision-language problems that VLMs can better address, enabling a more transparent and controllable reasoning process. The scheduler and all capabilities are implemented with a single VLM, without relying on external tools. To train this VLM, we adopt a multi-stage paradigm that consists of: (1) behavior cloning with expert plans, (2) DAgger training using trajectories collected by the model, and (3) reinforcement learning guided by an expert policy. Across these stages, we exploit the internal information of the environment simulator to construct high-quality supervision for each capability, and we further introduce augmented and synthetic data to enhance the model's performance in more diverse scenarios. Extensive experiments on widely used embodied task planning benchmarks validate the effectiveness of the proposed approach. Our codes will be available at https://github.com/woyut/RoboAgent_CVPR26.

AI.tldr: RoboAgent：一个能力驱动的具身任务规划框架，通过调度器调用不同子能力，将复杂规划分解为VLM能更好处理的基础视觉语言问题，实现更透明可控的推理过程。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉语言模型在多模态理解和推理方面取得显著进展，但在涉及多轮交互、长时程推理和扩展上下文分析的具身任务规划中表现仍有限，需要更有效的规划方法。
AI.method: 提出RoboAgent能力驱动规划管道：调度器调用不同子能力，每个能力维护自身上下文，产生中间推理结果或与环境交互；采用多阶段训练范式：专家计划行为克隆、模型轨迹DAgger训练、专家策略指导的强化学习；利用环境模拟器内部信息构建高质量监督，引入增强和合成数据。
AI.result: 在广泛使用的具身任务规划基准测试中进行了大量实验，验证了所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: RoboAgent通过能力驱动框架将复杂规划分解为VLM能更好处理的基础问题，实现了更透明可控的推理过程，为具身任务规划提供了有效解决方案。

title: Simulation-Based Optimisation of Batting Order and Bowling Plans in T20 Cricket
comment: Improved abstract wording and readability; minor textual edits, no change to methodology or results. Submitted to the Journal of Quantitative Analysis in Sports (JQAS), April 2026. 23 pages, 8 figures
summary: This paper develops a unified Markov Decision Process (MDP) framework for optimising two recurring in-match decisions in T20 cricket, namely batting order selection and bowling plan assignment, directly in terms of win and defend probability rather than expected runs. A three-phase player profile engine (Powerplay, Middle, Death) with James-Stein shrinkage (a technique that blends a player's individual statistics toward the league average when their phase-specific data is sparse) is estimated from 1,161 IPL ball-by-ball records (2008-2025). Win/defend probabilities are evaluated using vectorised Monte Carlo simulation over N = 50,000 innings trajectories. Batting orders are evaluated by comparing all feasible arrangements of the remaining players and selecting the one that maximises win probability. Bowling plans are optimised through a guided search over possible over assignments, progressively improving the allocation while respecting constraints such as the prohibition on consecutive overs by the same bowler. Applied to two 2026 IPL matches, the optimal batting order improves Mumbai Indians' win probability by 4.1 percentage points (52.4% to 56.5%), and the optimal Gujarat Titans bowling plan improves defend probability by 5.2 percentage points (39.1% to 44.3%). In both cases, the observed sub-optimality is consistent with phase-agnostic deployment: decisions that appear reasonable under aggregate metrics are shown to be costly when phase-specific profiles are applied.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个统一的MDP框架，用于优化T20板球比赛中的击球顺序选择和投球计划分配，直接基于获胜/防守概率而非期望得分，通过三阶段球员档案引擎和向量化蒙特卡洛模拟实现优化。
AI.motivation: 传统板球决策通常基于期望得分等聚合指标，但实际比赛中获胜概率和防守概率才是关键。现有方法缺乏对比赛阶段特异性（Powerplay、Middle、Death）的考虑，且球员在特定阶段的数据稀疏性导致统计估计不准确。需要开发一个能够直接优化获胜/防守概率，并考虑阶段特异性球员表现的统一框架。
AI.method: 1. 建立统一的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）框架，将击球顺序选择和投球计划分配建模为优化问题；2. 开发三阶段球员档案引擎（Powerplay、Middle、Death），使用James-Stein收缩法处理数据稀疏问题，基于1,161个IPL球对球记录（2008-2025）估计球员表现；3. 使用向量化蒙特卡洛模拟（N=50,000次局轨迹）评估获胜/防守概率；4. 击球顺序优化：比较剩余球员的所有可行排列，选择最大化获胜概率的排列；5. 投球计划优化：通过引导搜索可能的轮次分配，在尊重约束（如同一个投球手不能连续投球）的情况下逐步改进分配。
AI.result: 应用于2026年IPL两场比赛：1. 最优击球顺序使孟买印度人队的获胜概率提高4.1个百分点（从52.4%到56.5%）；2. 最优古吉拉特泰坦队投球计划使防守概率提高5.2个百分点（从39.1%到44.3%）。两种情况下的次优决策都与阶段无关的部署一致：在聚合指标下看似合理的决策，在应用阶段特异性档案时被证明是代价高昂的。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明，通过考虑比赛阶段特异性的球员表现并直接优化获胜/防守概率，可以显著改进T20板球的战术决策。James-Stein收缩法有效处理了数据稀疏问题，而向量化蒙特卡洛模拟提供了高效的概率评估。框架的实际应用显示了显著的改进空间，表明传统基于聚合指标的决策方法存在系统性缺陷。

title: SparseBalance: Load-Balanced Long Context Training with Dynamic Sparse Attention
summary: While sparse attention mitigates the computational bottleneck of long-context LLM training, its distributed training process exhibits extreme heterogeneity in both \textit{1)} sequence length and \textit{2)} sparsity sensitivity, leading to a severe imbalance problem and sub-optimal model accuracy. Existing algorithms and training frameworks typically focus on single issue, failing to systematically co-optimize these two problems. Therefore, we propose SparseBalance, a novel algorithm-system co-design framework, which exploits the sparsity and sequence heterogeneity to optimize model accuracy and system efficiency jointly. First, we propose workload-aware dynamic sparsity tuning, which employs a bidirectional sparsity adjustment to eliminate stragglers and exploit inherent bubbles for free accuracy. Second, we propose a sparsity-aware batching strategy to achieve coarse-grained balance, which complements dynamic sparsity tuning. Experimental results demonstrate that SparseBalance achieves up to a 1.33$\times$ end-to-end speedup while still improving the long-context capability by 0.46\% on the LongBench benchmark.

AI.tldr: SparseBalance：一种算法-系统协同设计框架，通过动态稀疏度调整和稀疏感知批处理策略，解决长上下文LLM训练中序列长度和稀疏敏感性的异构性问题，提升模型精度和系统效率。
AI.motivation: 稀疏注意力机制虽然缓解了长上下文LLM训练的计算瓶颈，但其分布式训练过程存在序列长度和稀疏敏感性的极端异构性，导致严重的负载不平衡问题和次优的模型精度。现有算法和训练框架通常只关注单一问题，未能系统性地协同优化这两个问题。
AI.method: 提出SparseBalance框架，包含两个核心技术：1）工作负载感知的动态稀疏度调整，采用双向稀疏度调整消除拖尾任务并利用固有气泡实现免费精度提升；2）稀疏感知的批处理策略，实现粗粒度负载平衡，与动态稀疏度调整形成互补。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，SparseBalance在LongBench基准测试上实现了最高1.33倍的端到端加速，同时将长上下文能力提升了0.46%。
AI.conclusion: SparseBalance通过算法-系统协同设计，有效解决了长上下文LLM训练中的异构性问题，在提升系统效率的同时改善了模型精度，为稀疏注意力机制的分布式训练提供了系统化解决方案。
